plumbers.name: Four Seasons Heating, Air Conditioning, Plumbing, & Electric
plumbers.address: 5701 W 73rd St, Chicago, IL 60638, USA

reviews.author: Ivan Tejeda
reviews.text:
‬ I spoke with several HVAC companies before choosing Four Seasons, and the difference was clear.

Some proposals recommended boilers in the 120,000–150,000 BTU range for my townhouse with only 90 feet of baseboard — and at significantly higher prices. In contrast, Keith Williams took the time to explain the heating load, why proper sizing matters, and the technical reasoning behind his recommendation. It felt like true consulting rather than a sales pitch. His professionalism and patience gave me confidence that the decision was grounded in sound engineering.

The installation team — Adan Ruiz and Edgar — were outstanding. They were organized, precise, and extremely detail-oriented. They flushed the system, verified pressures, tested every baseboard, and made sure everything was fully operational before leaving. A supervisor stopped by during the installation to review the work, and customer support followed up to schedule a quality audit — impressive quality control.

From the initial quote through contract and payment, the entire process was clear, structured, and professional.

Four Seasons stood out not just on price, but on competence, transparency, and execution. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Sheri Theakston
reviews.text:
I could write a novel, in fact I did as I kept notes of daily events so I'll summarize: Paid for new furnace/home humidifier/ACNegatives:
1) install was suppose to take 1.5 days, it's been 8 days and it's not done yet. No AC or home humidifier installed yet either.
2) first installers didn't install right-claimed new furnace needed a new heating element
3) techs that tried installing new heating element still wired wrong and blew my breaker and melted wires inside the new furnace, scortch marks in a few places on my breaker box, smoke, almost setting my home on fire.
4) Blowing up the breakers left me with no water for 1 night & 1 day bc my well pump, hot water heater and softener were among other things in the same breaker box
5) The internal communication is astonishingly terrible, techs didn't know what other techs did or were suppose to be doing.  Calls not returned, appointments got mis-scheduled or not scheduled at all, parts didn't get ordered like they were supposed to, electricians didn't get ordered/unable to come out when they were suppose to leaving me with a broken unusable furnace for another full day/night (freezing temps)
6) The electrician acted like it was an inconvenience to him to come and do a safety check on my breaker box, he was in a rush and a little rude.
7) I've had multiple people to my house every day for a week, only a couple showed up on time. The rest arrived 30min- over an hour past the 4 hour window. I understand things can go wrong and they are often behind but a courtesy call to let you know they are running late would be appreciated, I wasted A LOT of time for 7 days in a row (minus Sunday) waiting on them.
8) By the time this is all said and done (supposedly after 10 days and that's IF everything goes as planned), I'll have an *old* new furnace with all *new* parts instead of a brand new furnace that should have worked from the very beginning.
9) Nest thermostat was installed poorly.
10) My electric bill is going to be outrageous with my 2nd furnace working more than double time and having to use space heaters on the very cold upper level/main living area of our home.
My trust in this company is seriously lacking.  Use extreme caution before choosing this company.  I was misled so hopefully you won't be.
Positives:
1) The senior tech that finally knew what he was doing- He went out of his way to make sure the furnace was at least somewhat working until new parts could arrive and he was able to get me my water back when the previous tech couldn't do it and no one from customer service or dispatch seemed to be of any help getting me someone out to my home ASAP.  I had to keep hounding them and I hate hounding people.  This senior tech was very knowledgeable and was genuinely concerned for my family's safety and gladly volunteered to do the rest of the install for me when the parts arrive. 10 people from this company have been to my  home for this installation (which as a reminder is not even done yet).  Out of those 10 people, the senior tech is the only one that's made progress and I am grateful for his knowledge, work ethic, and compassion.  Freezing temperatures outside, this experience was a nightmare.  I regret my decision to use this company for my heating and cooling needs.

reviews.author: Lenore Walton
reviews.text: I had an incredible experience with Lisa and Justin, the installers from four seasons. They were very respectful, professional and was perfectly prepared.. She was very knowledgeable and made me feel that my needs were important and met. I truly appreciate the work that she did. And I also like to add she cleaned up behind herself. She did a very good job. I am so proud thank you Lisa.

reviews.author: Sean Brice
reviews.text: While the price seemed a bit high relative to what we later saw with research (we didn’t have the luxury of time to get multiple quotes bc our heat was out in winter), the work itself was done with a high attention to detail and professionalism. The installers were courteous of our home, suggested alternative ideal ways and locations for hooking everything up, did a great job cleaning up when finished, and walked us through proper usage and maintenance. We had a new furnace, chimney exhaust duct, and AC installed and had our all-house humidifier re-installed and the team were here for about 12 hours in total. Would likely use again in the future.

reviews.author: Diahann Goode
reviews.text: Kevin and staff did a great job on the install of a new boiler. I will request them again. They communicated well, were on time, and cleaned up after the install.

plumbers.name: Any Hour Services - Electric, Plumbing, Heating & Air
plumbers.address: 1374 130 S, Orem, UT 84058, USA

reviews.author: Jerome
reviews.text: Any Hour Services has been great and dependable. Especially during high stress times. We initially had Carlos come and snake our drains. They couldnt get through which meant our line was broken. He took us through each step to show us what was wrong. He called for a camera technician to come and see. Todd came and was a great help in showing us how the line was broken. He helped us through the process and scheduling to get the line repaired. On the day of work, James Murano came and began his work. He had an amazing crew! He worked with Arturo, Aguado, Jose Corona, Juan Carmona. The main crew who helped on the entire project which unavoidably lasted 3 days was Beto, Levy Herrera, Steve Decol, and Dan. These guys were such an amazing crew. I cannot express the lengths they took to ensure we had a serviceable system. They worked through some unknown issues that made their work take longer. I am extremely grateful for Any Hour Services for helping us in this difficult situation.

reviews.author: Todd Ward
reviews.text: Sherri came out today to snake our kitchen line. She was super friendly and professional. She quickly took care of the issue. I would recommend her to anyone!!

reviews.author: Samantha Richens
reviews.text: Mark was amazing! He explained everything thoroughly and was very respectful of our home. He went above and beyond; double checking specific details to make sure we got the right product that would last and work best for us. He filled up our new water softener with salt. He even fixed a loose handle he came across 😄 Mark was fun to talk with and very personable. By the end he felt like a family friend!

reviews.author: Kevin Bacon
reviews.text: Needed help with a clogged bathroom sink and a smelling kitchen sink. Sherri was amazing. Prompt, friendly, and educational! Went above and beyond to ensure that not only were our sink issues handled, but also helped us schedule our FREE furnace check up. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.author: Siva K
reviews.text:
I recently had a new range hood vent installed by Any Hour Services, and I’m very pleased with the experience. The technicians, Presley B. and Corry T., were professional, knowledgeable, and courteous throughout the process. They arrived on time, walked me through every detail of the installation, and made sure I understood the setup and what to expect.

They completed the work neatly and carefully, taking the time to ensure everything was properly sealed and aligned. While the vent can’t be fully tested until the new hood is installed, the overall workmanship and attention to detail give me full confidence that everything was done right.

I really appreciate the professionalism and quality service from Presley and Corry — I’d definitely recommend Any Hour Services for anyone looking for reliable home installation work.

plumbers.name: Baker Brothers Plumbing, Air & Electric
plumbers.address: 2615 Big Town Blvd, Mesquite, TX 75150, USA

reviews.author: Greg Sholly
reviews.text: Caleb and his assistant arrived just after 12:30 pm, removed and replaced, 2, upstairs, gas water heaters and were on their way just before 3 pm. Prior to work, they put down tarps to protect the floors and cleaned up well after completing the job. When I commented on how quickly and efficiently they competed their work, Caleb informed me they have multiple water heater teams who only install water heaters. While some companies may prefer the Jack of All Trades approach, in this case, the Master of ONE seems to be working out fine for Baker Brothers and their clients.

reviews.author: john aparicio
reviews.text: Baker Brothers was great! They came in and helped us repair and service some much needed plumbing and AC tune up needs. Alberto and Kelvin were very professional and respectful. Alberto found some issues with the AC and explained everything easily for us to understand and the repair price was very fair. Kelvin was also amazing on the kitchen sink, garbage disposal and toilet repairs/replacements. We are so happy with our new porcelain thrones and the garbage disposal works great! We even purchased the family plan which is a great buy as it pays for itself for major repairs and replacements like we had. Thank you Baker Brothers! 😊

reviews.author: Denise Graham
reviews.text:
Baker Bros did a fantastic job removing, sanitizing and replacing insulation in our attic. Renee and his crew were timely, courteous and very professional in their work.
Amazing job, thank you so very much. We have always received the best service from Baker Bros when we need them. Totally reliable company … thank you!

reviews.author: peggy dunlap
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Baker Brothers Plumbing, Electric & HVAC. The technician was exceptionally nice and very pleasant to work with. He seemed knowledgeable I had a great experience with Baker Brothers Plumbing, Electric & HVAC. The technician was exceptionally nice and very pleasant to work with. He seemed knowledgeable and qualified, and he clearly explained what needed to be done. I especially appreciated that he told me the cost before starting the work, so there were no surprises. The job was completed in a reasonable amount of time, and everything went smoothly. Overall, a very positive experience and I would definitely recommend them. what needed to be done. I especially appreciated that he told me the cost before starting the work, so there were no surprises. The job was completed in a reasonable amount of time, and everything went smoothly. Overall, a very positive experience and I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Jeremy Dungan
reviews.text: Brandon Romero, showed up to the house and quickly diagnosed my furnace issues. He was extremely professional and even made a great small talk with me. I was a bit apprehensive going with a large company however he won me over with his professionalism and detail to his findings. He’s the only tech I want on my property moving forward.

plumbers.name: ABC Plumbing, Sewer, Heating, Cooling & Electric
plumbers.address: 220 W Campus Dr, Arlington Heights, IL 60004, USA

reviews.author: Misha Pendersen
reviews.text:
Edgar Rodriguez was a phenomenal representative of the company. He was professional, respectful, friendly, and knowledgeable. We also received a free total house inspection for all our plumbing and heating.

Greg Skalski and Pedro Olascoaga installed my new toilet and upgraded the main valve in my powder room. They, too, were professional, courteous, knowledgeable,
and expedient.

I highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Scott Norman
reviews.text: Very professional and courteous. Did an amazing job with my project. He and his colleague came back early the next day and stayed 12 hours to make sure everything worked. Clean up was amazing. Highly recommend David for electrical needs. Super friendly and great attention to detail. 5 stars for ABC Electric. Will use again. If you get their AI system just follow the prompts, they will call you back quickly. Happy customer!

reviews.author: Samall Hazziez
reviews.text:
This is ‘Part 2’ from my August 16th post:  The ‘Actual Install’

If I attempt to communicate my satisfaction with the work, craftsmanship, and professionalism of Esteban and his partner Tyler, it would be an outright ‘INSULT’…!  These guys were (are), simply the best of the ‘BEST’…End-to-End they were focused and meticulous with their work and ‘QUALITY’ checks…WOW, I AM SO PLEASED WITH MY SYSTEM…!

The actual install/equipment removal was a site to see…’It was like Esteban/Tyler, were building a ‘CASTLE’…It was like they were handling ‘PRECIOUS CARGO’…. Layer, upon Layer…The discipline, the order, the patience (with my questions), their attentiveness to keeping the work area safe and clean.  When it came down to the ‘Verification & Validation’ activities for the system (Testing/Quality Checks), they left ‘ABSOLUTELY NO STONE UN-TURNED’…!

It has been a long, long, LOOONNNGGG-TIME, sense I (my family) was on the receiving end of excellent service and a quality assured, quality driven product solution.  I and my family are eternally grateful for what the ABC corporation has/is investing in their team[s].

From the point of my initial consult and problem eval/assessment with Bob and Tony, through the path of installation/solution validation (testing) with Esteban and Tyler, these guys were absolute champions.  Every home/business should (must) have at their fingertips a master HVAC point of contact.  I recommend (without giving it a second thought), the ABC Team.

I’m not ashamed to admit that I am (at times), a selfish man.  Esteban and Tyler had me believing that I had my own dedicated (quasi) service enablement team.  With that said, Bob M., I will be contacting you ASAP, for my next project/my next consult…’CONSIDER IT DONE’

reviews.author: Muminah Muhammad
reviews.text:
We are members of ABC and having a membership has its perks.  Our appointment had to be rescheduled twice due to dire emergencies and scheduling conflicts.

The third appointment ABC scheduled Mr. Darrell Bell, the Drain Technician to come out and inspect our drainage issue.  Mr. Bell was very professional, he introduced himself, listen to our issue and concerns, provided quality service and gave us the best solution going forward.

We were very impressed that he didn’t make a mess and cleaned up very well when the job was completed.

Well as they say, “the third time’s a charm”.  We are very satisfied with Mr. Bell’s service!

~The Muhammad Family

reviews.author: Sara Qawwas
reviews.text:
Jose was a great tech helping me with moving and putting back the radiators in my home for some restoration work being done. He was very attentive to details and worked extra time to make sure it was all done properly.

My 5 star review is mostly for him. Pricing wise I think they over charge quite a bit but I'm happy with the outcome of the work itself!

plumbers.name: Tom Drexler Plumbing, Air & Electric
plumbers.address: 3718 Bardstown Rd, Louisville, KY 40218, USA

reviews.author: Sarah Word
reviews.text: We hired Tom Drexler to enlarge our small shower Which consisted of demolition, removing a wall, moving the plumbing , rebuilding the wall and installing the shower surround . I will give them a pass on the fact that they did nothing to protect my home from the dust that was created during their demolition as due to other circumstances, my house was not pristinely clean when they arrived. I will give them a pass on the poor workmanship shown in the drywall, exposed screws, size discrepancy of the new wall,  and poorly cut molding that they just reused - as I assume they are plumbers and not drywall experts.  But when I finally got into the shower to use the water, hot was cold and cold was hot -  I would assume that plumbers would  hook up the water correctly.   And while the finished shower is a significant improvement over the shower we had, I do have some concern for the workmanship I can’t see as the workmanship I can see is far less than expected

reviews.author: Travus Brandon
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with Corey from Tom Drexler. From the moment he arrived, he was professional, friendly, and took the time to listen to my concerns. He explained everything clearly and made sure I understood my options before starting any work.

Corey was very thorough in diagnosing the issue and made sure the job was done right the first time. He worked efficiently, kept the area clean, and showed real pride in his work. He also took the time to give me helpful information about their membership program and how it can help with maintenance and savings, which I really appreciated.

Thanks to Corey, everything was fixed quickly and professionally. He is a true asset to Tom Drexler, and I would highly recommend him to anyone looking for reliable and trustworthy service. I will definitely request him again.

reviews.author: Paul Pearson
reviews.text:
Both Chad and Terrence were courteous and professional on this job. I am completely satisfied with the results.
I have both a clogged sewer line and it turns out a leak from the water meter into the house and this was fixed in short order. I would recommend Tom Drexel to anyone for plumbing problems.

reviews.author: Glenn Zwanzig
reviews.text: The plumber, Michael, was incredible. He walked me through the entire process as he was working. He alerted me to possible future problems an how to avoid them. He was incredible guy. I am thrilled with his work. I would definitely want him back for anything that could happen in the future. Thank you Tom Drexler Plumbing. I expected to have to pay a lot more than what I was charged!

reviews.author: Paras Patel
reviews.text: Highly professional and they know what they are doing. Always willing to explain the steps throughout the installation. Mike Garcia and his team did an amazing job installing our Kohler whole home generator. Definitely recommending for all home generator installations.

plumbers.name: Eco Plumbers, Electricians, and HVAC Technicians
plumbers.address: 4691 Northwest Pkwy, Hilliard, OH 43026, USA

reviews.author: Daniel
reviews.text:
I recently hired Eco Plumbers and felt that I paid a higher-than-average price with the expectation of receiving higher-quality work. Unfortunately, my experience didn’t match that expectation. Instead of removing the old piping and installing new lines to properly fit the new water heater, the technician retrofitted everything onto the existing setup, which led to work that didn’t look as clean or well-planned as I had hoped.

A few weeks later, I noticed my wood trim was warm to the touch because the water heater had been placed directly against the wall. When I requested a follow-up visit, the technician was argumentative about repositioning it. I even shared photos of a neighbor’s nearly identical layout where the heater fit properly, but the technician still pushed back. He eventually adjusted the unit by draining it and pushing it forward, without reworking the piping that should have been addressed initially. This left the pipes bent and angled awkwardly going into the heater. For the price I paid, I expected a more professional finish and a smoother experience.

Additionally, during installation I was told by their HVAC technician that I needed a completely new flue. However, when the city inspector arrived to approve the water heater, she informed me that a new flue was not required. This left me feeling uncertain about the guidance I received.

Overall, based on my experience, the work felt rushed and not as thorough as I expected given the cost. I hope the company takes feedback like this seriously, as quality workmanship and clear communication make a major difference for customers.

reviews.author: Pauly
reviews.text: Amazing company! Dalton was an expert installer! (his work in pics) Removed old water heater and had new unit installed within the same day! I absolutely recommend this company!

reviews.author: Lawrence Wimsatt
reviews.text: Nick and Jimmy did a wonderful job with the installation of a new furnace and AC units. They explained what they were doing and how everything should work. They also had to fix a crapy job done by another company at no extra charge. We highly recommend ECO and their fabulous team of technicians. Thanks Nick and Jimmy!

reviews.author: Sarah Priebe
reviews.text:
Very easy and quick scheduling- same day!
David was fantastic. He stayed late on a Friday to make sure the leak was fully repaired and took the time to explain everything clearly. You can tell he’s a good guy who cares about doing the job right. Really appreciated his professionalism and dedication.

reviews.author: Andre' bradley
reviews.text:
I would rate Anthony’s performance 6 out of 5 stars.  He called ahead 30 minutes before his arrival .  He was cordial, professional and knowledgable.  His deliberate communication style and pleasant demeanor made him easy to talk and listen to.  He explained the plan using  examples that were relevant to my project.  Once the installation was complete he invited my wife and I to examine the results as he went over what he’d done and ask for any question.  He then removed the floor covering that he used to keep our floors and stairs clean, thanked and wished us well and took off.

Robert Crowder was very polite, knowledgeable and professional.  He immediately diagnosed my water heater issues with me next to him and made it easily understandable. Likewise, he laid out my options for resolving the problems he found without coming off as salesy or pushy.  No pressure whatsoever.  I was very impressed with his approach.

plumbers.name: Milestone Electric, A/C, & Plumbing
plumbers.address: 5414 Forest Ln, Dallas, TX 75229, USA

reviews.author: Kevin S
reviews.text: Had Milestone help with the plumbing and electrical work needed for a back-up generator and replacement of old load centers.  Big job and they did outstanding work.  Very good communications every step of the way. Technicians that take great pride in their work, enjoy what they do and have no problem explaining as they go.  Shout out to Logan, Randall, Jeremy, Abram, Jonathan, Shan, Ryan, Robert, Jeff and Shanna. It was a pleasure working with all of you. Milestone will probably not be the cheapest quote you may receive, but based on my experience with them, they will be well worth the price.

reviews.author: Kksamps
reviews.text:
Excellent experience with Loy, Christian & Kevin.
They put in new under cabinet lighting in our kitchen, repaired and replaced bulbs in the lights above the cabinets too & installed to replacement fixtures upstairs. I called for the appointment yesterday, they came today & promptly finished the job. Everything looks great! Just in time for holiday hosting. Thank you Milestone!

reviews.author: Deborah Sherman
reviews.text: Milestone was very helpful when an outlet I plugged a charger block into sparked and smoked on me! They didn’t have a technician available to come out that day but suggested I call the fire department. And they would be able to turn off the breaker to that outlet. The next day they sent out Ricardo Monge. He did an excellent job replacing the outlet for me and checking other outlets and the whole breaker box. I felt so much more secure! Thanks, Milestone!

reviews.author: Brittany Harris
reviews.text:
Omg I’m so incredibly grateful for ROGER RUIZ!!!

I called in at 8pm with a hose leaking from a refrigerator where I was HOUSE SITTING. I was freaking out- talking to the homeowner and then finally called these guys.

Roger helped me locate the shut off valve and stop the emergency. I couldn’t believe it! He literally saved me and the homeowner from a horrible situation.

He even suggested that I reach out to the appliance people as it might be within their scope as opposed to the plumber’s.

I’m so impressed and blown away to see there are still people doing business like this today. It’s so hard to find honest contractors. Like wow.

God bless you my guy. That was super hero work for real.

reviews.author: Harold Parker
reviews.text:
Michael O'Connor was kind, friendly, personable, compassionate and caring.  He exemplified customer service and showed true concern for our issues as if they were his immediate responsibility.  He is a person of good character and integrity.

Nathan was our master electrician.  He is competent, compassionate and committed to excellence. He handled our home with great respect.  He has a dedicated spirit and will take ownership of issues.  He is passionate about his work and genuinely believes in being gentle with clients.  He was invested in the work and did not hurry the process.  He’s thoughtful and thorough.

Michael and Nathan changed our lives and made us feel comfortable and at ease.

We are thankful for their kindness and enjoyed having Michael, Nathan, Mark and Hayden in our home.

They are teammates and their work is unparalleled.

As home owners, my wife and I are well pleased.

plumbers.name: Radiant Plumbing, Air Conditioning, & Electrical
plumbers.address: 901 Reinli St, Austin, TX 78751, USA

reviews.author: Wayne Flint
reviews.text:
★★★★★

Radiant Plumbing 🪠 serviced my home today and I couldn’t be more satisfied with the experience. They fixed a severely clogged double kitchen sink quickly and thoroughly. From start to finish, the service was professional, courteous, and honest.

A special shoutout to Garrett, the plumbing professional who handled the job—he was polite, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain exactly what was going on and how he resolved it. You can tell he brings years of real hands-on experience to his work, and it shows in the quality of the repair.

On top of excellent service, the pricing was very fair, and I was given a 6-month warranty, which gave me even more confidence in the work performed.

If you’re looking for a trustworthy plumbing company that stands behind their service, I highly recommend Radiant Plumbing. They earned every bit of this 5-star review.

reviews.author: Hoang Nguyen
reviews.text:
Jacob Martin was awesome at his job! We are satisfied with the service he provided on our clogged sink, he is a true professional. We had an appointment at 12pm but instead Radiant was able to come earlier at 8am. We will be reaching out to Radiant in the future! Highly recommend this company for your plumbing needs!

Jeff Hicks swung by during the great freeze of 2026! We had a pipe burst under our mobile home and thanks to the Radiant Plumbing dispatch, we were able to get help from this professional gentleman. He was respectful, courteous, and went above and beyond his duties! Thank you guys, we highly recommend Radiant Plumbing for any emergency…rain, sleet, snow, they’ll be ready!

EDIT 02/03/26:
Shoutout to Garrett Beshears for helping us with a fitting that popped off in our mobile home’s foundation. Garrett not only provided spectacular service, but was also very informative about his repairs and addressed our questions knowledgeably. Radiant Plumbing once again proves to be a reliable company for your plumbing needs by sending in professionals like Garrett who takes great pride in their work!

EDIT 02/19/26
Manuel was a stupendous technician who responded to a late night call regarding our bursted water pipe. Not only did he resolve the issue, but he also helped us identify other safety concerns regarding our water heater. Manuel is a professional in all aspects and his service reflects greatly on the credibility of Radiant Plumbing.

reviews.author: Ellisha Isom
reviews.text:
In a routine inspection of my sewer pipes, a break was discovered under the foundation of my home (I could see it myself on the camera). It was an expensive repair, but working with the Radiant team was a really good experience.

The project manager provided consistent and timely communication and the onsite staff who did the work were thorough, professional, and provided outstanding customer service. I am 100% please and
definitely recommend Radiant for any plumbing repairs.

reviews.author: Deanna Parker
reviews.text: After confirming that my existing water softener had a unrepairable leak I was provided a few quotes to have it replaced. After reviewing the quotes I opted to have Radiant install a new softener which they provided and after accepting the quote I was contacted within the same evening to schedule the install. Mike just finished up, gave a brief explanation (similar to my only units operation) and left the manual and ensured if I had any questions I could reach out. The old unit will be picked up and properly disposed of as part of the service, a major plus. Thanks to Mike and all of the Radiant team I’ve had the pleasure of working with thus far. I look forward to our continued relationship and feel at ease that I have them by my side.

reviews.author: Cat Johnson
reviews.text:
I had an outstanding experience with Jeff Hicks from Radiant Plumbing. Jeff was professional, polite, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable from start to finish. He took the time to thoroughly explain my system in a way that was easy to understand and made sure I knew exactly what the issue was and how he planned to fix it.

What truly impressed me was his efficiency and expertise. After another company spent over six days just trying to assess the problem, Jeff was able to diagnose and fully repair it within 24 hours. That level of competence and responsiveness is rare and deeply appreciated.

Beyond fixing the immediate issue, Jeff also educated me on what to watch for in the future and how to properly maintain my system to avoid similar problems. His honesty, transparency, and ethical approach gave me complete confidence in his work.

We will absolutely be requesting Jeff Hicks again for any future plumbing needs and highly recommend him to anyone looking for an ethical, professional, and highly skilled plumber.

Well done, Radiant Plumbing — you’ve hired another keeper!

plumbers.name: Len The Plumber Heating & Air, LLC
plumbers.address: 3610 Commerce Dr #808, Halethorpe, MD 21227, USA

reviews.author: Peter Karis
reviews.text: We had a ruptured water main leaking inside our basement. We called LtP. The plumber came out a few hours later to inspect and hive us a quote. The repair work happened the next day, which was to replace some pipe, add new shutoff valves and a water pressure reducer. Everything is complete, leak free and working properly. Billy, the plumber doing the work, was very nice, respectful and honest. Everything was done professionally and in a timely manner. Excellent work.

reviews.author: Candace Cole
reviews.text:
All staff were extremely courteous, the appointment was scheduled in a timely manner.. our only complaint is the cost.  The plumber arrived then left for an hour to get a pipe, worked for a bit then needed to leave again this time for over an hour for a blade- the total hour and a half of work was much more expensive - I was told since I signed off on the pricing before that’s the cost - be careful that’s were they get you.  All in all the problem was resolved and I learned a lesson.

I asked for a call back to discuss the logistics but never rec’d one.

reviews.author: Samantha Chaffee
reviews.text: FIVE STARS! I am one tough client, I believe in transparency, our two day service resolved both plumbing issues. Len Plumbing Heating & Air sent Jamarl who arrived Monday morning and was kind enough to explain step by step how our two ruptured pipes would be fixed. He provided a thorough estimate. Tuesday a team of two arrived, cleared away the affected area, removed the damaged pipes, repaired the pipe under our deck with copper, and the bathroom a mix between copper and PVC piping, and utrap. IMPORTANT: The bath has never worked better. Not going to lie my lack of knowledge caused some complications however Lens Plumbing was able to calmly explain what was done and the purpose behind the choices. Truly grateful!

reviews.author: Pipe Guerra
reviews.text: Our technician James Long was awesome. He helped us get water back into our new home and gave us quotes and suggestions on what we should do to prevent it from happening. Would def recommend as he was very friendly. I would recommend to everyone.

reviews.author: Ellery Queen
reviews.text: Plumbing tech said Shower/tub diverted & plumbing install would take a day. I can't speak to the plumber’s skill because he didn’t do any plumbing. But he can do demolition. Put a hole in plaster & lathe hallway wall & left. I had put down a deposit & he didn’t do any plumbing. The company didn’t respond back to txt or call me until Monday October 13th txt saying they wanted to get me back on schedule to complete the work. The Tech was here on October 1st, and I haven't seen him since. A master plumber came today (10/15/2025) from another company and installed the diverter and other necessary plumbing features, he arrived at 09:45 AM and was finished at 12:45 PM, and while they were a little pricier than Len, I didn't have to deposit/pay a penny until the job was complete. I'm not even complaining, I'm just saying.

plumbers.name: AAA Service Plumbing, Heating & Electric
plumbers.address: 14998 W 6th Ave Suite 800, Golden, CO 80401, USA

reviews.author: Andy Mcphillips
reviews.text: Emilio Garza and Amelia Perez were great! They came quickly the day after we called and spent hours diagnosing the issues and walked us through our options. Once we realized what was needed they came out right away the next day to do installation and spent hours into the evening to make sure it was done right. We really enjoyed our experience.

reviews.author: Mike Gilbert
reviews.text: I had a good crew come out and replace my leaking cast iron pipes today.  They arrived early and worked straight through to finish the job same day.  They were dedicated and very hard working.  Dallas and Jesus were personable and knowledgeable.  They got my water turned back on as soon as possible and cleaned up after themselves.  I was impressed with them and AAA Service!

reviews.author: Shiela McGrath
reviews.text:
Very responsive company with excellent customer service. Shout out to my plumber, John Johnson (JD). His parents may have lacked creativity when naming him, but he certainly doesn’t lack in skill in his craft. His work is impeccable. He was very mindful of the interior and exterior of my home during the repair. He even sanitized my floor after the toilet repair.

My link to review the HVAC work isn’t working. I also need to recognize Miguel. I’ve had the misfortune of needing multiple repairs this week. Truly am impressed by the caliber of employees this company has. Really stellar service, impeccable work, great communication.

reviews.author: Christan Fergus
reviews.text:
You don't always wake up one morning and know you're going to drop some serious coin and have to replace your entire HVAC system and electrical panel, but it happens. And of course, it happens on the coldest day of the year. These guys came out and worked late in the day through until 10 at night and didn't leave until they had me all squared away. The whole time they were happy and friendly and totally rocked it.

A huge thank you to the AAA HVAC crew: Eddie, Michael, Tony, Pedro, and Boone; and the Electricians: David, Joey. Each one of them did an absolutely stellar, top-notch job, and I couldn't be happier.

I also want to call out the killer work DeShawn did installing a new ionizer to reduce mineral build up in my system after I had a water leak, and also a leak detector and shutoff valve and a new pressure regulator. Just like the HVAC and electrical guys, DeShawn did an outstanding job and got me sorted.

reviews.author: Kassi
reviews.text: Joey, Z, and John were a complete pleasure to work with. Polite, personable, hard workers, solid work. They all went above and beyond. Joey and Z installed a new electrical panel for us starting at noon yesterday, and they ended up staying until almost 10pm trying to help me further troubleshoot some lighting and outlet issues, working in the cold and strong wind. We’re very thankful and grateful for them and their hard work. And for their families who had to wait up for them.

plumbers.name: Hiller Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical
plumbers.address: 915 Murfreesboro Pike, Nashville, TN 37217, USA

reviews.author: Mitchmeeda
reviews.text:
Excellent in every way. We initially called Hiller for an AC problem and got a tech scheduled right away. Then I realized the issue was actually electrical, not the AC unit, so I called Hiller to request an electrician instead. Rescheduling was a piece of cake. The customer service reps, available by phone or text, are polite and effective. They even called back to offer us earlier availability so we could get our AC on faster.

The electrician, Mike, arrived on time and fully prepared. He replaced a fried breaker box that was preventing our AC from getting power. The initial fix was absolutely necessary, but it didn’t solve the problem right away. Mike kept hunting to find the problem, and he fixed it. He also reviewed our entire breaker box and explained that our outdated system poses some safety issues that we should address. We’re going to address that project next week.

The price for Mike’s service was under $400, which is totally reasonable. My house is cool,  and my wife and kids are happy. We’re glad we called the Happy Face Truck.

reviews.author: Ian Bargman
reviews.text: Upstairs R22 AC unit lost gas , need reliable AC so decided to replace the system, job was done in around 5hrs and system works great… Went with a Honeywell Redlink thermostat as system is 2stage heat / cooling .. Hiller team were polite efficient and got the job done …

reviews.author: Andrew Raymond
reviews.text: Gary and his crew did a wonderful job replacing all the old iron pipes in our house.  He explained every question I had. Very courteous and professional. I envisioned a black mess from the pipes, but they left no mess clean as before. Gary stayed afterwards to check on everything and answer my questions before he left. My wife and I are happy with his work.  We will be choosing Hiller again.

reviews.author: Jim Johns
reviews.text: Andrew and Thomas were great. They were prompt, professional, and fixed a challenging drain issue quickly, not long after we first called Hiller for help. We will definitely be using Hiller in the future!

reviews.author: T.G. Frahn
reviews.text:
I am grateful to have hired Hiller. The reason I feel this way is due to the personnel that came out to assess and recommend the project to be done.
I found the explanations realistic and the ease of communication and financing a def plus.

plumbers.name: SameDay Heating & Air, Plumbing, and Electrical
plumbers.address: 3020 S W Temple St, Salt Lake City, UT 84115, USA

reviews.author: Michael Anderson
reviews.text: We had an amazing experience with SameDay. Once we locked in the scope of work and an estimate, their team with Adam, Landan, Hugo, and Chris were at our place the next day to replace the water heater and A/C unit. The team was incredibly professional, very communicative, and did everything they could for the best outcomes possible during installion of the new units, to include relocating the A/C unit and new piping and exhausts. They also replaced the garden hose spickets and fixed two of our toilets. They did a fantastic job and we are very satisfied with them and their work.

reviews.author: Kerry Wall
reviews.text:
I needed a furnace repair.  Not sure who to call.  I remembered the TV ads for SameDay Heating and decided to give them a try.  I had a technician come named Eric Kent.  Wow, this guy knows his stuff.  In a matter of minutes, he had located the problem.  More importantly, with his thorough inspection he found a crack in the heat exchanger.  As you probably know, this permits exhaust gas to leak into the surrounding living space.  With Eric's thorough diagnostics, he probably saved lives in my home.  So, Eric is not only a top-notch technician...he is also a life saver!  As he worked, I had borage of questions.  Eric was very patient and answered each one to my understanding.  He also provided me additional information to help me completely understand our subject matter.  Eric spent time with me after his diagnostics to help me with the new issue -- replacing this no longer usable furnace.  Eric arranged for a Comfort Consultant  to come to my home to evaluate the best options for a replacement system.  He also stayed for a while after the consultant arrived to share details with him about the topic.  I couldn't have been more satisfied!  Eric seemed like a trusted friend.  I signed up with Eric for SameDay's service plan and might get to see him again in the future with service visits.  If Eric is any reflection on SameDay, then that must be one company that stands miles about the compaction.  Thankyou Eric.  Oh, I didn't have carbon monoxide detection in my home.  I do now thanks to Eric.

Benjamin Sprehn was the Comfort Consultant that helped me.  He did all the calculations to determine the proper capacity system for my needs.  It was a pleasure to spent time with Ben.  He answered all my questions and provided me with a large list of options explaining each in great detail.  There were items that he discribed that I hadn't considered - Items I didn't know about - and items that I didn't understand until Ben spent the time to share the missing points.  I was impressed right from the start at how quickly Ben arrived at my house.  I was delighted at how Ben  treated me and didn't try to push stuff on me that I didn't want.  By the end of out visit was able to select a unit that I know I will be pleased with for many years to come.  Yes, I did purchase a new, replacement furnace and air conditioner.  A mid-range unit that I am very pleased with.  If you are looking for a new system, you want to check out SameDay.  You also want to ask for Benjamin Sprehn.  I'm sure all their company Confort Consultant's (sales force) are great but I can personally vouch for Ben.  Thank you.

Ok...installation of my new unit occurred the very next day after purchase.   Alberto Carrillo and Josh Olsen were the two installers that showed up on my door step first thing in the morning and worked until the job was complete - almost the entire day.  They, like Eric and Ben were bombarded all day long with my questions and comments and they were very patient and answered each one to my understanding and satisfaction.  I watched them most of the day and was very pleased with the high quality of craftsmanship they displayed.  Each task in the installation was done with precise accuracy and care.  The quality of their work showed them to be true perfectionists.  I enjoyed having them in my home for the day.  I couldn't have been happier with the final outcome.  Alberto also did some major ductwork modifications to my system to improve the overall performance.  Alberto and Josh were very careful to keep the areas clean.  They are a credit to their company.  If all installers there are as good as these two then SameDay has a super top notch staff.  Thanks Alberto and Josh for a job well done.  Nothing was left undone.

One final comment...I don't remember her name...The lady that answered my phone call and arranged to send out the technician was very friendly and courteous.  Thank you for getting me the help at a stressful time.  Yet another example of a top notch business.  SameDay Heating & Air.  My new service team.

reviews.author: Gregory García-Harris
reviews.text:
We had the water line to our home fail and start leaking water all over the basement. Same-day plumbing came out after hours, got us a quote, and started the repair the next day.

It was a very big job. They had to dig 7-9 feet in order to make the needed repair. Apart from fixing the issue, they went above and beyond on this job. They repaired a broken sprinkler head (it was broken before they came), removed a water shutoff valve that had previously failed (part of our existing security system), and purchased / laid new bark in our flower bed. Even the water pressure in our home is drastically better now!

This was an expensive fix (> $6,000) which was hard to swallow. But they did everything to make the experience as smooth as possible. They offered 18 month financing with no interest which helped soften the blow. I sure hope your water main doesn’t fail, but if it does Same Day is a great company to get you back on your feet.

reviews.author: Alex Paugh
reviews.text: Tristen and Adam did a great job as a team. Ben and Josue were part of his crew and did an amazing job at resetting a big piece of concrete that they had to remove to access the water main pipes. Adam was incredibly professional and friendly, transparent and went above and beyond by also fixing a small leak on the toilet. And Adam even sprayed the flooring to clean up any residual dirt from the crawl space. I recommend!

reviews.author: Malorie Pennie
reviews.text: Mike was awesome!! Got here super quick, and took the time to replace the parts that had gone out, fix our ignitor, and explain everything to us. He was super friendly and left his card as well to his direct line to be able to contact him if we ever have issues in the future. We will absolutely be using him again!! I would highly recommend reaching out to him if you ever have issues with anything HVAC!

plumbers.name: RS Andrews
plumbers.address: 225 Scientific Dr NW, Peachtree Corners, GA 30092, USA

reviews.author: Angela Potts
reviews.text: Brennan did an awesome job. He and Rich built a copper manifold for us. Our old one which was broken was a product that last 7 years. We hope that the copper one is the best choice. Brennan was so helpful either by text or call when we had questions. I definitely recommend RS Andrew’s.

reviews.author: u. macre bostic
reviews.text: Jonte did a great job. Arrived according to the expected time, found the problem quickly, explained the problem (dirty flame sensor pin), fixed it, and was on his way. The company also sent texts on the arrival time. The initial customer service interactions when I called the service number was great as well!

reviews.author: David Gregory
reviews.text: I could ask for better service than I have received from RS Andrews Electrical.  Starting with setting up the appointment with Drew.  He was pleasant and professional.  He handled my concern with compassion and explained the process as it would transpire.  Come the appointed date and time,  I received a call from a dispatcher.  She continued the professional and courteous tone letting me know my electrician was on the way.  Travon, I simply cannot say how pleased I am with his professionalism and the high level of customer service he provided.  He seemed to know where the problem was but checked all other elements that may cause problems in the future.  Finally, the cost of the service was below what I  left, estimated.  That is always a good thing.  Yes, when Travon left, I had a R S Andrews smile on my face.  Could not have asked for better.

reviews.author: Bernadette Tan
reviews.text:
Mr. Jose Sanchez was very effective and professional. He put the correct size of belt on my attic fan as soon as he had noticed the previous one was broken. Then, he told me that was possible to replace my 71 years old fan by a newer one that was more effective and quieter. (I did not know that a newer model was available). He noticed too that insulating now my attic would cool my rooms in Summer and warm them in Winter. I will consider his suggestions to update my home cooling!
Thank you very much to Mr. Jose Sanchez!

reviews.author: David Andersen
reviews.text: My longtime tech at RS Andrews, David Rosati, was predictably on-time, professional, friendly, and efficient. During the course of performing a Winter maintenance check, he noticed my hot water heater was leaking, and brought this to my attention. Thank you, David Rosati! Well done.

plumbers.name: Dauenhauer Plumbing Heating Air & Electric
plumbers.address: 3416 Robards Ct, Louisville, KY 40218, USA

reviews.author: John Young
reviews.text: Tech was scheduled between 10-2 he showed up around 3:40 no communication what so ever on being delayed except when I called numerous times wasn’t able to complete due to supply house about to close at 4. Tech said he’d be back at 10am next day didn’t show up until almost 3pm and still charged full price. And still no communication what so ever on being late 2 days straight and being charged full price.

reviews.author: Gage Cumella
reviews.text:
Both Jeremy and Eric came to our house today and did a great job repairing an irregularly with our water pressure and water heater. Jeremy found our PSI to be high, around 120-130 psi where the normal range is supposed to be around 60. He then helped us determine whether or water company or builder had installed a PRV. After some time we were able to find out we did not have a PRV and he also highly recommended we get a water heater expansion tank which would help prevent any failure of the pressure valve. Through all of this process he was extremely patient and understanding due to our many questions. Overall he was amazing and I find him to be an excellent employee and an asset to the Dauenhauer team.
Once Jeremy assessed the issue and developed a plan of action he passed our case on to Eric.

Eric arrived on time and had already reviewed Jeremy’s notes and was very knowledgeable of what needed to be done. Before even unloading he went and studied the area and evaluated everything. Once he knew exactly how he wanted to perform the install and had his action plan, he began his work. He was very meticulous and proficient. He was knowledgeable and patient with the questions I had for him. Overall both men; Jeremy and Eric performed an excellent job and were professional, polite, and proficient in their jobs. I think both guys are a great addition to the Dauenhauer team. Thank you again Jeremy and Eric, you two made doing business with Dauenhauer enjoyable.

Sincerely,

The Cumellas

reviews.author: Nikia Conner
reviews.text: I truly appreciate the Dauenhauer team for coming out and making my home safe again for me and my children. Although it took a little bit more time than expected, the job was done right and professionally.

reviews.author: Rachael Bradford-Feldman
reviews.text: We’ve had an exceptional experience with Dauenhauer for both plumbing and HVAC issues. The technicians are kind, efficient and explain things very well. Dan Grissett came by today to help with our furnace/HVAC and solved the issue day of while another company told us it would take 6 weeks for double the price. Always impressed with their service and highly recommend!

reviews.author: Michelle Morrow
reviews.text: Jeremy was awesome and patient. The previous company claimed I needed to have my vanity removed. Jeremy was able to complete the task without anyone having to remove it. My valves were replaced without a mess. I’ve used Dauehauer in the past and will continue to use them in the future. 😁

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 166 W Washington St Ste 375, Chicago, IL 60602, USA

reviews.author: deliciamo
reviews.text: The service was AMAZING!! They were fast prompt and professional. I wasn’t expecting such an excellent service, but I got more than I bargained for. They were so informative and even gave me tips on how to move forward with better care for my plumbing system. I will definitely be using this service again. I am very pleased with my results. The two gentleman need to be recognized for such an awesome job. Great work guys!!

reviews.author: perry knight
reviews.text:
Great! Khaden came out in about 2 hours. He displayed exceptional customer service. Khaden listened, examined, recommended service, and completed service.

Khaden appeared to have a high level of expertise. He recommended action for reducing/preventing clogged pipes. Initial issue was slow draining water, leading to leaking.

reviews.author: Victor Bonhart
reviews.text:
Roto Rooter experience we received was excellent!
We received great service from dispatch to the service person, Jonathan.
Jonathan was friendly, patient and gave us professional advice on valve replacement, along with superb service all in a timely manner.
Thank you again for the excellent service! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reviews.author: Filomena Choate
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Roto-Rooter. Orion and Luis were amazing. They were efficient, friendly, and very knowledgeable. Before they got started, they took a look at everything and explained how the process would go. They also told me that if they were not able to fix the problem, they would not charge me. The work is guaranteed for six months, which gave me even more peace of mind. They were polite and courteous the entire time. I called in the morning and they were at my house within an hour. The whole process was smooth and stress-free. I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: David Monatelli
reviews.text: Israel and Mike were out at the specified time and did a fantastic job clearing my septic line. They went above and beyond to make sure I would not need to have my sewer pipe cleaned again anytime soon. Jayson came by after and checked my whole sewer line with this camera. They found a little more Roots so Israel went in and took those out as well. The whole process took over 2 hours. I was happy with the service and price. I recommend using coupons if you can. These guys are fast and good and worth a little bit extra.They went above and beyond to make sure I would not need to have my sewer pipe cleaned again anytime soon.

plumbers.name: Len The Plumber Heating & Air, LLC
plumbers.address: 550 Forest Glen Rd, Four Corners, MD 20901, USA

reviews.author: Isbel Alba
reviews.text: Last Saturday, I finally contacted Len the Plumber because my thermostat needed checking. They immediately dispatched a technician, Mr. H. He diligently identified the root of the problem and fixed it. Before leaving, he answered all my questions and explained the options I had for protecting my HVAC system. I'm so glad I can count on this amazing company whenever I need help. They never disappoint.

reviews.author: Nicole McFarland
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Len the Plumber and Sadou Aboubakar. My first time using them as I had an emergency on the weekend. Got my water heater replaced in only 2 days (it could have been 1, but the one I needed wasn’t in stock). The second day it snowed 4 inches and they still came to do all the work, and pushed the hot water heater through 4 inches of snow into the house. Mr. Aboubakar was honest, personable, knowledgeable, and offered me a first responder discount.

reviews.author: DJ Gino Wilson
reviews.text: Aaron, Len The Plumber technician arrived on time and gave my HVAC system a thorough inspection. Aaron demonstrated his superior skills in checking out my HVAC system and even corrected some issues which were left by a different company. Aaron discussed ways to keep the system functioning efficiently and explained that if I added power surge protectors I could prevent damage to the unit’s electrical components. I felt very confident in the expertise demonstrated by Aaron and consider him to be an asset to the Len The Plumber company.

reviews.author: M Cole
reviews.text:
Kemar Lewis, the dispatcher technician, led with professionalism. He explained the solution in detail and he even saved me some money and time by finding an alternate route to access the plumbing pipes without having to tear apart my bathroom
tile. His service, mannerisms, and workmanship were excellent.

reviews.author: Manuella Hancock
reviews.text:
We have had a couple plumbing issues, and both were handled by some great guys at Len the Plumber. Shout out to Manual for replacing our hot water heater promptly and professionally and responding to insurance adjuster calls as well.
We had another water issue - an unknown leak. Yves came out and figured out the problem in about 1 minute. He was so cordial and professional. He fixed the pipe, taking pictures and keeping us in the loop the entire time. He was tidy, quick and the fix looks and works well. We are so happy with his service and we would ask for him by name whenever we need a plumber again.

plumbers.name: Michael & Son Services
plumbers.address: 6420 Erdman Ave, Baltimore, MD 21205, USA

reviews.author: Michael Hastings
reviews.text: Jesse James was awesome 😎 explained everything in detail about what needed to be repaired/replaced with the water heater. He gave us options and great pricing. 0% financing for 18 months. We had another company come out first. Didn't like the approach and lack of details from the other person. Jesse is very knowledgeable and friendly. Recommend him highly.  Thank you Jesse and Michael and Sons! Update ----came out next day (Saturday 2/7) and installed in 3 hours. Expertly installed, and Jesse showed my wife how everything works and how to do maintenance. We are real happy we went with this company. Thanks again Jesse James!

reviews.author: Robert L. Rhodes
reviews.text: John Willis and the restoration team were timely, professional, communicative, flexible and informative. I learned a lot about my plumbing system from the repair guys as well. (John and Jerome, snake and Jet crew) Very knowledgeable and informative. What a wild experience. Many thanks team.

reviews.author: Kris Brown
reviews.text: Quick, fast and professional . Sherman clean his mess and put on footies before he entered my home, I was so grateful for thank many work don’t do. Would recommend him and Michael &Son to anyone. I called and got service the same day and at a reasonable time. Thanks

reviews.author: Patricia Reno
reviews.text:
Bought 1953 rancher in Catonsville in November. Moved in dec 15

OMG Dec 16 can you image having to call BG&E because you smell a strange odor.  They arrive saying yup there's 4 gas leaks you've gotta leave and we are shutting down the gas.  Can you believe the house didn't blow up???  To top off the entire family is coming to your new house for christmas!!!
In comes Michaels Plumbing, Mike Coleman the tech.  First glance only a few leaks we can fix.  Now it's Thursday a week before the 25th.  Inspector can't come till Monday. Monday arrives gas line fails to hold air pressure.  Mike comes back. Now what. Up the attic we go. There are leaks at every coupling, seal and bend in gas line. Replacing entire line. No heat for Christmas.   Friday 26th Mike arrives works thru Saturday  by 5pm the lines replaced.  Pressure is holding at 20 psi.  Called left message get an inspector out immediately.   Inspector arrives Tuesday 30th 11ish.  Passes. Mike is there to meet Inspector Tom.  Mike messages I'll be back in morning to hook everything up and get gas up again.  Later today 12/30 he messages I'm leaving supply and heading to your house to finish now. Lining up Inspector to come back tomorrow morning. Lines all hooked up.  Heat on
Hot water on!!  Gas holding pressure zero leaks!!!
Did we have heat on Christmas,  no.  Do we have a home that didn't blow up, YES!!! Do we have heat for 2026 you betcha!!! Its truly a blessing that we don't smoke, light matches or have candles in our home.  Christmas would have been much different.
Mike was awesome. He didn't have to come back today, he did!!!
Did I flip out on the 21st, you bet I did.  No heat, failed inspection, holiday 3 days away.  We had to go to my brother's house.  I slept on twin bed with husband 4 nights and we didn't divorce over that!!!  I deserve a medal!!
How can you stay angry, we are all alive.  2 extra holidays shut things down.  All issues where out of everyone's hands.
We managed. We got together. We had a lovely meal.
Michaels and Mike C. Came through and got us heat. It took a bit, no one's fault, just life. We are all alive. House intact.  Lives intact.
Thank you Michael's and Son and especially Mike Coleman. You went above and beyond.
Thank you from our entire family, close and far.  We wouldn't be here today without your help.

reviews.author: Jeremy Janney
reviews.text:
Scheduled an appointment online for between 330-6. Adam showed up on time called before he got there.
Gave me the options and he got to work.
About halfway through price did go up a bit because somebody decided to concrete the faucets for the shower in place for some reason. And the extra labor charge was alright by me because I was about to head to the ATM to give him extra for becoming an impromptu concrete worker.
Told us about the Michael & Sons Home Care plan which my wife and I plan to invest in with more home repairs coming.
10/10 highly recommend

plumbers.name: Atlas Butler Heating, Cooling & Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4849 Evanswood Dr, Columbus, OH 43229, USA

reviews.author: Rick roth
reviews.text: We need to have our Furnace AC unit replaced. These guys came in and in one day had the AC unit furnace tore out both of them installed. They also ran some more duct vents to help out the airflow and install professional grade dehumidifier. These guys were very nice very professional high-quality work and most of all when they were done they cleaned up so good it’s like they weren’t even here and did all that work. I would recommend Atlas Butler heating body.

reviews.author: Gayle Murray
reviews.text:
We had a tankless water heater and limescale inhibitor installed Feb 5, 2026. The installers were Tyler Landis and Karon Williams. They were very professional and  friendly. They were here the entire day. They left our basement very clean. They thoroughly explained the system and how it works. We are very pleased with the product and installation.
Thank you,
John Wagg & Gabby

reviews.author: Andrea J Lynch
reviews.text: Our furnace died on a very cold day & Atlas Butler sent technician within 4hrs but could not be repaired so sales engineer arrived 2 hrs later & examined whole system & the airflow in our whole house & made very sensible recommendations. He quoted several levels of new equipment & repairs to existing airflows. We accepted quote for the system that would work best for us within our budget. The next day the crew & new equipment arrived 15 mins early & worked the entire day until everything was installed, tested & left online. Our house came up to temperature very quickly (14 dgrs outside) & we immediately noticed the improved airflow that could be felt in every area & we are comfortable at a lower temperature now!  We were impressed with the quality of the equipment & the installation. We highly recommend Atlas Butler & will use them as needed in future. A special thanks to our sales engineer Eric for his recommendations.

reviews.author: Melodie Gee
reviews.text: During a carpet installation our cat apparently fell into a furnace vent that was open while being worked on.  After 2 days of searching he finally meowed and we found him stuck in the duct.  We have been customers of Atlas Butler for years but, this experience was special.  Finn Hartley our technician was able to get Jack the cat out in less than 30 minutes and repair the duct.  He was in good shape but, hungry of course.  We are so happy with the service. Thank you Finn and Atlas Butler!

reviews.author: Debbie Powell
reviews.text: Atlas Butler sent Mike Gallagher to service cleaning our vents.  He did an excellent job and was very thorough.  He was extremely pleasant and professional and even showed us the pictures after he cleaned out the vents.  We were very happy with his service.

plumbers.name: Precision Today Plumbing Heating Cooling Electrical
plumbers.address: 640 E St Charles Rd Suite 209B, Carol Stream, IL 60188, USA

reviews.author: Sofia Ascencio
reviews.text: The technician Ray Santiago did an excellent job. He was very kind and polite in explaining the work he would be doing. He took his time repairing the bathroom sink faucets and replacing the old valves. This was our first service with Precision Today, and we are truly satisfied with the work he did. We will definitely contact you again if we need their services in the future, and of course, we highly recommend you. Thank you for your services!

reviews.author: riana trice
reviews.text: We had two separate issues come up and had the pleasure of working with Carlos and Daniel. I have to say we have been having issues with the plumbing and pipes since we moved in around 5 years ago and never have we had such a positive experience. They were knowledgeable. They were quick. They were kind and willing to answer any questions that we had and it was clear that they were professionals. I felt comfortable signing up for the membership, because if these are the type of people that are coming out to help I know it'll a quality service and worth it.  Thanks again for coming out. Super appreciated.

reviews.author: Amrendra Kumar
reviews.text:
I am very disappointed with the recent service and the overall handling of my account. If a technician cannot replace a clearly dirty filter or at least document the issue on the work completion form, how is a customer supposed to trust that the rest of the job was completed properly? The new filters for both the humidifier and furnace were readily available in the home at the time of the visit. When I called the main office, I was told the technician “did not want to be rude” by changing the filter. That explanation is not acceptable. He could have asked my wife, who was present, informed her that the filters needed replacement, or at minimum documented it before obtaining her signature.
In addition, two maintenance visits in 2025 were missed despite our prepaid contract for biannual service. When I brought this to their attention, the initial response was, “You could have called us if we had not called you.” That is not a professional way to handle missed contracted services. We paid in advance with the expectation that your company would track and fulfill the agreed-upon visits. The minimum expected response would have been an apology and a reasonable solution, such as extending the contract by another year or offering a refund for the missed services. This experience raises serious concerns about accountability and customer service.

I am editing this review 45 minutes later to add that the heater is now not blowing hot air; only the fan is running. The furnace was working properly before the technician arrived, and the service document states that everything was functioning fine at the time of inspection. This raises even more concern about the quality and thoroughness of the work performed.

reviews.author: Robin Long
reviews.text:
Bryan Herrera is an awesome electrician with Precision Today. He took out my old Wadsworth fuse box and updated the electrical in my fuse panel. Bryan was very patient with me, gave a thorough explanation of the work, and how long it would take to be completed. He left the area clean and I’m very pleased with the outcome.
More importantly, his manager James Pope in electrical at Precision Today is a man of his word. He resolved my ongoing problem in one day that four people couldn’t do in two months. The installation Dept. blamed the Sales Dept. and vis versa for the mishap. The problem I had with them came after my furnace installation. The inspector deemed that the old Wadsworth panel needed to be updated to better support the new furnace system. They wanted to charge me over $6,000 for this work.
After speaking with James Pope for the first time to explain the problem, he returned my call the same day like he said he would and with a solution. This deserves repeating, he resolved my ongoing problem in one day that four people couldn’t do in two months. The icing on the cake is the work was completely free!!!  Thank you James Pope and  Bryan Herrera in electrical at Precision Today!

reviews.author: Donna Guy
reviews.text: Precision Today installed my water heater last year (2025) . Near the anniversary of the install, I called to have them do the annual inspection & possible drain of the water tank. It was easy to get the appointment. Michael, the technician, was on time. He quickly did a general inspection of my plumbing & any possible issues that may have to be dealt with soon (it's also part of my maintenance plan). He quickly took care of the water tank. He was very courteous & knowledgable.  I have been a customer of Precision Today for several years

plumbers.name: Waldrop Plumbing - Heating - Air
plumbers.address: 790 Duncan Reidville Rd, Duncan, SC 29334, USA

reviews.author: Hiram Wilson
reviews.text:
Had Melton & Blake, Come to my home for a broken water pipe this morning. Told them on the phone when I called about the problem the day before I could get home until around 9am. They got there at like 8:15am or so. He called me and I told them I wasn't home yet. They were like will go get some breakfast and come back just let us know when your on the way home. So I did they were very friendly and very understanding about the situation. When they got back Melton come inside looked at it all and talk me thru the whole thing. He was very informative about what was going on. Then we talked and he said let me go get my partner Blake and then Blake came in and walked me thru the rest of the process. Two very polite gentlemen very friendly. Those two guys made me feel like family thru the whole thing. We Laughed and cutting up but very professional guys. Two people they you could trust and help you make the right choice to fix the problem. Hands down I would choose this company over again to fix my plumbing work or hvac. If I have a problem again I'll definitely ask for those two gentlemen.

Had the installation crew come on monday after the two estimator came friday. The installation crew was David and Gavin the first day and boy they didnt know what there were getting into. They thought they were just going to redo a line for my sink and after getting into it they ended up doing a whole house replumb. They were here all week up until Thursday. They were great sports about it all. Very professional, friendly, and didnt mine me watching and being in the way as they completely destroyed my basement floor to get to all the pipe under the house. It was worth it all once they were finished. After they were finished it looked like no one had even been here. This company is very dependable and reasonable with pricing and more. I would definitely have David, Gavin, there third  gentlemen back out to do any of my plumbing work.They are definitely top notch. And this company is top notch as well. They guided me thru the whole thing. Will definitely use Waldrop again. Thanks to all involved.

reviews.author: Vito Galluzzo
reviews.text: Chad was amazing. He came on a short notice, assessed the situation, moved accordingly, worked with precision, and cleaned up after the job. He helped my family and I get back into our kitchen RIGHT in the Knick if time before Thanksgiving. THANKS Waldrop Plumbing, and THANKS Chad (our tech) and THANKS Madison for “making us smile” with great service! Have a blessed holiday.

reviews.author: Britany Phillips
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Jacob from Waldrop Heating and Air, and I couldn’t be more impressed with his service. From the moment he arrived, Jacob was professional, friendly, and incredibly knowledgeable about heating and cooling systems.

He took the time to thoroughly assess our situation and explained everything in a way that was easy to understand. I appreciated his attention to detail and the care he took in addressing our concerns. It was clear that he genuinely wanted to ensure our comfort.

His dedication to customer satisfaction truly sets him apart.

Thank you, Jacob, for your excellent service! We greatly appreciate your hard work and expertise. I highly recommend Waldrop Heating and Air, especially if you have the chance to work with Jacob!

reviews.author: Michael
reviews.text:
I feel compelled to update my original review after learning something that truly shocked and angered me. A neighbor around the corner, whose home is nearly identical to mine, recently had Piedmont Gas install the same gas line setup I requested — with a quick disconnect (which Waldrop told me I’d need to do myself afterward). His final cost? $300. Yes, you read that right — $300, compared to the $1,700+ I paid Waldrop for a similar setup.
When I heard that, I was stunned. I felt taken advantage of. I had hoped that by writing a detailed letter to Waldrop’s CEO about my experience, someone would respond — but I never heard back.
If you're considering Waldrop, I strongly encourage you to read my original experience below. I hope it helps others avoid what I went through..
________________________________________
Original Review (from December 3, 2024)
We hired Waldrop to install a gas line for a portable generator. What followed was over four weeks of delays, poor communication, and subpar service.
•	Initial quote: On October 4th, a technician quoted us just under $1,800. I asked about cost reduction options (we’re on a fixed income), but none were offered. My wife and I agreed to move forward for the sake of safety and professionalism.
•	Missed deadlines: Work began October 11th. We were told the inspector would come the following week. No one showed, and it took repeated calls to even get a response.
•	Communication issues: Calling the office was frustrating — constant recordings, AI, or long hold times. When we did get someone, they often lacked answers or never followed up. I finally spoke to James Kirby, who admitted the inspector hadn’t even been contacted and was surprised by the poor quality shown in their own technician’s photos.
•	Rework and mess: The crew returned October 24th to reinstall the line “properly.” They left a mess, chipped our sidewalk, and got paint on our siding. Even the state inspector commented that a regulator was missing, though he passed it due to the low pressure of our setup. Waldrop did install the regulator after the inspection and final adjustments.
•	I have many more details, though this should explain the basic reasons I am posting such a negative review.
We wrote to Jamie Porterfield (Waldrop) on November 7th. As of December 3rd — still no response.
This experience left us sadly disappointed. Others may have had better outcomes, but our experience was unprofessional, overpriced, and extremely frustrating.

reviews.author: Janet Hall
reviews.text: I couldn't be more satisfied. A great staff to setup the repair service and a tremendous job with the follow-up to the end. I can't say enough about my Tech, Ryan, absolutely awesome person. Gentleman, polite, courteous and a wealth of knowledge answering all of my questions. Went the extra mile with no hesitation. Also offered things to do if it happens again. Ryan is definately a hugh asset to the Waldrop Company! First time use, highly recommend to anyone.

plumbers.name: Len the Plumber Heating & Air, LLC
plumbers.address: 6598B Fleet Dr, Alexandria, VA 22310, USA

reviews.author: James Toles
reviews.text: I was extremely impressed with the work completed by Mr Mark Martin from Len Plumbing.  He was very pleasant and extremely professional.  He arrived on time, assessed the plumbing issue I needed addressed, and completed the work in less than an hour.  I wanted a valve to be replaced and we discussed a moving a second valve to make it more accessible.  He completed both tasks and now both valves are functional and accessible. I will definitely contact Mark for all of my future plumbing needs.  Excellent, excellent professional to work with.  Thank you Len the Plumber for sending Mark Martin my way!!

reviews.author: Ruth Ashlock
reviews.text: From the First Moment that Aturo Rivera arrived at our home this morning he was a True Gentleman. Thoughful , Articulate, and Kind. He explained in detail how the process of repairing our ‘Downstairs Toilet Issues‘would take, and gave us Useful Advice/Tips on the Different Plans that Lens Plumbing Services Offered. After settling on our choice of offers he Diligently and Smoothly went about bringing in the equipment ( By Himself) and Resolved our Plumbing problem. The toilet is Working and we’re 💯 Overjoyed that Aturo was our serviceman. Also, Shoutout to Brittney for taking our phone call on a Sunday. We  Highly Recommend Him and your company to our family and friends. Thanks again Aturo You Provided us with Excellent Advice and Service.

reviews.author: Alice Wilson
reviews.text: Daniel Aguirre did an amazing job replacing our water heater. He truly Exceeded our expectations In his work, detailed explanations, speed and professionalism. We have a 1959 home and are so impressed. When you think about before and after pictures, you don’t usually think about your plumbing and utility closet , but if you could see ours you would get it. Neat, tidy efficient, clean, and most importantly- Up To Code =SAFE.  After this experience, I honestly can’t imagine having anyone else work on our plumbing. Thank you, Daniel Aguirre, passionate plumber extraordinaire, and another decade of working with Len The Plumber.

reviews.author: Amy Thomas
reviews.text: We had a great experience with Mustafa at  Len the Plumber! Our water heater started leaking and Mustafa came out the next morning, on a Sunday. He was extremely professional, honest, and took the time to walk us through several replacement options at different price points so we could make the best decision. There was no pressure—just clear, straightforward information. Once we decided, he completed the work the same day. We really appreciated his professionalism and efficiency. Highly recommend

reviews.author: Stephen Pezzetti
reviews.text: James Milligan came back to my home to perform a leak test on the main line to the house after I consulted with him. I am in the process of selling and the buyers had two “plumbers” come and look at a “suspected” leak. Neither performed an actual leak test, but both said it was leaking and the main would need to be replaced at a cost of around $10K. James told me although the test would cost me $309 it would be money well spent if it demonstrated there was no leak (he suspected it was not leaking).
