After 30 minutes of watching the meter after shutting off the main it hadn’t moved. NO LEAK! James saved me from having to argue about a $10K subsidy/main line replacement. 5 stars just doesn’t cut it…10 stars!! Jim is a huge asset to Len the Plumber, no question about it!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 4480 Bridgeway Ave STE B, Columbus, OH 43219, USA

reviews.author: Nick Lilly
reviews.text:
The technicians that finally showed up saved the rating.

Their offsite call center is among the worst. They quoted me a tech would arrive in 2 hours at 9am on Thursday. I called again at 1pm and they couldn’t tell me anything other than they were behind due to high volume of calls which I understood because of the rain storm. The problem arose when I called again at 7pm and she told me the tech assigned to me was off at 6pm and no one was coming. I had to call for that info. That should have been a phone call to me.

Robert finally arrived at noon the following day and quickly addressed the problem. Quoted me a price that was pretty high based on reviews I’ve read from other companies. I was fine with paying because he was there and had the parts ready and we’re expected to get rain again soon. Robert and his partner did a great and timely job.

reviews.author: S P.
reviews.text:
After dealing with recurring plumbing issues, we feel incredibly fortunate to have connected with Christian from Roto-Rooter. What began as a service call for a standard toilet leak has evolved into a trusted professional partnership; he is now the only plumber we call. Christian consistently makes a stellar impression from the moment he arrives. He is punctual, friendly, and always introduces himself before getting to work. He has earned our complete confidence to the point that we trust him to work unsupervised, which speaks volumes about his integrity and professionalism.
Over the past few months, Christian has navigated us through several complex issues, including a sump pump failure. His approach is both strategic and highly technical. While waiting for parts to arrive, he expertly locked down the affected systems and installed new lines to ensure we remained functional with minimal disruption. He takes the time to explain the "why" behind an issue in plain English and lays out all available options and recommendations without any pressure.
Christian returned to install the new parts the moment they arrived, ensuring everything was back to peak performance. It is rare to find a technician who combines high-level technical skill with such genuine care for his clients. While we hope we won’t need a plumber anytime soon, we know exactly who we are calling if we do. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Kevin Jankowski
reviews.text: We had our garbage disposal go out suddenly and start leaking.  We called on Saturday at around Noon, and our tech, Terry came out ASAP.  He quickly diagnosed the problem, and went to get a new disposal for us.  He installed it fast!  He was extremely nice and very personable.  I'd highly recommend and would use them for future services.  Thanks!

reviews.author: Margaret Hall
reviews.text: Travis did a great job.  He arrived well within the time frame, he diagnosed the problem, and then gave a clear explanation of how to fix it.  He was very upfront about the pricing and what needed to be done.  He was personable, approachable, and easy to work with.  Very friendly and caring.  I appreciate his expertise and hard work.  After he finished with the emergency in the bathroom, he installed a new kitchen sink.  The job took all day and involved back-up help and several trips to Home Depot.  Travis stuck with it and worked hard.  Everything looks great and works perfectly.  Thank you, Travis.

reviews.author: Tayy Fink
reviews.text: Terry came out promptly after my initial call to Roto Rooter and was very polite and answered all of my questions to help me understand my situation. He was able to give me a very well explained estimate today. I just unfortunately did not have the funds at this moment to move forward with work. But I would absolutely recommend Roto Rooter to anyone who needs a responsive and reliable plumber!

plumbers.name: Black Diamond Plumbing & Mechanical Inc.
plumbers.address: 1400 Miller Pkwy, McHenry, IL 60050, USA

reviews.author: Shy Teal
reviews.text:
I’m a proud Diamond Member and officially part of the prestige family! My electrician was hands down the best — knowledgeable, patient, and professional from start to finish. I asked about 101 questions in under a minute, and he still managed to multitask, explain everything clearly, and get the job done right.

He even fixed the light in my kitchen over the sink — someone before me thought it made more sense to put a plug there instead of an actual light switch and outlet combo (don’t ask 😅). But he got it working perfectly!

Now I’ve got lights shining where there were no lights before! My utility room is beautifully lit with new canned lights — oh my God, excellent, très bien!

As a single woman, finding honest, respectful professionals means everything. I felt comfortable, informed, and completely taken care of. Black Diamond is a true one-stop shop — they go the extra mile and make your home shine, literally and figuratively!

reviews.author: Steven
reviews.text: Life savers! And I’m not even a customer. Well, I am now. I had a flat and without hesitation a representative from Black Diamond pulled over and hopped out with a battery operated compressor to help. It ended up being a pretty bad gash in the sidewall and wasn’t holding air. So he went back to the truck and got some rubber cement to help hold the air so I could get to a safer spot to change the tire. It was a busy two way street and he went above and beyond trying to help. And he did! Thank you so much. Praying I don’t having any plumbing issues, but if I do, I know who I’m calling.

reviews.author: J L
reviews.text:
I am so thankful for Black Diamond!

They have single handedly helped me repair and maintain my home with ease and savings since 2019.

Over the years, they have installed my furnace, air conditioner, replaced water shut off valves, garbage disposal, electric doorbell (Brennan was awesome), and most recently my water tank heater (Trevor and Keith were wonderful).

I always get several quotes for big repairs and Black Diamond is always the best!! They are worth every penny.  Honest up front pricing, no surprises, service windows are convenient, always on time, no employee turnover (i have had the same techs) and always knowledgeable and respectful. Their scheduling/customer service team is so kind and literally always answers my calls. Their quality is so good even my HVAC permit inspector raved about them when he came.

It is a god send to have one company offer the best service in all areas, plumbing,HVAC, and electrical and with the most experienced technicians, best schedulers/customer service, and for the best prices.

Thank you!

reviews.author: James Mashinter
reviews.text: I called Black diamond,about having my kitchen drain cleaned. Mario,was the plumbing technician who arrived on time. He looked over the situation,and got to work. He took great care in making sure my issue was resolved to the best of his abilities. I would highly recommend Black diamond,if all of their employees are as committed to excellent work,this is a company worth having a positive experience with.

reviews.author: Evette Rolon
reviews.text: First off I like to share that my family and I are not familiar with well water as we come from Chicago. We are not familiar with how well water works and almost gotten taking for a hell of a ride but thanks to Colten and black diamond they have been a blessing for my family and I. we HIGHLY recommend them especially Colton. Very intelligent, understanding, respectful, honest person. I work from home and the staff respected that and worked around my schedule. Everyone from the customer service department to the staff that came to work on our house were very polite and kind to us. Thank you for everything you have done for us. May God bless you guys.

plumbers.name: ARS / Rescue Rooter
plumbers.address: 6029 Campus Cir Dr W Ste 150, Irving, TX 75063, USA

reviews.author: Sean Ball
reviews.text: After 1 year, this system started to leak. The installer used a stainless supply and coupled it with galvanized connectors for the expansion tank.  The galvanic corrosion caused a leak and the buildup of rust had these components nearly blocked. The expansion tank was only pressurized to 1/2 of my line pressure.  As a consumer I should not have to double check your work. If it was intentional to create a system that was doomed to fail or negligence on the part of the installers, this should have been caught when the salesman came to inspect the work. Do better.  The labor alone was 2.5x the cost of the entire previous tank replacement.

reviews.author: Ellie Jeong
reviews.text:
Their hydrojetting service was flawless. It was a drain we had been trying to clear ourselves with various machines. Their hydrojetting service completed the job in less than 30 minutes.
Their 2 technician was nice.
They provided same-day service.
I would have been more satisfied if their prices were a bit lower, but in the end,
I'm satisfied and grateful.

reviews.author: Gregg Williams
reviews.text: I must of just been unlucky after looking through all of these reviews. My wife and I just moved into our home and one of the toilets were leaking from the backside. To start off, my appointment was scheduled any time between 10-2. 2 o'clock rolls around, no call/text about the plumber running late because of another job. I waited till about 3 and called their number to see what was going on. The woman I spoke to said she was going to reach out to dispatch or plumber, I can't remember. Another hour passes, still hadn't heard anything. I called again around 4 and they said the plumber was running behind because of another job. I said, "do you guys normally let people know that kind of thing?" The woman said, "yes sir." That's all she said. Anyways, the plumber gets here at 6:30 that evening, you know, only 4.5 hours after the appointment window had closed. He said he needed to change out the bolts and gasket. I said, "okay great." He finishes the work and goes on his way. An hour later I use the restroom and hear dripping from the back of the toilet. So here we are present day. My appointment window was this morning from 8-12. I stayed home from work hoping that they'd get here early enough so I could go in for a half day. It is now 4:16 and 1 phone call later, still no plumber has shown up. Completely unacceptable. The picture shows how much water has leaked since this morning around 7 a.m.

reviews.author: Marco Montalvo
reviews.text: We have used ARS in the past for our AC installation and we continue to use them due to the nature of good work quality and best in service. Our service representative Kevin and are two install technicians  Saul and Paul made our situation and  experience pleasant. Saul and Paul are very knowledgeable and understanding of what to do.  I asked questions and they automatically had an answer and was up to par with the installation. Overall ARS knows how to build their team to provide a good service and product to us consumers. Thank you ARS now our family can stay warm and cool at the same time.

reviews.author: Amiracle Johnson
reviews.text: I needed my main line cleaned out because it was clogged due to some flushable wipes so I tried cleaning it myself for three hours and I saw I wasn’t getting anywhere so I looked on the internet and saw they were running a special for $79 main line clean out and gave them a call. I called them at 4:30 and they were at my house by 6:45. Elijah was out technician and he was great! So polite, knowledgeable, and efficient! Elijah was in and out within 45 minutes! I was super impressed!! What could have been a multiple day issue was resolved in a matter of a few hours. Thank you to this company and thank you Elijah ! Definitely will use this company in the future!

plumbers.name: Jarboe's Heating, Cooling & Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4111 Champions Trace Ln, Louisville, KY 40218, USA

reviews.author: Christina Mercado
reviews.text: I booked an appointment this morning because I was having issues with the water temperature in my bathroom. I was able to book an appointment for them to come within 2 hours. The technician, Jonathan D, was great! He was very communicative, nice, and respectful. He quickly fixed the issue and did not charge me an arm and a leg which I was worried about with plumbing. Highly recommend Jarboe's and will definitely go back again if I have any issues.

reviews.author: Matthew Brett
reviews.text:
I recently had new HVAC units installed by Jarboe’s and couldn't be happier with the experience! Even though I wasn't home during the installation, their team treated my house with the utmost respect, as if it were their own. They completed the entire installation efficiently, all in a single day, which was incredibly impressive.

A special shout-out to Ronnie, who was fantastic. He listened to my needs and only recommended what was truly necessary, without any pressure to buy additional services or products. It's refreshing to work with a company that prioritizes honesty and customer satisfaction.

Highly recommend Jarboe’s for their professionalism, efficiency, and integrity!

reviews.author: melissa Goss
reviews.text: Called because we had no heat (flame issue) and they were able to schedule us in 2 days. They came on time and Matt was amazing! He was able to give me some pointers to help avoid our reoccurring issue and helped save me some money! He was friendly and helpful and the repair was fast. He listened and didn't mind answering any of my questions. I would definitely recommend.

reviews.author: Jaime Bronfman
reviews.text: Very friendly, professional and efficient team. Really appreciated the updates leading up to our appointment. Reasonable rates and we actually paid nothing in the end because they couldn’t diagnose/find the problem. Our issue may have just been ice/temperature related. We will definitely use Jarboe’s again in the future.

reviews.author: Rita Koontz
reviews.text: Drew did a wonderful job explaining our power vent gas water heater and a tankless water heater. He was very professional and efficient. He wore shoe covers and explained everything he did thoroughly.  Thanks Drew! Thanks Jarboe Heating, Cooling and Plumbing!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1465 Northside Dr NW #221, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Spice N WerkoutGloves
reviews.text: Contacted Roto Rooter when I lost the contact info from another company, who had given me an estimate for some cast-iron pipe sewer work on my home. To begin,  Mike & Jonathan showed up on time,  were very courteous, answered all my questions, & addressed my concerns without taking offense. When they actually looked at the issue, they found a completely different situation than what the previous company said. They took their time and spend several hours diagnosing & finding the right repair option. I have no doubt that the previous company did not know where they were talking about. I am happy I was not able to locate their information. Mike & Jonathan were transparent & openly discussed several repair options in an attempt to save me money. We decided on one that worked best, considering my split level home and the way that my waterlines are set up. They struck me as having a lot of pride in their work, being quite honest,  and very professional. So in the end, I will be going with them over anyone else because of this fact and that their work is also guaranteed. Not everything that is cheaper is bette…I highly recommend 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

reviews.author: Jason Murphy
reviews.text: The Roto Rooter team was excellent! Mike (technician) was incredible with communicating the plumbing issues and how to best resolve them. He was prompt, thorough, respectful of my home, and worked intently until the issues were resolved. Nice guy as well! I am pleased with the high quality work Mike and Roto Rooter provided and the price was very fair for such a great service. I will use Roto Rooter again if ever necessary, and would certainly recommend their service to anyone else. Definitely a 10/10.

reviews.author: Miguel Sanchez
reviews.text:
We had an excellent experience with Jamaal and could not recommend him enough! From start to finish, he showed great professionalism and was extremely respectful. He took the time to explain what the issue at hand was and how he could fix it. We are beyond grateful for his hard work, especially for going above and beyond to make sure the job was done right!

If you are looking for a plumber who is honest and hardworking, Jamaal is who you are looking for.

reviews.author: TaKnesha Hubbard
reviews.text: As you can imagine, having a major plumbing issue first thing in the morning is NOT an ideal start to the day. I called Roto-Rooter and they sent a plumber within an hour. The plumber, AL, was the absolute best that they could’ve sent. He explained what was happening and made the complicated easily understood. He fully replaced my water heater and thoroughly went over the details & warranties of the new equipment. In my time of crisis, AL made me feel at ease. I am grateful for the attentiveness, knowledge and professionalism of the Roto-Rooter staff. Thank you!!!

reviews.author: David Loftus
reviews.text: We have had problems with clogs and slow drains in our basement bathroom for the past few years but other plumbing fixtures in our house were perfectly fine.  Other plumbers have repeatedly plunged and snaked, but our problems have always returned within a few weeks.  Enter Vince from Roto Rooter.  He asked very intelligent diagnostic questions about exactly what we were experiencing, and immediately pinpointed a sewage backup valve sunk in our basement slab.  He explained how a normally protective flapper in the valve can break down and collect debris.  Sure enough, when he disassembled the valve, all manner of debris and backed up sewage came spewing out.  Turns out the other plumbers probably even damaged the valve further as they crudely snaked the lines.  He gave us a less expensive option to try to rebuild the 34 year old valve, or a reasonable price to replace it.  With the repeated problems we've had, we opted to fix it right and replace it. Vince was very polite and conscientious about keeping his work area clean, especially challenging given the nature of the work.  With a new valve installed and our lines verified clear with his sophisticated camera, we are now finally confident that we have the problem solved.  We will be calling for Vince for any future plumbing problems we have!

plumbers.name: Blind & Sons
plumbers.address: 344 4th St NW, Barberton, OH 44203, USA

reviews.author: Tanya J V
reviews.text:
Kevin D came in and got right to the issue. Very personable, friendly, courteous and respectful for my home and of me. I also learned a little more of what causes the issue, and how to avoid  it as well.

I also learned more about the furnace itself.  It will eventually have to be replaced, so with that knowledge, I can plan for that eventual expense in advance.

Not only will I call Blind and Sons for just a furnace check, but I will see if I can also have the same technician return.

I am a repeat customer though and have never had any issue with setting the appointment or with the service of any of the technicians over the past five years or more.

I recommend them highly.

reviews.author: Nicholas Stavrakis
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with my HVAC technician. He was extremely professional, friendly, and easy to talk to from the moment he arrived. He quickly serviced my furnace and clearly explained what was going on in a way that made sense.

What really stood out was how efficient and knowledgeable he was — he got everything taken care of promptly without cutting corners. It’s obvious he knows his trade well and takes pride in his work.

I truly appreciate the excellent service and would highly recommend him to anyone needing HVAC work done!

reviews.author: Cheryl Swiger
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 5-Star Review

We recently had a new furnace installed by Chris Harper and Garret Stoner from Blind & Sons, and the entire experience was exceptional from start to finish. Chris and Garret arrived right on time, were friendly and professional, and took the time to explain each step of the installation as they worked.

Their attention to detail was outstanding—they worked efficiently, kept the workspace spotless, and ensured the system was installed perfectly before leaving. They also walked us through all the new furnace features, answered every question thoroughly, and made sure we felt completely confident with the system’s operation.

Our home is already noticeably more comfortable and energy‑efficient. We couldn’t be happier with the service we received.

A huge thank‑you to Chris, Garret, and the entire Blind & Sons team for their excellent work. Highly recommend!
Cheryl

reviews.author: Earl Goodsell
reviews.text: Mr. Waugh was very competent because he knew right away what was wrong with the electronic air cleaner. He ordered a new one and installed it very successfully in a couple of hours. The difficulty was in removing the 16-year-old previous mounting box because the new components did not fit in the old box. The mounting screws were far inside the mounting box and extremely difficult to reach. We thank him for his patience and competency and certainly rate him the highest 5 star. And he didn't complain when I offered to help.

reviews.author: Dakota Warne
reviews.text: The whole team at blind and sons is incredible. Had my first appointment with Mark who quoted me for my new water heater. He was also to look at my pump for our boiler as it also went out. We had determined to replace the whole unit rather than piece it together and possibly make more issues as the whole boiler was 50+ years old. Then Kevin in sales came out last Wednesday to inspect and quote pricing. He was quick to get me in a tight schedule window. Then today 11/11 Karl and Jared came to install my new equipment.  They were quick, kind, efficient and made the whole experience even better. They went through explaining all shut off and their warranties thoroughly. Couldn't be happier with choosing blind and sons for this project. Thank you Mark, Kevin, Karl and Jared for all your hard work!

plumbers.name: Maeser Master Services
plumbers.address: 11101 Electron Dr, Louisville, KY 40299, USA

reviews.author: Terry Jones
reviews.text: Clayton called and let me know he was promptly on the way. When he arrived he introduced himself, and looked at our dryer. My dryer vent was super clogged with lint build-up. Clayton and his partner helped clear it very quickly! I appreciate their help making the situation worry-free. Thank you.

reviews.author: Lori Daily
reviews.text: I called Maeser And got same-day service. They called 30 minutes before arrival time and sent a picture of their representative. They arrived during the timeframe. They said they would. Tyler was excellent. He fixed my pipe in a timely manner and was very friendly and courteous. I highly recommend Maeser And would definitely use them again!

reviews.author: Mary
reviews.text: This plumbing company is AMAZING. Cole was my technician, and he was friendly and professional. Additionally, he charged me substantially less than was originally quoted, because the job wasn't as involved as they initially thought. This company could've easily charged more and I never would've known. Also, I had an issue after they left (and it had nothing to do with anything they did)  and they came back immediately to help. Customer service is great as well. Everyone is friendly, and they fit me in quickly when I needed help. Will recommend them to everyone I know!

reviews.author: Debbie Hovious Taylor
reviews.text: Anderson did such a great job. We had a miscommunication with when and where he should meet the HOA maintenance people to get the water shut off, but that was not his fault. He was pleasant and professional and fixed the repair without a problem. Would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Alicia Al.Uqdah
reviews.text: The Maeser team was very professional...their attention to detail as they were laying the tile made my bathroom look soooo 👍 good...will definitely call again when we're ready to do our 2 other bathrooms

plumbers.name: Superior Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3991 Royal Dr NW, Kennesaw, GA 30144, USA

reviews.author: Doug Lynn
reviews.text:
Fantastic experience with superior today!
Water heater was leaking it was Saturday and Chelsea answers the phone immediately no holds at superior and was able to get me in same day with the most fantastic tech
Joel came and took out the builder installed water  heater and installed the new one. His work is a work of art . He took a bunch of jumbled pipes and elbows fittings and cleaned them up and re installed everything to perfection. He is talented, experienced and  I was fortunate to have  a dedicated master plumber perform the replacement especially on a Saturday
Thanks to superior plumbing once again for being there !

reviews.author: Andrew King
reviews.text: Superior plumbing was fantastic from start to finish. 1) No issues with required COI. 2) Easy and quick appointment scheduling. 3) Great communication from both the home office and texting about technician arrival.  4) Kyle was a great plumber who fixed our issue quickly, quietly, and thoroughly.  He was very friendly and helpful including great tips to prevent the issue from happening again.

reviews.author: Tom Vadnais
reviews.text:
I've been using Superior Plumbing since I bought my house new more than 35 years ago. They've done everything from rebuilding toilets and replacing faucets to installing a sink with pump in my basement/garage below drain level to replacing the entire drain piping from the house to the sewer. They have always been timely, efficient, and clear about the services they recommend and their prices.

I'm fortunate to have Seth Gregory as my regular plumber. It's great that I've gotten to know him and that he knows what has been done previously. He really does care that the right things are done and done properly. Their office phone is always answered live and all are helpful—even just to answer questions or get advice. True pros. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Dominic Capraro
reviews.text: Went with Superior to install two faucets. Booking was easy and they were able to get me scheduled right away.  They also listened to my directions and arrived precisely on time.  My plumbers--Andrew and Damon--were professional and up front with pricing.  They did a terrific job with the installation and it was completed very quickly.

reviews.author: Justajanine Hagans
reviews.text:
Ronnie was excellent.  He was
Professional and did a great job.  He was kind and knew what he was doing.  Loved that he had everything he needed on the truck and got it all done in one day.  Great service.  Loved that I called yesterday and was able to get an appt and he even got here early.  He took his time and knew what he was doing.  He explained everything in detail.  I’m was happy that I got it fixed right.

plumbers.name: Absolute Services
plumbers.address: 3600 Chamberlain Ln #720, Louisville, KY 40241, USA

reviews.author: Michael Mabe
reviews.text: Having the right light fixture in a room makes all the difference, hiring the right person to install it is twice as important. Ethan Knoer, the electrician who installed my dining room light,  embodied the perfect professional for the job! Professional, courtesy and attention to detail were his trade in stock! Five star review for this young man. From moving the fixture to the center of the room, solid installation, clean up, even having the right cap for where the old fixture was made for the perfect experience. Even offering to help move furniture back was what  elevates the experience. If I could give him 6 stars, I would! I would go with Advance Services again and would request  Ethan every time. Thank you Advance Services and a big thank you to Ethan Knoes for a job well done

reviews.author: Ashley Louden
reviews.text:
We can’t say enough great things about Joseph Redmond with Absolute Services. Because of how much we trust his work, we purchased their lifetime membership (a one-time $100 fee), which includes free yearly maintenance and free inspections, and it has been more than worth it.

During his most recent maintenance visit, Joseph took the time to thoroughly inspect everything and helped us understand that our hot water heater is over 20 years old and past its life expectancy, allowing us to plan ahead before it fails unexpectedly. He also helped us figure out why our toilet wasn’t working properly and explained that it needs to be replaced. What really stood out was that he never once pressured us to buy anything or upsell services—he simply provided honest, knowledgeable advice so we could make informed decisions.

This wasn’t our first great experience with Joseph. Last year, he came out to help us fix our outside faucets that broke during the winter, and once again he was professional, efficient, and incredibly helpful.

Joseph’s customer service has been outstanding every single time we’ve worked with him. He is knowledgeable, patient, honest, and genuinely cares about his customers. Absolute Services is very lucky to have him, he is a huge asset to their company, and we always feel confident knowing Joseph is handling our plumbing needs. We will always request him for our plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Dedra Thomson
reviews.text: Thank you Brad and Absolute Services. Brad arrived on time, was easy to talk with to make sure we were on the same page installing my chandelier and he even insisted on cleaning up! Ask for Brad. Thanks for a job well done

reviews.author: Ciara Lockstadt
reviews.text:
Joseph R. was my technician when I chose to use Absolute plumbing after I attempted to install a bidet and wound up with a massive water leak in my ceiling. He was very friendly and explained the issue to me and was able to fix it quickly. I would use them again for their plumbing services. - 12/19/25

Ethan with Absolute electricians did a great job installing my ceiling fan. The technician explained why the fan wasn’t working and gave me several options with price estimates to get it fixed. He explained everything clearly and simply so I could understand my options. He also told me about the average lifespan of fans and how they have changed over the years. He was also very clean which I liked! - 11/4/2025

reviews.author: Donna McQueary
reviews.text: Katie was great on communication with our service and appointment. The technicians did a great job installing a new panel box. We have needed a new panel for a long time.  It wasn’t easy finding a reasonable price electrician but I would highly recommend Absolute Services.

plumbers.name: Done! Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electric
plumbers.address: 541 Norfolk St, Aurora, CO 80011, USA

reviews.author: Pam Musso
reviews.text: 5 stars because plumber Terry was able to locate the source of a water leak immediately, carry out the plan to install a new shower faucet system and get it Done the next day! Another Done plumber had been here two months before thinking the issue was caulking but it wasn't. Terry's work was meticulous, explanations excellent, he waited and tested that the leak was actually fixed. Terry was recommended to me by a neighbor. So when I needed a second plumber to come check the unresolved issue, I asked for Terry. He deserves a bonus for the work he did! I highly recommend you call Done and request Terry! I know what the market is like and how challenging it is to find a competent, honest plumber, I will definitely call Done if I need a plumber again and request Terry! Thank you to Done and Terry!

reviews.author: Eric Schneider
reviews.text:
I have had a lot of work done by Done. I found everyone I worked with helpful, courteous and knowledgeable. A few complications occurred within the spectrum of the work I had done and they
were able to adapt and solve some fairly complex challenges to
my full satisfaction! I felt the pricing was fair and reasonable.

reviews.author: Karen Wyckoff
reviews.text: Done Plumbing has been excellent to work with. They provide appointments that work with your schedule. They show up when they say they will, are courteous, clean and professional. Recently, Daniel and Josh performed complicated installations and repairs at my home. I couldn't be happier! Thank you, Jonathan, for extending affordable estimate pricing. Thank you, Kyla, for scheduling these two plumbers!

reviews.author: Linda Humphrey
reviews.text: I have been with Done Plumbing for a long time and always been happy with their work.  This was the biggest job yet and took  2 days.  They had to take the cast iron pipes under my townhome and replace with new ones.  They did a wonderful job and always kept me posted as to what they were doing and when they would be turning off the heat or water etc. They had to move a lot of things in my basement and nothing was broken and everything put back where it belonged. They worked very hard and were always friendly.  I was impressed that everyone had a specific job to do and did it well. I had plumbers, workers that took out the pipe, some with cameras, some that put in the new pipe and mixed the cement to cover it all up.  I have pictures and an estimated bill that they went over with me. I am now going to file a claim with my Insurance company to see if I can get some of the money back and they have a special person who just does claims that is working with me. I like that they are a family business and each person has their special job to do. Many thanks to Done Plumbing for a job well done.

reviews.author: Jody Frank
reviews.text: Our toilet was plugged up and being only one of two bathrooms in the house (with 3 people), they were the only ones who could come out right away. Justin got here within an hour or two of my booking and he was quick and thorough. He even gave me some advice on how to avoid it happening again. I will definitely contact DONE! in the future.

plumbers.name: Greenwell Plumbing Heating & Air
plumbers.address: 1840 Scott Rd, New Albany, IN 47150, USA

reviews.author: Mona Clemmons
reviews.text: James and Jack were punctual, professional and informative. They showed me as work proceeded and what was completed. Several others came and all were very polite. I'm very pleased.

reviews.author: Robert Stillwell
reviews.text:
I’m telling you what, I have had Greenwell in my home(s) a few times over the years and have always been thoroughly impressed.  Your serviceman, Kristoff was exceptional!
Thank you Mr. Kristoff for your kind, prompt, professional service.  I have a new hot water heater!  👍🏼

reviews.author: Kelly Garloch
reviews.text: We have had to replace both our sewage ejector pump & our sump pump in the last few months. Kristoff was our technician both times  & he was wonderful. He explained everything thoroughly & even suggested some tablets to use to help keep our sump pump cleaner so it will hopefully last longer. He cleaned the entire area that he worked around in our basement as well.  He was great to work with!

reviews.author: Ashley Palmer
reviews.text:
Adam, David, Timothy, Karen, and the rest of the crew who was out tonight.
I would highly recommend Greenwell Plumbing. We had an excellent experience. It started with Adam, he gave his honest quote and opinion on it. David came out and gave us an estimate and Karen worked on that with him. Timothy and Adam and their coworkers came back out again and were able to repipe the house. It was done in a professional and timely manner. Work was  well done. They were all nice and respectful of the situation.

reviews.author: Jacob Gillespie
reviews.text:
We had a A++, 5-star service provided by Dustin Nevil!  He was prompt to come out, identify and resolve our issue with a water leak in our home.  He was polite and communicated with us every step through the repair from start to end.

He is an excellent role model for a service provider!  Whatever he's getting paid now, he deserves more!

plumbers.name: Wilson Plumbing, Heating, Cooling and Electric
plumbers.address: 1501 Commerce Dr, Stow, OH 44224, USA

reviews.author: Daniel Filice
reviews.text:
(Updated) Art Kelly was the service tech for my Healthy Home care plan inspection and he created a great experience. He was personable, thorough and articulate, didn’t try to oversell me and went the extra mile to get me a fair price on my PRV replacement.

Wilson Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electric just earned a lifelong customer thanks to two outstanding technicians who serviced my home today.

Plumber – Hithem Judeh
Hithem replaced my PRV valve and was incredibly thorough and thoughtful throughout the entire visit. He clearly explained what the new water pressure would mean, what to expect going forward, and made sure I understood everything before he left. While he was here, he also noticed a few other small issues around the house, corrected them on the spot, and didn’t charge me for those quick fixes. That level of care and integrity is rare and seriously appreciated.

Electrician – Alan Yeager
Alan was very down-to-earth, efficient, and clearly great at what he does. He replaced my recessed lighting and garage switches quickly and cleanly, and then went the extra mile by installing a few additional fixtures I had purchased but didn’t end up needing for the original project. On top of that, he gave me really helpful insight and recommendations for my outdoor lighting needs.

Based on the service these two provided, I would 100% recommend Wilson Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electric to anyone looking for reliable, professional, and friendly home service.

reviews.author: Amy Norris
reviews.text: Technician Brian Hughes from Wilson just installed a vent on my new furnace so I have heat in my basement! He did an amazing job! He was very thorough and cleaned up afterwards. I am very pleased with the service I received.

reviews.author: Ian Whitesel
reviews.text: Yovel came to look at my furnace, and he did a fantastic job. Very personable and friendly, very knowledgeable. Gave me a fair and honest break down of my set up. He is a credit to his employer!

reviews.author: Khyle Halstead
reviews.text: Cole, Ryan and Chuck all did a fantastic job installing my new High Efficiency Furnace! They kept me in the loop with everything they were doing, were very respectful, clean and walked me through how to operate my new thermostat and some cool features that come with it. They displayed great craftsmanship, efficiency and professionalism. I am very happy with the work they did and will definitely be calling them again when it’s time to do the AC.

reviews.author: Justin McLoughlin
reviews.text: I signed up for a preventative maintenance check and just had my first preventative appt.  It was great.  Definitely puts my mind at ease to know what's coming and how my systems are doing.  Great work by Jacob Sidoti to walk me through it.

plumbers.name: Blue Sky Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electric
plumbers.address: 9830 Interstate 70 Frontage Rd S, Wheat Ridge, CO 80033, USA

reviews.author: greg bortz
reviews.text:
I have waited to do any kind of comment or review.
It is often said to never review anything while angry. Don't "YELP" angry.
The work done by Blue Sky Plumbing was done in September 2025
It is now mid January 2026.

I've had a great deal of time to look at all aspects of the work and formulate my opinion.
Right after the work was "completed" I called the representative who originally estimated / Sold the job
He came to our property to look over the work and listen to my concerns / complaints.

To start the two people who performed the work were polite enough with me, the home owner.
While on the job there were all kinds of mixed communications between the two. I noted at times they were conflicted and would appear to argue.
Other times over the few days here the seemed to be on the same page.
On at least one occasion one of them seemed possibly ill or lacking much if any motivation to work.

All of this is what resulted in the condition our property was left in at the conclusion of the job.
The approach to the job seemed to be to get things done as quickly as could be done.
I've found that most contractors take this approach to save as much in labor cost as possible, regardless of work quality at times.

I've taken several pictures of the finished work as well as the condition of the property upon completion of the job.

Here is a list of my concerns and complaints expressed to the Blue Sky Representative for this job.

A great deal of over spray  due to neglect of proper prep prior to painting the installed gas line
This left our brick, foundation, and cedar gate painted with gloss black.
I consider this to be damage to our property that could have easily avoided with attention to detail.
Blue Sky got paid, our property got sprayed.

According to the licensed inspector who reviewed the work, it was not even necessary, according to code,
to paint many of the unions and valves that were painted in whole. That being said, the very last piece of black pipe installed
was left unpainted and left to rust in the rain. Left unpainted after it was explained to me by Blue Sky
how it was required that the entirety of the gas line be painted (again, not necessary) Again a lack of attention to detail.

During excavation the downspout drain to the garage was destroyed . No repair or replacement was offered.

Debris was left on the property from work performed.

When a Blue Sky crew returned to fill the trench that was dug by a company they contracted. A few people showed up to refill the ditch by hand with shovels
as opposed to using the same contractor that dug by machine. It took a much longer amount of time, and the yard was left considerably uneven. This again, I assume
was in an effort to save expense, where as bringing a grader back for a fill and a few passes to even things out would have left our yard as it was prior to the work performed.

reviews.author: Jamie Miller
reviews.text: We had such a great experience with this team! From start to finish, everyone we worked with was respectful, knowledgeable, and clearly took pride in their work. Daniel, Joseph, Phaylan, Fernando, and Jayden were all fantastic—professional, friendly, and extremely thorough. From the initial visit and quote to the completion of the project, their attention to detail and care really stood out. It’s so refreshing to work with people who genuinely care about doing a great job. Highly recommend this company and this crew!

reviews.author: Haley Clark
reviews.text:
Andres with Blue Sky Plumbing was awesome. We had a cracked outdoor spigot pipe, and he handled everything quickly and professionally. He was knowledgeable, extremely kind, and took the time to clearly explain what he found and how he fixed it.

The company was very responsive, he arrived right on time, and he left the area clean when he was done. He even helped communicate with our landlord since we rent, which made a stressful situation so much easier. Pricing was transparent and very fair. We would absolutely request him again and highly recommend him

reviews.author: Margaret Eckel
reviews.text: Blue Sky did an excellent job installing our new boiler after our original one needed to be replaced after 40 years.  They worked diligently and together to replace it in a couple of days.  A beautiful job, respectful of us and our schedules.  Great work!  A piece of art!!

reviews.author: Sheryl M.
reviews.text: We have had Blue Sky twice now for issues in our home. Once for a furnace that would not start and yesterday for a backed up sewer. Both times they arrived within the time window, did the work professionally and with friendly communication and were done in a reasonable amount of time for a reasonable fee. Both service technicians who came were personable, knowledgeable and communicated well with us on what the issue was and how they were going to resolve it and the price estimate for the work. I really appreciated the fact that they texted me with a picture of the technician coming so I knew who he was before his arrival - thereby giving me peace of mind as to who I was letting into my home - and that they told me a couple little personal things about him.  This company is the real deal - competent, easy to trust with their client transparency at all levels and clean, reliable technicians. I also like it is a local, family owned business. We will continue to hire and highly recommend them for Plumbing, Heating and Electric needs around our home

plumbers.name: Jennings Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric
plumbers.address: 2279 Romig Rd, Akron, OH 44320, USA

reviews.author: Lauren McIntyre
reviews.text: We called Jennings because we tried to replace some porch lights and found a major electrical mess due to the previous homeowners. Josh came out to assess the situation and gave us an accurate price to re-install one of the electrical boxes, both of our new lights, and caulk it up so the same issues don’t happen again. He even had the correct screws for the light fixtures - which Amazon didn’t think we needed 😒 (and would have stopped us if we had tried to install them ourselves). It looks so much better and we feel better knowing it’s installed correctly. Thanks!

reviews.author: k bloom
reviews.text:
I was hesitant to call any company after questionable work from another company in the past, but read the positive reviews for Jennings. They are locally owned which is a bonus for me. From the outset, Matt was professional, personable and willing to show and explain everything he was doing for my boiler cleaning. I knew it was time for replacement, a topic I brought up, not him. He came in well under what I was envisioned the final bill would be. It was actually a relief to sign up to get my new boiler installed! I will definitely recommend Jennings to everyone I know. I will also be a customer for life! I wasn't aware they provided more services than just HVAC, but I'm very glad I made the call. No pressure, no hidden gimmicks, just great service and they keep you informed for every appointment. Do yourself a favor and look no further than Jennings!

*Adding photos to show what I started with and what I now have. I have to add Sean and Nick (I'm so sorry to the other tech whose name I forgot) were absolutely outstanding! The difference is amazing in my house. My cat definitely approves and found a preferred spot with the radiant floor heating. I will definitely use your services again!! Thank you so very much!

reviews.author: George Jensen
reviews.text: Everything that Jennings does seems to just be right on the money, including Steve, the technician that came to inspect and estimate for a new furnace for us. Now that the installation is complete I have to add how impressed I am with Tyler, Frank and Andy on their work. I am a retired Technician so I know a professional job when I see one! I am getting another estimate this week from Jennings for an upgraded main electrical panel.

reviews.author: Kayla Stephan
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Drew from Jennings Home Services. He was friendly, professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain everything clearly before getting started. The work was done efficiently and with great attention to detail, and he made sure everything was cleaned and working perfectly before he left. It’s clear he takes pride in his work and cares about providing excellent service. I would highly recommend Drew and Jennings Home Services to anyone in need of reliable plumbing services.

reviews.author: RIck Weber
reviews.text: Bobby and his coworker (don’t remember his name) were just great.   They were very courteous and knowledgeable.  They quickly analyzed the situation.  I would not hesitate to use this company again.  This was my first time using Jennings but now have very good impression of this company.

plumbers.name: ARS / Rescue Rooter
plumbers.address: 4071 Powell Ave, Nashville, TN 37204, USA

reviews.author: Stacy Rihel
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough good things about the service we received from ARS.  Our water tank basically blew out and we had water all over the garage.  We called several places for a quote on a Sunday.  Not only was their quote free of charge (even if we decided not to go with them), they responded immediately.  They had a technician, who was authorized to give full quotes on extra large tanks, out to our house within just a few hours.  The office also called twice to give us updates on his arrival.

The service technician,  Jerad, was so very nice and very professional.   He was knowledgeable about the entire process and answered every single question we had.  Even when we had to ask more after he left.  Jerad made the process so easy.  The quotes were very reasonably priced.

Casey, the installation technician came with the new unit the very next day!!  Customer service called to confirm his arrival time and kept me informed.   Casey arrived on time and was super personable.   He was polite,  funny, and professional.   He made the installation look easy!  He even cleaned up the water from the old tanks mess!

I would hire this company again without question!
5 stars to Customer service (thanks ladies)!
5 stars to Jerad and 5 stars to Casey!

As for the Essency tank, 5 stars on looks! It is very esthetically pleasing.   But right now, that is all I can say since it is brand new.  I will review the tank on its own after a few months.

Thank you, team ARS, for such a wonderful experience.   You made spending money not hurt so bad.. lol!

reviews.author: Mike Fischer
reviews.text: William came out to our home yesterday and installed two brand new toilets. He was very knowledgeable and explained what he would be doing to complete the installation. He,  along with the customer service staff were extremely professional, and very easy to communicate with. I recommend ARS, and I would definitely recommend William to do whatever work that you need done.

reviews.author: Mr. & Mrs. McConnell
reviews.text:
Bishnu, Carlos, Ivan, and Ian did a fantastic job installing our new HVAC system and removing all the old!
We have been loving it ever since, has made a HUGE difference in the comfort of our home!

reviews.author: Kelli Shannon
reviews.text: Our HVAC technician Derek was fantastic. He was very knowledgeable, thorough, and clearly takes pride in his work. He went the extra mile to make sure everything was checked and explained things in a way we could understand. On top of that, he was kind and pleasant to deal with during what is usually a stressful situation. Truly appreciate the great service from Derek!

reviews.author: Amanda Dardy
reviews.text:
Derek was super friendly! He was thorough in his assessment of my HVAC system during the maintenance check, and clearly explained the areas of concern. Derek did not try to just sell me a quick, expensive solution but rather provided several options for me to consider, with no pressure.
I would highly recommend ARS to other customers!

plumbers.name: S and J Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 1156 W Shure Dr Suite 130, Arlington Heights, IL 60004, USA

reviews.author: John Yousif
reviews.text:
I recently hired this plumbing service for a leaking pipe under my kitchen sink, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. From the first phone call, Justine was professional, friendly, and quick to schedule an appointment. She made the whole process smooth and stress-free.
When Brandon arrived, he was right on time, explained the issue clearly, and provided a fair estimate before starting the work. He was knowledgeable, efficient, and made sure everything was fixed properly. What really impressed me was how clean and organized he kept the workspace — no mess left behind.
The repair was completed faster than expected, and the pricing was transparent with no hidden fees. It’s such a relief to find a reliable team you can trust.
I will definitely use their services again and highly recommend Brandon and Justine to anyone looking for honest, high-quality plumbing work

reviews.author: Tammy Motin
reviews.text:
I called S&J Plumbing as I had a great experience with them in the past.  Plumbing issues can be so stressful, and Art, the technician that came to our home today, was so patient and thorough in every area, from diagnosis, to a repair that took several hours, coordinating a *second team for another issue, and in offering multiple recommendations to make sure the problem with our lines wouldn’t happen again.

Art told me that he really enjoys his work, and it is very satisfying when he can help resolve issues for customers, and that truly showed today.  I am never at a loss for words, but I can’t begin to tell you what a great job he did today, and today involved a lot of hard work.

In addition, *Mike N and Justin arrived a few hours into the job to replace a key piece of cast iron that sits between the toilet and the main line.  I had no idea how many aspects there were to that piece of the job, and Mike and Justin also exceeded my expectation in every way.

Mike and Justin were equally friendly and knowledgeable, and told me they also really enjoy their work and find it very rewarding to help solve customer’s plumbing issues.

These gentlemen didn’t miss any details and at the end, didn’t rush out, but thoroughly cleaned the job site, and put everything away for me.  It is very obvious these three gentlemen take great pride in their work and in their company.
I highly recommend this company.

The picture that I included in my review is “after”.  Had I been able to take a picture of the “before” you would have seen piles of sopping wet towels trying to stop a flooded floor from causing additional damage.

reviews.author: Eleanor Park
reviews.text: Nick Y and Nick L did a massive 2 day job in my crawl space with excellence, professionalism, and great craft. They explained everything as they worked, left my place very clean during and after, answered all my questions and concerns. I feel like my home is safe for years to come.

reviews.author: BOB SMITH
reviews.text: I called S&J Plumbing to repair a leak that developed behind the wall in our bathroom. Joe was able to get me on the schedule and sent Mark Lindeman out a few hours later. Mark was very nice, very knowledgeable, talented and informative. He noticed our tankless water heater and knew the unit and started telling us about it and how it needs to be maintained (I had no idea) and suggested other items he noticed that could be issues in the future. He wasn’t being a pushy salesman - just an experienced advisor. He did an excellent job with the repair and he was a pleasure to speak with. I definitely recommend S&J Plumbing and, in particular, Mark Lindeman. Thank you for fitting us into todays schedule.

reviews.author: Georgia McGuire
reviews.text: Had to have all our galvanized pipes replaced with copper pipes. Starting with Nick who came out to check out the problem and give us an estimate to Dennis and Robbie who came to our home and did a phenomenal job. Both Dennis and Robbie  were pleasant, professional and courteous. Answered all our questions and gave us a tour of what they did and what they were going to do. I felt comfortable with both of them and their knowledge of our problem was exceptional. The clean up afterwards was wonderful and I would recommend SandJ for any plumbing problems you have or may encounter in the future. They are definitely our go to plumbers for any future problems. All three men were great representatives of the company.

plumbers.name: Mighty Plumbing Heating Air and Electric LLC.
plumbers.address: 4730 Paris St #100, Denver, CO 80239, USA

reviews.author: Elizabeth Planas-Kerr
reviews.text: Very happy with the service and professionalism. I reached out through Thumbtack and was called back just a few minutes later. Nick was able to come the same day, look over the project area and the fuse panel, and  gave several options for how to complete my lighting project. Price was fair and scheduling was very flexible. Justin came to do the installation a couple of days later and he was also quick, clean, and professional. I plan to use this company again for future projects. Before photo with ugly fluorescent lighting and after with new pretty LED light.

reviews.author: Todd Schlafer
reviews.text: I cannot say enough, good things about my experience with mighty plumbing. I got a new mini split in my workshop, which was installed very professionally and cleanly. When the electrician came to connect it I had him look at my breaker box in the workshop because I had a feeling some things were not up to Code. He opened it and we immediately saw there was arcing in it. Ishmael Gonzalez was the electrician. He told me that I should get a new subpanel and that whoever had done it before the wiring was under gauged. He then went in my crawlspace and saw that my house was also not grounded and up to Code since it is an older house. My main breaker box was only rated for 125 Amps and we could upgraded it to 200 Amps. He told me he could get everything done the next day. He arrived at 9:45 AM and didn’t leave till after 10 PM. The guy just crushed it. He was awesome to work with. I kept asking him if he could get it all done in one day and he kept reassuring me I am not leaving till it’s all done. Sure enough he got everything done. I will be requesting him for any future electrical jobs. I do believe they are a bit expensive but when I received the quality of work he provided, I am more than willing to pay more for it.

reviews.author: Brian Howard
reviews.text:
Johnny and Elliot were awesome with explaining the replacement of our furnace. Our furnace is 50+ years old so it is time. I like the fact they are locally owned and operated. Installation is scheduled for Monday, so I can do another review post install. Pre-Install photo attached.

Post-Install
Christoper was awesome. I will recommend him any time. He completed a huge amount of work in a short time frame. He replaced my boiler and water heater at the same time. You can tell he really takes pride in his work and does a great job. He kept me updated throughout the day so there were no surprises, just a great finished product.

reviews.author: Zachary Nelson
reviews.text: We could not have had a better experience with Mighty! Ryan, Eugene, and Eddie were amazing. We had our entire plumbing redone from the house to the city sewer line. These guys made an incredibly stressful situation seamless. Definitely won't be going to anyone else for any future plumbing needs. Thanks again guys!

reviews.author: Drew Morell
reviews.text: Furnace installation. My experience with Mighty Heating was very good. Johnny did a thorough job of diagnosing the problem and explaining the work that needed to be done. He was friendly and easy to talk to. Angel and Cody were efficient, polite and profession during the install and got everything up and running as quickly as possible. Elliott (project manager) did a great job of explaining all of the options for the repair. Everyone listened well to my questions and concerns.

plumbers.name: Precision Plumbing Heating Cooling Electric
plumbers.address: 413 S Arthur Ave, Louisville, CO 80027, USA

reviews.author: Kay Ray
reviews.text: I needed to get water heater maintenance done. Did some research and Precision at a decent price of $49. Tyler arrived exactly at 8:01 AM and did outstanding work and explained everything. Now I feel confident my water heater works well and I know what to look for for any issues. Thanks Precision and Tyler for a great work. I am a very satisfied customer.

reviews.author: Jennifer Haller
reviews.text: Justin and Anthony from Precision Plumbing provided outstanding service for me today. I needed to have both my water heater and furnace replaced! They were very emphatic, kind, and professional. They provided me with options, and were not at all aggressive with their approach. They were extremely patient with my questions and concerns, and left me feeling assured that I had chosen the right people and company to manage the work I needed to have done in my home. Thank you Precision Plumbing for always being there for our plumbing, heating, and AC service needs since 2007! Precision Plumbing also has excellent customer service! When you call to schedule service, you truly feel like the person on the other end of the line truly cares about your issues. To me, that level of service really matters!! Thank you, Precison!!

reviews.author: Davis Clemence Schreiner
reviews.text: Devon was amazing and extremely professional. The original service he came out here to do was not what I needed, so we spoke through the options of what could be done and did a switch up. He knew what he was doing and explained it well so that I knew what I was paying for and the outcome that was expected. He was respectful of my home, pets and family. I recommend Precision Plumbing Heating Cooling Electric and especially Devon.

reviews.author: Thomas Faughnan
reviews.text: The technician, Tyler explained the issue and solution clearly and was upfront about the cost. He gave an honest evaluation of my options. He returned several days later when the part came in and finished the repair quickly. The furnace sounded significantly quieter as he had predicted. Very satisfied with the result.

reviews.author: Patti Masterson
reviews.text: Justin was very knowledgeable and explained several options to us and how they worked.  We were very comfortable with Justin and confident in the installation of our new system.  I would highly recommend Precision Plumbing the team was very professional.

plumbers.name: Advantage Plumbing, Heating & Air Conditioning
plumbers.address: 992 St Charles St, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Matthew Kooperman
reviews.text: I’m a new homeowner and six months into homeownership the thermostat and sensor on the old 9 year old water tank died. I called Four Seasons and they were out within 2 hours to evaluate my situation and make recommendations. I could either repair the old water tank which would be the band-aid approach with no guarantees something else wouldn’t go wrong or I could opt to replace with an entirely new water tank. I went with the second option and 24 hours later one of Four Seasons’ affiliated companies Advantage Plumbing was back at my house removing the old tank and installing a new tank that will hopefully last for as long as I own the home. I appreciate that Four Seasons was there for me when I needed help in an emergency and the level of communication from the service technician who came out to evaluate my situation was great. He didn’t try and upsell and he was honest and straightforward about my options. The service was really excellent. The install job 24 hours later went smoothly. I was relieved to have hot water again!  I ended up having a question about the billing invoice that customer service was unable to answer and I requested a callback from a manager and the manager called back which helped and I appreciated. Thank you. Five star experience. I definitely recommend Four Seasons and Advantage Plumbing.

reviews.author: Keshara Tyson
reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience with Four Seasons, and I truly appreciate their outstanding customer service. From start to finish, the team was professional, responsive, and reassuring during a stressful situation. They took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure I felt informed and supported throughout the process.

I especially want to recognize Madani, my technician, who did an amazing job. He was knowledgeable, respectful, punctual, and very thorough in his work. Madani went above and beyond to ensure everything was done correctly and took the time to answer my questions with patience and professionalism. His positive attitude and expertise made a big difference.

I highly recommend Four Seasons to anyone looking for reliable, high-quality service. Thank you again for a great experience!

reviews.author: Patricia Davis
reviews.text:
Excellent service from the salesperson Mr. Williams who came out to my home. The next day followed by the two technicians came out to install my furnace. Excellent performance all across-the-board they get a 10 out of 10. Thank you so much for having qualified technicians who come out to my home to guarantee safety and make sure that I am safe in my home after they leave by doing qualified work!!
Thank you Four Seasons your Company and your Services are the BEST ( 10 ) all across the board!!

reviews.author: KJ Johnson
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Four Seasons 😊. I required prompt service and they were able to accommodate me for the same day to tend to my furnace service. As the temperature has been so cold, this worked out greatly. Alex fixed my issue quickly and is very knowledgeable in his trade. Appreciate the great customer service from Alex and from the teammates at the office. I highly recommend all to use their services!

reviews.author: David Montee
reviews.text: Excellent work replacing my full HVAC system with new furnace, air conditioner, humidifier and UV lamp.  Install was done and looks very professional.  My installer Kasper was polite and did exceptional work.  Thank you!  New system is operating perfectly and exceeds my expectations.  Thank you Four Seasons

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 516 N Charles St Ste 407, Baltimore, MD 21201, USA

reviews.author: Paul Boykin
reviews.text: Vincent is very professional, knowledgeable and patient. He took the time to explain everything he was doing to repair my mother's drain and assured her he would come back if she had an issue

reviews.author: Chris Litz
reviews.text: Had an emergency hot water heater replacement done today, It's Saturday and they were here within about an hour after I called, excellent. Paul the technician did a great job. He was very friendly and explained everything that needed done, with cost upfront. He had me up and running again in just a few hours and cleaned everything up, very professional. Thanks Paul.

reviews.author: Raymond Keys
reviews.text:
Netch was very knowledgeable and may it simple for me. He was also quick with replacement my faucet and clean up everything without  me having to ask or worry. I’m overall happy with the results and yeah I would use him again. But no time soon.

Very Respectfully,
Ray

reviews.author: Sonia McCleary
reviews.text: Zauza Dochung was the technician that came out and fixed the reported link. He showed up with a smile and a good since of humor. He assessed the issue and was able to fix it without an issue. He was very patient and able to walk me through the issue and the way he was going to fix it. Thank you Mr. Dochung for getting the job done and for your hard work.

reviews.author: Sergei Ponomarev
reviews.text: Israel did a great job unclogging our kitchen sink drain. He was courteous, clean and friendly and did a superb job (the clog was 50 feet away). We would definitely recommend him as a professional to those in need of plumbing related services.

plumbers.name: Rescue Air and Plumbing
plumbers.address: 9639 Greenville Ave, Dallas, TX 75243, USA

reviews.author: Susan Safronoff
reviews.text: We have used Rescue Air for five years. For yearly maintenance and also a new unit. With the maintenance plan it is always reassuring that help is on the way as soon as you call. Today we had more outstanding service with Max and Andre. So polite, knowledgeable, caring, neat, safe and clean. I’m 100% for Rescue Air and their leadership. They were doing my bi yearly maintenance which is covered with my maintenance plan.

reviews.author: Amber Mendoza
reviews.text: Philip was so helpful and didn’t even mind answering my questions while he was working on my leaky toilet. He was cheerful which was nice and super fast. He cleaned up after he left as well! Would definitely call again and will recommend to my friends.

reviews.author: Chrissy Heinke
reviews.text: I’ve used Rescue Air & Plumbing several times for a/c issues and have always had success. Their technicians are always friendly and knowledgeable. Derrick Posley helped me this time and he is so nice and knows his stuff. He explained everything he was doing before and after the work. He even got me to sign up for a membership. That’s how much I trust Rescue to do great work!

reviews.author: Alan F
reviews.text: Eric was great! Knowledgeable about his work and area of expertise, good communication ability, and transparent during the whole repair process. One of the best utility service experiences I’ve had in a long time. 👍🏼👍🏼

reviews.author: Dana
reviews.text:
Dylan was excellent! He was polite, professional, and very knowledgeable. I can’t recommend Rescue Air and Plumbing enough.

They also have fantastic customer service and follow up. The text feature to communicate with the scheduling staff is top notch.

5 star employees and service!

plumbers.name: J&J Plumbing, Heating, Cooling, & Electric
plumbers.address: 61 Seiberling St, Akron, OH 44305, USA

reviews.author: Adrianne
reviews.text:
I had an emergency situation when I noticed one of my dogs kept going to the same spot outside. When I walked over, I could hear water running before I even saw anything. I went into the basement and found water spewing everywhere from a split pipe connected to our outdoor spigot. I immediately shut off the main water valve and called J & J Plumbing Heating Cooling & Electric.

They were able to dispatch David C. to my home in LaGrange, Ohio the same day within a few hours. David was extremely professional, friendly, and patient. He explained everything in detail as he assessed the situation and showed me where the pipe had split in multiple places, even though we had turned off the shutoff and removed the hose well before winter.

He didn’t have PEX on his truck that day, so he safely capped the PVC pipe so we could turn our water back on and scheduled a return visit to complete the permanent repair. When he came back, David replaced the damaged section with PEX to allow for better expansion if freezing occurs, installed a much better shutoff valve, and even relocated the pipe farther inside the house to reduce the risk of this happening again. He confirmed there were no leaks and waited to make sure everything was working properly, which gave me real peace of mind.

He wore boot covers every time he entered the house, kept the area clean, and was very respectful of our home. Pricing was explained upfront with full transparency. While they may be slightly higher than some, the quick response, professionalism, and quality of work absolutely made it worth it.

I would definitely call J & J again and highly recommend David C. and their team.

reviews.author: Angela Stacey
reviews.text: We needed to have a drain for a wet bar installed. Service was easy to schedule with a low lead time. David C and Jack B did a wonderful job installing the drain and cleaning up. They were also very friendly and kind. We will definitely use J & J Plumbing in the future if we need any more work done.

reviews.author: camryn manley
reviews.text: 100/10 recommend, I had new light fixtures put it, our electrician,  Braeden, did an amazing job, very efficient and polite. I also got a couple pipes fixed, the plumber, Dawson, was so kind to talk/explain what he’s going to do, never had a problem since. I would pick this business over any other any day!

reviews.author: Erin Shehadi
reviews.text:
We’ve had a great experience with J&J Heating, Cooling & Electric and their annual service subscription. It’s such a relief having a true one-stop shop for our home’s HVAC, electrical, plumbing and general service needs.

Most recently, we had a full electrical system inspection, and it was incredibly detailed and thorough. Scott W. took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure nothing was overlooked. He also installed a chandelier in our foyer, and it looks amazing:  professional, precise, and done right the first time.

We’ve also had our furnace and well serviced through J&J, and every visit has been just as smooth and professional. The team is reliable, knowledgeable, and respectful of our home.

Highly recommend J&J if you’re looking for dependable service and peace of mind knowing everything is handled by one trusted company!

reviews.author: Tracy Piccorelli
reviews.text: Justin was honest, kind and patient (explained everything I asked about, which was alot).  New water heater installed quickly and efficiently. Highly recommend J&J.

plumbers.name: Hiller Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical
plumbers.address: 241 Southpointe Way, Murfreesboro, TN 37130, USA

reviews.author: Adam Corgan
reviews.text:
Hiller saved our Holidays. Our HVAC unit went out on a Friday night. I got in touch with James that night and he was out bright and early the very next day(on his day off) to give me a quote. Which beat the competition might I add.
Then two days later on Monday the technicians Tim and Wes showed up right on time with the new system, talked us through the whole process and had us back up and running with a brand new unit in no time. They were super polite, professional and played with our dogs. They were super clean and even repaired some junk work that was there prior to them. They went above and beyond!
Another cool thing, they send you text updates so you can track your schedule and be prepared for their arrivals.
This whole company and the service team are awesome. Time to return these space heaters.
Highly recommend!

reviews.author: JeffN TN
reviews.text: Tim and Wesley showed up polite professional for 2 days of a very difficult low crawl space work to change out the air ducts that had become laden with dirt, mold, and fungus. After seeing the details of how hard a job this one was by the middle of the second day I'd have been cursing and throwing things if under the house. Not Tim and Wesley. Always polite always professional, tougher than I. These gentlemen left the entire yard and crawl space clean and debris free. I need HVAC or Plumbing work Hiller is my call now based on the great employee representation of themselves and Hiller. Thanks to Michael for coming out and doing the estimate.  The air quality in our home is undeniably improved to awesome. 40 year old ducts, they just get nasty over time. Call Hiller. They'll pro fix it. Thanks guys.

reviews.author: Ryan Whitcomb
reviews.text: The technician arrived on time, was professional and nice, and performed a thorough maintenance on our system. He explained everything he did clearly, made sure all components were operating properly. We appreciate the attention to detail and the respectful service. Highly recommend!!!

reviews.author: Hunter A.
reviews.text: Nathan was great. He was quick, knowledgeable, and friendly. He provided me with extra information about preventative maintenance and informed me of a couple of other issues I had and what costs for repair would be and how I could fix them myself. Edit: The service was also completed at 8pm, and I called at 7pm, they were extremely responsive.

reviews.author: Heidi Reeves
reviews.text: I had a major plumbing backup, several toilets and showers backing up and filling with sewage.  Not good!!  Hiller dispatched someone the same day.  Caleb was the technician and he was great!  He was kind, professional and explained everything fully.  He was clearly experienced and made an effort to save me money.  I would definitely recommend this company and Caleb specifically.

plumbers.name: P.K. Wadsworth Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 34280 Solon Rd, Solon, OH 44139, USA

reviews.author: Peter Giang
reviews.text: I had my annual furnace inspection. Technician was here for all 10 minutes (literally) and left. Dusty, dirty filter was left behind and the power to the house was off the entire time. This leaves me wondering if he has known the true working status of the furnace. I truly believe he did not do a thorough inspection. I hope the regional manager reads this and give a formal counseling to this kind of work ethic because know it is not representative of the company.

reviews.author: Nancy Thrams
reviews.text: PK Wadsworth is the best.  We have used other local services in the past and needed a change because of increased prices. So ask around in our neighborhood and PK name came up with very positive comments. So we gave them a call and have found them to be excellent and the right cost. And if you have a boiler, Mike is really great. Found him to be honest and very knowledgeable.

reviews.author: Brandon Boehlke
reviews.text: The electrical department at PK is amazing they give free quotes for panel changes and generators and even if your not looking for that their service call fees are the lowest I have heard about anywhere! Call PK Wadsworth for great experienced electricians!

reviews.author: Check One
reviews.text: We couldn’t be happier with the HVAC service from Mike M, who was absolutely fantastic! From the moment he arrived, he was friendly, professional, and incredibly knowledgeable. He explained everything in a clear way, and made sure all of our questions were answered. You can tell Mike truly cares about doing the job right. Everything was done efficiently, educating us along the way which gave us real peace of mind knowing that our system is now running safely and smoothly. The whole experience was smooth and stress-free. We’d highly recommend Mike M who provided top-notch service! Thank you Mike!

reviews.author: Fe Olson
reviews.text:
Mike Marcinick is Awesome  and knowledgeable Technician! He was able  to diagnose are problem with our Boiler Heating System. We even had some options on fixing it or install a new system. Mike was so courteous towards us and we felt he was doing his best for us.
Also I want to give additional compliments to the other technicians that made all this possible on the pictures posted on the boiler installation
Eric A. Bowen:
Who inspected the old boiler and recommended the best boiler replacement.  He also made finance advice that got the ball rolling.  He m a de it so easy and was able to get the boiler installation started the next day.
Jermaine Jolly and two other helper Technicians that made the installation efficient.
The Master Technician who made all his knowledge and expertise to get the Boiler upand running..You and your crew are so AWESOME  !!  The heat is working great and we are so thankful for PK Wadsworth coming to the rescue.  We highly recommend this company for your Heating and Cooling needs.

plumbers.name: Steve Huff Plumbing, Heating & Air
plumbers.address: 113 Witherspoon Dr, Kingsport, TN 37663, USA

reviews.author: Bob Welch
reviews.text:
