Replacement of the water service line from the meter to the house. The technician arrived when scheduled and made an assessment of the problem. He completely discussed the issue, offered corrective action with costs for each.
I chose an option to replace. The technician and his apprentice showed up when scheduled and commenced a difficult job. In the 3 days they were here I was extremely pleased with how professional they were. They went out of their way to make the job as little a problem to my handicapped lifestyle. The technician even discovered issues with my plumbing and corrected them to bring the system into compliance with code.
Needless to say I will use them again. In fact I signed up for their annual maintenance program. I strongly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Lara Nagle
reviews.text: Our plumber Chris did a very thorough assessment of the house and worked diligently for hours to address a long list of fixture updates and repairs. I also really appreciate how communicative he was, and willing and able to answer all of my questions. Chris and his assistant were respectful of our house and kept everything clean. So far, the repaired items are working well and most of the work is under warranty in case something happens. It did seem relatively expensive but the service was very professional.

reviews.author: Rachel P
reviews.text: Excellent service and experience. During a major storm they sent Zack out for the initial assessment. He was very polite and quickly found my heating issue. John N. came out within 24 hours and did the actual repair. He was another super polite, efficient guy. They were sensitive to keeping the house clean and worked quickly. Issue resolved and my heat is back on! Thanks Zack and John N.

reviews.author: Joe Oliver
reviews.text: Had them replace my 50 yr old leaking home water supply line. My yard is red clay and I understand the problems this causes. BUT they made an unbelievable mess.  Not only in my yard but also my neighbors and the street is still a mud hole. They also damaged my concrete driveway. I complained and someone from the office called and asured me there would be a follow up to this. Still waiting.

reviews.author: Pam
reviews.text:
Our technician Chris did a great job!! He had previously installed a water heater at my old house and did a fantastic job so I was glad
to see him. We had a leaky pipe under the house this time. He fixed it quickly and assessed the condition of the piping under the house and gave us options for further repairs. Can’t go wrong with Steve Huff Plumbing!

plumbers.name: Schuler Service, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1314 Tilghman St, Allentown, PA 18102, USA

reviews.author: Stacey Silliman
reviews.text: Kevin and Cayden looked at my sump pump and Kevin did suggest a new one since mine was not functioning. I expected as much and he and Cayden had it installed quickly and professionally. I love Schuler Service. Always professional and helpful and I am a repeat customer and always will be. Also thanks to the kind receptionists too for being so nice and decent when booking. Everyone has great customer service skills which means a lot to me. Five stars. I would give them 100 stars if I could!

reviews.author: D F
reviews.text:
If you live in Macungie Borough like me, you may enjoy “great” water pressure … but be careful, because you could unknowingly have *100 psi* running through your pipes, like I did!  At least, before Chuck Bell from Schuler installed a PRV (pressure reducing valve) to bring it down to a safe level.

It’s never fun to spend money on something you didn’t know you needed (and isn’t in budget).  But Chuck eased that blow by being patient (VERY patient) with my uncertainty and million questions.  Even when I asked the same thing multiple times, he was never impatient nor did he get offended - he stayed calm and kind.

Chick went out of his way to help set my mind at ease about the project and expenditure.  He went above and beyond: checking the pressure setting on my expansion tank (and matching it to the house pressure, as it should have been); measuring the temperature of my hot water; (and increasing the temperature on my heater to an appropriate level); and checking my toilet tank to make sure there wasn’t a leak.

I can’t forget everyone I spoke with on the phone at the Schuler Service office - they were all SO NICE!  I never felt like I was being a pest (these days, some places make you feel like … unless something has exploded or someone needs open heart surgery, you are wasting their time, so they can’t get you off the phone fast enough).  Everyone I spoke with at Schuler was warm and friendly, yet professional.  Thank you!

This review is too long and I doubt anyone has read it all, so I’ll stop now.  Do not hesitate to call Schuler; ask for Chuck Bell!

reviews.author: S. Miller
reviews.text: Excellent services. Appointments were easy to made and they arrived within specified time. Jason Price was the team member who fixed  my shower faucets and kitchen. He took the time to assess, provided explanations of plausible options with their pros and cons, and took the time to teach me how to best care for the plumbing integrity. He was tidy, professional, friendly, and attentive to his work. I trust Schuler for over 3 years now, and that trust has not changed. Thank you very much, Jason, for an excellent work. We appreciate you!

reviews.author: John Edmonds
reviews.text: I would like to thank both Jim and Noah for the timely and quality workmanship performed on the waterline work done at my home. Professional from the get go, I would give these guys a 10+ if possible.Schuler Service is the go to place for all your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: greg
reviews.text: I called Schuler, not in an emergency, but in need to address an issue with water pressure and air in the pipes.   They scheduled promptly for the next day.   The technician who arrived was very friendly, professional, courteous, but most importantly, knowledgeable!   After throughly diagnosing the plumbing, and explaining that there were several issues at play, Chuck outlined everything and made clear what options we had and the potential risk/reward of each.   After a decision was made, and a few phone calls later, parts were delivered and the work was completed.     The service was excellent and in the future I will not hesitate to call Shuler and ask for Chuck when plumbing issues arise.

plumbers.name: Plumbing 911
plumbers.address: 1103 Wooster Road North, Barberton, OH 44203, USA

reviews.author: Jean Kindry
reviews.text:
As a first time caller to Plumbing 911, I was pleased to book next day service for repair of 2 toilets with different problems. What seemed like a straight forward solution was anything but.
Shane Duncan  came up with an ingenious solution and gave us a perfect result.  He is very knowledgeable and goes the extra mile to give the customer satisfaction.

reviews.author: Chris Foster
reviews.text: Rob was excellent. He was highly experienced, on-time, gave clear communication, did quality work, and took time to explain a few things to me along the way. I would highly recommend Rob and Plumbing 911.

reviews.author: Nicole Osborne
reviews.text: I had a slow leak of my hot water heater and called for an estimate to repair. Shane came to the house (no fee just to show up for an estimate) and provided a thorough estimate. He scheduled the repair. Unfortunately, the repair did not work so I had to have a new water heater installed. They actually gave me partial credit towards the new install from the repair effort. Shane did a WONDERFUL job. He was friendly, personable, courteous and most of all efficient. I would highly recommend if you needed repair work or new installs to call Plumbing 911 and specifically ask for Shane! My experience could not have gone any better.

reviews.author: Teagan Busby
reviews.text: After dealing with repeat flooding and a previous “fix” that didn’t hold, this company was a lifesaver. They were professional, kind, and extremely thorough. Communication was great, the technician was efficient and knowledgeable, and they went above and beyond by scoping the entire line to ensure there were no other problems. I finally feel confident the issue was handled correctly. Highly recommend and they have a customer for life now!

reviews.author: Chris Miller
reviews.text: Scott from Plumbing911 was very helpful arriving promptly, diagnosing the repair, and getting the job done in an hour.  I appreciate the call ahead service, which was great so I could meet Scott at building from work.  Thank you for supporting your Christian community at Solon United Methodist church.  Chris

plumbers.name: WyattWorks Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1372 Lloyd Rd, Wickliffe, OH 44092, USA

reviews.author: Brian Rolinc
reviews.text: Whole team from calling, scheduling, service, to follow up is always so pleasant and helpful. Xander was my tech this time and he was patient and insightful in explaining everything that was going on and answering questions, in a way that made me feel like I was an expert by the time he left. What I liked best was that after Xander unclogged the drain, he was meticulous in double in triple checking for no new drips or leaks, and ensuring that the clog really was clear and not just temporarily before backing up again.

reviews.author: Nikole Wakeling
reviews.text:
Alex was knowledgeable, efficient, and truly focused on solving my problem while helping me save money. I really appreciated that there was no pressure to complete repairs that weren’t actually needed.

They have definitely become my go-to for plumbing and electrical issues for both myself and my clients. As a realtor, recommending quality professionals is essential in my business, and I feel confident referring them knowing my clients will be well taken care of.

reviews.author: Jim Piscioneri
reviews.text:
Alex and his co-worker did an excellent job of explaining the various options available to us. We had a clogged kitchen sink drain and needed to replace an old secondary shutoff valve.
All work was done in a timely manner and the guys were very pleasant to communicate with. We are very pleased with the entire experience. The communications via text were OUTSTANDING ! Thank you WyattWorks Plumbing !  We have a new plumber to contact for our needs !

reviews.author: Mike Brady
reviews.text: I scheduled an appointment with them because my mother's basement was flooded with sever water. I made an appointment in the morning and they promised to have someone that morning. They latered called and they said they would not come out for another 4 days. I knew a family member of there's so I went out on a limb. I got my mother to go with them instead of someone else. I really advocated for them. And they let me down! Unfortunately, I can't see a way to hold them accountable at this moment.

reviews.author: Linda Weitzel
reviews.text: Jesse and Indrek answered all our questions and were very very knowledgeable,  efficient and friendly! They explained what to expect and went out of their way to accommodate our needs. We will definitely have WyattWorks help us in the future!  I also appreciate the follow up calls from James regarding the service performed.

plumbers.name: Hiller Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical
plumbers.address: 1891 Slaughter Rd, Madison, AL 35758, USA

reviews.author: Richard Drewyor
reviews.text: JR and his team replaced our 40-year-old HVAC ductwork system in the crawl space. It took them about 6 hours to complete the job. They did an excellent job. Everything is working well now with good air flow and better temperature control. When they finish the job he explained everything that was done. We are happy with the work. We highly recommend him and his team for this work.

reviews.author: Kelion '___'
reviews.text: Hiller took our call at 9pm when we were having issues with our AC and had a technician out next day. They send a notification when the technician is on the way and you can track the time before arrival. They were here during the time slot alloted and didn't run over. Sloan was a great help and got everything squared away quickly. Will be recommending them to friends and family.

reviews.author: Genesis Brooks Viverette
reviews.text: Hiller, Inc. is an amazing company and I am always impressed with the professionalism that is given regarding every service. Technician Robert Mertz came out to check the heater on January 19th and he was knowledgeable and professional. He did a heat wellness check and no issues were found. My favorite thing about Hiller is the promptness in arrival time. They are always on time to complete the job given. I recommend Hiller, Inc to anyone.

reviews.author: stephany sinai
reviews.text: Clark did an outstanding job at installing my google nest camera. He was professional and troubleshooted some issues until the work was complete. I truly appreciate him going above and beyond.

reviews.author: Michael Grieco
reviews.text: Great company! Highly recommend. Had some modem issues after rebooting to pick up the new generator cable for the Kohler app and Roy and his team got everything working, great job guys!

plumbers.name: Hi-Tech Plumbing & Leak Detect
plumbers.address: 3712 E 2nd St, Edmond, OK 73034, USA

reviews.author: Chris
reviews.text:
The boys did excellent. Great communication, interacted very well, very knowledgeable about the job that they were performing for the customer. They let me know every step that they were doing and I would recommend them again and again - great job team- keep up the good work. Remember team, customer service and respect is the number one goal in business.

Thank you , so much team look forward to hearing from you real soon on our next step. Tattoos were awesome....
C. Smith Family,

reviews.author: Joshua Rutherford
reviews.text: Overall I had a good experience. The company had issue with the answering service getting the call out, so I had to wait a while longer than expected, but once they received it they were at my home within 30 minutes. The technician Amanda Sheppard was very professional, courteous and knowledgeable. What we found wasn't a simple fix, so I had to get multiple quotes. They were a little on the higher side as far as cost, but the warranty they offer was pretty good. If you needed a quick repair than I would definitely call them first, but if you need a major overhaul than it's always best to shop around.

reviews.author: Mark S
reviews.text:
Air Comfort Solutions manages this company. They blackmail you into giving them 5 star reviews because their technicians get 25$ if you do.

I’d give them 0 stars if I could. This company is the single worst thing to ever happen to me. They refused to attempt to clear a drain for me and instead sold me a 10,000$ service as a cheaper option than digging up my floor. they preyed on my fear and ignorance and their “solution” flooded my utility room and garage and doesn’t work even after they “fixed” it by replacing a part in the pump they used to bypass my floor drain. Another plumbing company cleared my drain for 230 dollars in less than an hour.

Never under any circumstances use this company for your plumbing needs. They are poorly managed and have poor ethical practices. Not to mention they’re extremely over priced even if you do happen to get lucky and not have them break or ruin something in your home.

reviews.author: Capt Dave
reviews.text: Levi and Dalton were very professional and friendly.  They quickly diagnosed the potential problem and solved it in no time.  They were protective of our property and cleaned up very well after the job was done. They asked if we had any questions about the job and solution and encouraged to call again if we had any other plumbing needs. Great representative of the company.  Oh, the price was very good!

reviews.author: Anani Mouse
reviews.text:
Overcharging for simple repairs.  A gasket had come off PVC pipe under sink. Part cost less than $10, took different plumber 5 minutes to complete repair. Hi Tech/Air Comfort wanted to charge me $1100 and rebuild my sink drain that was installed last year. No thank you.
Their plumbers work on commission and they charge $800 an hour regardless of what the problem is. It’s like paying a plastic surgeon to remove a splinter.
For large elaborate repairs, I think they do great work, but for simple stuff, I’ll go elsewhere.

No one from your staff has reached out to me to discuss my complaint about your overcharging policies. You need to do better - be transparent, if you are going to charge a base rate of $800 an hour for ANY repair you need to have that on your website.

plumbers.name: Lifeline Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 296 Williams Pl, East Dundee, IL 60118, USA

reviews.author: Victor Haddock
reviews.text: Great turnaround. Hot water wet out yesterday evening. Less than 24 hours later we have a new water heater. Melissa in the back office was great giving us timing expectation. Kyle explained what happened to the old heater and what he did with the new one and why. They covered the floor ensuring where they walked was clean.

reviews.author: Paula Weisserth
reviews.text: The work was performed  on time, correctly and on budget. Not only did we need to replace the old and discharge pipe - We also had a leaking faucet outside that required creating an access panel inside. Erick is a great Technician! Not only was he knowledgeable, helpful, and well prepared- He was extremely polite and friendly! he cleaned up after he finished and even pointed out a few other Items we may want to update in the future for our rental property. I would highly recommend this company!

reviews.author: Vilia Drazdys
reviews.text: Miguel, our technician, was absolutely great. He was professional, knowledgeable and very courteous. He immediately assessed the issue with our sewer line and proposed a solution. He explained everything well (without talking down to us) and gave us the cost up front. He was very careful of our home and made sure all surfaces were protected before starting work.  When finished, Miguel cleaned everything and tested all drains several times to ensure everything was reconnected properly and that nothing leaked.

reviews.author: Ayomide Omole
reviews.text: I had a great experience with D’Andre , he came to fix my heat. He was extremely pleasant, professional, and respectful from start to finish. He arrived on time, explained everything clearly, and made sure the issue was fully resolved before leaving. You could tell he genuinely cared about doing a good job and making sure I was comfortable. Excellent customer service, great attitude, and very knowledgeable. I truly appreciate the quality of his work and would absolutely recommend him to anyone needing heating services.

reviews.author: John Kent
reviews.text: OK Art, we really appreciate your prompt response and coming over to diagnose the sewer line collapse. Also getting started tomorrow is fantastic. We really need your help with this one and you’re coming through.

plumbers.name: Maitz Home Services
plumbers.address: 3320 Hamilton Blvd, Allentown, PA 18103, USA

reviews.author: Dawn Ranzan
reviews.text: Brandon was wonderful! Arrived as scheduled, super friendly and respectful. Assessed the issue, gave me the price and fixed my broken pipe. He fixed the pipe in my crawl space efficiently and there was no surprise charges when completed. So pleased with Maitz and specifically Brandon. They've earned a new customer.

reviews.author: Rhonda Vasconcellos
reviews.text: This company I highly recommend to anyone who is looking to replace there furance or any type of plumbing or electrical work done.   Anthony who is in charge of finance aspect works with you and your family and the technician Jerry and Chris are not just good at their job but they also clean up behind themselves.  Very very professional and highly recommend.

reviews.author: Melissa Helmstetter
reviews.text:
My experience with Maitz was nothing short of outstanding. I contacted them with my emergency, and to my absolute relief, a technician was dispatched and arrived at my home within the hour. This remarkably swift response was incredibly reassuring and immediately diffused a great deal of the stress associated with the incident.

Upon arrival, the team from Maitz demonstrated exceptional professionalism and efficiency. They quickly and accurately assessed the issue with my faulty water heater. Their communication was impeccable; they clearly and concisely explained the necessary repairs and the recommended course of action, ensuring I understood every detail without overwhelming me.

They proceeded with the work directly, tackling the replacement of my old unit with impressive speed and skill. Beyond their technical expertise, I was particularly impressed by their friendly and approachable demeanor. They patiently answered every single question I had throughout the process, providing thorough explanations and ensuring my complete peace of mind.

The entire service, from the initial urgent call to the successful completion of the water heater replacement, was handled with unparalleled professionalism and genuine care. I wholeheartedly recommend Maitz for their outstanding responsiveness, expertise, and commitment to excellent customer service.

Melissa Helmstetter

reviews.author: M. Fredric Rieders
reviews.text:
Maitz Home Services and Brandon were outstanding in there service and performance. We had an intermittent well pump problem and Brandon was able to quickly diagnose it and gave us a proposal for a complete solution. It was also very reassuring to see how thoroughly he checked all the systems and demonstrated that they were functioning properly with the exception of a  component in the filtering side. He was very knowledgeable very professional and thorough in his examination of the system and explained everything to me clearly. I woul⅘d highly recommend Brandon and Maitz Home Services. They also have excellent service Representatives via text, email and phone who checked on progress. Natasha was a very professional support rep as wel.l  She called me after the visit and made sure everything was done properly and professionally.
Kudos to the Maitz Home Service team, we will use them again and they also do electrical and plumbing which we will call on them for.

reviews.author: Bryan Lokez
reviews.text: We were in need  of  new water heater. Lyle came out installed a new one for us the same day. 2 years ago Lyle installed a water softener filtration system for us. Lyle's work that he does is very precise amd honest. We're very pleased with his service.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 2300 Hammond Dr, Schaumburg, IL 60173, USA

reviews.author: Michael Touhy
reviews.text:
We had sewage coming up from our basement laundry drain and called Roto Rooter to help us. They did anything but. Eddie arrived on site and called in his supervisor, Max Corner. Max said that he was unable to open up the main basement clean out so they had to run equipment from the main floor bathroom. This added 8-10’ to how far they attempted to rod which apparently weakened their equipment enough that they were not able to properly determine where the actual damage was. Max drew up a proposal and told me once I signed they would be able to get a crew out the next day to begin work. I signed the contract trying to get my home back in order and Max then called to tell me they actually wouldn’t be able to start the next day because he had already left and did not map out the yard (never received an explanation as to why this was not done when he was on site). He returned the next day and due to the cold weather he could not get his equipment or spray paint to work leading him to pace my yard yelling curse words for 20+ minutes getting to the point where a neighbor had to call and ask if everything was ok at the house. Max then came back in to do the same inside because he was not able to get the toilet back on (photo attached). He left it like this and said it was fine because it wasn’t actively leaking.
The next day a crew was supposed to arrive by 10am and they showed up around 2pm. They dug a hole and cracked my line and despite this area not being the issue, put in a clean out and left. Public Works actually told them that that do not appear to be the issue spot and they told him that that was the spot they were contracted to dig. They sent in a jetter who said that the issue was actually 8-10’ farther down the line and max would have to come back. The jetter also would not hook up his equipment to the main line because it was only accessible under my porch and he would not go under there. So he cut a hole in my basement window screen and hooked up to a near 100 year old laundry tub which is now leaking.
Max came back and confirmed that the issue was actually 10’ farther down the line and immediately quoted me an additional $7000 even though I was already out $8500 FOR WORK THAT DID NOT HAVE TO BE DONE!
I told him that I was not going to use them and called a local plumber who said that the job was actually $3500.
I’m getting in touch with an attorney as I now have more damage than when I called in Roto Rooter and they did unnecessary work for which they overcharged.

reviews.author: Ieasha Mccullough
reviews.text: So grateful for Mike! He did an excellent job explaining what the possible reasons for my sink backup could be and an even greater job providing me with reasonable and affordable solutions. Extremely satisfied with the service provided. Got my water flowing and sink draining in no time! Huge thank you to MIke!

reviews.author: immari hysaw
reviews.text: Mike at Roto-Rooter did a fantastic job! Took time to explain the process, periodically informed me of his progress, resolved the issue and cleaned up after himself. Got here quickly and completed the job quickly as well. Highly Recommend!

reviews.author: Keith Schultz
reviews.text: Had a utility sink in basement that would not drain. House built in 1921 so pipe is very old cast iron. Your technician worked on the clog diligently for over 1.5 hours trying multiple rodding bits and sizes. He was not giving up without a fight, and fight he did. He was very proffeaional, cleaned area after he finished, and apologized for not being able to clear the drain. He is a great asset to your company, and I commend him for a heroic effort. I would give him 6 stars if I could. Since he could not clear the drain he did not charge me, which I honestly felt bad about.  Bravo Roto Router! Luis, tech # 6165 is an outstanding employee for you guys!

reviews.author: Jeff Therkelsen
reviews.text: Mike, my technician, was awesome. He was extremely courteous and kept me informed throughout the repair. Mine was a very difficult main drain to open. He put every effort into clearing it. He just wouldn’t give up. I’m sure many other companies would have thrown in the towel and recommended that I call an excavator. Not Mike; he kept at it until he was able to clear it out. There is one set fee and he gave me that upfront. And then he proceeded to spend four hours working on it. This is the second time that I’ve needed their service and was more than satisfied with their. On a scale of one to five they are a ten!

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 5126 N Ravenswood Ave, Chicago, IL 60640, USA

reviews.author: Michelle Tyler
reviews.text: I had a great experience working with Clayton G. From the start, he really listened and understood what I was hoping to accomplish, and did everything possible to make sure the work aligned with my goals. He explained the process clearly, was respectful of my time and property, and paid attention to every detail. Super friendly and easy to work with — I never felt like the initial plan was being altered or going in a direction that would cost more than I agreed to. The finished result is exactly what I needed. I would absolutely use him again and highly recommend to anyone looking for a reliable and thoughtful plumber.

reviews.author: Robert Koehler
reviews.text: Emmanuel, Gio, and Greg were a great team. Handled the job with complete professionalism and left confident the money was well spent with the right people.  Fixed the sewer line using the best method and technology. Good interpersonal skills. Thank you.

reviews.author: Jose Flores
reviews.text: Christian and Julian stopped by for maintenance, my wife and I had been complaining about a running toilet for a few weeks. Christian changed out our flapper, and even tightened down the toilet bolts while he was at it, at no extra charge! I love having a plumbing company that doesn’t try to upsell on everything possible. Thank you Christian and Julian!

reviews.author: Susan Bledsoe
reviews.text:
My technician Andreas Pastos showed up on time. He was friendly and personable. He thought he was there to do a sewage line clearance but I really needed a toilet unplugged. I had tried to plunge the toilet myself but due to a recent hip surgery was unable to do it without increasing my pain exponentially.  Andreas used my plunger, gave me a lesson and how to use less energy to get the line clear and took care of my plumbing issue quickly and efficiently.  On top of that he was a great neighbor and would accept no money. He would not even let me give him money to buy him breakfast.  Who dies that any more?  I am so grateful.   This company will definitely be on my go-to list.

I also love their security. They text me a picture of the guy who was going to show up at my door and let me know exactly when he was coming.  First class.

reviews.author: Seth Maybury
reviews.text: Super helpfull.   They called back on a Sunday late afternoon and came out that evening.   3 plumbers came to the house on Monday to finish the job.   Joe, George and Anthony.   Highly recommend them.   No one wants to have Sewage backing up, they treated it like an emergency and kept at it.    Thank you.  Highly recommended..  (and the price was 100% fair).

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing of Nashville
plumbers.address: 207 Century Ct, Franklin, TN 37064, USA

reviews.author: Ben Watts
reviews.text: Jessy and Jeremy are truly outstanding plumbers who exceeded every expectation. They arrived on time, were professional and friendly, and immediately made me feel confident in their expertise. They carefully explained the issue, diagnosed it thoroughly, and fixed it flawlessly without cutting corners. Their attention to detail and commitment to quality really stood out. They worked efficiently while still taking the time to answer my questions with patience and clarity. Best of all, they left everything spotless when the job was done. If you want reliable, skilled, and genuinely great professionals, Jessy and Jeremy are the ones to call.

reviews.author: Tracy Evers
reviews.text: We have used this company for years.  They have not let us down. Our most recent work had a minor issue that kept the solution from working and they showed up pronto and made the simple fix and bingo. Awesome.  They are really, really great.

reviews.author: Vicky Seapker
reviews.text: I NEVER give 5 stars because I don't believe "perfect" exists, but I had a bathroom remodel done and had to outsource plumbing to get the results I wanted. We'll start with Scott... friendly, fun, light hearted and filled with corny jokes. Scott accessed what my project and was very confident it could be done and let me know it was a 3 step process. An appointment was then made to have the work done. Zach and Tyler showed up promptly, handled their business and told me to call when I was ready for the second visit. The remodel was complete and it was time to call the plumbers in to install the toilet and sink. I called and  my appointment was set up for the next day. Zach and Tyler showed up promptly handled their business and told me there was no need for a third visit. I was in agreement. Upon installing my toilet Zach noticed there was a clog in my system. He then called the company to see if a technician could be sent out to address the clog issue. They were able to come out later that day. Meanwhile it was lunch time and I recommend a restaurant and told them what I usually ordered from the menu. After lunch they returned and finished up. During the lunch hour I went to the grocery store and returned just as they were packing to leave. I was putting my groceries away in the refrigerator and saw a to go plate with writing on it. Zack left me the lunch I had mentioned to him with a thank you. Such a sweet gesture. Joe M was the technician who came to ease my (p)drain. He worked diligently in the cold until he cleared my (p)drain. This was a long post to say my experience with Benjamin Franklin was a good one. From the initial assessment, to the plumbers and the technician... all were respectful, knowledgeable, and caring. I will recommend them to anyone who approaches me with plumbing issues. Thank you Benjamin Franklin for a stress free experience.

reviews.author: Gyuzel Fedorov (Gyuzel Fedorov)
reviews.text:
Our tankless water heater under guarantee. I’m cover heater in my blanket. After my water comes out warm not hot. Technician come to my house, take off blanket and water start coming hot. They charge for it $99
It’s ridiculous. Be careful. Looks like scam. We finished build another house and I want buy another heater from this company. Now of course I’m not buying anything from this company

reviews.author: S. K.
reviews.text: Ryan communicated when he was en rout and showed up on time. I explained my issue and he immediately understood the situation. Offered a great solution and executed the work in a professional and timely manner. Would highly recommend.

plumbers.name: Cardinal Plumbing Heating & Air Inc
plumbers.address: 104 Carpenter Dr Suite D, Sterling, VA 20164, USA

reviews.author: ROBIN H.
reviews.text: Kyle was very professional! He knew the details about the unit he was installing, reviewed the contract terms and explained his work upon completion. He was prompt and even cleaned up after the work was completed. Also , he offered to help me replace the contents from the cabinet under the sink! Much appreciated!!

reviews.author: Sara McLaughlin
reviews.text:
We recently used Cardinal Plumbing, Heating & Air for the first time as new homeowners and had such a great experience! We noticed our toilet kept running and our shower had a small leak, so we called for help. Angelo came out and was absolutely fantastic to work with. He took the time to carefully inspect our toilet, water heater, and shower, and then provided us with multiple quotes and clear options for how to fix everything.

Once we decided which route to go, Cardinal got us scheduled quickly, and Angelo had everything fixed in no time. He was knowledgeable, professional, and very friendly throughout the whole process.

We are so glad we chose Cardinal and will definitely use them again and again. The attached photos show one of the items used to fix our issue - a new Pressure Reducing Valve to make sure our water pressure is just right.

Thanks so much, Angelo! We really appreciate your hard work and look forward to working with you again!

reviews.author: Andrew Williams
reviews.text: Great experience with Cardinal! We were long overdue for HVAC routine maintenance and were able to quickly schedule this week. Jay was our tech and he truly went above and beyond. Not only did he do a very thorough take down of our now 20+ year old furnace to inspect/troubleshoot, he also provided a lot of practical and helpful tips for overall HVAC and home maintenance. He was very detailed in his explanations and recommendations, we didn't feel pressured whatsoever. Highly recommend Cardinal for any HVAC needs - and thank you again Jay!

reviews.author: Robert Lindner
reviews.text: As new, first-time homeowners, we called on Cardinal HVAC & Plumbing for an inspection and service on our new home's HVAC unit. James did a thorough inspection of our system, finding several urgent issues that he presented as genuinely needing immediate addressing for not only our unit's health, but our own as well. With more than reasonable pricing, James was able to begin making the necessary upgrades same day, working quietly and quickly, and didn't leave until the other needed services were scheduled. After just one service appointment and install, we feel in great hands with Cardinal and their Nest Protection Plan in our home going forward!

reviews.author: Matthew Brooks
reviews.text: Had an issue with my hot water and needed help fast. Stephan came out first to figure out what was going on and provided a clear estimate without any pressure. Danny handled the install and did a great job — professional, courteous, and worked efficiently. They got everything up and running quickly and left the area clean. Appreciate how smooth and straightforward the whole process was. Would definitely use them again.

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing of Denver
plumbers.address: 1020 W 124th Ave #700, Westminster, CO 80234, USA

reviews.author: Jeff Vaughn
reviews.text: Had an emergency with our water heater springing a major leak. All three service technicians (Christian, Tony, & Dylan) did a great job! Super fast response, very friendly, and professional.  My wife really appreciateed the use of shoe covers as they entered the house and the care they took to keep everything as clean as possible. Great higher grade products, service, warranty,  and very competitive pricing as confirmed by our son who is also in the same industry but outside of our area.

reviews.author: Jeanne Lafoe
reviews.text:
Both Ilija and Dylan were great!  Ilija first came as we did not have hot water.  He handled that problem efficiently and then checked all 4 bathrooms, kitchen and laundry room.  Ilija identified quite a number of items that needed replacement and since our home is older it was very good to be made aware of those issues.  Dylan then came a couple of days later and fixed all of the problems in one day!  He worked all day and did an excellent job while treating our home with respect and went above and beyond to help us.
Excellent company and Ilija and Dylan both super!!

reviews.author: Michael Hayenga
reviews.text: Alex and Joel both did a nice job. They were available when I needed them and arrived on time. The work was done professionally and the cost was very reasonable. I'd use them again.

reviews.author: Bill Selby
reviews.text: The hot water tank was installed in an extremely tight space. They navigated the puzzle with out a problem. Work was well done and complete

reviews.author: Trent Hickes
reviews.text:
Christian from Benjamin Franklin Plumbing was absolutely outstanding. He fixed both our garbage disposal and toilet today with professionalism, efficiency, and a great attitude. He arrived on time, clearly explained what was going on, and walked us through our options without any pressure.

Christian worked quickly but thoroughly, left everything clean, and made sure everything was working perfectly before he left. It’s rare to find someone who combines technical skill with such excellent customer service.

plumbers.name: Reliant Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3841 Ranch Rd 620 S, Austin, TX 78738, USA

reviews.author: Christy N
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience with this team after they installed a new outdoor spigot in my backyard. When I noticed a connection issue a few months later, their office staff was incredibly helpful and managed to fit me in for a follow-up appointment the very next day. My tech consultant, Carlos, did an amazing job. He was prompt, professional, and took the time to be thorough while still working impressively fast. I really appreciated his clear communication throughout the process and highly recommend their reliable service. This is probably the fourth or fifth project I’ve had completed with reliance and they continued to do a great job.

reviews.author: Dayne Thornicroft
reviews.text: Steven and Jason F did a great job clearing a clog in my kitchen drain. They cleaned up after themselves and also scoped the line with a camera to show that it was clear. Transparent, efficient and polite. 5 star service

reviews.author: Mitch Cuningham
reviews.text:
This place is a scam, and the reason they have so many reviews is they relentlessly follow-up until you leave one.

I had avoided leaving one until now because I was hoping to have this resolved. I had a tech come out to evaluate a leak and was quoted about $2600 for the repair. We were informed that we would be charged 50% up front and then on completion of the work. However, we decided to cancel (same day) because we found a much cheaper quote elsewhere.

That was November. As of today, I cannot get a return call for a refund. The customer service department is excellent, but they cannot approve refunds and require approval from a manager in the field. I have called multiple times, and still no resolution.

I intend to take them to small claims court and file with BBB next week.

reviews.author: melissa bartholomae
reviews.text:
Great experience from the time I called  I spoke with Alan he was very nice and professional told me a price and said his guys would be here the next day! Victor Garcia and Carlos Fuentes
Showed up the next day on time, it was not an easy job pipe in my foundation these 2 worked hard to figure out the best solution very polite, hard workers best experience I have ever had .. it was a very stressful situation but they made sure to take their time and figure out the best possible fix for us. I will never use anyone else again best company, best experience! Thank you

reviews.author: Ashley Lawton
reviews.text: Huge thank you to Reliant and especially Carlos for coming out during the 2026 freeze! He quickly diagnosed the issue and took the time to explain how I can troubleshoot it myself if it ever happens again. He was kind, thorough, professional, and right on time (and even reassured me that since our unit is under Reliant’s warranty, there was no charge for the visit). He also made sure all my questions were answered before leaving. Truly excellent service from start to finish!

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of Huntsville
plumbers.address: 1330 Fletcher St NW, Huntsville, AL 35801, USA

reviews.author: sharon Brown
reviews.text:
Professional! Courteous! Timely! And very reasonable price. My cousin recommended us to you and we are very pleased. Myron was amazing! I don't remember the person that I spoke with over the phone but she was awesome, too!
Thank you!

reviews.author: Emily Davis
reviews.text: My experience with Mr. Rooter was nice. 1st let me start off with that I appreciate Mr. Rooter coming out on a Saturday moring. There were two men one was Mike and the other was Michael. They were both extremely polite and happy to help us with our plumbing needs. The only thing I did not like would be that they called at 8:30 in the moring. When I had made the appointment the receptionist said they would call 45 minutes before coming over, once I had answered the phone they said they would be over in 10-15mins and I kid you not. They immediately showed up two minutes later. Which I am impressed but I had no reaction time to even brush my own teeth. I wish this company would have a schedule instead of just showing up. I am extremely lucky they did come because I know where some plumbing places don't show up for hours or even cancles your appointments. But they did a wonderful job. But an hour later when. I went down stairs to check our bathroom shower the shower handle started to leak immediately after. 😅  I turned it on and off to see if it was still leaking big mistake the water would not turn off. I had to shut it off myself. I called them at 10:50am for them to come back and they came back 2 hours later. In total. The whole job had costed us 875$. I would recommend Mr. Rooter but I would change a few things. But at least they have a 90 day warranty.

reviews.author: Ron Lewis
reviews.text: Michael did a great job. I had a water leak (9,000 gallons on last bill!) and pointed to a squishy place in the yard. He dug there but there was nothing. My bad. Must have been the rain. Then he did it correctly. Step by step eliminating the line from the street to the house, isolating the hot side. Then hot in vs hot out and identified the problem methodically and smartly. It was the blowoff valve. In my defense, my builder put the blow off line and heat pump condensation line together and I thought the water coming out was from condensation. In any case, Michael quickly replaced it. Did good, honest work without trying to upsell anything. I would recommend him and Mr. Rooter, whom we've used for years.

reviews.author: Kevin Nishimuta
reviews.text: Had an emergency septic system backup while we had visitors late on a Friday evening.  Mr.  Rooter was there within an hour and emptied the tank and was able to fix the plugged line.  Great job; reasonable price; professional technician!

reviews.author: Karen Thompsen
reviews.text: We had a water heater that was starting to leak, and the tech came to our house quickly. He replaced our 2 old 50 gallon water heaters with 1 80 gallon heater. The installation was well done. and the old equipment and pipes were neatly removed. Very courteous and professional with good quality work.

plumbers.name: Mendel Plumbing, Heating & Electric
plumbers.address: 3N640 N 17th St, St. Charles, IL 60174, USA

reviews.author: Chris Synal
reviews.text:
Mendel came out when the original home filter casing finally broke and started pouring out water. No other service company was willing to come or care for concern.

Within 25 minutes the technician showed up after I shut of the main to the house.  After a an unsuccessful install of the replacement the new housing was faulty also.  After listening and spending beyond the time to care and explain some future issues that might occur in other areas while he waiting couple of hrs for a new housing to arrive we finally have water (note was not the technician fault to wait to hrs it was the gentleman delivering the canister)

Thank you and look forward to working with Mendel in the future.

Attached is some before and after shot.

reviews.author: Brandon Gentile
reviews.text: Tonight I came home and heard running water.  I called Mendel to the first time and my experience couldn't have been more awesome!!  Jenna took my call and was so professional!  I was all worked up when I called and after she reassured me that a tech would be dispatched, I hung up with her feeling a little more at ease!  Jared was the technician that came out and he was just absolutely great from the second he walked in my door.  He quickly assessed the issue and gave me several options!  He showed me several pictures of the issue(I wasn't getting in the crawl space).  He explained every option and weighed the pros and cons of each option with me.  Once I decided, he had everything needed in his van and he got right to work.  Had the repair done in a fair amount of time and showed me pictures of all the work he did after.  I have future plumbing work that I will need and I will be asking for Jared to come do the work!  10/10 Recommend!

reviews.author: Ed Dziewior
reviews.text: Unfortunately woke up on Saturday morning to find our pipes had frozen due to the weather. Called for service and was assured that a technician would be arriving later this morning. Received a text with the technicians' name and estimate  time of arrival. Dave was the technician that arrived and promptly evaluated the situation we were having. He gave us an estimate for the repair and mentioned that if unseen issues appeared we would have to reevaluate the repair cost. This was acceptable to my wife and I. His inspection did not turn up any water leakage. He isolated the area that he felt was the area of concern. He went his truck to get a piece of equipment that would place a electrical charge to the copper pipe to try to heat the pipe and breakup the ice blockage. He was successful in removing the blockage. No damage to the drywall, no split pipe, and running water again throughout the house. Thank you Dave for your experience and dedication in resolving our issue. He has a pleasant personality, listens to your concerns, and does his job professionally and with efficiency which is reassuring.

reviews.author: Andrew Nickel
reviews.text:
My 78 year old mother, who lives alone, has used Mendel for years.  Recently moved and had them come inspect the furnace.  Technician said it was fine and just needed servicing.  A couple months later, the furnace seemed loud, so she had another tech come out.  This guy said the furnace (less than 10 years old) had deadly problems.  Actually turned the unit off and said he did not want to be in the house with the unit on.  Said needed full replacement right away.  A sales person came out later that day and quoted $25,000+ for new furnace and install.  Said they could come out the very next day, take her money, and put in the new one.  Rush, rush.

She had another company come out the next day and they said the humidifier needed a new part, but otherwise the furnace was perfectly fine.

Draw your own conclusions.

reviews.author: Kenneth Weber
reviews.text: They sent Paul out on very short notice. He solved our problems quicker than expected was super friendly and gave us great information and technical advice for how to avoid problems in the future. Will absolutely call them the next time we need a plumber.  And definitely I would request Paul if he is available he was OUTSTANDING!

plumbers.name: Proven Plumbing & Air
plumbers.address: 300 Brushy Creek Rd Suite 402, Cedar Park, TX 78613, USA

reviews.author: Stanbo Miller
reviews.text:
Hooray for Zachary C! Routine maintenance turned into an urgent situation. We contacted Proven Plumbing based on the stellar Google reviews and nothing but positive recommendations from our community FB page.  40+ year old house, time for some routine bib and spigot replacements. The scheduled the consultation for the next day and by the end of the day we had received a quote.

We accepted the quote but were planning to wait until after the freeze / ice storm to schedule the service since nothing was urgent.  About 3 weeks later we received a call from our MUD that our usage was 5x the average and our meter was running constantly and we should check for leaks. Nothing in the house, I went around the perimeter and discovered an unplanned, small pond in the corner near our gas meter. I called late in the day and Proven scheduled us for the next morning. I should point out the communication is amazing via text updates and even a call when they were running 20 minutes late.

Zachary C was our plumber and he greeted us cheerily. I had spent the previous night fretting over how they would even fix this.  Zach took at look, didn't blink,  joked about not having any ducks yet, grabbed a shovel, and got to work. I'm not sure how he dug it out so fast but just like that the pipe and leak was exposed.  He also pointed out a kink in the pipe where it entered the slab, from the original installation, and took the time to chisel out some of the slab so he could round out the pipe and make the repair on the other side of the kink.

We're extremely happy with the work and the service and we have them scheduled to come out next week to do the maintenance items.

reviews.author: Austin Marino
reviews.text:
I’ve used Proven Plumbing & Air for every plumbing job I didn’t feel comfortable handling myself. They consistently deliver high-quality work at reasonable prices. I also really appreciate that they’re upfront about costs before any work begins and they don’t charge just to come out and provide an estimate.

If you’re researching plumbers, I recommend checking multiple review sites, like Google & Yelp. What stood out to me is that Proven Plumbing & Air has amazing reviews across all major review sites!

I recently had them come out to my house to fix a water leak near my main shutoff valve that was caused by some pesky tree roots. Fortunately, Zachary C. was able to come out quickly and resolve the issue. He took the time to clearly explain what caused the leak, what he did to fix it, and the additional steps he took to help prevent it from happening again.

He did an excellent job, and I plan to request him for any future work I need around my house. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: David Moreland
reviews.text: These guys are a great find.  Highly recommended for plumbing.  They showed up fast when I needed them and replaced my old water heater in just over an hour!  Really.  I got three quotes and they were by far the best price for a quality unit.

reviews.author: Efren Palacios
reviews.text:
I recently woke up to every homeowner’s nightmare… my water heater was spewing water everywhere. It didn’t just make a mess, it affected the water throughout the entire house. We needed it fixed immediately.

I called Proven Plumbing and they were at my door right at 8:00 AM. That alone was impressive. Devin and Michael were professional from the start. They took the time to clearly explain what had happened, what needed to be done, and what my options were. There was no pressure, just straightforward communication and confidence in their work.

Even better, they had the issue diagnosed and repaired within an hour. Quick, efficient, and done right. The pricing was fair, especially considering it was an urgent situation.

If you’re dealing with a plumbing emergency and need a team that shows up fast, communicates clearly, and gets the job done, I would absolutely recommend Proven Plumbing. They turned a stressful morning into a smooth fix.

reviews.author: Manjunath Shamanna
reviews.text:
I was trying to get my water heater replaced through AHS. However, the plumbing company assigned gave me a huge out-of-pocket expense quote for installing a lower quality water heater. They were going to charge me for stuff that is a standard install for a new water heater :-(. Instead i took the cash out from AHS and approached Proven Plumbing. I have had several friends and relatives that I had recommended Proven Plumbing  based on what i heard but i personally had not had a chance to use them. Now it was my chance :-). Anyways, the price that Proven plumbing quoted was only a 100 dollars (parts + labor + warranty)  more than the out of pocket expenses that the company from AHS had quoted but i was going to get a better water heater, longer warranty and also lesser cost overall (with the cash out option from AHS). Based on my overall research, Proven Plumbing had the most reasonable quote amongst other plumbing companies. More importantly, many of the plumbing companies in Austin appear to be very difficult to work with -- my way or the highway attitude as opposed to Proven who are very very customer oriented. We had Enrique to come by our house who did a fantastic job of replacing the water heater and spent a lot of time answering my questions. Many other companies who had come by to provide a quote were trying to gouge me by saying that they will charge extra for a tall-narrow water heater or wanted me to make framing changes (our water heater is in the attic and we have truss-roof). Enrique and Proven plumbing accomplished everything without charging me any extra. So I have no qualms in recommending Proven plumbing for any plumbing jobs.
Also Proven Plumbing management (if you are looking at this review) -- I would like to give a shout out to Enrique for a tremendous well done job and for his professional expertise, courtesy etc. At the end, it is the technicians' attitude/behaviour that make/break public perspective about any company. In this regard Enrique gets an Excellent and the top-most grade !!! Pl. continue to do your good work.

plumbers.name: Hull Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 2600 W Main St, Oklahoma City, OK 73107, USA

reviews.author: Brandy Kemp
reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience with Jerred when he repaired my sewer line. From start to finish, he was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly thorough. He took the time to explain the issue clearly, walked me through the repair process, and made sure I understood every step.

The quality of his work was outstanding — the repair was done quickly, cleanly, and with great attention to detail. It’s clear that Jerred truly cares about doing the job right. He was respectful, punctual, and easy to communicate with throughout the entire project.

If you need sewer line repair or any plumbing work, I highly recommend Hull Plumbing. Reliable service, fair pricing, and exceptional workmanship!

reviews.author: Sandy Kirkpatrick
reviews.text:
We have used Hull for our past 3 plumbing issues and I have had exceptional service Cecil, Nial, and most recently Aaron. All 3 showed extreme professionalism and knowledge of the work needed.

We just underwent a major job with Aaron. A gas line replacement. From start to finish he was professional, kind, knowledgeable, and actually took the effort to explain what the plan was in a way I understood. Any gas line issue is stressful, Aaron remained calm and in control. Couldn't recommend Hull more.

reviews.author: John Whistler
reviews.text: Definitely will use Hull Plumbing again if I need it.  We had a frustrating situation with the bathrooms in our new house.  Aaron showed up within an hour, gave us an honest and fair estimate, and started work right away.  His knowledge and professionalism was outstanding.  Within a couple of hours he had all of the problems fixed and looking good.  The amount of stress and frustration he took off of our family today was tremendous.  Thank you Aaron and Hull Plumbing!

reviews.author: Brian Eberle
reviews.text: Great and Professional service. Our Plumber Aaron was timely, Professional and addressed all of our concerns. New hot water heater in less than 3 hours.

reviews.author: Dexter Murphy
reviews.text: I decided to use Hull Plumbing after reviewing and speaking with many plumbing companies. I had a slab leak and determined that Hull Plumbing was the place to give my business. I am very pleased that I did. My wife and I satisfied with the quality repairs. Malcom was the plumber and he did an excellent job. He was courteous, respectful, and mindful of our home and our desires. He is our go to guy now for our plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Atlantis Plumbing
plumbers.address: 691 John Wesley Dobbs Ave NE UNIT W, Atlanta, GA 30312, USA

reviews.author: Adrienne
reviews.text: If you're looking for a plumber, look no further than Atlantis Plumbing! Brandon did an amazing job! He was also very nice and left everything very clean. We are new to Atlanta and I found this company on Google reviews. You always take a chance with someone new, but from the first inquiry speaking with Cristiana until we squared away what needed to be done, everyone I spoke to was so nice and so helpful! Thank you Robbie, Carol, Alex, Cory and Ivy!

reviews.author: Jessie
reviews.text: Our toilet flooded at Prestige Jewelers a couple days ago. We contacted Cody with Garrett Mechanical yesterday, and he came out first thing this morning…on a Saturday and on Valentine’s Day!! He and his partner quickly found the clogged pipe, replaced the toilet, and had everything handled efficiently and professionally. Great communication, no stress, and the whole process was smooth from start to finish. Thanks to Cody, we can keep our diamonds sparkling and our floors dry. Highly recommend Garrett Mechanical!

reviews.author: denise haeseler
reviews.text: We’ve used Atlantis for years and highly recommend them. So when we knew we had a fairly big job - replace a leaking main pipe outside from meter to home, we had great confidence in Atlantis. Thank you to Bryan and his crew! They were very timely, and most importantly you can be assured that they will do a great job. Very reliable.

reviews.author: nichelle joyner
reviews.text: Dylan was exceptionally great with customer service and helping out with a sewer line that was damaged in my yard. He was knowledgeable and friendly as well as helpful in managing costs and best case scenarios decisions for the project in my home. I highly recommend him and his team for any plumbing needs!!

reviews.author: Ron Russell
reviews.text: This company is the very best.  I had a water leak that a leak detector could not find.  Therefore,  I had to replace a 1,500 foot water line to correct the leak!  Atlantis Plumbing came out quickly and ran the new line.  The men worked tirelessly to get me hooked up again, working until 9:30 PM one night and until 2:30 AM the following morning (wearing head lamps) to restore my service.  I had wonderful responses and services from the telephone contacts (Kayla and Carol), the plumbers, Bryan, Jamaka, and Dale.  Everybody was kind, respectful, on time, and did all services with SMILES.....even at 2 AM in the morning.  This was a very tough job, and everyone came to my rescue.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 5125 MacArthur Blvd NW Ste 13, Washington, DC 20016, USA

reviews.author: Joan Knight
reviews.text: My mother experienced sudden flooding in her lower level bathroom. We were able to shut off the main water valve. We contacted Roto-Rooter and within an hour, Oleg B, field supervisor was on  site To inspect the issue. He was able to quickly make an assessment, contact a plumber, who arrived within the hour. In the meantime, he was reassuring professional, and answered all of our questions and filing a claim with our insurance company for the remediation as it was determined, the backup was from the main water/sewer line. Both Oleg and the Plumber were very professional, courteous and knowledgeable. Within a couple of hours, the initial job was complete completed, and water was restored. Oleg also said he would work with us providing pertinent and technical information to the insurance company claim. He provided his contact information and followed up with us through out the afternoon and evening.

reviews.author: Mwende Simms
reviews.text: The plumber, Aung, came out for an emergency repair and was able to get a temporary fix completed while awaiting a needed part. He came back the following morning to complete the repair. He identified an issue with the outside pipe and quickly fixed that as well. Both times he came out he clearly communicated the issues, needed repairs, and cost and completed them swiftly. I don't often choose to go with franchise companies because their quality of work may vary and costs may be inflated, however I was extremely pleased with the responsiveness, affordability, and quality of the work that was completed. I would not hesitate from contacting the Roto Rooter again for any plumbing needs based on our experience.

reviews.author: Denise Thomson
reviews.text:
Jerry was great. He gave us excellent customer service and made sure everything was done right.

Marc and Tyrell were both awesome. They spent so much time triaging and trying to confirm where the problem stemmed from.

One thing I learned about Roto-Rooter is that they will over charge you for everything. It stinks because most of the time plumbing issues don't lend themselves to price shopping.

reviews.author: bianca washington
reviews.text: Viente was absolutely wonderful! From the moment he arrived, his patience and professionalism were evident, making the entire process seamless and stress-free. He took the time to explain every step of the plumbing repairs he was undertaking, ensuring I understood the issues and the solutions. I was thoroughly impressed with the quality of his work; he not only fixed the clog but also provided valuable advice on how to maintain the system moving forward. His attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction truly set him apart. Without a doubt, he is one of the best plumbers we have ever had.

reviews.author: Antwon Cooper
reviews.text: My experience with Roto‑Rooter was extremely disappointing. I expected a professional, efficient service, but instead I encountered poor communication and a lack of follow‑through. Despite multiple assurances, no work was completed, and I was left with the same unresolved issue and no clear guidance on next steps. The technician, Israel, repeatedly came up with excuses not to perform the job. He claimed my bathroom space was too small, his equipment was too large, and then quoted an outrageous price that didn’t match the situation. On top of that, he tried to convince me that the storm drain in the street was actually my plumbing line and that I needed to call DC Water to fix the issue — something that was completely inaccurate and unhelpful. What made the situation even more frustrating was the lack of accountability afterward. Follow‑up support was minimal, and I felt dismissed rather than assisted. Based on my experience, I cannot recommend Roto‑Rooter and would encourage others to explore more reliable options.

plumbers.name: All Hours Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 1063 E 3300 S suite 102, Salt Lake City, UT 84106, USA

reviews.author: Sean Prescott
reviews.text: Josh Jones did an outstanding job working on our fuse box and installing a surge protector. He is an experienced electrician with great people skills. He explained what he was going to do before he started the work. He showed us the work afterwards and made sure we didn’t have any questions. He explained the warranty and gave us a copy for our records. I appreciate Tyson for making arrangements for Josh to come do the work.

reviews.author: Makenzie Elliott
reviews.text:
Brett Averett did an outstanding job installing my sauna today. He took his time to make sure every part of the installation was not only done right but also looked clean and professional. His attention to detail was impressive, and he made sure everything was neat, level, and perfectly finished.

He was careful with my ceiling tiles and put them back exactly how they were. When he finished, the area was spotless. It honestly looked like no one had even been working there.

Brett ran two new lines from my breaker panel, about 75 feet, to my outdoor sauna and another line for a future hot tub. He wired everything beautifully, tested the setup with me, and made sure it was all working perfectly before leaving.

Thank you so much, Brett, for your excellent work, patience, and professionalism.

reviews.author: Mariela Zhivkova
reviews.text: Priona Misa and Jacob Durrant were outstanding - they came and performed the drain clean and camera inspection included as part of my annual club membership. Both were very professional, cordial, knowledgeable and they worked quickly leaving everything neat. Thank you so much for the excellent work, honesty and care!

reviews.author: Anita Martinez
reviews.text:
We just had a new furnace and air conditioning system installed in our house. These guys were absolutely amazing throughout the entire process!!

They quickly responded to my request for quote. They immediately had us scheduled for a FREE in-home inspection & quote.
(We highly recommend Technician MIKE👍🏼)

The financing was a piece of cake!! It was unbelievably fast & easy.
(We highly recommend Gage👍🏼)

The installation was scheduled within 48 hours of completing the financing. The Installation Techs showed up on-time and fully prepared. They worked hard & fast, and they completed the entire job that day!!
(Highly recommend Emerson & Orlando👍🏼)

GREAT JOB ALL HOURS PLUMBING!
YOU GUYS ROCK!

reviews.author: Austin Stoddard
reviews.text: I have been very happy with Whipple and their warranty service. Furnace recently had an electrical issue and stopped working.  Called and dispatch was very kind, quickly got a team to come out and fix the problem.  Tech. George Nevarez and electrician Kanyon Hurst were professional, friendly, fast, and got it running in no time. Very happy with my experience.😊

plumbers.name: Heritage Home Service
plumbers.address: 109 Washington St, Auburn, MA 01501, USA

reviews.author: Chris DiRado
reviews.text: The workers are excellent. Nathan who came to the house first to assess our broken furnace was excellent, fast, very personable and helpful. Trevor and Thomas the installers were excellent as well, professional and helpful.  The electrician was friendly. The girls who answered the phones were all polite and caring. All the folks who do the actual work were great. They get 5 stars!  But there is room for improvement in the area of corporate customer communication and follow ups. i.e. after waiting all day with no heat before the big storm, we called them to find out why they did not arrive;  turns out they rescheduled our service date / time and did not notify us. There are other examples. After keeping up our phone calls to them we got a new furnace installed the next day. Again the actual workers are rock stars and were excellent and all deserve a raise!

reviews.author: Christine Doucette
reviews.text: I cannot thank Steve and Chris from Heritage Plumbing enough for getting my water running and drains flowing again! Following a recent cold snap, one of my pipes froze, rendering my laundry room inoperable. When they arrived, they quickly recognized that the pipe was likely not going to be the most challenging part of the operation— It was the 8 inch wide space they would have to squeeze through in order to access it! I was fully braced for them to tell me it was just not going to be possible, but that is not what happened. They shed phones and equipment, took a deep breath, and squeezed in there to assess the situation. In no time they had the water flowing again! The second job was to repair two drains in my bathroom that were continuously clogging. They diagnosed the issues and repaired them both quickly, and my bathroom now smells like it’s brand new with those good, clean pipes! If you have plumbing issues that you have been avoiding, or you’re just not happy with the service you’ve been receiving from your plumber, I cannot recommend Steve and Chris from Heritage enough!!! They are prompt, friendly, respectful, professional, and great at what they do! Thank you for a job incredibly well done!

reviews.author: Melissa Ferguson
reviews.text: Travis and Davi came to my house today and repaired some pipes in my basement. They did a great job and were  done in about 30 minutes. I am very pleased with their work. They were very polite and friendly.

reviews.author: Kevin Lynch
reviews.text:
I recently had my hot water heater replaced, and the technician Travis did an excellent job from start to finish. He was professional, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable. He clearly explained the scope of work, walked me through the replacement process, and made sure I understood how the new system operates before leaving.

The installation was clean and well-executed. All connections were neatly done, the workspace was left spotless, and everything was tested thoroughly to ensure proper operation. You can tell he takes pride in his workmanship.

The entire experience was smooth and stress-free.

I would absolutely recommend Travis and Heritage to anyone needing plumbing or water heater services.

reviews.author: Taraneh Rafieymehr Pettinato
reviews.text:
Jordan was efficient, professional and very thorough with checking his work before leaving! He did two projects, including replacing an old leaking gate valve with two new ball valves for my main shutoff (see photo). This will be so much easier if I need to shut off the water in the future.

Heritage in general was very responsive to my weekend request (more responsive than other local companies/plumbers) and came highly recommended.

I would definitely use Heritage again and would request Jordan if available!

plumbers.name: Western Heating, Air & Plumbing
plumbers.address: 235 S Mountain Lands Dr, Orem, UT 84058, USA

reviews.author: Jason D
reviews.text:
This company has gone down hill and might be rock bottom. On the last visit which was a furnace tune-up, they did the work (not sure how well) and presented my wife with thousands of dollars of recommended repairs and upgrades. The list was ridiculous and included things that only they could have caused (like crimped wiring inside the unit when it wasn’t mentioned when they came in March nor any of the other times they came and they’re the only ones to access that compartment in the last eight years). My wife called me and we declined the additional services and the technician left.

When I returned home after about a week, I found an absolute mess: the furnace room door was off its hinges, there was a furnace filter propped next to the furnace, and general disarray in the space. I went to work trying to clean things up and discovered that the problems were even worse than I expected. Not only was the door of its hinges, it had actually been broken. The technician didn’t even mention it, let alone offer to fix it. The furnace filter that was propped by the furnace was mangled and torn and plastic packaging (like from a new filter) was stuffed inside it. We figured out that the one leaning there was the new filter I had installed about 6 weeks before (and did not need to be changed) and the plastic was from the spare I keep on hand. It’s a tight squeeze to get the filter in and out and requires care not to damage it. Clearly the technician wasn’t careful and simply ripped it out of its housing. Again, no mention of this from the technician and no offer to replace what he ruined.

Upon further inspection, I found that one of the seals around the PVC pipe that delivers air to the unit was not in place. I went back and looked at the pictures from the previous service (in March) and it was properly seated, which makes me question whether the technician knew what he was doing or cared at all to do the job right. I’ve canceled my service contract with Western Heating and will never utilize their services again. I’d caution you against using them as well.

reviews.author: Linda Peterson
reviews.text: Seth Harward came to my home on  February 19, 2026 to clean the drains in my two bathrooms sinks. the tub drain in one bathroom and the shower drain in the second bathroom.  I was impressed with the communication given to me by the company. They reminded me that he would be coming between noon and 4. Later I received a communiation asking if he could come earlier at 10:30 am. Seth arrived and went immedicately to work while I asked a few questions. He showed me what he had cleaned out of the drains. He was neat and clean and he left the work area neat and clean.  Linda Peterson

reviews.author: Maria Schindler
reviews.text:
I originally called to get a quote to have the coils and panel of my furnace cleaned. The person who answered the phone told me they had a special going where they can do a tuneup for $69.00 and that included cleaning the coils. I asked if she was sure that cleaning the coils was part of this special. She put me on hold to double check and came back and said it was part of the special. When the technician came he told me he was scheduled to do a tuneup. I mentioned the cleaning of the coils and he told me that that wasn’t included with a tuneup.  Somehow a miscommunication with the scheduler.
We ended up with just having the coils cleaned. The cost was $520.00 which seemed a bit steep. However Ethan the technician was great. Showed and explained what he had to do to clean the coils. Was very efficient. Work space was clean after he finished. He did a great job. Very pleasant and respectful. Ethan deserves a 5 star rating. 3 stars because of the miss communication between scheduler and supervisor.

reviews.author: Barbara Lovell
reviews.text:
I’ve been on Western Heating & Air’s maintenance plan for a while, and I really appreciate how thorough their whole-home inspections are. They check and service everything in my furnace room and give clear, reasonable recommendations whenever something might be out of code.

Dillon was outstanding. He was extremely knowledgeable and took the time to explain everything he saw and everything he was doing. I felt completely comfortable having him in my home, and his professionalism and clarity gave me total confidence in the work. I’ll definitely be requesting Dillon for future service appointments. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Bobbi Metz
reviews.text: I would like to thank Dillon when he came out to do our water heater flush that he noticed that the duct work was too low and it could cause carbon monoxide leakage so he fixed the venting so now we can walk completely underneath it and not hit our head anymore. He was totally awesome.

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing
plumbers.address: 5808 N 56th St Suite A, Tampa, FL 33610, USA

reviews.author: Adam
reviews.text: Moreau was my technician and he was outstanding. Exceeded expectations. He went above and beyond to do the job right even though he had to stay until 9pm to finish. He was cordial and friendly the entire time and was kind to my kids as well. Exceptional job. If I could leave more than 5 stars in a review, I would.

reviews.author: Will 12
reviews.text: Dominic Turner deserves 10 star's he was very knowledgeable and professional he answered all my questions he made sure everything was perfect he installed a new toilet and a new hot water heater and double check everything to make sure it worked properly and he cleaned up all the trash I had left over he has to be the best technician they have I was 💯 satisfied with everything and will definitely call them again every time !!! This time Dominic replaced my toilet he's the best please never let him go  🙏🏻

reviews.author: Christopher Manning
reviews.text: Brian did a great job replacing my water heater. He was professional, knowledgeable, and clearly explained the entire process from start to finish. The installation was efficient and clean, and he made sure everything was done right. I really appreciate his attention to detail and straightforward communication. Highly recommend Brian for quality plumbing work!

reviews.author: Chantell D’Avignon
reviews.text: Nick was fantastic!!!! My water filtration system blew. He diagnosed it and installed a brand new system cleanly and efficiently. Explained the whole process!!!! Really happy with the service.

reviews.author: Tami Boudreaux
reviews.text: Wesley was fantastic. Arriving same day as we called. Handled everything timely and efficiently. Our water bill had increased and we identified the toilet as the potential culprit.   As members we received a discount from Ben Franklin.  Wesley sled and was able to apply another discount. He was polite, did not make a mess and reviewed the work with us and made sure we didn’t have any questions.

plumbers.name: Dipple Heating, Cooling, Plumbing, Electrical
plumbers.address: 2036 Frontage Rd Unit 7, Anderson, SC 29621, USA

reviews.author: Pamela Webb
reviews.text: Trent Rowland did an excellent job with the pull and clean on my furnace. He was polite and very knowledgeable. He took photos and explained every detail. I was sent an email with my details and receipt. It was a very good experience.

reviews.author: Jessi Klein
reviews.text:
