Billy West was amazing. I cannot say enough good things about this experience. From the moment he arrived, he was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly thorough. He took the time to clearly explain what was going on, walked me through what needed to be done, and made sure I fully understood the solution before moving forward. There was zero pressure and just honest, straightforward expertise.

Beyond being technically unmatched, he was genuinely kind and thoughtful. He even brought my trash cans in without being asked. Such a small gesture, but it speaks volumes about his character and level of care.

I never thought I’d describe a plumbing issue as “delightful,” but here we are. This was hands-down the best experience I’ve ever had when it comes to solving a home problem. I almost wish I had more plumbing issues just so he could come back and help again.

Highly, highly would recommend.

reviews.author: clark ballantyne
reviews.text: Mathew with Dipple was very professional and knowledgeable!  He came and serviced our HvAC needs and did a fantastic job.  He explained what needed to be done and the cost, which was very reasonable.  He completed the job and then explained how to best run our system so it would run efficiently and effectively, as it was supposed to.  Which prior to them, the original company had not fully completed our system properly and left one item broken and uninstalled!

reviews.author: Diane
reviews.text: Had a great experience with Brandon. He is knowledgeable, engaging and pays attention to details. I needed a light fixture replaced, Brandon ‘s assessment and installation were quick and efficient. He went the extra mile by patching up the holes left by the old fixture. Overall, a great and easy experience. Thanks Brandon!

reviews.author: Renee Hall
reviews.text:
Woke at 3:30am to a flooded kitchen!  Called Dipple and got a LIVE VOICE at 3:30AM! She was so kind and assured me a technician / service person would be out first thing that morning.  Dropped son at school and Danny was at my home, waiting for ME, at 8:15am!

He diagnosed and repaired one issue within an hour… Diagnosed a second issue and assured me he would be back the following morning to repair.

Danny was here by 8:45am, smile on his face, and new toilet IN HAND!  Like LITERALLY!  He installed the toilet and was finished within an hour.

I will DEFINITELY recommend Dipple to my friends and neighbors and will never hesitate to call Dipple again!  Thanks Danny and team!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 300 Frank H. Ogawa Plaza STE 249, Oakland, CA 94612, USA

reviews.author: Ivan Ramos
reviews.text: Enrique the technician provided us with updates throughout the repair.   Extremely efficient in repairing what I feel was a major repair but the expediency and marksmanship of his work is an example of the company having knowledgeable and experienced professionals.  Very happy with this experience.  Although I wouldn’t want to go through it again, they handled our water repair with urgency and professionalism.

reviews.author: Mamacita Dulce
reviews.text: Sayed did an amazing job was on time !! And got straight to the job!! It took less than 5mins to fix the issue !! He was so respectful and had a great attitude and very professional!! I love the customer service he provided it’s really nice to know there is still people taking pride in their job and having a positive attitude especially in a situation like mine where I needed an emergency plumber on the weekend !! And at 8pm Sayed was great thank you !!

reviews.author: Keith Nettles
reviews.text: Saide did a great job. Our system was backed up due to the school next door. It took some time, but he was able to get it cleared out and running like it's supposed to. Highly recommend asking for him.

reviews.author: Jonah Makonnen
reviews.text: Heath did an amazing job! Our toilet was overflowing, and he responded on very short notice. He was efficient, quick, and incredibly understanding. Huge thanks to Heath—10/10 would absolutely hire again!

reviews.author: varun agarwal
reviews.text: Sayed did a very good and thorough job for our main line drain blockage. He was very communicative, and efficient and gave me different options on how I want to proceed. Will definitely have him again in case of any issues.

plumbers.name: My Buddy The Plumber Heating & Air
plumbers.address: 3169 S Highland Dr, Salt Lake City, UT 84106, USA

reviews.author: David Keifert
reviews.text: After receiving several quotes from other places we decided to get one from My Buddy the Plumber, they went through our system like none of the other guys had. They had excellent recommendations about moving our vent to prevent hair build up and expanding the size of both our intakes. Our house is breathing way better than it ever has now. They recommended a quieter furnace and we’re loving it. Korey and Kasey were informative and went above and beyond with the installation and fixing things that our roofers missed, and clearing dog hair out of the intakes. They were pleasant to be around and had no troubles working around the professional cleaners that were working at the same time. Would recommend this company to friends and family. Very satisfied, thanks!

reviews.author: Talon Ozmore
reviews.text:
They came the day after the earthquake here in Magna. Daniel looked at my water heater and between the both of us came up with a game plan to get our house back into shape. Unfortunately the water heater we had installed when we first moved in was replaced incorrectly. I explained that when you guys came to fix our AC unit and replace our furnace that our water heater was out of code. Expansion tank on the hot side. No earthquake straps. Wrong piping. Missing parts. No sediment trap on the gas line. Etc.Daniel took the time to listen and showed compassion for what we had gone thru. He offered solutions and advice that was greatly appreciated in a stressful situation. He came the next morning and explained every little detail on what he was going to do. We also found out that the water pressure was not where it was supposed to be. He explained that average range is between 50-80. Our house was 112. So our pressure regulator was the problem. He was a great help and I hope the owner Brandon( Daniel couldn't stop praising him at every chance he could) will see this and Give Daniel the recognition he deserves. You guys have come to our rescue multiple times now and I will continue to call on you guys even when we move. I have told multiple people to call if they need anything.
07/13 New service. We had our water main break and they once again came to our rescue. Brian was out within the service hours and said he would make sure we got taken care of.
We don't have enough words to thank this company for how many times they have come and treated us with compassion and respect for our house issues.

reviews.author: Nathan Feller
reviews.text: Casey and Tony were the techs that replaced my Furnace and AC. After getting quotes from multiple companies My Buddy had the most bang for your buck. Air purifier was the icing on the cake. Casey and Tony were professional, cordial, clean and fast! They broke down the information so I could understand it and even swept my utilities closet. highly highly recommend them and will be requesting them in the future. Thank you guys so much! Me and my family very much appreciate it!

reviews.author: Evan Stephens
reviews.text:
Revised Review:  I was contacted by the owner and had a very good conversation regarding the work and the cost.  I am very satisfied with the resolution.  The work as I stated before was very good.

Awesome and Fast  (That was my initial response).  However after digesting the invoice, I would not recommend their service based on how much they charge.  I had a water leak coming through my ceiling.  I cut out a 3x3 section of drywall, identified the leak, placed a plastic sheet on the floor and had it ready to go.  The technician arrived and spent about 30 to 40 minutes working to repair the line.  He cut out 18" of pipe, used 2 fittings and installed 18" of Pex.  Total cost $555 (I did get a discount for writing a Google review).  I called the next morning and explained my concern and was told "That is what it costs to have a licensed professional fix your pipe."  The service itself was good as they responded quickly, the technician was very nice and the work so far appears to be good.  Simply put, Overcharged for basic plumbing service.

reviews.author: M S
reviews.text: Derek D. and Hayden came today and installed much need faucets, and repaired my toilet which was loose and running all the time. They were professional, explained what needed to be done and the cost was super reasonable!! I appreciated the professionalism, neatness, and they were on time. Thank you!! I will be using you again in the future!!

plumbers.name: F.H. Furr Plumbing, Heating, Air Conditioning & Electrical
plumbers.address: 20145 Ashbrook Pl #110, Ashburn, VA 20147, USA

reviews.author: Livia Wolfer
reviews.text: I had Matt in today, with Jonathan shadowing him, and they did great work!  Every part of the process was explained to me - what was wrong, what that meant, what it was supposed to look like, and how to fix it.  They originally came in for the yearly free maintenance check you get with a membership, but they found an issue with our water pressure system.  They fixed it within a couple hours, and were out of my house by noon with a full comprehensive list of what they had done, how long it should last, and an easy expectation that if *anything* was wrong later, they would fix it (for free, up to a year later).  Both young men were very helpful, friendly, and professional.

reviews.author: Scott H
reviews.text:
What started out as an issue with water acidity exposed a problem with the iron filter on my well. Allen came out to the house and assessed the problem and called on Jacob as the problem was larger than just adjusting the system.

Jacob adjusted schedule and came out. After identifying the problem he gave me pricing on removing the 25 year old iron filter and adding an equivalent and also addressed a problem with sediment. I didnt expect the visit to be so big a job and Jacob had to go get parts. It was 5pm by time he had everything at the house and, with a smile, he was ready to install and stay 2 to 3 hours past his work schedule.

He never griped or indicated any distress with having to work late. He did a great job of removing the old filter and putting the new one in place with all the plumbing changes associated. The new filter looks like it was there from the start.

As always, Furr really has a talented team that does goodlooking quality work.

reviews.author: Akua G.
reviews.text:
The representative was punctual and professional in demeanor. However, as someone who made it clear I’m not knowledgeable about HVAC systems, I was hoping for more explanation and guidance about the different options available.

I found myself repeatedly asking for clarification, and much of the conversation focused on the limited time of the Costco promotion rather than helping me understand the systems themselves. For such a significant investment, I would have appreciated who would have been more consultative and educative.

By the end of the visit, I found myself wanting to seek quotes from other companies, even though I genuinely would have preferred to move forward through Costco.

reviews.author: Hatsumi Mann
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with Chen Zhang, a technician. He was very friendly, professional, and clearly knowledgeable about his work. He took the time to explain everything and was extremely helpful throughout the entire process.
Chen arrived right on time and completed the job efficiently without cutting any corners. He worked diligently, made sure everything was done properly, and finished in a timely manner. It’s clear he takes pride in what he does.
I truly appreciate his professionalism and would highly recommend him to anyone needing HVAC services!

reviews.author: Debbie Brooks
reviews.text: Allen was indeed very thorough with providing details prior to completing any work and answered all of the questions regarding my plumbing concerns. He was able to determine exactly what my plumbing problem was and explained the related issues. This gave me complete comfort and trust in his work. Very knowledgeable and definitely demonstrated excellent customer service.

plumbers.name: Five Star Home Services Columbus
plumbers.address: 8160 Howe Industrial Pkwy, Canal Winchester, OH 43110, USA

reviews.author: Tony Casper
reviews.text:
So last Sunday in the middle of the storm Five Star Home Services came out and repaired our furnace and saved the day.  Matt the repair technician diagnosed the problem didn’t have a part to repair with him. He drove in that mess to his office and picked up the part then came back and made sure we were warm.

The service from them over the past 10 years has always been top notch.  I am replacing our furnace with them and they applied my repair cost as a credit which is an added bonus.

Today their team showed as promised and began replacing the furnace an A/C. Scott and Connor were amazing!  They were done in half the time it took my neighbors and the install look perfect. It’s sad to say I feel their high quality service isn’t the norm. I would highly recommend their team for a repair or replacement of your A/C or Furnace.

reviews.author: Jay & Daniella
reviews.text:
We were referred to Five Star Home Services through the Lowe's Project Referral Service, and honestly I could not be happier. While they were not able to come out the absolute moment we needed them (our furnace went out on a Saturday in the middle of January, when I'm sure a lot of homes needed assistance), they were very quick to communicate and reschedule for first thing in the morning on Sunday.
Naturally, we ended up needing a whole new system, but Five Star was incredible and able to update the entire system, furnace and AC, the very next morning and for a reasonable price. Noah came out and did our diagnostic, and he was super friendly and knowledgeable. I never once felt like my time was being wasted or that I was being taken for a ride.
Zane and Mike (maybe Matt, I'm sorry I don't quite remember) were both awesome! They showed up exactly when they were supposed to, there's a tracking system so I was ready for their arrival. They worked all day and everything was awesome, they wore booties and put down a drop cloth, even swept up when they were done, extremely respectful of my home.
Even their staff on the phone were incredibly great to work with!  Five Star truly deserves all 5 stars, plus. Customer service is a dying art, but they keep it alive. Thanks so much for everything!

reviews.author: Cody Harkless
reviews.text:
Very friendly, professional & knowledgeable. The whole team did a fantastic job. Joshua Rodriguez, Richard Rodgers & Cameron Woods. They installed quality products for me for a good price. Would highly recommend!
👍👍

reviews.author: Rory Nicol
reviews.text:
When our furnace went out during one of the coldest weeks of the year, I had four kids in the house and real concern about how we were going to get through the weekend. Five Star Home Services stepped in immediately. By Saturday morning — in the cold and snow — their team was at our home replacing the furnace.

What stood out most wasn’t just the speed or professionalism (which were excellent), but the way they treated my family. They were kind, calm, played with my kids, and treated our home with real care. The cleanup was spotless, and the stress we were carrying disappeared.

In a moment when it really mattered, they showed up. That’s the kind of company you want to call — and recommend.

reviews.author: Roger Doyle
reviews.text:
Hi. My name is Roger, and I won Five Stars Home Services "Scariest Furnace Contest" and had my new, totally free furnace installed last week and I couldn't be happier!

I'm a 74-year-old retiree and having my 45-year-old furnace replaced with a new energy efficient model is a blessing and all the folks at Five Stars were great. They even through in a wi-fi thermostat with a room monitor, which I really love.

After I was told I had won their contest, a Five Stars rep came over and surveyed the monster in the basement and the rest of the house and set about determining the correct sized unit, which is very important. Then they scheduled the install for the next business day. The installers texted when they were on the way and arrived on-time at 9am and promptly got to tearing out the old furnace and installing the new one, and they had it up and running by 6pm. They were very courteous and did a great job at the install and clean-up. I retired from Port Columbus where I coordinated construction projects, so I know a good job when I see one.
I've added a picture of the Honeywell T10 Pro Wi-fi thermostat and room sensor that was installed as part of the project. Having Wi-fi access is great and the room sensor acts as a portable thermostat that can be located in any room.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter
plumbers.address: 5600 NW 4th St, Oklahoma City, OK 73127, USA

reviews.author: Aubrey Renton
reviews.text: Josh and Telly did such an amazing job with not only fixing the problem entirely, but with communicating with me throughout the entire process! When I had a question Josh explained everything perfectly. I will definitely post the company card on Facebook! Will never use another plumbing company!!

reviews.author: Elijah Eiler
reviews.text: I’m the type of guy that likes to do things himself. However, sometimes you need a pro. I did not need a pro, I made a rookie mistake. Telly was great found and fixed the issue. I would use again. He was professional with a good personality.

reviews.author: Virgie Krane
reviews.text: 🙏 Lonzy. Service was fast. Drain restored. Technician was courteous professional and helpful. This is about third time in several years we have used RR for this issue. (We have a tricky bend in drain and very hard water) They always come through and we feel good about it. Price has gone up dramatically…but what cost hasn’t? Thanks again to the entire team!

reviews.author: Christine Coker
reviews.text:
Julian was great! Thank you for helping us!
Anthony C was incredibly efficient and solved
The problem in 5 minutes. Stayed to make sure everything was all good, very effective and the best Roto-Rooter experience that we’ve had at our Stables.

reviews.author: Matt Bailey
reviews.text: Julian was an awesome service technician to deal with. Very thoughtful in his answers and knowledgeable about the questions I had. He definitely saved us this evening with a quick and efficient service. I would 100% use him again in the future.

plumbers.name: ASI Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4310 Bishop Ln, Louisville, KY 40218, USA

reviews.author: Kim Sulzer
reviews.text: My hot water heater went out unexpectedly the day before yesterday, and as a healthcare worker, not being able to take a hot shower to wash away the germs from work was especially stressful. Logan and Michael from ASI Plumbing came out today and installed a brand-new unit. They were professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain everything, even teaching me a few helpful things along the way. I truly appreciate their prompt service and expertise.

reviews.author: S S
reviews.text:
Excellent job. Honest company and employees ASI technician Nathan was able to complete a job quickly and correctly.

I had hired 2 different companies companies through Angis list, both charged me even though  they couldn't do the job.

I don't do many reviews but ASI, I am grateful for.

reviews.author: Kevin Steele
reviews.text:
From my very first call with Michael, the experience was smooth, professional, and no nonsense. He was clear, responsive, and set the tone right away. The repair was then completed by Logan, who showed up on time, knew exactly what he was doing, and handled everything efficiently and professionally.

No upselling, no games — just solid work done right the first time. ASI Plumbing is officially my go-to plumber moving forward.

They also offer a military discount, which I truly appreciate. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: James Cundiff
reviews.text: ASI Plumbing came and done a water heater for me. They got here and had it done within a couple hours of me calling them! Extremely fast service, really nice on the phone. Ob my service guy, and yes, that's his name, was a total professional.  He wore his shoe covers, and had the place so clean, never knew he was there! He is the man! Thank you OB and the whole ASI team! Well done!

reviews.author: Sandra Rice
reviews.text: Daniel was our plumber. He wore protective shoe coverings, laid down a mat, used a protective floor covering, and cleaned up the area. He was courteous and professional. The price was very reasonable. He worked diligently until he was able to unclog the sewage ejector pump. I am so thankful they were able to come the same day I called as we.had water overflowing on top of the sewer ejector pump overflowing into the laundry room and my son's bedroom in the basement. We have used ASI Plumbing in the past, and they have always done an outstanding job. Thank you, Daniel, and ASI plumbing for your outstanding plumbing services!!! Respectfully, Sandra E. Rice, Very Happy Customer!!!

plumbers.name: Horizon Services - Air Conditioning, Heating, Plumbing & Electrical
plumbers.address: 908 Pulaski Hwy, Havre De Grace, MD 21078, USA

reviews.author: Brianna Huth
reviews.text: Josh Ortiz was the best! I recently bought an older house and inherited many “home depot special repairs” - a major issue being my hot water heater not having a gas shut off valve, my TMP pipe being too short, and a few other weird nuances. Josh was very easy to work with, friendly, and super patient with me. I have attached a few before & afters. If you ever need any work done, I’d highly recommend Josh & Horizon.

reviews.author: Derrick Jones
reviews.text: Travis Walker was my tech who serviced my home.  He was extremely polite and honest also professional during the visit.  If you are looking for someone who is honest and will give you the real deal as for Travis he will not steer you wrong.  The recommendations he give was accurate.

reviews.author: Maria White
reviews.text:
This is the 2nd or 3rd time that Chris Hyman has come out to fix plumbing and HVAC issues for us . This time Matt Dimock came along and they are both FANTASTIC! Both Chris and Matt were extremely professionally, courteous, knowledgeable and well informed regarding their profession and the issues we were having. They were patient and took their time to get to the root of the issue which was a back up in our toilet.

Not only did they check and test everything, they fixed the issue and cleaned up and I appreciate them very much. If you ever NEED ANYTHING FIXED ; PLUMBING, HVAC, ELECTRICAL and so on. ASK FOR CHRIS HYMAN & MATT DIMOCK , they got u COVERED!!

Photo below (floor was covered with debris  from leak ! ) and they cleaned and sanitized !

reviews.author: David Green
reviews.text: I had some expensive repairs done on a very old heat pump. Ray F. was great. He explained everything in great detail. He answered all my questions, and helped me understand what my options were. No one wants to spend a lot of money, but when you trust the person who is doing the work, it means everything. It needed parts and everyone knew that I needed to get my heat pump running and were very helpful. So thanks very much!!!

reviews.author: Sneja Doychinova
reviews.text: Mr. Tyrone was absolutely great! He came out and installed our new water heater efficiently and professionally. He took the time to explain everything clearly and even shared additional tips and features we didn’t know about but truly needed. His knowledge, attention to detail, and willingness to go the extra mile made the entire experience stress-free. We are very happy with the service and will definitely ask for Mr. Tyrone again for any future plumbing needs. Highly recommended!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 941 Bending River Rd W, Salt Lake City, UT 84104, USA

reviews.author: Ashley Wegrowski
reviews.text: Chad was fantastic! He took a thorough look at our water heater and helped explain what was going on in a way that was very straightforward and easy to understand. He helped to get us a new water heater under our warranty which was super helpful. He definitely is experienced and I couldn’t recommend him more! He was great and did an amazing job!

reviews.author: Gary Nielsen
reviews.text: A Roto-Rooter technician came to our home at 11:00 pm last night in stormy weather to assist with our plumbing emergency and advised me to wait until I had our septic tank pumped out before using their service. I was not charged for that service visit and really appreciated their honesty. The  Roto-Rooter crew came out again the next day after the pump out and were very, very persistent in locating and eliminating a clog in our main sewer drain line, which took many, many  tries and eventually relocating their equipment from outside to an upstairs bathroom . I really appreciate they they did not give up and got the job done. They definitely earned their fee. (The $100 off coupon on their website was helpful .) They provided me with texts and emails confirming their service appointments and the progress of their technicians driving to our home. Job well done!

reviews.author: Assad RAFFOUL
reviews.text:
3 days  ago I called Roto rooter at 9:00 PM to snake my 4 inch main drain pipe, in the basement. It was a straight 60 feet run in direct line to the street. The tech guy was prompt, he explained the possible problems that could happen and I signed quite a few documents. He told me the cost of snaking the line was $531.00 Dollars. That was an exhorbitant price that I never paid before in my life. But since it was an evening call and I needed to do the work I agreed. He brought down the tool and he snaked the line to the street in less than 15 minutes. I was expecting he will run the snake again but he was too busy trying to sell me further services. He refused to run the snake twice but he threatened me that if I did not agree to a free video inspection there is no warranty for the next 6 month on his work. He said if any thing happened  before 6 month the service is not warranted at all because there could be a problem in the line that only a video can find.
This was a totally new approach to snaking the sewer line. I have done it 25 years ago. The company at the time did it twice to make sure all waste was pushed out. Not Roto rooter. He packed his tool and left. I knew he did not clean the sewer well so I am calling my regular plumber to do another snaking of my line to assure all waste is removed.
Roto rooter is gouging its customers and will not do a decent job of cleaning the pipe i will have my line snaked in the day time for about a hundred dollars. Once Roto rooter steps in your house they want to make a big issue of snaking a sewer line, they want to do much more unneeded work to fatten their bottom line.
I will not recommend this gouging Company who refuses to give a tentative cost of snaking a sewer line on the phone. They keep it as a surprise. also any plumbing company who refuses to run a second run should be always rejected. Once the first run is done, the second is much faster and all decent companies will do it especially when they are charging the rate of a brain surgeon.
This is standard plumbing customs.

reviews.author: Shannon Mulder
reviews.text: Cameron was so polite, helpful, knowledgeable, and hard working. He did a great job and made sure our follow up apppointment was set up in a timely manner that worked with our schedules. Cannot thank him for his hard work enough. Thrilled that Roto Rooter didn't charge after hour charge for calls after 5pm. Thanks all!

reviews.author: Thomas Butts
reviews.text: Awesome techs! We were told a service window of nine to eleven and they arrived promptly at nine. A refreshing change from the norm of most businesses who leave you hanging until the last moment. Friendly, polite, sociable, and clean workers. Had the quote ready in less than ten minutes, and had a pipe removed, fixed, and replaced as well as a faucet changed in less than three hours, including the time it took them to run to the store for parts. Adie and Charlie are a credit to the profession!

plumbers.name: 1-Tom-Plumber
plumbers.address: 25 Sweetbriar Rd suite A3, Greenville, SC 29615, USA

reviews.author: Josh Moeller
reviews.text: I had a water line break in a terrible spot under my house. You couldn't reach it from the crawl space and there was only a 20" hole in the foundation to access this pipe. Tyler came out in a Sunday and worked most of the day to fix it, but when the line repressurized, I went from having a small leak to a broken pipe. He told me that he was confident he could fix it but he needed a tool and some fittings he couldn't get till in the morning. He came back out Monday morning and worked till about one o'clock, but when he was done, I was leak free and the job looked good. The thing that really impressed me about Tyler was his attitude. It was a horrible job in a horrible space with horrible working conditions(it was between 35⁰ and 40⁰ outside and once the pipe broke, he was working in a mud hole). I said,  "For whatever it's worth, I'm sorry you got this job, but I'm glad you're here." He said, "It's just a job. We'll get it done, and for whatever it's worth, I'm sorry I couldn't get it fixed for you on Sunday." If you need a plumber, give 1-Tom-Plumber a call. They'll get you taken care of. Thanks again, Tyler.

reviews.author: Craig Gilpin
reviews.text: I called to confirm a quote first thing in the morning and Matt and Tyler, we're able to be at our property at 1pm and had the whole new water heater install completed by 5:30. Additionally they upgraded our 40 gallon tank to a 50 free of charge as the 40 was unavailable on the day! Great, fast service and everything is working brilliantly. Thank you both we will definitely use 1-Tom-Plumber again!

reviews.author: Sierra Carter
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of meeting Rooky and having him help my husband and I fix our bathroom. Rooky made this such an easy process for us, and was very informative and honest with his work. He is very trustworthy and I would recommend him to anyone who may need help with plumbing issues!

reviews.author: Elle Cam
reviews.text: Tyler was courteous. He put something on his feet so he didn’t track dirt into the house. He was thorough and took the time to figure out the root cause of the problem. After having other plumbers come for the same situation (3 other times), I really appreciate Tyler’s process. Others left a mess for me to clean up, and patched work that should have been replaced, creating a larger problem for us. Thankful for Tyler’s work!

reviews.author: Tripp James
reviews.text: Tyler was extremely professional and went out of his way to assist me on a weekend with snow, ice, and frigid temperatures.  Cannot thank him enough and highly recommend his services.

plumbers.name: American Vintage Home Heating, Cooling & Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1523 Payne St, Evanston, IL 60201, USA

reviews.author: Alejandro Salgado
reviews.text: Gabriel was very courteous and professional. He did a fantastic job on the installation of the boiler 5 out of 5. Would recommend American Vintage Home and Heating to anyone needing a new boiler, furnace, and any HVAC maintenance.

reviews.author: Matt Fenwick
reviews.text: Finding a technician who is both skilled and willing to explain the "how and why" of a complex system like a steam boiler is rare. I cannot recommend Alex highly enough for service. We recently had them out for a repair, and the experience was top-notch from start to finish. Our technician was incredibly patient and informative he didn't just fix the issue; he took the time to walk me through the system, explaining exactly what went wrong and how to maintain it properly moving forward. He brought along a trainee.The trainee was also very polite, professional, and hardworking. It says a lot about a company’s culture when they prioritize thorough training and maintain such high standards of courtesy.

reviews.author: Reto
reviews.text: We engaged American Vintage Home to replace the sump pump / backup-pump, battery plus control-unit. It wasn't cheap, but it is an insurance, we live in a flat area and the water has to go somewhere. Tony did a great job, explained what he intends to do, gave us an estimate and days later he had all the parts and installed the new setup to our satisfaction. We picked the wifi-enable version to keep us updated on what the sump-pump does, or not. I feel better now with this old house we recently bought, great structure, but our previous owners did less than nothing and unfortunately the sump pump fell victim to their previous negligance. Glad we replaced it with the help of Tony, now we can afford not to think about it (kind of).

reviews.author: Jenna Casselman
reviews.text: Had our regular HVAC maintenance and Bautista did a fantastic job! Was very thorough, answered all my questions, and provided helpful information about keeping our furnace in good shape for the future. Leo also did a great job inspecting our plumbing system. Highly recommend AVH!

reviews.author: Tahiri Gutierrez
reviews.text: I had a consultation with Alejandro from American Vintage Home, and it was a great experience. He was very informative and took the time to thoroughly diagnose the heating issues in our condo with steam radiators. I really appreciated the care and attention he put into explaining what was going on and helping us understand our options. Thank you, Alejandro, very pleased with the service!

plumbers.name: Beehive Plumbing
plumbers.address: 350 E 400 S #308, Salt Lake City, UT 84111, USA

reviews.author: J Lynch
reviews.text: I hired Beehive Plumbing to replace our water main including the stop and waste valve. The price was average. They came out on the day promised and finished on time. Communication was good. The clean up was a one star. A simple square shovel and broom would have been great outside. Inside the basement was also not left clean. I should have taken the option of paying 1/2 upfront and the rest when completed to ensure the site was left clean.

reviews.author: Dynotron CBD CBD
reviews.text: 10 out of 5 STARS!!!! Benjamin and Maverik were outstanding!!! They had designed and installed an emergency shower, plumbing for washing machine, drainage, pump and a water heater. WE LOVE IT!!! Very Professional and highly recommended. Thank you very much! Everything was done efficiently, one day job. They Helped our Business tremendously at Dynotron!!!

reviews.author: R Miles
reviews.text: Needed emergency help with a bath faucet cartridge replacement that I couldn't figure out how to finish so we could turn the water back on. Lucked out that Beehive had an experienced plumber freeing up and he was able to arrive an hour or so later. Definitely needed a person experienced with that cartridge and he quickly saw what the problem was and resolved it and we were back with running water withing 2 hours of needing service. Arron - the plumber was very friendly and informative and because mot of the job was already done we had only a small charge. I did not realize the charge for a visit of $49 would be added to the estimate  however that was still inexpensive and we were very glad and relieved to have such fast expert service

reviews.author: Sande Harris
reviews.text: If a water heater is going to go out it will be on the weekend.  Thank goodness that BeeHive Plumbing has technicians available.  Comfort Solutions referred us to them when we called them and we were so happy.  They gave us a window they would be here, then showed up in that window, found what they needed to for our Hot Water Heater and replaced it all the same day.  They cared about not doing any damage to carpet and made sure we were up to code.  Thank you for your caring and help Beehive, thank you for the referral Comfort Solutions!

reviews.author: Kayla Kehres
reviews.text: Jacob was awesome!! Super friendly and informative. I also want to note how efficient he was. Found the issue and solved it with speed and quality. Great customer service! Overall very happy!

plumbers.name: Around the Clock Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1207 Posey St NW, Huntsville, AL 35816, USA

reviews.author: Vanisha McComb
reviews.text: Kenny came to check out my hot water heater. It did not take him long to diagnose the problem he explained everything to me and was very nice and professional. I felt very comfortable with Kenny and trusted his expertise! Around the clock is the only plumbing company I will let do any of my plumbing needs, they are fair and very good at what they do!!

reviews.author: maria gil
reviews.text: Fabion was very knowledgeable and found the leak quickly. He fixed it perfectly and explained everything along the way.Very professional. I called Aroynd the clock plumbing and they came in 1 hour!

reviews.author: A Glasgow
reviews.text: James did a fantastic job. And I was actually behind him driving to my house. He was a conscientious driver as well! He took no time to fix my pipe issue. Good job!

reviews.author: JoBeth Dunaway
reviews.text:
Kenny an Dawson come out within 30 minutes .  Did a great job fixing a leak.  Service was quick and thorough.  Will always use this company. Every detail was explained to me, I approved, they did the work , now I a
m happy.   Thank you Kenny and Dawson job well done.  Thank you Around the Clock Plumbing for a remarkable team of technicians.

reviews.author: K.C. K
reviews.text: I can't thank James enough. He was able to figure out where our leak was coming from quickly (part of our water heater) and repair it at a fair quote. I appreciate his honesty and great work today. You guys were recommended to us by a family member on the spot this morning when I told them what was going on and I can see why. Thanks for saving this day from being an absolute disaster. The next time I need a plumber for anything you guys are my first call. Thank you.

plumbers.name: Midway Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1017 Energy Dr, Abilene, TX 79602, USA

reviews.author: Scott Simpson
reviews.text:
I know enough about plumbing systems to know what questions to ask about some problems I was having. Two of the three issues I identified had to do with the 3” waste pipe under the house slab. I had already used an auger to clear a serious root intrusion and as my waste main is 60 years old, I was prepared for the worst. I would have given Midway the go-ahead for some seriously expensive work if their plumber told me it was necessary.
The Midway plumber scoped the 3” main from the city connecting point to the house vent pipe and explained everything we were seeing in a way I could clearly understand. He checked the work I had already done, carefully talked me out of doing either expensive project I had enquired about, and gave me some tips for improving the remaining flushing problem that was being caused by the 1.28GPM toilet.
The third project had to do with the incoming water supply. What I thought would improve the incoming water pressure and get a jump on a potential problem was diagnosed as a case of “If it ain’t broke, don’t fix it… and it ain’t broke.” I was wrong; he was right. He could have just done the work I requested and I wouldn’t have given it a second thought. Instead, he again clearly explained the issue and convinced me not to have the requested work done.
Summary: The Midway plumber was professional, courteous, knowledgeable, and honest. I now understand how they maintain such a high customer review rating.

reviews.author: Grady Martin
reviews.text:
Todd, my Technician was great! He took the time to help me understand all that would need to be done. Very kind, polite and professional. He unclogged the washer line in my garage and did not leave til he knew I was very satisfied.
I was a little surprised with cost but was the first time having it done, and had to have it done, and Todd didn't pressure me at all about the cost.

reviews.author: Dan Flatt
reviews.text: I paid so little because I was not going to pay the $3400.00 to power wash a single line in the house then asked cost to replace 20’ of 2” pvc under a house with lots of space and no digging just remove cast iron and replace with pvc. Somehow the price was the same. I will never call them again. This is something I could do in about 45 minutes easily.

reviews.author: Joel Brown
reviews.text: The Midway Plumbing staff was impressive from start to finish. Absolute best Customer Service, from Renee who took my initial request for service and kept me updated every step of the way to Alex the technician. Alex expert knowledge and ability to explain the entire process and answer every question and more importantly his ability to support his comments with written data.  His knowledge is only surpassed by his ability to install equipment in a timely manner.   Truly Awesome and Professional Team!

reviews.author: Diahnn
reviews.text: Called in the morning and they had someone at my house within 3 hours. Alex was amazing! Explains everything! I was so impressed with his service i asked for quotes on my water heater. Called 5 different plumbing companies and extremely grateful I chose Midway! New to town, and now i know what plumbing company i am calling from now on! Thank you for being awesome, Alex!

plumbers.name: Hoffmann Brothers
plumbers.address: 45 Willow St, Nashville, TN 37210, USA

reviews.author: Hal Roseman
reviews.text:
After five days without electricity and temperatures hovering around 15 degrees, we finally got our power restored — and it’s entirely thanks to Hoffmann Brothers, especially their electrician, Justin.

Our electric mast had literally been pulled away from the house after tree limbs dragged down the service line. Two other well-known Nashville electrical companies came out, but wouldn’t touch anything until NES disconnected the hot line — which meant more waiting… in freezing weather.

Justin, however, didn’t stop without finding a solution. He secured emergency authorization, safely disconnected the line, rebuilt the mast and meter connection, and coordinated everything so NES could immediately reconnect our service. Within 24 hours, we finally had power back.

And the workmanship? Outstanding. He didn’t just patch things up — he rebuilt it correctly:
• replaced the entire mast system
• fixed the previous builder’s makeshift nail mounting with bolting screws
• secured and supported the conduit properly
• caulked the board holding the conduit
• cleaned the entire area
• hauled away debris and old materials

Even more impressive, during a historic weather outage — when many companies add “emergency” surcharges — their pricing was fair and honest, coming in almost a third lower than another major bid.

Skill, integrity, and professionalism when we needed it most. If you ever need electrical work done right, I can’t recommend Hoffmann Brothers and Justin highly enough. They truly showed up for us.

Grateful doesn’t even begin to cover it. 🙏⚡️

reviews.author: Andrew Rickard
reviews.text:
Chance was probably the best technician I've ever had.  He was prompt, polite, efficient, well spoken, and made us feel very comfortable with the entire process. There was literally no friction and I am extremely happy with the results.

He replaced our 16-year-old gas water heater by inspecting, Recommending the replacement, and having the new heater here at my house and install installed within four or five hours.

To make room for him, I took our mountain bikes off of the wall, and without asking, he put them back for me. That says a lot, and lets me know that his attention to detail and his Quality and Work ethic is top-notch.

Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Tonya Miller
reviews.text: What an absolute wonderful experience. I was sent a man named Jacob, and it couldn't have gone better! Skills mixed with kindness is what a homeowner appreciates.  Jacob certainly had that and more. The automated system was suspicious,  however, walking through the process and allowing them to come to your home is effortless.  Once they arrive, the job is accessed and a cost is given. You have the option of accepting the bid or declining.  Very happy I agreed,  mine was an unusual custom job that was finished flawlessly by Jacob. I will certainly have their team back again!

reviews.author: Brittany Truman
reviews.text: The team members Hoffman Brothers sends out to my home have all been highly professional, curteous and good explainers. They treated myself, home and property with respect. They answered all my questions thoroughly, provided detailed pictures of the work completed and explained it in detail. They cleaned up after themselves. From the initial quote to the end result, the whole process was smooth. I liked how they gave me different options to choose from... just repair the worst items, mid level and full restoration. They never pushed a higher option on me. They simply laid the plans out and let me choose my comfort level. I have used other companies for HVAC needs and none of them provided the level of customer service Hoffman Brothers did. I fully intend to use them for all my future needs.

reviews.author: Mandi Jones
reviews.text: Mason was outstanding! During the ice storm, he was super attentive and understanding our need to get our heat working again with our HVAC system.  He went out of his way to pick up the parts from the warehouse so he could finish the repairs as quickly as possible.  He was also super knowledgeable and professional.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 577 Miami St, Akron, OH 44311, USA

reviews.author: Andrea Sanchez
reviews.text:
Mason did an excellent job unclogging my toilet! He responded quickly, arrived on time, and was very professional throughout the entire process. He explained what was causing the issue and made sure everything was working perfectly before leaving. Not only did he fix the problem efficiently, but he also left the area clean and tidy.

I truly appreciate his reliability and quality workmanship. I would definitely recommend Mason to anyone in need of plumbing services!

reviews.author: Lauryn Baker
reviews.text: First time homeowners and our bathroom sink started leaking water underneath. Our technician was very skilled and replaced our faucet in less than an hour! It took a lot of the stress and anxiety out of the situation. Very happy with the replacement.

reviews.author: Stephanie Edwards
reviews.text: Nick came to our home for a garbage disposal repair (that turned into replacement). He was very friendly and courteous to everyone, even greeting our kiddo. He was knowledgeable and explained everything we needed to know about the care for our new unit. Very pleased with everything.

reviews.author: Jovelyn Coffield
reviews.text:
We encountered drainage issues and my husband contacted them on the same day, and they delivered service within less than three hours. Initially, we thought a root issue was blocking the pipes.

However, Justin showcased impressive expertise, examining the drainage system and providing an explanation of the blockage's cause. Although we were unable to resolve the issue on our own, he provided expert assistance, using advanced equipment to give us a thorough understanding of the problem.

Justin is the best and we couldn't thank him enough!

reviews.author: Kelsey Meyer
reviews.text: They were awesome! Zachary came out same day and did a great job of explaining the issue and his recommendations, as well as letting us know about future work we will need based on what he saw. Zach is a sweetie, give this man a raise!

plumbers.name: Mallick Plumbing & Heating, Inc.
plumbers.address: 7620 Rickenbacker Dr Suite L, Gaithersburg, MD 20879, USA

reviews.author: Andy Rayno
reviews.text:
We were very fortunate to discover Mallick Plumbing and Heating when it came time to replace our 75‑gallon water heater. They immediately answered the phone and addressed all of our questions about the replacement.

Rob promptly came to our home, treated our space with respect, and thoroughly discussed the options for our unit replacement. When Rob and his assistant arrived with the new equipment, they were extremely careful with our surroundings during both removal and installation. They used new white floor tarps to protect our home and performed an exceptionally precise and neat installation.

Rob even added a drip pan and plumbed everything flawlessly. We are looking forward to continued service over the years with Mallick Plumbing and Heating!

reviews.author: Annette Pataki
reviews.text: Abbas.. and Koli came to hookup the gas for my new cooktop.  Both very friendly and professional. They both knew what they were doing. I greatly appreciated they took the initiative to reach out to the ApplianceLand installer asking exactly what was needed to hookup the cooktop because the wall oven needed to be reinstalled under the cooktop. They kept me informed of the steps that they would be performing for the hookup.   I will definitely call Mallick for future work.  Thank you for an excellent job done.  Annette P.

reviews.author: O
reviews.text: Eric (The Big E) and Mark (Mighty Mark)  both did an excellent job between the both of them replacing about 20 ft of pipe and fittings.  They fixed a pin hole leak and heavily corroded pipes.  Very thorough, professional, trustworthy and personable.   We were blessed to have Eric show up early and his cohort show up to help out as well.

reviews.author: Francisco
reviews.text: Roberto Buendia from Mallick Plumbing & Heating were phenomenal. Truly, a pleasure to see the passion Roberto has for the trade of plumbing. Very thorough, passionate, and professional. Extremely professional. Do not hesitate to call and ask for Roberto. He came in and fixed everything within the hour they originally quoted me. I will gladly work with them in the future if I ever need their help again. He also did the complementary check of my water heater and pressure.

reviews.author: Amad Jones
reviews.text:
EXTREMELY SATISFIED WITH MY WATER SOFTENER SYSTEM

On 10/6/25, Mallick Plumbing & Heating, Inc. installed our new water softener, and we couldn’t be happier with the entire experience. From start to finish, their team was professional, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable. They took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure the installation was done cleanly and efficiently.

Our plumber, Frederick Mason, was absolutely excellent. He was professional, courteous, and clearly takes pride in his work. He answered all of our questions, made sure everything was set up perfectly, and left the area spotless when he was finished.

The results have been amazing. My wife absolutely loves the difference in our water; she immediately noticed how much better it smells and tastes. Even better, she says her hair feels noticeably softer, and both of us have seen a big improvement in how soft and smooth our skin feels. It’s honestly been a game-changer for our home.

Now, five months later, we are still extremely satisfied with our purchase. The system has been working flawlessly, and it has truly been money well spent. If you’re considering a water softener, I highly recommend Mallick Plumbing & Heating, Inc. Outstanding service, quality work, and real results. Five stars all the way!

A. Jones

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 2229 N Lewis Ave, Waukegan, IL 60087, USA

reviews.author: Sarah
reviews.text: Wow what amazing service! We had a group of guys from Roto Rooter come out. Brandon was quick and efficient digging the area. George was quick and efficient with jetting the line. Matt did an amazing job bouncing around helping everyone. Mike was also great taking his time to make sure all the fittings were tight and in the proper space. They were all super respectful of the property even putting on booties to enter the house. Everyone was in great spirits and took the time to break everything down and explain certain terminology.

reviews.author: Casey Sager
reviews.text: We have used Roto-Rooter for several years now and we always appreciate the fast and friendly service we receive. Our tech Leonard was friendly and let us know all the work done and explained everything in an easy to understand manner.

reviews.author: April Trupes
reviews.text:
Cy came to my mom’s house. She had been experiencing repeated flooding in her basement. Upon mopping the floor the water mixed with cat litter and she was dumping the water down her laundry tub drain. Long story short she managed to not only clog up her drain she couldn’t wash clothes or use her kitchen sink.
When 2 plumbers failed to show we called roto-rooters. Cy showed up on time did a full inspection. He than walked me through everything he was going to do and took the time to explain it to me. He ended up replacing the sump pump, injector pump, routed out the sink pipes and the floor drain. He was very professional and knowledgeable. He made me feel at ease and very trustworthy. He was quick and efficient and after he completed the job he walked me through it and explained what he had done. And the best part of it all was it only took a couple hours and he gave us a discount on price. Thank you Cy!! We appreciate you, your honesty and your hard work.

reviews.author: Gloria Kouba
reviews.text: Team number 5281. I give these guys 5 stars!!! They went way beyond what I could I expected. If I need work done in the future I will for sure request them. As you can see they even cut the old floor out and put in new supports to even it out before putting in the water heater.

reviews.author: 87th St Rehab Clinic
reviews.text:
Technian came very quick and exhausted all he resources until her was able to successfully fix the issue very honest and etic job
We are glad we choose you company and the issue was fixed in a very short and professional way

plumbers.name: DB's Plumbing and Drain®
plumbers.address: 2609 Morse Ln, Woodbridge, VA 22192, USA

reviews.author: Lisseth Palacios
reviews.text: This company took my call and assigned someone to my home promptly. I was stressed and they were friendly over the phone.  The plumber that came to my home, Michael, was amazing.  He was kind and courteous. He explained everything thoroughly and was patient with my questions.  He was very professional and his work is neat and thorough. I highly recommend Michael from DB’s Plumbing & Drain!

reviews.author: Jennifer Hargis
reviews.text: Marv J installed a pressure regulator valve which we did not have and main water shut off valve.  It was a very small, tight space and he was able to do the work without cutting into the drywall.  He also replaced an old hose bib shut off for the outside water spigot and repaired a section of bent piping in the ceiling.  He did the work at a fair price and was very diligent and friendly.  He also cleaned up the area after he completed the job.  I would not hesitate to have him work on any other plumbing issues that we may have in the future.

reviews.author: Sherry P
reviews.text: We can’t speak highly enough of DB’s and particularly Aaron F. When we had a plumbing emergency late in the day, DB’s was the only company able to get someone out that evening.  Aaron F. Came out early in the promised window, diagnosed our problem, and got us all set up. He was courteous, incredibly knowledgeable, and did a great job of communicating with us what our issue was and how to address it in the future. The next time we call a plumber, DB’s will be the first call…and we’ll ask for Aaron F.

reviews.author: Adam Kerr
reviews.text: I did not have a good experience with this company. They don’t charge for a service call but then charge a very high price to do the work, in my opinion. The technician was friendly and seemed knowledgeable. However, the price to do the work was very high to me. He was in the house for not more than an hour and fixed the pipe to my shower diverter that I improperly installed. Part of that hour included a delay b/c he needed to charge the battery for his tool, which is understandable due to the cold weather. I’m all about paying for quality work but the price seemed very high. They gave me a military discount which was nice of them but the price was still $350 for 1 hour of work (which required very few parts). I should have politely thanked them for their time and gotten a second quote from a different company. But, I was pressed for time and just had them do the work. I went with this company b/c they had an extremely high rating. I am providing this review so other customers are aware of potential challenges that they may face when requesting similar services.

reviews.author: Jessica Gutierrez
reviews.text: I experienced the worst of the worst  plumbing disaster you can imagine. I had sewage back up on multiple floors and it was a hazmat. Aaron from DB Cooper showed up and we worked as a team to rid the biohazard immediately and had the plumbing working again temporarily until they could get a crew out the very next day. Aaron wrote up the invoice and report which was extremely easy for my insurance to read and dispense insurance funds to pay for most services. Not only did Aaron resolve and repair the issue he recommended me to a phenomenal clean up crew (Semper Dry) who came immediately and resolved the aftermath. I couldn’t recommend DB Cooper more, and I have dealt with other local plumbers who were not anywhere as near as proficient as Aaron.

plumbers.name: Baker Brothers Plumbing, Air & Electric
plumbers.address: 7315 Commercial Blvd E, Arlington, TX 76001, USA

reviews.author: Candi CooCoo
reviews.text: M. Bell's review for Jesse with Baker Brothers.  I called Baker Brothers to get a 2nd opinion and price for a supposed broken sewer line under my house caused by tree roots. The cost estimate from the first plumber that I called out had quoted a price for repair to be upwards of $10,000.  After careful and extensive examination of my ENTIRE sewer system by Jesse with Baker Bros, it was determined there was no need for ANY repairs AT ALL to be made. Jesse was very thorough and had ME watch the screen as the camera went the entire length of my sewer line. With his equipment, Jesse was able to show me exactly from INSIDE of my house where his camera was UNDER my house at any given moment. I was very impressed with his knowledge of the situation and my mind was finally put to rest. I highly recommend Jesse with Baker Brothers.  He not only saved me $10,000 I was quoted by the first plumber, but saved the construction mess and cleanup I would have had to endure. I will recommend this company to my friends and family for certain. Thank you Jesse and Baker Brothers! I appreciate you so much!

reviews.author: L M
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with Bryant from Baker Bros. He replaced my kitchen faucet and three bad valves under the sink quickly and professionally. The work was neat, efficient, and done right the first time. He showed up on time, explained everything clearly, and left the area spotless. It’s such a relief to have everything working perfectly again! I highly recommend Baker Bros and Bryant for anyone needing reliable, high-quality plumbing work.

reviews.author: Sandra Williams
reviews.text: The technician relaced my ceiling fan which was not working very well. He inspected the area to assure that there were no problems.  He installed the new ceiling fan perfectly. He was very professional,  knowledgeable, and respectful. He explained the steps he made to me. His work was flawless. I was very pleased with the outcome of the service.

reviews.author: Kenny Horning
reviews.text: Definitely was not a great experience, but Baker Brothers plumbing department hooked me up and handle the problems at hand. The team was real, honest and straightforward with me, which I greatly appreciated. Now if they would only have a bundle package to offer across all there platforms or even customer rewards.

reviews.author: Mercie Gonzalez
reviews.text: I just want to say thank you to our technician, Jonathan and to the team at Baker Brothers. He came in last night and helped us get our AC going. From the initial call and to the upcoming work we’re having to set up on our unit, everyone has been super helpful and transparent. We’re so grateful to have found your team to work with and we’ll definitely be continuing service for as long as possible.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1691 Town Center St Ste 104, Aurora, IL 60504, USA

reviews.author: nancy anderson
reviews.text:
Our old (and only) toilet had not been working right for a couple months (partial flushes, tank running, etc). It finally got completely stopped up and started overflowing and we couldn't plunge it out! Roto- Rooter to the rescue!

Our Technician, Marc, was great! He arrived within 3-4 hours of my call, diagnosed the problem quickly, and gave me possible solutions and estimates for the work before starting.

Marc augered toilet and replaced some old parts in a timely fashion. He got our old potty working better than it had before. Plus, he left the bathroom clean and tidy too -- Hooray!

It was expensive but worth it for the quick, friendly service.

reviews.author: Chuck Damore
reviews.text: We had a catastrophic failure of the cast iron sewer pipe exiting the house on a late Friday night.  None of the toilets or sinks would drain.  The salesperson from Roto Rooter came quickly after I phoned them on Saturday to assess the problem and give me a repair price.  The issue was a broken cast iron sewer line exiting the house at the foundation.  It sheared in two pieces and became clogged.  Monday morning, Roto Rooter arrived on site.  They needed to dig an 8 foot deep X 4 foot wide X 8 foot long hole under the porch to access the failed cast iron pipe.  They had to cut out concrete stoop as well.  They removed the failed pipe and replaced it with a new PVC pipe.  They pulled all permits and arranged for a city inspection.  We were able to use our water Monday afternoon.  Tuesday morning, they filled in the hole and cleaned up.  The cleanup was fantastic.  If you didn't know what happened the day before, you would have never known they were there.  It was a big job that required a large backhoe and many service techs to make the repair.  The supervisor Brandon M. did a fantastic job along with the sales associate Kyle and the rest of the crew.  The finished site was professionally cleaned.  My neighbors commented on how well the guys cleaned up.

reviews.author: Day
reviews.text:
We had a great experience with Roto-Rooter thanks to Leonard and Levi. Leonard was the plumber who completed the work, and he was extremely professional, knowledgeable, and thorough. He took the time to make sure everything was done right and left the area clean afterward.

Levi, the supervisor, was also fantastic — he clearly explained what was going on, walked us through the issue, and helped us understand the best options to resolve it. Having someone explain things in a straightforward way really made the whole situation less stressful.

Overall, excellent service, great communication, and a team that truly cares about helping their customers. I would definitely recommend them and wouldn’t hesitate to call again if needed.

reviews.author: Diana Caputo
reviews.text: I had water and sewage backup comimg from my shower. Mitchell was great. He came to my house twice. Both times in a timely manner, super friendly and respectful. He explained the whole process. He spent a lot of time getting to the root of the problem and didn't leave until he made sure everything was good. He was able to get my house running again until repairs can be done. I would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Brent VanLanduyt
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with Roto-Rooter. Nertil came out to fix the water supply stop valves under the sink, and from start to finish the service was top-notch. The work was done efficiently, professionally, and he answered all my questions before leaving.  I would highly recommend.

plumbers.name: The GOAT Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 4029 Crescent Park Dr, Riverview, FL 33578, USA

reviews.author: Robin King
reviews.text:
I needed to replace my pretty old water heater (Insurance mandated) and got about three quotes for replacement on three different systems (tank-less, Essence, and traditional electric).

The GOAT came in as the lowest bid for all three and Natalie (our bidder and installer, at separate times) was absolutely the most knowledgeable and professional of all three reps.

We went with the Essency to get the benefits of tank-less like cost savings without having to up my breaker and change pipes.

Natalie answered literally every question I had through the bidding and install processes and seriously helped me make the best decision of the options.

Then she showed up and installed it. Not much to say about that except she was great at maneuvering though my crowded garage, completed a perfect and professional installation (expected, I know, but it is Florida...), and also handled disposal and cleanup so well, you'd never know she was there (except it's cleaner than the rest of my garage). All this and she took time to talk me about the uses and benefits of reciprocating saws.

Straight 10/10. I could not be more satisfied with every step of this process.

reviews.author: Mikka Patterson
reviews.text: The GOAT Plumbing  has earned the business of Girl Scouts of West Central Florida! We had an issue with our hot water heater having corrosion build up and The GOAT Plumbing team , specifically Natalie, came to our rescue! Everyone  from the beginning to end was extremely professional. Communication was everything a busy organization like us could ask for! Appointment times to fit our needs as well as quick responses to ensure we not only had our issue resolved but met our non profit processes for repair work. Pricing was fair, repair was fast and thorough, and it was a pleasure having Natalie on our side! Highly recommend The GOAT Plumbing Co!

reviews.author: Marisha G
reviews.text: I have never been more excited to give someone my money then I was today! I received astronomical quotes from other plumbing companies. With respect to their skill and expertise, they were trying to upcharge and take advantage of a possible client.   I didn't have to deal with that with Pete from The Goat Plumbing. The initial phone call was clear and I was able to get an appointment that worked with my schedule.    The company sends reminders and pictures of employees for safety. Pete came in with a great attitude and clear pricing. I was able to do three plumbing issues for a great price that was under what the the other companies priced for just two items.   Not only was the work quality but Pete was constantly cleaning up after his work. In addition he didn't speak to me like I was ignorant. I knew what to do I just didn't want to do it, lol. He showed me the issues, advised on next steps to maintain and AGAIN....kept everything clean.   Call the Goats and ask for Pete!

reviews.author: Karla Garrido
reviews.text:
I feel significantly overcharged for this service. The technician replaced a small section of galvanized pipe (under $50 in material) and completed the job in less than 20 minutes, yet I was charged $700.

I was told they would dig and review the condition of the pipes, but they only dug approximately 5 inches into the sand before stating everything looked great. This did not seem like a thorough inspection.

For the amount of work performed and the limited time on site, the pricing felt unreasonable. I strongly suggest getting other estimates before moving forward with this company.

reviews.author: Giselle Patrick
reviews.text: GOAT Plumbing is an awesome company and my Technician Peyton was the absolute best. He was knowledgeable and professional and he made sure to answer any questions we had. He kept us informed throughout the process and was always friendly and kind. Everything he said he would do he actually did. He kept his word. We couldn’t have asked for anyone better. I would recommend GOAT Plumbing to everyone.

plumbers.name: TopTec Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electrical
plumbers.address: 510 North Ave, Libertyville, IL 60048, USA

reviews.author: Joseph Hall
reviews.text: We had Top Tec install a hot water heater, furnace and central air conditioning system in our home.  Our hot water heater was out and found Top Tec in the Lake County yellow pages.  They came out and assessed our hot water heater, and the next day they installed a new hot water heater.  Approximately 3 weeks later we had a furnace issue and Moe came to our home on a Friday evening and did a thorough check on the furnace, which continued our journey with Top Tech.  Moe was great and explained perfectly what was wrong with the fan and why it was not pulling enough air out causing the furnace to shut itself off and after an hour or so it would reboot itself and run again but never reach temperature.  Moe did a quote on a replacement part and called Robert, the service manager to do a quote for a furnace.  We promptly received the quotes and after looking over all quotes decided to have Robert do a total replacement quote to see all options.  After a few phone calls on Saturday and Sunday with Robert, we decided to do a total furnace and central air replacement.  Robert was great to work with and understood that this process is stressful for a homeowner to spend a non-budgeted large sum of money.  Top Tec was here on Monday at 8 am with a crew and completed everything in about 6 hours.  All of the technicians were very professional and knowledgeable and willing to explain the product and service to our understanding.  The technicians that replaced our hot water heater were:  Sam and Brian.  The furnace and central air technicians were:  Tony, Buzz, Bayra, Hero and Jim.  The office staff was also very professional and possessed excellent inter-personal communication skills.  Office staff included:  Eli, Jennifer, and Robert, Service Manager.  Eli is the first person to answer your call.  Jennifer did all the warranty paperwork with the manufacturer, so we had no paperwork to fill out on our own.  Jennifer did an excellent job at keeping us informed through email with all completed paperwork on all the jobs.  We will continue to use Top Tec for our home needs.

reviews.author: Ryan Taubman
reviews.text:
Wonderful thorough job!
Tony, Bayar, Jim, and Koss came to replace my full HVAC setup and from start to finish they handled everything without me having to lift a finger.
They brought floor mats and even swept up around the new units when they were finished!
Very highly recommend working with them everything turned out perfectly and was completely stress free!

reviews.author: Molly Klos
reviews.text: Gerry and Cesar installed a new water heater in my house today and did amazing work. They were kind and made me feel very comfortable and safe. They did quality work efficiently! Top Tec continues to impress me with the quality of work and the quality of people they hire! Thank you so much!

reviews.author: J_B Shad
reviews.text: Tony did a great job installing a water heater for us last minute. Fit us in right away, very detailed from Oscars assessment to Tony and crew on the install. Happy New Year guys and thank you!

reviews.author: Terry' Davis
reviews.text:
You get what you pay for and this is absolutely the truth in certain instances! I read reviews, speaking about how pricey this company can be! But again, you get what you pay for! And I got what I paid for! I got quality service, professionals, professional installation, and good people. I am former US Army and I believe in doing everything to the best of my ability! Thank you for top-tier installation and service! 🇺🇸 ✌️✌🏾

PS: Pleaseeee, don’t forget you get what you pay for! And I would recommend #TOPTEC thank you, Steve, Chris and Ken! 💯

1000.00+

plumbers.name: Hunter Super Techs
plumbers.address: 707 Lake Murray Dr S, Ardmore, OK 73401, USA

reviews.author: Colefox
reviews.text: Let me first say how amazing it was that they not only had same day repair but they were able to be at my house within an hour of my call. Huge shout out to Cameron the service technician that came out and did all the work. He was extremely polite and professional and went above and beyond the call of duty. He made all the cuts and adjustments needed outside in the cold so my 6 month old could nap. They will have my business any time I need any plumbing work done!!

reviews.author: Dave Dulany
reviews.text: Hunter Super Techs installed a state‑of‑the‑art water softener in my home, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. Connor was incredibly professional, patient, and thorough—he took the time to understand how we use water in the house, explained the system clearly, made sure everyone knew how to operate it, and paid close attention to how the installation looked as well as how it performed. The workmanship was clean, the setup was thoughtful, and the unit has been running flawlessly. It’s easily the best installation experience I’ve ever had, and I’m extremely pleased with the final result.

reviews.author: Peter Winkfein
reviews.text: On time, courteous and very professional.  Dylan was very thorough. He checked out my issues, explained what he was going to do to resolve them then proceeded  to repair the problem.  He then explained to me what he did.  I found the experience very refreshing. Thank you Dylan for a job well done!

reviews.author: WagonWheel
reviews.text: Omg! My plumber Jason was so professional, compassionate, and respectful! He made sure everything was clean while doing a quick and thorough service.. I praise God for Hunter Super Tech. They are people of their word with great integrity. Definitely keeping them in my back pocket.

reviews.author: Gayle Selby
reviews.text: Ishmael did a super job! He was very professional, knowledgeable and explained everything clearly to me. He didn’t make me feel rushed or pressured. He provided great customer service. Very pleased!

plumbers.name: Plumbing Care Inc
plumbers.address: 2415 San Ramon Valley Blvd UNIT 312, San Ramon, CA 94583, USA

reviews.author: Kristina Marin
reviews.text: Pablo was our technician & he found problematic areas on the hot & cold water valves under the sink as well as toilet wall valve. The valves were stiff & difficult to turn & showing rust & corrosion.   Also Pablo showed me a crack in the old original pipe connecting the pea trap that could start leaking, so he changed it to a new plastic PVC pipe.  Pablo is very conscientious, honest, knowledgeable, & communicated his professional opinion & experience whenever any problems arose or plans needed to change.  Thank you Pablo for a job well done!

reviews.author: Ridhima Singh
reviews.text:
We had an excellent experience with this plumber. From start to finish, he was professional, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable. He quickly diagnosed the issue, explained the problem clearly, and completed the repair efficiently and neatly.

What really stood out was his attention to detail and the pride he takes in his work. He left everything clean and made sure everything was functioning perfectly before leaving.

It’s hard to find reliable, honest service these days, and this was truly a 5-star experience. Highly recommend to anyone needing plumbing work done right the first time.

reviews.author: Arnab “Ari” Sinha
reviews.text: Alex (Alejandro) was amazing to work with. He was patient, answered all of our questions, and did a thorough, high-quality job installing our first tankless water heater. The pricing was fair, and the overall experience exceeded our expectations. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Sanjay Anavekar
reviews.text:
Mitko did a wonderful job installing new Navien NPE240A2
water heater. He made sure everything works as expected and did a detailed walk-through post installation.

Martin the owner, has built a very professional team of plumbers over the years. I highly recommend them as they always deliver good quality service.

reviews.author: Alex Kalpin
reviews.text:
Hristo Ivanov from Plumbing Care INC is absolutely outstanding. From start to finish, he was professional, punctual, and incredibly knowledgeable. He took the time to explain the issue clearly, offered practical solutions, and completed the job efficiently with great attention to detail.

What really sets Hristo apart is his honesty and workmanship — no shortcuts, no upselling, just quality work done right the first time. Everything was left clean and working perfectly.

If you’re looking for a reliable, skilled plumber you can actually trust, Hristo is the one. Highly recommended!

plumbers.name: Flow Pros Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2770 25th St N, St. Petersburg, FL 33713, USA

reviews.author: Carina Baker
reviews.text: Elijah was professional and thorough. I am pleased with the communication, friendliness, transparency, and effectiveness that came with this job. I had my main water shutoff valve replaced (kind of a big deal) and I appreciate Flow Pros working with me despite the preexisting material. The price was fair, scheduling prompt, and warranty great. They will not disappoint!

reviews.author: Chris Nesci
reviews.text:
Flo Pro Plumbing was fantastic from start to finish. We recently had a water softener installed, and our technician, Kahlil, did an outstanding job. He was punctual, professional, and incredibly knowledgeable. Kahlil took the time to explain the system, answer all our questions, and make sure everything was installed perfectly. The quality of his work and his attention to detail were clear.
We’re extremely happy with the service and highly recommend Flo Pro Plumbing—and especially Kahlil—for anyone needing plumbing work done. Great experience all around!

reviews.author: Christopher Hudson
reviews.text: Fantastic response!  Had a complicated issue with an iron pipe.  I called, got an immediate response, got a window for the next morning, and the problem was completely resolved by the middle of the afternoon.  Jeffrey was efficient, explain the quote and what the work was going to entail, and kept his time estimate! He cleaned up nicely the area.  Very pleased.

reviews.author: Kristen Tompkins
reviews.text:
Alex came out. He was kind and friendly and reassuring.

Alex is an amazing job to show up. Get the work done within integrity and commitment.

I had a New water softener installed And I can’t wait to see how amazing my curly hair looks after today.

Hands-down would hire them again for all plumbing needs. You will not be disappointed.

reviews.author: Kevin Palcsak
reviews.text:
Bradley found the issue and provided a clear quote for the work, and Alex took the lead in fixing it. They were both friendly and knowledgeable throughout the entire process.
