It turned out to be a larger project with some unexpected challenges thanks to our older home, but Alex always had solutions and still managed to stay within the original estimate.
He was consistently respectful of our space and offered helpful tips as we navigate being new homeowners. It’s never enjoyable having to spend a significant amount of money just to get your home working the way it should, so I hope I don’t need to see Alex or Brad again anytime soon—but if you do need work done, I would definitely recommend them.

plumbers.name: Upfront Plumbing Drains Heating and Air
plumbers.address: 8496 Harrison St STE 102, Sandy, UT 84047, USA

reviews.author: Keri
reviews.text: We called Upfront to install a microwave that vented to the outside.   They came first to see if what we were asking was feasible.  With a green light,  we went ahead and purchased a microwave that had convertible venting.  Then Jose and his assistant showed up the next day and installed our microwave.  They were professional and completed the job in a timely manner.  They answered questions I had about installation. They cleaned up afterwards and then showed me the work they had completed.  We felt that the price was great considering they would need to drill through stucco.  They also hauled away our old microwave.

reviews.author: Mariah Morris
reviews.text: I've worked with Mason a couple times and he's been amazing. This time, we had mold and had to completely demo our bathroom to remediate. Mason came and was very thorough when looking at everything which was really nice because he understood everything that needed to be done to help avoid any surprises that he could. He even offered 2 different options based on my budget and what needed done, and made sure I was aware of what each entailed and potential consequences and benefits for each option. I've really respected and appreciated the full disclosure and time he's taken with me each time he looks over everything and goes over options and estimates. Two other employees came and did the work to replace my main drain stack and some other piping. They even noticed that my ABS had a recall on it, which I had no idea about. They've all done great work, been very respectful, friendly, and kept me engaged throughout the whole process so nothing came as a surprise. I've had other companies try to tell me I need products that I don't really need and Upfront has never done that. The office employees are also very nice and it's super easy to schedule appointments and make payments, they'll even text you a link for you to pay. I feel like Upfront is very trustworthy and would definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Bryan A
reviews.text:
I had a really good experience getting my furnace replaced by Upfront! Their estimate was fair, and they were extremely responsive, and they accommodated the replacement within 3 days.

My furnace was condemned on Friday morning. With temperatures beginning to drop next week and it being Christmas week, I scrambled to get my warranty company to take the job but their contractor was unresponsive during the weekend. Jakob coordinated with me throughout Saturday on getting the furnace replaced Monday. On Monday Justin and Austin finished the furnace replacement in less than 4 hours. Everything looks great and we don't have to worry about using space heaters to survive the cold that's coming. Thank you for doing a great job, being responsive, and working diligently to resolve a habitability issue quickly!

reviews.author: Tonia Eidson
reviews.text: Mark came out to give us a price to replace a 14 year old water heater for my in-laws after we woke up with no hot water. My husband and I come from the industry, but are from out of state and the company I would normally use was booked so I looked around for other local companies with good reviews and Upfront seemed like a great place. We were not disappointed! Mark was able to get the water heater temporarily fixed so that we would have hot water over night and then came back the following morning to replace it. He did an amazing job on the install! Everything was done to code and looks great! You can tell Mark really cares about his customers and takes pride in his work. The price was better than we expected! If you are looking for a local company that does great work at a decent price, these guys are great! Ask for Mark!

reviews.author: Austin Heywood
reviews.text: This is the best run company in utah - fair Price fantastic employees amazing management took such good care of my mom’s place and she’s 88 years old. I would use them all day and twice on Sunday. Thanks Ryan for your team.

plumbers.name: Ernie's Plumbing Service, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1809 W Pioneer Pkwy, Arlington, TX 76013, USA

reviews.author: Mayan Boricua • 9 years ago
reviews.text: Austin was great. He was extremely knowledgeable and explained everything well. He stopped the leak under my sink. He replaced my clogged old faucet with a new modern design. I couldn't be happier; would reccomend to anybody!

reviews.author: Baxter Mullins
reviews.text:
After 25 years living in my phone, I found in December 2025 that both showers were plugged. I called Ernie’s, our long time plumbing company, to correct the problems. Ernie’s sent Anthony to check the issues with the plumbing. What was found can be classified as a “Nightmare before Christmas”. Scenario. Both sides of the plumbing had moved where the back of the house, the plumbing was much lower than the exit to the city system. Anthony allowed me to sit with him as we moved the camera from front to back showing up and down holding waste and several breaks plus tree root blockage. Another adventure!  Ernie’s replaced 115 ft of sewer lines on both major branches. Three 4’x4’ foot tunnels had to be excavated to do the job.  New sewer pipes were hung from the foundation to assure stability. The team did a good job, cleaning up the property. Anthony and the team did a great job.

Photos show new sewer pipes compared to original and the second shows front yard after the work is completed.

reviews.author: Nora Flores
reviews.text: Anthony did a great job in replacing our gas line.everything was as he said it would be . Very communicative in details. I definitely recommend him to everyone who is needing plumbing work .

reviews.author: T V
reviews.text:
Feb. 27, 2026 EDIT

Thank you Ernie for responding very quickly to my review and graciously offering to make things right. Someone was indeed sent out the very next day after we called to schedule. The entire process was very pleasant, from our scheduler to our plumber. Our Plumber was Scott and he informed us that the first person did not do the job correctly and used the wrong pipe for our hot & cold water line leaking in our ceiling space which is an enclosed area (he used something meant for an open area such as under the sink instead). He removed the sharkbite fittings and installed a new correct pex fitting for a more permanent repair solution, and soldered it together - which the other person also did not do, and fixed up everything for us during the same visit. He was very pleasant to deal with, educated us, and checked out a few other spots for us while here. We are thoroughly satisfied and will definitely recommend and continue to use Ernie's in the future. Thank you Scott and Ernie! :)

----------------------------------------------------
During 'Snowmageddon' we had a pipe burst through our ceiling and Ernie's came to give us an estimate and repair. The estimate was free as they advertised, repair seemed well, and the technician seemed nice and timely. It was suggested that we get the pipe repaired with PVC(?) I believe, which is a more flexible material and will expand better instead of repairing the pipe with a metal pipe, which our original pipe is. Since he was the expert, we went with what he suggested. All seemed well until the next Winter when we noticed a leak in the same exact spot which required us to open up our ceiling again. We called Ernie's again to come and give us another free estimate. This time, the person that came (different person) said that he'd have to charge us $200 just to go into the attic to even look. That seemed weird so we tried to go without and tried to patch it up. That spot has given us problems every Winter since. We will be doing a full repair with metal soon but the thought and trauma of that ill-repaired pipe during Winter every year sucks. It's completely fine throughout the year but during Winter is when it starts leaking again. Not enough to notice right away but eventually a stain appears in the same spot on our ceiling and every time, I'm reminded of what our expert recommended which turned out to not be a wise choice for our house. That and the random charge to go into the attic left a sour taste in our mouths. Thoroughly disappointed.

reviews.author: Larry Whitaker
reviews.text:
" Buyer Beware!! "
We had Ernie's Plumbing do  scan of the sewage pipes because of a recurring clog.
After the video scan that gave use the estimate here attached.
It was VERY expensive (as you can see) so I asked for a copy of the video we paid for and they said "we do not supply copies of our scans."
That was an immediate red flag!
I called another plumbing company (LD Plumbing) and they said they could do a scan of the system and would provide a video with an explanation of what was found.
They cane out and did the complete scan and said there was a MINOR problem, showed us the scan and said they could fix it for $450!!
They did fix it for $450 not $3000 OR MORE!!
(2) Response to the owner's (Ernie) reply.
(A) I spoke at length to Michael the plumber who did the scan and he said they do not supply copies of the scan to customers, I called the office number and they confirmed to me that they do not supply copies of the scan to customers.
(B) Justin did NOT stand over Michael and watch the scan.
(C) Michael the plumber went into a long description of how laborious the repair would be to fix the dual clean out and even sent me a picture of what they would use to do the repair (see the picture). That is what we were quoted $3000 to replace!
(D) LD Plumbing came out and did a full scan of the entire pipe system inside the home and outside. Came back and said there is only one minor problem which was that the dual clean out had slipped off  the pipe and provided us with a picture (see the picture) and the repair would be quick and they would do it for $450!
(E) They did the complete repair (NO BANDAID) using exactly the same item that Michael showed me in the picture he sent. (See the picture of the FULL REPAIR!)
Once again I say BUYER BEWARE!

plumbers.name: ACE Home Services (formerly Yavapai Plumbing & Heating)
plumbers.address: 1302 Rhinestone Dr, Prescott, AZ 86301, USA

reviews.author: C M
reviews.text:
HIRE THIS GUY FOR WORK - he’s gifted in the HVAC field.  Derek came in and tackled a serious issue we’ve had for about 6 years with our HVAC system. We had incorrect roof PVC pipe drainage (too long to get to the gutter) and an HVAC unit  leaning 1 1/2”  the wrong direction which caused water to back up towards the blower motor i.e towards the expensive pieces not away - then rust, corrode, and likely create something flowing thru the air that made me sick/congested from contaminated HVAC condensation.  He fixed the problem in a really creative way and didn’t give up until he had the HVAC system exactly balanced to a centered bubble. No one has even tried to tackle this before so we are super grateful that he came up with a simple solution.  Now our unit drains condensation correctly with a new, direct path to the gutter.  This now prevents mold growth.  The guy literally saved our unit from probably dying in a year to living a much longer life.

Hire him because he just removed six years of frustration that other technicians had no desire to tackle.  The pics are after showing his finished work on PVC pipes. The precious version ran to the far right along the wall then down to the gutter.

You’ll appreciate his easy-going personality, kindness, and attentiveness . When you find a good one like Derek, you’ll be a repeat customer who is confident in his work.  He didn’t just “do his job”. He cared, fixed the real problem and then sealed it so no rusty water anymore could enter the house.

Derek, a big thank you for being a hero to this family. 🇺🇸 Cecelia

reviews.author: Chase Rumfola
reviews.text:
Marcus and Danny with Ace home service services. Aka The dream team🫡🫡🫡

These guys came out, gave an estimate, then got the work done same day. Replaced an aging instant hot water heater with a slick new one and were professional with communication throughout the process.

reviews.author: Joe Ellerbrock
reviews.text: Highly professional, prompt, LICENSED. The person who scheduled my job was very nice. Mr. Pereira (plumber) was very knowledgeable and explained all my questions, with good recommendations. Very polite and respectful. However, these guys are not cheap. But you get what you pay for and and maybe more in the long run. I would recommend them as a reliable go-to shop when you're not real sure of your problem or solution.

reviews.author: luke hart
reviews.text: The whole process start to finish was great. I requested information from Home Depot and within 5 minutes I received a call back to schedule a free home estimate.  I had a sales rep at my house the next day and they didn’t try and over sell me. They installed everything very quickly and when they ran into problems they stayed with the job.  They were friendly, professional and proficient. I would highly recommend ACR home service to anyone.

reviews.author: Doreen Bender
reviews.text: Joe, Brad and Tom were at our house yesterday and installed a new heating/air conditioning unit and also cleaned out our ducts.  They worked in a very professional and friendly manner.  They cleaned up after themselves and explained how the new thermostat worked.  We are very happy with their expertise and getting the job done in a timely matter.  They cleaned up after themselves and left everything in order.  Thanks again, Don and Doreen Bender

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing, Drain, Septic, & Water Restoration Service
plumbers.address: 7001 Wooster Pike, Medina, OH 44256, USA

reviews.author: Ato kad
reviews.text:
I needed a gas valve, about 3 inches of line, a line cap, a T, and a union replaced to get our heat turned back on. I explained that money was tight, but I was still quoted nearly $1,000 for about $60 worth of parts, plus almost $500 for a leak test just to verify the work.

Afterward, I called another company, and they only charge $50 for the leak test and $150 for the entire repair. There was nowhere near 10 feet of repairs needed—the plumber who actually fixed it used penetrating spray and removed the old parts easily.

*Update*
After speaking with the manager at Roto-Rooter, I was told they plan to adjust their leak-testing prices. They also assured me that the estimate I received represented the absolute worst-case scenario, and that the actual price could end up being lower.

reviews.author: audin1027
reviews.text:
I had John M come out and replaced a plastic hot water line from the basement to the dishwasher that had broken, spewing water everywhere at 5am!!. Found their 24hr service. Called at 7am and he was here around 10:10. Called to let me know he was on his way, quoted a price before doing the work, polite professional, awesome plumbing experience. (he just made me feel he cared and put me at ease) Guess who is coming out to replace my dishwasher next week?!?! I scheduled him immediately. Highly recommend their services. Job well done!!

12/1/26 Had John back out and installed a new dish washer. Another great job. Reasonably priced and I got an additional $25 off with a coupon he left me the last time. Job well done!! I'd give a 10 star if I could!!

reviews.author: Timothy Slama
reviews.text: Chris came out and did an excellent job. Very nice guy. Very nice to my mom. He was able to joke around a little bit. And definitely did a good job and made us feel very comfortable. I was going to call anyhow and let you know. I'm in the trades and it's always nice when someone lets you know they do a good job. And he did. Thanks chris + Merry Christmas to Roto-Rooter LOL 🙂 happy New Year!

reviews.author: Tyler Hardy
reviews.text: I had an old sump pump that needed replaced and Joe was fantastic. He explained everything, showed me how everything works, and ensured the job was done right. Now I have peace of mind that my basement will continue to be protected and fine!

reviews.author: Michelle Bridenthal
reviews.text: Thank you to the team deployed to repair  a main water leak in my home, they were awesome in communicating the problem and had it diagnosed and repaired quickly.  they were very knowledgeable and caring through the process.  would highly recommend them.  Thank you team Roto!!

plumbers.name: Plumb Works Inc.
plumbers.address: 3116 Chestnut Dr #101, Atlanta, GA 30340, USA

reviews.author: Sadie B
reviews.text:
Krum is the best! He came out for my home inspection during due diligence and came back out to provide the service. This was a full days of work with a partner. They moved my water shut off out of crawl space, reworked my pipes for crawl space access, reworked pipes of of a leaking sink with missing parts, and switched my water temp faucet things (because it’s hot on left and cold on right), and definitely more. (The hole was mistakenly patched up by a separate handy man, thus their removal.)

AND Krum got my Dekalb plumbing certificate delivered to my email within a few hours. While I don’t know much about plumbing, I can see the new pipes have been installed sooo cleanly, very satisfying.

I mostly appreciate their empathy and kindness, because I was kinda *losing my mind* this morning with the general cost of homeownership. 🤣

reviews.author: CK Tan
reviews.text: I was really impressed with Spencer service. He sent the quote right after the visit and offer competitive and reasonable price. We have decided to go with Plumb Works. I was also surprised that he was able to start work after couple day. Well done and will do business again. Thank you again for the great work.

reviews.author: Aaron Ezell
reviews.text: Just bought a house that needed a new sewer line, and went with Plumb Works after getting a few quotes because of their attention to detail, friendly customer service, willingness to work within our budget, and extended warranty. The work included running a trench and cutting out part of the driveway, which they returned to good condition when finished. I would recommend them for any job.

reviews.author: Dina Molaison
reviews.text: From the initial call to schedule a repair to the actual service, the entire experience was top-notch. We had a plumbing emergency, and Ray got a plumber out to our home in about an hour and a half. Mr. Krum did an excellent job, was very detailed and explained the entire problem and process. The price was fair and work was high-quality. I appreciate the after-service emails documenting the repair process, faulty parts and replacement parts. Well done!

reviews.author: Justin Schaeffer
reviews.text: Wow. I'm not joking...I told my wife I had goosebumps after I got off the phone with Andrew, the technician that fixed several gas leaks and an improperly vented water heater for a blind, senior neighbor here in Kirkwood. It's SO nice to deal with a friendly, confident, competent, technician who genuinely cares and is trying to help you get the best value for your (non-profit's) money while doing the highest quality work. I LOVED my experience from calling to schedule the appointment to the quickly resolved gas leak for my senior neighbor. Great company, great customers service, great technicians.

plumbers.name: Public Service Plumbers
plumbers.address: 5610 Dyer St, Dallas, TX 75206, USA

reviews.author: Tara Westbrook
reviews.text: Christain was amazing. I like details and he explained everything very well. He came in after another plumbing company did a bad install of our tankless hit water heater. Now we are enjoying all the benefits of having hot water quickly to the other side of our home.He even corrected the venting for it.

reviews.author: Clancy Hawkins
reviews.text:
Troy was great to work with. He was professional, knowledgeable, and clearly very experienced — his 46 years in the industry really show. He quickly figured out what was going on, explained everything clearly, and made sure the issue was handled properly.

What I appreciated most was how straightforward and helpful he was throughout the process. He took the time to answer my questions and made a stressful situation much easier to deal with.

I’ll absolutely be calling Troy again for any future plumbing needs and would definitely recommend him to others.

reviews.author: Kate Busch
reviews.text: Kyle saved the day. He cleared two very clogged drains quickly and efficiently. He’s responsive, on time, and truly knows what he’s doing. I’m recovering from surgery right now and didn’t have the capacity to oversee — he handled everything seamlessly. So grateful to work with someone who is dependable. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Rachel Lane
reviews.text:
After our water heater unexpectedly failed, we spent an entire weekend trying to fix it ourselves, only to realize it was beyond repair. By Monday, after three days without water and a broken cold water inlet on top of it, we were completely overwhelmed. The plumber we’d used before couldn’t come until the next day, and we simply couldn’t go another day without water.

We called at least 10 plumbing companies, and that’s when Tony with Public Service Plumbers came to the rescue. He made an after-hours visit, showed up promptly, and immediately put us at ease. Tony was professional, courteous, and communicated everything clearly. He explained exactly what needed to be done, didn’t try to upsell anything unnecessary, and the pricing felt completely fair.

In less than two hours, we had water again.

Tony truly turned a stressful situation into a great experience. We highly recommend him and Public Service Plumbers, they’ve earned our business for life.

reviews.author: Kari Drews
reviews.text: Appreciate Jason's professionalism, experience & customer care for the large repiping he did. He even noticed a flaw in the new toilet he installed so I had a new one delivered. Very detail oriented!

plumbers.name: Saffer Total Home Plumbing, Heating & Electrical
plumbers.address: 4247 Harford Rd, Baltimore, MD 21214, USA

reviews.author: Abby Ricko
reviews.text: Gary & Steve came out to check on a plumbing issue at my work space, and made the experience incredibly smooth and easy!!! They were communicative, prompt, knowledgeable, and so kind! They were able to pinpoint the problem right away as our water heater, explained the whole thing to me with ease, and had an installation plan ready to go right away. I am so appreciative of how seamlessly they took care of everything which completely eliminated any stress on my end. We have used Saffer Plumbing 3+ times and its an A+++ experience every time. Thanks guys!!!!

reviews.author: Asha Hislop Des Vignes
reviews.text:
Wonderful Service! So, refreshing to get real genuine service, knowledgeable and professionalism.

The morning of the appointment Scott called to let me know he was 15 minutes away. He was punctual!

Scott left a great first impression when he placed the blue mat outside my front door as to not track dirt or the wet rain.

Scott's communication and knowledge are top tier but what Absolutely won me over when he said he's bring CJ cause his words " I believe he can learn from this job" .

CJ was respectful, courteous and kind.

I will definitely recommend Saffer Plumbing.

reviews.author: Ken Brown
reviews.text: Knows his stuff.  Prompt, courteous, efficient.  Understands our concern in maintaining the integrity of our 50's vintage home.  He & Saffer offered the solution vs. others that just wanted to "rip everything out."  We'd have him/them back again.

reviews.author: Susan Miller
reviews.text: Saffer was wonderful to work with. They kept me informed throughout the entire process and explained everything to me. The team was wonderful. Will definitely use them again.

reviews.author: liang huang
reviews.text: Don't waste your time and money with them. Bad experience, failed installation, suffered one year until I found another independent plumber who fixed their failed installation in 2 hours. Will never deal with Saffer Plumbing again. To your comment below: I didn't want to pay the bill so you failed the installation, or the other way around? A business owner with such a logic capability is not far from failure.

plumbers.name: Jim's Plumbing Now
plumbers.address: 2418 Marsh Ln #106, Carrollton, TX 75006, USA

reviews.author: Christina Brown
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with Jim’s Plumbing. The service number staff had excellent communication and made scheduling easy from start to finish. The technician, Malik, was professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to clearly explain the problem I was having. He did a great job addressing my concerns and making sure everything was handled properly. I’m very satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend Jim’s Plumbing.

UPDATE: I called Jim’s Plumbing to do some more work for me. I needed a new water heater and some work done on my outside hose bibs. Review following: I had a great experience with Jim’s Plumbing. The contractor, Malik, was very knowledgeable about his duties and was able to problem-solve with ease. He was communicative throughout the process and very pleasant to speak with. Overall, he did an outstanding job, and I would highly recommend Jim’s Plumbing. Old pics versus new water heater.

reviews.author: Susan Donohoe
reviews.text:
Great job. James came to the job early and stayed late in order to have the job completed before the predicted ice storm. I found the price reasonable. The area was pristine when completed and he spent time explaining the vagaries of the water heater in detail. James was pleasant and professional and I will certainly call Jim’s Plumbing for any further plumbing needs for my home or my rental units.
Susan Donohoe

reviews.author: Hugo Leal
reviews.text: After foundation repair I Called Jim’s plumbing for a hydrostatic test and confirm if I had any leaks beneath the foundation , so they got me on the schedule asap and sent out an excavation crew next day .the next day I call Jim’s plumbing they sent Victor  and Steve to do an amazing job fixing all plumbing under the foundation ,very meticulous, great communication and easy to talk . 100% satisfied with his work and professionalism

reviews.author: Susan Diane Mackey
reviews.text: I highly recommend Jim’s Plumbing Now for any sewer and/or water line issues. I had a major sewer line issue and their team was incredibly professional and knowledgeable. From the initial inspection using camera technology, to tunneling under the house, to locating the issue and the final repair,  Chris, explained every step along the way. The team was on time, they worked very efficiently and were very careful to minimize  the disruption to my yard.. The price was fair and there were no last-minute unexpected fees.  If you need sewer and/or water line work done right, call Jim’s Plumbing Now. Be sure to ask for Chris, who did an outstanding job!!!    Thanks Chris!

reviews.author: Amelia and Andy also Piper and James 1,000 like's
reviews.text: Larry is amazing! He is so nice and informative. I had talked to some other companies but they were trying to make me pay an extraordinary amount of money and still didn’t know what was wrong. He came in and solved it and the cost was great and not what the other people said. I will use this company from now on! Larry is the best! He knows his stuff and works hard.

plumbers.name: Mr. Central
plumbers.address: 1926 Richland Ave E, Aiken, SC 29801, USA

reviews.author: Andrea So
reviews.text: I had an excellent customer experience with Mr. Central. With regard to scheduling, they booked my appointment and our technician, Oscar arrived within two hours of my call for service. He did a great job diagnosing and fixing the issue with our tankless water heater. He explained everything that was causing the problem and gave me multiple options (including cost free options) for how to address it. The service fee for the visit was reasonable and transparent. I am very happy with this company and would schedule with them again.

reviews.author: Jessica Coleman
reviews.text:
Jeremy was thorough, he took his time and he answered all my questions. He went out of his way to find out answers to some questions I had that he wasn't sure of related to payment. He explained the process of what they would do and made me feel confident with choosing then to get the job done right the first time.
Jeremy and Nik did an incredible job with installing our new water heater and gas lines for fireplace. The neatly mounted the water heater and safely removed the old water heater tank. They were very clean making sure to put booties on every time they entered the home. They cleaned up the yard very well after digging for the gas lines. We are extremely pleased with the work they did and the professionalism. We will be using them again in the future!

reviews.author: Lawretta Cameron
reviews.text:
Felix did an amazing job on our HVAC system! He was professional, knowledgeable, and explained everything in a way that was easy to understand. He showed up on time, worked efficiently, and made sure everything was running perfectly before he left.

What I appreciated most was his honesty and attention to detail — no upselling, just real solutions. You can tell he takes pride in his work and truly cares about his customers.

If you’re looking for someone reliable and trustworthy for your heating and air needs, I highly recommend Felix and the Mr Central team!

Thank you so much! From the Simpkins family!

reviews.author: David MacIntyre
reviews.text: Nick and Mark came to do my yearly plumbing review and look at a leaky toilet. The toilet needed to be overhalled and after discussing three options I decided to go with a new toilet and they were able to do it while they were here. They did a fantastic job and were very careful with my house and very considerate about wearing shoe covers and were great at asking questions and giving me information. I highly recommend this company and the folks that work for Mr. Central.

reviews.author: CeeCee P.
reviews.text: Jeremy Butler was my technician. He was so professional and efficient. I appreciate him taking time to explain what was wrong and going into detail on how he fixed it. I felt very comfortable giving him space and letting him work. Thank you for the awesome experience and we will be in touch. If you’re in Aiken I highly recommend them.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing and Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1435 Paramount Dr, Huntsville, AL 35806, USA

reviews.author: Joseph Lee
reviews.text:
Honestly, I’d give 10 stars.
I had been without water since yesterday, and at first, I brushed it off, thinking the nearby construction was the cause. But when the faucets were still dry this morning, worry started to creep in. After calling the water utility and hearing that the problem was on our end, I spent a long time searching for the leak—finally finding water seeping out near the meter.
I reached out to Roto-Rooter, and that’s when Riley arrived. He stepped out of the truck with a warm, genuine smile that immediately eased my stress. In the freezing cold, he knelt down and dug through the ground with his hands, determined to find the source of the problem. He went out of his way to get rust‑resistant parts so the repair would last, and he worked with such care and integrity that it honestly moved me.
He didn’t leave until everything was fully restored, checking and rechecking to make sure the water was flowing properly again. He even gave us a discount—something he didn’t have to do but did anyway. Before he left, he wished us a blessed day, and it felt sincere.
Thanks to Riley, we finally have water again. After a stressful, uncomfortable day, his kindness and professionalism turned everything around. If five stars is the limit, then he deserves double.

reviews.author: verna rizvi
reviews.text: Great service! When I called Roto Rooter I was told they had someone close by and they would contact him and send him over.   Cole arrived quickly and went right to work figuring out what was causing the backup in my sink. He did a great job getting to the cause of my problem and cleaning out the pipes. Very pleased with the professionalism shown by the service man Cole and the quality of his work.

reviews.author: D.T.
reviews.text: Had a great experience with Roto Rooter today. Technician Markues Montalvo was friendly, knowledgeable, and right on time. He was honest about the situation, very thorough with the inspection, and explained everything clearly. I really appreciated that there was no charge just to come out and inspect. It’s hard to find service like this anymore — highly recommend!

reviews.author: Emily Pauli
reviews.text: Roto Rooter did an excellent job!  They were professional and took time to explain their findings and recommendations. The were timely, worked efficiently, and cleaned up when finished.   I’ve used them in the past and will do so again if needed.

reviews.author: Kristie Scheuer
reviews.text: Roto Rooter responded to our request for service, septic tank service, in a very timely and professional manner.  We called on Friday night and the service was performed on a Saturday which was extremely helpful for our situation.  The technician, Aye, was very knowledgeable, efficient and personable. I would definitely use Roto Rooter again for my plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Andersen Plumbing, Heating and AC Repair
plumbers.address: 700 Terry Ave, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Anthony DiAngelo
reviews.text:
Highly recommend Joe and the Anderson team. Joe replaced our sump pump and was outstanding to work with. He took the time to educate us, clearly laid out all of our options, and explained the trade-offs so we could make an informed decision—no pressure, just solid guidance. The quality of the work was excellent.

We’ve had Anderson out to our house multiple times over the past few months for different issues, and each experience has been consistently superb. Professional, knowledgeable, and reliable service every time. We wouldn’t hesitate to call Joe or Anderson again.

reviews.author: Mariah Wright
reviews.text: Nate & Zach were great! They were on time, very polite and very knowledgeable. Immediately was able to identify the issue and provide a solution. Walked me through everything in a way I understood. Great service all around! “Im just a girl” lol and I was able to explain the issue no problem to my husband as well. 10/10!!

reviews.author: Jeanette Hoffman
reviews.text: Jon and Cesar came out to diagnose a noise I heard coming from the furnace. They arrived quickly, were polite and professional and did a thorough inspection of the entire furnace. They were able to figure out the issue and discussed with me the other things they saw that looked like they should be addressed to keep the furnace running smoothly. They offered me different options on what to repair urgently and what should be addressed but could wait a bit longer. They were not pushy at all and explained everything thoroughly while showing me pictures of what they were seeing. I continue to use Anderson because every time I’ve needed them this is the same reliable and professional service I receive.

reviews.author: Max
reviews.text:
I recently had a bathtub faucet installed by Andersen, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. Evan and Michelle were professional, courteous, and clearly knew what they were doing. They took the time to make sure everything was installed properly and working perfectly before they left.

Their workmanship was clean and precise, and they made sure the area was spotless when the job was finished. It’s clear they take pride in the quality of their work. I would definitely recommend this company to anyone looking for reliable and professional plumbing services.

reviews.author: Andre Porche
reviews.text:
We had an outstanding experience working with Joe Harkins. From the moment he arrived, he demonstrated a high level of professionalism, knowledge, and attention to detail. He took the time to thoroughly assess our home and carefully identify the source of the leak, explaining each step of the process in a clear and reassuring manner.
Joe truly went above and beyond to ensure we felt confident that the issue was properly diagnosed and that our system was secure. His expertise and patience gave us peace of mind during what could have been a very stressful situation.
In addition, he provided thoughtful recommendations for trusted services that could assist with the necessary repairs. That extra level of guidance showed that he genuinely cares about his clients and the long-term well-being of their homes.
We highly recommend Joe Harkins to anyone in need of a knowledgeable, dependable, and customer-focused professional.

plumbers.name: Plumb Crazy Plumbing
plumbers.address: 308 W Britton Rd, Oklahoma City, OK 73114, USA

reviews.author: Dale C Courtney JR
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Plumb Crazy Plumbing. The technician, Tim, was extremely professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. He arrived on time, quickly diagnosed the issue, and completed the work without any unnecessary delays. Everything was explained clearly, and the quality of his work was excellent. It’s clear he takes pride in what he does. I really appreciated how smooth and stress-free the whole process was. I would absolutely recommend Plumb Crazy Plumbing and would be happy to have Tim back for any future work!

reviews.author: Ramona Campos
reviews.text: Happy with service from this company. Able to schedule estimate online and got a confirmation of appt within the hour. Day of appointment, I received a text 30 minutes prior to arrive and arrived within the requested time frame. Jesse did a great job of explaining the process, giving me the quote and told me it was good for 30 days. After speaking to my daughter, we decided to rescheduled for actual appointment. Again online and quick response from company to confirm. The same tech Jesse came out and quickly completed the job within the hour. Fair pricing, within what I was expecting for pay for the job. (Single Bibb Replacement- should cost anywhere from $300-400; paid $375 for service). Overall, very pleased with service and will call again for any future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Dina
reviews.text: I had a pipe burst under my house when temperatures dropped below zero, and Plumb Crazy was amazing. They sent a plumber within two hours, and he was wonderful, efficient, thorough, and clearly knew what he was doing. There was no dragging out the job or padding the bill, which I truly appreciated. Great service, honest pricing, and fast response. I will 100% use them again and recommend them to anyone needing a plumber.

reviews.author: Miranda Mohi
reviews.text: We have used Plumb Crazy the last 20 years, since 2006. We have had some big and small jobs to complete and they do a great job for a fair price. They are always polite and prompt, and I feel they communicate with us well about appointments! Thank you!

reviews.author: Michael Stephanic
reviews.text:
ABSOLUTELY FANTASTIC

The late January winter storm Fern wreaked havoc on plumbing in and around Oklahoma. Even while leaving our hot and cold water faucets dribble to prevent freezing, we ended up with a cracked hot water pipe underneath the house. I called Plumb Crazy Plumbing, figuring I wouldn’t get a tech out for days in this weather and with so many others dealing with broken pipes. Instead, Plumb Crazy had a technician at our house within the hour.

My tech, Kevin arrived with his assistant and they checked out the damage, gave me a quote, and had the problem fixed in less than an hour. They were extremely friendly, polite, professional and well-trained. The price was great. The service was prompt and efficient. The warranty was very reasonable and totally unexpected. And the follow-up from Plumb Crazy was above and beyond what I’ve had from other plumbers. I highly recommend Plumb Crazy Plumbing for all your plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Catons Plumbing, Drains & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 801 Geipe Rd, Catonsville, MD 21228, USA

reviews.author: Javon Cooper
reviews.text:
Ramon is hands down one of the best plumbers I’ve dealt with. He came in and fixed a problem that multiple other plumbers couldn’t figure out. No hesitation, no guessing, he got right to work and handled it.

The service was fast, efficient, and professional from start to finish. You can tell he knows exactly what he’s doing. I’m beyond satisfied with the results and will definitely be calling him again if I ever need plumbing work done.

Highly recommend Ramon if you want the job done right the first time. 💯

reviews.author: K Brooks
reviews.text:
My initial call to Catons was great.  Very friendly scheduling.  They provided me an estimated time for the plumber to arrive.

Curtis, a field supervisor, arrived a short time later to preview the issue.  He was friendly and professional.

The plumber, Jason, arrived some time after.  He was very friendly.  He assessed the issue and exhibited problem solving on the spot since the house is old and he had to figure out the best way to perform the repair. He explained what he was doing.  Jason got the job done in a very acceptable period of time and he didn't seem to mind me hanging over his shoulder.  He removed the ancient inoperable water meter which is pretty cool to look at.  I was very pleased with the service and charge.

There was some residual water on the repair the next day even after wiping, but I gave it a couple days to insure I wouldn't need to call them back.  All is very good.

Having not had to ever call a plumber, this was a great first experience.  There was a lot of anxiety on my part leading up to the repair.  The entire process is very efficient and they will let you know when the plumber is on their way.   Thanks, Catons.

reviews.author: Courtney Moore
reviews.text: Highly recommended. When another plumbing company cancelled on me last minute, Caton’s was able to send someone same day. They arrived on time after calling to confirm they were on the way. Henry and his associate were very friendly, respectful and explained things in a way I was able to understand. Will definitely be my first call in the future when another plumbing issue arises.

reviews.author: Ryan Johnson
reviews.text: On incredibly short notice, Caton was able to schedule a call and come out later in the evening. I had a bad leak in the kitchen sink. Henry came out and assessed the problem instantly and gave me all available options. He thoroughly informed me. He was incredibly respectful, professional, and knowledgeable. Really glad they were able to assist me. He came out and followed up with the perfect install. Grateful to have had him!

reviews.author: Vicki Clifton
reviews.text: Catons Plumbing was the only emergency plumbing company that was able to immediately come address our problem late at night. From the initial plumbing professional, Derrick, to the field representative Curtis, Tuesday, and the excavation crew, everyone was extremely kind, professional, and talked us through each step and explained all pricing breakdowns. They provided all images/pics/documents needed for our insurance. At the end of our experience, it was as though we were all family. I will definitely call on Catons again for all of our plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Michael & Son Services
plumbers.address: 45681 Oakbrook Ct STE 101, Sterling, VA 20166, USA

reviews.author: Steve M
reviews.text:
Superb Service!
Roberto did an outstanding job installing my new water heater. He arrived on time, worked efficiently, and clearly explained everything along the way. His attention to detail and professionalism stood out—everything was done neatly, and he made sure the system was running perfectly before leaving. It’s rare to find someone this thorough and courteous. Highly recommend Roberto for any installation work!

reviews.author: Richard Smiechowski
reviews.text: George did an excellent job! He arrived promptly on time, and detailed, (very thoroughly), his objective for the day. His primary purpose was to advise us on the condition of our 15 year old sump pump. George systematically lined out good, better, best scenario’s, and we decided to go with the best option, as a replacement. George demonstrated excellent communication skills, by delegating necessary electrical wiring to his colleague, Rayyan who returned to complete the electrical connections needed to finish the sump pump project. Very impressive display of teamwork. Overall, we’re very happy with the professionaly done work performed today, and look forward to doing more business with Michael and Son.

reviews.author: Charly Camacho
reviews.text: Outstanding service from Michael & Sons technician Donald Monroe! Donald arrived on time, was professional, friendly, and extremely knowledgeable. He quickly diagnosed the issue and unclogged our drain efficiently, making sure everything was working perfectly before he left. He explained what caused the problem and gave helpful tips to prevent it from happening again. The entire process was smooth and stress-free. Highly recommend Michael & Sons for their excellent service and top-notch technicians — we will definitely use them again!

reviews.author: Stephanie Green
reviews.text: We recently had an outstanding experience with Roberto from the Sterling office. Our water heater needed servicing (and ultimately replacing). Roberto was knowledgeable, thorough, communicative and respectful of our home and pets. He went above and beyond to ensure that all issues were satisfactorily resolved. We would definitely recommend Roberto and give more than 5 stars if we could!

reviews.author: Friska Rubijono
reviews.text: It was a Big job.  Eric was simply outstanding. He was very technical and competent and provided the service top notch. We wish him all success. Thank you.

plumbers.name: Wizard Plumbing and Drain
plumbers.address: 2300 Palm Ave, San Mateo, CA 94403, USA

reviews.author: Mani Hashemi
reviews.text:
Exceptional service and an exceptional team!!!
I lost hot water pressure and right away I knew something was wrong with my water heater. Since it was Sunday I had to email a few places and one of them was Wizard plumbing. Monday morning I got a few responses but Wizard plumbing was the quickest of them all and could dispatch someone urgently. Kevin arrived and identified that the water heater was leaking and needed to be replaced, after answering my many questions and making calls around to find the model I wanted. Shortly after Dino arrived and the pair not only replaced the water heater but also fabricated a custom pan to adhere to the current drain that was in place. They also replaced the leaky hot water valve as well as an automatic shut off valve. Throughout the whole time, they were curious, attentive, and thorough. They got the job done wonderfully and quickly within a few hours; this was exceptionally important as we have little kids. As they say, you get what you pay for and with Wizard plumbing, you get every Penny's worth. Don't just look for the cheapest but look for quality and Dino and Kevin are a great example of why that is the case. Thank you very much. A rockstar team for sure.

reviews.author: P. O. Benito
reviews.text: Made an appointment three days prior, they took down all of my information and asked me a bunch of questions. The morning of the appointment, I get a text message saying they do not service my area and have to cancel. Why didn’t you tell me that three days ago when I made the appointment and gave you my address? Waste of time.

reviews.author: Todd S.
reviews.text: I’ve lived in a house that was built in 1947 for 10 years. So I’ve had more than a few plumbers come through for various issues during that time. A termite inspector found a leak, so I panic-called the first result on Yelp (I don’t usually do that). Wizard Plumbing came through, assessed the situation, and gave me a number of options, each with associated costs. Not one to mess around with plumbing, I went with the most extensive & labor intensive option (and I’m glad I did; see pix). Out of all the plumbers I’ve done business with over the years, Wizard Plumbing proved to be — by far — the most honest, fair, competent, experienced and thorough. In fact, if I made a Venn diagram with all of those attributes for each of the plumbers I’ve done business with, Wizard would be the only one that made a perfect circle. They’ve definitely made a customer for life.

reviews.author: Lawrence Lam
reviews.text: Ammar from Wizard plumbing came out same day to fix me emergency. I would not have been able to open my business the next day without his help. He had to perform a major hydrojetter procedure on my plumbing. Everything works great now. I will call Wizard Plumbing again if needed.

reviews.author: Venu
reviews.text: Todd and Kyle came out today and the whole experience was fantastic. The dispatch was super responsive to start. I had a 75 gallon water heater that flooded my utility room. They sent out the two techs within hours of opening of business hours. Our situation was a bit special. Water heater two stories down and in a weird framed in closet the tank did not fit out of. They moved the washer and sink for me and left to do another job while I sawed apart the frame. That was on me for obvious reasons. I had to move electrical wiring too. The 75 gallon did not fit through the frame. Once I was complete I called and they were back in an hour. The entire new 50 gallon water heater was installed by end of business and less than 24 hours after the first discovery. It fit better. Operated better. Both techs were courteous, professional, knew exactly what they were doing as they were specific to water heaters. I will definitely call them again in any emergency. The other company called me to schedule the estimate when wizard was almost done….

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of Farmers Branch
plumbers.address: 4250 Spring Valley Rd, Farmers Branch, TX 75244, USA

reviews.author: Vivian Li
reviews.text: Pascual came and did a speedy and wonderful job fixing our bathroom sink plumbing that was leaking.  He was patient to find the problem since it is a slow leak but definitely there, and was quick in fixing it in less than an hour.  He had a cheerful personality too and was considerate to take his shoes off when he came in.  Thanks Pascual!

reviews.author: Alejandro Suarez
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of being helped by Keyfer and Dillion. Outstanding experience. Keyfer was extremely thorough when explaining the possible solutions, stand out guy. Once we settled on a solution he got right to work showing me what had caused the problem. He was also training Dillion at the time who was also very nice, Keyfer did a great job of describing the steps to Dillion and verifying his understanding. I hope to not have any further plumbing issued but if I do I will call Keyfer in the future, thanks gents.

reviews.author: Brian Bacher
reviews.text: Ian came out to assess a kitchen clog we couldn't fix. Not only was he personable, but he also figured it out quickly and uncloggd our pipes. He also provided great advice on how to avoid deep clogs in the future. We used Mr. Rooter before and will definately use them.again. Highly Recommended.

reviews.author: bryan wilson
reviews.text: Had an outdoor garden hose valve break in the evening and was leaking behind the wall/siding of our house. Called Mr. Rooster and they were able to send someone out right away. Pascual was able to come out first thing in the morning and was able to make the repair, reinstall newer better equipment as well as enforce it better than it was to prevent from happening again, and most of all was able to reseal the wall back up to save me time from running to low s and rushing to get it done before the ice storm hits the DFW area. Very friendly, and helpful! Would use again!

reviews.author: Conner Atwell
reviews.text: Clint came in to fix a leak from our shower in our new home and was an absolute pleasure to work with. Kind, professional, and very knowledgeable. I would give him 6 stars if I could. Will definitely be asking for Clint again in the future, give this man a raise!

plumbers.name: Total Plumbing Service Inc.
plumbers.address: 3706 Big A Rd, Rowlett, TX 75089, USA

reviews.author: Brandy Cloud
reviews.text: My place of employment had Total Plumbing come out and I was impressed with the workers they sent out. We work in a quiet environment. Jubal and Bobby arrived and understood the atmosphere immediately. That is a nice surprise- to not have to explain how to behave in a professional environment. The communication was excellent. They were very respectful of the staff, office and clientele. They did a great job. The issue was resolved quickly. Great guys, would recommend!

reviews.author: Tex Hep
reviews.text:
I recently used Total Plumbing Service for some bathroom work at my home in Melissa, Texas, and I couldn't be happier with the entire experience. From start to finish, they were fast, friendly, and very reasonably priced—no surprises or upsells.
The technicians, Johnathan and Fabian, were absolutely outstanding. They arrived on time, took the time to explain everything clearly, and provided an exact estimate upfront with no hidden fees. They worked efficiently, completed the job swiftly, and did a thorough cleanup afterward. Honestly, the bathroom looked cleaner than it did before they started—attention to detail like that is rare!
I'm so impressed that I joined their maintenance program right away, and I've already scheduled them for a couple of smaller jobs coming up. If you're in the DFW area and need reliable plumbers who treat your home with respect, look no further. Total Plumbing Service is the real deal—highly recommend!
Thanks again to Johnathan, Fabian, and the whole team!

reviews.author: Don S
reviews.text: We had both upstairs showers that really needed the valves replaced so that they would work, and work efficiently, with no leaks. Chris replaced both valves quickly and did a great job! He also let us know about other services that we might benefit from in the future for bathroom upgrades.

reviews.author: Anthony Joplin
reviews.text:
Guy came on time did an excellent job cleaning up abd tested everything and asked if I had any questions.  He was really clean and professional in every way

Yes I use them twice already im please with there work and will definitely be useing them again if I have any plumbing issues in the future

reviews.author: Penny Robinson
reviews.text: Total Plumbing answered the phone after hours and was able to offer me next day service since it was not an emergency. My serviceman Alexis Cervantez was very knowledgeable and fixed everything I needed. Very professional as well was very kind. And with that ... I very much can appreciate this kind of service. Highly recommend them.

plumbers.name: Limelight Services
plumbers.address: 4540 Venture Dr #100, Johnstown, CO 80534, USA

reviews.author: M S
reviews.text: We were very happy with our tankless water heater replacement today.  The technicians, Robert and Brennan, kept us informed along the way, left everything neat and tidy, and gave us a thorough review before they left   I highly recommend them and would you use this company again in the future!   Thanks so much for the hot water!!

reviews.author: Bambi Oshel
reviews.text:
We were very pleased with Limelight Services. Christine was helpful and great at communication for scheduling and the technician they sent out, Ben Holden, did an amazing job.
Ben was knowledgeable, personable, and patiently took his time addressing every possible concern we had, letting us know that it was nothing to be concerned about in the electrical system but he did offer solutions to eliminate the issues in the future. We plan to meet with them early next week to get that done.
I asked about under counter lighting and Ben will be installing that for us in the near future.
As we just moved to a new home we have some issues that would make the home more comfortable for us and Ben addressed those with solutions too if we are ever interested..
While he was here he installed some new plugs for my husband that were badly needed in the garage.
We highly recommend Limelight Services  and plan to call them for future projects.

reviews.author: G S
reviews.text: I'm a returning limelight customer, and they continue to provide great service. Jeremiah cleared a really tough drain in my bathroom. He explained the issue, helped me figure out the best price option, talked me through what with he did and gave me advice to improve my maintenance in the future. He was also very thorough about cleaning up, and kind to my dog. I'd be happy to work with him again.

reviews.author: Kjersten Johnson
reviews.text: Limelight was fantastic! I actually called them after poor customer service and callback from another company—and I’m so glad! They were helpful on the phone and then even got me in much earlier than scheduled (thank you, Celeste!). Brayden was then our technician and he was amazing. He was communicative and explained what was happening while solving the problem as quickly as possible. And my cat and dog loved him! Prices were fair and service was great.

reviews.author: Leslie Krug
reviews.text: I am incredibly impressed and thankful for the work that Trevor did today from Limelight Services. He was professional, friendly, on time and very knowledgeable; He also taught me some valuable tips about electricity, which I love. Five stars definitely. We have plumbing needs and will reach out to Limelight for their plumbing expertise. I am impressed that limelight treats their employees really well, is family owned, has a five star rating, and is a suite of services. Try them you’ll like them.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Drain Service
plumbers.address: 136 Tanner Rd, Greenville, SC 29607, USA

reviews.author: William Howard
reviews.text:
Travis Reid did an outstanding job!  The Frankenstein valve for the dishwasher the builder install started leaking and was lightly flooding the cabinet and floor.  Travis replaced it with a quality quarter turn valve and put in a new supply line to the dishwasher. Turned the water back on and it works perfectly.

We’ve used Rotor Rooter at our past house and had excellent experiences. The great experience today was no exception!

reviews.author: Jimmy Martin
reviews.text: Travis was very professional plumber and did a great job. My wife & I did not want to be without water a second night. Travis had to rebuild our tub faucet and build an access box. Highly recommend Travis and Rotor Rooter!!

reviews.author: Liz F.
reviews.text: Roto Rooter has always been able to clear out pipe clogs when they happen in my older house. Their prices are fair and they perform quality work. The dispatchers and technicians are always friendly and knowledgeable. I also had a leaky toilet fixed quickly as well. They don’t try to add in unnecessary work either. John was very helpful today and now we can use our plumbing again.

reviews.author: Michelle McLeod
reviews.text:
Miles and Jose were fantastic. They were punctual, respectful, and took time to explain the issues with our disposal and water pressure that were contributing to a leak.
They answered any questions, and made sure I understood and felt comfortable with the work and quoted costs.
They worked efficiently, and cleaned up after. They were also friendly!
Would definitely recommend their service.

reviews.author: Paragermania
reviews.text:
We called Roto-Rooter for an inspection on our gas water heater after noticing a leakage.
The person on the phone, (customer service) was excellent with a very fast response. Shortly after the technicians Ellis Wheeler and Tylor Fobian arrived. We felt in the best hands possible, due to not only very knowledgeable in the field but also very caring individuals. The whole team was working non stop until the project was completed. And let me tell you the finish product was flawless.
When we are talking about good, better, best. This company is truly THE BEST. 100% recommended. Very grateful and happy customer!

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1137 W Webster Ave, Chicago, IL 60614, USA

reviews.author: Andrea Monllau
reviews.text:
What a great and fast job they did! We have a bursted pipe and called them. In less than 1 hour Javier and Jimmy showed up and were able to quickly repair the pipe.

They kept us informed of pricing and steps throughout the whole process.

Javier was really good at identifying where the burst was and only had to do a small whole in the wall.

10/10!! From call to fixed less than 3h

reviews.author: Lauren Ortega Falconer
reviews.text: Dex always comes through for us in an emergency! We have had several plumbing issues in our condo in the last 12 months, and Dex has been great. He's always responsive and persistent, even coming back a few times free of charge to tinker with his solutions to chronic issues we're dealing with. He's been trustworthy and friendly, and I would definitely recommend him to anyone.

reviews.author: Claire Anderson
reviews.text: This team was outstanding. Within 10 minutes of me calling they had three guys in the house working to fix my pipes. Ended up having 6 burst pipes during the Omar vortex that were really complex to fix and Dex and his team were fast and kept me updated the whole time. I have two small children at home and need water to properly care for them and he promised me no matter what he was getting me water by the end of the night. And they did for a good cost. I cannot say enough for how amazing this company is and the men who work for it are. So great fun to have found them

reviews.author: Rhianna Kern
reviews.text:
Dex and the crew literally saved our night (and our hardwood floors!) We got home from work and the kitchen sink was backing up with gross water and quickly started overflowing onto the floor. Between bailing out drainage water and panicking, Rescue Plumbing answered the phone in 2 rings and said we can help you right now.

Not only did Dex and his team show up AFTER HOURS in the SNOW, they were warm, kind and jumped right into action to save my kitchen. They knew exactly what to do, explained it all to me, told me the costs right up front and stuck to it. Within 30 minutes they fixed our building’s drainage issue, cleaned up the kitchen neat as a pin and were out the door with a quick joke.

I hope I don’t need to see them again but also if I need a plumber, they’re saved in my phone and getting every recommendation. 4 seasons and ABC told me I’d have to wait til tomorrow afternoon at the earliest and I think my floors would have been ruined from overflowing sink water if I didn’t have Rescue Plumbing. Thank you Dex and team!!!

reviews.author: Charles Hastings
reviews.text: Javier was fantastic, honest, and efficient! I got several quotes from other companies and this was by far the most cost effective. Not only did they provide a fair and up front quote, but they were friendly, and responsive. I will definitely be calling them again for any future plumbing needs!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 24W500 Maple Ave # 209, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Fresh
reviews.text: Erlin was fantastic!  He actually took the time required to diagnose the issue (where previous plumbers did not) and address the true problem.  He was professional, respectful, and effectively communicated the details surrounding the problem and provided tips for future plumbing health.  I highly recommend Erlin and will definitely be using him again in the future!

reviews.author: Joseph Morisco
reviews.text:
I scheduled a plumber to come out and had a few questions after booking the appointment. I called back simply to understand what the technician planned to do since I had already had the line rodded a few months ago and didn’t want to just repeat the same service without understanding the approach.

Unfortunately, whoever answered the phone was extremely dismissive. She repeatedly cut me off while I was speaking and had a noticeable attitude. I wasn’t trying to be difficult — I was just asking basic questions about the service.

Instead of listening, she kept saying they couldn’t tell me anything over the phone and wouldn’t even let me finish my sentences. Because of that interaction, I immediately canceled my appointment.

Good customer service starts with listening to the customer. Losing business simply because someone won’t take a moment to hear a question is disappointing.

reviews.author: Burst Flames Entertainment
reviews.text: Kemal with Roto-Rooter was great! He explained everything that was recommended to be serviced and didn't try to upsale me on a service that wasn't needed. I highly recommend Kemal and I'll definitely be reaching out to him again when I need any plumbing service.

reviews.author: Charia Johnson
reviews.text: Roto rooter is a scam... they dont do any work... Im the president of a condo association... called them for a boiler issue the man didnt do a thing... looked at the hot water heater and told me it was old and probably out of warranty and it would be 15k to replace... I even asked like you didnt even look at it.. you arent telling me whats broken just that it old and broke... well I can see that... he made a call to the company about warranty... wrote his paper for the 75 dollar fee and left... did nothing for 75 bucks Nothing

reviews.author: Andrea Gomez
reviews.text: First service a few months ago left me happy, issue got taken care of right away. Appt was made and tech was there within the estimated time frame. The work was done quick and efficiently. Recently i had some plumbing issues and immediately thought to call them. Scheduled an appointment same day within the hour, the tech was dispatched- i waited 2 1/2 hours before calling for an update and being told there is issues with travel and they cant make it in, thats fine, i reschedule for next day, wait over an hour and a half before calling for an update, was told to hold on a bit more. An hour later they call to reschedule that the tech cannot come, made for next day in the AM this time instead of PM. Got a call this morning at 7am-(3 hours before my appointment time) to ask if my appointment can be moved up, the tech can be there in the next 30 minutes, i agree, wait, over an hour later, nothing- i call for an update, am told the technician is supposed to be on the way still but nothing. I cancelled the appointment. Ive had to rearange my schedule for 3 days now and ive been able to try things at home to help my plumbing issues. Crying in the club- send help

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 3817 Conflans Rd, Irving, TX 75061, USA

reviews.author: Tiffani Geisert
reviews.text: I had an emergency at one of my listings and Roto Rooter had Juan out within 2 hours.  He was great and corrected the issue!  Their follow up was great as well while I was waiting for Juan to arrive.  I even had a mold remediation contact (Jorge) called me to introduce himself to see if in the future we needed any assistance. Great customer service!! I will definitely use them in the future.

reviews.author: Jackie Perez
reviews.text: Andrew (Drew) was very helpful, friendly, and knowledgeable! He had us fixed up properly and was on time. Thanks Drew!

reviews.author: Quinn
reviews.text: Had a burst pipe on my outside spigot. I used the website scheduler around 3 and had a technician out by 5, with the problem being repaired by 5:45. Bry, our technician, was very knowledgeable and showed me the problem and what he did to fix it. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Nancy Shelton
reviews.text: The experience with Roto Rooter today was amazing from start to finish. From the initiall call to the actual service I have no complaints. Drew is an amazing plumber. 35 years of experience!!! He took the time to not only identify the issue but found the parts and got them the same day and got the work done. He is incredibly knowledgeable and a great man. What a blessing to have some like Drew working for this company. Roto Rooter should be real proud! And let me tell you really professional and by the way nice hat he was wearing. He has some class!! Overall fantastic service and amazing quality!!!!

reviews.author: Dianne Crumpton
reviews.text:
They installed new PVC under the house and removed all corroded metal piping. Left dirt everywhere, including on outdoor AC unit.  After installing the new PVC, they did not modify or repair the shower drainpipe; pipe was forced inside the shower.
We asked them to extend PVC clean outs above ground; were to come in the morning, they arrived late evening.  They were going to return to install a concrete pad to protect the new extended PVC clean outs, but no one ever called and work never completed.  Jason M., Field Supervisor attempted to discuss our concerns over the phone but did not understand the issues. Never came to the house for us to physically show our concerns.  No follow-up or courtesy. Communication between the Field Supervisor, workers digging, and the plumbers not consistent and we as homeowners received conflicting information from all parties.

plumbers.name: Advanced Plumbing, AC & Furnace Repair
plumbers.address: 902 Davis St, Vacaville, CA 95687, USA

reviews.author: Trish Collier
reviews.text: The best experience ever.  The receptionist was wonderful and Ivan the gentleman who came to my house was exceptional.  The friendliest and most professional gentleman ever.  He even went to Home Depot with me to pick up the new toilet. The experience was second to none and I highly highly recommend this company for any of your plumbing needs.  Please recognize Ivan for his exceptional performance.  He installed a new toilet and unclogged the main area that almost flooded my house.

reviews.author: C D
reviews.text: I hired Advanced Plumbing Heating and Air to replace a shower head, and two bathroom sink faucets. Jamaul and his colleague arrived on time on the day they were scheduled to come (a weekend, which worked well with my schedule). They came right in and evaluated the bathroom fixtures. They went over all of the options I could choose from, and answered all my questions. I had initially inquired about also replacing two sinks, however, Jamaul let me know that changing my sinks could cause me to have to change many other things, like the mirror on my wall, dry-wall, and more plumbing. He let me know that the sinks were in good condition to keep-which saved me money. He also kept safety a priority. When evaluating the faucets, he and his colleague discovered that my emergency shut off valves were not working (which makes sense because they are over 20 years old). They were able to replace everything including the valves, and the price was great. Jamaul and his colleague worked hard from start to finish. They had excellent customer service and communication. I would highly recommend Advanced Heating and Air!

reviews.author: robert anderson
reviews.text: Overcharge me did only half of what they charged me for left me with sheet rock repairs a backed up system, which they had to come out and unplug the waste and vent work. They said they were gonna do. They didn’t do they trashed. My carpet would not recommend them to anyone and I paid $9500 for this work.

reviews.author: Joseph Klucarich
reviews.text:
I just wanted to express my appreciation for the Moen Roman Tub valve and trim replacement job that Ivan and Miguel and the entire team at Advanced Plumbing and Heating and Air completed for me last week.

Like most jobs it turned out to be a lot more difficult than we had planned. In order for the valve and trim to be replaced and access had to be cut through 2 inches of tile, concrete, and chicken wire not to mention having to deal with the extreme heat.

The initial appointment was fast and they had a plumber at my residence in only a couple hours. Getting the valve and trim for this tub had a couple twists and turns which resulted in having to reschedule the final installation appointment several times. This was not a problem for the scheduling staff, they were wonderful.

To help me determine the correct valve and trim for the job they put me in touch with a local expert that provided me with the information I needed.

As for the price, I thought it was a good value for the work performed. I’m not just paying them for their time but also for their expertise and they came prepared.

I felt that they cared about my situation at that time, and also their other customers I heard them talk about and that impressed me.

reviews.author: K C
reviews.text: From start to finish, it was a good experience. I had a 30 year old natural gas unit that was on its last legs. Daniel came out to inspect it and told me what I already knew was coming, I was on borrowed time. We were able to schedule Mark to come out the same day and go over new units with me. I had already known I wanted to upgrade to a heatpump system amd Mark was great at explaining the differences and patiently answering my questions. We were able to schedule the install within 3 days. Chris, Justin and another gentleman whose name I didnt get all were wonderful. They were fast, efficient and very polite. They also cleaned up and didn't leave a mess. Everything went great and I had a new unit within the week. Special shout out to Enrique who was also great at quickly answering my questions via email and helping me out as well. Thanks a bunch to the whole APHA team!

plumbers.name: Reliant Plumbing - Austin
plumbers.address: 12111 Menchaca Rd, Austin, TX 78748, USA

reviews.author: Christopher H
reviews.text: We had the need to do a whole house repiping and received multiple quotes. Alex from Reliant was here and walked the house and listened to all our requirements carefully. We wanted to switch from electric tank to gas tankless waterheater and get whole house water filter with hot back wash installed. We decided to go with Reliant due to the very professional advice and appearance. And we were not disappointed! Once the installation crew hit the ground lead by Roman everything unfolded nicely! It turned out our house was very solid built with lots of unforeseeable challenges in the walls but Roman mastered them swiftly and with great care. Also shout out to Patrick, Victor, David, Brant and Julian as supporting crew members keeping the site as clean as possible. VERY glad we decided to go with Reliant as everything turned out very nice! We have now a flight control system in the attic where I can mangage separate sections in the house which comes handy with the freeze coming in from time to time. Thanks Roman for all the brain work you put in!!!!!!

reviews.author: Montenegro Hector
reviews.text: I was most impressed with technician Alex. He was professional, friendly, and knowledgable. He immediately assessed our plumbing problem and explained what he needed to do to rectify it and the cost. We had sediment backing up into our dual bathroom sinks from the AC drainage pipe. He not only took care of the problem, he recommended what we needed to do to keep the algae from returning. He was very reassuring and we would call on Reliant again. My overall experience Reliant was very positive, efficient and informative. They answered when I called after hours and kept me informed as to when the repairman would be arriving. The best customer service overall.

reviews.author: Daina Huntington-Linkenhoger
reviews.text: Brett Williams is an incredible person to work with! He was prompt, probably spoke to me via phone & text 100+ times within a 3-4 day span (including a holiday), and was always patient & descriptive. His entire crew responded quickly & professionally- he even had his manager step in when he was unavailable one of the days. I cannot recommend Reliant Plumbing enough for folks in the Austin area. If I have one complaint it is that he would not share his venmo so I could "buy him a beer." Thank you again!

reviews.author: Caty Cope
reviews.text: I had a few things I needed a plumber for. Zach came over easily diagnosed the problem and provided a solution. He provided many options at different price points and was very efficient. Highly recommend him and the company!

reviews.author: Lisa Landry
reviews.text: Jose and Julian came out on a Saturday afternoon and were one time and provided very good service. They made sure to let me know everything that they were doing and got everything up and running. Would recommend these guys.

plumbers.name: Brian B. Quick Plumbing
plumbers.address: 10739 Tucker St Suite 100-B, Beltsville, MD 20705, USA

reviews.author: Kia Banks
reviews.text:
I ordered a new washer and dryer but couldn’t have them installed because the existing shut-off valves were corroded. Pierre came out to assess the situation and provided several options with clear pricing. He arrived on time, was professional, and extremely knowledgeable. He took the time to explain everything in detail—what he was doing, the updated plumbing codes, why larger commercial companies often charge much more, and why emergency services are usually scheduled on weekends.

By the time he left, I felt completely confident in the work and the service provided. Pierre installed new shut-off valves so the water to the entire home no longer needs to be turned off, and he properly secured the drainage pipe to the wall, including fixing issues hidden behind the drywall that hadn’t been secured by the previous homeowner.

He was also able to install both my washer and dryer, and they are running perfectly. He even followed up the next day to make sure everything was working smoothly. Sorry it took me so long to write this review—but the service was absolutely worth it.

reviews.author: Damien Begley
reviews.text: We could not be happier or more impressed with Brian B Quick and in particular their technician/plumber Jimmy Stewart. We were in a real jam on a Saturday. We called Brian B. Quick and much to our amazement they were able to provide service that day. When their technician Jimmy arrived, he gave us the news as to what needed to be done, and an estimate. He wasnt able to get to us until around 3 p.m. because he was at another job. As it turned out he had to a larger job and the thoughts were he would have to come back the following week especially because it was Labor Day weekend. But no he said I can start now. We followed him over to the home depot picked out the shower hardware with his guidance and he went to work not finishing until around 9:00. He had to work in really tight quarters to do the job and minimize later repairs.
