He was able to do it and while it would have been perfectly understandable for him to call it a day at any point and return later to finish the job; he stuck to it doing a fantastic job, demonstrating the work showing us all the details and providing follow up information should we need it. Could not be more pleased or impressed with the experience.

reviews.author: Gloria C
reviews.text: This is our second time calling on Brian B. Quick Plumbing for repairs in our home. In both instances, the service far exceeded expectations - prompt, courteous, professional, experienced, efficient. Today, Dan was the technician sent to our home to install a faucet in our backyard. Everything about the experience was exceptional. Dan quickly assessed the layout and condition of our piping, and offered several recommendations for installation. A very reasonable price estimate was provided, to which we agreed in the same visit. After a quick trip to obtain the needed supplies, Dan returned and completed the work in very short order.  Dan explained exactly what he did and the steps we should take to maintain the faucet in cold weather. We are very satisfied with the service and results we have received from Brian B. Quick Plumbing and will continue to call on them for any future needs.

reviews.author: Dina Nawas
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Dion from Brian B Quick Plumbing. His communication was excellent—he gave a 40-minute heads-up before arriving and provided clear, regular text updates throughout the job since I wasn’t onsite. He quickly diagnosed an issue with the garbage disposal, clearly walked me through my options, and was very honest—after unjamming it, he did not push an unnecessary drain cleaning. He even sent a video confirming everything was fixed. Dion also investigated a suspected leak affecting the unit below, coordinated thoughtfully with all parties, and once he confirmed the issue was isolated to the lower unit, he promptly sourced materials and completed the repair. Professional, transparent, and thorough. I highly recommend Brian B Quick Plumbing—and especially Dion.

reviews.author: Charmeda McCready
reviews.text:
This company was great. My tech Patrick came in and knocked it out in less than 30 minutes. Professional, polite, and knowledgeable. It’s hard to find qualified, trustworthy, experienced people. I’m grateful and thankful for the help.

My drain was blocked and now it works! I also appreciate not being taken advantage of as a female!

Thank you. I highly recommend this company and technician.

plumbers.name: Busy Bee Plumbing, Heating, & Air Conditioning
plumbers.address: 40 Burton Hills Blvd #200, Nashville, TN 37215, USA

reviews.author: Sierra Rodgers
reviews.text: I cannot say recommend enough! I had a pipe burst inside a wall in my house and water was flooding the floor. I called a couple of places and the earliest either one could see me was the next day in the afternoon. I called Busy Bee and immediately talked to a real person (means more than you think) and someone came out immediately! I was so shocked. The price was pretty high but the leak was inside the wall so it’s kind of understandable. My repair man was Daniel Adkins and he was phenomenal! So fast, efficient, and also very kind! You could tell he knew what he was doing. The poor guy even brought out a shovel trying to get in the crawl space to try and locate the leak. I’m not sure what he gets paid but it’s probably not enough for that! Great experience!

reviews.author: Mary M
reviews.text: Kevin came out to check on an issue with our Halo whole house water filtration system and I am very happy that he knew right away what needed to be done to correct it. He was very friendly and knowledgable. Thank you Busy Bee for your great service!

reviews.author: Raven S.
reviews.text: Brandon was very nice, helpful and knowledgeable. He took care of my home’s needs, and also informed of some structural issues with my sink that I was completely unaware of. I am glad I was referred to busy bee! I look forward to using their services again in the future!

reviews.author: Elaine Love
reviews.text: Chris was fantastic! He arrived right on time and was professional, courteous,  and clearly knowledgeable.  He quickly assessed the issue with the hot water heater which required to be replaced. He  completed the repair efficiency.  I really appreciated his expertise and the smooth experience from start to finish. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Michael Speight
reviews.text: I had a heat/air unit replacement install this week. Tyler and Dalton were complete pros with the work they did.  They were knowledgeable and answered any questions I had and provided all the details of what they were going to do during the complete course of the install.  They had a tight space to work with and did it with ease and perfection.  They made sure everything about my new unit was working as expected and made sure my duct work was good as well. Highly recommend Busy Bee and the work of these technicians.

plumbers.name: Plumber Near Me
plumbers.address: 13513 E Boundary Rd Suite C, Midlothian, VA 23112, USA

reviews.author: Ashley Rodriguez
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with Plummer Near Me for the installation of my hot water tank. Craig and Nathan were professional, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable from start to finish. They took the time to explain everything clearly, answered all of my questions, and made sure the installation was done safely and correctly. They worked efficiently, cleaned up their work area, and ensured everything was working perfectly before they left. It’s clear they take pride in their work and truly care about customer satisfaction. They also expedited the work as I had family visiting for Christmas. I highly recommend Plummer Near Me, and especially Craig and Nathan, for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Nicole Gray
reviews.text:
As the Community Director, we have always had great experiences with Plumber Near Me at Vue at Westchester Commons. From scheduling to completion, everything is always smooth and professional. The technicians always arrive on time, clearly explained the issues, and completed the repairs efficiently.

They were respectful of the apartments, worked quickly without cutting corners, and made sure everything was functioning properly before leaving. Communication was excellent throughout the process, and the pricing was fair for the quality of service provided.

Highly recommend if you’re looking for a reliable, professional plumber in the area!

reviews.author: Brian Moore
reviews.text:
Craig communicated well and arrived on time.

We walked through what was needed and he offered recommendations.

He completed the work quickly and efficiently. Recommend yearly follow-up.

Great service and very professional.

Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Hannah Witopil
reviews.text:
Had a clogged sewer pipe out in my front yard due to roots growing into it.
Jesse came out within a couple of hours and cleared the clog as well as determined the needed work to get the pipe replaced. He quoted me right away and answered all my questions patiently, all late in the evening. Even noted to forgive the camera cost ($300) if I decided to move forward with the job, because I was concerned about overall cost.
I called the next morning to schedule the job and they were able to fit me in just a few days later. The project crew (Kevin, Chris & Nathan) were nice guys, they worked fast and left the dig site looking like nothing ever happened. Even put grass seed down.
Overall very happy with everything and can only recommend.

reviews.author: Joe Bareford
reviews.text: Kevin and his crew did a fantastic job switching our home from septic over to public sewer. They completed their scope in a single day, and even put down new grass seed over my entire front yard. I would highly recommend!

plumbers.name: Hill & Company Service, Inc.
plumbers.address: 5125 NW 5th Pl, Oklahoma City, OK 73127, USA

reviews.author: L Crymes
reviews.text: We have been shopping to replace our HVAC system for six months. By far the most professional quote process came from Jeff Holloway. He took the time to inspect each service and return vents to calculate a balance load (turns out we needed an additional 12"12" return vent). Then two days later technicians Ryan & Kasem arrived to install new system. They were polite, hard working, quite efficient, and very respectful of our property. Everyone at Hill&Co were willing to fully answer and explain any questions. Also. the financing terms were quite attractive. We are more than pleased. Eric, the manager of the installation crew, came and preformed a quality assurance inspection of all facets of the work. Have never had this level of service before and are quite happy, especially for such an expensive purchase.

reviews.author: Kathi Black
reviews.text:
Two months ago we had one of our two AC units replaced by another well-known AC company in the local metro area. That experience from start to finish was not good on many levels. I would not recommend that company to anyone.

So when our second AC unit decided to break last week we decided to call Hill & Company this time. I can positively say that the full experience from Paxton coming out to find the issue, to Jeff coming out later that same day to discuss options if we decided to purchase a new unit instead of a repair, to the next day having Zeus and his team out to do the new AC install - every single interaction was professional, their employees were very knowledgeable and personable, our property was treated with respect, they showed up on time and were done exactly when they said they would be. They cleaned up after themselves. The options of which unit to buy were presented to us in an easy-to-understand way and we felt we really got a lot of value for our money.  Overall, a very good experience with everyone at Hill & Company. I would definitely recommend them to my family, friends and neighbors. Thank you Hill & Company!!!

reviews.author: SkystormChargerVortex
reviews.text:
AC compressor went out. The outside unit was 23 years old, so we decided that we just needed to buy a completely new outside unit. The inside garage closet furnace heating unit was in perfect condition, so there wasn't a need to replace it, plus we didn't have the money to replace both.

Contacted multiple heat and air companies, several came out to give me a price on a new outside unit and a second price just in case the evaporator under the furnace needed to be replaced.

One company in particular, actually gave me a set price to replace both the outside unit and the evaporator under the furnace. That company thought it would be best.

They said the actual price shown was the actual price we would pay. We decided to go with them after they waited on us for 3 weeks while we gathered the amount of money WE ALL agreed upon!

On the day we were making the appointment for them to come out to install the new outside unit/evaporator coil (if it needed it)...The price changed, it had magically jumped up a $1,000!
(Interstate Heat & Air🤬)

I immediately went looking online again.

❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️❗️
I saw Hill & Company (thinking Drabek & Hill at first.🤦‍♂️🤣) so I messaged them. Didn't think about it until after I had already hit send. I'm glad that my brain messed up like that though, because it was a SMART MESS UP!

Nick came out to diagnose. Checked everything out, even crawled up our broken later, into the poorly ventalated (I'll fix that later) heat filled attic to check our installation/vent ducts. He gave me 2 prices after he had finished up.

One for just the outside unit replacement and a second price just in case they needed to replace the evaporator. I liked the pricing, it was the lowest we had received, so I said; Let's do it!

Dalton & Zario came out to replace the outside unit. Everything was going good, they were quick and informative while working. They finished up with the outside unit, unfortunately the PXV valve was freezing up on the old evaporator (which means it's bad) so they had to go ahead and replace the evaporator by pulling out the entire furnace.

They got it out, replaced it and put everything back in.

Sorry again guys that the builders of this house made it so hard for ya'll to get it in/out of the closet.
(Way before we came here!🤣)

They vacuumed out any air/moisture from the system, charged the A/C up, cleaned everything up and within 30 minutes after turning it on, we could feel the cold, that we haven't felt for some time now.

Feels great to be back in it. I know that besides me, that the Wife, Dublin, Butterscotch, Garfield, Katniss and my cousin are all glad to have it back!🥶🥶🥶🥶

Great job boys! And thanks again to you Nick for dropping the price just a little bit more after the job was already finished!

We really appreciated that!

reviews.author: Pat
reviews.text:
Can I just say how *unimpressed* I am with my experience with the Hill & Co. group?!

I had a pair of guys come out & take a half-assed look around, then the older, chubbier journeyman sent the younger, skinnier apprentice under the house to poke around at the plumbing (he forgot his flashlight & had to be handed one).
They tried to convince me that I needed to upsize my whole gas line, "for code."
They even had me convinced & up-sold, until I asked the next 2 plumbers about it...
They were *absolutely* trying to take advantage of someone who didn't know better.

Anyway, they quoted me $9,2k for a simple Tankless Water Heater swap.

I though that was too much, so I called around. An outfit called Yarbrough & Sons sent a technician named Cole Hobson to come out & do an estimate for a Tankless Hot Water Heater swap for me, and not only did he do a *thorough* bathroom, utility closet & crawl-space inspection, he came out of the crawl space (looking like the undead 🧟‍♂️), went looking for a shovel, & then went *back* underneath the house to trench out access to allow him to get where he needed to go, to see what he needed to see! I should add that Cole & I are both bigger guys (like the Hill&Co Journeyman), & I would not have wanted to have to do what he just did. And he did it enthusiastically & professionally, all for just a free estimate! Very impressive!

Unfortunately, a guy from a "2 guys in a truck" outfit came in right behind them & immediately underbid their quote.

But I was so impressed by Cole, that I called Yarbrough & Sons, & I asked if they could match/beat the other offer?
And, guess what, they did!

So, we were pleased to get to book the project with them & are having it installed next Monday (So long as I can get my Electrician to come upgrade the power outlet box over the weekend 😅).

For the record, they beat out Hill & Co.'s (who was Angie.com's 1st recommendation) initial quoted price by >45%, coming in at just

reviews.author: Ahmad Latifzai
reviews.text:
We needed emergency services because our downstairs heat stopped working during the January storm. They were able to send Paxton quickly who was very knowledgeable and very much willing to take the time to explain how the system worked. He was able to get us up and running within an hour.
I highly recommend these guys and will definitely use them again

plumbers.name: Plumbing Outfitters
plumbers.address: 24 Co Rd 496, Taylor, TX 76574, USA

reviews.author: Ryan Coleman
reviews.text:
Spoke to Zoe to set up a water heater inspection. She was very professional, friendly and knowledgeable. Plumbing Outfitters was recommended to me by family who also had a great experience!

Techs Matt A and Zach just finished replacing our water heater...they did a thorough evaluation, provided insight and recommendations with several options. They were amazing, extremely clean and efficient. Communicated throught the process with professionalism and transparency. I would highly recommend to anyone looking for service.

reviews.author: Leela Uppuluri
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience with Plumbing Outfitters! Scott Miller came out and did an excellent job — he flushed out my water heater tank, fixed my kitchen sink faucet, and took the time to inspect all the pipelines in every bathroom during his visit. He was thorough, professional, and genuinely courteous throughout the entire appointment. It's clear he takes pride in his work. I felt confident that everything was in good hands. Highly recommend Scott and the Plumbing Outfitters team!

reviews.author: Jeniza Ketay
reviews.text: Matt was great! Rolled two toilets, provided very in-depth details on how to care for it as well as tested our water pressure and recommended options for future projects we have on our list. We will definitely call up Matt when we start out next plumbing project.

reviews.author: Joe Robinson
reviews.text: Melvin and his assistant showed up on time and was very professional. Melvin explained the water testing process in great detail. I was very satisfied with their service. They even wore shoe covering inside my house which we greatly appreciated. I will definitely be calling Plumbing outfitters again and I will be calling specifically for Melvin Haddix. He represented your company well!!!!

reviews.author: Capen Apple
reviews.text: Had an emergency leak causing water to come out of our floorboards.  Plumbing Outfitters was quick to respond. When Melvin arrived, he was quickly identified the issue after a few tests and even made a few very minor repairs to prevent further issues.  They gave us estimates for a few levels of service at a fair price.  We were able to schedule quickly for repairs and the work he did was top quality.  Never felt any pressure to upsell us or to force us to do anything that was immediate.  Will def be calling again if other plumbing issues arise.

plumbers.name: Mac-Vik Plumbing, Heating, and Electrical
plumbers.address: 13050 W 43rd Dr #100, Golden, CO 80401, USA

reviews.author: Jann Boyer
reviews.text:
I had a new water heater installed by Will. Brian did the diagnosis of old heater a month ago, and he was on target: old tank had a lot of debris, way too much to flush out. It was time to replace it.

Alex called early to advise of delay in Will’s arrival, about 40-50 minutes behind  scheduled window. Not a problem and I appreciated the early call.

Will was helped by Fernando during the heavy lifting parts. Otherwise worked efficiently on his own. He was courteous, answered my questions willingly, and cleaned up neatly. He showed me what to expect as air bubbles (from water shut-off) worked through the system. All seems in good order.

reviews.author: RushTac
reviews.text: I run a tire shop in Golden called Gills Point S. We recently had some service done on our furnace unit that was over 45 years old by Marius and Jorge. They were wonderful to deal with and they eventually got me a quote for a new furnace which we had replaced by Erin and another employee this past Wednesday. I couldn't be more thankful and I absolutely recommend this company for all your heating needs. Hopefully I won't need them any time soon, but I'll happily be a return customer. Thank you to the entire Mac-Vik team for being so easy to work with and so fast in your service call, quote write up, and even getting me in a week early to do my furnace. We appreciate all of you and I'll happily give anyone who works at Mac-Vik discounts on any tires and service you need from us in the future.

reviews.author: Megan Boone
reviews.text: Jorge was fantastic to work with. He struck the perfect balance between professional and personable, making a stressful situation much easier. He clearly knows his craft and took the time to explain the diagnosis in detail. I especially appreciated his honesty—he laid out all my options without any high-pressure sales tactics for expensive repairs.

reviews.author: Dale Becker
reviews.text: Had great service on a recent project with Nate and Erin.  Super professional in all communications, showed up on time and finished the job in a timely manner.  Solutions oriented, no upselling.  Just great service and a professional process from start to finish.  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Robert Scheinman
reviews.text: Camden came by to give me a quote. He was friendly, knowledgeable, and patient. He worked with me on the design of a home power system to get us through power outages as well as some other problems. He contributed great ideas and gently corrected my misconceptions. Perhaps most important , he freely communicated when we strayed away from his expertise. His price quote was reasonable. I’m excited to work with him on this project.

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of Greater Baltimore
plumbers.address: 3701 Commerce Dr Suite 105, Baltimore, MD 21227, USA

reviews.author: Jenny Zeigler
reviews.text: Wayne and his team were very efficient and took care of the sewer line in a morning. The stress relief of knowing it was done with little impact to the yard, surrounding areas and my life was amazing. The team were pleasant to talk to and verified all the work before leaving met expectations. Not normally an experience you would have found to be easy. Sincerely appreciated!

reviews.author: James Easley
reviews.text: Rich came out to repair my shower nozzle and did a fantastic job. He was polite, very knowledgeable, and took the time to explain exactly what the issue was and how he fixed it. The repair was quick, the price was great, and everything is working perfectly now. I really appreciated his professionalism and would definitely recommend him to anyone who needs a reliable plumber. 👍🚿🔧

reviews.author: Marcy Windsor
reviews.text: Mr Rooter was referred to me by a neighbor in 2019 and I was very pleased with their service. I had to call them this week for a mixing valve replacement.  Mr Franz gave me an appt the next day. I had the pleasure of meeting Technician Rich Bush who arrived within the 2 hour timeframe.  He was pleasant, put on shoe covers, asked about the water/heater, turned on all the faucets to test the water temp. Rich was very thorough, courteous, and knowledgeable in his skillset (he has worked for Mr Rooter for 12 years).  He took the time to clean up everything and retested the water temp and make sure everything was working before he left. I would definitely recommend this company and technician and will use them again.  The total cost was $545 with a coupon, which I think is high (everything is overpriced these days) but my problem was solved in one day without any hassles.  Thank you Mr Rooter & Rich Bush!

reviews.author: Charles Aloe
reviews.text: Absolute expediency and professionalism.  Found on Thumbtack, Mr. Rooter called me within minutes of my request for servicing a defective toilet flange.  My technician, Rich, was out here the very next morning to diagnose the issue and then the morning after that to make the repair.  Rich even took a look beyond the immediate fix to ensure there wasn't a larger issue that needed to be addressed.  All in all, I am completely satisfied and confident in his work, which comes with a one-year guarantee.  I will note that this all came with a higher than anticipated price tag, but for my situation and for the value of the service it was one that I was willing to pay.

reviews.author: Greg Baber
reviews.text: My 15 year old water heater went up on New Year's Eve. The gas control valve failed. Mr. Rooter sent a tech out on New Year's Day to give me a free estimate on a replacement water heater. I was able to get the water heater that I wanted at a reasonable price. The price included the new water heater, warranty, parts & labor, and removal/haul away of the old water heater. Mr. Rooter installed the new water heater on January 2nd and they did a fantastic job.

plumbers.name: Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air
plumbers.address: 2205 A St, Antioch, CA 94509, USA

reviews.author: Kristina Pfeifer
reviews.text: Wow if I could give over 5 stars I would. Tyler and his crew came within 45 min of me booking the appointment. They fixed our clogged drain and put in our new sink within a day. AND VERY reasonably priced. They are absolute problem solvers. If we ever have any sink installations or clogged drains in the future, I will always pick Tyler and his crew over anyone else. Thank you!!!

reviews.author: Charles Francis
reviews.text: When are water heater died unexpectedly we called and John came out the very same day to assess the situation. He was thorough knowledgeable and genuinely one of the nicest professionals I've ever met. He provided a clear quote and promised the new unit will be installed by 12:00 p.m. the next day - and he absolutely delivered. John's crew arrived installed the new water heater and fully tested everything before leaving. They were courteous professional and clearly knew exactly what they were doing. From start to finish this was a seamless stress-free experience. Outstanding service excellent communication in true professionalism. This is an easy five star. Highly recommend it

reviews.author: Daniel Lam
reviews.text: ERIC JONES was a legend! The man did a wonderful job unclogging my old filthy shower drain. He was on time, fast, professional, experienced, organized, wore shoe booties. I highly recommend hiring him to do the work! Thank you!

reviews.author: Armi Vega
reviews.text:
Awesome Service!

My kitchen sink was totally clogged, and Regie took care of it fast. He explained what was going on, and got everything draining perfectly again. Super friendly, great price, and excellent work. Definitely recommend  Rooter Heroe Plumbing & Air!

Thank you, Regie!!

reviews.author: Kate Wentworth
reviews.text: Bryan was fantastic. He fixed our plumbing problem in no time, and taught us how to see what was wrong for the future. He was knowledgeable, patient, funny, and even our dog liked him! It was super easy and fast to set up an appointment. Communication was clear and we appreciated the tracking app. Thank you!

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of Greenville
plumbers.address: 1341 Rutherford Rd, Greenville, SC 29609, USA

reviews.author: Cecelia Danthine
reviews.text: We had an issue with our pipes backing up on a Sunday, and Dallas from Mr. Rooter came out quickly to help us. He was able to find and clear the clog fast and efficiently, which was such a relief. Dallas was very friendly, professional, and easy to work with. We are so appreciative of his prompt service and highly recommend him to anyone in need of a reliable plumber!

reviews.author: Pierce Thomason
reviews.text:
This is the first time I've used Mr.Rooter. From the first conversation on the phone with them until my technician Josh Powell left my home. They were all quick and efficient in the whole process. Our water heater’s pilot light went out (a Rheem which decided not to relight being 5 months out of warranty). They sent Josh right out promptly to get me a quote and assess what they could do for me. He was very knowledgeable and worked very efficiently. I really appreciate the work Josh did and the quick response time from Mr.Rooter to get him out here as soon as possible to put my mind at ease. I will definitely be recommending this company and Josh to anyone I know that needs plumbing repairs done. Also, other companies I contacted prior charged insane dispatch fees ($150+) just to come out!

Mr. Rooter has my total endorsement

reviews.author: The Future is Bright
reviews.text:
My service tech, Dallas, just left -- less than an hour after I called to report a broken waterline that feeds to the outside faucet! I cannot say enough for this service experience, or Mr. Rooter Plumbing. They came through quickly, did a great job (it's not leaking anymore!) and the bill was modest. Excellent experience -- they earned five stars and more, if I could.
Addendum: About a week after Dallas fixed the first leak, a second one occurred, and Dallas returned. This time, he had to go under the house and spent a total of about two hours here, and yet the bill was still modest, and only a couple of dollars off the first one. Even though the second leak was not a reflection of his initial work, Dallas even offered one solution at no cost to me. I opted for a different solution, and he did great work, again. Fast, professional and reasonable all describe Dallas and Mr. Rooter.

reviews.author: Brishelle Miller
reviews.text: After a burst pipe caused by the snowstorm, Mr. Rooter responded quickly and helped restore our water right away. Dallas was fantastic. He clearly explained the problems, answered all of our questions, and was extremely helpful throughout the entire process. He even detected additional issues we weren’t aware of and was able to fix everything the same day. We have been using Mr. Rooter for years, and they are always timely, professional, and helpful. It gave us a lot of peace of mind knowing everything was properly taken care of. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Cameron Ranslow
reviews.text: My roommate and I experienced a busted water pipe following the two rounds of winter weather received by the Upstate. We discovered the leak on Sunday and Mr. Rooter was able to send their amazing technician, Matt, the very next morning. Matt was incredibly attentive, kind, focused and knowledgeable throughout the entire repair process. After discovering the issue, Matt was able to fully reorganize the piping system, provide a better-insulated pipe, and provide more insulation surrounding the pipe all within the day. We highly recommend Mr. Rooter, and specifically Matt, to assist you with all your plumbing needs paired with exceptional customer service.

plumbers.name: Intelligent Service: Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 709 N Main St, Mt Prospect, IL 60056, USA

reviews.author: Seana McPherson
reviews.text: Intelligent Service was great! We ended up needing extensive work done and they made it as easy on us as possible. Their communication was top notch with us AND on our behalf with the insurance company.

reviews.author: Eric Pelz
reviews.text:
We had our hot water heater go out.  We picked Intelligent because they had working hours on the weekends and didn’t charge extra for weekend hours.   Trevor came out to look at the issue with the hot water heater.   I personally thought it was the Thermopile, so I ran to hardware store replaced and issue still existed.   Trevor diagnosed it with a bad gas valve and said he can replace the heater part for $850 or he’d recommend a brand new water heater.  He said if he replaces the part, he will most likely need a brand new water heater anyway in the next few months to at least a year.   He then went on to look at the boiler, which was about 40 years old. Now keep in mind this boiler does work, and I was not planning to have any service on it whatsoever.  Over the years when I’ve had the maintenance guys over to look at the boiler all companies would not even touch it scared that they were going to break it even more and then have to owe me a brand new boiler.  He then went on to say he could give us a deal. We can kind of throw in a hot water heater. If you get a new boiler, we can install it this week.  So we thought about it a little bit more and we wanted to go ahead and do it because not only the savings but what if the boiler went out in the middle of winner then we’re going to pay extra charges for the winner cause they’re gonna be busy and it’s probably Probably gonna be more expensive.

So we went on to replace the boiler and the hot water heater hot water heater heater was replaced that day which was perfect. It took about an hour and a half.  He then said someone from Intelligent would call me to set up the install of the new boiler.  Two guys came out to install the new boiler and they brought another guy Neal who helped me I’ll walk through the process of what’s gonna happen and what they’re gonna install what they’re going to leave in place Place and not touched due to the fact that I made damage didn’t even more. Install took about 78 hours they did not have to come back the next day except to change out the thermostat just because that was kind of them. We had a small issue with the damper, but luckily they replaced that within the next day or two and now going on 24 hours to 48 without any issues.

Overall, I was very happy with their service very happy with their service service man. They were very polite and they explained what they were doing. They were in and out. They kept the place clean so I was very Happy with them overall.

reviews.author: Andy Lenczow
reviews.text: We had a broken pipe under our basement floor. Technicians arrived on Monday morning, thoroughly diagnosed the issues and provided a detailed estimate. On Thursday,  only three days later, the technicians arrived on time and, by the end of the day, the problem was fixed.Throughout that day they kept me informed, both warning me of potential problems (it's an old house) and calming me with their breadth of experience and professionalism. My wife and I are extremely satisfied with Intelligent Service.

reviews.author: Dion Lione
reviews.text:
I would like to give a top rating for the excellent work done by Intelligent Service. Jason deserves special recognition for outstanding leadership, great team coordination, and smooth communication throughout the entire process. Everything was well organized and handled efficiently.
Also, I want to personally commend Trevor for a job very well done — professional, reliable, and detail-oriented. Overall, a fantastic experience with a great team. Highly recommended 👌 💫💫💫💫💫

reviews.author: O OMAN
reviews.text: We've been using Intelligent for years, and they always do a great job!  Fast service, friendly & knowledgeable technicians, highly qualified, and outstanding communication.  When our heater went out today, they were out the same day.    Can't recommend them highly enough!

plumbers.name: 1-Tom-Plumber
plumbers.address: 8003 Vine Crest Ave Suite 12, Louisville, KY 40222, USA

reviews.author: Jeff Toy
reviews.text: Daelyn came by today to replace a 20-year-old toilet that was well past its prime. He was a pleasure to work with. He gave me several options to save money. I bought my own toilet and he had it installed in no time. Left the workspace very clean, which I really appreciated. I'll be calling these guys again in the future when I need serious work done.

reviews.author: Julie Ann James
reviews.text: It seems like since Covid it has been really hard to find quality customer service and I should know, I worked in the industry 20+ years. From the time I booked my appointment it was a great experience. Dylan was right on time, knew exactly what to do and got right to it. At no point did I feel like I was getting the runaround, as I was with a previous plumber I had hired and quickly fired. He went above and beyond, as did Luis who showed up to give a hand. I would highly recommend them to anyone and will be using them for several projects coming up this Spring. Thanks Dylan! 10 stars!

reviews.author: Mackenzie Miller
reviews.text:
What we thought would be a quick do-it-yourself fix turned out to be a major plumbing issue, and 1-Tom-Plumber Louisville was our first call—and the best decision we could have made. The owners, Mike and Lesley, are incredibly kind and honest, which immediately put us at ease.

The team that came out to our home over two days to resolve the issue was outstanding. Daelyn Shirley and Marvin Brown were respectful, professional, and worked tirelessly to ensure everything was fully and correctly resolved. They were proactive, showed up right on time, communicated clearly throughout the process, and the pricing was more than fair.

If you need plumbing work done for your home or business, this is the team you want. I truly couldn’t have asked for a better experience.

reviews.author: Jason McCartin
reviews.text: We had a great a experience with Daelyn and Nick.  Our downstairs neighbor had a leak that turned out to be coming from our unit.  D & N were very understanding and offered up several solutions.  The easy solution, a new wax ring, turned out to be the answer.

reviews.author: Rachelle Sharar
reviews.text:
Dwight and Daelyn solved a year long issue with our lines backing up and spewing sewage out of my shower! I've have multiple plumbers and septic companies come and look and thank God we finally have a solution. It was fixed within 24 hours of our first visit.

Scheduling was easy, they were punctual and they communicated with us for every step. Thank you so much guys!

plumbers.name: Integrated Plumbing Solutions
plumbers.address: 3111 Moon Station Rd Ste B, Kennesaw, GA 30144, USA

reviews.author: Josh Leebow
reviews.text:
Top notch service! Matt and his team including but not limited to DJ, Laura, Todd, and Joe.
You will not be ripped off, scammed, or taken to the bank. I’ve used Matt multiple times to fix other plumbers expensive, mess. Don’t think twice.

reviews.author: Jeff Le Blanc
reviews.text: Cobert was super friendly and explained what   Process and expectations with water and gas cutoff times.  He did great work! It was pricy but in line with other quotes we received.  We used Integrated plumber before with adding a gas line 5 years ago and the did a great job with that.

reviews.author: Carson Smith
reviews.text: Matt and his team with integrated plumbing are awesome! They helped me figure out my problems with my sewer main line and gave me great recommendations of what I need to do to fix it. They are extremely knowledgeable and have all the tools to handle any project. I would highly recommend them to anyone. I will be using them for all my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Richard Graham
reviews.text: Douglas was very professional. He came to provide a quote to replace my leaky hot water heater on a Friday afternoon, and was able to finish the job same day. He explained everything he was doing, ran his pipes perfectly vertical, labeled the valves, offset the tank in the pan so my moisture alarm unit would fit, and left the area clean. I liked that he wore slip-on booties over his boots and even put some on the wheels of the cart to protect my carpet. I also liked that this is a local company.

reviews.author: Christine Cheung
reviews.text: Douglas Dominguez from Integrated Plumbing Solutions is simply excellent. What a great problem solver! He arrived on time, carefully inspected all the areas, prepared 2 solutions for my budget, answered all my questions, and promptly fixed a leak in my bathroom. Throughout his work, he was professional, helpful, and friendly. Most importantly, he paid close attention to details, such as listening to all my concerns, wearing shoe covers, double checking to see if there's any leak, and properly cleaning after the job was done. He was great in explaining technical stuff in simple language, and always thinking a few steps ahead to ensure the process could run smoothly. So glad he worked on this job. Thanks Douglas!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 110 Lithia Pinecrest Rd ste i, Brandon, FL 33511, USA

reviews.author: Lyann Noe
reviews.text: I called a couple other places to get pricing,  and when I called Roto- Rooter, they said their estimate is free.  I said send him out.  He was here within 20 minutes.  Raif was so professional and polite.  He spoke to us and we told him to get started.  A couple hours later, everything was fixed and working better than before.  Thank you so much Raif for coming and and fixing out plumbing issue.  And thank you for being you!  Professional, polite, very nice guy.

reviews.author: Sean M
reviews.text: Went with Roto Rooter to deal with a clogged line. They were great at communication involving a time frame. Scott Bowers was the plumber and he is very personable and explained everything in detail. Explained the process and possible causes for the issue. Was able to get the line unclogged rather quickly. Determined the issue. He then had his camera guy Sammy Watkins come to look at the lines and find the clean out so that in the future it will be easier for us. Scott made sure to clean up the area and make it look better than it looked before his arrival. Will definitely use them again and ask for Scott for my next job.

reviews.author: Joanna Gibas
reviews.text: I scheduled an appointment with Roto-Rooter today and they came in right away. I had a great experience with Scott Bowers. He was explaining everything to me in detail and he definitely found the issue right away. :)  I’m very happy with the service and would definitely recommend him to anyone looking for a knowledgeable and reliable plumber.

reviews.author: Pamela Murray
reviews.text: We were staying at my parents house while they were out of town and 2 of the 3 toilets wouldn't flush. My dad called this company and they sent someone out within 2 hours. Scott arrived earlier than estimated which was great! And was absolutely incredible and informative as to what was going on. He called in his cameraman, Sammy, and they found the cause of the problem and snaked all the lines. They had everything working in no time. Very professional and polite. We highly recommend Scott and his team!

reviews.author: Tim Lucas
reviews.text:
The Service Technician that came to my house: Scott B. was absolutely top of the line. He was approachable, nice, and straight to the point. You could tell he actually cared about my home and the issues my family was experiencing. He was quick! And found my issue immediately! This company, and this Service tech- is who you want working on your most prized possession, Your Home. I 1000% recommend them, and they Will Be the only plumbers touching my homes from here on out. Thank you Scott B. for caring so much.

*Roto-Rooter- give this man a Raise! You can afford to lose this level of experience and customer service.

plumbers.name: Metro Flow Plumbing - Dallas Emergency Plumbers
plumbers.address: 3730 Dilido Rd #422, Dallas, TX 75228, USA

reviews.author: Bob Brock
reviews.text: Absolutely the friendliest and most accommodating technicians   I've encountered in a very long time. I wanted to know which of my options made the most sense, ballpark pricing, and potential timelines. Normally this would be like pulling teeth to get a straight answer, but Michael Murphy not only went over my chosen options but presented me with several more, along with not just ballpark prices but a guaranteed set price for each, and suggestions on when I could get the work scheduled and completed.  Both Michael and Javier were courteous, clean and professional, and the exploratory work they did was super clean and with as little intrusion into the structure as necessary to ascertain the scope of the problem. When they left I had the peace of mind knowing that the work was scheduled, when it was scheduled to be completed, the details what the work would  involve and what I was paying for it. This is the kind of company I like to do business with.

reviews.author: Liz Griffith
reviews.text: Had an issue with the hot water going to my washer after the recent hot water repairs by Metro.  Called and talked to Bree and she was able to get Luis out to check the problem within 30 minutes.  Luis was knowledgeable and friendly and found the problem quickly and resolved it easily.

reviews.author: Meera Menon
reviews.text: Michelle was very good at his job. I had asked Metro Pumbing to put in a R.O water Filteration disinter my sink. Michelle arranged the right counter top guy to come a drill the hole through the marble counter top. He was very patient. He took extra care to call and ask a specialist regarding a question I had about my main Water Filteration. He was through and did a great job. Overall I liked the way Metro Pumbing took care of this job. Even the dispatch staff was always courteous. Most importantly I feel they listened to me and did the job wonderfully well.

reviews.author: J.J. Leonard
reviews.text: Michael was great and very professional. The night before he came out to do the work, New Year’s Eve, he stayed on the phone with me to explain the situation and FaceTime some, even though he did not have to. Came as scheduled on New Year’s Day and was communicative the whole way through the process. Was not a cheap job, but The workmanship and professionalism were top-notch.

reviews.author: Logan C
reviews.text:
Edit: company called to offer a partial refund for the high cost of the service bringing it close to $530 from $725 , still expensive for a simple kitchen drain clog but it's appreciated to have a company followup on their work and customer concerns.

Luis Maldonado did a great job with his service and was friendly. But we got charged $725 including dispatch fee for a simple clean out of a slow flowing kitchen sink which as far as I can tell from research is at least twice the price of what it should be. I'd love to give 5 stars because as I said Luis did a good job but these plumbers are way too expensive.

It seriously feels like we got car shop ripped off.

Edit: apparantly it took 15 minutes to do. We totally got scammed. So. Cautionary tale for anyone planning on using this company AND he apparantly tried selling us those BioOne drain cleaner bottles for $100 each when you can find them online for $30 to $50 each.... While I appreciate Luis's work and he was overall friendly, Its the only reason it's not one star and I'll never use this company again unless they correct this

plumbers.name: Capps Plumbing & Sewer Inc.
plumbers.address: 160 W Hintz Rd, Wheeling, IL 60090, USA

reviews.author: Peggy Schwebke
reviews.text:
My shower has been making some weird noises recently and, with the cold weather, I was concerned that my pipe might be freezing.  I called Capps yesterday afternoon and was able to get someone out this morning, including them accommodating my request that my time slot not be too early.  I received a call from the office, notifying me when Tim was on his way.  Tim was very polite and put covers over his boots as soon as he walked in the door.  I described the issue and he checked a couple things.  He explained that my pipes weren't freezing and how to know if they were.  He then explained a couple things that could be causing the noise, checked those, and did some work to correct that.  He was very patient, explained everything well, and asked if I had any questions.  He asked at every step if it was okay to proceed and explained what the options and cost would be.  He left the area clean and I received my receipt immediately via email.

I have had Capps do all but one of the plumbing and sewer jobs in the over 20 years I've owned my house, have been very pleased with their work, and truly regret the one time I tried a different company.  Capps is very customer-service oriented.  Gianna in the office helped me with a few different things this week and has been very nice and addressed everything quickly.  I highly recommend Capps for quality work.  (Note:  My bill was lower because I have a service agreement with Capps.)

reviews.author: Christina Spanos
reviews.text: The two technicians that came to my home today, Hernan and Ruben, were not only fast, efficient and friendly, but they were also extremely polite and respectful.  They explained everything to us so we could understand what they were doing and what was going on and answered all of our questions. There is more plumbing work that needs to be done at our home and I will definitely  have Capps do the work for us. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Robert Gemkow
reviews.text: Capps did an outstanding job. Jose and Eddie cleared a heavily clogged 2” kitchen line and took the time to ensure it was completely clean before they wrapped up. The camera inspection confirmed the quality of their work. I plan to use Capps for future plumbing needs, including a preventative main sewer line cleaning. Their pricing is competitive, they’re honest, and the workmanship is excellent.

reviews.author: Mike Bilton
reviews.text: Danny and Jose did an amazing job working on my main sewer line. A previous company was unable to get it cleared and they put in the time and effort to get it done. Very straightforward without any unnecessary services. I will definitely be using them again for future needs.

reviews.author: Sue Plath
reviews.text: Very good experience getting quote and scheduling purchase and installation of a new toilet. Responsiveness and professionalism of Capp’s staff are just two reasons we only use them for all of our plumbing needs. Never have any issues with the work done by their technicians. Highly recommend!

plumbers.name: Beyond Wow Plumbing & Drains
plumbers.address: 421 Talbot St, Taylor, TX 76574, USA

reviews.author: Jake Green
reviews.text: Talmage located and repaired the leak in a pipe outdoors quickly and professionaly. His price was very reasonable and he did the work with no problems.  Talmage and Beyond Wow will now be our choice for ALL our future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Ramon Uson
reviews.text: Beyond Wow Plumbing is exactly what they are. I had a major leak at my meter and Sean and Micah came out to repair it.  They were super prompt and called and came out early this morning.  They called and updated me with what had to be done. Sean was a super great rep for Beyond Wow. He was forthright and caring about my current situation.  They had it all repaired in just a couple of hours. This is the best experience I've ever had with a plumber. I definitely recommend Beyond Wow and will surely use them again. Thanks a million!!!

reviews.author: Marie Pavlovsky
reviews.text:
August 27, 2025
Our service provider, Jason Radford arrived promptly and was very professional and friendly. He provided the camera test to find out if any other blockages existed. Before he began to work, He explained everything thoroughly. Several times he asked if we had any questions or concerns. Jason had us watch as he used the camera in the pipes. This allowed Jason to give us real-time feedback and allow questions from us. Being able to watch the camera footage during the test was very informative, educational and invaluable. Jason's camera test found some issues with our pipes, so we have scheduled a static test. Great job, Jason!

August 26, 2025
Our service provider, Andrew Coyle arrived promptly and was very professional and friendly. We needed to have our kitchen sink drain cleaned out. Before he began to work, He explained everything thoroughly. Several times he asked if we had any questions or concerns. As a follow-up, he scheduled to have coworker, Jason Radford come the next day to do a camera test, to make sure that there are no other blockages. We asked for additional services that were not in the original request, to replace 3 outside faucets. He gladly agreed to our request and he had all the equipment needed in his vehicle. Great job, Andrew!

S&D Plumbing is a very professional group of folks that I'd recommend to anyone for their plumbing needs.

reviews.text:

S&D Plumbing is a company, I will use again for my plumbing needs.

reviews.author: jennifer metzger
reviews.text: Everyday Plumber is the best!  When we noticed a leak in our hot water heater we thought we would be in for a long wait for someone to get out.  We called in the morning and were told someone would be able to get there at 2:00!  "Ryan" showed up on time and we couldn't have asked for anyone better!  Ryan was very professional, knowledgeable, helpful and perhaps one of the nicest people we have met.  He was very thorough and explained everything to us in detail.  He was able to replace our hot water heater in less than a few hours and we had hot water almost immediately!  He left the area cleaner than when he arrived which we were very thankful for (we had just painted the walls and door the previous day).  He even cleaned out the area with a wet/dry vac before he installed the new one!  Again, one of the kindest, efficient and professional plumbers we have dealt with and will definitely be referring them to everyone in our neighborhood.  Thank you again for everything!

reviews.author: Andrew C. Tsunis
reviews.text: I have dealt with many plumbing companies over the years and nobody beats Everyday Plumber.  These guys know what they are doing and are super professional.  I have several homes and have referred them to several friends and everybody raves about them.  They are super polite, super knowledgeable, and very courteous and professional.  I have to give a shout out to these outstanding technicians: Dylan, Evan, Chase and Camaren and Aaron.  Every single one of these technicians knew exactly what they were doing, and worked very diligently with care and caution to my property and at the end of every job they always cleaned up after themselves-  I can’t say enough good things about this company and I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Richelle Brown
reviews.text:
I had a small leak in my outdoor sprinkler system and called everyday plumber for a non-emergency repair. They were able to get someone out the next day, which I really appreciated. Ryan provided a two- hour arrival window and called to let me know he was on his way. He quickly assed the issue and gave me three repair options, clearly explaining the pros and cons of each solution so I could make an informed decision. Ryan was friendly, professional, and efficient. He also went above and beyond noticing an error light on my water softener, helping me address that, and even testing my water purifier while he was there.
Great service, great communication, and a very positive experience overall. I would recommend Ryan and Everyday Plumber.

reviews.author: brandi karr
reviews.text: My hot water heater went on the fritz and started leaking water everywhere. Everyday plumber got plumber James Curry out to me as soon as they could. James was extremely knowledgeable, professional and kind. He got me a new hot water heater installed with new piping same day and also removed and discarded the damaged ceiling above the hot water heater for me. Would recommend this company and James

reviews.author: John Ferlita

reviews.author: Danae Kozelsky
reviews.text: I called the office at 7:30am with no hot water. They answered and Mickey came to assess my heater by 10am. It was 27 years old Hot water heater from 1998 😳 It was time. He was very professional and  helpful. He gave me the quote, I paid 50% and then Scott and Dave came later  and installed it in the afternoon. They worked hard since it was an attic unit. The new unit got a dent but should not effect it’s functions. I was glad Benjamin Franklin plumbing were prompt and professional.

reviews.author: Roberto Sanchez
reviews.text: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing is the best I’ve used in Austin over the 25 years I’ve owned a home here. I’ve used them several times now and they are courteous, communicative, punctual and do the job correctly at a fair price. Recently, Timothy was fantastic. He diagnosed a complex issue, explained it and made recommendations providing options, then promptly made the repair. Would use again and again.

reviews.author: Justin Denman
reviews.text: We were in a tight situation and needed a plumbing repair on the same day. Fred was exemplary at understanding my need and working to secure me a same day appointment. My plumber, David G, completely exceeded my expectations. His communication, his patience with explaining what is needed and his quick thinking at answering the endless, “Yeah, but what if -”. Although the repair couldn’t be fixed the same day, they are going to be able to fix it the following day after securing a hard-to-find part. I called them at 10:00 am this morning and it’s 3:22 pm and my problem will be rectified fully by tomorrow. I’m an extremely happy customer.

reviews.author: Elena McGinnis
reviews.text: Gimmicks, 4+ hours of work, problem not resolved, plumber consistently correcting my words (snake a drain vs. cable a drain). Charged me extra for 2" drain pipe in an old home.  Offered to rip through walls for another $3K plus a membership to their club for $500 which gives you access to more discounts.  Another plumber came a few days later to give another estimate and fixed the clogged drain within 10  minutes.  This is a slick big franchise company who bought an older Austin business.  I called to give them this feedback that someone else was able to fix the problem and the manager never called me back. Do not recommend.

reviews.author: W Z
reviews.text:
This company seems much more focused on making money than meeting customer needs. I contacted them to have a licensed plumber check the gas connections for my water heater and HVAC, just to confirm there were no leaks. I didn’t suspect a leak, but wanted professional verification.

When scheduling the appointment, I clearly explained my request. However, they refused to provide a quote for the gas leak check. Instead, they said there would be a minimum $99 fee, and that the actual cost couldn’t be determined until the technician assessed the situation onsite. OK, fine.

When the plumber arrived, I again explained that I was looking for a simple gas leak check and verification. After a quick 10-minute look at the appliances, he told me the only test he can offer is a pressure test — priced at $1,000. I was shocked. There are many standard, less expensive methods for detecting gas leaks (e.g., visual inspection, soapy water test, electronic gas detectors, gas sniffers), yet they only offered the most expensive option.

I asked how long the pressure test would take and was told less than an hour. So essentially, I paid $99 just to get a quote for a $1,000 test that involves no repairs — just using their tools and a plumber's time for an hour. That’s effectively $1,000/hour.

Later, I contacted another plumbing company. Their pricing was less than half of Benjamin Franklin’s, and their service included more comprehensive checks and other items.

Given this horrible experience, I will not be using Benjamin Franklin Plumbing again.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[Comment after reading “Response from the owner”]

The owner’s response only reinforces my original impression — that this company prioritizes making money over addressing customer needs. They seem to exaggerate every situation to justify selling more expensive services.

In my case, I simply wanted a basic gas leak check and verification, with no known issues or suspected leaks. Yet, they offered only one option — a $1,000 pressure test — while dismissing other standard and legitimate methods used across the industry. Their reasoning was, “$1000 would be a small price to pay if it prevented a fire or worse yet the loss of someone’s life.”

If that logic applies to everything, then perhaps they should set a $1,000 minimum for all services. For example, if a customer only needs to install a gas shutoff valve, they could insist on a $1,000 pressure test, because, “$1000 would be a small price to pay if it prevented a fire or worse yet the loss of someone’s life." Or if someone wants to install a water shutoff valve, they might recommend a $1,000 water pressure test — since, by their reasoning, “it could prevent water damage that costs tens of thousands to repair.”

This kind of approach doesn’t demonstrate care for customer safety — it shows a business model focused on upselling and inflating costs under the guise of safety.

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of The Oakland-Berkeley Area
plumbers.address: 50 Hegenberger Loop, Oakland, CA 94621, USA

reviews.author: Manuel Rivas
reviews.text: Alfredo arrived promptly as scheduled.  He was polite, professional, and efficient.  He cleaned up the job site before leaving and tested the plumbing.  The work comprised of opening the wall and cutting a drain pipe to lower it to proper code and installing new plumbing below the kitchen sink.

reviews.author: Jessica Kim
reviews.text:
Had a very smooth and positive first experience with Mr Rooter, especially with our technician Alfredo!

I called to make an appointment and they had one available the next morning. I received a text 30mins before the appointment to let us know Alfredo was the assigned technician and on his way. He was punctual to the appointment, and after walking him through the issues, he explained the job that needed to be done clearly. The quote and details were pulled up upfront on the iPad, with flat rate pricing that also listed the components that would be replaced.

Alfredo himself was very courteous, knowledgeable, and very helpful. He guided us through the whole process with clear explanations of what he was doing. Besides fixing the immediate problem, he also took some steps to diagnose multiple other possible root causes of the issue. I very much appreciated that he didn't put any pressure or push with going for a larger or broader jobs. When I also shared about some auxiliary concerns, he went above and beyond to provide additional recommendations and information. I was very grateful that he was our assigned technician - thank you!

Mr Rooter came highly recommended by a neighbor - so while I didn't do much as much research on how it compares - I would go with them again in the future again given how positive this experience was.

reviews.author: Kiyomi Yim
reviews.text: Arrived home to a pool of water all over the kitchen floor.  Found we'd sprung a leak in a line under the kitchen sink past the shut off valve. He confirmed we'd shut off the water correctly, inspected under the house, explained everything he was doing, and then offered multiple levels of solutions to choose from.  I wasn't in a state of mind to make a big decision and so he offered to come back the next day.  He returned promptly the next day and did the work in a few hours.  There was never any pressure to do more than what we were comfortable with; we'll definitely be calling Mr Rooter and Alex when we're ready to do more work! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Laura Jevitt
reviews.text: I was able to get an appointment right away. Keith and Logan showed up right on time, both very friendly and got right to work. Very knowledgeable and explained/showed me what the problem was and how they fixed it. I thought the price was very reasonable for both jobs, too. Highly, highly recommend and I will definitely use Scott Plumbing in the future!

reviews.author: Scott Lahoda
reviews.text: Called Scott at 11am, had a tech to me by 2, and new hot water heater installed by 5. Absolutely incredible and for a fair price. Best thing was the tech. Smart and a great guy. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Carolyn Figueroa
reviews.text: Brandon came out to my house promptly and was professional and knowledgeable. We made a plan to fix my hose and will be out next week to repair it due to my needing to wait for payday. He was willing to repair it right then, however if I hadn’t needed to wait. The price seemed reasonable-it’s not an easy fix.

plumbers.name: AAA AUGER Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 2437 E Union Bower Rd, Irving, TX 75061, USA

reviews.author: Terri Borrego
reviews.text:
i called AAA Auger, and explained to the gentleman in the office that I had 2 other plumbers come and I could give pictures and a smoke test video. He said they would take the information I had and do a visual and give me a free inspection and give me an estimate. The guy came out, told me it would be $437 for his visual, he would dig around under the house a little and look everything over really good. I was already in my feeling with my sewer pipes issues , so not really thinking it through, I allowed the inspection. In hind sights I should have sent him back, because I was mislead.
I’m glad I didn’t use them, What else would they have mislead me on.,….
AAA Augers guy pretty much found the same issue the other plumbers found. But AAA Auger quoted me an extremely higher price!!
I decide to call one more company, with years of experience, who actually honored their free estimate. They were in the same price range as the first 2 Companies.
I did Not trust AAA Auger, so I did not use them…

reviews.author: Mike C
reviews.text: AAA Auger has been our go-to plumbing company for many years and we are still high on their responsiveness and quality service. They are fair and knowledgeable and do the work right. It takes several good experiences to gain this level of trust. We're lucky to have them available. Today's service by Tim McGrady was fantastic, easing our concerns about an outside spigot and cutoff valve that had broken. With the impending winter weather and hard freeze, we were very concerned but AAA Auger and Tim put us at ease. It took a morning online request, a call just a few minutes later and Tim was on his way. By early afternoon, it was all done. Thanks Tim and AAA Auger!

reviews.author: Jared Perry
reviews.text:
AAA Auger has been awesome to work with. We bought a home that had been flipped before the previous owner, and there have been issues galore. Having used other plumbers in the area, they often didn't catch the issues or weren't able to make a full repair.

AAA Auger has been out to our house probably 5 or 6 times now, and each time they've done excellent work in a timely manner for a good price. They show loyalty to their customers, and when our pipe broke the first day during this past freeze, they did everything they could to get someone out to us as soon as possible.

reviews.author: Kris Cook
reviews.text: Wow! AAA Auger is so professional. They sent Ramiro who was very thorough and informative. Our issue was a toilet not flushing. Additionally , the toilet was rocking and needed to be seated. He solved both problems quickly and efficiently. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Marisa Trevino
reviews.text: Highly recommend AAA Auger for plumbing needs - these guys are awesome! I used them today for toilet change out and TIM did an outstanding job - professional, efficient and thorough. He left restroom looking good as new and even took time to review and discuss some additional plumbing concerns I had.  The work was completed with care and integrity, and Tim honored his original quote, so there were no surprises or hidden fees. I had compared prices beforehand, and another company quoted significantly more. I’m very glad I chose Tim/AAA Auger.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 333 W 2230 N Ste 320, Provo, UT 84604, USA

reviews.author: Daniel Walker
reviews.text: Matthew was great.  I was under the impression I’d have to replace my disposal. He was very professional and did a great jo.  Thank you so much.

reviews.author: Eric Smith
reviews.text: We had a leak in our water main and noticed wet carpet. The service team came out, identified the problem and resolved it quickly. They were professional and the customer service was incredible!  Matthew worked well past the end of his normal shift to make sure we were taken care of. I would recommend them to anyone!

reviews.author: Mason Mathis
reviews.text: I called several plumbing companies, and Quick Quality Plumbing was the only one able to get someone out immediately. Jaren arrived promptly and was fantastic from start to finish. His communication was on point—he walked me through the entire process and kept me updated every step of the way. The quality of his work was exceptional, and he made everything easy to understand. I would highly recommend Quick Quality Plumbing to anyone looking for a reliable plumber and will definitely be using them again in the future.

reviews.author: Sierra Wilcox
reviews.text: Our service from Roto Rooter was absolutely amazing! Our toilet broke after hours, and they were quick to respond and temporarily fix our issue, and then come back a week later to install a new toilet. Our plumber, Matthew, was absolutely wonderful and did an amazing, clean job!

reviews.author: JaNae Pyle
reviews.text: We were very thankful that Roto Rooter came to help us with our water pipe leak. Both Matt and Roy took great care of us and stayed until the issue was fixed. Again, very much appreciated!! 💕

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 4641 Montgomery Ave Ste 518, Bethesda, MD 20814, USA

reviews.author: Benito Gomez
reviews.text:
Hosea was the plumber that replaced my water heater. He was really professional, transparent and honest about the work that needed to be done.
He was really generous with the pricing of the service that he performed and communicated everything with me clearly. Hosea definitely went above and beyond with his service in a timely manner.
Excellent service that far surpassed my expectations Roto Rooter plumbing will be my go-to shop now going forward for all my plumbing needs.Thank you for your expertise and service Hosea and Roto Rooter🔧 😁

reviews.author: Gene McCloskey
reviews.text: They were very quick to respond and assess the situation.  When a part needed to be special ordered Eric was very communicative and explained why and what costs would be involved.  The work was done quickly and done well.  I will definitely insist on having Eric do future work on my house.

reviews.author: Tam Nonea
reviews.text: Roto-Rooter was able to assist in a timely manner with an unfortunate plumbing issue I had as a new homeowner. The folks that helped resolve the issue(s) are very informative and weren’t pressuring to make a quick decision/sale. I was always informed of what was happening prior to and no actions were done without my agreeance. Special shout out to Raven, she did her thang replacing a cracked drainage pipe that was nearly 7ft long!!

reviews.author: Tim Furbee
reviews.text: Thank you to Roto-Rooter and their plumber Raven. They were fast, polite and got completed the replacement of our main water shutoff did valve in a total of 4 hours. That include the initial call, dispatching a tech and completing the job. 5/5 will recommend in the future. Raven was also a 5/5 I will for sure request her again.

reviews.author: Cecile Djoumessi
reviews.text:
I would like to sincerely thank Kyle Wesley, Williams and Hannah from Roto-Rooter Restoration Services for their outstanding support during my water damage restoration process.
From the very beginning, they were professional, responsive, and extremely helpful. They promptly removed the wet drywall, handled the necessary water mitigation work, and carefully moved items during the pack-out process to prevent further damage.
What truly stood out was their guidance beyond the basic restoration work. They:

Helped coordinate a professional company for the specialty pack-out of valuable items

Assisted me through the insurance claim process with clarity and patience

Provided advice on how to find qualified contractors for flooring, drywall installation, and other repairs

Answered my questions thoroughly and kept me informed throughout the process

Dealing with water damage can be overwhelming, but Kyle and Hannah made the experience much more manageable. Their professionalism, communication, and genuine concern for doing the job correctly gave me confidence during a very stressful situation.

I highly recommend Roto-Rooter Restoration Services, and especially Kyle, Williams and Hannah, to anyone in need of water restoration services.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1077 W Boylston St Unit 201, Worcester, MA 01606, USA

reviews.author: Raquel Jimenez MUA
reviews.text:
Excellent service!
I had a great experience with Bryan Lawrence. He was punctual, professional, and very knowledgeable. He explained everything clearly, worked efficiently, and made sure everything was spotless before leaving. It’s hard to find someone so reliable and respectful of your time and home. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of plumbing services!

reviews.author: Kira Slisli
reviews.text: Thank you for the great work! Oleksandr completed everything very quickly — after I called the company, he arrived at my home in Springfield in less than an hour. I really appreciate the fast and high-quality service.

reviews.author: Rick Onofrey
reviews.text:
I called Roto Rooter when my plumbing backed up and I could not clear the clog with a toilet snake. They were out within an hour and had to remove the toilet to clear the clog. After snaking it with an industrial sized snake they cleared the clog which was all the way out to the septic tank. They replaced the toilet and left everything nice and neat (and easy for me to bleach).

The initial price was over $1000, but he gave me a discount.

Overall, I am very pleased with the service.

reviews.author: Allie Stoddard
reviews.text: Of course needed emergency services on a Saturday night and Jude came out to problem solve the issue for us at 10pm! He was professional, kind, patient and understanding of a accidental but difficult situation. We really appreciate him getting our plumbing back up and running in a pinch. We had guests staying over so I can't say enough about how much we appreciated the plumbing rescue!! Thanks again.

reviews.author: Lou DiFruscio
reviews.text:
The entire experience  was  seamless. We had an urgent situation , a human picked up the phone when we called and we had Jason at our house within 90 minutes. This was in the evening.  He immediately diagnosed the problem, went  about fixing it,  was courteous and cleaned up before he left
Not surprising these guys have been in business so long with that type of great  service!

plumbers.name: Olin Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 3201 E 8th Ave, Tampa, FL 33605, USA

reviews.author: Tim Traud
reviews.text: Great experience with Olin Plumbing. This is the second time we called them and they have done a great job both times. Jesus was awesome. Explained everything, kept things clean and did a great job. My dog has also decided that Jesus is now one of her best friends.

reviews.author: Ann H
reviews.text:
This was my first experience with Olin Plumbing. I never enjoy it when I need a plumber, but Olin made it a very good experience. Everything was smooth and simple, from my initial phone call to schedule the appointment to having the work completed. I really appreciated getting the name and a picture of my technician prior to his arrival.

Jesus showed up during the time window specified. He had a great attitude and smile. He also really seems to like the company he is working for. That counts for a lot to me. Jesus was efficient and thorough. He went straight to work, checking out the leaks and replacing the valves. He explained what he found and the probable cause. He had the parts he needed on his truck. I appreciate him not having to go back to the office or the hardware store to complete the job.

All in all, it was an excellent experience. I will keep Olin's phone number and Jesus's name at the top of my list of service providers. Next time I need a plumber, Olin will be my first call.

reviews.author: Jen Frost
reviews.text: Olin Plumbing was able to get me scheduled at the time I needed for a few items. Jesus showed up, and after completing some assessments and inspections, he provided a solid game plan for my plumbing needs. He was also very informative and kind. Thanks, Jesus, and thanks, Olin! I'll be calling again when I need you.

reviews.author: Deirdre Tatum
reviews.text: Oh my goodness!  What extraordinary service!  I called Olin as my bathrooms were backing up and they sent Estevan out.  He was so polite, helpful and he even called the previous plumber to see if there was a warranty on their work before he got started (he was trying to save me some money). Estevan found the problem and showed me what was wrong.  He fixed the issue, cleaned up behind himself (I think that  its cleaner than when he started, lol), and I paid the exact price that he quoted me earlier.  I was so impressed with him.  He even said that his company has integrity and that all of the employees want to do a good job.  I love that!  If anyone asks me for a recommendation for a good plumbing company, I will definitely recommend Olin (and hopefully you'll get Estevan, lol)

reviews.author: Deepa Malavalli
reviews.text: Two outstanding technicians, Anthony and Willi from Olin Plumbing Inc., came to my house to complete some plumbing work. I was pleased that I was able to secure an appointment for the same day. They performed excellent repairs on the taps connected to my washing machine. Moreover, they offered me an affordable price for their services, which made me feel that I was receiving great value for my money. Before going Anthony gifted me two beautifully designed Olin mugs. Thank you for your excellent service and the mugs!

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of Yavapai, Coconino and Maricopa Counties
plumbers.address: 248 W General Crook Trail, Camp Verde, AZ 86322, USA

reviews.author: Elijah Poulos
reviews.text:
James from Mr. Rooter was excellent! He came out, accurately diagnosed our septic system's issues, and fixed everything the same day (the day after Christmas too). So happy with everything we even signed up for their advantage plan the same day for regular service. Great job!

Update: So, maybe not so great after all. So, the 1st time James came out, the problem was that power had accidentally been cut to the septic system, and it became clogged. Turns out, my ststem has an aerator/agitator and a pump which all require electricity.  Ok fine. James pumped the effluent tank (into my yard) and unclogged the pump/system, and it worked for about 2 days. I still think James was good, not a reflection on him, he did his best. But, turns out I have an "aerobic alternative" septic system (fyi I'm new to septic, as in just bought the house and it's my first) and even though Mr. Rooter installed the thing new in 2017 (at a price tag of nearly $60K as the install receipt was included in the home purchase) they really don't currently have anyone with experience working on these systems. Over the next couple weeks they had to send out several more techs, and even a "supervisor" to troubleshoot my system. I honestly got the feeling they'd never really worked on an alternative system much, and one of the techs flat out told me he "hated" these alternative systems and had no idea what he was doing! He said "I'm just going to try and figure it out because I'm the only tech available today" but of course he couldn't. But that didn't stop them from charging me!! Turns out after all the drama, and over $4 thousand dollars!!!!!, my pump/emitters were just gummed up- again (see below) and then the leach field just became saturated because I didn't know anything about these, and I exceeded the gallon/day flow capacity 2 days in a row (which i had to look up myself). Mr. Rooter nickle and dime'd me at every turn, even when they were just "trying to figure it out". What a waste of time and money. At one point they told me they'd have to dig up the whole thing and replace the lines/emitters bc they "might be clogged". They didn't even have the install schematics, despite them installing it just 7.5 years ago, because they "upgraded their computers" a few years ago. I found the schematics from the inspection report and gave to them myself! On the last day I asked what I needed to do to keep everything running smoothly going forward, and wasn't provided any real guidance.
