For example, I asked why the original install had a notation about "Chlorine tablets" and the supervisor actually said "yeah, sometimes people have to do that" seriously!?! I ended up having to research all this myself!! I found a label on a cylinder near the system and called the number on it, in Clearwater TX, and turns out it's an automatic Chlorine tablet feeder!! And the manufacturer told me it's "absolutely necessary" for my alternate system to function properly! No mention of this whatsoever from Mr. Rooter! In fact, that company told me Mr. Rooter wasn't even certified to work on alternate septic systems anymore!!! Would have been nice to know! To top it off, it takes a special Chlorine tablet I ended up having to order online (not the pool Chlorine tablets Lowe's tried to sell me) which took 3 weeks to arrive.  Needless to say, since becoming a self-educated "expert" now on alternate systems, and putting in those special Chlorine tablets (and not overloading my system anymore) it's been working perfectly now. Just a terrible overall experience, and I feel like I was taken advantage of and mislead by Mr. Rooter, which was very costly in both my time and money. Maybe they do a good job on "normal" septic systems, but definitely don't use them for "aerobic alternate" septic systems, at least not until they get someone who's actually certified in working on them!! I hope this helps someone else avoid my mistakes. And, if anyone knows who I can/should call to service my aerobic alternative septic system in the future, please comment on this review!!!

reviews.author: Carl Jackson
reviews.text: James G. was excellent.  We live in Sedona and have used & trusted Mr. Rooter for years. The breadth of their service is amazing.  James was onnsite for or annual plumbing review and we had a need to replace the cap on our water/furnace vent.  James was able to help us same day.  We've used James many times and we trust him and the high quality of his work. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Mark
reviews.text:
Very pleased with Mr. Rooter of Yavapai and Coconino counties.
We had a drain backing up regularly progressively getting worse over time.
These guys were responsive, very professional, uniformed, clean, identified the problem, secured the parts, tools and resources necessary to complete the job and were finished within 24 hours of my first call. Dan, Mark, Chris, Aiden were all on site providing excellent service. Most especially Chris and Aiden went above and beyond expectations.
Do not hesitate with this crew.

reviews.author: Misty Lee Cook
reviews.text:
We recently thought we might be facing a serious plumbing issue after several things were found in our pipes, and we were worried it might require breaking concrete. Thankfully, Mr. Rooter was able to resolve the problem using their high-tech pipe scrubbing equipment.

James G. was absolutely amazing—professional, knowledgeable, and truly went above and beyond to make sure everything was taken care of. He explained the process clearly and made a stressful situation much easier.

We’re so grateful for the excellent service and highly recommend Mr. Rooter and James G. to anyone needing plumbing help!

reviews.author: Alexandro Ross
reviews.text: When Clinton arrives for our appointment,  I told him that I wanted my manufacture home repiped,that if it carried water change it. He took measurements under home and inside in every room that used water.before he left he knew how many of tubing and fittings we would need. He also saw the need for water on our south side and two faucets no charge,financing was set up at a reasonable rate. Now for Chris and crew. Chris is a pro. And knows what he is doing, know matter how busy he was he stop and answer all our questions, very much appreciated. He worked the job so we have water by of end day, sometimes sooner. Both Chris and Clinton went over and beyond by going to every store in Payson looking for the parts need to finish install of vanity sink.much appreciated. I received every discount they could give me, wih good financial terms, I'm satisfied that I received good value for money spent and highly recommend this company.

plumbers.name: YES! Air Conditioning, Heating, Plumbing and Electric
plumbers.address: 765 S 100 E, Provo, UT 84606, USA

reviews.author: Craig Moore
reviews.text: Our 24 K generator had not been operating properly for at least a year. It wasn’t installed by Yes and the company that I purchased it from was no longer in business. I discovered that Yes is a licensed distributor for Generac generators. We have been a loyal customer of there’s for years for our HVAC. I would never recommend any other company. Our tech Tony was on time, very professional, and very personable. Throughout the service he kept me appraised of every thing he found that needed attention. The service was excellent. The generator runs like new and I’m excited that Yes will be here every year for its annual service.

reviews.author: Dave Henderson
reviews.text:
Great experience with YES! so far. Our furnace went out, they came the next morning (Saturday) and it’s now working great.

I also really appreciated the time that Sawyer spent explaining things to us. Very informative and helpful in helping us make a good decision about what we may need in the future. He was great!

We will use them again.

reviews.author: Frank Tello
reviews.text: Sterling came out to do a tune-up on our HVAC system and did an excellent job. He was friendly, had a great attitude, and took the time to keep me informed throughout the entire process. He explained what he was checking, answered questions clearly, and was professional from start to finish. I’d gladly have him back and would recommend him to anyone needing HVAC service.

reviews.author: Tom Williams
reviews.text: I’m installing a new oven and found that the electrical needs for the new oven exceed what I had available. I called Yes! And had an electrician at my house within the hour. Kayden Dooley, who has done electrical work at my house before, arrived and knew both my needs and the house. He got right to work and he was joined by George Webb. Together, they ran a new electrical line, upgraded my circuits and made quick work of it so there is no delay in my moving quickly ahead with my project. I felt great seeing Kayden again.  It’s like having my own personal electrician on call.

reviews.author: Shauna Mayer
reviews.text: Sterling was professional, kind and informative. He worked fast and was very helpful. He made clear the issues with my furnace and gave me great options. I definitely recommend Yes.

plumbers.name: Admiral Plumbing Heating and Cooling
plumbers.address: 475 E 1000 S #202, Pleasant Grove, UT 84062, USA

reviews.author: Braxton Miller
reviews.text: I had a life changing disaster happen on my property but John was supper awesome and was very personal with me and made it easier for me to swallow they pill. He made sure my property was taken care of and helped me save money wherever we could. He ended up saving me 6,000 over all on the job they did for me. They also did great work and were very fast. Thanks

reviews.author: victor ramirez
reviews.text: Justin Fillmore was a great and informative technician. Admiral was able to get Justin here within a couple hours to help with a fountain we have in the backyard that was broken leaking out water. Justin helped shut off the water and provide useful information on the water system in our home. We appreciate all of the information that Justin provided and the quickness of him getting here/the service.

reviews.author: A.J. Rounds
reviews.text: We love using Admireal at Keyrenter Provo.  They've been a great partner for years.  Thanks for helping out with our HVAC needs.  Prompt, professional, and Economical.   You guys are awesome!

reviews.author: Blake and Laurissa Jones Bills
reviews.text:
We just had Nick come out and fix a water heater that was under warranty. The pilot light went out and it was having issues. He figured it out fast and got it up and running smoothly in no time and the warranty covered it all.
He was so nice and professional and explained their annual service plans. Knowledgeable, professional, and kind. Thank you for getting our hot water back Nick!

reviews.author: Jeffrey J
reviews.text:
Competitive price, good HVAC work. I trust they aren’t trying to over charge.

Gavin installed my new heat pump and furnace. He’s also the guy who comes to service it. This “installer is also servicer” method lets installers see any issues so they can improve their craft. Haven’t had any issues.

plumbers.name: JT Services
plumbers.address: 17311 U.S. Rte 66, Claremore, OK 74017, USA

reviews.author: Tiffany Ridenour
reviews.text: We noticed our septic tank backing up. We called JT services and they sent Keeton out to pump it for us. He was very professional and answered all our questions. He gladly explained how our septic system worked. Highly recommend Keeton at JT services.

reviews.author: Andy Romsa
reviews.text: The folks from JT Services were the best. They dealt with rock, soil and terrain issues. They worked out solutions to each problem and accomplished the job in an exemplary and professional manner. The finished project is great and they went above and beyond to get us back to a fully functional treatment system. Thanks so much, y’all are the best, from the staff at headquarters to the installers in the field.

reviews.author: Eldon Riley
reviews.text:
Had an emergency backup and they were there within hours.  Jake went above and beyond to clear the blockage which turned out to be caused by a previous plumber's broken snake in the line.  Jake used critical thinking and ingenuity in devising a method to retrieve it.
Also a shoutout to Quincy who came and pumped the septic tank during all of this.
Office people were very pleasant to talk to and everyone was professional and friendly.  Thanks for saving the day!!!

reviews.author: Aaron Peters
reviews.text: We are highly impressed with JT services. From the moment we called and spoke to customer services and had an appointment made everything went smoothly. Keaton came to our house. Was extremely thorough and knowledgeable. He gave us multiple options that we can do he helped us out tremendously. I highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Chad Costes
reviews.text: Great company with wonderful staff. Everyone is friendly, professional and knowledgeable. Was very thorough throughout the entire process and explained everything that was going on. Definitely recommended!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 650 E Terra Cotta Ave #110, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Esther O
reviews.text: Jonathan was super helpful with my plumbing issue and made sure there were no leaks after the job was done. He was very kind and worked quickly and professionally. I would recommend him to anyone who needs an understanding plumber.

reviews.author: Mary Hawkins
reviews.text: Bruno & Steve were very helpful not only at talking me through what caused our main line slowness/backup, but also daily preventative measures. We were also able to talk through bigger picture needs down the line. Our home is an investment, and they were easy to talk to about protecting it. Never felt like I was getting upsold.

reviews.author: Epic Battle Reenactments
reviews.text: Roto-Rooter was swift to respond to my request. The technician they sent, Azzi, arrived promptly on site and demonstrated his skill and expertise at handling the fixes and installation required. He was dedicated to completing the task on my behalf and overall was a pleasant interaction. I am very satsified with his work and the experience given!

reviews.author: Eric Ohlrich
reviews.text:
Our house has had issues with roots clogging drainage pipes for years so we have had a few different companies come and resolve the issue, Roto-Rooter was very thorough, Israel and Mike were very professional, kind, and patient. They explained everything they were doing and why, even giving us information about our pipes and issues that could arise later on. Israel and Mike didn’t just stop once the clog was cleared, they went through the pipes multiple times in order to guarantee the pipes were completely clear and told us the further steps to take.

The price was a bit steep, it was around 720$ for them to do this service which hurt, but unfortunately it wasn’t too surprising.

Overall, overpriced, but they were very knowledgeable and took the job seriously and worked through it thoroughly. Will be using Roto-Rooter again, after our wallet recovers 😅

reviews.author: Sagar Mehta
reviews.text: This is from Saturday morning. Bruno, Steven & Kyle came to check in the drainage issue. After going to the root cleaning in the pipeline process they were able to pull the roots and waste. The pipeline has got some real issue that merges into the city sewer. All them tried really hard and put in 5+ hours of work. They are helpful and I recommend them for your services

plumbers.name: Black Plumbing Heating & Air
plumbers.address: 4402 S Danville Dr, Abilene, TX 79605, USA

reviews.author: Missy Pu
reviews.text:
On 4 Dec, my home warranty insurance notified Black Plumbing about a leaky faucet.  Black Plumbing called the same day and made appointment for 5 Dec.  Josh (the attending tech) called to inform me he would be later.  That was GREATLY appreciated, respectful and just good customer service.  Josh came over diagnosed the problem (which had to be rectified the following business day).  Mind you, this faucet was not for daily use so the Monday appt was ok.  Josh discussed the issue and gave me options.  He left but the faucet was leaking , I called Josh and he had to come back to make pipe adjustments.  The leaking was ceased.
He returned Monday to replaced the faucet.
The faucet was pretty much identical to the original one.
I am very satisfied with the service I received from Josh.
He was very professional, courteous and showed no signs of disgust because he had to return.
Thanks Josh

reviews.author: courtney dodd
reviews.text: Black Plumbing Heat & Air has been excellent to work with! Thanks to Chad L., we got our master shower fixed! It was a new construction mistake and our worst nightmare. He knew exactly what we needed and how to get it done! We were so pleased with the service and attention to detail that we hired them for the plumbing (another fix) and mini splint in our mother-in-law addition. Everything has ran smoothly thanks to Chad staying on top of it all! Thanks for the great service! Don’t hesitate to call Black Plumbing Heating and Air!

reviews.author: Cesar Rodriguez jr
reviews.text:
Huge thank you to the team at Black Plumbing for coming out and fixing our drain so quickly and professionally. Everything is running smooth now!

Also, shoutout to the very friendly dispatcher — I believe her name was Lilly she was extremely helpful and made the whole process easy from the start.

We truly appreciate the great service and would highly recommend Black Plumbing to any business needing reliable plumbing work. Thank you again!

reviews.author: Brent Brazell
reviews.text: I’ve been doing business with Black Plumbing in commercial and residential for years, and they’ve consistently gone above and beyond to deliver top-quality work at the exact price they quote—no surprises. Everyone I’ve dealt with there is friendly, personable, and incredibly knowledgeable. I can’t recommend them highly enough. If you’re looking for a reliable plumber who’s fair on pricing, shows up on time as promised, and truly knows their craft, Black Plumbing is the company to call.

reviews.author: Kim New
reviews.text: We've had Black Plumbing out3 different times, the most recent was Friday, February 20th. 1st fix a pipe that was causing my washing machine to overflow(had a different company come out but never told us this was an issue), 2nd- run a camera to check on what was causing toilet to not flush correctly, 3 rd -  fix the issue that was found with toilets. We've always given a quote of the cost of repairs. If they finish the job sooner, the price is adjusted. Amazing young men came each time. Sweet and explained everything to us.

plumbers.name: 615 Plumbing
plumbers.address: 475 Metroplex Dr #108, Nashville, TN 37211, USA

reviews.author: jenny Cruse
reviews.text: We were able to get a quote and same day service. Chris was an awesome technician and ran a whole new water line for our new Refrigerator in just a couple of hours. Excellent work and service. Highly recommend 👌

reviews.author: Candace
reviews.text: 615 Plumbing did a great job for us. They came out quickly, fixed our plumbing issue, and installed a new faucet. The technician was professional, friendly, and made sure everything was working perfectly before leaving. We really appreciated the quick response and quality work. I would definitely recommend them and will call them again if we need plumbing help.

reviews.author: Marina Barisic
reviews.text: Caleb came out to service my home and I am beyond grateful for him! He first started with a full diagnosis of the quality of my pipes which was amazing! I love that now I am fully aware of the integrity of my plumbing system. Next, he got down to the root issue of the call: a clog in my main line! Within an hour, Caleb had resolved the issue. I never once felt like I was being pushed to buy… Caleb showed professionalism and patience with me during the whole process. While I decided what to do, he patiently waited for me and never once pushed me to make a decision. Seriously can not say enough good things about this technician. He could have rushed our appointment as it was his last call of the day but no, he literally addressed every issue with pure knowledge and interest. I am truly shocked at how lucky I got to have Caleb as my tech. Thank you 615 plumbing and Caleb for taking a huge weight off my shoulders.

reviews.author: Tinà Clàrk
reviews.text:
Called because I need a flange for my toilet. They set an appointment that same day. The sent Caleb, he was very informative,  pleasant and very professional. He gave me more than one option of what needed to be done to fix the problem. He answered any question I asked him. He did an excellent. Thank You Caleb!
I would recommend 615 Plumbing!

reviews.author: Mallory Day
reviews.text: We had a great experience with 615 plumbing. We had a leak and were able to get someone to come out the same day, which was amazing! Max was extremely helpful and kind. The service was fast, efficient, and friendly. We would definitely recommend this company, and will use them again.

plumbers.name: Tidy Tank Plumbing, Sewer, and Septic
plumbers.address: 740 McArdle Dr, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Kevin Morrison
reviews.text: Great experience with Tidy Tank Septic! Brad handled my septic pumping and was incredibly helpful. Not only did he get the job done smoothly, but he also took the time to explain my whole setup and what to watch for over time. I left the visit knowing a lot more about my system and confident about when I’ll need service next. I’ll absolutely be calling them again. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Hyung J. Kim, MD
reviews.text: They performed residential septic tank service at my house. They did a wonderful job. They were professional and courteous. I highly recommend Ron's Tidy Septic Tank Service!!

reviews.author: Sabine Vosters
reviews.text: Was contacted by Tidy Tank Septic reminding me that the last service had been almost three years ago, and did I want to schedule a service. Set up an appointment for the very next day. They arrived at the scheduled time and got the job done thoroughly and efficiently. They explained what they were doing and documented everything in pictures and on the invoice. Their prices have gone up quite a bit since our last appointment, but I guess it's on par with every other price increase in the country. A very professional experience all around, I would definitely recommend this business to anyone looking for septic tank maintenance.

reviews.author: Terry A
reviews.text: I called Tidy Tank plumbing because my sump pump line broke. Dan was here within 45 minutes. He looked at the obvious issue but then investigated further to make sure that there were no other related issues such as frozen drain lines, etc. He went through all of the options from doing a simple repair to replace it with a top quality sump pump and backup system. He did not push me in any direction nor try to upsell me. Once the choice was made he had all of the equipment on the truck, completed the work, tested the system, and cleaned up. I've always had very good luck with their septic service and now I can add their plumbing service to that.

reviews.author: angelique archos solhi
reviews.text: TJ was polite and very professional.  He was even better at his job!  He replaced a disposal and faucet as well as reconfiguring the entire pipe system. He explained everything that needed to be done and was quick and efficient.  I will recommend him to my friends and family. I will also use his services in my new home going forward. Excellent!

plumbers.name: Griffin Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 3389 Orcutt Rd, Santa Maria, CA 93455, USA

reviews.author: Korinne Leal
reviews.text: James was sent to my home for a leaking valve and he replaced it quickly and efficiently. Thank you James, we appreciate you!! Elizabeth was also amazing!! Elizabeth provided great customer service from start to finish over the phone. Both James and Elizabeth are great representatives of Griffin! Thank you again, have a blessed day! ☀️😃

reviews.author: Ray Hallenbeck
reviews.text: Only one call and I had Noah out to install a shutoff valve required by my insurance company.  Noah also replaced two faulty ball valves on the line.  His work is impeccable, neat and clean.  All work also comes with a warranty which I appreciate.  He was polite, on time and efficient.  The admin staff at the office was also top notch.  Thank you

reviews.author: Rob Tesdahl
reviews.text:
Cris from Griffin Plumbing was amazing. He was very thorough when investigating our issue, making certain to provide a fully informed plan and estimate. He was also very patient with our questions about our options.

Elizabeth was very professional yet friendly while working with us to schedule the work, making an honest effort to work with our schedule. And when there was an unexpected conflict, she contacted us immediately with a sincere apology and options for rescheduling.

The whole team at Griffin has been wonderful

reviews.author: Dennis Hennessy
reviews.text: Exceptional service. The workmanship was first-rate, the job was done right the first time, and the level of professionalism was impressive. Obviously, Noah takes great pride in his work. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Christina Jaramillo
reviews.text: I have not had service like this in decades. The Griffin Plumbing team quickly responded with a normal team of people who actually coordinated with each other and me to provide a friendly & knowledgeable solution to my two plumbing problems. The house now has an unclogged sink that another plumbing company failed to resolve after two visits and a brand new beautiful touchless faucet that I didn’t even need to shop for. This company gave me hope in the failing service industry. Thank you.

plumbers.name: Emergency Plumbing Heating & Air
plumbers.address: 3354 U.S. Hwy 23 N Suite A, Delaware, OH 43015, USA

reviews.author: Tiffany Emrich
reviews.text: Best Plumbing Company in Ohio! Thank you for assisting my tenants when they had no hot water. Great communication from the office and technician. Got a new hot water heater installed same day for a very fair price in a world where everything is so expensive. Will refer Emergency to all my friends and family and will only use them for my rentals!

reviews.author: Chris Martin
reviews.text: 10pm at night, we discovered our main sewer line had clogged and started backing up into our basement.  Thankfully, we caught it immediately and limited it to only a small puddle.  I Googled for an emergency plumber and to be honest... Emergency Plumbing Heating & Air was not at the top of the list, therefore not my first choice.  However, they were the first to answer the phone for being a 24/7 service.  Seth had appeared at our door within an hour of speaking to someone and was very quick to diagnose and quote a cost.  Within another hour, the clog had been cleared and everything was back to normal.  Seth was very professional in explaining everything as he was working, and given the late hour, his efforts were greatly appreciated.  I highly recommend Emergency Plumbing Heating & Air as a first choice for any emergency needs.  I know who I will NOT be calling next time as the first 24/7 service didn't return my call until 8am the following morning.  Thank you!  and thank you Seth!!

reviews.author: B R
reviews.text: I had had multiple jobs that needed done 5 days after closing on my home and a dishwasher problem from a Home Depot dishwasher “installation” gone wrong. One call did it all! I called and was able to schedule an appointment next day. Rob and Corey came out. They were on time, wore shoe covers, were uniformed,  polite, professional, personable and got 4 sinks, 1 toilet, 1 shower and 1 dishwasher all fixed  in one day. THEY WERE GREAT!! Will recommend their service to anyone needing fast fixes done by friendly faces!! Thanks so much for such a great experience!!!

reviews.author: Don Gardner
reviews.text:
Apex Pros (the pros that blows) came out to "clear my sewer line." They failed miserably. I suspect they didn't try. The technician "couldn't get the auger into the pipe." They were pushing a huge repair project saying the pipe could be collapsed. I told them I would like a second opinion and all of a sudden the technician was able to get enough augering done to let water flow. APEX quit at that point and left without saying a word. Despite their ineptitude I was forced to pay an outrageous fee for their failure.
Fortunately I called Emergency Plumbing Heating and Air for a second opinion. I informed them of the situation and they went about their work. Jimmy Davis and Kobe Gurley were outstanding. They immediately found the partial blockage APEX left intact. The cleared it with their auger out to 56 feet without any problems that couldn't be fixed with elbow grease and professionalism. They fixed the problem and recommended a further course of action which would be accomplished the very next day weather-permitting.
On their second visit, Cory Wilson and, again, Coby Gurley, came out in freezing temps and jetted the whole line out to the sewer tap.
Outstanding job.
On both days, the Emergency Plumbing Heating & Air crews were professional, personable, informative and let me know each step along the way what was going on. If there was a need to change pricing for extra service, I was told upfront and not pressured into making a decision.
I know this is a long review, but these guys did a great job!!!!!
If you need sewer line work, don't call Apex -- the Pros that Blows.
Call EMERGENCY PLUMBING HEATING & AIR first.

reviews.author: Maximilian Ekey
reviews.text: Family friend referred me when my heat was broken and my pipes were frozen. Brody, the plumbing expert, reassured me that my pex pipes wouldn’t burst and that it would be safe to wait for Tim, the HVAC expert, to come from another job. He saved me the trouble of opening the walls to find the frozen pipe. Tim was able to get the furnace running better than when it went out, which quickly unfroze the pipes. All around excellent professional service and thank you to Doug and Owie for getting everything scheduled so quick. I will definitely be using these guys again.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1123 Emerson St UNIT 209, Evanston, IL 60201, USA

reviews.author: Brittney Trice
reviews.text: Tony was excellent. He gave great customer service, he was personable, and got the job done quick. I am extremely appreciative of the work that was done in my home. I also had 2 toilets which is difficult to rod and Tony got it on the first try. Amazing work. 10/10 would highly recommend. Please REQUEST TONY

reviews.author: Bobby Lowstetter
reviews.text:
Hussein did the work for me. I cannot express how awesome he did. I had a flood happen due to my sump pump failing and not only did he replace it for me, he taught me how it worked and showed me what different parts were for. He also took the time to diagnose another quick issue for me and teach me a few more plumbing things.

The service was overpriced but, they worked with me on it.

I cannot express how thankful I am for Hussein and his work. Thank you so much Hussein!

reviews.author: Miles Heck
reviews.text: I repeatedly confirmed (four separate times) that they would be able to inspect my house and identify what needed repair. Despite those assurances, they gave me a window of time they would arrived. Five hours after the window concluded without anyone showing up. They then called to say they couldn’t perform the service at all without offering any explanation. Completely unprofessional and shockingly disorganized. Total waste of time. Would never recommend to anyone

reviews.author: Adam Woodburn
reviews.text: This company ruthlessly stripped us of our savings. We called them to unplug a drain and run abatment on our basement after 2 inches of groundwater got in. We were under the impression insurance would cover it. When we were denied coverage, Roto Rooter demanded $24,000 from our pockets and threatened to put a lien on our home if it was not paid with in 2 months. There are far more sketchy details here. But the bottom line is this billion dollar company represents everything that's wrong with a capitalistic society. Don't trust them. They are awful.

reviews.author: Paul Wisowaty
reviews.text: I had the drain rodded and it worked fine for three days and was plugged up again. I ordered a Jet Snake 100ft Sewer Jetter on Amazon based off of the reviews and it cleaned the pipe for a fraction of the cost. Employees at RR were great, just won't be needing them anymore since I have a new little green friend.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 505 Progress Dr #119, Linthicum Heights, MD 21090, USA

reviews.author: Aldo Peralta
reviews.text:
TL;DR I would not recommend for big projects as they will try to bill the max amount to the insurance company. Also you will need to be coordinating for company since the internal teams do not speak to each other when working with them for multiple jobs since I needed to text them daily to keep the work flowing.
Work started on Feb 03 2026, at first everything was going well fast response and solution giving. Proceeded to work with them since time to repair and cleanup was going to be short. Insurance would cover the cleanup but not the pipe repair which I was okay with. They quoted me around 3k for cleanup to disinfect and remove carpet. The disinfect happened fairly quickly and they needed to wait for the chemicals to dry for a couple of days. On the 5th they said everything looked good and they will begin carpet removal but I told them the issue has not been fix so they decide to wait, bad idea since the 2 machines were being rented per day. They decided to leave the machines even though the carpet was dry and they would come back later to remove the carpet after the excavation team will dig up the old drain pipes (I still have not received the invoice for that project but I needed to finance the work through a bank not sure what they charge me for, they gave me an estimate only.) It took a while to schedule the excavation team and they finally came out on the 9th to do the work which they completed in a day (awesome by the way) but they left a mess since the sanitization crew would clean up afterwards. The excavation team also had trouble finding the metal drain pipe which led them to break more of the basement foundation. I though they had a metal detector or something since I asked them if they had something to find the metal pipe and they said yes. They also made a mess of the walk way but cleaned it after I complain since they were only going to remove the carpet that the sewage water contaminated. Also the excavation team broke one of the machines which was probably a good thing since my energy bill kept racking up. The following day on the 10th they were suppose to come to remove the carpet and machines but the employee got lock of there van and couldn't come out until the following  day. As of Feb 23 they have still not come out to remove the carpet. I have sent responses asking them about the charges on the machines that I was renting for 9 days which they only needed to be out there until the carpet was dried which was the 5th. They proceeded to ignore me and pass the bill to the insurance company. I hope this reaches someone in the company that actually cares and resolves my issue.

reviews.author: Brent Lambert
reviews.text:
I hired Roto-Rooter for what was sold and financed as a complete sewer line replacement from the house to the street, with a five-year warranty. That is not what was delivered.

During the work, a section of the original pipe (approximately 75 years old) was left in place, despite the job being sold as a full replacement. A clean-out was installed in the sidewalk even after I raised concerns during construction. The yard was excavated and left in poor condition, and two sidewalk slabs were cracked completely through by vehicle weight, in addition to scrapes and damage to other concrete and the driveway. During the backfill they cracked one of the new cleanouts and they had to be called back out to replace it.

Shortly afterward, the water service line in the same excavation area failed, resulting in a major underground leak. The County confirmed the leak was between the meter and the house — directly impacted by the area of Roto-Rooter’s work.

I have spent multiple days off work trying to coordinate follow-up because of missed or unconfirmed service windows and lack of communication. A branch manager later acknowledged issues with the work, but the proposed resolution was a partial refund rather than completing the job as originally sold, leaving me with damaged property and ongoing risk.

I also contacted Roto-Rooter again for a separate branch-line issue and paid a diagnostic fee, only for the technician to confirm what I had already identified and leave without performing a repair.

This has been an exhausting and costly experience involving incomplete work, property damage, and poor follow-through. Based on this experience, I cannot recommend Roto-Rooter.

UPDATE: Pat thank you for the response. I have already been in contact via email regarding this matter and have provided detailed documentation. I’m happy to continue working toward a resolution and look forward to corporate review and follow-up.

reviews.author: Moshe Broder
reviews.text: Israel was very helpful, knowledgeable, efficient, and kept the house clean while working.  He resolved the issue and gave some helpful pointers for the next time it could happen. There was a longer wait for service than estimated but to be fair it was a Sunday in the middle of a snowstorm and the technicians were busy throughout Maryland, and Roto-Rooter did fit me in the same day when other plumbers couldn't do it.  Would definitely recommend.

reviews.author: Angela Ritchie
reviews.text: 2 yrs ago we had a clog len the plumber came  cleared it out then next day told us with their video our sewer line needed replaced, for the entire job line inside and out it was quoted 14k we had multiple companies come out give quotes and no one ever verified with their own camera it was a true break, finally got someone and they told us to leave it alone.. after all that I completely mistrust plumbers as all those companies would have taken our money with out blinking twice.  Fast forward to this week we had another issue we could not get a drain line clean, only plumber to answer was Roto Rooter. They came could not clear the line, sent their video he could not access the line to view past a few feet. We understand probably needs replaced/fixed right at the joint under the clean out. I'm even more disgusted with Roto Rooter then the other companies we dealt with in the past. For 1 they quoted us 10k for up to 15ft..   the highest of previous quotes was 14k for 65 feet inside outside, digging outside permits and back fill. 10k for a fraction of the work is just astronomical. Your camera rep also pushed on my husband to fill out credit check applications about 6 times before he finally left. I then received multiple calls and a DocuSign without having confirmed we wanted roto rooter to take the job. We did it ourselves for less than 1000. In my opinion (and through both experiences I have had quotes from 7 companies) plumbing is a sharky business and please people do NOT freak out and go with the first quote. Had I replaced the entire line the first time we could have re routed for 5k and not spent 14k. Don't let the aggressive sales pitch also sway you, don't rush to make a homeowners claim, don't rush to fill out credit apps. Please get quotes from various companies.

reviews.author: Lulu Kun
reviews.text:
I recently used Roto-Rooter Baltimore for a toilet drain clog.
Technician was professional, clearly diagnosed the clog location, explained the issue, and successfully removed it. I appreciate his thorough and courteous work.
However, Roto-Rooter’s pricing is concerning. The charge for running a 6-ft snake was $450, and the only alternative option presented next was over $1,000. For a simple toilet clog, within 15 ft, this felt excessive. It would be fairer if Roto-Rooter clearly presented all available options and full pricing upfront before 'any' work.Greater pricing transparency would improve the overall experience. I see online that such a service should have costed at most $600.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Drain Service
plumbers.address: 4207 Mike Padgett Hwy Unit A, Augusta, GA 30906, USA

reviews.author: Ryan Burgess
reviews.text:
I want to say how awesome working with Roto-Rooter was. Has a pretty big problem that then turned into a major problem when the 1 collapse in my kitchen drain line became 4....

But the techs they sent to my house, Anthony and Brandon and the other 2s who's names i don't remember were awesome! They answered every silly question I had when I didn't understand what a part was, or the direction we needed to go cause it just seemed like everything wrong in a concrete slab drain pipe went wrong at once.

But working from home and starting a new job I was worried about noise level among other things, but man aside from the tile hammer the first day, could barely hear them! And that isnt a fault in the tile hammer, work was kind enough to give me off that day since we knew it would be loud!

But they really came in clutch and helped me with a massive problem I was having and prevented me from spending a bunch of money just to have the same problem again!

100% the entire team I worked with was fantastic! Can't recommend enough!

PS: before someone says they didn't restore my concrete out front I requested they not as I plan to remove that walk way, makes it easier if its precut!

reviews.author: Tony Graham
reviews.text: Mike Vance from Roto-Rooter did a great job repairing leaking sink. Great response time and quality service. Mike also cleaned up the area after the repair. Thank you!

reviews.author: Janet Broeckel
reviews.text:
Today is Valentine’s Day and I felt bad for calling somebody out for a backed up toilet and shower on this special day. But I called Roto-Rooter and Cullen Sutherland came to my rescue. After assessing the problem, he went straight to work…And what seemed like minutes … he had everything taken care of!
I would definitely recommend Roto-Rooter in Augusta , Georgia who also services my area in Aiken, South Carolina. It started this morning at 8 AM when I talked to Miss Alexis… Who was such a delight on the phone. She actually heard what I was saying and said I will send somebody out there today! (In a very cheerful voice I might add) How wonderful it is that you can call somebody and actually get a real live person on the phone. My whole experience was wonderful! When you are a senior citizen, those little things are the things that mean the most.
Thank you so much for taking such good care of me!
Jan B
Aiken, SC

reviews.author: Brian Ozden
reviews.text: Ruan was amazing!  Went above and beyond to get us back.  Without question,  he made our family a priority and did a great job.  Work quality was also amazing.  Ruan identified (he had to dig really deep and move shrubs to find the issue) and fixed the leak quickly and effectively.  100% satisfied!

reviews.author: Yoda 10
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I couldn’t be more impressed with Roto-Rooter and the amazing job they did on my kitchen replacement and garbage disposal installation. The technician was professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to make sure everything was done correctly and cleanly.

The pricing was very reasonable, and I truly appreciated the military discount, which shows they value their customers. The work quality exceeded my expectations, and everything is functioning perfectly.

I will absolutely use Roto-Rooter again in the future and highly recommend them to anyone needing reliable, high-quality plumbing work. Thank you for a great experience!

plumbers.name: AZ Super Plumber - The Plumbing Store
plumbers.address: 501 6th St, Prescott, AZ 86301, USA

reviews.author: Raul Sebastian (Raul S Fisher)
reviews.text: AZ Plumbing did an excellent job installing our new septic tank system. We were very pleased with both the results and the entire process. Their service was highly professional, and we gladly recommend them!

reviews.author: James Huddy
reviews.text: They were prompt at responding to my septic tank problem and sent someone out within a couple hours. Anthony was great and very informative. He got us all squared away in short time and was literally finishing up when my guests arrived from out of town. Everything worked out perfectly. Thank you!

reviews.author: Pat Kelleher
reviews.text: I used another Septic company for 11 years. They got too big. AZ Super is just what their name says. SUPER. Service was great. Real pros. Would recommend to everyone. Thank you AZ Super…

reviews.author: Erica Hellman
reviews.text: We had a septic emergency and Az super plumber was awesome to work with! They got back to me right away, scheduled me for the following day. and were able to come out earlier than scheduled to help me out. The tech walked me through possible issues, actual issues, and future maintenance. This was a great experience and we now have our go to company for plumbing and septic needs.

reviews.author: Jennifer Stainrook
reviews.text: I needed a full sewer pipe replacement from the house to the street. Anthony and his crew were amazing and educated me on everything that was going on.  I felt 100% comfortable even though it was a big job they were undertaking.  When digging they navigated around the posts of my car port with zero damage and also managed to avoid my rose bush! Thank you, it’s nice to have work done by people who enjoy doing the job.

plumbers.name: Eric's Plumbing & Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 647 S 1800 E, Spanish Fork, UT 84660, USA

reviews.author: Natalie Garrett
reviews.text:
We recently had extensive plumbing repairs done on our home, and I couldn’t be more satisfied with the entire experience. From the initial inspection to the final walkthrough, the team was professional, knowledgeable, and transparent about the scope of work and costs involved.

The quality of workmanship was excellent. Everything was left clean and orderly, and we’ve had no issues since the repairs were completed. It’s a huge relief to know our plumbing system is now reliable and functioning properly.

I highly recommend their services to anyone needing plumbing work, especially larger or more complicated repairs. Their professionalism, expertise, and commitment to customer satisfaction truly set them apart.
Weston went above and beyond to make sure communication was always a priority. I was extremely impressed.

reviews.author: KathiJo Smith
reviews.text: Hunter did an excellent job. He was so easy to work with and was very detailed in what needed to happen.  He not only did a great job, but he eased my nerves of the pressure in hiring a company to do a huge plumbing/sewer job. I would hire back Eric's Plumbing again. I would request Hunter but many  from Eric's actually worked  their tails off at my house, even the owner, Eric.  If I had more plumbing needs, I would take any of them. The office people were detailed and easy to work with as well.  Thanks so much!

reviews.author: Christopher Sanchez
reviews.text:
Hands down the best in the business.
We live in Ogden and Eric's plumbing and drain cleaning still serviced us and provided top notch services all around! We were blessed to work directly with Eric, the owner, to establish the right approach to our plumbing needs. His delivery was over reached and veryuch appreciated! We never expected anyone to go to such leaps and bonds to help us get the direction we needed to go. Without the pressure of going with his company. With such exceptional customer service and garentees on deliverables we just had to go with them. And we couldn't be happier. Our major issues that were going on for a month were handled in less than 8 hours day work! Remarkable work and services!
If you're looking for the best, look no further. Eric's plumbing and drain cleaning is your best stop!
Thanks Eric, Ian our tech and the rest of Eric's plumbing and drain cleaning team!

reviews.author: Kathryn O
reviews.text:
This is the BEST plumbing company. I wish I'd found them years ago. Richie (along with Levi, Ian, Mason) installed a liner in my main sewer line and did several other needed repairs. I also talked with Eric the owner who helped troubleshoot an issue with such kindness and expertise. These guys, along with their office staff (Dee and Angie), are excellent at what they do. Their customer service is second to none. AND, they stand by their work. Finding a trusted plumber is a relief.

I am grateful to be on their annual maintenance plan. Many thanks to Eric's Plumbing & Drain Cleaning!

reviews.author: Retired
reviews.text: Weston came and did a fantastic job. Very nice and even hauled the old items away. He replaced my sink and faucet and garbage disposal. Also switched to one drain from two.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1412 Main St Ste 620, Dallas, TX 75202, USA

reviews.author: Shibagaki Ryota
reviews.text:
This is my personal feeling and opinion.
They may have good skill plumber, but my feeling is not friendly attitude  for customer.
Feeling would be they unilaterally impose their own ideas and methods and aggressive It seems they lack services and approaches that are tailored to the customer's needs.
I paid everything before their work done, but they have not done.

When we found the hot water line leak underneath the house, they took care of it immediately.
After it needed to be installed drain to out our house, they are good job, but they asked us to pay for this before work is done. I was OK with the payment before they finished, but they did not say when the excavator people come, he said maybe this afternoon or tomorrow morning.
Excavators came in next morning and worked to install the drain, but they did not finish the job, and we got complaints from neighborhood. Here is the picture they done.
After they work done, they notice they should work more correctly, and they contacted us.
On Friday, 12/19/25. 11:39 am. we had a phone call and conversation with plumber that he worked our hot water leak, and at that time he said excavator people come Saturday, but he did not mention what time, and he said he will find out what time they come in Saturday. But I have not received the update about what time excavator people come in Saturday.
On Saturday, 12/20/25. 8:47 am. He called me and excavator people will be there, but we were not home because he did not update what time excavate people came on Saturday.
Plumber said we will come Tuesday, Not Monday. We have nothing to do to fix or figure it out for our possible leak more than 1,696 gallons...that we received the Irregular water usage from City...

reviews.author: Melody McGee
reviews.text:
Last night around 6 PM, a pipe burst under our kitchen sink. We called Roto-Rooter, and they assured us someone would be out as soon as possible. Ken, the water damage field supervisor, showed up quickly, assessed the issue, and thankfully confirmed that our water damage was minimal. He was very professional and upfront that it might be a few hours before a plumber could come since they were handling some big jobs.

Around 9 PM, the home office called to let us know the earliest available appointment would be first thing in the morning, and they even offered a discount for the inconvenience — which we really appreciated.

Robert arrived promptly this morning, was super knowledgeable, and explained all our options clearly. He worked efficiently, and our sink is now back to normal!

We’re giving 4 stars only because we had to wait until the next day for the repair, but overall, the experience was great. The team was professional, reliable, and took good care of us. We’d definitely recommend Roto-Rooter!

reviews.author: Logan R
reviews.text: Called for an emergency issue and crazy enough Steven can out to help. I’ve worked with him before at another location and was more than pleased with the service he provided. They were able to come out and resolve our issue quickly (1-1.5hrs) and they even sent out a camera technician to verify the issue was resolved and to give an inspection of the plumbing system all included. If you find yourself in a plumbing emergency give them a call.

reviews.author: Taylor Maxwell
reviews.text: Roto-Rooter was great! We had a bit of an emergency and they were here within an hour on a Saturday night. Mason was very knowledgeable and handled everything efficiently and professionally. They will be our choice anytime we have a plumbing issue.

reviews.author: Chris Russell
reviews.text:
Steven did an outstanding job clearing a very stubborn kitchen sewer blockage. He showed up on time, diagnosed the issue quickly, and explained everything clearly before getting to work. What really stood out was his persistence—this wasn’t an easy clog, but he stayed with it until the line was fully cleared and flowing perfectly again.

His professionalism, skill, and respect for my home were top‑notch. If you need a plumber who knows what he’s doing and takes pride in doing the job right, Steven is the one to call. Highly recommended.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 7800 W Jewell Ave Unit G, Lakewood, CO 80227, USA

reviews.author: Ben Hale
reviews.text: We had sewage backing up into our basement shower and overflow drain in our HVAC room. We called Roto Rooter and they were able to send someone out within one hour of calling. The tech, Dakota, was great! He was very knowledgeable and willing to explain everything that he was going to do. He spent several hours at our house making sure he thoroughly cleaned out our sewer pipes. A supervisor, Mike, also came and did a free video walk through of our pipes to help identify other problem areas. Dakota even came back a couple days later to fix a small leak in our clean out access point. I would highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Mile High Shade
reviews.text: We noticed last night that our downstairs toilet was starting to leak around the base and so we immediately looked into getting someone out to take a look. Booking the appointment was quick and easy, and Stephan showed up exactly on time the next morning ready to help us out. He was open with his communication, letting us know there were a few options that might work and helping us choose where we wanted to start. When the first option didn’t fix the problem, he was upfront and honest with next steps. We chose to do a full main drain snake and he got it done promptly and efficiently! He explained his process and what the problem was afterwards so we knew what to look out for in the future! All in all a great experience and we highly recommend Roto-Rooter and especially Stephan for any drain and plumbing needs

reviews.author: Joy Headrick
reviews.text: My main floor drain was clogged and while doing wash overflowed in bathroom and basement. Christopher from Roto Rooter was amazing and always cheerful and hard working. They came out in the evening and worked till 7:30pm getting it open. He was positive and made me feel like no worries. He was confident and thorough.  I would always ask for Christopher again.  Thank you, I am so happy and relieved. I would give 6 stars if I could. :-)

reviews.author: LoriLeah Gulzow
reviews.text: I have used many "big" plumbing companies.   The orange trucks, the black cowboy trucks, the red, white and blue trucks.  I swore I'd only use mom and pop again.   But they don't do emergencies.   Roto-rooter came out in hours and ant 10 pm fixed the clog.  A bit expensive but Saturday night emergencies are.  Then I expected as the others did the upsale.   The we can't promise unless we do 20 thousand dollars more work.  Roto-rooter didn't.   They made suggestions and also gave options.   And still warranted the work.    Everything is fine and I will follow their suggestions

reviews.author: Anne Marie Disney
reviews.text: Dakota was great. Very efficient and kind and walked me through everything giving good suggestions. Very knowledgeable

plumbers.name: Elek Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2186 Community Dr, Bath, PA 18014, USA

reviews.author: Erik Derbak
reviews.text: Amazing experience.  Elvis was extremely professional and explained everything that he was doing along the way.  I am amazed that I called at 1:00 today, Elvis was on site by 2:30 and my leaking hot water heater was replaced and running perfectly by 6:00.  You have new customer for life.  Well done.  Thank you.

reviews.author: Mark & Daune Wilson
reviews.text: Outstanding fast,, polite and fair service. 4th I have used Elek Plumbing and they are wonderful.  Orion was my technician today and he was quick but also made sure that the next step that I need done was addressed.

reviews.author: Katelyn McMurtrie
reviews.text: I recently had a frozen pipe burst in my house. I called Elek plumbing and Elvis came out to my house and was extremely professional and friendly. He explained the problem that caused the pipe to break as well as explained everything he was going to do. He replaced all the pipes in the area of the outside hose bib as they were old and likely to fail as did the pipe that already burst. As well as installing a new shut off valve and frost free pressure releasing hose faucet to help prevent this from happening again. Once he was done, he did a walk through with me of all the work he completed as well as show me the piping that he took out of the wall and showed me exactly where all the faulty solder joints were. He even called me after he left to ensure that I had a space heater set up to ensure that the pipe didn’t freeze again while I waited for my wall and insulation to be repaired. He was fast, efficient and, friendly. I am super appreciative of Elvis and Elek as they helped me during this time and will definitively be using them in the future. I recommend Elek to anyone that needs emergency or non-emergency plumbing work.

reviews.author: Erin Goga
reviews.text:
I’ll try to keep this review short although I could easily write pages of positivity and accolades. I’m currently at a friend’s home recovering from a serious femur fracture.  My house sitter called to let me know that all drains in the house were clogging and the toilet would not flush.  I called Elek (now my “go to” plumbing company)and they promptly sent Jody to check out the issues.  She found the problems and while on FaceTime, clearly explained everything to me along with solutions.  Some relatively simple fixes and others a bit more time consuming.  Both the toilet, bathroom sink and kitchen sink have had off and on problems for at least 18 years with quick fixes by other companies that did not last.  Finally Jody solved the mystery!  Knowing my situation (needing to use a walker and cane)she suggested a comfort height toilet (which I’ve never heard of), and to replace my non-working garbage disposal which was a big reason my kitchen sink drain never fully drained.  Jody was patient with me and helped me to choose the toilet and disposal from afar.  Within days she was back to install the toilet (it arrived from a big box store cracked) so she took care of that calmly and went and got another toilet from Elek’s warehouse with the same specs the same day! All sinks and a new toilet running well!  Talk about above and beyond!!! Her kindness, knowledge, ability to think on her feet, and patience were a gift during a difficult time in my life.  Thank you Jody and the staff at Elek as well.
Erin Goga

reviews.author: Mysterioso77
reviews.text:
I recently spent time with Jody and orion while they were here to do a plumbing job and installed a new toilet.
They were very prompt, polite and extremely efficient.
This was my first experience with Elek Plumbing and I would definitely recommend them for any plumbing job.
Excellent Job!!      Thank you!

plumbers.name: Champion Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2350 S Midwest Blvd Suite 4, Midwest City, OK 73110, USA

reviews.author: Harry Xie
reviews.text: The quote estimated is reasonable, honest and professional. Most importance is sent all the plumbers are professional, responsible, friendly and enthusiastic. As your customer  I am very satisfied you plumbers job. They are all excellent. I’m going to count on your company as our plumbing doctor forever for all my properties. Besides, I definitely will refer you Champion Plumbing to all my friends whenever they have plumbing problems. Thanks again for all the jobs Thomas, Steve and Eric did for me.

reviews.author: Shawni Williams
reviews.text: Thomas was respectful, and very diligent! You rarely see that anymore! Reminded me of older men in my family, not afraid of hard work, never complained and was very quiet and quick! I was sick, and they got the work done, quietly, efficiently and quick so I could rest, also, i was comfortable leaving Thomas to deal with it, I actually fell asleep! It felt like family, comfortable. Im very peticular, and can be very critical, i also value quality and customer service, greatly. If someone is even a little rude, im not using that company again. But Thomas was great, I'm a champion customer for life!

reviews.author: Adam G
reviews.text: Champion Plumbing has been great. We initially had them out to fix a running roilet, and ended up using them to fix our water pressure issue and clean our tankless heater as well. Thomas is friendly and kept me in the loop on what was being done as he did it. We'll continue working with these guys in the future.

reviews.author: Matthew Puckett
reviews.text: It's never fun to have a plumbing leak. Thankfully, Thomas with Champion Plumbing was my technician. He was prompt, courteous, and extremely experienced. My problem arose from the rushed work of a previous company/ individual. Thomas diagnosed the problem quickly and effectively. He took the time to educate me and explain his work. Thomas went above and beyond, where others failed.  Thank you for your professionalism and character Thomas. Have a blessed day. Sincerely Matthew.

reviews.author: Michael McFarland
reviews.text:
Thomas came out and got us all taken care of!  We had a shower that wasn’t getting hot and a main boiler that was leaking so much water our walls were soaking it up.

I called Champion Plumbing and they were out the next day.  They might not be the least expensive but the service, professionalism and guarantee they provide definitely makes me feel better.

plumbers.name: Johnny Doan Plumbing
plumbers.address: 301 US-92, Seffner, FL 33584, USA

reviews.author: LA
reviews.text: Lance did a a fantastic job installing my new dishwasher. The installer from the big box store wouldn’t install it and said if he did, it would stick out 5 to 7 inches into my kitchen. Lance was able to reroute the drain line and install with no problem. This is third time I have used Johnny Doan Plumbing, and each time I have been impressed with their timelines, professionalism, communication, and pricing. They recently re-plumbed my entire home. It took Jake and team less than 6 hours and everything turned out great. The city inspector was extremely happy with their work. There estimate also included patching the drywall, which Conner did an awesome job. I couldn’t be happier with the services provided by them.

reviews.author: Amber LaHue
reviews.text: We have used Johnny Doan several times over the past year for plumbing issues we've had at two separate properties. We've had very good service on each occasion. Their communication over the phone and via email is professional, yet friendly and helpful. They always let you know ahead of time who your plumber will be so you know who to expect. Most recently, Jesse was our plumber. He showed up on time, was able to diagnose the issue, and then repair it in a reasonable amount of time. Based on our experiences with them, I would recommend Johnny Doan Plumbing.

reviews.author: Nicolle Meeke
reviews.text:
We had an incredible experience with Lance from Johnny Doan Plumbing during what was easily the coldest weekend in Tampa. After dealing with a stressful, weekend‑long main valve leak, Lance truly saved the day. Even though we were exhausted and frantic, Lance’s professionalism and calm, understanding demeanor immediately put us at ease.
He clearly explained the repairs needed, broke down the costs with complete transparency, and worked through the cold without hesitation to make sure the fix would last for decades. He showed up quickly on
Monday—and his service was not only reliable but also affordable.
Thanks to Lance, we now have peace of mind and a new go‑to plumber. Absolutely 5 stars!

reviews.author: 2015 Stronger
reviews.text:
Another good repair today by Sam, he was able to take care of a leak in the main line and now I don't have to worry about it.

Jordan, Jesse, Jake and Emily are all awesome and they take care of issues fast. Just got another irrigation meter connected today. Can't wait to use it.

I have so many great experiences, everyone is great at what they do! Water meter connection, water softener, clogging, etc. They do it all

Very professional and highly recommended! Jake was great and professional, this is the best experience I've ever had!

Awesome service again!

reviews.author: Deborah Bunton
reviews.text:
Johnny Doan Plumbing had Jesse Brown to come to our house this morning for a service call. Mr.Brown was very professional and took care of our issue in a timely manner. I highly recommend Johnny Doan Plumbing for all of your plumbing needs.

We also had the company do a repipe several months ago and their service was excellent!!

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing of Prescott
plumbers.address: 6741 Corsair Ave, Prescott, AZ 86301, USA

reviews.author: The Pupp
reviews.text: Aaron was friendly and did most of the work in a short period of time.  He forgot to return to finish the job so I had to call four times. He came out and apologized as he forgot to finish the small job.  No biggie to me. What I was upset was the cost of $2K. It was excessive for the job.  I had surgery on right hand so I couldn’t do it. Aaron dug a few feet down reattach the flipper and install a new tube. Being retired with limited income the price was too high for the job. the only new parts was the 40 gage tube and cap which was about $25. The flipper was not replaced but reattached. I feel you folks could do better by not charging a high price for the type of job. The $538 to come out would have been the price to pay. The back up problem was the back flow flipper came off and cause the stop of the flow. Once it was moved the water flowed away. Other suggestions came with a price tag of $4K the back flow value was already installed. Like I said the cost was way too much.  Aaron was good doing his job.  I’m just angry at the price.

reviews.author: Paula McCoy
reviews.text:
Aaron arrived on time, he is very courteous and respectful of my home.
He worked quickly and efficiently.
He went the extra mile to assure I was taken care of.
I plan to have another ADA toilet installed after the first of the year.

I will ask that Aaron is my service technician.

reviews.author: Sydney Harrington
reviews.text:
Tom came back to check on previous employees failure to clean out tree roots. Previous employee used an electric snake, like the one we own, it got out of hand and he broke sewer line and water line, all he did was punch a hole thru toilet paper which it allowed to flush thru 2 guests in my Airbnb. When Tom came  you could tell he did not want to deal with the situation as telling my husband and I if he used his tool it would break our pipes. He never took a camera to look at the issue,  as we explained my husband and I had separated the pipes and had taken our camera to look into the issue, we had previously taken off the toilet( we are in our 70’s and my husband had a stroke wheelchair bound) Tom told us to get someone who does hydro jetting( which can breaks pipes too
Tom went back to office stated I wouldn’t let him cut pipes or take off the toilet never said such a thing. I am currently waiting for supervisor to call as I want a full refund($754).

reviews.author: Louis Ingutti
reviews.text:
The Plumber/Technician, Andrew Korland,  was friendly and professional. He listened well and added his thoughts & experience to what our plumbing situation was. He also was creative in his approach on what direction we should go in order to save money and be more efficient therefore satisfied with the job overall. Bottomline, a good ambassador for your Company!
The 2nd visit to do the install when OK but we had a few unexpected glitches that took place. It wasn’t a good experience but Andrew tried to his best to make amends to make it right. A few things could have been improved but sometimes unforeseen issues do come up. Andrew will make a follow-up visit on 3/2 to check everything out to make sure it’s to our satisfaction. Thank you!

reviews.author: Chris Mattson
reviews.text: Had an emergency. My septic tank drain from the house was clogged. Tom was great. Very professional and thorough. He diagnosed the problem quickly. Unfortunately it was more involved than just a simple unclogging and he explained the next steps to take for me to get the ball rolling on fixing it. I was impressed with Tom and the Benjamin Franklin company and will recommend you guys in the future

plumbers.name: Fly Plumbing & HVAC
plumbers.address: 584 Chaddick Dr, Wheeling, IL 60090, USA

reviews.author: Catherine Ortiz
reviews.text:
Great service. Respectful to our property and cleaned up after work was completed.
We needed an outdoor spigot replaced and they recommended an anti-freeze spigot which I had no idea was an option.
They send us pics of the completed job and accommodated a service latch.
Shawn did a great job. This is our second time using their services and they do not disappoint. I recommend Fly Plumbing.

reviews.author: Michael Hansen
reviews.text: A very positive experience with Fly Plumbing. The company is always very responsive and goes above & beyond. I had a back up in my basement on a Sunday evening. I was able to easily reach them and set up a next day appointment (they had offered same day service, but the water had gone down). I requested Adrian (he had been out before) and they accommodated my request without issue. Adrian and Ben came out and addressed the issue. They were communicative, knowledgeable, kind and attentive. They remedied my issue & left my home clean. I highly recommend Adrian, Ben & Fly Plumbing!

reviews.author: Courtney Biewald
reviews.text: Miguel and Adrian were amazing. They really helped explain the process of everything they did and tips for the future. I will 100% be a returning customer and will be recommending them to everyone in the area! Thank you again! Excellent service.

reviews.author: yaakov sugarman
reviews.text: Adrian was amazing! He was very thorough and a pleasure to work with. He explained everything clearly, and I would definitely use him again.

reviews.author: Manny Arenivas
reviews.text: Got some work done on a few drains in my basement that were overflowing. Mikhail and Mickey did a great job getting everything sealed and cleaned. Very polite, friendly, and efficient. I will only go with this crew for any job moving forward. 5 stars.

plumbers.name: Backup Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2121 Spencer Ct Unit 5, La Grange, KY 40031, USA

reviews.author: Chuck Norris
reviews.text: We have used backup plumbing for all of our needs. We have used them for small bathroom install, all the way up to larger remodel. You call them and talk to a human being. They have excellent customer service. I have not had to wait for a plumber. They give accurate estimates. And they back their work up. Not everyone takes pride in their work these days like backup plumbing does. Due to their reliable/time tested excellent work, backup will remain our preferred plumbing service and first recommendation.

reviews.author: Tremors Coffee
reviews.text: Josh and team did a great job installing our tankless  water heater.  He was here all day and stayed to make sure we had hot water.  It was so cold out too when making the exhaust vents.  He was a troooer and did a great job.  Endless hot water woohoo!

reviews.author: Brad Ott
reviews.text: Josh provided truly outstanding service. His professionalism was exceptional.  He accurately diagnosed and resolved our issue. The entire process was smooth and efficient, and he made it easy to add an additional service without any hassle. We greatly appreciate his expertise and customer-focused approach.

reviews.author: Giselle Sada
reviews.text: Eric was genuine, kind, and made me feel at ease. Sometimes a new person coming to your home can feel awkward but I didn’t feel that way at all. He fixed a part under our kitchen sink and flushed out our hot water heater. He did a great job and I am grateful to him.

reviews.author: Ashley Uber
reviews.text: They came out quickly when I called and were able to fix everything and install new toilets same day! They explained the process and the costs very clearly. I would definitely use their services again and highly recommend them.

plumbers.name: Agentis Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2678 Butztown Rd, Bethlehem, PA 18017, USA

reviews.author: Austin Kobordo
reviews.text: Tyler and Zach did a phenomenal job at my place. Very knowledgable.  I called around 12 PM on a Friday and they were at my door within an hour. I had two clogs one in my main line and one in my drain leaving the kitchen. They came in with a camera and a snake and got it done in just a few hours. They even refitted my trap under my laundry sink that had a minor leak. And replaced a plug on my sewer for easy access.  It was also a very reasonable price. Thank you Agentis for the great service!

reviews.author: Judith Malitsch
reviews.text:
Agentis plumbers are always courteous, pleasant, professional and respectful! Jake and Norbert this time, (and Jack last visit), were patient with all my questions  and    were great at explaining thoroughly what was being done. And Jake immediately emailed the bill to me so I didn't have to call.
Great clean-up, too! Nothing left behind!

Always a pleasure dealing with Agentis plumbing, a most reliable business!

reviews.author: Alan Allegra
reviews.text: Our appointment was for late afternoon or the next day, but Patrick showed up not long after we called, to unclog our tub drain. He worked hard but had to call in their drain expert, and they were able to clear an extremely stubborn clog that even chemicals could not clear. They were very polite, professional, and careful to keep our home clean and sanitary. We have been trusting Agentis for decades. They give you an estimate up front and prices are reasonable, including appropriate discounts.

reviews.author: Patricia Mangiaruga
reviews.text: We had Joseph and his partner come to our son’s house at 2819 Willow St. yesterday to replace a toilet. It wasn’t an easy job as it was built on concrete with a metal plate put on top. They did a phenomenal job putting the toilet in and made sure it was a secure fit. We are extremely happy with them and their work. They were very professional and friendly. From this experience, I will be using Agentis for all our plumbing needs. They are a great asset to the company!

reviews.author: Chris V
reviews.text: We had issues with a backup from our kitchen sink leading to a clog in our basement sink. Our technician Luke was extremely knowledgeable and was able to fix the problem immediately. Luke and the Agentis team were very reassuring and responsive. Highly recommend!

plumbers.name: Heil Plumbing & HVAC
plumbers.address: 1162 Taft St, Rockville, MD 20850, USA

reviews.author: Troy Wheeler
reviews.text: Otto and his crew were very professional, respectful, timely, and efficient. Otto explained the entire main waterline replacement before they started and stuck to that process. Their process was very minimally invasive with only needing to dig a single hole to replace 30 feet plus of copper water line. It took them a single day for the entire process and the following day was the City of Rockville's inspection. These guys are great!

reviews.author: Mr. Wang
reviews.text: As a GC building my own house, I’ve worked with many contractors, and the technicians from Heil Plumbing are among the best I’ve seen. The lead technician, John, demonstrated extensive knowledge and was very patient in answering all of my questions. I will definitely use Heil Plumbing again in the future and highly recommend them to anyone needing plumbing services.

reviews.author: Phil Sandick
reviews.text: Erik Young did an expert job at replacing our water heater. The job was done carefully and quickly, and he went through our options and answered all of our questions prior to purchase and install. Same-day service, and the new water heater has been working perfectly for the last few months. Highly recommend Erik and would definitely call Heil Plumbing again.

reviews.author: Eugene Kovin
reviews.text: We had great experience with Heil Plumbing . We were dealing with a major sewage backup that other plumbers simply couldn’t fix. Damontae Tuck from Heil Plumbing diagnosed the issue perfectly. He went above and beyond, cleaning pipes in areas the previous companies completely overlooked. The problem is finally solved! After finishing the job, Damontae took the time to explain which maintenance chemicals to use to prevent this from happening again. We definitely recommend Heil Plumbing for their expertise and thoroughness.

reviews.author: Yashar Norhashemi
reviews.text: I was smelling gas under my stove and my water heater was not working. Israel answered my call and helped get a technician out right away all while being polite and professional. Jeffrey showed up first thing in the morning of the scheduled service day with a smile and eagerness to fix the issues. He took the time to explain the issues I was having while pointing out some other possible issues I might have in the future and to keep an eye on them. He was professional, courteous, knowledgeable, and genuinely nice person. I appreciate Heil Plumbing & HVAC dedication and expertise all the way from the initial phone call through the service with the tech. I highly recommend this company and their hardworking team.

plumbers.name: J Rowe Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3600 W Pioneer Pkwy STE 12, Arlington, TX 76013, USA

reviews.author: Michael Guzman
reviews.text: Yesterday I saw a plumbing truck 2 houses down and went over and asked the gentleman if he had a card and took the time while working on the other house to ask me some qualifying questions about my issue. The fact he was on another site and didn’t pass me off to just call was impressive and really showed me he takes pride in his job and customers who need help. Told me to call the number and ask for the co-owner Jesse Morales.  I called the number and I think the person who answered the call was Jenny (if I am wrong let me know and I will correct). They worked to try and schedule me that day but had to come the following morning between 8am-10am. Showed up on time and even received a text indicating who would be there and they were on their way with a picture of the worker. Fixed our issue within a few hours perfectly, offered a referral for the flooring issue due to the flooding and is sending an estimate for another issue I will need fixed. I cannot express my gratitude other than letting anyone know who needs plumbing work done these are the ones to call!

reviews.author: Kathy Jones
reviews.text: I called J Rowe Plumbing for a hot water leak i had.  They were so prompt, so professional and located the problem pretty quickly.  They were fair, fixed my leak issue and did NOT take advantage of me financially.  They came in with a good fix at a reasonable price.  I was so stressed but Myles was a calming influence and knows his stuff!  Thank you!

reviews.author: Warren Ehn
reviews.text: Wow! Myles and Dalton did a great job! Courteous and professional. They diagnosed the problem causing the leak under our sink and fixed it immediately. Dalton did a courtesy check of the plumbing in the rest of the house as well. Myles made excellent suggestions for future replacement/upgrading of our hot water heater and water pressure regulator. The visit was 45 minutes long and the only charge was for the service call. Fantastic service! This was our third time using J Rowe Plumbing and we will be repeat customers.

reviews.author: Heather Wegener
reviews.text: We’ve called J Rowe on several occasions and they have always exceeded expectations. Jamey is awesome; professional, courteous, and knowledgeable. We have found them to be very efficient and honest. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Lisa White
reviews.text: The Plumber was attentive and explained the process thoroughly. He and his crew were prompt and finished the job in the timeframe he stated. Their work was timely and efficient and they completed the job in one day. He found the leak and got it repaired and floors patched back up all in one day.  Phil was awesome and this great service has earned J Rowe Plumbing a permanent customer for my future needs. I would definitely refer Phil and his team!

plumbers.name: MAS Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 81 Monaco Dr, Roselle, IL 60172, USA

reviews.author: Diana Branca
