reviews.text: I really appreciated Mas plumbing schedule my appointment for the very nice day. Everyone is very nice and friendly tackling the plumbing problem as soon as possible. Matt did an excellent job replacing the wax ring and bolting down the toilet. He was very neat and cleaned up afterwards. I highly recommend Mas Plumping. Thank you for a job swiftly done so my family could use our guest bathroom again. Diana

reviews.author: Charles Auriemma
reviews.text: Ron you guys took my calll of a leaking pipe from the main water and despatch response was fast Jason tackled the pipe review the job as he was driving to the job and cap the pipe review and we had service in the apartment in a few hours I always call this company never had a guys that ever ran into any problem they no what they doing screw the price it’s a peace of mine it’s fix right( then about I think I get a break my hot water tank started to leak at my house as soon as I call  in a half hour window they had a new tank on to the job site as Eric was installing he found a pipe that any time it would of started a leak maybe not that day but one day if I’m not home owners nightmare great company  f the money sleep easy no worries

reviews.author: Elisabeth Arnold
reviews.text:
We used this plumbing service based on a recommendation from a friend and had a great experience from start to finish. They were extremely responsive, prompt, and came out to our house quickly to resolve the issue we were dealing with.

Our technician, Carl, was especially impressive. He was very knowledgeable, clearly experienced, and took the time to explain what was going on and how it was being fixed. His professionalism and skill really stood out during a stressful situation.

We’re very thankful for the service we received and will absolutely be calling them again in the future. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: David p
reviews.text:
My hot water heater went out yesterday.

Neil and Matt were great!

Made the process very easy and this morning got me back up and running!

Old unit and new one pictured!

I would highly recommend MAS!

reviews.author: Sean York
reviews.text:
I have nothing but good things to say about MAS plumbing. My initial call was after work, for a slow drain on my kitchen sink, I had a little bit of a slow drain throughout the week, and I thought I had time before things totally clogged up, so I scheduled my visit for the weekend (WEEKEND AVAILABILITY IS SUCH A HARD THING TO FIND). I was told that MAS could have someone come out and perform an inspection and I signed up. I tried to see if I could fix the issue myself using a hand crank drain snake, and I wasn't getting anywhere. Low and behold, later that night my sink and dishwasher totally backed up, and I knew I needed help ASAP.

I called MAS the same day at 9 p.m. and got a hold of their afterhours answering service, who let me know they would forward my call to the office to be addressed the next day. To my surprise, Carl called me back the same night! He offered to come out at 9 p.m. but let me know that since it wasn't really an emergency, he'd recommend that I just wait until the next day. He let me know that they could definitely get me in for the next day, and that he would probably be the one to come out and assist.

Without Carl I wouldn't have been able to sleep, just getting a call back from Carl letting me know that MAS plumbing could be out the next day helped me rest easy.

Carl came out the next day, and KILLED IT. Super kind, professional, skilled and also charismatic. He got the pro-sized snake out and got the job done in less than a couple hours. I could tell he really cared about the client experience, and he was super focused on getting the job done. Carl also went above and beyond and took a look at my drain line set-up so that I could ensure that it was pitched correctly.

I can't recommend MAS enough. The customer service was excellent from start to slightly panicked late-night moment, all the way to when Carl came and won me over as a client for likely the rest of my time in this house.

I'm so happy I found this Company, and Carl made me a client of MAS for life!

Thanks again, Carl and MAS!

plumbers.name: Amped Plumbing Heating Air Conditioning and Security
plumbers.address: 4205 N MacArthur Blvd, Warr Acres, OK 73122, USA

reviews.author: Deborah
reviews.text: They are very professional.  Their work is exemplary and they have great customer service with constant communication during the process.  They pay close attention to every detail to ensure the work is exceptional!  We had new water lines installed, broken pipe repaired, and new drain line to sewer line. It was completed in a timely manner and again exceptional work!  On a personal note, i have 2 adult children with challenges that live at home with me.  My son wants to be very involved and has many questions.  Ashton Norton, Joshua Smith and every other employee, including the owner, Joe Norton that came to work at our home was very accommodating, answering questions, staying engaged and made him feel very important in the process.  I’m very grateful!!  Highly recommend Amped!!

reviews.author: Alex Hofbauer
reviews.text: I had Korey come over to give a quote on 3 cameras and a video doorbell.  The price was in line with what I was expecting and less expensive than the other two quotes I received.  Overall, the installation was relatively easy, except for one camera that Korey was determined to hardwire to avoid using a WiFi camera.  He got the job done and the install was clean with the more reliable wired camera. I appreciated his hard work and would recommend Amped to others looking for security systems.

reviews.author: Ashley Burns
reviews.text:
Thank you to Amped pluming for all of their help. Thank you to Zeke for coming out and giving us an accurate estimate that Amped stuck to. Thank you to Dakota Elmore and Dakota Boyd for coming and doing the work. They worked very clean and did minimal damage to our walls to get in and repair the leak. They also were very polite and explained everything that was going on as they did the fix.
When Zeke gave us our quote he also gave us a quote for getting our whole house plumbing done and once we get to a point that we can do that. We will definitely be going with them for that process.

reviews.author: Alan Wattenbarger
reviews.text: The crew at AMPED replaced my old cast iron sewer lines with PVC. They replaced the main sewer line under the slab and did a kitchen and laundry drain reroute. They did an amazing job!  They were very careful and methodical through the whole process!  It was a lengthy repair and pretty invasive to say the least but there is no way around that.  If you have cast iron sewer pipes, do not take shortcuts that other companies offer.  DO NOT do CIP pipe lining!  Just do old fashioned replacement.  You will sleep better at night knowing you have brand new sewer pipes and not a bandaid.  AMPED did a very pfofessional job and I am very happy with the work they did.  They are honest and dependable.  They keep you in the loop the entire way and the financing options they offer make the repair less scary.  Take a bow AMPED, you guys are awesome!

reviews.author: Joe Meyer
reviews.text:
Totally recommend this company! They had a technician at my house within 30 minutes after my initial call. Technician Byron is the best! He is so respectful and knowledgeable.  Byron diagnosed the problems quickly and fixed it right the first time. Not only did he fix our problems, but he also took the time to walk me through preventative measures for the future.

The service was professional, courteous, and transparent regarding pricing. If you want great work done right, call this company!

plumbers.name: Roger’s Plumbing
plumbers.address: 7696 183A Toll Rd #4B, Leander, TX 78641, USA

reviews.author: Rick RRTEXAS
reviews.text:
We had a water leak somewhere as our bill kept getting higher till it  tripled and we called Roger's plumbing.  They were very thorough in finding it I n slab. NOT what we wanted for a quick fix, but the quoted a fair price to repair and backed it up with a good warranty.
They had to replumb the whole house so floors didn't have to be jackhammered and flooring ripped up and replaced. Very good job by Eddie and apprentice Sean. They covered holes needed to access plumbing nightly.
So far we are happy, no leaks and inspection passed.

reviews.author: Michael Landry
reviews.text:
My daughter recently purchased a house with a possible slab leak that was noticed during the inspection. We called Roger's Plumbing and Marc came out to assess and give us a possible budget to work from. We negotiated the price and after purchased, contacted Marc for repair. He and his helper came out and found the leak was in the slab within 2 hours. A reroute plan for the waterline was initiated and all work completed that afternoon. They were very thorough in their work and kept the job site orderly while working. When they left you could barely tell they had dug 22 ft of new line for the reroute of the line.
I would highly recommend Roger's Plumbing for any future Plumbing repairs you may have.

reviews.author: Lou Sigety
reviews.text: Third time using Roger's Plumbing and all experiences were very good although a bit pricey. However sometimes more work is required than one would think and that seemingly pricey quote covers the unexpected.  This last time Orlando did a fantastic job installing a seemingly simple RO system and ran into some unexpected issues. He spent the time to get the correct parts and did a great job with the install. He was prompt and very professional - highly recommended.

reviews.author: Marcia Rhodes-Tyler
reviews.text: Orlando was amazing from the moment he arrived until the moment he left. He was kind, patient, and incredibly informative the entire time. It’s rare to experience this level of service these days. Thank you for genuinely caring and for taking the time to walk us through the whole process. We highly recommend using Roger’s Plumbing!

reviews.author: Sherry Todd
reviews.text: Jaskson was great!  He was polite and respectful.  He told me what he was doing each step of the way, asked my opinion and gave me options.  He left my bathroom really clean, much better than he found it.  He even brought in packages that were sitting on my front porch.  She went above and beyond.  I will definitely call Roger’s Plumbing next time, like I have for many years.

plumbers.name: Black Diamond Experts, Electric, Plumbing, HVAC
plumbers.address: 1525 W 400 S, Orem, UT 84058, USA

reviews.author: Bob McCann
reviews.text:
Great experience all around. The initial technician they sent out was outstanding. Your the best, Jose!

He not only diagnosed our immediate issue, he also advised us about the condition/potential issues with all of the components (it's an old furnace).

He took the time to lay out several repair options, from just fixing our immediate problem through several different price options to repair/replace some or all of the other issues.

We ultimately decided to have Black Diamond install a whole new furnace due to age/overall condition, but the detailed breakdown of *all* of the options and their (very reasonable) prices was very much appreciated in helping us make the best decision for our home.

reviews.author: Melanie Christensen
reviews.text:
Bryan and Zack came over first and evaluated our problem with many plugs in the attic area that needed a safer solution. They returned two days later with extra safety plug in areas with GFI.  They also gave it their own master switch in the box.
Thx guy!! Y’all are awesome!
Melanie C

reviews.author: William Martin
reviews.text:
We have had a great experience from Kris who came out to clean out backed up line then Alan who came back with Kris to run ecamera and show us the problem and quote what it would take cost and time wise to our Lead installer with Matt and Riley as his helpers. Mike keep us informed and their scheduler keep us informed and we got the job done in 3 days. Just waiting for asphalt to be patched and we will be done. Great job Black Diamond, we used them on an electrical project before and everything went just as smooth
Thanks Bill Martin

reviews.author: Michael Johnson
reviews.text: Todd and Joe repaired a shorted neutral and added a 220v circuit in our garage. They were thorough, careful, and kept me in the loop throughout the work. Joe did the diagnostic work on the fist visit, and Todd and Joe wrapped everything up in an afternoon just a few days after my first call.

reviews.author: Carissa Dib
reviews.text: This company has the best employees!  Brad was on time, professional, kind, answered my questions, explained everything well, and gave price quotes for possible changes.  The membership is well worth it.

plumbers.name: Gold Star Plumbing & Drain
plumbers.address: 8737 Florentine Rd, Prescott Valley, AZ 86314, USA

reviews.author: Aadam Lamb
reviews.text: Clay Komos did an amazing job at diagnosing and repairing our circulator pump for our home water system. Once we received the parts needed for the repair, Clay was able to able to schedule the installation within two business days. He was knowledgeable and explained what the issues were with our old circulator pump. He was also very friendly with me and my kiddos! Would highly recommend Gold Star Plumbing!

reviews.author: J Ferris
reviews.text:
Great experience all the way around. The guys that came out were fantastic; professional, friendly and knowledgeable. The job entailed cutting into our foundation slab and repairing a leaking waterline. Price was reasonable and they started the very next day. Very pleased and will use this company for any future plumbing needs I can’t handle myself.
Great job Gold Star Plumbing!

reviews.author: Angie D in AZ
reviews.text:
Outstanding Service from Start to Finish!

This was my first time needing to call a plumber in many, many years, and I was pretty panicked after my pest control company found standing water in my crawl space. I contacted Gold Star, and they were able to come out the very next day (yesterday).

Michael and Andrew arrived and were absolutely incredible—thorough, polite, informative, and truly ROCK STARS. They walked me through everything, explained what they were seeing, and shared tips I know I’ll appreciate if anything ever comes up again.

They completed a full inspection, offered clear recommendations, and thankfully confirmed that the issue was minor and completely fixable. They genuinely put my mind at ease, and I slept peacefully last night because of them.

I’ve already told my family about Gold Star and will gladly recommend them to anyone who needs plumbing help. Their number is now saved in my phone, and they will be my first call if I ever need service again.

THANK YOU SO MUCH, Gold Star! 🌟

reviews.author: Fred Kennedy
reviews.text:
After an experience with a local plumber who couldn’t resolve an emergency that stopped us from using water or sewer in our apartment complex, inconveniencing, both, us and our tenants…we went without water and sewer from seven o’clock that morning until the following day!!! We called Gold Star the evening of the first day and immediately spoke with Ann who understood our issues completely! She scheduled us for an assessment the following morning, with actual repairs scheduled for that afternoon. On the morning of the assessment, Clay, the technician, called me before eight o’clock an said he would see me shortly, he was expedient and reflected a high level of professionalism, warmth (especially on an extremely cold an wet day), and understanding!!! From the moment he introduced himself, explained the process, provided an estimate for the possible repair, and product knowledge, we were amazingly impressed! Upon his initial inspection, Clay, also, answered all of our questions intelligently, helping us understand a variety of issues we had been dealing with. At that point, we decided to do a more thorough investigation and repair, which he said he could start immediately!!! We were ecstatic!!! Upon approval of the new estimate, he began an extremely detailed assessment using a camera and an iPad to reflect the condition of our downline, the exact location of the blockage, and the condition of our sewer-line. We were impressed by Clay’s explanation of what needed to be done, both, short-term and long term! After the explanation, he began hydro-jetting our downline, our upline, and all seven roof vents on our property, including our waste-line on our kitchen sink!!! He cleared all invasive roots, cleaned and flushed all lines, removed all blockages and then videoed the mainline. He went on to show us how thorough his expertise and equipment had left our system in pristine condition!!! He then inspected the property, put away his tools, secured all of his equipment, cleaned up all work areas completely, and walked the area with us explaining the work that had been completed. He discussed future issues needing attention, and the level and quality of repair that could be done!!! Again, we were impressed and extremely comfortable with the absolute quality and outcome Clay exhibited throughout the day until the job was done!!!
We anyone could leap tall buildings, walk on water, and be faster than a speeding bullet, both, Clay and Gold Star would fit the description!!!
Thank you Clay and thank you Gold Star!!!
Humbly,
Fred & Joann

reviews.author: Suzy Kitchukova
reviews.text: I cannot even begin to explain how much Clay went above and beyond. He was so professional and easy to work with. It truly is refreshing communicating with such a stand-up guy. He had all of our issues resolved quickly. I absolutely recommend Gold Star Plumbing!!!

plumbers.name: The Clean Plumbers - Tampa
plumbers.address: 14545 N Florida Ave, Tampa, FL 33613, USA

reviews.author: goose goose
reviews.text: What a great experience with the clean plumbers.  Eric Young probably won't answer my phone calls anymore because of how much I called him and asked him for pictures and camera footage. The buyers realtor were obsessively annoying and needy. Needless to say, luis and Steve did a hydro jet job on the house and I was able to close without a problem, to make a very long story short. Thank you fellas for working your tails off ahead of time so that I could close on-time. I really appreciate your professionalism, and dedication throughout the entire process. I couldn’t have asked for a better team, and I highly recommend The Clean Plumbers to anyone who wants the job done right the first time

reviews.author: susan massey
reviews.text:
I had my gas hot water heater replaced today. Mike Mihal and Reagan Blake were on site at 10 am and left at 12 noon. The installation included new water supply connectors, gas reflex lines pressure relief valve and expansion tank as required by code. The existing setup was a difficult one but these two with their team efforts were able to accomplish the task.

The team were certified professional plumbers and their job was exceptional. Now I know that some think that it is a little pricey but I do not mind the price for a certified, well trained professional team of plumbing associates as well as the customer services that I received along the way. This was impressive. So today I signed up for The Clean Club Membership for priority scheduling for any other plumbing services I will have in the future.

reviews.author: Stella ventucci
reviews.text:
Nothing gives me more pleasure than to speak positively about someone who truly deserves it. Erick Young of Clean Plumbers arrived early in the morning and left around noon time.
For what appeared as an anxious project dealing with sewer plumbing blockage, Erick's calm and polite manner overshadowed any anxiousness I had. He explained everything in detail and showed tremendous patience, as we waited for another technician to arrive. When it came time for my options ,He was eager to speak jointly with my son via telephone, so I would have another input for my final decision. I am so satisfied with Erick and Clean Plumbers that my best interest came first, and I would not hesitate to recommend them as a trustworthy and honest dealership.

reviews.author: charlotte young
reviews.text: Adam was delightful and efficient. I called him “Magic Fingers,” because he solved several issues by simply adjusting the valves or whatever. He also solved the more major issues that needed addressing. I would highly recommend him, and thus, Clean Plumbers, for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Ray L
reviews.text:
Luis has been to my home several times. I am always grateful when I find that he has been assigned to my job.
He was accompanied by a coworker, Malik, who complimented Luis‘s competence, friendly demeanor, patience, and professionalism.
The two of them represent the company exceptionally and I am very happy with the services they provided
I’m am very happy with “ The Clean Plumber” and their exceptional staff including, Patrice, Brian, John, Luis and Malik!

plumbers.name: Bowers Plumbing Co Inc
plumbers.address: 2265 Carters Gin Rd, Toney, AL 35773, USA

reviews.author: Martin Carey
reviews.text: I called them at the recommendation of a friend that’s used them for years. They responded promptly and communicated everything very well. They were courteous and completed the job quickly and professionally. This water heater was in a terrible spot and replaced a 30 year old poorly maintained water heater. Thanks!

reviews.author: Bertha
reviews.text: I was pleasantly surprised at how quickly I was scheduled (the next morning). The young man was here right on time, was friendly, polite, efficient, and patient, answering my many questions without hesitation. Very efficient. Done installing a new water heater, and two additional parts in under three hours. Everything working great! Thanks!

reviews.author: Bobby Mathis
reviews.text: I am so happy to have found a great plumber! Nick Frost is an expert and handles himself with the utmost courtesy and professionalism! He evaluated my plumbing problem quickly and made the repair with ease. Some other plumbers would have had me remove flooring and areas of a wall and still not found the problem. I am so thankful that Mr. Frost was the expert that came to my house. Whenever I need any type of plumbing done, I’m going to call Bowers Plumbing and request Mr. Frost!!!!

reviews.author: Lynn Quann
reviews.text: Finally, a plumber with knowledge and confidence.  Thank you Preston for your honest assessment as we walked through the scenario. And thanks to Chris for talking me off the ledge the night before thinking I needed emergency service when clearly I did not.  He walked me through a system check and assured me ai would be fine until the next day.  Bowers will always be my go to from now on.

reviews.author: Julie Williams
reviews.text: We had a stopped up drain and a leaking pipe under another sink. Bowers got us fixed up in a couple of hours and did great work. The technician was very nice and if we ever need plumbing work again we will definitely be using them again. Thanks for the great service!

plumbers.name: Pure Plumbing
plumbers.address: 521 Sterling Dr, Richardson, TX 75081, USA

reviews.author: Carol Rodgers Borden
reviews.text: Job well done! Micheal and Dillon did an amazing job finding the break and planning the fix. The crews were dedicated to doing the job Right. Pure Plumbing was fairly priced for the work required. We are so grateful for all that was committed to a “Job Well Done”. God Bless this Company from the office to each member of the crews!

reviews.author: John Allen
reviews.text: I am a long time customer of Pure Plumbing and they are great! They replaced 2 bathroom faucets and I signed up (again) for the Pure Plan (1970s house, lots of plumbing issues). Their prices are very reasonable. They notify you when they are coming, show up on time, give accurate estimates, keep you informed, are knowledgeable, polite and neat. Fantastic!

reviews.author: Kim Long
reviews.text: Dusten not only does fantastic work, but he's very kind and patiently explains everything he's going to do. Always on time, great communicator, trustworthy, and super clean. I'm thrilled with his service! He installed a gas fitting for my new portable generator, which he also picked up for me from Lowe's. He assembled the wheel kit and tested the whole system.

reviews.author: Jordan Harris
reviews.text: I’m a big fan of Dylan Burns at Pure Plumbing. He’s trustworthy and hardworking. I gave him a call a few days after he completed some work to fix something that occurred during install, and no questions asked he fixed it under warranty. Thank you for hiring quality guys like Dylan.

reviews.author: Emma Huels
reviews.text:
A huge thank you to Jacob and his team at Pure Plumbing!!

We are first time home owners and during the winter freeze, we had an exterior pipe burst. The Pure Plumbing team was quick in deploying Jacob to help us. From the initial inquiry to the fix of our pipe, it took just under 2 hours - to say we are grateful is an understatement. Thank you again Pure Plumbing team!

plumbers.name: Stateline Services
plumbers.address: 2 Spruce St, Bristol, TN 37620, USA

reviews.author: John Coleman
reviews.text: A huge shout out to Sam from Stateline Service for his outstanding work in restoring water to our bathrooms. Sam demonstrated exceptional professionalism, courtesy, and plumbing expertise throughout the job. His genuine smile was present throughout, not just for the photos. I highly recommend Stateline for their responsive, high-quality service.  Now I can finally take a hot shower! (And my family said, Amen!!)

reviews.author: Marsha Nidiffer
reviews.text: Customer service from start to finish was a wonderful experience! Zach and Kyle arrived within an hour of my call and earlier than originally quoted at inital intake. They were friendly and explained everything for the project I had going on. I received the quote and was able to get completed same day as they had all the parts (except one which they got quickly) on their vans. It was so nice to not have to wait to get schedule later and also great for the company actually showing up when they said they would. We are very happy to habe a working kitchen again!

reviews.author: roxanne mullan
reviews.text: We are first time customer that were in need of electrician after hours.  The on call rep was great in helping us make determination to wait till morning. Dispatch called before 8 am to get us on the schedule and before 1:00 pm, Tyler had resolved our problem and power was restored.  He was very friendly and professional and we will definitely be calling State Line for future repairs!

reviews.author: Buddy
reviews.text: Zach did a great job providing the necessary service to get our unit operating properly. He was kind, courteous and informative about what and why he would do certain things. Gavin at dispatch was easy to work with as well, he kept us informed of every step along the way. I will certainly hire Stateline Services again.

reviews.author: Taylor Burkette
reviews.text: We are new homeowners and had a pipe leak through our ceiling within two weeks of moving in. The guys at Stateline were so responsive and came out as quickly as they could to get this fixed for us. They took the time to not only explain what exactly was going on, but to make sure there wasn’t anything else I needed. It was so nice to have someone fix our issue, explain it, and take the time to show it was important to them as well. I highly recommend!

plumbers.name: Fix & Flow Plumbing Co.
plumbers.address: 1433 Mayson St NE, Atlanta, GA 30324, USA

reviews.author: Laura Cate
reviews.text: My toilet needed maintenance and Fix and Flow was able to come the next day to check it out. As a business owner myself, I appreciated that they were able to work with my schedule. They use a messaging system to communicate when your repair man will be arriving and who will be arriving. I really appreciate the communication. Kendall came and worked quickly and efficiently to replace my toilet. He was very courteous and respectful of the property ensuring that everything was put back the same if not better than how he found it. I would highly recommend Fix and Flow for your Atlanta plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Suzan
reviews.text: Fix & Flow Plumbing was fantastic from start to finish. They were able to get me a same-day appointment and arrived quickly. My technician, Mike, was professional, reasonably priced, and took the time to explain my options clearly so I could make the best decision without feeling pressured. The work was done efficiently and with care. I highly recommend Fix & Flow Plumbing and will definitely use them again.

reviews.author: Robin Mertz
reviews.text: The guys who handled the job were professional, friendly, and efficient. I really appreciated how clear they were about every step of the process — no guesswork, no surprises. Their skill and attention to detail made everything feel effortless. It’s rare to find service that’s both fast and trustworthy, especially on a holiday. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them to anyone, and I’ll definitely call them again if anything else goes wrong. They turned a stressful situation into an easy, smooth experience.

reviews.author: Paul B.
reviews.text: Fix and Flow was recommended on the Candler Park Neighbors website. We were very happy with the thoroughness and quality of repairs and updates performed on our kitchen sink plumbing, faucet, drains, and fixes to cabinetry due to long term water damage. Our plumber Kendall was highly experienced and knowledgeable and was able to answer our questions up front and throughout the project. We opted to pay more to have quality work done and for turnkey solutions made possible by their partners in carpentry. The new setup was upgraded to code and even used innovative models according to company owner’s high standards. Isaac the business mgr was transparent each step of the way with scheduling.We are really pleased with the workmanship and care that went into the entire project and won’t hesitate to recommend Kendall and Fix and Flow to our friends and neighbors!

reviews.author: John Rose
reviews.text: Fix & Flow has been wonderful. They solved a faucet issue for us. They were prompt, neat and courteous. Easy to communicate and schedule. Will continue to work with them!

plumbers.name: Big Apple Plumbing LLC - Westminster, CO
plumbers.address: 8872 Meade St, Westminster, CO 80031, USA

reviews.author: Kyra Silbernagel
reviews.text: We used Big Apple Plumbing to do our sewer line replacement and we were very happy with the work that was done. Jason was very quick to respond to our initial request for a 2nd opinion and sewer scope. He talked us through all of our options and patiently answered all of our questions. The actual work to replace the sewer line was completed extremely quickly and with super minimal impact to our yard, which we really appreciated!

reviews.author: Kelly McDowell
reviews.text: Sewer Line Replacement: Jason and his team were professional, excellent with communications keeping me in the loop every step of the process. This was a huge job replacing the entire sewer line from inside the house to the main line at the city sewer. I was so impressed by their professionalism, their work, the knowledge, taking the time to help me understand the job, communicating when they would be here, the status of the project and their clean-up. I would HIGHLY RECOMMEND them for any of your needs from the really large, extensive projects like mine, to any smaller projects. What a great company and crew! Thank you guys so much. I am very happy with your work and will recommend you anytime someone is looking!

reviews.author: Alexis McKinley
reviews.text: Jason and his team are amazing! We had a leak for who knows how long because we are very rarely in the basement and I called about 20 minutes before closing on a Sunday. Monday morning Jason came and assessed the situation which was drastic enough to be a 2 day job and from start to finish Jason was super professional and made sure to educate us the whole way through. The team made sure to lay down protective things for our floor and they were very efficient. I am very pleased with the outcome and am showing before, during and after photos. I would recommend this company anytime you need anything plumbing. Jason knows what he is talking about and exactly how to fix it right the first time. He made sure our clean out was placed in a proper place for future problems if plumbing is ever needed again. I am very thankful I called Big Apple Plumbing LLC!

reviews.author: Kevin Frame
reviews.text: Jason and Disraeli are amazing master plumbers. With the two of them working together, the new plumbing additions and replacement of old pipes went very quickly. They were able to meet every request I had and kept me informed throughout the entire job. They added a new washer box in the garage, new plumbing for a basement remodel including a new full kitchen, full bathroom, and washer/dryer. They also installed the new tub/shower, and frost free hose faucets leading outside. I will be using Big Apple Plumbing for all my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Robert Sipe
reviews.text: I would like to express my gratitude to Big Apple Plumbing for sending Disraeli to resolve our clogged drain issue. Disraeli was extremely patient and clearly explained the entire repair process. We were very impressed with his professionalism and attention to detail. I highly recommend Big Apple Plumbing for any plumbing related needs.

plumbers.name: Drain Doctor
plumbers.address: 1277 N 15th St, San Jose, CA 95112, USA

reviews.author: Melodie Wille
reviews.text:
On Sunday, I needed immediate service so I started going down the list of plumbers near me that are open 24/7.
Four different businesses didn’t answer the phone and one said they only take appointments…. What???
Drain Doctor Fremont was next and I was assured someone would be at my home within the hour. The technician was here within 30 minutes and just as quickly he had cleared the drain from the street.
Both the office and the technician were very courteous and wanted to make sure I was satisfied.
The task was completed, but I will tell you service makes all the difference!
Job well done, and it let me get back to my weekend quickly!

reviews.author: Carrie King
reviews.text: I’ve worked with Drain Doctors Plumbing on many residential and commercial projects, and they consistently deliver exceptional results. Their professionalism, attention to detail, and commitment to doing the job right the first time make them my top choice for plumbing work. They’re punctual, communicative, and always maintain a clean, safe worksites. Whether it’s new construction, remodels, or emergency repairs, Drain Doctors brings a level of expertise and reliability. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for a skilled and dependable plumber.

reviews.author: John Al-Samarrie
reviews.text:
OK, this is overdue.  Last month I noticed water on the garage cement floor and thought it was just moisture.  After careful review I noticed that the water heater was leaking.  I called four different plumbers to get estimates with Drain Doctor being the first one I called.  A little history of my previous water heater is in order.  in 2019 I was overseas, and the heater broke and leaked all over the garage damaging some important personal items.  My girlfriend at the time called a plumber who installed a new heater and what a mess it was.  That plumber used galvanized steel for the inlet and outlet of the heater lines.  Routed the pressure relief pipe into the water heater pan rather than outside of the pan and installed my recirculating pump facing the side wall where I could not gain access.  Additionally, the gas line reservoir was installed by the water heater rather than near the gas line valve coming out of the wall.  There were no 2x4 boards in the back of the heater for earth quake bracing and the water lines were not earth grounded, all of which are city compliance requirement.  To say the least it was a cluster F.  When Bobby from Drain doctor showed up, he immediately pointed out the nonconformance of the water heater and gave me a bottom-line price from his standard pricing book which no other plumbers could beat.  Some quotes were almost double and after negotiating with those plumbers they got close to Bobby's price which didn't sit well with me.  So, I decided to go with Bobby and that proved to be fortuitist based on his efficient and compliant work.  Bobby is a plethora of plumbing information or more like a Wikipedia of plumbing.  He does have a laid back and straight forward attitude but don't let that fool you.  He's the top gun in his industry.  Anyway, I've read some of the negative reviews and in each case, there has been a unique set circumstance that all of us experienced in our daily life but over 99%+ of Drain Doctor reviews are very positive.  I can't tell you how happy we are with his work and in fact our outside main water line inlet valve was broken, unbeknown to us and we had him come back the next day to fix that as well.  I didn't bother getting other quotes because I knew Bobby would give us a competitive price but more importantly do the job right.
Anyway, you can't go wrong with Drain Doctor and ask for Bobby.  Bobby is your man.
Lastley, I don’t usually write reviews, but I was so impressed with the work I was compelled to write about our experience.
Thank you,
John A.

reviews.author: Tere White
reviews.text: Very happy with the service I received from Oscar and the customer service from the company. They called to confirm the arrival of my Plumber and he was right on time. I would be happy to recommend drain Doctor and Oscar Ruizto anybody needing the service of a plumber.

reviews.author: H Enj
reviews.text: Alex did a great job fixing our main line problem. He took his time, resolved the issue thoroughly, and explained everything clearly. Very quick service!

plumbers.name: Monkey Wrench Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 660 W 7250 S, Midvale, UT 84047, USA

reviews.author: Janelle Leppink
reviews.text:
TLDR; Call these guys, they’ll take good care of you and your home 🙏 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟

We had a pretty stressful situation this morning when a toilet supply line randomly burst and sprayed water everywhere in our third floor bathroom. Before we knew it, water leaked down three floors through the walls, the ceiling, everywhere. Total nightmare.

We called Monkey Wrench Plumbing and they were able to get someone out the same day, which saved us. Kyle was our technician and he was great. Super down-to-earth, easy to talk to, and clearly knew what he was doing. He explained that the old builder-grade plastic supply line had failed (which apparently happens more than you’d think) and walked us through what he was going to replace it with.

He swapped out the cheap plastic line and valve for a braided metal one that’s much more durable and built to last. It feels good knowing we won’t have to worry about that happening again.

What really stood out was that they also helped get a restoration company out that same day to start dealing with the water damage. When you’re standing in a house with water coming through ceilings, that kind of quick coordination means everything.

Overall, just a really solid local company that shows up when you need them. Hopefully we don’t have another plumbing emergency anytime soon, but if we do, we’re calling them again without hesitation. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Kim Belliston
reviews.text: Carlos, Tony, Onni and crew did a fabulous job with such a quick turnaround time. My water main was leaking heavily and not only were they able to put a new one in and route it in the best way possible, they brought the shut off valve to an accessible location in my home. Big shoutout to them for the great work done!

reviews.author: Danielle Wolf
reviews.text:
Jerry and Tony were great!  They were efficient, friendly, and knowledgeable. I would recommend them to anyone. That is why they deserve a five star rating!

I’m so happy to have hot water again and looking forward to utilizing a water softener with my new tankless water heater!  We were always running out of hot water. So when my water heater decided to flood the basement on Christmas morning, I figured it was time for an upgrade.

reviews.author: Zoe
reviews.text: Excellent plumbers - Jerry has helped us out with leaks and estimates before. We recently had Jerry and Tony out to install new fixtures and fix a leaky sink shut off. Excellent work, professional communication, and on time.

reviews.author: Namnecron
reviews.text: Our technicians Carlos, Cody, & Tony were absolutely outstanding! We had our water main break & we’re completely out of water. We got a bid from Scott Hale plumbing, which took a day for them to complete, & had priced the job at over $15,000. Carlos was able to assess the problem & had a bid to us at the end of his inspection. Their excavation crew Monkey Wrench bid came in at just over $6,000. Carlos was honest & fair with his bid, unlike the competition. Carlos, Cody, & Tony, along with their amazing excavation crew came in and completed the entire job in roughly 6 hours. Everything works great now! I highly recommend Monkey Wrench plumbing & will be going with them for all my plumbing issues going forward.

plumbers.name: All Masters Plumbing
plumbers.address: 11117 Shady Trail, Dallas, TX 75229, USA

reviews.author: brad stevens
reviews.text: MP Daniel Moncrief came I would 24 hours we notified them the night before we had a storm and noticed a weird sound from the hot water heater closet that the flu was completely off. They kindly put an appointment came by the next morning and fix it or no charge. very nice pleasant courteous appreciate them very much. They did a great job as well as Serena the encore. It was very attentive and kept me up-to-date on their availability.

reviews.author: Jai's Tasteaments (Jai)
reviews.text:
A kind soul, real glad I got to meet him. Did a great job. Showed that he really cares about what he does. Very professional and took his time ensuring the job was right. I feel like a better job of communicating could be done between them and the city when it comes to time frames of arrivals for inspections but Bubba explained that also. I'm just glad to have heat again. Very thankful. Kind of pricey but hey if you want it done right then peace of mind is what you'll get.

Thanks Bubba

reviews.author: William Turner
reviews.text: I was not happy with the individual that come out to check my hot water heater. He did not check it whatsoever. He looked at it. He said yeah it’s not running. He looked at the date that I installed it so you need a new hot water heater and he left, Yet I still had hot water in the house he never checked anything. All he saw was the date that was installed. No it was old said I needed a new hot water heater, Yeah, I still had hot water in the house. It was just simply the alarm that was going off alerting me that there was a problem with the hot water heater. That’s why I called to get someone to check it out that did not happen. The two men that installed my new hot water heater did a wonderful job. I was very impressed with the work they did and while I do not feel, I should be giving a review on this this early after the repair I feel like in this case I’m OK and given the repair early after the repair As far as referring the company because of the first individual that come out and did not do his job. I could not refer the company and will not likely use the company again.

reviews.author: Mark Kessler
reviews.text: Douglass Wolf came to our home on icy roads to help us with our hot water heater. He did a great job and let us know exactly what was going on with our heater. Very knowledgeable. Thankful for his expertise and workmanship.

reviews.author: Samuel Magnan
reviews.text: Got me an appointment pretty fast for some sewer work, to deal with a clogged and overflowing canalization. $89 + trip which ended up being fairly reasonable. Work was done fast, no problem since them. Tech was nice and efficient. Didn’t try to push for more work to be done. Also included a free camera inspection at a later date

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3307 New Easley Hwy, Greenville, SC 29611, USA

reviews.author: Angel Tibball
reviews.text: I had a basement flood caused by a broken water line, and the team at Benjamin Franklin Plumbing came out right away. Their emergency plumbers responded quickly and had the water line repaired within an hour. They were fast, friendly, and very professional. I really appreciated that they wore shoe covers and cleaned up everything before leaving. If you need a reliable local plumber for emergency plumbing or water line repair, I highly recommend Benjamin Franklin Plumbing!

reviews.author: nicole schmidt
reviews.text:
Sam was our technician and did a great job. He came out during a stressful situation with a failing water heater and no hot water, and even though it was late, he was professional, patient, and thorough. He explained our options clearly and made sure everything was installed safely. We really appreciated his hard work and the peace of mind he provided.

The service was more expensive than expected, but given the late hour and prompt emergency response, we understood the higher cost.

reviews.author: Justine Mullinnix
reviews.text: Great company. Very professional technicians. We had Eric come out to our home. He is very knowledgeable and patient in explaining the issues we had with our plumbing. He took care of everything on site and did great work. I really appreciate the fast response and care that they provided for our home. Thanks for everything!

reviews.author: Michelle Urps
reviews.text:
"I think Benjamin Franklin himself said it best: 'An ounce of prevention is worth a pound of cure,' but in my case, a call to Benjamin Franklin Plumbing was worth three times the cost of a water heater in saved 're-piping' fees!

If you enjoy shivering in an ice-cold shower while a 'big box' store tries to convince you that you need to re-pipe your entire house for the price of a small yacht—by all means, call the other guys. But we chose sanity instead. After the 'unnamed' hardware store told me my perfectly fine copper lines were a disaster, Vincent and Josh from Ben Franklin showed up within the hour. They debunked the 'gas line catastrophe' and had our family back in steaming hot showers before sundown. Quick, honest, and didn’t try to bankrupt me. They are officially our first call from now on. Sorry big-box store, it’s not me... it’s your terrible advice!"

reviews.author: Dan Perkins
reviews.text: Eric was friendly and professional. He provided a clear overview of charges before work commenced that were reasonable along with potential service costs beyond inspection should the need for them arise. I have used Benjamin Franklin Plumbing previously and once again they have exceeded my expectations with their personnel from appointment set up, confirmation checks, and service visits. Highly recommend!

plumbers.name: bluefrog Plumbing and Drain of North Dallas
plumbers.address: 122 Rose Ln Ste. K1, Frisco, TX 75036, USA

reviews.author: Beverly
reviews.text: My first experience was with Mike Ashby who came to provide an estimate to install a new water heater. Mike is a people person and advised me what I needed and the cost! Ivan and Jon came the next day to install the water heater. They were both polite and worked diligently in replacing my water heater. Once the work was completed, they cleaned the area and removed the old water heater which I was very happy about. This was a pleasant experience and I will be contacting them if I need them for any plumbing issues. By the way, the services rendered was very affordable in comparison to some of the other companies I contacted!

reviews.author: Kayla Belmore
reviews.text: I’ve used blue frog a few times now and have been extremely happy with the work each time. Martin and his apprentice Uriel did a great job replacing my hot water heater and stuck washer valves. Blue frog has been reliable, honest, and great at communicating on every job

reviews.author: Lina Li
reviews.text: Ivan, Martin, and Jeremy did a great job fixing our pipeline issue. They were professional, efficient, and explained the problem clearly. Ivan was especially helpful and made sure everything was done right. Highly recommend their work.

reviews.author: Kellie Carroll
reviews.text: My water heater stopped working and Blue Frog came out on the day I requested.   Fortunately, the water heater was still covered under their warranty and was replaced by Martin O and Uriel in less than 2 hours!  They arrived on time and quickly assessed  the situation.  The water heater is in my attic so I wasn’t the easiest to remove and replace but they got the job done and did a great job cleaning up afterwards !  Thank you guys🙏🏽

reviews.author: Brian Ramirez
reviews.text: Martin and Ivan were excellent. The excavators a subcontractor was also great. A minor miscommunication happened but it was quickly addressed with management. I don’t think perfection but how a company reacts says it all you will not be disappointed with blue frog. I would recommend them to my closest family members. They found my leak resolved it and all is clean. Price was reasonable and I’m happy.

plumbers.name: Curtis Total Service
plumbers.address: 1415 E Pennsylvania St, Allentown, PA 18109, USA

reviews.author: Nathan Linder
reviews.text:
I trusted this company to install a new HVAC system a little over a year ago. I've gotten quite an education on systems since their install.

Essentially, they installed a VERY expensive communicating air handler to work with a base-level NON-communicating Heat Pump. ALL I knew at the time of install was that I was getting a new system. I had no idea how poor their choice of product was for my home until it was too late. I felt I had no choice but to act quickly because I was told my old oil furnace system was "red tagged" or unsafe to use. Truthfully, they offered 3 options: repair the current system, replace the current system, or go with a "highly-efficient, ultra modern" heat pump. They really pushed this system saying it was a certain seer level and that I would qualify for ALL sorts of rebates and incentives from the government - none of which happened.

Here are some more bullet points to help you make your decision on whether or not to use this company:

- left trash from the install in my yard
- had to come back the very next day after install because they installed the wrong type of thermostat
- had to come back a month after install to install a mysterious "box" under the air handler. I have no record of this work being done because they refuse to let me see the paperwork / invoice for it. This was Feb. 19th of 2025
- system formed a LITERAL block of ice in it after only a few days of using it to cool my home in the summer. Tech tried to chalk it up to some nonsense about difficulty shipping parts during covid (it was 2025 ... ) - ? They actually had to turn the system OFF in the middle of summer to let it melt while I slept in my attic that has separate AC. They added a small amount of coolant to the unit to "fix" the problem. See the photo.
- thermostat is off / wrong and always has been - they blame my old house, etc. - shouldn't these factors have been taken into consideration prior to the install? When I asked specific questions about the thermostat, the tech responded, "Well, we'd have to consult an expert for that". Aren't YOU supposed to be the expert!?!?
- NOTHING in my set up qualifies for any tax rebates or cash incentives from PPL.

After giving up and consulting a reputable company, we found:

- Heat pump had a leak and was pretty much running on VERY little coolant. This discovery was a stark contrast to the "all is good" seasonal maintenance updates that Curtis performed
- This was the result of a broken part that needed to be replaced. I also had to pay to have the unit flushed and restocked with coolant.
- New company was taking pics because they were in total and complete disbelief of how unprofessional and shoddy the installation was.

Final notes: Curtis Total Service is currently dealing with an ongoing lawsuit for taking advantage of customers not fluent in HVAC tech or that are elderly. My last conversation with their General Manager ended with him calling me "Stupid" because:, "You could have gone with ANY other company but us, did research, etc., but you chose us. You're stupid"

This company is an absolute fraud. If this review costs them even a dime, I'll be happy.

reviews.author: pradell pompilus
reviews.text: To be honest we have had not the best experience with Curtis in the pass with the system that we had installed... mainly the system then any one person at Curtis... But we stuck it out with them and did the rest of the work needed to get our system working correctly... were still getting accustomed to it... But as of today... we needed a professional and my wife didnt want to call Curtis... but I said I dont want to deal with someone who doesn't know what was done recently and who just installed our system... like taking a caddy to Lexus dealership... yes they work on cars... but they specialize in that brand... long story short... Curtis Sent John who not only was patient but very kind and very helpful... not only did he retrace the entire system in our house to find this small issue caused by a temporary install that another plumber didnt see but... but was kind to wait till our other plumber was able to capp off and fix his problem to fix ours... Thank you for sending John. Much Success to him.

reviews.author: Irene Platania
reviews.text: They were informative, honest, and completed the job to my satisfaction. Jason made me feel at ease, Brian did a great job of communicating and the workers took the time to do the job right. A great experience during a stressful time.

reviews.author: Lauren Hall
reviews.text: Jacob (master plumber) is exceptional. He is very knowledgeable about plumbing, especially older systems. He walks you through the entire process and checks all aspects of the system to ensure success after install. Jacob and Brian were incredibly communicative and responded to our call in a timely manner. They schedule the job quickly and helped us manage the problem until the proper parts came in. We felt taken care of throughout the entire experience. Do not hesitate, call Jacob and the team to assist you with your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Amber Rubin
reviews.text: AMAZING! So normally big name companies freak me out because you think you’re going to get a cookie cutter service but I was completely wrong. I was assigned Joe Matos as my inspector and all I can say is he was a life saver. I called completely stressed out because of our insurance not taking our situation seriously and not helping us get housing, someone to clean up extreme water damage and plumbing damage. Joe swept in and got the insurance to put us in a hotel, he explained to me what my claims process was and what I should expect from Roto-Rooter. He answered a frantic call on a Saturday night at 8pm and was still friendly and kind. Thank you Roto-Rooter for a quick and efficient job and thank you Joe for helping make our lives so much easier in a crappy (literally) situation!

plumbers.name: Baethke Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3511 N Cicero Ave, Chicago, IL 60641, USA

reviews.author: Rodolfo De Jesus
reviews.text: Baethke Plumbing was incredibly prompt and friendly attending to our water heater problems. They arrived quickly on a Saturday, explained the problem clearly, and completed a full water heater replacement in an afternoon. The technician, Jack E. was sincere and reliable, making the whole process stress free. I will definitely call them again for any water heater or major plumbing needs. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Tara Nemeroff
reviews.text: If you need plumbing services call Baethke Plumbing. If you are lucky your technician will be Billy McMahon. He was knowledgeable, professional and honest. He explained all my options with ease and clarity. I would use them again and again. Thank you Billy for a job well done!

reviews.author: Pat Miller
reviews.text: Top things I loved: 1) Friendly and sincere service 2) Prompt and reliable response I called Baethke Plumbing when I needed service on a garbage disposal.The technician was very friendly, explained the work clearly, and completed the disposal replacement on time. I would definitely recommend Baethke Plumbing to anyone searching for a plumber near me.

reviews.author: Robert Mills
reviews.text: Baethke did a great job of presenting options for a variety of plumbing issues. We proceeded with the most crucial items. Technician Jack Elkin did an excellent job of repiping one area and pursuing additional problems that we discovered along the way. The work was professional and communication with the company was easy.

reviews.author: Kuu Ard
reviews.text: We’ve worked with Baethke Plumbing for the last few years and have been very happy with their service. They’re thorough in explaining problems, and always provide options that fit our budget. When asking an opinion, they’re not biased by price but share what they’d recommend in their homes. Isaac has been to our condo a few times, and is always kind, thorough, and efficient. We’re committed to the annual membership of services because of the high quality service. Thank you Isaac and team!

plumbers.name: Peach Plumbing & Drain | Plumber, Drain Cleaning, Sewer Line and Tankless Water Heater Repair Atlanta, GA
plumbers.address: 1876 Defoor Ave NW STE 7, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Lakshan Genagtharan
reviews.text: TJ from Peach Plumbing did a fantastic job flushing my hot water system. He went above and beyond, checking everything and even installing a water filtration system. Super professional and knowledgeable. Five stars all the way—definitely call TJ for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Nia Edwards
reviews.text: I could not be happier with tj's service.His knowledge, he is one of the few service providers.I have worked with in the last year.That shows a great amount of integrity and honesty. I appreciate how knowledgeable he was and the quality of the work that was done. Because of him, this company has a new customer and I will definitely be referring him. Happy new year.The barbecue sauce is at the bottom.Yeah I got twoWynn

reviews.author: Jennie Soria
reviews.text: They were fantastic. All my plumbing chores handled (move exterior faucets, fix exterior water line, replace PVC and compression tank, reroute my dryer vent). They started same day and finished next day.  A beast of redirecting my dryer vent through ceiling was done. So happy with the results. Very nice gentleman plumbers. Very reasonable price.

reviews.author: Jennifer Sovik
reviews.text: Great experience! We needed a new water heater and they were able to fit us in for a quote that day. The price was in line with what we were hoping and they had availability to do it that day. Carlos took great care of us and did an awesome job putting it in. Thanks again guys!

reviews.author: Jessica Willms
reviews.text: I’m so glad that Palette Plumbing and Peach Plumbing merged - Jordan was so awesome! Such painless process and everything was very straightforward. He explained everything clearly and got us a few extra discounts on top of what was already projected. Even ended up getting the main tankless water heater service I initially requested done for free because we took care of some other plumbing issues simultaneously. Will absolutely call Peach every time.

plumbers.name: Atlanta Plumbing & Drain CO
plumbers.address: 3500 Lenox Rd NE Suite 1500, Atlanta, GA 30326, USA

reviews.author: K Davis
reviews.text: I contacted Atlanta Plumbing & Drain Co due to water leaking from my ceiling. A member of the team was dispatched the same day. I was given a 4 hour afternoon appointment window & they arrived within the first hour of the quoted window. They were professional & courteous locating the source of the leak very quickly. The repair was made before the appointment window time expired. Very impressive! I now have a go-to plumber in the event that I ever need services again.

reviews.author: Diana
reviews.text: Rahmel did a great job repairing the leak from my hot water heater. He was very professional and got it done very fast! I would definitely use their service again!

reviews.author: Lois Pinson
reviews.text: Excellent service the guys were very professional.They made sure the job was completed correctly. I got my busted pipes replaced as well as my water heater. All in the same day. I can’t thank Atlanta Plumbing & Drain enough, for taking great care of my family and I. Truly my Hometown Plumbers.

reviews.author: ERICA WOODS
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of having Alema (the tech) so professional and courteous from the time he entered the property until the time he left. He also worked very efficient and in a clean manner. I would recommend him to anyone. Thanks you ALEMA you ROCK!

reviews.author: Sameka Ragland
reviews.text: I am thoroughly impressed with the overall quality of Atlanta Plumbing & Drain. They came to my house in Newnan to repair my water heater, new gas line and replaced my old cast iron pipes. I hate that they wasn’t my first choice but the other jobs was trying to advantage of me. Thank you Mike, Rahmel, Alema for your expertise and great customer service. Make them your first choice and you won’t be disappointed.

plumbers.name: JustUs Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1622 Belvedere Pl, Round Rock, TX 78665, USA

reviews.author: Lang Vo
reviews.text:
We had Alexander come out the next day when our gas control valve died on our water heater.

They picked up the phone the night before and got us scheduled in.

He called told me a rough price, picked up the part and got our water heater going again very quickly.

end price was pretty much dead on.

Thank you guys for getting us back up and running.

reviews.author: Chelsea Parkinson
reviews.text: Alex (and Dwayne) have been absolutely wonderful to work with. During a really stressful time, when we were horribly overcharged by another company, Dwayne gave an honest perspective and immediately made me feel at ease about the path forward. Alex was no different! He came out to do several work items for us, including having our homeowner's shutoff valve replaced, and he thoughtfully explained everything he needed to do and would recommend, without trying to upsell. Honesty is what wins long-term business, and these guys get that. 100% recommend and will continue to do business with JustUs Plumbing. Thank you all so much!

reviews.author: Rhonda Belam
reviews.text: We love these plumbers!  We bought a water heater from them a year and a half ago.  They did a great job so when we needed a plumber for a couple issues we had in the house we called them.  Christopher came out the same day.  He was very courteous, knowledge, informative and found our problems.  He had to come back, the supply house was closed.  He came back and fixed everything!  We would highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Derek Smigelski
reviews.text: I recently had the pleasure of working with JustUS Plumbing / CenTex Water Systems (Water Softner & Whole House Filter), and I can’t recommend them highly enough. Dwayne Justice is a true professional—honest, reliable, and a man of his word. It's clear he takes pride not only in his work but also in running his business with integrity. As a veteran, Dwayne brings that same level of commitment and service to every job. The work was done efficiently, with great communication throughout the process. I wouldn’t hesitate to call them again in the future. Highly recommended! Chris was also excellent!

reviews.author: Judy Abernethy
reviews.text: I would like to recommend Justus Plumbing for any plumbing needs you have.  I have used them twice recently and both times I had same day service, they were prompt, and took care of the issues to my satisfaction.  Also they are reasonably priced. I’m sure I will use them in the future for my plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: J&R Herra Heating, Cooling, & Plumbing
plumbers.address: 701 May St, Geneva, IL 60134, USA

reviews.author: KERRY CRABBE
reviews.text: I had a water heater that needed to be replaced. J&R Herra got back to me within an hour with a quote at a reasonable price. They sent a technician out within one working day to replace the old unit and they added a couple of bells and whistles. Their technician was friendly, courteous and very efficient. I highly recommended them.

reviews.author: Earthgirl Ray
reviews.text: Excellent experience from start to finish! Sebastian was friendly, professional, and resolved my plumbing issue quickly and efficiently. I really appreciated that the company sends a personal text with a little background about who will be coming to your home, it made everything feel more comfortable and personable from the start. The front office staff was extremely friendly and helpful and had someone at my house in less than 30 minutes. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Big Nelly
reviews.text: Great work done. Very knowledgeable and friendly. He had the Job done within an hour. The last guy that attempted it took over 5 hrs and didn’t do the job right. Michael did an amazing job and did it correctly. I will definitely be recommending J&R Herra to family and friends… Hell, even to strangers.

reviews.author: Niccole Dienst
reviews.text: Great experience from start to finish! Fast response, honest pricing, and very professional service. My furnace is working better than ever. I’ll definitely be using them again in the future for all my HVAC and plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Katherine Zielezinski
reviews.text: Our tech Sebastian was excellent! He called when he was on his way, arrived promptly and put booties on over his shoes when entering the house. He found the issue quickly, explained the repair and got right to work. No mess was left behind and we would be more than happy to have him as our tech any time we need a repair done. We called after hours for immediate repair and the job was done within 2 hours of making the call. Couldn’t recommend Sebastian more!

plumbers.name: Edwin Stipe, Inc
plumbers.address: 1642 Union Blvd Suite Z, Allentown, PA 18109, USA

reviews.author: Pam Richetta
reviews.text: What a terrific experience, thanks to Edwin Stipe and the terrific professionalism provided by Brian.  He was extremely thorough as he checked all of our plumbing throughout our home AND outside.  Our home is 108 years old so you might imagine that checking our plumbing can take extra time’.  But the quality of work, the level of experience and the tremendous quality of work provided is just one of the many, many reasons we have ALWAYS reached to Edwin Stipe when we have plumbing issues.  They have been providing us with quality workmanship for our problems since 1999.  In a word … Excellent!

reviews.author: Linda Smith
reviews.text: Shelby was so knowledgeable and courteous.  She found the problem right away and she repaired our oil furnace with ease! She found what numerous techs were unable to do! Not only did she solve the problem but treated us professionally and respectfully. She is a five star technician and we were very impressed with her skills in troubleshooting and technical expertise.  Thank you so much for going extra steps to help us on a very cold day in January 2026! Our furnace is functioning so well now! We will recommend her in the future to our friends and family. Thank you, Shelby for a flawless repair.  Linda and Lee Palmer Township PA

reviews.author: Cortney Selander
reviews.text: I’ve been a customer of Edwin Stipe for 11 years, on a service plan. All of the techs I have had come to me home over the years have been great. Most recently Roly Calero was at my home several time over the last two weeks helping me troubleshoot an issue with my furnace. He was a wonderful help and gave me great advice that ultimately helped get to the bottom of the issue. I can’t recommend Roly enough!

reviews.author: Kevin DeMouth
reviews.text: I would give the tech Shelby a five star rating. She was very professional very friendly explained what she was doing every step of the way just very professional. However, I would rate the company at two. I spent two days waiting the entire day for them to come, and there was a no-show. Two entire days I waited. Not good work policy not good business management. The AI equipment they have answering is not working properly.

reviews.author: Ashley Gerstenberg
reviews.text: I was so impressed with Shelby! She was very thorough and took her time to explain things to me. Other technicians have complained about the tight spot that they need to crawl through to get to our unit but Shelby said it was no big deal and its just part of the job. I will most likely be requesting for Shelby to be the tech to come to our home from now on! We highly recommend her!

plumbers.name: Reliance Plumbing Sewer & Drainage, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1848 Techny Ct, Northbrook, IL 60062, USA

reviews.author: Arthur Schmidt
reviews.text: The plumbers who serviced me were on time friendly and confident. They knew what the feeding. They replaced my 20 year old tankless water heater and made sure it was up to current codes which required a new vent. The water heater works fine. They cleaned up afterward. Nice guys. I’d call them again in a heartbeat.

reviews.author: J T
reviews.text:
John Holden from Reliance Plumbing came out for a sewer line camera inspection and was outstanding. He was friendly, extremely knowledgeable, and—most importantly—gave me the strong feeling that he was being completely honest. I had a ton of questions and he patiently answered every single one in detail, explaining everything he was seeing on the camera in real time. Afterward, he walked me through all my options without any pressure and gave me his genuine recommendation.
I’ve recently moved to the area and have already dealt with a few other plumbers/companies. My experience with John and Reliance has been the best by far.

reviews.author: Marcia Swire-Walker
reviews.text: Reliance Plumbing has provided services to us for many years. Most recently they installed a commercial water heater. Assigned technician, John is always pleasure to work with, he is knowledgeable, professional, and goes over and beyond to meet expectations.

reviews.author: A Lee
reviews.text: We discovered a leaking toilet on Friday evening. Our usual plumber wasn't available and so we called Reliance. Alex arrived first thing on Saturday morning. At first we were presented with pretty costly scenarios to fix the problem. However, in the end, Alex was able to fix the leaking toilet at a significantly lower cost than we were expecting. He also took care of a couple of other small plumbing issues in our bathroom. Alex was punctual and friendly. We don't know how cost compares, especially since we paid a premium for a weekend visit. However, we were satisfied with Alex's work and appreciated the availability to service our plumbing issue on a Saturday morning.

reviews.author: Nevenka Tomic
reviews.text:
We had Reliance out last week and couldn’t be happier with the experience or the workmanship. After a frustrating visit from another well-known plumbing company in the area that spent hours without fixing our sewer issue—and left us with a HUGE bill—we were referred to Reliance.

Alex arrived, identified the problem within minutes, and clearly laid out three options with fair pricing. His crew came out, dug in our crawl space, replaced the broken sewer line, and backfilled everything professionally.

We received several quotes before choosing Reliance. Although Reliance wasn't  the cheapest, they were transparent, straightforward, and confident in the work that needed to be done. Many others had service call fees or vague “it may cost more” estimates, while Reliance gave us clarity from the start.

Overall, we’re extremely satisfied and feel we finally found a plumbing company we can trust.

plumbers.name: Big Brothers Home Services
plumbers.address: 28 E Fireclay Ave, Murray, UT 84107, USA

reviews.author: Zuhaib Alam
reviews.text: Frank was exceptional to work with! I truly appreciated his attention to detail and how courteous and professional he was throughout the entire process. He made sure to take care of all the intricate details with my Water Softener and RO system installation at two locations. His depth of knowledge and technical expertise went a long way in architecting innovative solutions for my complicated project. It's rare to find someone who combines technical skill with such genuine care for getting things right. I wouldn't hesitate to work with Frank and Big Brothers Home Services again!

reviews.author: Nate Reynolds
reviews.text: And then just say great fix with big brother plumbing was absolutely phenomenal. He was professional courteous and very professional. It is a pleasure having him in my home. I would recommend this plumbing company over all others. The pricing was fair and competitive. Thank you Frank from Big Brother plumbing you were absolutely amazing. Can't say enough about this guy. So kind and courteous great working individual.

reviews.author: Cheyeanne Johnson
reviews.text: We had a water leak pipe and they came and gave us price originally. They started to finish and realized it was better to take more off. They recommended us and gave us a good price. To do the extra stuff. I recommend the big brother company they are nice people, and took care of us to get our water pipe line.

reviews.author: JR Allen
reviews.text: Truitt was outstanding in his service of installing our water softener system for our new home! Professional and courteous in every aspect, showed up early for appointments, took the time to educate me on the different options to choose from and which ones made the most sense for my families new home! Went above and beyond and actually improved some piping that hadn't quite been installed as good as it should have by the home builder and generously offered to make it look as good as it should! Truitt was friendly, Knowledgeable, and made the entire purchasing process seamless and enjoyable! If you are looking to install any water treatment services in your home, call Big Brothers Home Services and ask for Truitt, you'll be in great hands!

reviews.author: Roger Burdette
reviews.text: With my 2 water heaters beginning to show their ages, I started looking into a tankless system. I called Big Brothers and got what I thought was a pretty good estimate for the install. My wife decided that she wanted a water softener so I got an estimate for that also. After talking with my neighbor, I found out that Big Brothers price for the tankless and softener was about the same as he paid for just the tankless system. The install was done when they promised. The clean up was done perfectly. Since then, I have had 2 toilets replaced and got the same professional service as before. Seems that Big Brothers takes pride in their work and treats you very fair which is something that I find lacking in a lot of business. Will be calling them for furture home services that might arise.

plumbers.name: JB Plumbing Services LLC
plumbers.address: 553 Woodruff Rd, Greenville, SC 29607, USA

reviews.author: Lynn Vining
reviews.text: Oh my goodness, how thankful I am for JB Plumbing! My 22-yr old hot water heater went out on a Sunday evening (not a surprise; had already gotten a quote from another company a few months earlier & was saving up money for this purchase). However, after putting in a call to the "other company" TWICE, and not hearing back from them, I searched for a reputable plumber in my area and found JB Plumbing. Not only did the owner, Jean, call me back personally after I had spoken with his office, but he came out the same day to give me an estimate. While he was here, I inquired about the pipe/valve next to the water heater, wandering if that should also be replaced. His answer was "NO". He said I did not need to waste $400 fixing something until it actually needed to be fixed. What a delight to find a company that values PEOPLE more than money. Jean was so kind, completely trustworthy, and clearly values quality craftsmanship—thank you, Jean! And his quote was far better than the one from the "other company", forget the fact that they still haven't called me back. When he scheduled my installation, he expressed that he wanted me to get to know the rest of his team, so he set up my installation with Kerry. It was equally nice to see how much Jean values the people that work with him, too! Kerry was scheduled to arrive between 10 and 12. Kerry contacted me when he was on his way, and arrived only moments after 10AM, how cool is that? Kerry was so personable & professional that I readily knew I was dealing with a top-notch master plumber for sure! He took such care to make sure that everything was done precisely and TOP-NOTCH! Both of my sons saw the installation after he left, and both commented on his TOP-NOTCH work! Kerry even did things that were not part of the original estimate, like drill a hole through the wall to the outside, so that a proper drainpipe could be installed (he did beautiful work on that too). It is so comforting knowing that in the future, I don't even have to think twice about who I will call for all of my plumbing problems—the wonderful team of this family-owned business—JB PLUMBING! I HAVE FOUND MY PLUMBING FAMILY!

reviews.author: Katie Pizzo
reviews.text:
I cannot recommend JB Plumbing enough! I recently moved to a new house and discovered I had several problems and leaks that needed to be fixed. Chris and Kerry have been absolutely wonderful throughout the entire process. Their team is incredibly professional, and they get to you quickly – they've helped me resolve many issues that could have been major headaches.

What really impressed me was their responsiveness, especially when I had a gas leak on the weekend. I was panicking, but they came out immediately and handled everything with such care and professionalism. They were reassuring, took the time to explain what was happening, answered all my questions, and made sure everything was safe before they left.

Chris and Kerry truly go above and beyond. They're not just skilled plumbers – they're genuinely helpful people who care about their customers. Their dedication, even during what should have been their time off, really shows their commitment to excellent service.

If you need a reliable, skilled, and caring plumber, look no further. JB Plumbing has earned a customer for life, and I'm so grateful for all their help!

reviews.author: Octavia Andrews
reviews.text: We called JB Plumbing Services for a sewer drain clean-out and were very pleased from the initial call to the finish. The customer service agent was a gem.
