Upon arrival Kerry clearly explained the process even when additional equipment was needed, he and John handled everything seamlessly. Both were knowledgeable, professional, and easy to work with.  JB Plumbing will definitely be our first choice for future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Barb Rafail
reviews.text:
I had my hot water tank replaced by Kerry Workman from JB Plumbing.  Was pleasantly surprised by the quality workmanship he performed as well as his gracious demeanor and kindness to me in answering all of my many questions!  He did an awesome cleanup as well.

In addition, the company is very professional and keeps their customers updated concerning your job-related information.

reviews.author: Rebekah L
reviews.text: JB Plumbing team has been wonderful in navigating the unexpected adventures of owning an old house! This morning (Wednesday) I woke up to my backyard trying to create a swimming pool without my approval. John was reassuring to speak to before business hours and Rachel was prompt at getting us scheduled to have it evaluated and a quick two hours later Jack was there to diagnose what happened. He had a solution for the day to get running water to the house and will be back on Friday to update some galvanized piping. We are so thankful for how quickly the team was out to our house with a same day fix at a reasonable price point! And we appreciate how soon we were put on the schedule to get the bigger job done. Thanks again!

plumbers.name: Parley's Plumbing, Heating & Air Conditioning
plumbers.address: 864 N 1430 W, Orem, UT 84057, USA

reviews.author: Renee Van Buren
reviews.text: This is the second time I’ve had parleys ppm do an inspection of my furnace and I will call them again for any other services I need. They are so easy to communicate with. They were prompt, professional and there was no pressure about replacing anything. In fact, mason told me my furnace was in great shape! He cleaned it, gave me a good suggestion and left with reasonable check and a smile! Thanks!

reviews.author: Darci Stone
reviews.text: Our old furnace died late at night. Parley's had a tech out to look at it first thing in the morning, and we had a new furnace installed the day after that. Technician was able to answer all my questions. Later ChatGPT verified that everything they told me was accurate. Overall, fast service, competent work, and reasonable price.

reviews.author: Liz Dean
reviews.text:
These guys are genuinely the best. Once again they came through- the furnace of my 90 year old mom broke and they came out within an hour of our calling. Mason and Zach were professional and patient with her and the cost is always very fair. They did a wonderful job!
Thanks you guys!

reviews.author: Wayne Lindsey
reviews.text:
Parley Plumbing was prompt and pleasant. They performed quickly with no disruption to our daily routine. Their diagnostic skills were superior to our other quotes.
They left the place clean and tidy.
I am having them back for a new heater /AC and water heart. Their quote was20% lower than the bigger company quote, with better equipment.

reviews.author: Janice Jenkins
reviews.text: They came within 2 hours of calling them. They were kind and finished the job quickly. They didn't leave a mess to clean up. One of the best parts was that they didn't charge a fee to tell me how much it would cost like other companies.

plumbers.name: 1-Tom-Plumber
plumbers.address: 310 Quecreek Cir, Smyrna, TN 37167, USA

reviews.author: Taylor Andrews
reviews.text:
UPDATE: Approximately 30 minutes after Shawn and Darian left, we were without hot water, yet again. I called them back out the next day, and I was informed it was a cartridge in the single-handle shower upstairs causing our entire house to be without hot water. I informed the technician I would not accept that answer, and we called another company out two days later. Upon telling the new company what was happening, he immediately diagnosed it as the recirculating pump, which we had mentioned both times 1 Tom had been out.

After running diagnostic testing, it was confirmed to be the recirculating pump. Fast forward to the next day, and we had discovered a significant gas leak at our water heater. There were missing and loose screws, allowing gas to flow freely into our garage instead of properly venting out into the exhaust. I’d like to think that 1 Tom would have noticed this since they “watched the flame rod for 30 minutes,” but nothing was ever mentioned about it (the second company did not have to “open” our water heater for the recirculation pump diagnostic). Our family’s health was severely jeopardized by this oversight. I highly recommend spending your money elsewhere.

Shawn and Darian were quick and efficient with their service! Having no hot water isn’t any fun, but they fixed the problem quickly, and they made sure to thoroughly explain the problem they found. 10/10 recommend these guys!!

reviews.author: Dana Haas
reviews.text: Thomas Fitzgerald was great to work with, professional and courteous. He found plumbing issues and repaired. Area where work was performed was left clean and tidy. Overall a great experience. Will use 1 Tom Plumber again.

reviews.author: lauren ray
reviews.text: Cameron did such an amazing job. He came in and quickly assessed the damages and got everything done so fast. He also had me test it out after to make sure it was all in good order. He even said hello to my cat Negan who was watching him work. Great guy, and great service!

reviews.author: Ryder IsReal615
reviews.text: Tommy & Sean was great! They was very informative when they came by our restaurant to make sure all our plumbing issues was fixed! If you have any issues with plumbing these are your guys! Very nice, pleasant & just professional attitudes! We appreciate these guys ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.author: Tena Black
reviews.text: Cameron came out to work at my job at BWW and he was incredible and professional. He knew how to explain things to me so I could understand them and kept me informed the entire time. Highly recommend

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 2821 Lebanon Pike #206, Nashville, TN 37214, USA

reviews.author: Stephanie Scott
reviews.text: We lost power due to a major snow/ice storm in Nashville and when I returned home to check on things, I found water everywhere. A pipe had clearly burst. I called Roto-Rooter and they sent a plumber (Brian Y.) out within a few hours. Brian has been amazing- so knowledgeable, kind, and efficient. With my husband out of the country, I've had to manage this solo and Brian has made it easy and manageable. Thank you, Brian and Roto-Rooter for coming to my rescue and being SO helpful. Highly recommend!!!!

reviews.author: Clarence Green
reviews.text: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup in Atlanta demonstrated true craftsmanship and precision during their recent visit. Jamal, Al, and Daniel arrived fully prepared, exhibiting a clear understanding of advanced sump pump systems. They carefully installed a battery backup sump pump in our basement and walked us through each feature, ensuring we felt secure in its operation. Their thoughtful approach to flood prevention showcased both technical knowledge and genuine care for the integrity of our home. It’s rare to find a crew that balances skill with professionalism so consistently. Our foundation feels protected, and our confidence in their work is absolute.

reviews.author: Greg Gerry
reviews.text: I’d give 6 stars for the team at Roto-Rooter if I could.  I called at 10 am and Garret listened to our issue and promptly had a technician scheduled to come to the house by noon.  Our tech Axel arrived on time and was understanding, professional, and friendly.  He diagnosed and fixed our water problem in no time.  Extremely pleased and satisfied from top to bottom.  Do yourself a favor and give them a call.  Thanks again!

reviews.author: Mallory Neal House
reviews.text: Axel was great!! Was on site within an hour of me calling - identified the issue and had everything replaced and working properly the next day. I’ve used roto rooter a few times and have always had a great experience with each tech. Definitely recommend!

reviews.author: John R
reviews.text:
Monday and Tuesday I had guys out to encapsulate my crawl space.In that process one of the workers cracked one of my pipes under my house in which they said they would handle getting repairs. Rota-Rooter is the company they finally were able to get to come out. I was told they would be here at 6:30pm, but the plumber didnt show up until 8:45pm.
The plumber asked me if I had the water turned off not realizing he was talking about at the meter. As far as I knew the pipe that got cracked wasnt leaking no one told me anything as far as that. I told him it is. He noticeable got mad when he discovered the water wasnt turned off and spent the next 10 minutes scolding me.
After he got done scolding me I took him to the water meter. He then proceeded to ask me if I had a T handle to turn the water off. Since when did I become to the plumber having to supply equipment?Isnt that something all should have in the business? I told him no and then the curse words starting flying out his mouth in the middle of the night.
He told me to call my neighbor and ask them if they have one. I know darn well she doesnt plus she had already gone to bed. Here we sat at the meter with him trying to turn the water off with a wrench. He finally got it turned off.
I went back in at this point because it’s not my job to do his job. I remained respectful through this time of interaction, but I can tell you for any plumbing needs that arise in the future on my dime I will not ever call Roto Rooter. If I ever have a company do anything under my house and they mess something up I will tell them to never call Roto Rooter.
I know they have been around for decades but rudeness wont get customers

plumbers.name: DeWolfe Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 211 Shrewsbury St, West Boylston, MA 01583, USA

reviews.author: Kayla Cortes-Aguilar
reviews.text: I had a new steam boiler heating system installed by Omar from DeWolfe. His team arrived on-time and began removing my nearly 20 year old system and installing the new one. They completed the job in 1.5 days, which was great. After the work was completed, Omar made sure all my radiators were working well and fixed one that was found not working in my children's room. Afterwards he brought me down to the basement to give me a rundown of safety and operation. He answered all my questions and was professional and knowledgeable. I now have a happy warm home and it all came at a more affordable price than some other large, local competitors. Ryan assisted me with the quotation process and he also was courteous in answering my calls and answering any questions I had before feeling comfortable in moving forward. No pressure sales, just helpful and available. So thank you to everyone involved, I will recommend you to anyone who asks.

reviews.author: Dave Scranton
reviews.text:
These guys are great. Our go to moving forward. Excellent communication throughout. We needed some work done on our furnace and they came the next day, diagnosed the issue and explained everything very clearly. Once they completed the job and left we still had a little issue… they came right back at no charge and made it right. It was just a simple thing and they fixed it right away.

Highly recommend

reviews.author: Joseph Rossacci
reviews.text: We had our boiler system replaced over a two day period.  Omar and G Did a fantastic job!  Everything looked perfect. They explained every detail of the system to me and answered all my questions. They were very professional and courteous.  It was a pleasure to have them in my home. I hope if I need additional service, that they will come again. Thanks!

reviews.author: Veronika Bentekovics
reviews.text:
Excellent service with DeWolfe plumbing & heating co!! 👌 All the guys were very knowledgeable and efficient with their work. I had a new gas furnace and hot water combo installed. Omar and his team were outstanding with installation. After installation they cleaned everything up and made sure all radiators were in working order. They explained all the parts and safety and operation of the unit. The unit had to be put on the wall, Ron installed all the framework and did an excellent job! I am VERY happy with the whole process.
Thank you also to the plumber Jamie for the complete initial rundown of different units and helped us purchase the right one for our needs. Awesome job guys!
Veronika & Rob

reviews.author: Carrie McFarland
reviews.text: Our water heater sprung a leak and we needed a new water heater fast. Working with DeWolfe was a great experience.  From the beginning when I was talking with the customer service rep to the very end.  The tech, Gokhan Yilmaz was on time, friendly, knowledgeable, and extremely helpful.  He was able to reduce the price of the water heater by making phone calls and finding an existing warranty on our tank that we didn't even know we had! He worked with the manufacturer, found the water heater we needed and went to pick it up by himself so we could have same day install.  We had a fully functioning water heater that afternoon! I will definitely use DeWolfe again. They are the best plumbing company we have ever used in the 20+ years we have owned our house.  A+++

plumbers.name: Jastal Plumbing
plumbers.address: 8936 OH-14 unit a, Streetsboro, OH 44241, USA

reviews.author: Michael Janesch
reviews.text: I highly recommend Jastal Plumbing. They were very prompt in getting an estimator out and they started the job a few days later. The crew was very professional and got the job done promptly. We had an issue with a small leak and the urinal needed to be anchored better. They were out the next day to fix the small issues. I will definitely use them again in the future.

reviews.author: P M
reviews.text: I had a new whole house filter installed and a new valve installed to fix a leaky bathtub. Paul and Kyle came out and did a great job. Both men were very courteous and professional throughout the day. The day after they left I found a small issue with the filter. I called Jastal in the morning and Paul and Kyle came back out the same day and rectified the issue. They were truly great and I will definitely use them again. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Heather Bridgeman
reviews.text: David came to my house today to help determine the source of the water that was in my basement.  He did a great job.  He was on time, professional and extremely knowledgeable.  He took his time to thoroughly explain the current issue and the solution.  He also helped bring in another Jastal employee to test my water and offer a solution to my filtration issue with my well water.  I plan on moving forward with Jastal and absolutely want David doing the work on this repair.

reviews.author: James Martin
reviews.text:
The work order concerned repairing two leaking stack pipes, enclosed with walls, replacing ABS pipes with PVC, reseating a toilet, repairing a leaking shower cartridge control.
Everyone associated with Jastal Plumbing, Allison, Jacob, Justin and David were all very professional, courteous and knowledgeable. The work was completed on time, as promised and expertly done. Jacob answered all of my questions and explained everything. The jobsite was left clean. I had spoken with three other plumbing companies previously, who either didn't know how to proceed, didn't want to tackle the job or were unreliable. I am well pleased with Jastal Plumbing.

reviews.author: Lily Bentley
reviews.text: I will never use these plumbers. Why? Because they hire people who obviously would prefer to be race car drivers. Specifically whoever was driving truck PL47594 - T20 going up route 8 North on 12/20/24 at 8:20am. They found it necessary to weave in and out of traffic and if this vehicle was any closer to the back of my car he would be kissing it. Real great marketing.

plumbers.name: Cardinal Plumbing Heating & Air Inc
plumbers.address: 464 Herndon Pkwy suite 216a, Herndon, VA 20170, USA

reviews.author: Michelle Ortega
reviews.text: Best experience ever with Cardinal as always. Kyle was amazing. He explained everything perfectly. Gave us some great options to upgrade our thermostat. Also changed our UV filter. So glad we found cardinal. Every time they come out they always do a great job and always keep us updated on our upcoming HVAC services, so it’s no need to worry about anything. They schedule everything and keep track of everything too.

reviews.author: ryan newell
reviews.text: Cardinal is great! We were dealing with an issue for weeks that was a real head scratcher. And it was an emergency as our heat kept kicking off when temperatures were dropping to the single digits. Sergii saved the day! A true expert at his craft. Took the time to educate me on how our system works and provided helpful tips around preventive maintenance. He found the issue which was not easy but fixed it immediately. This company’s customer service is top notch throughout the entire process. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Aimee Wedlake
reviews.text: Efficient and incredibly kind. Made sure everything was in good working order and even took old filter and box away. Took extra time to show me details on thermostat etc and was very patient with my over friendly dog :)

reviews.author: Feraz Mohammed
reviews.text: My experience with the Cardinal Service has been excellent. The call service is always available. Response is and communication should be a template for other companies to follow. My Service Tech (Danny) was very professional. He listened to my problem with the system. He asked questions about the system to help triage the issue. At the end he explained what work was done and his findings. Everything was placed as they were. The whole service from start to end was top notch. Lastly, the maintenance cost that Cardinal provide is super competitive value.

reviews.author: Alexandra Pinkowski
reviews.text: Sergii was very professional, respectful and extremely nice. Took the time to explain what he was checking and told me exactly what needed to be done, made process feel easy and stress free. Highly recommended!

plumbers.name: Bishop Plumbing, Heating and Cooling, Inc.
plumbers.address: 901 E Business Center Dr, Mt Prospect, IL 60056, USA

reviews.author: Alaina Welch
reviews.text: BISHOP!!!!!!! James and Scott are very nice guys. They came to fix my heater. Scott was very teachable he explained every step to me that they were doing and what the problem was. They fixed, cleaned and wiped the heater down. My heater was very dirty and dusty. I would recommend these 2 guys!!! I also would like to say it was a tight squeeze  where my furnace was but they made it work!! Great job guys ..

reviews.author: Samantha Gibson
reviews.text:
We called Bishops to have my mom toilet fixed. Thinking it was due to be repaired or replaced. The tech Joe S. saw that is was working just fine but needed a deep clean. After the cleaning was completed Joe had my mom see that everything was working perfectly!
Asked about something for my own self personally & he was nice enough to give me a quote so that I could save up some money. Mentioned that we had coupons and he worked with those . We definitely recommend Bishops for your plumbing needs especially in the Bay Colony area they know how everything is set.

reviews.author: Jenny Murphy
reviews.text: Scott and Bill came to fix our bathtub drain. Our son put a toy wash cloth down it during bath time. They discovered that our plumbing was out of date, replaced it and did extra rodding to find the difficult wash cloth. They also advised replacing a cast iron pipe , unbeknownst to us, had a huge crack on top. They spent extra time making sure everything was right and working properly. We so appreciate their attention to detail and thoroughness.

reviews.author: Elizabeth Ball
reviews.text: I was referred to Bishop Plumbing by Carrozza Plumbing and I'm so thankful for their professionalism and great work ethic.  Joe and Lionel were amazing, I had tree roots and the previous company did not do the job well.  Bishop does things RIGHT, they did a fantastic job and Joe kept me informed during the entire painful process.  Thank you guys!!  We appreciate your hard work.

reviews.author: Kate Cummings
reviews.text:
I cannot figure out how anyone is giving them anything other than 1 star.  Interesting, they have only a 1.5 rating on yelp????
Anyway, the place is a total scam. Charged us thousands of dollars and claimed they found the break. Turns out the x he was referring to was actually from a tree trimming job done the week earlier. He came to the door 3 times. Each time looking for more money to do further investigation. In the end they never found the cause. We than had a local independent guy come out. He found the break and didn't even charge us for the camera use. Bishop only offered us $100 compensation. However, if we took the $100 we had to sign a waiver stating we would not publish bad reviews. Well that says it all. We refused the $100 just so we would be able to warn others in our neighborhood of the sketchy services. We care more about being a good neighbor than getting $100. STAY AWAY!!!

plumbers.name: Jerry's Plumbing, Heating & Air Conditioning
plumbers.address: 319 N Russell Ave, Santa Maria, CA 93458, USA

reviews.author: Bill Hrnjak
reviews.text: The technician, David, was extremely knowledgeable aa well as very intelligent.  He communicated extremely well both by phone and in person.  He was able to "McGyver" the broken cartridge on the hot water side of our upstairs shower on Saturday afternoon into the off position which allow us to turn the main water back on in the house, early on Saturday afternoon.  He was able to go to the supply house and acquire a pair of NOS replacement cartridges early Monday morning and basically rebuilt our 40 plus year old shower early Monday afternoon.  David was an excellent mechanic aa well as a real gentleman too.  I rate his service at 5 stars.

reviews.author: Christine Fogh (ChristineFoghMusic)
reviews.text: I needed a new water heater, and they didn't waste any time. They went and picked up the new unit and had it fully installed within two hours. The whole process was seamless, and the pricing was very reasonable. Highly recommend for anyone who needs reliable, fast plumbing service!

reviews.author: Lisa Janke
reviews.text: The installation service for my new furnace provided by Jerry’s Plumbing was top notch. Jose and Juan were professional, friendly and meticulous in their work. I particularly appreciate that they took extra care to not damage the drywall or molding around the opening to my attic. I would highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Mike Andersson
reviews.text:
We had a furnace replacement through our home warranty, and they sent out Jerry’s. Armando was so nice, and very professional, he asked lots of questions and did a thorough investigation. It was determined it needed replacing. Jerry’s and the home warranty rep communicated in a very timely manner, and the furnace and all the necessary parts arrived very quickly! We were able to schedule the install at our convenience, and Armando and Jose arrived bright and early for the installation. They kept us informed about the roof work, when they needed gas and the breaker shut off, etc. Both Jose and Armando were so nice, and really knew their stuff!! They walked me through the furnace operations and parts while they were assembling, and when it was all done I got a wonderful tutorial on how everything works!! 10/5 STARS!! 🌟 ⭐️

We won’t hesitate to call Jerry’s for any future work we need-plumbing, heating, or AC. We received timely texts and email reminders of important steps and arrival times, which were super helpful!! We couldn’t be happier with the company and service.
(Written by Valerie Andersson)

reviews.author: Carl Krugmeier
reviews.text: Fair and work done exactly as promised.  Easy to schedule within a reasonable time.  John was professional and personable. He answered my questions quite well.  Will call you back the next time

plumbers.name: DrainMaster Drain Cleaning & Sewer Line Repair
plumbers.address: 4696 Trabue Rd, Columbus, OH 43228, USA

reviews.author: Nataliya
reviews.text: Great customer service. John was very knowledgeable at what he does. I was so glad to have found Drain Masters. They were able to schedule me in quickly ( next day) compared to the other company (a 24 hr emergency service plumbing company ) which was scheduled a week out. ??

reviews.author: Sherri Lengacher
reviews.text: John was fantastic! He was kind, intentional, and took the time to thoroughly assess the issue before getting to work. He went above and beyond to make sure our drain was fully unclogged and running properly. We truly appreciated his professionalism and attention to detail. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: CJ Deas
reviews.text:
From my first phone call to Drain Masters they (Charity) were attentive, responsive and clear in terms of options and costs. They got us on the schedule quickly as well. Great communication during the entire process. The techs, Devin and Eric, clearly knew what they were doing, easy to talk with, explained things clearly and got the job done quickly and efficiently. I highly recommend this company. (Just for context, this was a commercial call to a relatively old church building, so a little more complicated, I'm guessing, than a residential call.)

We did need a follow up visit, and I'm happy to say that it was taken care of efficiently and professionally, just as the first was. I'm very happy with DrainMaster.

reviews.author: Kevin Seiple
reviews.text: Just before Christmas my basement floor drain kept backing up all over. I called Drain Master’s the day after Christmas as they had good reviews and were local family owned. John and Dillon came out in about 4 hours to investigate. They were very knowledgeable, professional and nice guys all around. Thankfully I had an outside drain clean out and chose to hydrojet and camera my main line. They were here about 2 hours scoping and jetting my line as it was tree roots causing the problem. My house is 93 years old and it was great to watch their camera scoping to see that my overall drain was still in quite good condition!  They let me hangout with them the whole time and learned they also do many other drain, plumbing and HVAC work as well. Will definitely use again for any future issues!

reviews.author: Jules Coleman
reviews.text: Phone call was answered immediately, Charity was super helpful in getting a same-day hydrojet appointment set up for my blocked sewer drain. Prices were clear and quoted up front - $950 for hydrojet and camera with a 1-year warranty, plus a $150 fee for coming out after 5pm, and that was still half of what I was quoted by Eco Plumbers. The techs arrived a little earlier than our appointment window, first time that's ever happened to me before! They called to say they were on their way and were very polite, friendly, and knowledgeable and didn't talk down to me at all. All the good reviews are true and I will be using DrainMaster for all of my future plumbing needs!

plumbers.name: Andersen Plumbing, Heating and AC Repair
plumbers.address: 1554 Crescent Lake Dr, Montgomery, IL 60538, USA

reviews.author: Anabelita G Merck
reviews.text: He did a excellent job. He was very polite and answered all our questions. This is the kind of company you want to come to fix and maintenance your equipment. But will not be possible if you don't have people like Austin Ramirez he deserves a big compensation or bonus. We really like him and thanks again for the service he did an our home. Definitely we will continue working with Andersen Plumbing and Heating an the future.  The Merck's.

reviews.author: David Podjasek
reviews.text: David and his team were incredibly efficient and friendly. They installed a brand new furnace and air conditioning system. The process throughout the day was easy and the result is EXCELLENT! Would definitely recommend... I had two toilets replaced with them a week ago and that experience was just as good!

reviews.author: Frank Rivera
reviews.text:
We have nothing but great things to say about Anderson. We have had them do yearly maintenance on our HVAC and its always been a great experience. Their techs are professional, super knowledgeable and recommend other optional services that help ensure your system is at optimal level.

For example, we had them install a UV light in our HVAC system & boy what a difference!! The house smells alot more fresh & its a peace of mind to know that there are no viruses or bacteria growth in your unit!! Thank you Anderson for your superior service.

reviews.author: Dave Lach
reviews.text: Jon was extremely personable and very friendly. This guy loves his job! The quote we got from him was reasonable considering we needed two furnaces replaced. We’ve used Anderson’s for plumbing in the past and never had any issues, so we decided to try them for 2 complete furnace replacements after the heat exchangers were defective. They always have been honest and upfront with no gimmicks. No upselling, just give you exactly what you need for your house. Kyle came by to inspect the old units initially, and then again a day after the installers left to make some minor adjustments to the new units. He is simply fantastic at what he does and just a wonderful person to talk with. The installers, Sam, Richard, & Kris were fast and efficient and got the job done in less than 8 hrs for 2 units. These guys made sure everything was left cleaner than when they found it and left to our satisfaction. The Anderson H&P experience has always been top notch!

reviews.author: Charm
reviews.text: We called Andersen Heating because we needed to replace our old furnace. From the 1st call to the completed installation of a new Lennox furnace, the Andersen team did a great job! I was kept informed, the installers worked hard, and everyone involved was great! Thank you to Cory, Jon, Sam, Ron, Erin. Thank you to Chad Andersen for offering a quality product. I didn't realize how loud my old furnace was or the different temperatures from room to room until this morning! I woke up to a comfortable home! The new furnace is quiet and every room is comfortable with a consistent temperature. Thank you to the Andersen Team!

plumbers.name: Trojan Plumbing Company, Inc.
plumbers.address: 4568 Rumsey Ave, Oak Lawn, IL 60453, USA

reviews.author: Manny Ardon
reviews.text:
Better plumbing companies out there that actually respond and follow through. Check out my reviews, I found an amazing plumbing company that actually follow through and does amazing honest work.  I reached out to Trojan Plumbing Inc, scheduled a day for them to come out and check out the leaking issues I was having in my home. They showed up, promised a quote and never heard back from them again. I even reached out via their portal after a week for an update with no response.

Be a bit more professional and if you don’t want to take the job let people know. It’s understandable. Instead of wasting everyone’s time and having no communication at all. Everyone do yourself a favor and don’t waste your time. Better and more professional companies out there.

reviews.author: Shirley Roberson
reviews.text:
Hats off to Dan and Conner.  I had an incredible experience with them.  They did a great job installing a new kitchen faucet and tubular under the kitchen sink.  In addition, they replaced the toilet tank flapper and handle for me.

Both Dan and Conner were informative, thorough and professional.  They made sure everything was installed correctly before they left my house.  I will definitely do business with Trojan Plumbing Company, Inc. again.

reviews.author: Michael Lyons
reviews.text: “Trojan Plumbing did an outstanding job at our home in 60652. They quickly rodded out both the tub and lavatory drain lines, supplied and installed a new Moen positemp valve to replace a leaking unit, and extended the copper riser for the shower head after the soffit was removed. They also extended the 3/4” copper pipe in the kitchen so it won’t be buried by cabinets and can be properly connected during trim out. The team was responsive, professional, and efficient, with no delays. Excellent service, clear communication, and quality workmanship — highly recommend!”

reviews.author: Emily Bohn
reviews.text: The guys came out quickly.  They answered all my questions and gave me options with pricing for each.  They worked quickly, and cleaned up well after themselves.   Trojan will be my plumbing company for anything moving forward.

reviews.author: williemae witt
reviews.text:
Shane was very knowledgeable and completed the work in a timely fashion.  He even explained other issues not related to plumbing that need attention.  I would definitely recommend Trojan.
Troy was especially personable on the phone.  He made me feel comfortable about the job his company would be doing.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 1603 Orrington Ave #600-1085, Evanston, IL 60201, USA

reviews.author: Jonathan Buchholz
reviews.text:
Edgar showed up on time and ready to work... Great, personal guy who knew his stuff. Estimated I had approx. 30' clog from my sink, had it rooted out and done within 20 min. Excellent work.
-Jon

reviews.author: Emily Sproule
reviews.text: Lawrence was absolutely phenomenal! Very professional, knowledgeable, and kind. His perseverance is remarkable. My husband and I truly grateful for the exceptional service that has been provided. Thank you, Lawrence, for an exceptional job well done. We give you 10 stars!!!

reviews.author: liz charney
reviews.text: Shout out to Ronnie Levandowski  who has guided us through several initial assessments in order to address plumbing repairs and improvements. He is friendly, polite, attentive and thorough. He shares his decision making about next steps which  allows him to offers honest and appropriate options. Highly recommend Ronnie for your plumbing needs

reviews.author: Eddie mehdi
reviews.text: Nick came in to service a gas leak. He was very thorough and talked my tenant and I through all the steps and what he was doing. He was very professional with his services and explained in details wha was needed. Highly recommend him.

reviews.author: Caitlyn Ford
reviews.text: I needed someone to come and fix a toilet in an old building and J Blanton plumbing was the first to reply back to my inquiry from Angi’s list. Once I connected with them, they were able to send out a plumber within 24 hours and sent a photo of who I’d expect to be coming over. This was super helpful and an added layer of attention/safety I appreciated. John Hogan, the plumber assigned was super friendly and educational on what the issue was and the best recommendation to fix it would be in a way that was easy to understand. He was able to fix and replace my entire toilet within 2 hours. He was transparent about the pricing so I knew the options. Would highly recommend John for any emergency or general plumbing needs!

plumbers.name: Plumb Pros Inc
plumbers.address: 6525 W 52nd Ave, Arvada, CO 80002, USA

reviews.author: Tyler Burke
reviews.text:
My heat went out today during the snowstorm, and I was really stressed that it was going to be a big issue or take a long time to get someone out. I called Plumb Pros and they had a technician at my house within 90 minutes.

Charlie was awesome! He was friendly, professional, and very straightforward about everything he was doing. He explained the issue clearly, gave honest feedback, and had my furnace fixed in no time.

I’ve used Plumb Pros multiple times for plumbing, AC, and now furnace work, and they’ve been consistently excellent every time. They are extremely customer-oriented, true professionals, and always reliable. They never try to upsell or take advantage of the situation, and they do exceptional work without breaking your wallet.

I’m very grateful for their help today and highly recommend Plumb Pros to anyone looking for trustworthy and reliable service.

reviews.author: Summer Kirkpatrick
reviews.text: I called Plumb Pros to come out and fix our heater and backed up kitchen sink. Not only did they resolve these problems and ensure that our appliances were back up and running properly, but they were professional and well educated. Charlie & Fonz were so polite and very informative as they went over all of the options for payment, financing, and available discounts as well. Definitely glad we called this company and would certainly recommend them to anyone in the future! Thank you so much!

reviews.author: Greg Meyers
reviews.text:
I highly recommend Plumb Pros for your plumbing work. TL;DR: Fonz and team installed a Rinnai tankless water heater with expertise. Solid install and very professional interactions.

The longer story is that I had an 18-year old failing tankless water heater that needed repaired or replaced. I called a recommended plumbing company to address the issue and the plumber made the entire experience feel transactional. He didn't ask questions to understand my issue and simply did not convey any sense of wanting to help. I called Plumb Pros on the next day. Fonz came out, assessed the situation and gave me options - something we all want - including a well-priced replacement solution. He and team came out soon after to do a complete replacement. Nothing was left incomplete and no shortcuts were taken. I believe in writing solid reviews for companies and people who deserve them. Plumb Pros earned not only business, but also my trust.

reviews.author: Cathy Montoya
reviews.text:
This company has my five stars! They have been servicing my home for almost a decade. The brothers Fonzo and Alfredo have gone above and beyond to make me happy and my house warm. Matt David Alfonso and Fonzo are always professional knowledgeable and on time. They make the wrongs right and I know I can count on them. Claudia is on point and knows her job well. She always takes care of me. The owner is great and runs a good business. I would recommend them to all I know. Use them you won't be disappointed
Cathy Montoya

reviews.author: Jenny
reviews.text:
First of all thank you to Philip and Deborah We are so grateful for you💓. Thank you for always being there. You have an amazing team.
Plumb Pros is affordable, reliable, professional and helpful team.
All Plumb Pros techs are amazing. We are so thankful for the work done on our home.
Jason and Mat were amazing, Helpful, professional, kind, efficient, diligent, and very respectful.
It was no easy task bringing the water heater down our basements tiny entrance they got the job done.
THANK YOU PLUMB PROS.
Finally a warm long enough shower.
We are so blessed.

plumbers.name: Plumbing In Pink
plumbers.address: 102B Mountain Ridge Industrial Park, Taylors, SC 29687, USA

reviews.author: April Needles
reviews.text: Jason was awesome!  Arrived on time, friendly, knowledgeable, & respectful. He got everything completed quickly & left our bathrooms as clean if not cleaner than when he got there. I will use Plumbing in Pink every time we need plumbing fixed.   Thank you for being able to get us an appointment so quick!

reviews.author: Holly Anderson
reviews.text: I am very impressed. I got a friendly voice after the first ring and did not have to leave a message, a voicemail, or call back. Laurie listened to my problem and sent someone out within a few hours. My technician Pat was very knowledgeable and thorough in his explanation. He is obviously very experienced. He fixed my issue right away. He was also super nice and personable! We have had a hard time with contractors, so we feel lucky to have found this company to rely on for all our plumbing work.

reviews.author: Cam McKinney
reviews.text: Plumbing in pink has helped me out over the past few years to maintain my plumbing issue. They are kind and fast and always able to resolve my issue to get me running again. Over the holiday they came out and replaced the pipe in my front yard. They were very professional and efficient. I appreciate Laurie and her team for their help and hard work. Thank you! Will be using them again!

reviews.author: Kevin Hendricks
reviews.text: We had a major sewer line disaster and Plumbing in Pink came to the rescue. They were easy to schedule and got here quickly. It was not an easy job but Jason was an expert plumber and Alex was an expert at excavating. They also left the site clean when the job was done. Pricing was very reasonable. Thank you, Plumbing in Pink!

reviews.author: Sandra Teague
reviews.text: We highly recommend Plumbing in Pink. They responded immediately, were extremely professional, and our technician, Jason Guy, was knowledgeable of all the details needed to make repairs within the hour. We also did not expect but appreciated a Veterans discount that was an extra bonus to our experience.

plumbers.name: River City Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 1125 Paramount Pkwy E, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Brian Karel
reviews.text:
Our old injector pump was working but needed replacing along all the piping. Jake did an amazing job. He explained everything thoroughly along with showing what needs to be done.  Only took 1 hour. Very professional!!!!  Arrived on time.
Getting this preventive maintenance done before parts break is well worth it.
Highly recommend River City Plumbing.

Brian K

reviews.author: Michelle
reviews.text:
I am so grateful to Dustin Bradley & River City Plumbing. 5 stars for high quality work, professionalism, very fair about fees, super fast at responding and resolving the problem, and excellent clean up,!

Specifically, I contacted them to diagnosis and repair a problem with my shower & tub and toilet not properly draining.  Dustin was really fast to respond and come on site, and he knew immediately what the problem was and how to fix it.  Plus he and my technician Joseph were professional, polite and friendly when interacting with me, patient with my questions, and clearly communicated throughout the process.

Dustin went above and beyond making sure the drain line was cleared all the way out to the public lines, he was also wonderful at testing the work to be sure the problem was solved and that all was clear and clean underneath and around the house.

They also guarantee their work to be sure that you don’t have the same problem in the near future.

Thank you Dustin & River City Plumbing!

reviews.author: Susan Teska
reviews.text: This is the second time we’ve used River City Plumbing. They’re very reasonably priced, friendly, and prompt. I like that they keep you updated with texts and send a photo of the tech so you know who’s coming to your house.  No complaints here!

reviews.author: Chris Wegner
reviews.text: Danny Ramirez and his co-worker came out to clean out my shower drain and it was done quick and easy!! They also installed a new shower head i had purchased at the last minute. These guys were very nice and courteous, answered all my questions with no problem!! I will definitely hire them again!

reviews.author: Thomas Paul
reviews.text: My PTSD with plumbing companies is finally over. River City Plumbing was professional, easy to schedule an appointment with and they sent a thoughtful and focused plumber team (Conall &  Chris).  Pricing was very good and the time of service was efficient. I can now move forward with non-priority plumbing needs, because I found my plumbing team!

plumbers.name: Drain & Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 95 Meyerson Way, Wheeling, IL 60090, USA

reviews.author: Yaroslav Soltys
reviews.text: Had an issue with my laundry sink and my laundry faucet. My friend recommended I called Drain And plumbing services Because they had worked on his house in the past. Valerie was very nice in answering my call and scheduling the appointment. Roman was my plumber and he was excellent. The price was fair and the work was done very fast. I also got warranty on labor from the company, which is a big bonus. I will continue to call them from now on.

reviews.author: Katerina Shevel
reviews.text: Drain And Plumbing Services did an excellent job fixing the sink at my restaurant. They responded quickly, showed up on time, diagnosed the issue right away, and got everything working perfectly with minimal disruption to our business. Very professional, clean, and efficient. Highly recommend them for any commercial plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Helen Gluzkin
reviews.text:
We used Drain  & Plumbing Services previously a few times. They always provide very good service. This time the service was amazing!
Jerry, the technician, was very knowledgeable, professional, smart and prompt!
Also, Valerie from the front desk was very friendly, always answering the phone right away and always willing to help.
We pleased with the completed job and will recommend this company to anyone who needs plumbing or drain work.

reviews.author: Yevheniia Dashevsky
reviews.text: The service was top-notch. The work was done by an excellent plumber who knows his job 1000%. The problem was fixed quickly and efficiently. I'm very happy I found this service. I definitely recommend it.

reviews.author: Matt Reid
reviews.text: This was my second time using Drain and Plumbing Services and I was again very satisfied with the work done. They installed a new sump pump system in my house and were able to complete the project quickly and for less money than their initial quote.   I highly recommend them for your plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Kwik Serv Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 1047 E High St, Mundelein, IL 60060, USA

reviews.author: Char Oslund
reviews.text:
I used this company on recommendation of my home owners ins. However, I am very pleased on so many levels... with the quick schedualing, the service was beyond  professional as well as accurate!  The service man was so sweet and courteous, on time. My toilet wasn't really even broken, he showed me how to fix it if it happens again. Over all... a really great experience!  And to think if I wasn't for my ins company, I may not have known to call them.  I am 65 and have had my fair share of service calls. Firstly, you worry as you don't want to get "taken", and then there is the lateness along with the attitude and rudeness... none of that!  I am telling you... so refreshing! I will us them even when its not a insurance issue. I feel  confident that I will have no issues.
Gina at the office is also great.

reviews.author: Hope Engels
reviews.text: Kwik Serv Plumbing is an amazing company. First, I would like thank Gina who works in the office. She was amazing. Very courteous and sweet. She assisted me with scheduling the installation and answered all of my questions. Gina also assisted me with scheduling the Village of Buffalo Grove for the final inspection. Alex A and Adrien were the technicians who installed the new hot water heater and they were amazing. They were courteous and professional. They were prompt and cleaned up completely after the installation was completed. They also gave me an explanation on what they did and how the new hot water heater works. I highly recommend this company. You will not be sorry.

reviews.author: Ben Stylez
reviews.text: Andy is hands-down the best HVAC technician I’ve worked with. He showed up on time, knew exactly what he was doing, and broke everything down in a way that actually made sense. No rushing, no guesswork—just pure professionalism and skill. He treated my home like it was his own and made sure everything was 100% before leaving. If Andy is on the job, you’re in great hands. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend him to anyone.

reviews.author: Tammie Clarke
reviews.text:
Josh P. was absolutely outstanding! He was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly polite throughout the entire service. His customer service skills were top-notch—he brought back that old-school feeling of being truly valued as a customer. It’s rare to find someone who takes such pride in their work and treats clients with genuine respect. If I ever need plumbing help again, Josh will be my first request. Highly recommended!

Thanks,
Tammie

reviews.author: Nyronia Clark
reviews.text: Ulises was great! He explained the issues and why replacement parts were needed.  He took his time and properly installed faucets & pop up extension. He made sure to thoroughly test after installation.  He also found the source of the leak.  He was great with communicating as well as the work performed.  The job was just completed yesterday, so hopefully there will be no future issues related to this job.  I’d so I will leave another review.  However with the service he provided I belief that will be unlikely.  I will be sure to request Kwik Serv and Ulises for my plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Pro-Rooter Plumbing & Drain Services
plumbers.address: 9501 Timberwind Ln, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Lord Khang
reviews.text: Shelby and Trent came out and solved a challenge with my septic system that other veteran companies could not without wanting to charge ten or more thousand dollars.  Total professionals whose thoroughness is unmatched in the industry.  The results were exceptional. Their recommendation sound.  I spent far, far less to obtain the best possible result.  Thank you, so very much.  And that Angus guy on the phone, truly a pleasure to deal with sir, I salute all of you.

reviews.author: Kedrin Coleman
reviews.text: I can’t say enough good things about Shelby. I’m very happy with the service he provided. He was timely, professional, & quick to diagnose/fix the issue I was having. I would highly recommend him and Pro-Rooter Plumbing and Drain Services to anyone in need of plumbing services.

reviews.author: Jason Thaxton
reviews.text: Angus and his team were the best plumbers I have dealt with. Quick, transparent, quote. Arrived right on time to replace our water heater. Communicated with me regarding every step of the way. The work was completed much faster than I could have imagined. The work was impeccable, and our garage was cleaner when they left than when they started. No doubt they will be my first and only call going forward. Can't recommend them strongly enough. It's great when you find a trustworthy and talented company.

reviews.author: Austin Johnston
reviews.text: Trent and Shelby came out to my house this afternoon. They explained to me through step by step of what our situation was looking like in a very professional manner. I would definitely recommend to anyone and definitely going to contact them for any future repairs I have going forward.

reviews.author: Julia Towe
reviews.text: Shelby was so kind and very helpful. He as Professional, quick , high quality work. Will definitely be using him again. Thank you Shelby!

plumbers.name: Pro Plumbing Plus Electric
plumbers.address: 302 S Spring St, Manchester, TN 37355, USA

reviews.author: Carrie Fierro
reviews.text: We tried to save some money and DIY the plumbing ourselves. After the second clog, we gave these guys a call and glad we did. They came out addressed/corrected the issue and ran new main sewer lines. Anthony, Matthew and Curtis were great! Answered my questions, explained the worked completed and left a clean workspace after. From the time you call and speak with sweet Brittany to the final walk-through with Anthony and Curtis you know you are in good hands.

reviews.author: Samra Thut
reviews.text:
Great experience so far! They thoroughly tested for a leak, clearly explained everything, and confirmed the issue. Very honest, professional, and helpful. Glad I chose them!

Update: Anthony & Andrew came out to perform leak detection and had to cut through the drywall, but they did minimal damage and were able to neatly cover it afterward, which I found really impressive. They quickly located the leak and  improvised on the spot to avoid having to jackhammer through my slab.

They truly went the extra mile to find the most cost-effective solution possible, and I really appreciated their effort and honesty throughout the process. I can’t recommend them enough and will definitely be using them exclusively going forward.

reviews.author: Susan Mundell
reviews.text: Chris and Todd were wonderful.  They told me exactly what was wrong (Old cast iron pipes) and cleared the clog as well as I willing me how much it will be to replace the old pipes.  They were very polite and helpful.  I will definitely be contacting Pro Plumbing Plus to get pipes replaced when I can get the money together.  But at least they cleared the blockage in the pipes so I am no longer getting a backwash into my tub and shower.

reviews.author: Doug B
reviews.text: Anthony and Matrhew were professional and courteous and  set my new propane tankless water heater up in one day.  It works great!  The guys even cleaned up the work area after they were done.  Brittany did a great job getting the job scheduled quick and calling to let me know when they were about 45 minutes out for the install.  Price was great too for high quality work and product. Great company that I will definitely be recommending to my friends and family!

reviews.author: Madeline Ritter
reviews.text: I would look somewhere else. This company is not worth the money they estimate. Paid close to 700 dollars for a sink to be reattach the countertop. First guy came he was on time and very polite told me the estimate 693.00 and that they are the cheapest around for a job like this. After "fixing" the sink told us not to use it for 24hrs we didnt. Having to do take out for the night. Couple days later it wasnt attached anymore. Called and told them with what happen same tech came out and "fixed" it again told us to not use it for 24hrs. We didnt use it for 48 hours so take out for 2 nights not cheap first all for a family of 6. After using it for a week the sink detached from the countertop again. Call and explain my frustration on this matter. They sent out a different person. When he came we told him what has happen. Seemed like he didnt believe us or something. He was kinda rude on the matter. Again we cant use our sink for 3 days this was over the weekend. Which was a big inconvenience but at this ponit we just want the sink fixed. After fixing the sink he tell my sister we can not use to the sink until the seal is dry and if it gets wet and they are called out again for it we will be charged. He was not clear on the 5 year warranty they offer. Is the warranty void because they can not fix the problem the first time. My sister sent pictures of the finished work it looks like there is still a gap from the sink to the countertop. I would not recommend this company to anyone.

plumbers.name: The Fair Plumber LLC
plumbers.address: 846 N York St, Elmhurst, IL 60126, USA

reviews.author: JH
reviews.text: I had to get the line routed out between the house and the street, once that was fixed he had to repair the wax ring.   Jose was my plumber,  he was awesome!  Polite and knowledgeable.   A great smile too!  I will definitely use him again. Thank you Jose!! 😊

reviews.author: Peggy Woloszyk
reviews.text:
Our house is 100 years old. Water was backing up into our basement shower. We called 3 companies and only Fair Plumbing sent someone out that same day.

Manny used the camera and found that some clay pipes had shifted and rodding out the pipes did not clear the build up.

The next day, Manny, Anthony and Gabriel arrived. A section of the basement concrete floor needed to be jackhammered to expose the pipe. Once exposed, they also found a hole in the sewer pipe and in the drain pipe.
The clay pipes were replaced with a 10 foot PVC pipe, a new drain and two clean out traps were also installed.
Anthony and Gabriel did a great job laying the new concrete and Manny made sure to keep us informed throughout the entire project.
The team came on time, plastic was hung around the work area, they mopped the floor and did a great job cleaning up. They told us what they needed to do and they got it done. Thank you so much!

reviews.author: Ron & Yasha Talaga
reviews.text: Our toliet had been sprouting water from the tank, as well as leaking from around the bottom. Thomas and Rolando from The Fair Plumbers came out, and replaced the wax seal which was pretty much nonexistent, replaced the supply line and reconnected the valve. They were quick, thorough, and informative. The office also did a good job communicating when the plumbers were scheduled and on their way. Overall a great experience!

reviews.author: Orlando Santiago Jr
reviews.text:
Jose and Eric were INCREDIBLE!
Honest, upfront and super helpful with every option they had. They truly saved the day!  The laundry sink broke in the back and when I was unable to reach or see what the issue was i shut the main water valve off and began calling. No one was available, or they were too far away to be bothered until I reached out to The Fair Plumber. They came within an hour and handled it. Will use them again and highly recommend their services

reviews.author: Cruse Family
reviews.text: I called due to a malfunction with our pump. We had warranty with them. I called and they came out to replace it the same day at no charge. Jesus was super helpful at explaining what happened and over all we are very satisfied with the work.

plumbers.name: Brandenburg Plumbing, Heating, & Air
plumbers.address: 320 N Ridge Rd Ste 2B, Marble Falls, TX 78654, USA

reviews.author: Chris Cabiya
reviews.text:
Brandenburg Plumbing provided excellent service diagnosing and repairing a water leak for one of my trusted seller clients. The issue was identified quickly, clearly explained, and resolved properly by replacing the leaking valve. Efficient, professional, and done right the first time.

Lucas, the owner and master plumber, sets a high standard. His expertise, professionalism, and leadership are evident throughout the process. He takes a methodical, no-nonsense approach and prioritizes quality workmanship.

The entire team was professional and respectful, and communication was smooth from start to finish. An honorable mention to Nick McBride, an outstanding journeyman plumber whose skill, attention to detail, and professionalism stood out.

For context, I am Chris Cabiya, Founder and Principal Realtor® at Cabiya Realty Group and a local real estate investor serving the Highland Lakes area, including Marble Falls, Horseshoe Bay, and Granite Shoals. I hold service providers to very high standards on behalf of my clients. Brandenburg Plumbing met those standards without hesitation.

Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Janet Bray
reviews.text: Brandenburg plumbing and all of its employees are excellent!! I have worked with them for nearly 30 years and they have come to my rescue time and time again. They are all very knowledgeable, helpful and courteous. This time it was Gabriel and Colton fixing my old plumbing issues. Gabriel goes above and beyond; and is very thorough. Thanks again guys!!

reviews.author: T E
reviews.text: It was easy to make an appointment and they addressed my leak the same day. Nick was amazing! A leak in a wall is never good news but he did everything he could to minimize the wall cut, worked quickly and was able to solve the problem without extensive repairs. This was a great experience and I’m so happy I was able to work with Nick. He was polite, friendly, explained everything along the way. He left the area super clean as well.

reviews.author: joan redbird
reviews.text: Great experience. Colt worked hard and got the job done. He was polite, friendly, and professional. Mr Brandenburg stopped by checked the job. He was also friendly and professional. Pleased with service. Would recommend! Thanks

reviews.author: Rami Segal
reviews.text: Highly professional service all around. House water filter canister cracked with the last freeze. We called after hours on Friday and Brandon came next day to evaluate. He made great recommendation for improvement of the system and provided an estimate. Work was done and Brandon sent pictures of the complete job. Great company, Great service , Highly recommended. I will use again when needed.

plumbers.name: ACE Home Services (formerly AZ Best Plumbing)
plumbers.address: 50 Stutz Bearcat Dr Ste 3, Sedona, AZ 86336, USA

reviews.author: Dianne Echazabal
reviews.text: These guys are the very best. I needed  to put a freeze free spigot in the paddocks behind my small barn.They came out together and had the difficult job completed in about 1.5  hours. They made the suggestion to put a "shut off " valve in the box should there be any problem with this spigot. Also suggested we diconnect all the hoses from their bibs during the winter. Friendly  knowlegable with good advice. Many thanks. You did a terrific job.

reviews.author: John Goodman
reviews.text:
Recently had two complete HVAC systems replaced at our home in Verde Santa Fe. First I appreciated the non pressure of the sales and management staff to make a decision and their patience with all our questions as well as concerns.
The three man crew that came to do the job were very polite, knowledgeable and efficient.
The total job was completed in two days, one system per day. Everything working perfectly.
They cleaned up nicely too.
I highly recommend ACE Home Services. (8/6/24)

Adding to my review, ACE was the only company I spoke with that would install and warranty their work for a Mini-Split AC unit I purchased independently.
Joshua Hogan, did an excellent job with the installation of the 24k BTU unit I purchased online.  Joshua was one of the 3 installers on the main house installation.  They all did excellent work and took any time needed to answer and questions, concerns or requests we had during the installations.

Before the main house was done we were having a problem with small particles and what looked like pink insulation coming down from one of duct lines.  After a duct cleaning the problem still continued, but slightly less.  Technician Marshall crawled around in the very hot attic inspecting the duct run looking for an obvious hole. No luck.  ACE offered to replace the whole duct run at a very reasonable cost and so they did. Upon inspection of the removed 50' of duct it was determined that the particles were actually particles of rust material flaking off the old A-coil.
Problem solved!  Thanks for pursuing the problem.

I would not hesitate to call or recommend ACE and use any of the service staff. Our job was big and it was a pleasant, unstressful experience.
We are very please.  (8/22/24)

reviews.author: Robert Ganem
reviews.text: I have used ACE Home Services a couple of times for my vacation rentals, but was very disappointed by my last experience.  They scheduled a plumber to come out on Saturday to unclog a toilet.  I informed my guest, but no one ever showed up, nor did anyone call to say they would not be showing up.  I called the next day and was again given an appointment window.  Again, no one showed up and no one even called!  I can understand that certain calls can take longer and needing to reschedule, but not even calling to let me know is really inexcusable.  The fact that it happened twice, unfortunately, lets me know that it's just how they operate. After the service, I received a standard survey request and had a chance to speak to a representative for the company. She was cordial, but I did not get the sense that any steps would be taken to avoid this type of poor service in the future.  Very sad.

reviews.author: Bridget
reviews.text: I had a new furnace and thermostat installed and the ducts cleaned out in a 1000 sq ft Flagstaff home. The entire process from start to finish was excellent. Sol did a great job with the quote and decisions on what to install. Lisa and Tom did fantastic assisting me to coordinate services and payment through my escrow company, Joe and Bradley did an amazing job with the installation and such cleaning (and the ducts were super gross from the previous long term tenants). I feel so fortunate to have had a great team making my new-to-me home safe and warm. Thank you ACE!

reviews.author: Helen Baker
reviews.text: Not reliable for non-emergency services. I waited in day after day, each time being rescheduled to the following day at the end of the service window. Finally got rescheduled to a weekend service window and the plumber called to say he “wasn’t driving that far unless it’s an active emergency”. So why schedule me? Wasted 3 days of my time and then ghosted. This isn’t AZ Best any more - do not recommend.

plumbers.name: Restore Plumbing and Drain
plumbers.address: 1401 Timber Dr, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: Barbara Diepenbrock
reviews.text: Quick in and out.  Half as much as a plumbing company I've been using for years with the same product and quality.  Friendly and fast.  I believe in paying fair wages and paying what for what you get but the other guys were ridiculous for what the job is.  If I wasn't old and fat now....I could do it myself but it would take me a whole day lol!  Thank you Restore Plumbing for being accessible and affordable without losing the fantastic service and quality.

reviews.author: Mike Dudek
reviews.text:
Absolute incredible experience from start to finish with the Restore team. From my very first phone call, everything was handled professionally, clearly, and with real care. The consultation with Dave was thorough and straightforward. He took the time to explain the system, answer questions, and make sure I was comfortable with every step before moving forward.

The installation work completed by John and CJ was equally impressive. They were punctual, respectful of my home, and clearly took pride in their work. The install was clean, efficient, and well explained, and they made sure everything was working properly before they left. It is obvious this team knows what they are doing and genuinely cares about delivering a great experience, not just finishing a job.

It is rare to work with a company where every touchpoint feels this well run and thoughtful. I would give this group 1000 stars if I could. Restore has absolutely earned my long term business, and I will confidently refer them to anyone I know who needs reverse osmosis or plumbing solutions. I truly appreciated the experience and could not recommend them more highly.

reviews.author: Ula Borodzinska
reviews.text: We had Kohler Veil "smart" toilet repair (still under warranty luckily).   Jonathan was on time, super polite and professional. He quickly determined issue and fixed it perfectly. Thank you Jonathan! If needed in a future I will be calling them and requesting Jonathan's services.

reviews.author: Pat Pornsakwiwat
reviews.text: The shower had no hot water. We called Restore plumbing and drain. The woman who answered the phone was very nice. John came the next day to inspect and explain the possibilities in detail. He was extremely patient and tried to fix the problem. Finally, we had hot water running. Very happy with the service we received from John.👍👍

reviews.author: Larry Wetzel
reviews.text: This is the second big job I have had in my house plumbing-wise.  Restore has done an outstanding job from start to finish. My technician, Virginio, was absolutely fantastic on explaining everything and performing the work.  Thanks again.  Will talk to you in the future.

plumbers.name: Champion Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2524 N Broadway Suite #421, Edmond, OK 73034, USA

reviews.author: Tom Teasdale
reviews.text: Zack and Bennie spent parts of two days to get this repair made that included assessment, dust containment, jack hammering to expose failed pipe, repairs, concrete patching, and cleanup. We really appreciate their professional approach and plumbing expertise. Dr B (Brian) gave us an initial assessment at the front end that established confidence and a solid plan for the work. We are very happy to have the “slab leak” behind us and Champion Plumbing with us. (TT in OKC)

reviews.author: Rudy Navarro
reviews.text:
I had a fantastic experience with Thomas from Champion Plumbing! I purchased a water softener from Home Depot, and Thomas was incredibly responsive—he arrived the very next morning after it was delivered and had the entire installation completed before noon.
What really impressed me was his attention to detail. He didn't just "hook it up"; he cleaned up the existing plumbing, ensured all pipes were properly insulated, and positioned everything so that the parts are easily serviceable in the future. He even discovered some "builder-grade" issues with the original plumbing and made on-the-fly adjustments to ensure the entire house now has softened water.
Thomas is a true professional who clearly takes pride in his work. He took the time to show me exactly how to operate the system before he left. I can’t recommend him and Champion Plumbing highly enough!

reviews.author: Osvaldo Rodriguez
reviews.text: Ethan Patton technician came to fix at pipe leak urgent same day fix behind water heater in the wall and the service was fast, knowledgeable and expertly done. 5 stars thank you very much

reviews.author: Delaney Cooley
reviews.text: Fantastic experience from start to finish. Chase was punctual, clearly explained what was going on, and got the repair done quickly. Fair pricing, great workmanship, and we felt very well taken care of.

reviews.author: M
reviews.text: Very Disappointed had them come out for a estimate. Was told it would be $80 and be removed if we proceeded. We had 10-15 feet of pipe to be routed off of our gas meter and they want $4500-$5500 to do the job! Are you kidding lol.. So we decided we would pay the $80 fee and be on our way. Well it is $89 as a fee. Just buyer beware as you need to know that is highway robbery !

plumbers.name: Bulldog Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 580 S River St, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Justin Clapper
reviews.text: Chris did phenomenal job. Knowledgeable and competent and worked efficiently. installed multiple redundancies to prevent the pipe from freezing, including a local water cut-off valve, a drain, and added necessary pitch to enable the pipe to drain properly. I was very impressed with his work. pro tip: have cash available if you plan to tip; i was not able to add a tip with my CC bc its not enabled with B'dogs transaction service.

reviews.author: N. Cavallaro
reviews.text: Had an excellent experience with Bulldog. Will recommend to all friends and neighbors. Quick to come out, very reasonable pricing! Plumber Chris was so great to work with. Fast and knowledgeable.

reviews.author: Marina Hinton
reviews.text: I am so glad I came across Bulldog Plumbing! We own a house in Aurora and have been looking for a go-to plumbing company. They were very no frills about the estimate via phone, and were able to send someone out to do our repair same day! The pricing was right on-par to what they provided via phone and my plumber was friendly and knowledgeable. Will certainly be calling Bulldog for future repairs!

reviews.author: julie tokars
reviews.text: I was very happy with my experience with Bulldog Plumbing.  They were very responsive with my request and had a quote and appt set within an hour.  The plumber was prompt, courteous and showed me exactly what he was going to do.  Price seemed reasonable.  I would recommend them for any project.

reviews.author: Jessica Grace
reviews.text: I could not recommend Bulldog plumbing more! They were fast and efficient, clean and respectful. They explained the scope of work to me and had incredibly fair pricing. He was even kind to my cat who wanted to get under the sink with him. They will be my go to company for all my plumbing needs. As a single woman, it is great to know I have such a reliable and respectful option for help when I need it!

plumbers.name: O & M Plumbing Services, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1406 Three Points Rd Ste B8, Pflugerville, TX 78660, USA

reviews.author: Shannon Markus
reviews.text: Chris was extremely helpful during the visit to our residence to fix our water heater. He was knowledgable and explained everything clearly and thoroughly. Extra points -- we actually got a different, very well known, plumbing company to come out 2 days before and they could NOT fix the issue. Chris fixed the issue in 1 hour after troubleshooting at least 5-6 different processes and explaining each one. I can not recommend O&M enough! We've used them a lot and will continue to do so. Thanks!

reviews.author: Eric H
reviews.text: My neighbor recommended Ben at O&M several years ago. They’ve been my go-to plumbers ever since. The technicians are reliable and well-trained. Great communication. Good recommendations when seeking cost-effective solutions. Reasonable pricing. And they honor their work.

reviews.author: Clinton Dobbs
reviews.text: Andrew was the most friendly, knowledgeable, and helpful professional that we’ve had out to our place. To the point, efficient, and clean work. I cannot recommend O & M Plumbing enough. There is a reason why they get so many great ratings!

reviews.author: Cyndi Nickel
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ O & M Plumbing – A True Gem!**

We recently purchased a beautiful mid-century home built in 1962, and while it had charm in spades, it also came with a few plumbing challenges. Enter **O & M Plumbing**, and more specifically, **Chris**—a master of his craft and hands-down the best plumber we've ever worked with!

From the start, Chris tackled every issue with precision, professionalism, and a genuine care for our home. He installed a **new main gas pipe** for our HVAC system, not only enabling the upgrade but also curing **slow gas leaks in the attic** that had been a lingering concern. That alone was a huge relief!

But Chris didn’t stop there. He **fixed a leaky toilet and its stubborn shut-off valve**—a problem that had stumped *three other plumbers*. His persistence and expertise were unmatched. He also installed a **new diverter tub spout** that seamlessly blended with our vintage fixtures, preserving the home’s original aesthetic while ensuring modern functionality.

And then there was the **outdoor spigot**, which had been virtually abandoned due to severe corrosion. Chris brought it back to life, solving a problem we thought was beyond repair.

Every step of the way, Chris was courteous, knowledgeable, and incredibly thorough. If you’re lucky enough to book him for your plumbing needs, you’re in excellent hands. **O & M Plumbing is a rare find, and Chris is a true plumbing hero.** Highly, *highly* recommended.

reviews.author: Marjan
reviews.text: I had a great experience with O & M Plumbing Services who visited our job site. He was very honest and took the time to explain everything in detail, ensuring I understood the situation clearly. His professionalism and transparency were much appreciated, and I feel confident in the work he recommended. Highly recommend!

plumbers.name: Flow Right Plumbing
plumbers.address: 13947 Kildare Ave, Crestwood, IL 60418, USA

reviews.author: Janet Cobb
reviews.text: Emilio was prompt, courteous and knowledgeable about what I needed done. The price was on target as well. I appreciate you guys so much.

reviews.author: Ivan Bolivar
reviews.text:
*Update*
I am adding a video and a couple photos. This is work they did. Spigot not anchored? Im pretty sure the pipes are not supposed to look like that after 1 year of barely being used.

I am writing this review because so far the owner has ghosted me. He set an appointment with me, and never showed up or had the decency to call me to let me know he wont be showing up. When I spoke to the office, i was informed that he had an emergency customer. So you guys ditch appointments for an emergency customer? Ive been calling the office and the receptionist (Michelle) can only pass on my message, which i understand. It is beyond her hands. I will change my review if anything changes but so far im very dissatisfied with their service.

I bought a house that has had complete new plumbing done by FlowRight, the 1st couple of months, the water pressure wasn't right. I couldn't have 2 showers on at the same time. Plumber came in, found the issue and told me they need to replace and  order the part off Amazon because they dont Install these parts and then gave me a quote for fixing it. When I informed him the work was done by FlowRight, he stated that it couldn't be true because they dont use these parts. He got on the phone and 10 minutes later said yes they did do the work for my house and that he can fix it. The issue was "fixed" free of charge but im confused as to why he said they had to order a new part. I left it alone. Its been a year later and Im having water pressure issues still. I called to have them check the water pressure issue and to check my water spigot because the water is shooting out of crawlspace area Instead of my spigot. I have not been able to use my spigot at all this summer and its supposed to be new plumbing. Plumber came in, and gave me a quote. 300$ for labor to take out a filter so they can identify what kind of filter, order it, and replace it. 600$ to fix the spigot because it apparantly ruptured in the winter. Im confused as to why they need to charge me 300$ in labor to figure out a filter THEY Installed. They should know what kind of filter they Installed. And 600$ to fix a spigot ive only used a couple times the summer prior.
I am writing this review because as of now I've missed a day of work to accommodate the owner Mark and for him to do a no call/no show while I missed work to meet him. He has not returned my calls. I've been calling the office and speaking with Michelle since I've gotten the quote on the 26th of June. It is now the 9th of August and Mark has yet to return a phone call.
I spoke with the manager Stephanie, nice lady. But upon speaking to her, she informed me that they had no record of their plumber going to my house last year. Very odd in my opinion especially when I explained how I needed " a new part", then the story changed to they can fix it the prior year.
I asked why would they need to charge me labor to figure out what kind of filter THEY Installed, order the filter and then install it back. She informed me that they dont always take notes in regards to the work that they do. Again, very odd. If I go do a job, and later on the customer calls me to replace something, I will know what needs to be replaced if I did the job myself but okay, fine lets move forward. I was informed that the warranty for FlowRight Plumbing is 90 days upon completion of job. As far as I know, in Illinois minimum is 2 years for plumbing warranties. I have not received a call back from FlowRight nor the owner.

I will update my review if the problem gets resolved.

reviews.author: Christina Lazauskas
reviews.text: Technician Frank was on time, friendly, and professional. We chatted briefly about the situation and he immediately went to work and quickly resolved the issue. He was respectful of my property and cleaned up everything to look like he was never even here. After the service he offered tips for sewer line maintenance, again in a friendly and professional manner.
