Overall I am very satisfied with the experience and the work provided and would absolutely recommend Flow Right Plumbing to anyone needing plumbing service.

reviews.author: jim zouras
reviews.text:
Matt and his partner were excellent! The job became a little bit of a challenge but they stayed calm and professional and patiently completed the repair. It was great to see the great and caring attitude they both portrayed.
I will definitely use Flow Right Plumbing as well as recommend them to anyone who is in need of Plumbing services.
Thank You.

reviews.author: Dawn Stevenson
reviews.text: I had a toilet that kept running after flushing.  I chose the best company I could imagine.  From beginning to end they showed kindness, care and professionalism.  I would recommend them to anyone who needs a great plumber.  Polite and caring they did the job quickly and efficiently.  Thank you so much!  I would use your revives again and again!!

plumbers.name: Expert Services - Plumbing, Heating, Air & Electrical
plumbers.address: 2330 S Main St #7, Salt Lake City, UT 84115, USA

reviews.author: John Pfaff
reviews.text:
Mark and Jonathon were fantastic and extremely professional. The job ended up being more difficult than anticipated but they were extremely knowledgeable about how to proceed. For reference, they had to move water pipes and a gas line for us and it was a huge task they accomplished.

Would recommend them to anyone as they were fantastic to work with and the company is not Private Equity owned. You can tell they are committed to providing a great service for a fair price, unlike most other plumbing companies in SLC

reviews.author: Eric Newman
reviews.text: Mika was awesome! We had to get our sewer line replaced earlier this month and he did everything he could to get us the help we needed. The plumbing manager, Aaron, did great keeping us up to date on their communications with the city. The rest of the crew who came out to help (I think Lyric, Toni, and Brandon based on my texts, but there might have been more and I apologize if I missed anybody), were great as well--they were very polite and if they needed to discuss something with us they did a great job explaining it and making sure we were okay with everything. When they were done they spent a lot of time making sure our lawn was as good as they could make it before they left. I'm very happy with everything. Everything works great!

reviews.author: Chris Schaeffer
reviews.text:
When I want my plumbing fixed, I'd like it to be fixed in a way that the problem does not come back.  You get what you pay for and I'd rather pay a little extra up-front than pay twice when the first repair fails and it has to be done again.

We have had excellent experience with Expert Services for Plumbing.  Especially David and David, Chandler and Mika deserve shout-outs for the quality of their work, their explanation of what they were going to do and why and their recommendations.  We had a MASSIVE disaster when our connection with the main sewer system broke.  Mika rode to the rescue at short notice and the Expert team involved a disaster mitigation company and by the time I got back, everything was fixed and cleaned.  David gave us great recommendations for our plumbing system and implemented them.  Chandler replaced our water heaters and changed the configuration so that the chance of future water heater failure is much reduced.

They work clean and are very competent.  I will hire them again.

reviews.author: Lisa Lee
reviews.text: I have used this company for years- this is at least seven repairs on a 15-year-old house that has all the original appliances. They're always friendly, neat, and explain everything carefully so I understand. The work is always excellent and I recommend them to anyone

reviews.author: Luciana Fernandes
reviews.text:
The service was impeccable. I called the company yesterday afternoon with a serious plumbing issue at my house, and they scheduled me for the very next day. John Harvey arrived exactly on time with all the necessary equipment. He clearly explained what the problem was, the possible solutions, and the challenges. He arrived shortly after lunch and finished about 15 minutes ago. The issue was quite serious, but he handled everything from start to finish with professionalism and confidence.

John is extremely friendly, communicative, and such a pleasant person to have around. The whole experience was smooth and stress free. I do not usually write reviews, but finding a plumber and a power company that truly solve your problem is priceless. Highly recommended.

plumbers.name: PlumbCrazy
plumbers.address: 1302 Continental Dr, Abingdon, MD 21009, USA

reviews.author: Shaun Haberkam
reviews.text: Quick shout out to #PlumbCrazy for fixing me up over the long weekend. Working in real estate I come across a lot of service companies. PlumbCrazy is the only plumbing company I call. My home was built in the 80s and constantly needs plumbing updates. They have installed for me a new well pump, multiple hose bibs, faucets…you name it they have fixed it in my house. I called at 8 am Monday and they promised to get to me buy 2 pm as I had no water. They prioritized me and were there by 10:30 am the same day. Diagnosed the problem quickly and figured we had to dig out well cap down about 5 feet to access the part. They fixed me up the same day and had machinery there within the hour. It was also the first time in a long while where is saw the work that went in and was shocked by how affordable the repair was. When I saw that machinery digging I thought I was in big trouble with a huge bill coming my way. I can’t say enough great things about them over the 10 years I have been calling on them for service. Thanks to the PlumbCrazy team!

reviews.author: Timothy Chrockrem
reviews.text: Tom was friendly, professional and worked quickly. Work was done in less than 4 hrs. He removed the old water heater and installed a new one plus expansion tank. Even added shut off valves that i didnt have previously. I will definitely use Plumb Crazy in the future.

reviews.author: Mike Potter
reviews.text: Great company to deal with. I had them come out to replace a indoor water shut off and the plumber did a great job.  Showed up right on time and the price was reasonable for the work done.   They are now my go to for doing plumbing work as needed.

reviews.author: Elli Jones
reviews.text: Front lady there name Katie has a rude attitude and terrible customer service. Next time I go to ask for help I prefer not to talk to her a nice guy name Rodney helped me after speaking with him my experience got better as a older lady I thought it was extremely helpful talking with someone who didn’t disrespect me my daughter had to pick me up later that day due to not understanding what I was saying distracted the whole time on her cell phone with out any communication on why I couldn’t get a reply. The crew came and fixed my home thank you plum crazy better luck next time my son says she stinks anyway haha!

reviews.author: Erin Kelly
reviews.text: I had a pipe burst under my house. I was lost and I had an appointment with Plumb Crazy. Rodney came out,  assessed the issue, showed me everything that led to it and fixed it for me at a great price. Everyone that I had contact with from Admin to Rodney was so nice and professional. I have a fixed pipe and water now. Thank you Plumb Crazy! I'll definitely recommend you guys to anyone with a plumbing issue.

plumbers.name: Jim Wagner Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 51 Eisenhower Ln S, Lombard, IL 60148, USA

reviews.author: Julie Adams
reviews.text: We were really happy with the customer service at Jim Wagner. Someone came within the hour to look at our water heater. Our plumber Kevin was awesome!! He was honest, thorough, and friendly. He was able to get our new water heater installed that day and within 3 hours. The price seemed average too. We will definitely work with them again!

reviews.author: Mike Rodak
reviews.text: They came out the day I called to evaluate the situation and provide a quote immediately.  We wound up replacing my old concrete laundry tub and galvanized pipes with a new fiberglass tub and PVC pipes, new copper, new faucet and shut off valves.  They were fast, friendly, clean, and efficient!  Highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Tim Abell
reviews.text: Had our kitchen faucet replaced.  We supplied the faucet and had Jim Wagner replace it.  Kevin was great.  Did a great job and was on his way in less than an hour.  Not knowing the cost of other plumbing services, I would say the price to replace the faucet was on the high end.

reviews.author: Rich Chiesa
reviews.text:
Kevin came out to repair a leak off our sump pump.  Not only did he fix the leak, he fixed the problem with the piping hammering when the sump pump stopped.  Kevin did a FANTASTIC job!

Kevin was transparent about pricing, he cleaned up after the job was done, and he was very courteous.  I HIGHLY recommend Jim Wagner Plumbing!

reviews.author: Kelly Toboja
reviews.text: I did a thorough review of 5 local plumbers, including taking time to read reviews/ratings, preferred local and family-owned business, quality and certifications. I plugged each into AI and selected 3 and reached out/put in a request for a call back on their website. First, Jim Wagner reached out same day (and it was a Saturday!), another one reached out 3 business days later, and the other one never reached out. I went with Jim Wagner, and I am so happy I did. They had a call off, and called to ask if I could move my appointment to a later time in the day - no problem. Christopher showed up promptly at the time promised, and he was friendly, explained everything in detail, was very transparent with cost, provided a coupon online I was not aware of, and spent a lot of time here ensuring the problem with our drain was fixed. For the record, the cost for them to come out was a little less than the others I researched, and second - I am a firm believer in you get what you pay for, but of course value has to accompany the cost, and I firmly believe it did. I would and will use them again, and will recommend them to friends and family. They have created a loyal customer in me.

plumbers.name: Residential Plumbing
plumbers.address: 155 Kirkland Cir #600, Oswego, IL 60543, USA

reviews.author: Stephanie Van Tieghem
reviews.text: If you need a plumber, call Residential Plumbing first. I had multiple plumbers out for a quote and Residential was by far the best price and did an amazing job. I had just moved into the house and the previous owner had done his own plumbing. Everything was out of code or not working. I have had Residential out 4 times in the past 2 weeks for new issues that pop up and every time they are great. I am a loyal client from now on.

reviews.author: Denise Murray
reviews.text: Residential Plumbing was recommended by a friend of mine. I called another plumber first and was very unhappy with the receptionist, who could not answer my questions and would not let me speak with a plumber. I was very pleased with Residential Plumbing. I spoke with Stacia. She answered my questions and relayed my information to the plumber. She was supposed to call me back after speaking with the plumber but perhaps forgot. I called her back the next morning. I received email confirmations and texts with a picture of the plumber prior to his arrival. When he arrived, he listened attentively and was very nice. So far, so good. Everything seems to be fixed and working great. I will definitely recommend Residential Plumbing to anyone I know.

reviews.author: Mary Anne Sorensen
reviews.text:
Residential Plumbing once again delivered outstanding service! We had a water leak in our living room ceiling, and Rob and Cade came out promptly today.  They were extremely professional, kind, and knowledgeable from start to finish.

They took the time to walk us through every step of the repair, explained what they were doing, and reassured us throughout the process. They even remembered being at our home last year when we had a leak in our laundry room ceiling—such a thoughtful touch that shows how much they care about their customers.

Rob and Cade were friendly, respectful, and truly went above and beyond. They also recommended a great company to help with the drywall repair and to work with our insurance, which was incredibly helpful.

We are very grateful for their excellent service and highly recommend Residential Plumbing to anyone needing trustworthy, professional, and dependable plumbing work!

reviews.author: Natasha Marriner
reviews.text: I discovered a back up (coming up laundry floor drain) to the house on a Sunday and left a message for Residential Plumbing.  They called me first thing Monday morning and had a team at my house within an hour.  The office texted me updates of their arrival.   The team was professional, friendly and helpful at explaining the issue and solution.  Overall fantastic experience.

reviews.author: Mark Taghap
reviews.text: Great experience from start to finish. Ken arrived on time, explained the issue clearly, and completed the work efficiently with high-quality results. Pricing was fair and transparent, with no surprises. I would definitely recommend this service to anyone needing reliable and professional plumbing work.

plumbers.name: 1-Tom-Plumber
plumbers.address: 1920 Jordan Ln NW, Huntsville, AL 35816, USA

reviews.author: Rob Narvaez
reviews.text: Heath and Kaden were very friendly and professional.  They worked quickly to find the leak and repaired it quickly.  They are a great team.  They were incredibly considerate of my house and property.   I would recommend 1 Tom to my friends and family. This team was at my house with 30 mins of calling Travis super fast

reviews.author: Paul Huske
reviews.text: I had a plumbing emergency. They were very prompt and were able to accommodate me and coordinate their team quickly. Easy to communicate with everyone from the dispatcher through the work crew. They did a good job and nothing else was damaged or affected. They had a backup ready in case of more flooding occurring when they pumped the stoppage. They gave me options and I did not feel pressured with an upsell which was nice. I had an emergency and I did not shop around for pricing so I cannot compare on price with anything else. I can saw the we’re prompt, professional, fixed it first try and took a bit of time after to verify that everything was flowing correctly and working before they left. I was glad to get a solution in under 24hrs. In hindsight, I would try everything I can to solve it myself, if I had another problem. I could have bought the professional grade snake, bought the same tier dry vac, put my family up in a hotel for a week, and still saved enough money for a weekend away vacation had I done it myself. It was shockingly expensive.

reviews.author: S Braz
reviews.text: I called 1 Tom Plumbing this morning at about 9:30.  by 11:00 their Service Technician Mark Waldrop was standing in my garage talking to me about the problem I was having with my whole house water filteration system. He really spent some time looking at where the leak was originating from and determined that the housing wasn’t cracked, instead the O-ring on the pressure release valve was basically disintegrating, and making it so you couldn’t take the pressure off the water filter to remove it and replace it. He had the part in his truck to fix it and had me back up and running by noon. The price they charged was very reasonable. He was wonderful. I can’t say enough nice things about Mark Waldrop. he is a GREAT representative for your company. this is the second time that I’ve had y’all out to do something for me and both times the technicians have just been wonderful and knowledgeable and fixed the problem quickly. I will definitely use you again and will recommend one time Plumbing to all of My friends

reviews.author: John Clark
reviews.text: I would use these guys again, Mark our tech was great, we had a gas leak under our house. He got it fixed made us feel real comfortable. Very nice guy. I would definitely use this company again for any of my plumbing needs. Mark went out of his way to make sure we were taken care of thank you again.

reviews.author: Will Arrington
reviews.text: Answered the call on a Sunday night...when all the big name corporate plumbing companies who i had prior business with would not, for a third of their price!!! Could not have gotten the plant running efficiently without them. Will definitely be using 1-Tom from now on. Good job Joseph!

plumbers.name: Service Force Plumbing
plumbers.address: 706B E Gude Dr #3, Rockville, MD 20850, USA

reviews.author: Joanna Deutsch
reviews.text:
Had an unexpected gushing leak in my garage. Tyler from Service Force responded quickly. He did the necessary repairs and my water usage was restored. Tyler has done another complicated repair at my home and although late didn’t leave until the work was completed.
Great company with knowledgeable service people.
Wouldn’t use another plumbing company!!

reviews.author: Suzanne Maggi
reviews.text: I can’t say enough good things about the service I received from this company. They were attentive, accessible, knowledgeable and completely understood our situation with a very old house, and geared their remedy to our needs. Many thanks to Andrew, Tanner and Hendrick and to Roy for setting up a quick appointment.

reviews.author: dani
reviews.text: Roy was helpful and informative on the phone when I reached out to schedule my first ever annual maintenance on a tankless water heater as a new homeowner. He was thorough with explanations and rationale and he was able to schedule my appointment quickly. Ethan completed the service and answered all of my questions thoroughly and explained everything he was doing. Overall great experience!

reviews.author: Aravindan Kolandaivelu
reviews.text: We had an overall great experience.  We noticed our hot water availability had been tapering off over a week or so and the Service Force team was able to fix the problem the next day which was unexpected.  Ethan and Cameron did a great job of explaining the likely cause better than others we had contacted, going over options to fix, and working with us to select a replacement water heater that seemed to best fit our needs.  The install was clean and whole experience was very professional.  As a side note they also managed to cleanly haul out our old 75G water heater which was weighed down by 18 years of sediment.  Thanks again for the help of your great team!

reviews.author: Priscilla F.
reviews.text: Tyler was very informative. Solved the problem quickly and answered questions about other issues I might have in the future. I highly recommend service force. My emergency occurred fairly late last night and they were able to get out here this morning.

plumbers.name: Holt Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 1000 Industrial Dr, Old Hickory, TN 37138, USA

reviews.author: Gregory Yuh
reviews.text: Geoff from Holt is awesome. He came to fix and replace shower fixture and did the best job I've seen to date. Very professional and he walked me through the steps, cleaned up everything after and completed the best job I've seen. Eventhough it was late in the day, Geoff was very through and did not rush any part of the job. Although he did not leave until 9 pm, Geoff made sure everything was working and cleaned up everything. Cannot compliment Geoff enough. I'll absolutely use Holt again and ask for Geoff.

reviews.author: John Darlington
reviews.text:
Geoff and Gabe showed up about 10 minutes early - it's certainly a nice start when we've all experienced having to wait until later in the window of time a company gives you.  I wasn't aware that this property's driveway was north facing after these ice storms.In nashville, the driveway was still completely frozen.  Not an issue for these guys.They took it in stride, had a shovel to chip a safe path for them to work and went about their business.  I'm so pleased with the work they did.  My tenant has been patient with these unexpected plumbing problems because I have been responsive.  This team helped me continue to deliver quickly considering a somewhat "delicate" plumbing issue.
I'm going to have to have additional plumbing done and I plan on using Holt/these guys to do it.
Professional, kind, polite. thorough and not hard selling. Educating me with the problem and offering options.  That's all one could hope for. All that in below freezing temperatures?  Thank you!!

Thank you!

reviews.author: Connor Cain
reviews.text: Had an emergency leak from my pressure reducing valve post ice-storm and Geoff and Gabe and Holt Plumbing were extremely quick, professional, and thorough. My crawl space is small and has some fragile wiring, but they navigated the space carefully and fixed the leak in about an hour and a half, in freezing temperatures. I even asked an unrelated question about water pressure as the call was wrapping up and they re-parked and stayed longer just to check a few more things and helped me get my water pressure a little stronger. Will absolutely be calling them again and I would recommend them to anyone that I liked.

reviews.author: Erik Manger
reviews.text: Worked with Holt Plumbing for the first time to have them take a look at a commercial property regarding an unknown plumbing related issue. The tech. was with us for probably 10 minutes and stated that they would have to come back once again with an additional individual to help perform some additional work at an additional cost, which I was perfectly fine with. Holt Plumbing sent me an estimate for that work as well as an invoice for the initial visit which included an egregious hourly rate and a "billing and administrative fee". I've never seen a company add a "billing and administrative fee" to their invoicing - extremely tacky. I'll find someone else to finish the job.

reviews.author: Nancy Laura Scott
reviews.text: My neighbors recommended Holt Plumbing for the quality of work and customer service. I knew I had a leak and some Home maintenance that needed attention. I did not understand what it really encompassed . Geoff Was the service man who came to assist me. He went out of his way to put me at ease and showed me so much courtesy and respect. He educated me through the process explaining what was needed and why. He was professional and thorough through the entire job. It is going to end up being a two day job and he explained why that was going to have to happen that way. I wholeheartedly recommend Holt Plumbing for any of your Plumbing needs,  and Geoff as of repairman who you will feel comfortable having in your home.

plumbers.name: Drain Go Plumbing
plumbers.address: 211 Central Cir SW, Decatur, AL 35603, USA

reviews.author: Joy Webb
reviews.text: I had a service call for 12-4 and they called me at 2:15, I was at work and had paid someone to be at my house, they did not come and rescheduled for another 4 days. I had already waited 5 days to get the 1st appointment. They were used through American Home Sheild my warranty company, but I would not recommend them at all. They do not care about the problem that's going on at your house and their customer service is a joke. I rescheduled with Roto Rooter and got outstanding service.

reviews.author: D. L. Spence
reviews.text: Terry and James recently assisted us with a clogged drain, and their service was both prompt and highly professional. They quickly identified and resolved the issue, leaving everything in excellent working order. Each time we’ve needed support from Draingo for plumbing concerns, the experience has been consistently positive. Their team is reliable, efficient, and dedicated to delivering quality service. We truly appreciate their expertise and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Draingo to anyone in need of trustworthy plumbing solutions.

reviews.author: Stephen Ross
reviews.text:
Draingo of Alabama replaced our water heater, we had some issues with our home warranty who by the way will not send out a list of of parts they cover, they will tell you what parts are covered over the phone from a call center in India which isnt good enough. This is for anyone dealing with warranties, nothing to do with Drain go. We finally did get them to send us a list of what parts were not covered (weird) but they sent it under a letterhead and logo of some completely different company name so we never opened it and didn't find it until later as it looked like Junk Mail.

However Drain Go was very nice on the phone, and also the person they sent out Elbert was fantastic, and super fast. I would use them again.

reviews.author: Latasha
reviews.text:
Over priced and under performed.

Came out to look for a leak. Advised me to turn off the water until they could get there 6 days later. Of course I had to clean up the water.  They get here, 2 young boys, look at the toilet for 15 minutes and say nothing is wrong with it.  Charged me $170... standard work day during regular work hours...

reviews.author: Debi Ungerbuehler
reviews.text:
I really was pleased with the 2 gentlemen that came to our house this morning. I am terrible with names, look on my receipt, I'm sure  you can find out their names. They both meet and played with our dogs. Which was extremely nice. Then they were happy to leave them alone and to go play in the yard. Our hot water heater had went out. They changed out the thermostat and both heating elements. They were both very respectful and a joy to have fixing our problem. Thank you so much. The world needs more people like them.
Merry Christmas and Happy New Year,
Debi and Vanessa

plumbers.name: Salt City Plumbing, Heating & Air
plumbers.address: 47 S Orange St A8, Salt Lake City, UT 84116, USA

reviews.author: Fuong Banh
reviews.text: If you are looking for a company that is affordable, great service, and can take care of things fast, Salt City Plumbing is it!  I have tried a few plumbing companies and most of them tries to upsell you on things you don't need and prices that cost an arm and a leg.  Tre at Salt City Plumbing was awesome!  He arrives promptly and gave us a solution that cost a lot less than the other companies and got things done for us the same day.  We would recommend this company and Tre to anyone.

reviews.author: Trish
reviews.text:
This is from a service done on Monday, Jan 5, 2026:

Today was my first time working with Salt City Plumbing. Got an appt set up for tomorrow to come do a FREE estimate to repair gas pipe leaks. They called me back shortly saying they had a cancellation, a technician would be out between 3 and 5!! 🥳 Tommy showed up early at 2:15 🤩! Tommy looked over the issue with me gave me 3 very reasonable quotes and got right to work. He fixed the pipes quickly and ended up not needing to replace a gas valve that another company was ready to charge me for.

It’s so nice to want to cry tears of joy rather than tears of frustration. We got astronomically ripped off by another company this weekend for a similar repair needed on our other boiler…which we were charged LITERALLY 4X the price of what Salt City Plumbing charged (and did a better job).

Got our heat and hot water restored to our second building after it being off since Friday night. Crying tears of joy 😭🥰

Thank you so much Tommy and Salt City Plumbing!!

I also took a good look at their newest reviews before Tommy arrived…. you have to scroll a LONG WAY to even find a 4 star review.

THIS BUSINESS IS AMAZING!! 🙌
Happy employees and happy customers!!!

Also, shoutout to Shae for coming over to look over our boilers and give us estimates for future work! Very knowledgeable and professional!

reviews.author: Lori Campbell
reviews.text:
These guys deserve all five stars.  They are down to earth, no bullshit, efficient, and affordable.   This is old school attention to detail and customer service that you don't see anymore.

I have an old house with it's fair amount of plumbing drama and these guys, Josh especially, have sorted it out without selling me on a bunch of upgrades and extras I don't need, which means I call them when new issues arise because I trust them.  My house was built in the 40's, something new always comes up.

The owner has been out for projects and is just as professional and straight forward as his employees.

As a homeowner who isn't handy having a company I can trust to get here, get the work done, not try to fleece me, and stand by their product/service is priceless.

You can shop around and get all the bids you want, you're not going to beat these guys on getting the job done.  They get my business every time and they have earned

reviews.author: Maude Vôs
reviews.text: Tommy repaired our heating last week and did an amazing job! He was on time and had great communication! 10 out 10 will use this company again & request Tommy!

reviews.author: Jeremy Koff
reviews.text: First time using this company and the experience was exceptional. They were extremely responsive, and within an hour of my call one of their technicians, Shae, was on site investigating a leaky shower. He quickly determined it was a minor issue that didn’t require plumbing services and proactively made a quick repair by sealing a small gap in the shower plate where water had been seeping in. Shae was professional, courteous, and honest. I would absolutely recommend this company without hesitation, especially Shae.

plumbers.name: MPT Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 1520 Industrial Dr, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Bob Lescaleet
reviews.text:
I was impressed with the plumber Mike.  He was very knowledgeable and efficient.  Mike was on-time and finished his work without a problem.  He answered all of my questions and gave me good advise about my upcoming project with a new sink install.
All in all it was a very good experience and I would not hesitate to recommend MPT Plumbing.

reviews.author: Dave Dorocke
reviews.text: Called MPT Plumbing (Mike) to address a minor leak after a water meter replacement late last week. Since the issue occurred due the meter replacement, he not only called the city to ask about having this fixed, they directed him to the company that replaced the meter. He called, they listened to his explanation of what happened and promptly scheduled to come out the day to fix this issue. Mike is a true honest business owner that genuinely cares about his customers and goes well beyond the norm in regards to typical customer service. I am incredibly grateful to have met this good man today. Thank you for your service and insight today.

reviews.author: Gina K
reviews.text: Mike saved me from a major disaster with a sink install. He came in and took over the situation and I’m grateful for his professionalism and direction. He even set me up with other contractors to help with other needed services. Great guy. Highly recommended MPT!

reviews.author: Carol Schacherer
reviews.text:
Mike and his partner were amazing!
Very professional, very kind.
I had a big difficult job that they had to do and now it’s fixed!
I would recommend this company to everyone.

reviews.author: Brian Seng
reviews.text: The gentlemen who did the job were perfectly reasonable and professional. Clean job and did exactly as needed for a little less than I expected to come in at. MPT came recommended by 2 acquaintances, will be happy to continue that recommendation.

plumbers.name: H. Jack's Plumbing and Heating Akron
plumbers.address: 1055 Evans Ave, Akron, OH 44305, USA

reviews.author: Brian Plumb
reviews.text: Full master bath remodel including custom shower. Chip, Steve, and Blake were incredibly professional and knowledgeable. Kept a very clean work environment including cleaning up every day. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Jeff Blackburn
reviews.text:
Love the attention to detail and the trouble shooting skills Chip and Adam gave us. We were dealing with low water pressure with a 24 year old pressure tank. These guys were amazing, had it knocked out in a morning and took on a couple of issues we had with an outside hose bib.

Truly Professional!
Thanks guys,
Jeff

reviews.author: Alex Harper
reviews.text:
Jay and his group came out to replace my furnace and air conditioner and were efficient and so nice to work with.
The work was done about 2 years ago and everything has held up nicely through the cold winters and hot summers!
I've had them come out for maintenance too during that time and the guy is nice everytime!

reviews.author: Amanda Lauer
reviews.text: I have used H. Jacks several times and they are always super friendly and helpful. Had to call on a weekend for an emergency plumbing situation. Ken came out within 30 minutes of my call and snaked my main drain line. He was very kind and knowledgeable. I know when I need them they will be there!

reviews.author: Dana Kroffke
reviews.text: Ron and Ben came out to look at and diagnose an issue I was having with my septic/sewer lines. They arrived quickly, diagnosed the issues, explained everything thoroughly to me and quickly got me on the schedule for a repair. They were incredibly nice; I highly recommend them!

plumbers.name: Ex-Stink Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 19 Hillcrest Ave, Fox Lake, IL 60020, USA

reviews.author: Joe Rodriguez
reviews.text: I’m a caregiver for my mom. Had a sewer line collapse and needed to get it fixed to make sure she had what she needed. Dave and his crew were great to work with. Very professional and efficient and kind. Easy to work with. They showed up when they said they would, kept me informed and when I thought there was another issue they were quick to address it. Enjoyed working with them. 👏

reviews.author: Ruth Wojak
reviews.text:
The owner Dave came out and assessed the situation. He realized that the plumber the day before didn't do their due diligence. He called them immediately and had them out again within 20 minutes to finish what they should have finished the day before.
The job that Dave was hired to do, he explained that it needed to be done, but was probably not an emergency.  He actually called me three times after he left, to make sure that I was doing good with my present situation (which was a rusted through kitchen stack, which was now full of mud).
The guys who came and did the work were fantastic. Arrived on time. I received a text with their location, so I knew when exactly they would arrive, should they be delayed. They were courteous, quick, clean, friendly.... Can't say enough good about them.
When they left, I went down to clean the path to the work zone. They literally left the area cleaner than when they arrived. I assumed they would make a mess, so I didn't vacuum up the dust that is frequently in a basement. I also didn't clean up the mess from the basement being flooded. All was cleaned up. True, they jack hammered part of the floor out, but they also cleaned more than just the area they jackhammered.
Top notch company. I would hire them again in an instant.

reviews.author: Lindsey Idle
reviews.text:
Dave is awesome… such a good guy. I own a home bakery, so my pipes are definitely used more often than others.

I had a pretty major blockage this morning and not only did Dave come out on time but he brought all the necessary equipment as well as some preventative care for me to hold onto. He gave me great advice on how to avoid blockages in the future and made sure I knew how to use the drain treatment product to get the best results.

Honest plumbers can be hard to come by but these guys are absolutely fantastic

reviews.author: Justin Richtmyre
reviews.text:
The crew as well as the staff at the office were extremely professional and extremely helpful. They helped us achieve a workable solution for our needs. All expenses were discussed upfront so that there were no unexpected financial surprises. They communicated their arrival times via text. Our experience was top notch and we would definitely reach out to them for any needs in the future.
They dug up our broken pipe, installed new pipe, installed a sump pump which we did not have before, and poured concrete. Great job.

reviews.author: Ricardo Cedillo
reviews.text: Superb performance by all of the crew at Ex-Stink Plumbing & Sewer! I give there professionalism and attention to detail an A+. Excellent job gentlemen! I will highly recommend and pass the word on. Thanks again!

plumbers.name: Red Beard Plumbing Heat & Air
plumbers.address: 1733 S Fretz Ave, Edmond, OK 73013, USA

reviews.author: Gil M Baez (Coqui84)
reviews.text: Exceptional experience with water heater troubleshooting and repair. It’s rare to find plumbers who are not only skilled but genuinely pleasant to work with, these guys exceeded expectations. Their attitude and professionalism clearly reflect strong leadership from the top down, and it shows in their work. Hands down some of the best service we’ve ever received. Thank you Red Beard Plumbing for exceptional service!!!!

reviews.author: James Guzak
reviews.text:
Redbeard has been my go to plumbing company for three years. They are responsive, do top quality work, and their staff technicians are knowledgeable and personable.

In this instance I had an after hours emergency leak with the tubing above my hot water heater. They were there promptly that same evening to stop the leak and make repairs. Jay Garcia was the tech on call and took great care of us.

reviews.author: The Goods
reviews.text: Quick, responsive, and fair. I have an older home and they were able not only to get someone dispatched same day, but they sent someone who was able to solve the root cause of the issue. I have used them multiple times around the house and have been really happy with their service. Their employees are very knowledgeable to good at explaining the issue even if you don't know much about plumbing.

reviews.author: Andrew Merrill
reviews.text: They did a great job replacing all the parts in our toilet. They spent extra time answering all our questions about other plumbing needs we will have to tackle in the future. They were on time and quick getting it fixed. They were kind and hard working men. We are very thankful to have found a trustworthy plumber.

reviews.author: Amy Key
reviews.text: Tyler and Taylor were amazing. Went above and beyond to locate and repair my leak. We have used Red Beard several times and have always been completely satisfied. Definitely recommend them!

plumbers.name: Dial One Johnson Plumbing, Cooling & Heating
plumbers.address: 830 S Hampton Rd, Dallas, TX 75208, USA

reviews.author: JOSE CRUZ
reviews.text: Travis came out this morning to do a check up on our AC/Heat system. He is very courteous, polite and professional. He was very thorough and clear in his explanations of what he recommends for our system. Travis has a great personality and it was a pleasure having him to come out and do the inspection on our system. Dial One Johnson always sends the best people out. Thank you for your awesome customer service and great workers! These guys truly are the best, cant recommend them enough. If you need AC, AC service of any kind, Johnson Dial One are the very best in the field! You can’t go wrong with them. Thank you again for sending Travis to us; he is truly a credit to his profession and represents his company magnificently!

reviews.author: Ben Hart
reviews.text: Jose called and let me know that he was available earlier than scheduled, which was excellent. Arrived, diagnosed and fixed my furnace problem within 10 minutes. Very pleasant and easy to work with. Top service.

reviews.author: Marianne R
reviews.text: Dial One was quick to book an appointment. Their friendly admin staff was very helpful. The call-out fee is mandatory, and they only come to assess, so the work wasn't done the same day.  But once the plumbers were there 2 days later, they did all they could to figure out and fix the problems.  A big shout-out to James & Will, who were excellent in their communication and work-ethic.  I will certainly call on these folks again.

reviews.author: CJ Johnson
reviews.text: Mold light install in vent system went well. Fast and clean! Other problem areas were identified and an intervention was to avoid future problems, of which was much appreciated. Very informative about what was done. Overall pleased with the service

reviews.author: Deidra Collins
reviews.text: The technician (James) was professional and efficient . I appreciate him remembering having serviced my home before. That goes a long way with me. The problem was  diagnosed and completed. I will continue to call Dial One for my plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Plumb Doctor
plumbers.address: 747 Chance Rd, Marietta, GA 30066, USA

reviews.author: Charlie Perez
reviews.text: We had a leak in the main line from the water meter to our house.  These guys were referred to me by one of my neighbors so I felt good about calling them.  They came out the same day to assess the problem and returned the next day to fix it. It was  pretty big project that took the better part of the day. Brandon (the owner) came out I person to help out.  They did a great job at a fair price.  Not cheap but fair. Cheap does not usually equal good.  I’ll definitely reach out to them again next time I need plumbing work.

reviews.author: Sean McIntyre
reviews.text:
Plumb doctor was recommended to me many years ago.  I have contacted them on 4 different issues and they sent someone out immediately each time and once was a Sunday afternoon after I spoke with Brandon the owner directly.  Each time they were able to fix the problem and only charged me a service call.  Today I had a severe leak and because of their previous
honesty and excellent customer service (including the administrative staff that assisted me on the phone and the on site plumbers) I contacted them again. They were able to send Fletcher over, who has helped me before, and it took more extensive work to fix but he did a fantastic job once again.  I highly recommend Plumb Doctor!

reviews.author: Aaron Reali
reviews.text: Plumb Doctor is a top-notch company with an outstanding team. While I haven’t personally used their plumbing services, I’ve worked with their company professionally and have always been impressed. Brandon, the owner, is incredibly honest, hands-on, and easy to work with, and that leadership clearly shows throughout the business. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Plumb Doctor to anyone looking for a trustworthy plumbing company.

reviews.author: Juanita Love
reviews.text: I had called another plumber before calling Plumb Doctor and I had some doubts about the repair he said I would need. I decided to call Plumb Doctor and I'm glad I did! Plumb Doctor provided excellent service from start to finish! Their pricing was very reasonable, and what impressed me most was the way they explained every step of the process before beginning any work. I felt informed, respected, and confident in the service I was receiving. The work was done efficiently, professionally, and with great care. I highly recommend Plumb Doctor and will definitely call them again in the future. Fletcher and Del were the absolute best!

reviews.author: Pablo Peñasco
reviews.text: My water service line in the front yard broke. Plumb Doctor had provided excellent service at my house before so I called them. They went out of their way to help me today! 8am phone call and Brandon answered immediately. Cody was here by 11am. We agreed the old PVC line was old and brittle since this is the 3rd break in 4 years(plus we discovered another repair later when digging). They gave me a fair price and were back by 2PM with utilities getting marked before they started trenching. I am grateful to them to have plentiful clean water flowing again! I also told Cody about my pressure regulator had failed twice in the last 4 years and he immediately knew to check the expansion tank. It had failed. Cody replaced that for me while he was here. Thanks also to Tim for his expertise and hard work. Both times I have used Plumb Doctor they have provided a quick response and quality work the same day I called in. Thank you gentlemen.

plumbers.name: GS Plumbing
plumbers.address: 55 Donkle Rd, Greenville, SC 29609, USA

reviews.author: Kevin Thomson
reviews.text:
GS Plumbing provided outstanding service from start to finish. My technician, Trevor, arrived on time and was professional, courteous, and attentive as I explained the drainage issue I was experiencing. After verifying the problem, he first attempted to clear the line with a snake. When it became apparent that the blockage was likely farther down the line or more severe than initially expected, Trevor didn’t hesitate to take the next step.

He went into the crawl space beneath the house, carefully traced the line, and isolated the approximate location of the problem. Throughout the entire process he worked diligently, explained what he was doing, and made sure I understood the situation and repair options. His communication and professionalism gave me a lot of confidence that the job was being handled correctly.

As a disabled veteran who is unable to access the crawl space to perform these types of repairs myself, I was especially grateful for Trevor’s thoroughness and respect. GS Plumbing also extended a veterans discount, which I truly appreciated.

Based on this experience, I will not hesitate to call GS Plumbing again for any future plumbing needs. Excellent service, knowledgeable technician, and great customer care.

Thanks again Trevor 👍

reviews.author: Daniel Hamersky
reviews.text: Kendall and GS plumbing did a great job! They were able to come out within a few hours of my call and had everything fixed the same day. Kendall was friendly and professional and was able to diagnose the problem quickly, provide a price to fix it right away, and get it fixed and working.

reviews.author: T b
reviews.text: I've had Andy with several jobs of my own. This time it was my dad's. He did a great job and as my dad put it-you couldn't even tell they had been there except he has no leaks now. Before and After photos. 100yr old galvanized pipes rusted thru.  More work was done but this sums it up.

reviews.author: Amarjit Pabla
reviews.text: Ben and his team did a great job diagnosing the plumbing leak source and were able to to replace the affected pipe section. The were timely and knowledgeable. I would definitely use them again.

reviews.author: Kent Smith
reviews.text: GS is a top-notch outfit, supported by great people. Was a pleasure working with Lee and Cody… Trevor was our technician who single-handedly performed our hot water heater replacement, plumbing, and additional faucet installation. Great guy and very solid technical expertise. All in all, very pleased with GS plumbing!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 38 S Dundalk Ave Ste C-LL, Dundalk, MD 21222, USA

reviews.author: Jeremy Horvat
reviews.text: Monae was the plumber that Roto-Rooter sent to work on our toilets. Both toilets would not flush and gurgling noises came from the bathroom sinks and shower. Monae arrived around 4:30 pm and did not leave till almost 8:45 pm on a Sunday. Monae made several attempts at de-clogging our pipe that led to the street. Those attempts unfortunately failed. Monae then changed course a removed 1 of the toilets and began to work on breaking up the clog. Eventually, Monae was successful and our toilets finally worked. Monae was fantastic! Monae was very kind and respectful. Monae explained what she was doing and why throughout the 4+ hrs she was here. We feel fortunate to have had Monae as our plumber! We would highly recommend Monae for any plumbing work needed! Thank you Monae for your hard work, time, and effort! You are very much appreciated!

reviews.author: Joshua Cucci
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough good things about my experience with Roto-Rooter, specifically with Howard. We were dealing with a major issue with our main sewer line, which is a stressful situation for any homeowner.

From the moment Howard arrived, he was incredibly professional and thorough. He didn't just guess at the problem; he took the time to properly diagnose exactly what was blocking the line. What I appreciated most was how he explained every step of the process to me. He walked me through the camera inspection, showed me exactly where the issue was on the monitor, and explained why it was happening, not just what needed to be done to fix it.

He was meticulous during the repair, ensuring that everything was cleared out completely rather than doing a "quick fix." He even double-checked everything before leaving to ensure the flow was perfect. It’s rare to find a tradesperson who is both technically skilled and a great communicator.

reviews.author: Melissa
reviews.text: Howard at Roto Rooter was great to work with.  I called in a clogged kitchen sink around 8 pm on a Tuesday and he was at our house within the next hour or so.  He was able to quickly resolve the issue. He was great to work with and we were very happy with our service.

reviews.author: Artistically G
reviews.text: After an almost 12-hr work day, I arrived home to an intermittent gurgling sound coming from my bathroom. I immediately turned the shut-off valve to the off position and contacted Roto-Rooter. Brian took my call at roughly 7:35 pm and immediately scheduled a technician that would arrive within a 2-hour window. My technician, Howard, arrived within an hour of my call, ready to help. He tested the functions of the commode, flushing several times and checking the components of the tank, but was not able to replicate the problem. He was patient as I asked questions, and offered the possibility of replacing all of the elements in the tank and gave me an estimate. Additionally, he waited several minutes to see if the problem presented itself again, but it did not. Although no work was necessary, the customer service was top tier. Roto-Rooter provided excellent and dependable customer service - from scheduling to arrival. The best part of this experience is that Howard was genuinely kind and professional, and suggested a potential solution if it occurred again. If I have plumbing problems again, I will definitely contact Roto-Rooter.

reviews.author: Debra Robins
reviews.text:
I want to give a huge shout-out to Howard from Roto-Rooter! He was the second service professional to come out for a stubborn kitchen drain issue, and he absolutely nailed it.

Howard took his time, ran the snake slow and steady, and made sure everything was done right. He even filled the sink afterward to thoroughly test the drain with both cold and hot water. The difference in care and expertise was obvious — and best of all, the problem is finally solved!

Professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely committed to getting the job done correctly. I couldn’t be more impressed. Highly recommend Howard!

He also left with a delicious homemade  brisket Sandwhich I was making for the holidays.

plumbers.name: OnCall Plumbing
plumbers.address: 247 Clear Frk Lp, Liberty Hill, TX 78642, USA

reviews.author: Jeff Alderson
reviews.text:
UPDATED twice.

Too long, don’t read. Find someone else. Poor communication, wouldn’t stand by their work.

I'll give an honest review here, there have been some issues outside of their control, and some issues on their side.  But most of the major fault is theirs.

After posting my initial review I got a prompt call and an explanation of what went wrong.

Then I came home and found the whole setup spraying water and cycling on and off excessively. They said resubmit to the warranty company, but the warranty company said they are no longer working with this company.

We have a home warranty and had a sewer grinder pump fail  It's an older home which has complicated things.  We were without use of our home.  Initial call to them was on 2/3.  They couldn't come for 3 days, until 2/6.  Their reason was that was their contract with the home warranty company.

On 2/6 they worked on it for a few hours and spent quite a bit of time on the phone with the warranty company.  That's not their fault.  By the time the repair was authorized they couldn't drive to get the part because the place was closing.  They wouldn't come back until 2/11, even though the part was in stock and they could have picked it up the next morning.  The repair guy did patch it enough so I could run it manually as needed and showed me how to do that.

On 2/11 he returned with the part.  He comes while we're at work, leaves after a few hours.  Never hear anything.  I look at the side of the house and it's cleaned up, put back together.  I notice the switch is flipped to OFF, I assume it's done and he made a mistake, so I flip it to AUTO and forget about it.  Then I start getting emails from warranty company about the service not being complete.  On Sunday 2/15 I call to find out what's going on.  I'm told they don't know anything but will ask the technician tomorrow and call me back.  No call on Monday 2/16, so I call back on Tuesday 2/17, said technician will call me.  Someone from there calls twice on Tuesday but doesn't leave a message, I couldn't answer.  I call again on Wednesday, same thing, technician will call me.  Finally Thursday AM (2/19) I'm told the pump can still be run in manual mode, but a part is needed and they don't know when it will come in.

We wait until the next week and start calling again on Monday to find out when the part will be in.  Told we'd get a call back, don't get called back. Call again Tuesday, first time told someone will call right back, they don't, so call again at 5 and told the part just came in and they will fix it on Thursday (2/26).

Technician comes on time, calls me after and says he's done.  But the only part he could get requires a neutral wire in my electrical box so now I need an electrician to come rewire it.  Oh and by the way, it won't run in manual mode anymore.  So now we can't use the house again until I can get that fixed.

That evening I receive a bill for $950 from them.  I'm writing this review after receiving this bill after hours so I can't even call and find out why they are billing me when the home warranty company told me everything was covered.  I call the home warranty company and they said they contractor hasn't submitted the report to them yet so they have no idea either.

UPDATE.  After submitting the review I get a call from someone who is genuinely trying to figure out what happened.  He explains some challenges they had and agrees there's some things to fix.  He acknowledges the bill was sent in error and their communication wasn't up to his standards.

Update #2. See the attached video. Water spraying everywhere. They wouldn’t just come out to fix it. Said to call home warranty company. Home warranty company said they don’t work with them anymore. I’m actually glad to be done with them.

Wouldn’t call me for days on end, never tell me what's going on or if I can even use my house.  It took from 2/3 until 2/26 to do the repair, 6 days of that was waiting on a part.  I called them 9 times and my wife called 4 times.  After all that the repair was terrible quality.

reviews.author: Irene
reviews.text: Oncall WAS  amazing.  Their service was a 5 star rating.  Their quality of your work was outstanding. They Were quick and efficient on everything they did.. I would recommend them to everyone.Thank you for making us feel at ease. AHS played a huge factor in their ability to service us in a timely manner. AHS was quick and efficient in providing the service that we needed with OnCall. We were very pleased.

reviews.author: Fred
reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience with this company. The dispatch team stayed on top of my repair from start to finish, and the plumber immediately spotted that the toilet sitting on my tile floor was a cheap model that could eventually crack or damage the tiles. Within two days, they sourced a new toilet that fit my floor perfectly and installed it the right way.

Every person I dealt with — from dispatch to the plumbers — was friendly, professional, and had a great attitude.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Call them first if you want a great team and a repair done correctly.

reviews.author: Evie Ellis - ATX Home Realty
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ On-Call Plumbing is truly top-notch!

I had a couple of issues at my home and On-Call Plumbing made the entire experience effortless from start to finish. Scheduling was quick and smooth, and I loved how professional and organized their communication was — I received a text confirming the appointment, another when the plumber was on the way, and they arrived right on time.

They came in ready to work, assessed everything efficiently, and handled the job with true professionalism. The quality of the work was excellent, and they made the whole process stress-free.

I’m extremely happy with the service I received. I’ll absolutely be referring On-Call Plumbing to my clients, family, and friends. It’s rare to find a team this reliable, responsive, and easy to work with!

reviews.author: Seth Woolery
reviews.text: Patrick and his team are the best local service plumbing company in the north Austin area. We needed our water softener removed from the garage while our epoxy flooring was being installed and then reinstalled after the flooring was completed. They were also able to add a recirculating pump to our hot water heater during the process.  Now, we have hot water on demand through our entire home with minimal wait time.  Very professional, great communication & quality work! Thank you, On-Call Plumbing, for doing a fantastic job!

plumbers.name: Flatirons Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1111 Spruce St #404B, Boulder, CO 80302, USA

reviews.author: Jeanne Tobin
reviews.text: I was extremely pleased with Flatiron Plumbing. They were able to come out the same day that I called and Anthony the technician was very pleasant, knowledgeable and helpful. We have used them several times now and have always been very pleased.

reviews.author: John M
reviews.text:
The technician, Anthony, was great, professional, efficient, and did solid work after he had to go get parts.

The price was quoted upfront and I agreed, not knowing the job would take under 30 minutes or be as simple as capping two water lines and one gas line with easy access. The $575 final bill later felt well above market.

When I contacted the office, I did not ask for a specific price reduction. I intentionally left any adjustment to their judgment, in good faith, believing they would assess what was reasonable. Instead, I was told that because I accepted the quote, I needed to state what the job was “worth.” When I declined to name a number and asked them to determine a fair adjustment, the office manager became rude and refused any consideration.

That response reflects poor customer service. A small goodwill adjustment would have kept me a satisfied, repeat customer. Unfortunately, the office response overshadowed an otherwise positive experience with the technician.

reviews.author: Greg Boehme
reviews.text: I contacted Arvada Flatirons Plumbing for resolution on a water issue late in the afternoon.  They scheduled us for the first appointment the following day.   I received notification my  tech would  Anthony who arrived timely.  We discussed my issue with a leaking stack pipe as evidence by water in the basement.   Anthony said he would do an inspection to determine source of the leak. He quickly determined the source.  We were given several options for correcting the water leak on the cracked fitting.  Once we  selected the fix,  he quickly got to work.  It's was within the walls from the upper bathrooms.  During his work , a second tech , Paul show up to assist as the plumbing ran thru 3 Floors.   They completed the work on a timely fashion and  flush tested the new plumbing.  They thoroughly cleaned up the area when finished.   I highly recommend Flatirons plumbing Arvada for any work.  They are professional, courteous and prompt.   My neighbors had previously use them and were please with them as well.

reviews.author: Rob Watt
reviews.text: From my very first contact with Flatirons, I was impressed with their quick response to my plumbing issue, getting me on the schedule quickly, and then repairing my leak in a timely fashion. Steven was very professional and got the job done when he said he would. The only issue I had, I felt they over charged me for the work performed. But their work performed, was 5 star.

reviews.author: Ken M
reviews.text: A visit yesterday from Flatirons Plumbing was a pleasure.  Caesar arrived on time and immediately knew what our problem was.  After checking his truck for the part that he needed (he had one), the repair was quick and our leaking drain was fixed - I had tried to repair it but knew I did not have the right part and was hesitant to attempt buying, let alone installing, what was needed.  Caesar was a delight to work with, personable, knowledgeable, very focused on helping us resolve our problem, and should we have other plumbing problems in the future we shall always call Flatirons Plumbing. . . and ask for Caesar!

plumbers.name: Earl's Plumbing & Air
plumbers.address: 879 US-83 84 St 1105, Abilene, TX 79602, USA

reviews.author: Lesvia Millican
reviews.text: Alexandro was very professional. I got the sense that he knew exactly what he was doing so that put me at ease right away.  Both of the technicians were really nice and very polite. They installed my wall heater in a really short time and took the time to explain how to operate the heater. I would highly recommend their services.

reviews.author: Vincent Alderete
reviews.text: Jerry and Jeremiah were 10 stars the best I have ever seen in my life. Mastery in performance, customer care and know what's best. I have never experienced the type of care and advising the best possible outcomes. Me and my family were suffering with out a functioning water heater taking a cold shower was a nightmare. Amanda dispatch sent the guys out they knew exactly what to do and diagnosed the issue quickly with precision. After explaining our budget the family like business at Earl's donated a water heater to us. I'm still pinching myself. Thank you King Jesus for Earl's Plumbing & Air. I pray everyone gets the service, love and good Christian business relations I have received. My heart goes out to the company. Bless you and your generations to come. If reading this you are truly in for one in a lifetime experience.

reviews.author: Lindsey Brown Synatschk
reviews.text: Earl's was so professional in their communication from start to finish. I usually spoke with Stephanie on the phone, and she was so kind and helpful. Our plumber was Zach N. and he was fantastic as well. Although we were outside of their normal service range, the supervisors at Earl's approved us during a terrible winter storm, and we are most appreciative. I especially appreciate that they texted a technician photo, bio, and ETA along with tracking. Would definitely use Earl's again and have already recommended them to others. Thank you!

reviews.author: Paul J Brooks
reviews.text: Earl‘s always does an amazing job! Fast, friendly, professional, and expert install installation and maintenance maintenance! We have our home warranty with them, and they have been really great to work with. They saved us a ton on our water heater expenses. I would definitely recommend buying a home warranty for girls and getting the premium package. It’s been a lifesaver.

reviews.author: Alyssa Mattheus
reviews.text: Tyler Anderson has come to fix our plumbing on a couple different occasions. He has been phenomenal each time. Tyler is kind, knowledgeable and professional. This is a small but big thing for me- We do not wear shoes in our house.. he must’ve noticed the subtle clues of how we leave shoes outside etc. Without me asking, he took his boots off and put them outside the front door. That is SO appreciative and excellent to observe something like that. Thanks Tyler for being an amazing plumber, but providing great customer service too!

plumbers.name: Rooter Man
plumbers.address: 195 Potomac Ave Unit B, Tallmadge, OH 44278, USA

reviews.author: Schyler Chappell
reviews.text: I had Austin out to clear a backup in my sewer line. He not only unclogged my outlet, he educated me on what potentially may become an issue down the line, how to avoid problems and what long term solutions may be, if it becomes an extensive problem. Austin was pleasant to speak with, clean cut, and professional. I highly recommend this company and certify that they are trustworthy and provide quality service. The office lady - I think Lucy was her name - was also an excellent communicator.

reviews.author: Theresa E Carpinelli
reviews.text: It took them awhile to finally get out to my house for the installation, but once they got here, they couldn’t have been nicer and more professional.  Did a great job with the installation, and were very considerate.  Highly recommend.

reviews.author: EA C
reviews.text: Austin was prompt and very helpful and informative!  The cost is very high only down side for me definitely seemed like a nice company to work with.  I will definitely give their info to a neighbor or friend.

reviews.author: Jennifer Pavlak
reviews.text: Rooter Man has been the best plumbing experience I’ve ever had. I was recommended them by Americon Restoration after a pipe started leaking through my kitchen ceiling. Heather from Rooter Man text me SAME DAY that Americon was here trying to set me up with an immediate appointment with a plumber. She got me booked for the very next day! My plumber, Evan, showed up promptly right as the two hour window began, and was so personable and kind. He assessed my issue and determined he needed to make a run to the hardware store first so he could do the job same day. He ended up replacing about 16 inches of my corroded supply line. He worked so diligently, and explained to me what he did to correct the issue. He spoke to me (a single mom) respectfully and concisely. His cleanup was if he was never here. What a wonderful and smooth process this was for me- I took their card to recommend them- and use them again!

reviews.author: Mary Morgan
reviews.text: Patrick was prompt and so nice. Very helpful, even when i couldn't get home to talk to him myself. My daughter called me & had him on speaker to explain what the problem was, how he fixed it & assured that we should be good for a long time now, also explained what would be done if they have to be called out again. Highly recommend & definitely will call if any other problems arise

plumbers.name: Mackin & Sons Plumbing
plumbers.address: 911 Broad Suite 201, Wadsworth, OH 44281, USA

reviews.author: Polly LaHue
reviews.text: Josh did a great job installing a much-needed garbage disposal. He was prompt, pleasant and professional! Tidy, too! What more could you ask for in a plumber?! I'll be using Mackin for all my plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Karen Elizabeth
reviews.text: Mackin & Sons provided excellent service when my water heater failed. My phone call was answered immediately--no automated voice system, no need to leave a message. They got me on the schedule the first day I was available, removed the water heater and gave me a written estimate that included options to repair or replace. I chose replacement, for which they helped me secure financing. There were issues with my subfloor and surrounding area that needed to be addressed before the new water heater was installed. Mike worked with my insurance company and recommended a company to do the remediation work. Mindy in the office was always pleasant and helpful, as was everyone else I spoke with. Once the floor repairs were done, they were available right away for the installation. Josh and Ethan did a fantastic job fitting a 40-gallon water heater and drain pan into a small opening that previously held only a 30-gallon. They even managed to fit a thermal expansion tank into the limited space. They explained what they were doing without my even asking, and the questions I did have were answered patiently and knowledgeably.  Turning the water back on caused my ancient faucet to give way, and Josh was able to repair it on the spot. The whole company was professional from start to finish, and it showed in the end result. I would recommend them anytime.

reviews.author: Rachel Latin
reviews.text: Hot water tank started leaking at 8 pm last night and called Mackin & Sons late to schedule an inspection. By 10:30 am today, we had a new tank professionally installed. Josh and Ethan were friendly and answered all our questions. Couldn't be happier with the quick response time and the great service. Thank you Mackin & Sons!!

reviews.author: Josh Brockman
reviews.text:
Mackin and Sons Plumbing was fantastic to work with. Kristian was great to work with and goes out of his way to help. They rushed to get our water running so we could move in on time, which meant a lot to us. Not only that, but they took the time to walk us through several water treatment options that fit both our needs and our budget.

When we later ran into a plumbing issue that they hadn’t previously worked on, he didn’t hesitate to help and took the time to talk us through how to fix it without even having to coming out. The problem was resolved immediately.

They are extremely professional, friendly, and very knowledgeable. We will absolutely be using Mackin and Sons again in the future and highly recommend them to anyone looking for reliable plumbing solutions.

reviews.author: Penny Mcbride
reviews.text: Mack N Son’s helped us get through a winter of sewer damage. Christian was so helpful in guiding us through restoration and preparing us as we rebuild both bathrooms. He has even went through insurance. Thank you for all your company has supported us through. Make a big difference knowing you have our backs.

plumbers.name: The Drain Surgeon
plumbers.address: 1613 Barton Chapel Rd, Augusta, GA 30909, USA

reviews.author: Karena Y
reviews.text: A+++ service from day 1!! Extremely knowledgeable and friendly. They had my new water heater delivered and installed less than 24 hours from contacting them. They also quoted me a reasonable price. Great business!! I highly recommend!

reviews.author: Ken Jones
reviews.text: Had a septic tank installed. Kevin was a great communicator. Spent a lot of time going over the details. Completed the job in a timely manner. Everything works great. His office has followed up with me regarding satisfaction and maintenance.

reviews.author: Carsha Holley
reviews.text: After calling a few other companies who had "emergency appointments/same day appointments" listed on their websites, and finding out the next available appointment would've been between 3-4 days out, I called The Drain Surgeon. They listened to the issue, found availability to assist, and was out at the property less than 24 hours later! The issue was identified, addressed, and my tenants were happy! I should've called them first! But, now I know and will definitely make sure they're at the top of my list. I commend them for their professionalism, caring demeanor, and being empathetic with the situation. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jose
reviews.text: Drain Surgeon originally came out for a quote. We needed to have a leak fixed because it was traveling to the room downstairs from our master shower. They agreed that the leak was coming from the "drain pan" under our shower. It was cracked. So we decided to rearrange our bathroom, something we've been wanting to do, but kept holding off due to cost. They were very efficient and worked with us on price. We opted out from using their financial institution for a loan (Regents Bank). They had the plumber come out, fix and rearrange the pipes, and then had a bathroom remodeling team come out and start the work. Here are the Before and After

reviews.author: ricky ramize to
reviews.text: I called multiple plumbers for my clogged sink and received unreasonable pricing… the Drain surgeon work with my availability..also instead of charging me a price I agreed to pay which was already better then other plumbers..he found a way to where my fee was not even a quarter of what I had already agreed to pay.. Best service ever !! I will never use any other plumber and neither should anyone else ..Respectful.. honest .. and overall great experience.. Very grateful I call the Drain Surgeon

plumbers.name: Bailey Brothers Plumbing, Heating and Air Conditioning
plumbers.address: 800 Industrial Dr, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: annetta mason
reviews.text: Stephen and Aaron installed a new Bradford White 40 gallon gas hot water tank 1/2 in the attic today for a lot of money :) but the best estimate I got. I chose Bailey brothers bc Stephen was the person I felt most trust worthy to do good work and stand behind it after so many calls, texts, and estimates in person. He is the only one that did not criticize anyone else or try to "convince" me to go with him over a week long decision making process for me....its in there! I have hot water today! And I have no reason to believe that will not continue to be the case...

reviews.author: Savanna Pearce
reviews.text: I can't say thank you enough to these amazing people! Aaron was able to get me a quote on a new HVAC system and get the ball rolling ASAP. Thanks to them, I have the security my heater will last long past this Apocalypse Snowmagedon!!!! We're sitting roasty toasty and no more cold spots in our house! They were so nice, very thorough and didn't rush the install process just to get to the next job. Highly recommend this wonderful company.

reviews.author: Gary Lott
reviews.text:
Called Bailey Brothers Plumbing on a Friday around 2:30 PM—the day before we were about to get full-blown Snowpocalypse. We had a leak somewhere in our hot water closet and had already struck out with several other plumbing companies. One of them actually referred us to Bailey Brothers… and that alone says something.
Bailey Brothers said, “No problem,” and sent Larry Floyd to the rescue.
Larry was fantastic. Super professional, easy to work with, and honestly brought some serious Sherlock-level deduction skills to the job. This was not an easy issue to find, but he didn’t rush, didn’t make excuses, and didn’t quit because it was cold or getting late. He stayed with it until he figured it out—and fixed it—just in time before the great cold front of 2026 hit.
Huge thanks to Larry and the entire Bailey Brothers team for saying yes when others said no. That kind of service is rare, and it matters. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Taylor Moore
reviews.text: Highly recommend Bailey Brothers! Stephen came out within hours of calling. He was incredibly professional, transparent, and personable. Stephen took the time to explain the processes and actually listened to any of my concerns. The greatest part? The cost was very affordable! I have found my new plumbing company! Thank you, Stephen!

reviews.author: James McMurphy
reviews.text:
I called Bailey Brothers and they showed up within the hour! Very prompt.
Unfortunately it was all downhill from there:
I was quoted $2,800 to fix a broken fitting on the bottom of a well pressure tank. They said the whole tank needed replaced along with other fittings and their labor. I questioned why the broken fitting couldn’t simply come out of the tank so that the entire tank didn’t need replaced. I insisted they try to remove the fitting and when they did, it came right out. So right there saved over $1,000 just because they were going to be lazy and not try to remove the broken fitting. When I tried to question, very nicely, why I was being charged so much for labor and a part ($1,200- $1,400) to resolve this issue, Larry got hostile and hung up on me after saying if I didn’t like the price I could call someone else. He left me and my customer high and dry with no water all night just because I was questioning some things and trying to figure out why labor was so high. He ignored calls and texts, which I could see he did in fact read. Unbelievably rude and unprofessional. Not to mention lazy. Do NOT waste your time calling them.

plumbers.name: Patriot Plumbing and Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 102 Cross St # 100, San Luis Obispo, CA 93401, USA

reviews.author: Peggy Jern
reviews.text: Patriot plumbing answered my phone call, then came within 3 hrs for a non emergency toilet fix, and had my repair completed in an hour. Leo was very nice and explained my options. I was very satisfied with Patriot Plumbing and I now have their business card magnet on my refrigerator.

reviews.author: Gavin Vitale
reviews.text: Jacob is the best. Took an emergency call on a Saturday of a 3 day weekend and stopped a big leak within an hour. Trusting your plumber when you live out of town is so important and these guys always take excellent care of us!

reviews.author: Shahrad Teimouri
reviews.text:
We’ve worked with Patriot Plumbing on multiple occasions, from small fixes to large projects, and they are truly the best around. Their workmanship, professionalism, and integrity are outstanding. You can always trust them to get the job done right—and to exceed your expectations. Noah is informative, honest, hard working and professional.
10 out of 10 🙏

reviews.author: Charles Roche
reviews.text:
Patriot plumbing is always on time and does great work. Their service reps are well trained, polite, and explain everything in a way that your average person can understand.

I highly recommend patriot plumbing… I have used them for years

Joe Ryan

reviews.author: Scott Newell
reviews.text: Great job!  Leo arrived on time and was very knowledgeable of the system and how to troubleshoot the problem. He had us up and running in no time at all. I would highly recommend Patriot Plumbing to friends and family.

plumbers.name: TN Plumbing Solutions
plumbers.address: 4630 Sulphur Springs Rd Suite 1, Murfreesboro, TN 37129, USA

reviews.author: Zakary Whisman
reviews.text: It took me a long time to find a plummber that could actually do the job. I went through 4 plummers before I found this company and I am blessed for it. When I thought all hope was lost, and I was never going to get my sewage cleared. This company answered my prayers. This man is born to do this. I am a repeat customer. TN plumbing solutions will always be my first choice. Mr Tyler wood is extremely gifted at what he does. He's very attentive and he bites the bullet. So we as homeowners, Don 't have to. It's damn near impossible to find cheap and reliable. With  Mr. Tyler woods, you get both. If I could give him more than 5 stars, I would. So if you want fast responsive quality work. Then, you give this company a call and Mr. Tyler woods will sure take care of you.

reviews.author: Andy Wilson
reviews.text:
First - an actual person answered the phone and then quickly got me scheduled for my emergency issue

Second - Robert arrived promptly, and quickly assessed the situation. He was knowledgeable and an absolute professional all-around!

Third - Robert gave me great advice on caring for the old unit, and insight the inevitable future repairs.

I found my new plumbing company and cam easily recommend them to anyone I know.

reviews.author: Rick Williams
