reviews.text: I called TN Plumbing Solutions at about 7:30AM and Robert and Connor arrived about 1PM and were very professional, efficient and courteous. After assessing the need to replace our water heater at 1:30PM they returned at 5PM (an hour earlier than promised!) and had hot water for us by 7:15PM. We are very happy with the new tankless unit and highly recommend TN Plumbing Solutions.

reviews.author: Maya Joelle
reviews.text:
Aaron is the best. He took his time when addressing my kitchen sink issue and he fixed it promptly.
He is super efficient as the diagnosis, the travel to get the faucet I wanted, and faucet replacement took less than 2 hours.

I would highly recommend this company!

reviews.author: Ellen Quertermous
reviews.text: Robert is very professional and personable. Scheduling our appointment was easy and he arrived promptly. He fixed our problem quickly and completely and cleaned up thoroughly. We will call R&M Plumbing Solutions for any future issues.

plumbers.name: Economy Plumbing Services, LLC
plumbers.address: 701 Tillery St, Austin, TX 78702, USA

reviews.author: Norma Rangel
reviews.text: We called Economy Plumbing Services, LLC for our church irrigation backflow annual inspection they were the most straightforward and offered a very fair price.  We were able to save $25.00 this year by "Saving last year's receipt and showing it  as they suggested on their email, "Show this to your service professional on your next service visit and save an extra $25! " Their technician,  Sean, arrived on time and gave us a call 30 minutes before. He was knowledgeable, friendly, and did an excellent job.  We are very satisfied with the work and the price."

reviews.author: N Allen
reviews.text:
Sean the Manager  from Welles Branch showed up to drain my water heater.  He didn't.  He said it was rusted and needed to be replaces.  He showed me water around the bottom of the heater in the pan on which the heater was sitting.  The water was not there the night before.  I removed the water.  There was no rust at the bottom of the heater.  There is no water there after two days.  He had a couple of minutes alone with the water heater so my conclusion is that he put  the water there to force replacing a functioning water heater and a couple of valves  a cost of over $3000.   When I priced what he was offering compared to what I could independently, I could do all of what he offered at around $1000. I didn't want to waste money to replace a fully functioning water heater.  I had one before that lasted more than 20 years.  Rheem water heaters interior is glass coated for a long life if they are maintained properly.
Be careful if you ever need anyone doing work in your house, make sure to ask around and get some decent people.  There are a lot of thieves skinning a lot of innocent people and there almost no regulation and no control.  We live in a strange time.

reviews.author: Nick Allen
reviews.text:
I needed to have a toilet replaced at my house. I was able to text the number on their website and they responded immediately, scheduling a visit later that same day.

Grant did great work on the install and was done in less than an hour and a half. The price seemed fair and I was happy with the result.

reviews.author: Ruben
reviews.text: had a four hour appointment window didn’t even show up on time in my option. That’s a bad start so I canceled my appointment.

reviews.author: Alexia Dauterive
reviews.text: They were fast to respond, but the company's name makes you think that they might be economical.  Nothing could be further from the truth.  Plumber charged $500 per toilet (2 toilets x $500 = $1,000) to tighten the screws on the toilet because they were slightly loose.  We were in a tight trunaround to get this work done because we were sellng out home and had no choice but to use them.  When I complained about the price, the plumber said he would throw in the sanitation loop for free, but then left without doing it.  When I called and complained and asked to speak with the plumber, I was told that he was too busy and that would not happen.  I tried for weeks to get a receipt and they never would send one even after calling multiple times.  I would definitely not call these guys ever again.

plumbers.name: Absolute Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 317 Northpoint Pkwy, Acworth, GA 30102, USA

reviews.author: Kaitlyn Brewer
reviews.text: We Had an all around good experience thanks to Keith and the team at absolute plumbing! Had to get my pipes for my sink replaced quickly due to a leak. We were super happy with the prices and quality of the products they used. They are extremely knowledgeable and thorough while checking your home. Such respectful gentlemen. I would recommend them to ABSOLUTELY anyone.

reviews.author: Victoria Sammarco
reviews.text: My toilet was not working. I called Absolute Plumbing. Nate and Evan came right on time the next morning. They explained all my options thoroughly. I decided to get a new toilet. They did a great job installing it. I will definitely call them again for future work i need done.

reviews.author: Zenobia Jackson
reviews.text: These are the greatest guys EVER!! They felt like family. They gave off great vibes. The project was researched thoroughly and I had a variety of options to choose from financially. I was very pleased.

reviews.author: Ron Strickland
reviews.text: Nate and Evan came to fix a plumbing issue. They were very cordial and fixed the issue within  minutes. They also checked the overall plumbing system and discovered other issues that needed attention. They were very professional and knowledgeable and provided a plan to resolve with the newly discovered plumbing issues. I would not hesitate to call them again.

reviews.author: Lurene Hunt
reviews.text: Evan and Nate were fantastic during their visit.  They took the time to explain everything they were doing as they checked out an issue we're having with an odor from a drain.  Their attention to detail really stood out. While handling the job they came for, they also noticed a few other areas of concern and explained what could happen over time if the issues are not addressed. What I appreciated most is that they didn't try to upsell anything or push for their company to take on the additional work. It was clear they genuinely care about the quality of their work and the well-being of the customer's home. Because of their professionalism and honesty, I'll definitely be using Absolute Plumbing Services for any future needs they can help with.

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of Dallas
plumbers.address: 10155 Plano Rd #104, Dallas, TX 75238, USA

reviews.author: Trinh Mai
reviews.text: Clinton from Mr. Rooter was amazing. He was patient, respectful, and took the time to explain everything while helping my parents at their nail shop. He fixed the issue and made sure everything was working before leaving. We truly appreciate his professionalism and kindness. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Ulysses Grant
reviews.text: From the moment Tun arrived, his professionalism was evident. He quickly assessed the plumbing issue and provided a clear, straightforward explanation of the potential costs, depending on the specific type of plumbing repair needed. I appreciated his directness and transparency in outlining the pricing structure, which helped me feel confident in the services being offered. Tun didn't just jump into the work; he took the time to thoroughly explain the repair procedure, answering all my questions and ensuring I understood each step involved. This level of communication was incredibly valuable. More importantly, Tun efficiently and effectively fixed the plumbing problem, demonstrating his expertise and skill. His ability to diagnose and resolve the issue quickly saved me both time and potential further damage. Tun is an outstanding representative for Roto-Rooter, embodying the company's commitment to quality service and customer satisfaction. I would highly recommend his services to anyone in need of a reliable and knowledgeable plumber.

reviews.author: Michael Dow
reviews.text:
I tried to take off my old outside faucet and completely smashed the old copper pipe. Therefore that means no running water!!
Tun did a fantastic job. The pipe repair and faucet work like a charm. Great quality work as well. I had my water back on in a couple of hours as well. Mr. Rooter is more expensive. However, they get the job done right and are great to call in emergencies. Thanks again, Tun!

reviews.author: william skinner
reviews.text: David was great, I had ruptured sewage line gave me the location of the break did not push for a complete line replacement  . Had a team the hand dug for the repair much more clean than having have and excavator do it and lower risk of damage to other systems.

reviews.author: Leah Hoffman
reviews.text: Overall a great experience & they got to the house super quick after I called! Brett explained everything well and gave me my options. It did seem a little on the pricier side (I spent around $2,000 for everything I needed) but, it all needed to be done and I’m happy with that. I do recommend.

plumbers.name: Clarke Kent Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1408 W Ben White Blvd, Austin, TX 78704, USA

reviews.author: Nina Fuller
reviews.text: I have used Clark Kent a few times now and have found them to be reliable, keeping me informed every step of the way. They have provided good service and patience in making sure I understand what is going on. The last service was complex but feel like my 2 problems have been solved.

reviews.author: Wing Commander
reviews.text: Andrew from Clarke Kent was excellent to deal with and did a high quality repair. He had to dig out the line from the meter but did so without hesitation or complaint. The job took about 3.5 hour's and he kept me updated as the work progressed. Worthy of the five star rating.

reviews.author: Pj Johnson
reviews.text: Had to replace floor bolt on my toilet and had a small leak under my sink. They did a great job. The price was good. Plumber was friendly. Been a while since I needed a plumbing company but the last one was over priced, tried to upsell me, and just seemed greedy. Clark Kent didn't feel like that at all. I was very happy and will definitely use them again. Highly recommend them.

reviews.author: August Beverly
reviews.text: We had an issue with our kitchen sink not draining, and Daniel was fantastic. He was extremely knowledgeable, quickly and confidently identified the problem, and took the time to explain how we can care for our sink moving forward. I especially appreciated his holistic, health-conscious approach to prevention, no harsh chemicals and nothing that could compromise our health. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Angela Masciarelli
reviews.text: We had a great experience with Daniel Machuca! We’ve used Clarke Kent for a few years now and have always had good experiences. However Daniel was exceptional! He clearly explained the issue and problem areas to look out for in the future. We appreciated his diligence and honesty and would recommend him and Clarke Kent to any of our neighbors and friends.

plumbers.name: To the T Plumbing Heating and Air
plumbers.address: 12487 Syracuse St, Thornton, CO 80602, USA

reviews.author: Christine Balzano
reviews.text: Excellent service!!!! My furnace went out of course on a very cold day and it’s supposed to be a super cold weekend. I called. They picked up the phone when I called  and came out a few hours after I called. They diagnosed the problem. It was a gas valve and fixed. It saved us from freezing and my pipes are safe! I recommend this company to everyone because they had excellent service and an honest price.

reviews.author: Marie Jones
reviews.text: Mike and Lyndsey are an awesome team! They knew what they were doing and how to explain what we needed to know. Timely and very friendly!

reviews.author: Sonja Maher
reviews.text: This company was referred to me by a family member who said to ask for Justin or Anthony as they did a fantastic for them. I called and spoke to Sarah. She was very nice and patient. She set up an appointment on Oct 28th between 1-3pm. I specifically asked for Anthony or Justin to assist with my issue. Sarah said no problem and assured me Justin would be the plumber coming out to my home. Justin was not dispatched to my home. It was another tech by the name of Hector. Although he was 30 min late for my 1pm-3pm appt; I was given a heads up. No big deal. Hector and another HVAC person by the name of Mike showed up at 3:30pm. They told me it would be a cost of $250 to “diagnose” the hot water heater. Mind you my heater was replaced 4 years ago. The problem was diagnosed within two minutes upon removal of the two nuts on top of my water heater. They were completely clogged which explained why my water pressure was extremely low. They explained it would take an hours worth of work to fix at the cost of $459 per hour. With our hot water heater dismantled, we were asked if we wanted to go through with the repair. We felt we were being strong armed but didn’t want to go through the hassle of calling and waiting for another plumber as we would be without water and it was late in the afternoon. The bill for an hour and a half of work came to just under $800! I have yet to receive a copy of my bill which was supposed to be emailed to me that evening. Once Hector and Mike left, I went to my basement to make sure everything was in order. I was disappointed to find that a mess was left in the hot water heater space, water all over the floor in my bathroom (the water in the shower was being tested to make sure it worked) and that my toilet was used and not flushed. GROSS. In addition they turned off my furnace and forgot to turn it back on. We found out the hard way when we woke up the next morning  in a house that was 59 degrees! I do not recommend this company as they didn't send out who I wanted and felt the cost for the service provided was very high. I am deeply disappointed. I had to give one star to post this review. However, I give this company ZERO stars.

reviews.author: Zachary Munson
reviews.text:
Great local company with amazing attention to detail. We sent a request for a quote and within 24 hours we had an appointment that accommodated our work schedule.

Nate and Max were scheduled for our in home quote and we received confirmation over text prior to the appointment which provided great detail on how to make any changes if necessary. On the day of the appointment we were reminded of the time frame and again prompted to reach out if any changes were necessary.

Before we reached our scheduled time frame Nate provided a courtesy call to confirm the appointment and let me know he and Max would arrive shortly. On arrival I was already impressed with the level of professionalism and customer service provided. Nate and Max greeted me at the door they were both in company uniform, presentable and courteous of our home even wearing boot covers.  We briefly discussed work to be completed and they began a survey of our furnace, ducting and where to install an AC unit.

We determined there needed to be an update to our electrical panel to handle the AC unit and Nate provided great detail on that and offered help finding an electrician to complete that work as well.

After that we sat down to discuss our options for our new furnace and AC. Nate provided multiple options which included handouts detailing each system with all specifications. We decided on a few different packages that ranged in price and level of efficiency. We didn’t feel pressured into making a purchase but the honesty and transparency provided by To The T made us feel great about our options. Shortly after our appointment ended we received a quote with multiple options as discussed.

We chose to go with a quote provided by To The T and we could not be more happy with that decision.

On the day of our install the crew called with another courtesy call to confirm our appointment and showed up promptly. Not only did they provide exactly what they promised they were extremely pleasant. Second to none with customer service and professionalism. Big thanks to Nate Kam and Max for doing such a great job with everything!

Billing and scheduling was handled by Jen in their office and she was available to answer all of our questions also providing outstanding customer service.

Thank you,  To The T Plumbing and Heating!

Highly Recommended

reviews.author: Ryan Foshag
reviews.text: I called To the T Heating & Air to come look at our offices broken furnace. They responded with fast same day service. Mike was able to diagnose the problem, get me a quote, order the part, & repair our furnace all within a few hours. We will definitely be using them for all of our future HVAC & plumbing needs. 10 out of 10 & highly recommended!

plumbers.name: Plumb Doctors Inc.
plumbers.address: 1519 Dillon Lake Bend, Leander, TX 78641, USA

reviews.author: Dre !
reviews.text:
Insinkerator Badger trash disposal was leaking. Unit was 11+ years old; it was time. Called up the docs and needed it expeditiously because my tenant was moving in the very next morning. They sent muh man, Josh, over and he was brilliant. Walked me through the diagnosis and required solution. Got all that was needed from his van, showed me what thorough repair/replacement experience is supposed to be like. Thanks a ton, Josh!

The entire thing was most definitely on the pricey side but it needed to be done. I had no other viable options and was literally in the 11th hour. This Badger should last another 10+ years, hopefully.

I highly recommend Plumb Docs and if you want a best-in-class experience, ask for Josh!!

reviews.author: Lisa Pritchard
reviews.text:
Beyond disappointing- said they would be out this morning. Around 11:30am I called to confirm they were still coming, and was told the technician would be here in about an hour.

Another hour went by, I called again- this time no one picked up and I was sent to a full mailbox. I even tried 2 more times in case that was a fluke- same message.

I wish I had searched reviews by “most recent” as it seems this place does not have any positive reviews in the last 7 months. Do not call!!

reviews.author: Jerrod Horton
reviews.text: Installed faulty shower pan, dodged calls for months, then provided inadequate response to resolve issue. Would recommend for basic work, but avoid them for any difficult / non-basic work.

reviews.author: Jeffrey & Tina
reviews.text:
We tracked down Plumb Doctors after a few plumbers recommended by friends turned us down because they didn't service tankless water heaters. We've since used them twice and I can highly recommend!

Marc came out last year because our water wouldn't stay hot during showers. He showed up promptly, immediately diagnosed the issue as a faulty check valve, and had it replaced within minutes. He took the time to explain to us what he was doing and even showed us how to replace it ourselves in the future (plus how to flush our system) so we wouldn't have to pay for the same service again.

We called Marc out again earlier this week because we thought we damaged our heater after we fumbled through some self-maintenance. He came out on time and quickly confirmed nothing was wrong. He then stayed another 20-30 minutes to answer all of our questions, even allowing us to record videos of him showing how to do some basic maintenance so we wouldn't always have to rely on a plumber.

I don't believe they're the cheapest but we found the pricing to be fair after getting comps from a few other places. More importantly, Plumb Doctor and Marc have always been reliable, professional, courteous, and friendly. I appreciate their transparency and willingness to explain and educate us on what they're doing. I wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone who needs help.

reviews.author: Charles Michalk
reviews.text:
I recently had the opportunity to work with Plumb Doctors, and I am extremely satisfied with the service provided. After submitting an online request outside of normal business hours, I was impressed by the prompt response and confirmation of my appointment within just two hours.

Jami, the plumber assigned to my job, was punctual and professional. He ensured I was informed of his arrival time and kept me updated when he needed to leave and return for supplies. Jami managed his apprentice well, giving clear instructions and delegating tasks efficiently while handling other company needs. This not only demonstrated his leadership skills but also his ability to multitask effectively.

Jami's communication was excellent. He quickly identified the issue, explained the underlying problem in a way that was easy to understand, and kept me informed throughout the repair process. His commitment to customer service was evident as he took before, during, and after pictures of the repairs, which he later emailed to me for my personal records. This attention to detail and dedication to ensuring I had a complete record of the work done was greatly appreciated.

Overall, my experience with Jami and Plumb Doctors was outstanding. I highly recommend them for anyone in need of reliable and professional plumbing services. I will certainly be using their services again in the future.

plumbers.name: Catons Plumbing, Drains & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 616 Water St #316, Baltimore, MD 21202, USA

reviews.author: Rj
reviews.text:
Called them for a frozen pipe that burst. Sent out a plumber who did okay work. Have to redo the pipe he replaced because it's QPVC and his replacement piping is bent putting stress back on that area. Water remediation crew didn't check my flooring which had a lot of water on it, flooring is bowing in multiple areas after they finished. The crew also damaged my flooring when setting up a plastic tarp to isolate the area. Crew also didn't clean up any of the drywall dust from demoing, only did so after I asked them to. Going to have a GC tear up the floors to look for mold since they didn't even bother to.

Edit: Changing review from 2 to 1 stars. I called Catons with my compliants and asked how they would remediate it. Supervisor Dennis I spoke with told me they could only offer to spray anti-fungal when I had someone else pull up the floor. He also said the threshold wasn't their fault as it looked, based off my pictures, that the damage was caused by the flooring they failed to remediate per the contract I signed. Haven't heard back in multiple days, going to file a complaint with the city.

reviews.author: Just Jason
reviews.text:
We have used Catons for several different projects and each time the service is excellent and the team we have worked with is superb. They arrive when they say they will and the projects are done with perfection.

We will continue to use them for all our needs.

reviews.author: Ivan Celestial
reviews.text: Excellent service from Kevontay. He was able to quickly diagnose an issue at one of our properties, develop a solution, and perform repairs in a timely manner. We definitely prefer to use Caton Plumbing in the future — especially if they send Kevontay.

reviews.author: STUDIO MANAGER
reviews.text: This was the worst service call we have ever experienced. Complete lack of communication internally between technicians and management. Customer service was running interference and was misleading at best. I spent a total of three plus hours on the phone with them over this time period. We had 8 different people out here over the course of 7 days; some just left, some gave wildly different pricing scenarios and solutions. The first plumber cut the water line to our third floor and only made the leak worse - then left. That cost $400! It was a simple fix that was needed. Catons refused to apply a promised credit to our final bill until I made a loud and angry stink about it. I do not recommend them for your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Frank Flamish
reviews.text: I was in a very bad place with a burst pipe.  I called on a Friday evening at 5:30.  Our technician "Jason" showed up quickly and immediately had the water shut off!  He is very skilled and totally professional.... the knowledgeable not fooling around type!  In and out like 45mins 👍👍

plumbers.name: H.R. Stewart Inc
plumbers.address: 52 Crystal St, Cary, IL 60013, USA

reviews.author: Mike Tate
reviews.text:
H.R. Stewart went out of their way to get a plumber to my home in less than 24hrs when my water main valves broke and needed replacing. Jimmy was great and a super nice guy! Jimmy replaced 2 old screw valves with new ball valves.
Would recommend H.R. Stewart to everyone and will definitely call them again if I need plumbing or HVAC work done.

reviews.author: Ryan Smid
reviews.text:
Eric from H.R. Stewart was incredible. My furnace stopped working in the middle of the night, and he spent nearly 30 minutes on the phone with me at 4 AM troubleshooting the issue. He was patient, thorough, and even followed up exactly at 8 AM like he promised.

We later found out Nicor had a frozen gas valve outside, so the furnace wasn’t actually faulty but Eric’s help and dedication at that hour really stood out. I’m extremely grateful and will definitely use HR Stewart for my other properties. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Judy Gitchell
reviews.text:
Cody is prompt knowledgeable and efficient. Fixed a leak under the bathroom sink. Cleaned up after the job. Bathroom looked better than before he started the job.
Have only been doing business with this company for 4 months but they are the best plumbers I’ve ever used

reviews.author: Arden Nelson
reviews.text:
He did excellent and I as a General Contractor am sincere.
I had guys onsite and we all worked together to determine best path and  Cody was key to that decision.
He walked the entire area and shared thoughts which all made sense.
Decision to put on semi hold made total sense and if needed for sure I will call you guys back and highly likely ask you to bid on future projects I may have.

Thank you

reviews.author: Dan Kennedy
reviews.text: I rely on HR S to be the reliable and professional experts for my home HVAC system and I am never disappointed.  They are very responsive on the phone and quick to be available and service my home systems issues.  All of the personnel that come to the house know my HVAC system and will install or resolve issues expertly and with professional customer service attitude.

plumbers.name: Big Blue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 768 Stewart Ct, Alameda, CA 94501, USA

reviews.author: Terry O'Connor
reviews.text: Harris Giotas, our Big Blue plumber, was incredible. He is a real credit to the industry. Not only was he able to replace our aging (and old) Glacier Bay fixtures without tearing out the entire wall, he discovered and repaired a unknown major leak under the toilette. We are truly indebted to Harris for his complete professionalism. He was prompt, efficient, and courteous. He is highly recommended for any plumbing problem or issue.

reviews.author: Ralph Martinez
reviews.text: Enrique Luevanos, Technician with Big Blue installed our new thermal expansion tank. He was very professional, thorough and respectful during their entire process. The end result was great professional service by again, another great technician with Big Blue.

reviews.author: Jenn Lavelle
reviews.text: When our old hot water heater died and couldn’t be fixed, we called Big Blue. Javier V. was really helpful with explaining our options, and we decided to upgrade to a Sanco2 heat pump system instead of gas. Javier and Pardo were knowledgeable, kind and precise with the install, and navigated challenges like where to put the heat pump behind our house and ordering special parts. They also work with a great electrician and facilitated that work. The whole job was done in two days! They made sure we didn’t have to go a weekend without hot water. I highly recommend going with Big Blue and their expert staff.

reviews.author: Kate Loreaux
reviews.text: Called these guys with an emergency when a water heater flooded my condo in the evening. They confirmed they could make an appointment the next morning. Overnight they texted me that they were “canceling the appointment due to a scheduling change.” I can’t speak to the quality of the actual work they do, but I certainly wouldn’t depend on them in the case of an emergency. They might just decide they won’t be coming after all.

reviews.author: Angela Gregory
reviews.text:
Nate J at BBP was very professional and knowledgeable. He explained our options and when he left I felt good because he actually made sense at when he explained things.  My neighbor said that he had his plumbing done at Big Blue and was very happy with them.
So I would definitely recommend this company.

plumbers.name: My Local Plumber Water Heater Repairs and Leak Detection
plumbers.address: 2430 Squire Pl, Farmers Branch, TX 75234, USA

reviews.author: Kim W.
reviews.text: I called My Local Plumber for help with determining a leak detection within my home.  Their plumbers quickly came over and found the leak!  They were friendly and knowledgeable!  The office staff were also very helpful and attentive.  Thanks for helping me in my time of need!  I'm so glad I found their service!  I highly recommend for leak detection!  I wish I could leave 10 stars for their service!

reviews.author: William Kitchens
reviews.text: I have and will always use My Local Plumber. 2 broken outside faucets from the ice storm. Pipes leaking in wall. I tried to fix it myself. Not a chance. Zac Cassel fixed it like a champ! You get live updates on the drivers arrival time, you get great pricing, and you get great service. What more can I ask for?

reviews.author: Matt Roberson
reviews.text: So great, I had a big clog in our main drainage line on the Saturday of this latest snow storm in Dallas and they were able to send out Zach and Marco to help me on a day where hardly anybody could get out and around town. They quickly resolved the issue which allowed me to drip my faucets and potentially save me from disaster! Zach and Marco were very knowledgeable and very kind. Much appreciated guys!

reviews.author: Rick Reid
reviews.text: I'm a repeat customer -- My Local Plumber had a super-quick response and turnaround time on snaking a drain, running a diagnostic camera, and fixing an annoying toilet mechanism that had gone south. They also helped me determine the cause of a new, leaky sink. Super pros -- a little spendy, but worth the peace of mind. I highly recommended My Local Plumber for caring customer service and outstanding quality workmanship.

reviews.author: Joanna C
reviews.text: We have used My Local Plumber for a couple of years now.  We will not use another plumbing company!  We got the recommendation from my realtor friend and I understand why they come highly recommended.  From scheduling to communication and expertise, everything is handled efficiently and professionally.  Trevor and Kevin just left after solving 2 separate issues.  Trevor explained methods and costs of everything before, during and after the process.  Thanks for a positive and reliable experience!

plumbers.name: All Clear Plumbing & Drain Service, LLC
plumbers.address: 154 Lafayette Ave unit i, Laurel, MD 20707, USA

reviews.author: Sandi Hall
reviews.text: Alan and Cody did an outstanding job at replacing my decades old leaky water heater and bringing the system up to code. They were polite, professional, a pleasure to talk to and they brought some humor to an otherwise costly event. I will use All Clear again.

reviews.author: James Allen
reviews.text: I was very pleased how efficient my plumbing work was done with our gas furnace pipe replacement. I highly recommend Mr. Juan & Mr. Amilcar for there fantastic work done at my house today with replacing our main 12 inch pipe and other pipes from our gas line. I got there company name from my neighbor who they had done work for. I am very pleased with there service and work, I highly recommend these two guys from All Clear Plumbing & Drain Service.

reviews.author: Keisha Ross
reviews.text: Amazing Service! Allen Provides Great Knowledge on Water and Plumbing Services!! Allen and Cody are very welcoming and approachable as they are ready to answer any of your questions. They move FAST!!! Allen and Cody were Punctual and the installation was quick. I had my water heater replaced and I am very pleased with the end result.  Allen came to do my initial estimate and inspect the previous water heater. He was very straight forward with pricing and informing me of everything that needed to be done. I didn’t get work done right away, but All Clear Plumbing didn't continuously harass me or pressure me into going forward with their services, which is something I truly appreciate as so many companies do that!!!!  My husband and I waited a while because it’s a large purchase, but when we were ready Allen had such a memorable first impression I knew we HAD  to go with him!! Thank you both, Allen & Cody for providing such amazing service! I Definitely recommend their services and I will be using them again when it comes time to service my water heater in the future.

reviews.author: Rai Page
reviews.text: Allan and his counterpart did a phenomenal job with our water heater installation. Very knowledgeable and worked with us to get it done promptly. He gave us options to choose for a specific heater and picked it up from home depot the morning of. Thank you again!

reviews.author: Cherise Johnson
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with this company. My water heater was acting up and losing hot water, and the technician took the time to properly diagnose the issue instead of rushing me into a full replacement.

He clearly explained what was going on, showed me the condition of the heating elements, and walked me through my options. The lower element had failed and the top was badly corroded, which fully explained the problem. After replacing the elements, everything is working well again and my hot water is stable.

I really appreciated the transparency, communication, and professionalism throughout the visit. No pressure, just clear information and solid work. Would definitely use them again.

plumbers.name: Neighborhood Plumbing and Drain - Georgetown
plumbers.address: 104 Country Rd, Georgetown, TX 78628, USA

reviews.author: Boomer Anderson
reviews.text:
To replace my water heater, I made the mistake of calling another company first. Those people seemed more like used-car salesmen than plumbers. I got a very slimy vibe and realized they were not the kind of people I wanted in my life, let alone my garage. So I sent them packing and did what I should've done in the first place - I called Lauren at Neighborhood Plumbing.

The difference in personalities was amazing. Lauren was straightforward and fun, with no B.S. I explained I just wanted a water heater, with no upsells or fancy bells & whistles. She respected that and got a crew out in less than 24 hours.

The guys (sorry, I'm spacing on their names) were friendly and professional and, of special importance to me, they weren't pushy at all. They finished the install in just under an hour (for real) and charged a reasonable price.

I can't imagine hiring a plumber I don't like or can't trust. So I've already made my choice about who I'll call next time I have plumbing issues - Neighborhood Plumbing!

reviews.author: TRS
reviews.text: We have used them prior to them changing names and nothing has changed. The service is excellent and we haven’t had a signal issue both in getting them to respond or with any of their repair repairs. Highly recommended

reviews.author: Patricia Graves
reviews.text: Rick was great! He looked at everything that I asked for and either took care of it, or told me the next steps that needed to be done. My mother had used the original company, Brittain Plumbing, for years. I've been using them for about 10 years. They've always done a good job for me!

reviews.author: Kim Stout
reviews.text: Quick response time and excellent customer service from the two young men that provided same day Service.  We trust you guys and have been thankful for your service over the years.

reviews.author: Robert Weston
reviews.text: Zack came out and found the problem the last tenants left for us to deal with.  Great service and I highly recommend this company. Service is great, customer service ladies are awesome and quick to respond. Can’t say enough about these folks.

plumbers.name: 911 Rooter And Plumbing
plumbers.address: 10650 Irma Dr UNIT 1, Northglenn, CO 80233, USA

reviews.author: Jerry Batt
reviews.text:
I ihink this business is disreputable. The estimate I received for a simple PVC drain repair was over $1800!!
I had already assembled the parts needed. It was a 15 minute job on a non-pressurized drain line. The repairman went on and on about all the bad things that "could" happen and came up with this outrageous number. I Sent him alway. The next plumber did the job for $100.

reviews.author: Matt Nape
reviews.text:
Excellent tech that came to house but I am extremely disappointed in the pricing structure and poor communication. While they communicate and charge a $150 emergency fee to you, they seem to only have a single after hours technician so be prepared to wait hours. I'll commend Angela from customer service for making an extra call to try to help me shut off the water. Where they've failed for me is in their $318 "leak finding" fee. They charge this if they have to cut into your drywall. This needs to be communicated during initial set up of appointment so that a customer can take the hours they are waiting and make their own decision; I very easily and safely could have made the same opening. Once a technician is standing in your home at 10:30 pm you're no longer in a position to have other options.

You are also charged the $150 just to reserve the appointment so you won't be able to find a faster service once you reserve a technician (I had an unknown ETA initially during an active water leak because they only had the one tech)

Overall I just felt undeserved and way overcharged. I waited over 2 hours for a technician to be in my house for 45 min and a total of $468 to tell me the AC  had condensation building up. So while I do appreciate them "identifying the problem" I can't say I'll be using or recommending their services.

I've dropped this to a 1 star as all I've gotten is the generic "please call us".

reviews.author: Equitable Denver
reviews.text: If you want your plumbing issue done right the first time, go to 911 Rooter and Plumbing! Nelson and his guys will get you taken care of, with a customer service level you have never seen!!  I have used them regularly for over twelve years now, and recommend them for any of your plumbing needs!  And they also did a fabulous job on a bathroom remodel for me three years back as well!  So they are multi-talented and know their stuff!

reviews.author: Jaime Aubry
reviews.text:
Discovered our mainline had backed up around 8pm. Called around to multiple companies, 911 Rooter & Plumbing was the only one that answered their phones. We were told they could have a tech out between 10pm - midnight and from experience with other companies, we figured it may end up being even later so we asked to schedule for the next morning. They were able to schedule us for 10am the next morning, saving us the after hours fee. A representative followed up with text messages to confirm the appointment, a reminder of the scheduled time, and to let us know when the tech was on their way. The tech, Paul, was on time, courteous, and very professional.
Our mainline backed up again four days later, so we contacted the company. Since it was the same drain, they let us know the previous work was under warranty and promptly sent out another tech. The tech, Seth, arrived within 20 minutes and went right to work. He asked us questions and explained what could cause additional backups. We felt confident in both Paul and Seth's work and if we continue to have issues will use the company again to scope our line. Their professionalism, timeliness, and communication was much appreciated.

reviews.author: RANDY BURGE
reviews.text: I would recommend 911 Rooter and Plumbing for any issues you may have. They came out on a Saturday and took care of my plumbing problem. they were fast and showed up on time and got the job done. Patrick is a very good plumber and got all my kitchen plumbing replace and looked better than expected. Douglas was also very helpful and did a great job. If you need any plumbing done I would call 911 Rooter and Plumbing. I know I'll call them again if I have anymore issues.

plumbers.name: SteadyFlo Plumbing & Septic
plumbers.address: 1945 Southpointe Way Ste D, Murfreesboro, TN 37130, USA

reviews.author: Jake Perry
reviews.text: Autumn & Nick at Steady Flo have been a huge help for us. As landlords it's important to have reliable partners who treat our tenants with respect. Thank you for making the trips to Woodbury!

reviews.author: Brian McCombs
reviews.text: I had to call on a Sunday and they were able to come out the next day. They were even able to show up earlier than originally scheduled. Once here, both gentleman were professional, friendly,  and honest with everything they quoted. After evaluating our service needs, they came back with lower price than their original quote. Most companies would have kept their original quote and taken advantage of people, but they did not do that. It is so very appreciated that companies treat people like that. THANK YOU for putting your customers first!

reviews.author: Karl R
reviews.text: Fantastic service as usual for SteadyFlo.  They are our go to company for fixing our plumbing.  This is the third time they have repaired three different issues for us.  They arrive when they say they're going to be here.  Polite and hard working.  You get an estimate before the work begins.  Everything gets cleaned up and picked up before they leave.  HIGHLY recommend them!!  Chris did a fantastic job for us, fixed and back in business.

reviews.author: Zadarea Waldrop
reviews.text: Chayse did excellent work on our plumbing project. He responded quickly, arrived on time, and explained everything clearly before starting. The quality of his work was outstanding, and he made sure everything was working properly before he left. He was professional, respectful of our home, and his pricing was fair and honest. We will definitely call him again for any future plumbing needs and highly recommend him to anyone looking for reliable service.

reviews.author: Angie
reviews.text: They are great! Highly recommend. They came out to repair my water line that had frozen at the water meter and broke, and were outside in freezing cold  weather with snow in the ground having to dig down to it, not east job, but they did great work and got my homes water restored in no time. They are very polite, very professional,  and show up . I will be calling them from now on.

plumbers.name: Spot-On Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1631 Bayland St, Round Rock, TX 78664, USA

reviews.author: Patrick Pille
reviews.text: So today was another job well done from Spot-On Plumbing.  This time a new commode was installed. The guys were great and did a good job-clean lines and everything in working order.  My wife is very happy.  She loves how they put new shoe covers on each time they come into the house.  She was concerned we weren't going to be able to keep the appointment because of a snafu on our part, but they were able to move forward and now the new fixture really changes the space.  Great company, great people.

reviews.author: Ben Hobbs
reviews.text: I had an awesome experience with Spot-On. I called for a struggling toilet that was clearly backed up and not flushing efficiently. I was lucky that I got same-day service. Amy helped schedule over the phone and Matt was there an hour or two later. He explained what was going on, how he was going to approach it, and resolved the issue quickly with clear communication. He explained pricing along the way so there were no surprises as well. If you need anything done in this space, I'd 100% recommend Spot-On as a family-owned company that gets stuff done in a trustworthy and communicative way.

reviews.author: Grey Warrant
reviews.text: Scott, Eric, John, and Lorenzo were THE BEST! When the man who owns the company and has over 30 years of experience and is a Master plumber comes to your house you know you’re going to get the best! Exceptionally kind, professional, courteous. If you’re reading this review and you see that I paid over $1000 don’t be alarmed. The old toilet leaked at the wax seal and there were repairs to do to the sub flooring area. The upfront quote was exactly what I paid - no surprises, no drama. Yes Spot-on Plumbing is the only plumbers I’m putting in my contact list. Yes, I highly recommend them.  Hire them to do any work.you need.

reviews.author: Stanley Rogers
reviews.text: Had my kitchen sink fixed today. Finally! Matt and Geo were so nice and informative. I had other plumbing projects and they offered different options so that I was able to plan and get things done. For the past week or so, owner Scott has been most helpful by phone and text as well. We've never met before either. We ended up ordering a part and it was installed today. Great service, great company. Will use for future work.

reviews.author: Kjell Schwarz
reviews.text: I’ve been dealing with a low pressure symptom for some time. I was very happy to find out it wasn’t a leak. The house is between 10 and 15 years old. PRV went bad. To be honest, it’s been bad for a while. I called around 330 on a Friday. Matt showed up a little after 4. He was able to quickly diagnose the main issue. Got to work right then and had the job finished in just a few hours. I felt the price was fair. They even have decent financing options. Thank you for doing quality work.

plumbers.name: Quick Action Plumbers
plumbers.address: 676 Puckett Dr, Mableton, GA 30126, USA

reviews.author: Taj Mahal
reviews.text: Absolutely wish I did this 3 weeks ago. Quick Action Plumbers were my second opinion and they they assisted the situation gave me results compared to a previous plumber who did absolutely but lied on the customer.  My technician came told the cost which is not bad found a small leak in the process repaired it for a reasonable price  and got my home back to normal in mere minutes..Thank you so much I really appreciate the work done.

reviews.author: Harriet Rawls
reviews.text: We have used Quick Action Plumbers multiple times, and we have had a great experience each time. Today, we had a water heater replaced after finding a leak. Roger arrived early, he was professional, and the whole process was easy. We will continue to use Quick Action Plumbers when we need plumbing services.

reviews.author: Jan Huffman
reviews.text: Quickaction Plumbing exceeded our expectations! Roger Valente was our technician.  He came out promptly to give us an estimate and returned to swap out a toilet.  He was very knowledgeable with what needed to be done and was helpful in providing the information to make a decision on what to purchase.  The actual work was done professionally and they cleaned up behind themselves too! Could not be more pleased with our service and our technician.  Would not hesitate to recommend and will use them again for any plumbing services that may arise.  Thanks so much Quickaction Plumbing!

reviews.author: Brenda Mason
reviews.text:
I have had the best experiences with Quick Action Plumbing for a number of years. The most recent work done was by the technician Roger Valente. He arrived on time, listened attentively to my plumbing problem and fixed my issue in a timely manner. He gave me helpful information on how to determine some things from my water meter. I really appreciated this. Rest assured that I will call Quick Action Plumbing for all my future plumbing needs!
-Brenda Mason

reviews.author: Sarah Demamiel
reviews.text: I needed a toilet installed and Quick Action Plumbers did a great job, for a good price. They were able to come out next day, which is just the quick response time I needed. They left the work site clean and gave detailed photos of every step of the work completed. I recommend this company.

plumbers.name: Rocket City Plumbing & HVAC LLC
plumbers.address: 2604 Newby Rd SW, Huntsville, AL 35805, USA

reviews.author: stephen guy
reviews.text:
I have worked with a lot of different plumbing companies dealing with larger repairs for a 126 unit complex.  After 8 years of searching I finally found the dream team.  They schedule to fix it and get it done.

I have had scheduling issues but notice they still get 5 stars.

They aren't in a rush to just get every job they can, they make sure to get every job done right.  I prefer quality that takes time than a quickie that needs another repair later.

reviews.author: SH hardiman
reviews.text: RCP did a fantastic job, the entire experience was great. They did what they said, plus a little extra; All of their employees take a lot of pride in their work & I highly recommend for any size job. This recent experience was by far the largest in scope & I couldn’t be happier with the outcome.

reviews.author: Ray Toth
reviews.text: Dylan and the rest of the Rocket City Pluming team are fantastic! Every time I've needed them, they came out quickly, diagnosed the issue without fail, and conducted repairs for a very reasonable fee. Would not hesitate to use them again and definitely recommend them to anyone needing plumbing help.

reviews.author: Christy Bechtel
reviews.text: I'm very happy with the service from Rocket City Plumbing. I called in the afternoon because my water heater died and Dylan and his team responded quickly and had me up and running with a new tankless water heater that evening. I would definitely recommend!

reviews.author: David Beard
reviews.text:
1) Great communication regarding my appointment, including updates on the day of the appointment.
2) Fair prices for the services I needed with no unexpected or hidden costs.
3) Knowledgeable technician who explained problems and solutions without trying to "upsell" me to more costly options.

Very satisfied with the service and will definitely use again!

plumbers.name: Coblentz Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2995 State St NW, Uniontown, OH 44685, USA

reviews.author: Anna ivory
reviews.text: They did a wonderful job on our main water break. Was done very quickly and we are very satisfied with the work! Would recommend them to anyone!!!

reviews.author: Brandon Bilinovich
reviews.text: Great experience with Coblentz! Amazing team from the beginning-Randy, Matt, Alex and Zack. Very professional and did a superb job, while also being meticulous with the whole process of replacing my 28 year old electric water heater, with a tankless gas water heater. I would highly recommend them for any of your plumbing needs!

reviews.author: M B
reviews.text:
John was very professional, efficient, kind and well versed in explaining his expertise in his trade. I would recommend him to anyone.
Update: after scheduling more services Koblentz sent out more men the next week and they did their work. However, when I came home there was a leak. So I called them up and they came out the same day at night and said they would have to charge me $500 to fix the leak and that they would have to come back the next day. The leak was from the supply line to the dishwasher. I asked why did they do half the job? I can replace a supply line and for a $30 supply line that should have been part of the repair. I thought it was very poor service and unprofessional to complete half the job then expect me to finish it. I liked John but this experience makes me want to go elsewhere.
Response to their response: Unfortunately, I was never contacted by management even if they did they should have done it for free as Koblentz caused the the line to break and caused damage to my property. If it wasn't for the fact that I inspected their work, there could have been damage well over $500.

reviews.author: April Hetrick
reviews.text:
John Becker and the crew that did the work with him were phenomenal.
They replaced all the water and drain lines into entire house, with minimal wall damage.  He was kind, respectful, and very communicative. Thank you!

reviews.author: Paula Kliem
reviews.text:
They did amazing work on our plumbing and shower job. The work exceeded our expectations. They were easy to work
with and quick to respond.
They were courteous coming into our home and took very good care of our bathroom. Highly recommend the company and John. 10/10

plumbers.name: Anderson Plumbing Heat and Air
plumbers.address: 3510 N Rockwell Ave, Bethany, OK 73008, USA

reviews.author: Kim Killgore
reviews.text:
We have used Anderson Plumbing for a few years. We have been pleased with their service. The technicians are polite, prompt and efficient.  Andrew McClure and Maven Jim installed a new hot water heater. They cleaned their work area and answered all our questions.  Both were very knowledgeable about the product and made recommendations for us for our new heater to last.
Andrew McClure returned today and installed our new water softener alternative. As usual,  he was prompt and efficient.  Again, he answered all our questions and explained the warranty. Showed a podcast about the product for further explanation.
Ashley will answer your calls, or, if needed, promptly return a  call if you call after hours.
I would not hesitate to contact Anderson Plumbing for all your plumbing needs..

reviews.author: Melanie Rice
reviews.text: We used recently for heat and air plus hot water installation.  We decided to use their heat and air program because annual cost reasonable plus service is very thorough.  Technician very nice and left dog treats for our two dogs.    On hot water tank installation our tank was still under warranty so they do stand by their previous work and worked directly with manufacturer on the warranty replacement so saved us that headache.  Very pleased and happy to have hot water again.

reviews.author: Jan McIntyre
reviews.text: I use Anderson Plumbing Heat & Air and Flux Electric throughout & outside my house. They are dependable, responsive, experienced, knowledgeable, & have the kindest employees. Recently they faced many issues for me from heat & air, washer drainage, toilet parts replacement, plus other concerns. They resolved them quickly & diligently. The office & all their departments are easily accessible & want to help. I could go through a litany of employee names who become friendly faces you look forward to seeing.  They are reasonably priced & understand your frustrations when needing this kind of work done.

reviews.author: Linda Anders
reviews.text: Our family has used Anderson Plumbing for many years and have always appreciated their prompt, professional, friendly and knowledgeable team. A special Thank You to both Andrew McClure and Bobby Mastoris for maintaining this tradition of excellent service. Thank you.

reviews.author: Bailey Driggs
reviews.text: Miles was awesome! He installed my new tankless water heater and I was given a 10% discount for being a whole home member! Anderson is amazing and I highly recommend them!

plumbers.name: Lakewood Plumbing
plumbers.address: 9800 W 44th Ave, Wheat Ridge, CO 80033, USA

reviews.author: Kyle Winters
reviews.text: Joe is simply just great. He's super responsive and answered all my questions and took care of our valve repair a lot faster than I anticipated.  I would 10/10 have him back for any future needs that surface in our home. Thanks Joe!

reviews.author: D Brayshaw
reviews.text: John helped us get a clog out of our kitchen sink today. He was super friendly and honest. We appreciate the help! I would recommend Lakewood Plumbers and use them again.

reviews.author: Cleveland Payne
reviews.text: I am on the HOA Board for Mountain Vista Estates Condo Assoc. Lakewood Plumbing has provided service on numerous occasions to our community to diagnose and resolve water leaks and conduct major repairs. Most recently, we contacted their dispatcher, Kim, for an emergency which had the water to one of our buildings shut down.  Kim was very responsive and had Tim and Doug dispatched to our property within 30 or 40 minutes. I observed the expert knowledge of Tim and Doug and their ability to perform the repair needed in a very timely manner. We were so very thankful for the timely response and expertise of Lakewood Plumbing.  I recommend them most highly.

reviews.author: Alain Lizarraga
reviews.text: Sean & Max worked efficiently and were communicative on what was going on. They ran into more things to replace and still didn’t go over the three hour estimate for a full water heater replacement. They were on time and friendly. Would highly recommend. Plus my dog was chill with them, always good to have good people work in your home.

reviews.author: Richard Price
reviews.text: We needed emergency repairs of the condo water riser. Kim from Lakewood Plumbing immediately dispatched the two best plumbers in the world, Tim and Doug. The responded within thirty minutes and had the building water back on in a few hours from the time of being dispatched. What a great team!  Thank you, Lakewood Plumbing!

plumbers.name: Excellent Plumbing
plumbers.address: 785 Oakwood Rd STE E101, Lake Zurich, IL 60047, USA

reviews.author: Aaron
reviews.text: Gino and Saul were great!  They fixed a leaky/dripping shower faucet with a quick response on a Saturday and explained everything in detail.  They were able to save the fixture and in turn saved me a lot of money.  Very professional and courteous.  I would highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Antonio Castillo
reviews.text: I highly recommend Excellent Plumbing for your plumbing needs. Saul was extremely professional in his work and understood our needs perfectly. All work was done to perfection. What really impressed was their way of communication with us leading up to the day of work. Five Stars…

reviews.author: Alina P.
reviews.text: Gino and Saul did an excellent job cleaning out the main line. Before they did the hydro jetting, we had concerns that the pipes were damaged, but after Gino and Saul cleaned them, they could see that they were not damaged. We highly recommend their business!

reviews.author: Robert Fitch
reviews.text: Woke up with no hot water and the water tank leaking. Called two places. The first was a machine left message. Gino picked up on the second ring gave me a rough estimate. He did say that any variable issues would be identified on site. His team showed up 1 hours later. They did a great job, cleaned up after, and since there were no issues with the replacement, the estimate was accurate.

reviews.author: Frank Barnard
reviews.text: Called for clogged floor drain in laundry room.  Response quick.  Results successful.  Around an hour to completion.  Price not transparent and seemingly high.  Senior discount not in invoice detail.  Appealing to 'customer service' resulted in the contractor calling me up and was explained away as implied in the final amount. Clumsy and unsatisfying.  Would have potentially turned more business over to them if their pricing had been more transparent.

plumbers.name: LaCassa Plumbing | Plumber, Drain Cleaning, Sewer Repair and Tankless Water Heater Installation Naperville, IL
plumbers.address: 50 S Main St Suit 200, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Susan Angus
reviews.text: Carmen and his entire staff were awesome. We had an emergency and they came out right away. We have never used LaCassa before and we are extremely happy with the work. Carmen was very detailed in explaining the work he was going to do. He was very patient with all of our questions. They finished the job in one day and cleaned up everything. Nicole was super helpful with the process with permits and a payment plan. I would recommend LaCassa 100%.

reviews.author: Tim K
reviews.text: Mike and Carmen did an amazing job! They were reasonably priced and very thorough. My basement drain was backing up from the sewer and they got everything cleared out of the main sewer line. They ran into some issues that they thought may cause problems in the future and they spent hours more than they needed to making sure everything was able to flow properly. 10 stars!

reviews.author: Jonathan La Berg
reviews.text: Mike and Carmen were both incredibly helpful in solving my issues with two toilets that needed repair. They walked me through my options after assessment and provided recommended solutions. Additionally, they completed the repairs quickly and effectively. I will definitely continue to use them going forward.

reviews.author: Carlie Martin
reviews.text: Carmen and Nick were very helpful in repairing our toilets. We had a leak in the toilets due to a faulty flap. They were detailed oriented and informative in their recommendations. They gave us recommendations on how to proceed and what next steps would be in terms of our faucet and water pressure issues. This was our second time using LaCassa (previously for a water disposal replacement) and we have been very happy with their service both times. I highly recommend LaCassa Plumbing to anyone in the area!

reviews.author: Lou Cassara
reviews.text:
Carmen always does a very complete, thorough, and professional job. We’ve worked together for years, and I wouldn’t use anyone else for my plumbing needs. You get what you
Pay for.

plumbers.name: St. Matthews Plumbing
plumbers.address: 201 Meridian Ave, Louisville, KY 40207, USA

reviews.author: Wyman Marshall
reviews.text: The tech’s from St Matthews plumbing were great! They pointed out some issues that had been done incorrectly with the former owners toilet install. While fixing it correctly, they accidentally damaged the toilet flange. They told me about it immediately, and repaired it better than it was before (with no extra cost). Businesses like this are hard to find these days… And I appreciate people who admit their mistakes and do the best they can to fix them. I would highly recommend St Matthews Plumbing to anyone.

reviews.author: Patrick Henshaw
reviews.text: Jacob was incredible! Courteous, timely, efficient and effective! The ability to also text them photos of the work I needed was a game changer for a quick and accurate estimate that I was already comfortable with before they arrived! Will definitely be using St. Matthews plumbing again and would recommend you do so as well!

reviews.author: Debra Hensley
reviews.text: These professionals are really good. They are prompt,  trustworthy,  hard working,  skilled, and extremely knowledgeable.  They figure out the problems and solve them without delay.  I will go to this company for my plumbing,  electrical,  and handyman services.  The owners have thoroughly vetted their employees.  I couldn't have asked for better service.  Thank you.

reviews.author: Jenny
reviews.text: St Mathew’s Plumbing is the bomb! They checked every box for a plumbing company.  They are courteous, efficient and reasonably price.  I cannot say enough to express my gratitude for the service they provided to unclog a drain after I accidentally poured a cleaning rag down the toilet of my son and his family’s home that they had just moved into.  Jacob and three other guys worked tirelessly and with great attitudes determined to unclog the pipe.  They were successful thankfully!!  Reasonably priced on top of great service.  What more. Everything a customer could want!  They also confirm appointments with texts, emails and phone calls.

reviews.author: catherine astorino
reviews.text: We liked their personnel and communication. We appreciate the Veterans  discount. However, we felt that the initial recommendation of a new toilet should have been the last resort in the problem solving process. When discussed, they agreed to auger the line and that is working right now. That may change over time. However, we appreciated doing the least expensive first.

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of South Nashville
plumbers.address: 4235 Hillsboro Pike, Nashville, TN 37215, USA

reviews.author: Mirko Pintar
reviews.text: You never like to wake up and see a water leak on your ceiling right before the weekend. Thankfully, Mr. Rutter’s efficient and professional company showed up first thing Monday morning and fixed everything quickly and cleanly. I’m very satisfied with their friendly, professional service and the great value for the job done. Highly recommended for any future needs!

reviews.author: Shannon Garner
reviews.text: Mr. Rooter was very compassionate, and quick! I called they had someone out that same day. Not only that I didn’t think they would be able to repair my issue until the following week but they sent someone the very next day. My technician was Robert super cool, super informative, super professional. Would definitely recommend to anyone needing any type of plumbing services. Thank you Robert for all you did, you definitely went above and beyond.

reviews.author: Blainr Ray
reviews.text: I had a great experience with this plumbing company. They responded quickly, arrived on time, and fixed my leaking pipe the same day. The technician was friendly, knowledgeable, and left everything clean when the job was done. Pricing was fair and upfront with no surprises. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Caden
reviews.text: Amazing experience from start to finish. Scheduling was easy, they showed up on time, and the work was done quickly and professionally. The plumber was respectful of my home and cleaned up everything afterward. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Mckane Clemmons
reviews.text: Excellent service! The plumber showed up on time, fixed the issue quickly, and explained everything clearly. Very professional and reasonably priced. I would definitely use this company again!

plumbers.name: Daniel Brown Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2810 S English Station Rd, Louisville, KY 40299, USA

reviews.author: Kelli Braun
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with this plumbing company. Josh and their team responded very quickly, and their communication was outstanding from the start. They were helpful right away and even offered support and possible solutions before coming out, which I really appreciated.

Bryan was who came out, and he was excellent ! Very professional, respectful, and clearly knowledgeable. He took the time to explain everything and made sure I understood what was going on, which made the whole process much less stressful.

I’m very thankful for the help and would absolutely recommend Bryan and this company to anyone needing plumbing work.

reviews.author: Thomas B
reviews.text: I am so glad to have found Daniel Brown Plumbing.  Kurtis showed up on time and did a great job installing a new toilet and removing my garbage disposal.  He did great work and left my house spotless.  They are priced well and it’s easy to see why they have the 5 star reviews they do.  I came across them on next door and saved them for the time when I needed a plumber.  Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Omega Toliver
reviews.text: Very professional! Great prices. Educated homeowner on exact problem. Showed up on time! Really nice guys came out today! I needed last minute service and they showed up!  Thank you so much! Will definitely use this company again!

reviews.author: Michael Lamey
reviews.text:
We have been using Daniel's Plumbing for the last 25 years.

Are most recent call was to have a freestanding bathtub installed along with a vanity and top and toilet reset.

When I called the office I spoke with Josh who was very polite and very attentive to what our needs was and what we were asking, Josh I would like to say thank you to you .

The estimators that came out were very courteous, thoughtful and nice, as well as respectful of our property.

The plumbers that came out and did the work Ted and Charles we're not only knowledgeable and professional as well they were courteous and understanding of our needs in the house. We wanted the work done if possible before Thanksgiving and Ted and Charles made sure that happened.

The freestanding tub along with the vanity base and top and toilet look amazing they did a fantastic job, cleaned everything up when they were finished it looked so nice.

We would highly recommend Daniel's Plumbing to anyone needing plumbing services in the future, not only are they fare on their price their professionalism and knowledgeable staff and plumbers can take care of any of your needs.

We will certainly be using them in the future for any of our future needs.

To the owners of Daniel's Plumbing thank you for having such knowledgeable and caring employees who have the talent that they do. Ted and Charles went out of their way to make sure that my wife was happy with everything. To have employees like Ted and Charles the plumbers that came out with your company.

I can see why you all are five star across the board on all the review sites. Again thank you for the wonderful work that you all did.

reviews.author: Shawn Houchens
reviews.text: Brian was our plumber technician. He was efficient and knowledgable. He completed the job and cleaned up everything and explained the reasons and workings of all repairs. We highly recommend  Daniel Brown plumbing

plumbers.name: Deluxe Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 4240 Fritch Dr, Bethlehem, PA 18020, USA

reviews.author: jennifer papai
reviews.text: Had Tabish come out to snake our kitchen sink drain on a Sat. Excellent job, very professional. Even gave me a suggestion on a product to keep the pipes and septic tank clean and in working order. Will keep number on hand for any future work, Thank you Tabish!!!

reviews.author: ryne byron
reviews.text:
This company is scammy avoid at all costs. After paying $79 for them just to come out they gave me a quote with two estimates first estimate was ex-30 with purge and air vent for $900 dollars . The second was $1225 with a combo autofeed back vent prevention valve. No summary was provided I mean for a $80 expansion tank and $150 valve it seemed steep but I was sick of dumping water from overflow . They show up to tell me the $1225 estimate does not include the tank just the combo back flow and they need to get the parts . I told the Manager this is a mistake and laid out the pricing of the valve ($150) and his excuse was there is a markup. Not knowing what is actually wrong I went ahead with the $900 estimate to fix my issue. This included the removal of an older style rafter tank and then ProPress in the EX-60 expansion tank with a purge and vent per the estimate. Long story short they put it in , no purge and no air vent. I now have the same issue that I started with an overflowing backflow valve dumping water $900 later into a bucket. The gentlemen who did the work performed his job well, he was even left by his manager to remove the rafter tank alone. I went downstairs and helped him as it was a large 30
Gallon steel tank. I told him he did a good job as who ever originally came out to quote for $79 for 3 minutes did not care what my the problem was nor did he even make note of my boiler piping that would require significant piping changes for a purge and air vent to be added per the quote .Anyone working for this company with the ability to communicate with a customer EFFECTIVELY should open their own business. This company IS SCAMMY BEWARE. The reviews don’t match the service. Please don’t reply to make your business look like you care. After milking my money, you TRULY deserve this negative review. Area capable plumbers take advantage of this disastrous company and grab customers with honest service at pricing that should reflect the work . This was $500 job tops,  2 hours of labor at $200/hr with a 30 percent mark up on parts.

reviews.author: Carli Cadmus
reviews.text: Tyler and Winston arrived early to our appointment, which was a great way to start. They successfully installed a new mixing valve on the domestic coil of our oil boiler, all while being polite and explaining the problem and solution in simple terms so that I could understand. They also made additional recommendations to extend the service life of our boiler. We will continue to use Deluxe for our plumbing and HVAC needs going forward.

reviews.author: Alice Stinebaugh
reviews.text: Dylan and Miguel arrived on time and even accommodated  a last-minute change to our schedule.  The problem with our water heater was hard to describe to them, but they came with a plan and were very thorough in investigating possible causes.  They were friendly, communicative and knowledgeable.  They found the problem and offered multiple solutions, laying out the pros and cons of each one.  They then resolved the issue exactly as we requested for a reasonable cost.  The experience could not have been better.

reviews.author: casey heward
reviews.text: They did an awesome job. Fast and efficient. Would refer to anyone.

plumbers.name: Big Apple Plumbing LLC - Broomfield, CO
plumbers.address: 1022 Depot Hill Rd Unit 10, Broomfield, CO 80020, USA

reviews.author: Marco Sepulveda
reviews.text:
I was recommended Big Apple by my brother-in-law who is an architect and used them for his home. From the beginning with a phone call, Jason was very compassionate and cared that we had no hot water and wanted to make sure he get someone quick. I had an appointment scheduled for a few hours later.

Disraeli showed up and was very professional and respectful of the property and great with my two crazy dogs.

He pointed out the issues and recommended a new water heater. He understood our budget and wasn’t trying to oversell but find the right water heater.  He also installed a water pressure regulator as our house didn’t come with one.

He was very attentive to his job and paid attention to all the small details like water pressure and temperature for the hot water.

He also wheeled the old water heater away too which was a blessing because we were concerned how we were going to do that.

I highly recommend Big Apple Plumbing. They are reasonable in price, very professional, do great work and care for the customer!

reviews.author: Joe Ellis
reviews.text: Disraeli at Big Apple plumbing did an outstanding job finding and repairing a pinhole leak in a copper pipe above our living room ceiling. He worked quickly to repair the pipe then checked all the other water systems in our home to ensure everything was working.  Was reasonably priced.  We won't hesitate to to call Big Apple again!

reviews.author: Randy Perila
reviews.text: Jason was very knowledgeable and thorough, and did a terrific job in replacing my water heater. I am very satisfied with the service that I received from Big Apple Plumbing. Thanks Jason!

reviews.author: Carole Westphal
reviews.text: Jason was early for our appointment and diagnosed and fixed the problem quickly. I'm house sitting and cannot make the necessary decision for a new water heater, which he understood completely.  He fixed the old one to limp along until the homeowner returns. If I were the decision maker, I would have had him install a new water heater then and there - he is very knowledgeable and inspires confidence in his work.

reviews.author: Monica Ng
reviews.text: Fast response!  I just sent a request/inquiry on Friday night and Jason immediately responded within minutes!  They scheduled an appointment first thing Monday morning and arrived on the dot at 9 am!  Disraeli was extremely helpful, knowledgeable and patient as he explained about my sump pump issue.  I am a returning customer for years now.  They are my go-to whenever I have plumbing issues.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 3406 W Elm St, McHenry, IL 60050, USA

reviews.author: Lemiell Kareem
reviews.text: Excellent service! Well priced.  My husband and I just purchased a home in the area. We had some plumbing issues that arose literally after closing. J. Blanton Plumbing was able put me on the schedule quickly. They came out early the next morning.  John,  the technician, was able to completely solve all of our issues that same day! He is knowledgeable about the job, very professional, and communicated well.  He showed me areas concern, and told me what to do to make sure the problem we had would not be back, but if it does come back, we know who to call!

reviews.author: Jon Rappoport
reviews.text: Scott was fantastic. He walked us through every step with great information and perspective. His passion for the work and helping people is so apparent, matched only by his passion for dogs! Obi enjoyed meeting Scott as much as we did. Thank you!

reviews.author: Christopher Dingman
reviews.text:
We had an issue with our sump pump in a home we moved into less than a year ago, and we contacted J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain. Scheduling an appointment was easy, and the service charge was very reasonable—especially since it’s applied toward any work performed.
Robert Camargo came out the very next day (today) and just wrapped up his visit. He was extremely personable and genuinely a pleasure to talk with. Robert is honest, straightforward, and clearly very knowledgeable in his field. The way he explained the issue—with clear options for how to proceed and what each option would mean both now and in the future—made everything easy to understand.
His communication style, paired with his expertise, gave us a lot of confidence moving forward. We truly appreciated having someone like Robert take the time to walk us through everything so thoroughly.

reviews.author: jalen herring
reviews.text: Great service honest worker. Anthony The service technician rodded out our pipeline heading into the sewer. He was very efficient and honest about his work. I highly recommend you guys contact him specifically.

reviews.author: Lucy Pristovnik
reviews.text:
In the morning, Ronnie came to review the work we needed done. Ome of what we wanted ended up being more extensive in nature and was not needed or necessary. We agreed to just replace our toilet and faucet that we supplied. The other work required cutting into our wall which we did not want to do.
Then later in the afternoon the actual plumber came out to do the work. Brendon was very pleasant and I went over what I needed done. Took about 2 hours to complete the job and he removed the garbage so I didn’t have to put it out to the trash. He also put the sticker with the faucet model # inside my cabinet for future reference which was great.

plumbers.name: Plumbing Utah
plumbers.address: 8789 Highland Dr #260, Sandy, UT 84093, USA

reviews.author: Andrew McMahon
reviews.text:
Make this your first and only call.  I truly wish I had found Brandon and his team before bringing in other plumbers and even a foundation repair company.  It would’ve saved me so much time, money, and stress.

Brandon is hands-down the most knowledgeable expert in the leak detection and plumbing repair industry.  He identified the issue almost immediately, walked me through the plan to fix it, and had a crew on-site faster than I thought possible.  And the cleanup?  Incredible. I was honestly nervous about how my yard would look after replacing the main line, but they left it looking just as good, if not better than before they started.
