Brandon and his crew have absolutely earned my trust and my business for life.

reviews.author: Justine Farrell
reviews.text: Joey came out for a simple, fast, and quickly fixed an issue.  Was awesome to learn what the issue so quickly. Was able to get parts and fix in less the the time quoted. Super kind and got an amazing quote for future work. Joey was extremely professional with the work he did while maintaining an excellent job.

reviews.author: Tamera Eaton
reviews.text: Just had my pool leak fixed. Felipe and Daniel did a fantastic job on both the plumbing and the cement work. We got prompt, knowledgable and friendly service.

reviews.author: Shaynee Dugdale
reviews.text: I had a great experience with plumbing Utah! Brayden was professional, on time, and got the job done right the first time. He explained everything clearly and made sure everything was clean before he left. I’d definitely recommend him to anyone needing reliable plumbing work. Great service all around!!

reviews.author: Shay Liv
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of working with Brayden for some plumbing issues in my home, and I couldn’t be more impressed. From start to finish, he was professional, punctual, and highly knowledgeable. He explained everything clearly, provided an accurate estimate, and got the job done quickly without cutting any corners. The quality of his work is top-notch, and he even took the time to clean up after finishing. If you need a trustworthy and skilled plumber, I highly recommend Brayden—he’s the best in the business!

plumbers.name: Royal Services Plumbing, Heating, & Air
plumbers.address: 3351 E 120th Ave Apt 36102, Thornton, CO 80233, USA

reviews.author: Rob Fortney
reviews.text:
Let me save you the headache of searching for a plumbing company. Royal’s pricing was fair, the team was professional and timely, and scheduling service was a breeze. From start to finish, everything was handled smoothly and efficiently.

I had them replace a hot water tank, install a new main shutoff valve, and fix a dripping sink and a running toilet. The work was done cleanly and correctly, and they took the time to explain everything along the way.

It’s hard to find a plumbing company that’s responsive, reasonably priced, and easy to work with. Royal Services Plumbing checks all the boxes. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: D Wagner
reviews.text: Was pleasantly surprised at how professional and punctual Dylan was. Arrived on time during the appointment window and provided a reasonable estimate. The work was done quickly, quietly, and what seems to be high quality. Job was finished within the time estimated and looked extremely well installed. Work was finished the same day as quote, and Dylan appeared to have done the work of 2 employees. Would certainly recommend and will call for future services.

reviews.author: Andrew Johnson
reviews.text: With an 8 month old baby we want to bed one night and we’re alerted to a leak coming from our hot water heater.  Our house main shut off was corroded and not operational so we had to shut it off at the street…no water for the family.  Royal showed up early the next day and helped my family first get an isolation valve at the water heater so my wife and baby had water to use! An extremely thoughtful installer who diagnosed the problem with excellent communication and worked through several issues in my house for a fair price.  Jeff was amazing, curious and clean, got us a new water heater and main shut off installed same day so my family and I were back to regular operation in no time.  Will definitely call them next time I have any issues. Jeff was great and we couldn’t speak more highly of the service provided. Thanks Royal!

reviews.author: Mike Baldwin
reviews.text: We were very pleased with both Dylan and Steve. They were very professional and courteous. Both were very helpful to find and detect what needed to be done. They both cleaned up after the job and never even knew they were here. We would highly recommend them and their service. The Baldwin's

reviews.author: Aiden Stern
reviews.text: Steve is the most competent and hardworking tradesperson I have ever met, hands down. Spent hours to diagnose a water heater issue that wasn’t even related to the plumbing, but the ventilation around the water heater. When our water heater broke 6 months later (unrelated issue), he was back to fix it up same day, and also replaced a basement toilet that was broken. It ended up being 8 hours total of installation on a last minute notice and he was professional and personable the entire time. Extremely hard worker and extremely competent. Can’t say enough how awesome Steve is. Thanks Royal

plumbers.name: Cherry Blossom Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2219B N Columbus St #304, Arlington, VA 22207, USA

reviews.author: Alan Robertson
reviews.text: I highly recommend Cherry Blossom Plumbing.  I had a minor plumbing issue, and I called them in lieu of one of the larger firms.  What I got was personalized service; a highly trained and licensed technician; and customer service that was off the charts. Scheduling was a breeze – I talked to Courtney who was professional and eager to match their schedule to my needs. She even sent me a picture of the technician, Val, when they texted me he was on the way.  Val showed up on time and was super professional.  He made sure he understood what I needed and then presented me with several options on how to proceed.  We had a very informative discussion and then he presented me the estimate, and we came to an agreement on the work to be done.  He then the completed the repairs and the results were outstanding.  He’s a true professional.   From beginning to end Cherry Blossom Plumbing made this experience wonderful.  Call them the next time you need a plumber.

reviews.author: Cory Jurentkuff
reviews.text: I recently had an urgent plumbing issue in my bathroom that could have turned into a major problem. The plumber, Matt from Cherry Blossom Plumbing, responded quickly to my call and arrived promptly at my home. He was incredibly friendly and made sure to explain everything clearly, which really put me at ease. Throughout the process, Matt was responsive to all my questions and handled the job with great professionalism. I highly recommend Cherry Blossom Plumbing services for anyone in need of reliable, timely plumbing assistance!

reviews.author: Olivia Wilmarth
reviews.text: I had a great experience with this company and the tech, Matt! I called for a water heater issue and they came the same day to check it out. They matched the price for water heater replacement given to me by another company and added $100 off from the coupon I received in the mail, and they completed the replacement the next day. Matt was honest and professional. Very impressed with the service!

reviews.author: Janet Phillips
reviews.text: Johnny with Cherry Blossom Plumbing was fantastic.  He clearly explained the problem and my options for repair.  He took his time explaining the job and the finished work.  I appreciate them getting out to me so quickly for an emergency repair.  I would highly recommend recommend them to anyone needing plumbing work.

reviews.author: Kasia
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Val earlier this week. First and foremost, he showed up quickly after I first contacted the company. He was competent, professional, efficient, had all the necessary parts with him that needed replacement, and quickly fixed the issue.  He was also friendly, and explained the process step by step, answering all my questions.  10/10 recommend!

plumbers.name: The Plumber Guys
plumbers.address: 1205 Loflin Rd, Aberdeen, MD 21001, USA

reviews.author: Lois Dobart
reviews.text: Steven did a terrific job! He let us know when he was on the way. It was great to have a 1 hour time window instead of having to be home all afternoon. He installed the garbage disposal and we received a senior discount which was an added bonus. Everything is working great. I will definitely call the The Plumber Guys when we need help in the future. Great customer service!

reviews.author: Harry Snyder
reviews.text:
I have used the Plumber Guys in the past and had a very positive experience. So, when I had some leaks and my home warranty company could not provide a plumber they were my go to.

I set up an appointment online and Steve showed up on time and was very helpful in recommending solutions to my problems. He provided me an estimate and even helped with getting my home warranty company to cover the cost.

They were out the next day and completed all the work in short order with no mess and no fuss. Everything was smooth and easy. I cannot recommend them enough. They're awesome!

reviews.author: Paula
reviews.text: I had an exceptional experience with The Plumber Guys replacing my water heater. From start to finish, the service was professional, efficient, and stress-free. Steve, Ron and their colleague were outstanding—they were extremely knowledgeable, explained everything clearly, and took the time to ensure the job was done right. Their workmanship was top-notch, and they left the area clean and orderly. Steve even took the time to work on some other unresolved plumbing issues I was having. I highly recommend this company for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Jim Whaley
reviews.text: I contacted The Plumber Guys for a non emergency plumbing issue and was able to get an appointment for the next day with a time frame of expected arrival. On the scheduled day, they experienced a small issue that was causing them to run late. Both the technician, Ron, and the owner Steve, contacted me to explain the situation and update the time window. They still arrived within 30 minutes of the original window. Ron had come prepared with the necessary parts and completed the repair quickly.  He was both professional and friendly Steve was also professional and was very appreciative of our business. The cost was extremely reasonable. I would highly recommend The Plumber Guys for your plumbing needs.  Thank you Ron and Steve!

reviews.author: chad michael
reviews.text: Excellent service.  The Plumber Guys came the next day, figured out where the leak was coming from, replaced the pipe and everything looks even better than before they came.  Very kind, professional and reasonably priced.  I'll use them for my plumbing needs in the future.  Really pleased overall.  Highly recommend.

plumbers.name: Amy Home Services
plumbers.address: 39 N Western Ave, Carpentersville, IL 60110, USA

reviews.author: René Zamora
reviews.text: I have been using AMY Home Services for 18 years !!  I currently have (3) products a water heater,  air conditioner and furnace.  Good products reasonably priced and great service.  The air conditioner and furnace come with 10 year warranties.  I’m signed up with a service agreement that covers annual inspections to keep these products under warranty.  The crew always offers great tips on what home owners can do to minimize service calls.  I’m a happy customer.

reviews.author: stephanie papaioannou
reviews.text: We have been clients with Amy Home Services for more than 10 years and have used them for electrical, HVAC plumbing. Don't think there is anything in our house they have not touched!!! Techs always reliable and get the job done. Would not consider ising anyone else! Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Jacob Reisbich
reviews.text: Had the last thing you want during a cold wave with our boiler giving us no heat to the entire house and Justin was able to come out quickly and troubleshoot the issue. Ended up being a rather simple fix in form of a malfunctioning damper, but Justin was also able to temporarily provide heat to house while we waited for the part to arrive. When it did get here the replacement was about as quick as you could ask for and at a very reasonable price. Ended up having a circulating pump that was also on the way out and got that fixed as well. Given the age of my home and it being worked on by a good handful of contractors throughout the years Justin handled everything very professionally. My favorite part is he not only fixed our issues, but was thorough in explaining how he also detected the issues so these things can be better avoided in the future. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kevin Sanchez
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with Amy Home Services and Jake installing my new water softener. He showed up on time, was extremely professional, and clearly knew exactly what he was doing. He took the time to explain the system and walked me through everything I needed to know.

The installation was done quickly and cleanly, with great attention to detail. Jake even cleaned up the workspace afterward, which I really appreciated. Since the install, everything has been working perfectly—I can already notice the improvement in my water!

Highly recommend Jake for anyone needing any plumbing services. He made the whole process stress-free and seamless. Great service all around!

reviews.author: Dave Snyder
reviews.text: This is not as easy as it may sound. Trevor and Jason removed the entire furnace system and replaced it in a day. Not only the outside condenser unit but the inside furnace and blower system. Trevor had noted that the size of the trunk was smaller than recommended and completely modified the system to enable a greater airflow. There were many changes to the system requirements based on updated HVAC code, which Trevor explained. In general, the overall reworking of the system was done smoothly and with hardly any change to our home system, except of course, the whole furnace and outdoor unit. Amy has done many upgrades to our home and my Wife and I are very pleased with the work that was done in the past as well as this particular upgrade.

plumbers.name: Ken's Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2506 Poinsett Hwy, Greenville, SC 29609, USA

reviews.author: Valorie Ruck
reviews.text: Keith is a very knowledgeable and friendly plumber who installed my hot water dispenser easily. He was even a little early for my appointment!  He took time to educate me on some other plumbing issues I may need to take care of in the future. I would definitely recommend Ken’s Plumbing.

reviews.author: Mikalah Smith
reviews.text: Awesome, prompt service from Ken's Plumbing. They were able to get to us very quickly when our septic pump started giving us problems. Clearly very honest, hard working people. We had Bill come out and he was great! I will recommend them to anyone I know who has plumbing issues!

reviews.author: Lynn Smith
reviews.text: We have used Ken's Plumbing for a couple of things now, and have been well pleased.  We had sewer issues several years ago and they were very fast and helpful.  We have now called them back for a gas line to the generator before bad weather hits. They came out and estimated and were back for the work in a couple of days, well before the predicted storm. Also referred us to an electrician, Andrew Grant with Kingdom Electrical who was also awesome.  Thanks very much to Keith, Jonathon,  Gina and Betty for all the assistance.  Awesome team!

reviews.author: Al Carden
reviews.text: Let me tell you, there is still a competent plumbing company in the Greenville area that you can trust.  I have used Ken’s Plumbing many times over the years and they never disappoint.  The latest was a drain under my kitchen sink that needed some rework.  Billy showed up and fixed it perfectly quick time in a hurry.  These guys are the best!

reviews.author: Fred Smid
reviews.text:
We had a water leak from our sink drain pipes and a severe rust problem with our disposal.
We contacted Ken’s Plumbing which we had used a few years ago and they were able to send James out within 45 minutes. Over the course of about 2-3 hours he fixed the (replaced the drain piping and installed a new disposal. We then remembered we had been meaning to see about a replacement for our old kitchen faucet which was definitely on its last legs. He gave us a quote on a new one and the price and quality were fine so we had him install that as well. We feel we will be worry free from now on. James was professional, courteous and VERY helpful. First class service at a fair price. Jean who answered the phone and helped us get help immediately couldn’t have done it e a better job either.

plumbers.name: King Rooter & Plumbing | Plumbers Denver, CO | Drain Cleaning | Sewer & Water Line | Tankless Water Heater Repair
plumbers.address: 100 Fillmore St #500, Denver, CO 80206, USA

reviews.author: Patrick Hansen
reviews.text:
I made a service call on a Sunday evening and they were able to schedule a visit the very next morning.

They were very friendly & helpful service over the phone and with discussing info about my plumbing problem and with the scheduling.

I was dealing with an internal basement sewer main clean-out issue with an older cast iron pipe.

Dan, the technician arrived at the expected time in the morning, was friendly, knowledgeable and very informative.

He listened to my issues and what I have been dealing with. He accessed the problem and provided 3 potential options with very reasonable pricing.

We discussed the options and chose the best route for my needs, and proceeded w the repair. He had to depart momentarily to retrieve some materials, but came back quickly to start the project.

Dan handled the repair within a couple hours after returning & starting. When he was done, he notified me and I went down to review the work, it was a solid clean repair which aligned to what we discussed & agreed upon. He also did a great job cleaning up the area - couldn’t even tell he was there or a repair was recently made.

I am very satisfied with Dan and this company.

Overall, they were very helpful, friendly, timely, reliable, knowledgeable, and offered reasonable pricing.

I will definitely work with them again for future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Jack Sims
reviews.text:
King Rooter teamed up with Anytime Plumbing from Santa Fe, New Mexico to do a re-line project at Kendall HOA, Purgatory Ski Resort, Durango, Colorado. It was an extensive project that  required re-lining the entire plumbing system in a 5 story building. It was over $2,000,000.00 in work that had to be completed in 4 months. Considering multiple hidden conditions, King Rooter and Anytime Plumbing did an excellent job.
Jack Sims
President Kendall HOA

reviews.author: Scott Forsythe
reviews.text: Professional, prepared, no quit until it’s done right. Courteous to our needs. Would recommend.  Repaired sewer line and Installed liner.

reviews.author: Erin Wills
reviews.text: King Rooter & Plumbing was amazing. I had an issue with a backed up French drain, causing standing water and water in my basement. Al came out to inspect the issue. He gave me 3 options for solutions, talked through each one, and made me feel confident in his expertise. Before booking, I called for clarification. Whoever I spoke with reassured me, answered my questions, and was very kind. The repair process was painless. I am very pleased!

reviews.author: Samuel Montano
reviews.text: DONT GIVE THEM YOUR BUSINESS. MAKE SURE THEY SHOW YOU HARD COPIES OF THE ESTIMATE BEFORE YOU AGREE TO ANYTHING.  For my mom’s residence. Water was coming up from the floor sewer. They came and talked my mom into 1500 dolors worth of work. My mom thought she was getting the pipe fixed so it wouldn’t leak anymore. They were called to fix a leak. Turns out they were there to snake the drain and replace pipe above ground that is not leaking. Therefore leaving the leak in the ground unattended. Then after saying that she needs to pay more for a coating. When she was under the impression that the leak repair was included in the estimate. They left and never gave my mom an estimate on what it would cost to fix the leak it’s been a week. This company is BS. STAY AWAY.

plumbers.name: Tom's Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 130 Tefft Ave, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Rudy Galfi
reviews.text: Tom’s Plumbing did an absolutely amazing job relocating my water heater, adding a hot water recirculating pipe and motor, and installing a Moen Flo water protection system. The quality of workmanship was excellent—efficient, clean, and clearly skilled. Best of all, the estimate was very reasonable for the scope of work performed. Highly recommend Tom’s Plumbing for anyone looking for quality and reliability!

reviews.author: Diana
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Tom’s Plumbing. Bob kept a clean, organized workspace throughout the entire job. During the inspection, Bob was patient and took the time to thoroughly explain each concern I had, making sure I fully understood the work that needed to be done. I’m very pleased with the quality of service and the work completed at my home, and I would not hesitate to recommend him.

reviews.author: Joe Bayer
reviews.text: Bob from Tom’s plumbing helped replace galvanized pipe coming from my main that was starting rust and drip. Bob went above and beyond on the job, was quick, and was very respectful. The estimate from Tom’s plumbing was by far the best out of the 5 plumbers I asked estimates for. I will definitely contact them again in the future when I need something done.

reviews.author: Patricia Davis
reviews.text:
I have used Tom's Plumbing for three different jobs. I live in an older townhome and thigs are starting to wear out.
They are professional, dependable, qualified and each job has been done
within a good time frame, attention to detail including to my home. I am more than pleased with their work, pricing and dependability. This time they replaced the Ejector Pump and the Hot Water Heater.
I can confidentially give this great review because several years I had work done by another company and it was a terrible experience.
Tom's is the BEST!!!!

reviews.author: Joseph Bajek
reviews.text: Tom's Plumbing sent out a professional to install my toilet within a few days. Bob was very professional and did a great job. Total time was about 2 hours. Would recommend service.

plumbers.name: Just Right Plumbing
plumbers.address: 231 E 400 S Unit 104B, Salt Lake City, UT 84111, USA

reviews.author: Tricia Bronson
reviews.text: I had a great experience with this heating service. Todd showed up with such good vibes - friendly, professional, and easy to talk to. He explained everything clearly so I understood what was going on. He also provided detailed photos of the work, which I really appreciated - it gave me confidence that everything was handled correctly. Excellent service from start to finish! I highly recommend.

reviews.author: Thomas Osimitz
reviews.text: Todd Petersen from Just Right came to our home recently to do annual service on our 3 gas furnaces. We appreciated that he called about 20 minutes before he arrived. When he showed up, he was polite and cheerful and very professional. While working on the furnaces in our basement, he was very patient with my questions and told me the kinds of measurements he was making and why they were important. He offered some suggestions for possible upgrades for us to consider, but never pressured us to make a decision. When he concluded with the 3 furnaces, he gave us a detailed written Tune-Up Inspection check list showing, among other things the various measurements and how they compared to what was desired. This is the first time that Todd has come to our house and he was just as professional and customer-oriented as the other people from Just Right that served us over the last three years since moving into our home. This speaks to the fine training program that Just Right must have and also to their ability to attract friendly and highly capable service professionals like Todd.

reviews.author: Maria Mumby
reviews.text: He was very nice and easy to talk to. He went through everything with us and made sure we were told all our options prior to the work starting. We appreciated this very much as new home owners trying to navigate our home, having it laid out so thoroughly was a huge help. The work he did looks great and we would love to have him come back in the future

reviews.author: Vladimir Tolstik
reviews.text:
DJ is great, knowledgeable and caring representative of company. Really thorough and dedicated. Presented my mom and I with choices, being considerate for what we can afford, and also will be happy in a years to come. I was absolutely impressed with how fast he got to our home. And even more impressed with immediate, next day service of full installation. Thank you Just Right for taking care of our needs as customers on maintenance program. And in time of worst case scenario, when furnace broke. To be at our house helping us to replace it with brand new, really affordable products.
P.S Thank you for lending us for free those portable heaters, so we would be warm through the night.

reviews.author: JAMES Guymon
reviews.text: Very satisfied with the service provided. Just Right HVAC was able to send out a service technician 2 hours after I contacted them. The technician was very professional and knowledgeable. He had my Heating System up and running which in 90 minutes. He also pointed out some issues with my 22 year old furnace. He performed a Carbon Monoxide test and reassured me the system is running safe and I had time to evaluate my next move for replacing the system. Thank you Just Right.

plumbers.name: Beyond Wow Plumbing & Drains
plumbers.address: 310 W Main St Ste. 104, Round Rock, TX 78664, USA

reviews.author: Moses Wasswa
reviews.text: They came and failed to unclog my toilet and charged me $275 for not fixing the issue… very horrible experience. It cost me $275 for them to just show up and leave without fixing the issue

reviews.author: Tina B
reviews.text: Had to call out Beyond and they got here the day after I called.  The fill valve on my toilet broke. (Not sure how but it did) Also had an issue with no water coming into the tank after flushing. They came out and replaced the fill valve. 2 days later, same issue. Called Beyond and they (Lisa) were able to hook me up for later on that afternoon and they got it fixed.  Good customer service with call backs and letting you know how long it would be and a shout out to Bobby for coming out and fixing the issue. Good guys!!

reviews.author: bob elder
reviews.text: I’m very impressed! We had a clogged kitchen sink and Zen showed up to help less than 2 hours from the time we called.  Then Jason arrived, and they fixed everything quickly and even showed video proof of the pipes before and after the service. Wow!   I called 3 plumbers before I found WOW on line, and the next time I need someone, you better believe they’ll be the first place I call.

reviews.author: Mark Hamzy
reviews.text: Claims to give exceptional service but refuses to give a ballpark estimate over the phone to replace a water heater.  They want to lock you in by charging you to visit your house to give an estimate.

reviews.author: Eiko Tsai
reviews.text: I have an old water heater and I’m not sure if it should be flushed or replaced. The technician Zen Gonzales came and shared his honest and professional opinions. He was patient and answered all my questions. He provided the estimate of replacing the water heater but he didn’t push me to make decisions which I highly appreciate. I would love to work with Zen in the future again.

plumbers.name: Modern Heating & Plumbing Co.
plumbers.address: 1949 Swanson Ct, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: David Galbo
reviews.text: Albert and Casey just finished installing the new Trane furnace and A/C unit that we purchased from Modern.  They both worked very hard to complete the job, were very professional, friendly and pleasant to work with.  They did a great job, cleaned up after themselves, and were considerate of our home and yard during the entire process. Great job guys and thank you Modern Heating & Plumbing!

reviews.author: Lois Hamann
reviews.text: Fast response to our needs, from the first call. Setting up schedule, having the technicians come out and assess the damages. They had to install a complete new boiler system, and hot water heater, (due to frozen pipes and flooded basement the old system was unable to be repaired.) It was a pleasure to do business with this entire group of employees and service staff. They made a difficult situation have a positive outcome.  Thankyou.

reviews.author: Ellen Lindal
reviews.text: Modern Heating came to my home within two hours of my initial call. Gela, the serviceman was terrific. He diagnosed the problem quickly. He provided a temporary fix while he went and got the needed replacement part. Part installed, he went on to provide maintenance for the furnace. Great service-I’ll be using them in the future.

reviews.author: Kathy Keating
reviews.text:
Herman is an outstanding technician. We had a service call because our air conditioner unit was blowing air but not cooling the house. After a thorough inspection of our 24-year-old unit he explained, in layman's terms, that it would take at least a $1,000, if not more, to repair it. He explained the life cycle of the unit and the continued expense it will take to maintain it. He gave us options to replace the unit and explained the differences in brands and gave his personal experience with these units.
We decided to buy a new A/C with Modern Heating and Plumbing. Herman returned to our house with a portable air conditioner to use while we wait for installation, which will be during the holiday weekend.
We cannot say enough wonderful and thoughtful things about Herman. He is truly an asset to this company.

reviews.author: Chris Lynch
reviews.text: Great experience from start to finish. I had an issue with the ignitor on my tankless water heater. Contacted Monday morning and received a fast response. Technician was scheduled to be my house between 12-4. Tech got to the house at 1220. The tech identified the problem in less than 15 min, and had it fixed in another 15 min. Fantastic service, would work with again.

plumbers.name: Nearby Plumbing
plumbers.address: 8204 Wilson St, Midvale, UT 84047, USA

reviews.author: Nichole L.S.
reviews.text: Outstanding customer service! Kris and Joe were absolutely phenomenal. They truly went above and beyond for our family, and it’s so rare to feel genuinely cared for these days. After doing a lot of research, we found their pricing to be extremely fair and affordable. We are so grateful we found them—they truly feel like family. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Steve Phillips
reviews.text: Nearby Plumbing provided excellent service when fixing my water heater. Khris, and the rest of the team who helped me out were professional, knowledgeable, and got the job done quickly. They also helped me navigate the manufacturer's warranty, making the entire replacement process smooth and stress-free. I highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Ronak Chauhan
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience with Joey from Nearby Plumbing. My water heater failed right before Christmas, and I was worried about being without hot water for the holidays. Joey prioritized my job and managed to install a brand-new tankless water heater in a single day. Not only was he incredibly fast and professional, but he also gave me a very fair and competitive rate. It’s rare to find such reliable service during the busy holiday season. Highly recommend Joey for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Cristian Torres
reviews.text: Kris and Joe did a great job with the installation! Happy with the new water heater, way overdo! Highly suggest to enter their water heater giveaway. Will be reaching out to Nearby plumbing for any other plumbing issues I run into. Thanks again for your service!

reviews.author: Bryce Webb
reviews.text: Kris, from nearby plumbing, was extremely professional. He was the one that came out for my estimate, and was very thorough and easy to discuss things with. When he came back out for the service, he did an excellent job and I was very happy with his work.

plumbers.name: Fairway Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 1320 Arrow Point Dr Surambirite 501 #TW137, Cedar Park, TX 78613, USA

reviews.author: Dale
reviews.text: My water heater was not functioning properly so I called Fairway. I have some past experience with water heaters so I had a pretty good idea that it was going to need to be replaced. They sent Tyler and Wyatt out to take care of my problem. They confirmed  my suspicions and told me exactly what they were going to do and exactly what it was going to cost. The guys were knowledgeable, professional, and efficient! They left the place exactly as they found it leaving no mess behind! Their price was $400 below my other quote as well. The company is honest and upfront about everything. I would highly recommend them to anyone who needs plumbing work!

reviews.author: Penny Hagen
reviews.text: They didn't get to my house until almost 4 p.m.  Needed additional materials they had to go and purchase.  Didn't get back until 5 p.m.  Then they proceeded to tell me that the pressure valve at the meter was running too high and would have to be replaced at the my cost of $1,175.00.  If I didn't allow them to replace it, no work would be guaranteed.  Being a widow, I had no idea if this was the truth so I had no choice but to pay the additional costs.  What started out as a quote of $2.650 ended up at nearly $4,000.00.  They still haven't finished installing some pipe that they have to come back for but since it was almost 11 p.m. I told them they would have to come back another day.

reviews.author: Ali & Franco Lorenzi
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Highly recommend Fairway Plumbing. We were referred by David Massad, and the service was exceptional. Wilma Huggins runs a great company, and her employee Tyler truly went above and beyond.

What started as one issue turned into three broken pipes causing a major leak. Tyler worked from 4 PM until 7 PM, even bringing out a large star light to finish the job after dark. He explained everything clearly to both my husband and me while literally elbow-deep in mud fixing the problem.

Professional, thorough, and honest—Fairway Plumbing is who we’ll call again.

reviews.author: John Deming
reviews.text: I’ve hired plumbers all over the word from New Zealand to Japan. Fairway guys are the best ever. Competent, efficient and responsive. Such a relief to know that a critical system we cannot live without is in their hands.

reviews.author: Michele McDermott
reviews.text: Cliff and Tyler replaced my old water heater with a tankless heater and installed a new gas line all in one day. Professional, efficient and exactly what I needed. Definitely recommend Fairway Plumbing.

plumbers.name: Doctor Drips Plumbing - Nashville
plumbers.address: 1101 Davidson St, Nashville, TN 37206, USA

reviews.author: Korry Rahn
reviews.text:
Excellent Service from Doctor Drips – Highly Recommend!

Doctor Drips (Jance) did an outstanding job replacing my hot water heater. From start to finish, he was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly courteous. He quickly provided a fair and clear quote, offered great recommendations, and showed up right on time. The installation was done efficiently and with great attention to detail. It’s refreshing to work with someone who takes pride in their work and truly cares about customer satisfaction.

I highly recommend Jance and Doctor Drips for any plumbing needs – you won’t be disappointed!

reviews.author: Amos Maley
reviews.text: When a 30 minute consultation and shower repair job turned into a 9.5 hour tankless water heater and gas line replacement job, Jance and his team kept us informed every step of the way and just kept working until the project was done.  I'll trust them to do all of our plumbing and related work from now on.  They were so easy to work with too!

reviews.author: Anna A Clinton
reviews.text:
We cannot say enough good things about everyone at Doctor Drips — especially Ronnie and Wyatt. Working on a historic home built in 1920 requires experience, patience, and problem-solving skills, and they brought all of that and more.

Ronnie was incredibly knowledgeable, punctual, and respectful of our home throughout our bathroom addition and bedroom renovation. The whole team took the challenging aspects of plumbing in an older house and navigated all of the quirks with confidence and care.

What really stood out, though, was how kind and thoughtful they were — always friendly to our family (and our dog!) and meticulous in their work. It’s rare to find tradespeople who combine technical expertise with such a great attitude. We felt completely confident having them in our home and would recommend Doctor Drips without hesitation.

reviews.author: Marty Yurjevich
reviews.text: Dr Drips (Jance and Robbie and Wyatt) did a great job fixing our toilet and Replumbing our entire house.  We had defective PEX by Nibco and they removed it with all new PEX-A.   They did an excellent job and worked to minute damage to our home.  They cleaned up very well and respected our home.  Jance and Robbie are outstanding plumbers.  Highly recommend if you have plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Valerie Cleaves
reviews.text:
Dr Drips provided excellent, efficient, and educational service! Robbie came prepared with shoe covers and took them off when he needed to go back and forth from inside to out.

Issue resolved in a transparent and non-complicated communication style.

I recommend Dr Drips to anyone needing efficient, thorough, and educational service! Refreshing!

plumbers.name: JCB Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 1099 Brown St STE 201, Wauconda, IL 60084, USA

reviews.author: Judy Billings
reviews.text: Roger Tinajero made sure everything was working well—and gave us next steps, if there is more trouble with the sewer backup, and for peace of mind.  Great work.  He is thorough and personable.

reviews.author: Michael Dahlgren
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with JCB Plumbing. Our water heater went out, and they handled the replacement quickly and professionally.

Roger did an awesome job! He was efficient, knowledgeable, and made sure everything was running perfectly before he left.

reviews.author: Jennifer Gallien
reviews.text: Outstanding service from JCB Plumbing! I was super nervous calling a plumber for a sudden leak coming from our guest bathroom and falling through our kitchen ceiling.  I called JCB plumbing because of the many positive reviews that I found on Facebook and Google.  What a great decision! This company answered right away and scheduled a call within two hours that same day. Our service technician, Jake, was extremely knowledgeable, honest, and professional. Jake explained everything in detail so that I understood what was broken and what needed to be fixed.  He was truly kind and honest.  I felt that he was there to help, rather than worrying about being taken advantage of with quotes of unnecessary work.  Thank you, Jake!! Fair pricing and high-quality work. Highly recommend to anyone needing a reliable plumber! Thank you, JCB Plumbing.  We will make sure to spread the word!!!

reviews.author: Abigail Cornish
reviews.text: I greatly appreciated JCB Plumbing’s same day service.  The plumber was professional, thorough and friendly.  He took his time to explain everything before and after.  The hot water heater was fixed quickly with no disruptions, and the service charge was reasonable. I recommend them for their expertise, friendliness and quick response time.

reviews.author: Samantha Turzynski
reviews.text:
JCB Plumbing really did a quality job and they are totally a reputable company!  I had a problem with my plumbing not draining and Kyle spent hours assessing the issue.  It was unfortunately an outdoor drainage issue!  The entire team was respectful of my home, my landscaping and me!  I never felt uncomfortable or like I was being gouged.  I added the replacement of the water heater while they were there for the sewer and everything was done at the same time, by different plumbers!  The entire crew worked to finish the jobs, a real testament to the team work!  No detail was too small for the crew members to help each other with, including the resolution!

Thank you to the entire team for doing a fantastic job and for being so respectful of my home!

plumbers.name: Greer Plumbing & Water Heater Repair
plumbers.address: 3017 Mountain Rd, Pasadena, MD 21122, USA

reviews.author: Eric Armer
reviews.text: Alex and his team maintained a professional work relationship regardless of the obstacles they encountered during the entire Job. Them members were respectful during the entire job. Alex made sure that we always knew exactly what the goals for the day was. The team represented Greer Water works at all times. They went out of their way to do everything they could to minimize the impact of the work at hand especially safety first. Their tenacity paid off. The job was completed in a masterful professional way. We appreciate you arranging for the rebar and concrete pour.   Thank you for a grate repair.

reviews.author: Jeana Osborne
reviews.text: Dominic & the team at Greer were great! We were working with another contractor to finish our basement on a strict timeline and Dominic completed the plumbing for the bathroom so efficiently. We were able to tell him exactly where we wanted things to go and he delivered. Once the contractors were finished drywall, he came back to set the toilet & sink. We love the final look and are happy with the services provided by Greer!

reviews.author: Ron Schreiber
reviews.text: This is a review for the second job Greer plumbing and waterworks has done for me. This was a complicated, challenging project for a residential home. My cast steel main line drain ran directly under the mudroom floor. Which happened to be concrete.. Matt and his crews were very professional. The camera guy came and they scoped and checked the pipe to make sure it needed replacing. They also traced the pipe so they knew exactly were the pipe was. It took a 4 person crew 2 days to replace the old cast pipe which was about 5’ underground. They cleaned up when they were done, the price was reasonable, and the follow up was great. We found out one of the old connections had started leaking a few days after the job was completed. Matt had a technician here the following morning to fix that. I would say that if you have a plumbing issue, no matter how big or how small it is. Give Greer plumbing a call for a quote. Because of how great they handled 2 plumbing issues for me, I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Dustin Richardson
reviews.text:
Greer Water Works — Always Here for You
Imagine putting in the work day after day, but the calls never stop — and that’s okay, because helping our community is what they’re about. Today’s goal: get this family’s heater back up and running with no leaks and peace of mind restored. At Greer Water Works, we’re there for your needs anytime, any day — even if it means getting up at 6:30 on a Saturday. That’s what dedication looks like.Justin & Brian where the most professional trades  I work with in a while make sure they had carpet covered with hard cardboard, roll out paper and plastic not a drip of water got on our carpet Had water within two hours could not be more happier about our experience at Greer waterworks thanks to Justin and Brian!!

reviews.author: cha scott
reviews.text:
Horrible service. Came out to repair a toilet clog, which was not repaired. When I called them back to come back to fix it, they scheduled an appointment. They cancelled on the day of after advising a text would be there. We waited for almost 5 hours with zero communication. Keep in mind they sent me a $375 bill which I would pay, if the issue was corrected. Someone named Sean who refused to give me his last name, pretty much told me if they come out again, they are going to charge me again. Yes, I will be notifying BBB because who says the work is not under warranty when the issue comes back 2 days later? I could go on but I just had surgery on my heart and it’s not worth risking  my health.

Yes I told SEAN this info but he was extremely RUDE.

plumbers.name: Vessels Plumbing & Services Inc
plumbers.address: 1002 Flat Rock Rd, Louisville, KY 40245, USA

reviews.author: John Ervin
reviews.text: Another excellent job by Vessels. Have been a repeat customer for years. Latest project was updating plumbing for a first floor bath and remodeling the shower in the process. Results speak for themselves!

reviews.author: Tony Tricase
reviews.text: Wonderful service! Great follow up with me and our tenant. They have earned my business in the future because if their honesty and willingness to explain and help fit us in their busy schedule. I’d ad an extra star if I could for Shelly who was ready to answer any questions I had along the way.

reviews.author: ADRIANNE WRIGHT
reviews.text: I had a gas leak with my furnace and was referred to Vessels by a coworker; and I must say, I’m genuinely thankful for that recommendation.  Nick and Jaylen were kind, knowledgeable and informative in letting me know of the process step by step, until their job was done…and that’s important for someone like me.  I would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Ethel Bragg
reviews.text:
I really appreciate Leaha and Justin for working with me . They are really customer service excellence! They worked with me practically held my hands during this trying time of having my entire plumbing system underneath my home . There no dig process is highly impressive and saved my home from being...basically chopped in half just to replace the old pipes...this digless  process is a true home owners life saver.
Thanks again and GOD BLESS both of you made me feel like a true friend helping me and not some cold sales lead out to get some money...Tom Drexel can take a page from your customer care book!!! 😀 I wish you all at Vessels Plumbing and very merry Christmas and a Happy New Year 😊

reviews.author: Christina Chesnut
reviews.text: Originally gave a 3 star but after speaking with Tanya in scheduling, I changed to 4. Ultimately, it was more of a communication breakdown than lack of a quality inspection. I appreciated that they were willing to talk it through and would use them again in the future. I did also appreciate that they were able to get me in the same day I called.

plumbers.name: Reliant Plumbing - Georgetown
plumbers.address: 1616 Williams Dr Suite 101, Georgetown, TX 78628, USA

reviews.author: Anita T
reviews.text:
AVOID THIS COMPANY!!!

I want to give 0 stars but it makes me give 1 minimum  I paid a very high fee for an emergency repair.  The quality of the work was good, but after taking my credit card #, they asked my husband for payment and he gave them a check.  Then they proceeded to also charge my credit card twice TRIPLE charging us.  They notified me of the error, and said they would reverse the credit card charges but did not.  After over a DOZEN phone calls that were not returned, I finally gave up and contacted my credit card company who was able to reverse the charges.  I have never had anything like this happen in my decades of home ownership and I cannot emphasize enough NOT TO DO BUSINESS WITH THIS COMPANY!!!!

reviews.author: Fredy Valdez
reviews.text: They overcharged me for services. They came to check for a gas leak in my house. I thought they would have some expensive intricate way to find my leak, but no, they just used a bike pump and a diaphragm gauge and didn't even find the leak. Barely 2 hours of "work" and they charged me once 750$ then an additional 160$ the next day. For what, I have no clue. I never even received a quote or an invoice, and when I was told someone would call me to discuss pricing, no one ever did. I have tried calling several times, but it always sends me to an AI operator. When I called with a different phone number, I was able to reach an actual person who simply said I would get a call back, which I never did. Please rethink doing business with this company, as they will essentially scam you for your money. I will personally ensure those around me AVOID this company.

reviews.author: William
reviews.text: We had an emergency plumbing issue with no hot water with relatives coming to visit right before Christmas. Reliant put us on the schedule for the same day and determined that our 20yr old water heater was heavily calcified and needed replacement. Roman arrived in the late afternoon and worked hard for a few hours to uninstall our old unit and install a new 50gallon unit, replacing all the old fixtures and piping. He was detailed and thorough in walking us through the installation steps and even took a quick look at a few minor leaks in our house to make sure we didn't have any quiet money-sucking water leaks. Our hot water is back just in time for our holiday visitors.

reviews.author: Amber Thorp
reviews.text: Alan and Patrick arrived within two hours of us calling for an emergency with our sewer line on a Sunday.  They were quick, professional, and transparent about pricing. Would highly recommend Riliant and their team!

reviews.author: Mark and Irina Brn
reviews.text:
I didn't know if this is common or if they just didn't want my business. Only good part was they sent the scary quotes before coming out and charging me after hours fees for something they knew no reasonable person would pay. But they sent quotes for anywhere from $1800 to $3000 that could have gone higher for a clogged pipe. luckily we cleared it ourselves finally.

They were making it out to be much worse then it was to upsell to crazy amounts

plumbers.name: Drain Kings Plumbing
plumbers.address: 7517 John T White Rd, Fort Worth, TX 76120, USA

reviews.author: M Ryan Grandy
reviews.text:
If you are looking for the best plumber in Fort Worth, look no further than Desmond and the team at Drain Kings. We were facing a scary natural gas leak that wouldn't pass city inspection right before a major cold front. After a disappointing experience with another plumber, Drain Kings came in and completely outshined the competition.

They replaced our entire natural gas lines and got everything up to code so Atmos could restore our heat just in time. Huge thanks to Desmond, John, and Marcus for their professionalism and hard work. They are personable, respectful, and walk you through every step. For a fair price and top-tier quality, call Drain Kings. You won’t regret it!

reviews.author: Ryan Maxham
reviews.text: Desmond and DrainKings were the best. I should have started with him and probably would have saved myself the headache and some money. They helped me with my city citations, my water leak and fixed a year long break. I moved on to a gas project and they helped me there as well. All around great company!!

reviews.author: WonderFul Woman
reviews.text: I called Drain Kings for a leak under the kitchen sink and Desmond had availability within a couple of hours. Johnathan arrived early and assessed the problem and offered his expertise. Not only did Johnathan walk me through the process of the repair, he answered my questions and offered his professional opinion about leak detection devices. After he finished,  he doubled checked his work even showing how to use a device he recommended. I know I made the right call to Drain Kings and I wouldn't hesitate to call them again for my future needs.

reviews.author: Joy Laurice Johnson
reviews.text: Desmond and his entire team are amazing! My issue was identified and resolved immediately. Their knowledge, expertise and customer service is unmatched. At the sight of water or plumbing issue he should be the first call.

reviews.author: Tony Cube
reviews.text: Drain King is the best!!! Punctual, professional and meticulous!  I have used several plumbing companies in the past, but Drain King out performs all of them. They have my loyalty, and will use them exclusively. I have an older home that sometimes develops blockages in the pipe underneath due to its age and other issues. Drain King always does an amazing job!

plumbers.name: A&W Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1420 E Algonquin Rd Box 385, Algonquin, IL 60102, USA

reviews.author: Tyler Sullivan
reviews.text: I highly recommend A&W Plumbing! Matt did a great job from start to finish! We were in need of a water softener and installation and Matt was able to come out on very short notice to help us determine the best solution for our home. With the limited space we had available, it was determined that our best option was to install the unit in the crawl space. He helped us choose a unit - making sure that it wouldn't be too tall while also fitting within our crawl space access point. Matt's attention to detail and craftsmanship was exactly what the job called for. I am extremely pleased with the results and look forward to working with him again for any and all of my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: J Schmidt
reviews.text:
Called Matt on Saturday, found my water heater was leaking pretty bad.  He swung bye on Sunday and confirmed the tank was compromised and that we'd need to wait until Monday to replace.

Gave me a call at 7:30 am first thing with a quote, price was amazing, well under quotes I got from other larger plumbing companies.  He showed up around 10:30am with the new water heater and  left shortly after 1pm.

Matt is a great guy, great service, and even corrected issues the previous plumber had done like over tight fittings.  Matt does an amazing job, this is my second time having him over, the previous effort was to repair my Ejector pump that failed.

A++ job, Five stars all the way.

reviews.author: Sean Patrick
reviews.text: A&W is FANTASTIC AND Matt is great reliable owner. Very friendly and professional and at a very reasonable price. Takes pride in his work as he is the owner. Always on time, and communication is fantastic. He has replaced my water heater, replaced whole house shut off valve, as well as other plumbing issues. A&W is the only plumber I call these days. Great business.

reviews.author: Marie Beusse
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Matt he was very quick to respond to my call. He arrived on time and immediately diagnosed my problem. The repair was done efficiently and at a very fair price. It is hard to find such an honest and dependable service these days. I will definitely call him again for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Brendan Gillespie
reviews.text: I needed to have some shower/tub fixtures replaced so Matt from A&W came out to work on it. The new set looks good and works good with no leaks. He also inspected some of the other plumbing features of the house and took care of a pipe on the water heater that was not positioned right. Overall I am satisfied with the work. Thank you!

plumbers.name: Coast Plumbing Solutions
plumbers.address: 198 W Hwy 246, Buellton, CA 93427, USA

reviews.author: Jayraj Laxman
reviews.text:
I recently had a Rinnai tankless water heater installed by Coast Plumbing Solutions, and the service was excellent from start to finish.

After requesting quotes from several local companies, Coast was the first to respond—not with an automated text, but with a personal phone call. The owner, Katie, was incredibly polite and took the time to answer all my questions thoroughly. She quickly scheduled a site inspection to accurately assess the job. Their technician, Wallace, arrived for the inspection and was both respectful and thorough. Shortly after, they provided a very reasonable quote that clearly outlined the scope of work.

On the day of installation, Wallace arrived promptly after calling ahead. He was professional and did an immaculate job with the installation and the removal of our old unit. Before leaving, he tested the system and ensured I understood all of its features.

For the past two months, my family and I have had consistent hot water ever since the installation. We will definitely be contacting Coast Plumbing Solutions for any future needs and highly recommend them to friends and neighbors in the area!

reviews.author: Sandy Lincoln
reviews.text: I recently used this plumbing service and couldn’t be happier.   Charlene at the front desk listened and was so very thoughtful.  Julio came to my rescue!!!  He communicated with me every step of the way. The repair was completed efficiently and everything was left clean and tidy.  I feel so lucky that I contacted them.  Highly recommend for any plumbing needs!  Thank you again, Julio!  You're the best!

reviews.author: Kristen Gowing
reviews.text: We had such a great experience with Coast Plumbing. David was our technician and he was awesome. Also very reasonably priced and it is hard to find places that don’t juice you for basic services. We were so happy with their service we plan on calling them again to come look at a few more things around the house. Thanks David!

reviews.author: P S
reviews.text: I had a few shower fixtures and valves in my home that were outdated and needed replacement with something more modern. Isaac, Julio, and David were able to quickly diagnose what would be necessary for the repair and provide a solution that integrated well with the existing architecture. Despite the rainy day, they were clean, polite, and courteous along the way. I'll be sure to use them again for my future plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Jessica Simonson
reviews.text: We work with Coast Plumbing Solutions all the time at DMH Properties, and they are truly top-notch. Their team is friendly, knowledgeable, responsive, and consistently does great work. Katie, Char, Riley, Isaac, and everyone else there have been awesome to work with. Communication is excellent, scheduling is smooth, and we always know we’re in good hands. We will absolutely continue using Coast Plumbing Solutions for all of our plumbing needs. Highly recommend!

plumbers.name: Champion Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1221 S Holly Ave, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Chyloe Koch
reviews.text: Had a clogged pressure reducing valve. I was fearful that my pipes were frozen or busted as that is what the City of OKC kept telling me for a week. Thomas with Champion Plumbing came to my home and instantly put my mind at ease, he was informative about every step and started with the most logical and cost effective solution. Luckily, it was the exact issue and he was able to get it fixed in no time! No runaround or trying to squeeze me for every dollar in my bank account, just pure genuineness and professionalism. I cannot recommend enough. While he was here, I asked if he could flush the tankless water heater as well; not a problem!!! Just the best plumbing company by far! Not to mention Melissa who answered the phone when I called to set the appt. She was able to get Thomas out quickly so we could get water and answers, great teamwork! THANK YOU!

reviews.author: Rizz Adamz
reviews.text:
RAUL VASQUEZ serviced my plumbing issue. Unclogged my drain, fished a camera, and performed a plumbing inspection in our new home. His customer service and knowledge of the trade was impeccable. I will request him for all service calls in the future. Also the lady who took my call was so sweet and professional. She said "we are a real company" lol  I was sold.
Thank you guys!

reviews.author: Robert Keeley
reviews.text: Brian is my new super hero. He managed to dead lift the heavy tank into position and saved the cabinets from being pulled out. The entire team is great. Champion (Ethan, also super nice) came out on a Sunday to start working on it and had it fixed Monday morning. Everyone was friendly and worked quickly to replace my hot water tank.  Very pleased with the reasonable cost too. Thanks Champion and thanks again Brian.

reviews.author: Jerry Sinard
reviews.text: Bought our home new 30 years ago. Unfortunately, got a leak. Chase came out, checked, advised leaking near the meter. Would send a crew out in 2 days to repair. Right on time Dominique and Brian arrived. The repair was made. I even bought their lunch. Brian is a dog guy, treated my Fred like good dog people do. Dominique gave him some attention as well. Probably our FORTH time over the years to use Champion. One more thing. Brittney that took care of my calls was wonderful as well as Melissa who transferred me.  Thanks Champion, our yard will not be a swimming pool for Christmas.

reviews.author: Ryan Kizer
reviews.text: Had a washer drain that was bad and Steve and Eric came out and Repaired it . They were easy to work with explained everything  from the cause to the Repair. Will not find better people to repairs plumbing issues

plumbers.name: Planet Plumbing & Drain
plumbers.address: 729 Walnut St suite d-4, Boulder, CO 80302, USA

reviews.author: David Hodges
reviews.text:
We had our counters and sink installed today and thought we wouldn't have time to have a plumber come and install our garbage disposal and faucet but the installers finished by 11 AM. I started calling plumbers to see if somone could quote us today. We had a plumbing quote in the early afternoon that I thought was too much and we were luck to get in touch with Planet Plumbing who quoted us half the previous quote at 5:00 PM. They were professional and did the quote in an informative way. We agreed and they started the work immediatly and finised with by 7:00 PM which was amazing they were willijng to go above and beyond on the evening before the 4th of July. Jessie and Ben were professional and did a great job installing our faucet and garbage disposal. We are grateful for their service and could not recommend them more.

Post Number 2. December 19, 2025. We had some molding installed 5 months ago. After getting some items for Christmas decorating out of the crawl space, I noticed that some of the items were wet. I looked up at the plumbing and found that water was coming down one of the pipes that seemed to increase when the upstairs shower was on. I called late at night and Planet Plumbing set up an appointment the next day. Chase and Collin came to the house, I told them that base on where the pipe went up, I thought it might be a nail from the molding. They looked around and said that it made sense but they wouldn't know until they opened the wall. They opended a small space in the dry wall above the pipe and sure enough a nail went through the molding to a pipe that was leaking. They cut and replaced the pierced pipe expediently and for a fair price and even found some other issues that they recommended we consider fixing. Thankful we have Planet Plumbing to call on them. We have used them 3 times this year and have been impressed with the professionalism and fair price each time.

reviews.author: Barry Jennings
reviews.text: I had the best experience with Planet plumbing.  They were open, honest, hardworking and had fair pricing after a thorough inspection was carried out to see what the problems we had were.  Saul was our tech and he is a spectacle of professionalism.  He was not satisfied unless he had it done the right way. He stayed late to make sure the job was done in a timely manner to allow for the use of the home while they tore up the concrete slab to fix the main drain in the older home.  The old cast iron pipes were extremely scaled up with buildup over the past 60 or 70 years.  They came quickly to evaluate and gave a fair quote didn’t change the price on us and scheduled right away to fix the problem.  I would use them again in a heartbeat.  If I have any plumbing problems in the future, I don’t even see a reason to call anyone else.  I will even ask for Saul by name when I call.

reviews.author: Brad Magill
reviews.text:
This is a reveiw for Michael Longwell who performed plumbing services for a rental porperty owned in Boulder, CO.

Our rental unit is located in a two-story condominium with an underground parking garage. In early January 2026 a leak was discerned in the garage. Numerous plumbers came to the property but were unable to figure out where the leak was coming from. The HOA of the property then called Planet Plumbing and Michael Longwell came out to inspect the problem. Within 30 minutes Michael figured out exactly where the leak was coming from and what unit in the property the leak emanating from. The leak was coming from the tub in the unit above our unit. Michael determined to locate the leak he would need to go into the bathroom wall of our unit, so we scheduled a time for Michael to go into our wall. Within 15 minutes Michael located the cause of the leak, which was an HOA pipe, and the leak was 100% fixed within an hour. All can say is Michael was a fantastic in every aspect of the work he performed as he was courteous professional and knowledgeable.  If we have a need for another plumber in the future, we will be reaching out to Planet Plumber and specifically requesting that  Michael be put on the job.

Thanks for the great work, Michael. You were a pleasure to work with.

Brad

reviews.author: Amy Zeiger
reviews.text: Our apartment supervisor recommended Planet Plumbing and we had an excellent experience. The tech, Ryan, was knowledgeable and thorough, our new faucet and garbage disposal work great. Highly satisfied.

reviews.author: Hanna R
reviews.text: I manage several properties, and Planet is always my first call for any plumbing repairs. Chase from Planet Plumbing has been outstanding—professional, responsive, and incredibly skilled. He recently resolved a long-standing plumbing issue at a property I had just taken over—an issue that had reportedly persisted for more than 10 years—and he managed to fix it within a week. I couldn’t recommend this company and (Chase) more highly.

plumbers.name: Golden Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2430 Bowman Ave, Louisville, KY 40217, USA

reviews.author: Michael Hommrich
reviews.text: Dean Titus was super.  He and his apprentice were very knowledgeable , friendly, and efficient.  The entire team, Janet, office manager and Jacob Allen were great to work with.  Great service and reasonable pricing.  Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Raven Meredith
reviews.text: Golden Plumbing was very helpful after another company chose not to help repair a leak in my old weird house. Quick repones and scheduling, and very helpful and professional service from Dean! Will definitely use them again for future needs and will recommend to anyone who asks!

reviews.author: Drip Collins
reviews.text: Jacob has been great!!! He worked with me and explained everything that needed to be done. It’s been so nice to work with a company that wants to be fair in pricing and doing a great job!!!! Thank you will use again if ever needed.

reviews.author: Brittanie Steele
reviews.text:
I am absolutely going to use Golden Plumbing for our next job. The technician Jacob Allen was so sweet and extremely helpful. He and his helper not only repaired the water leak outside our home but also came in and did a quick diagnosis of another issue we are having.

We look forward to having them back to get that resolved as well.
Our water line needed to be repaired immediately. We didn't have time to wait because having our water off put the rest of our pipes in danger of freezing due to the cold weather. Golden plumbing came right out. The price they gave us was extremely competitive and affordable. They were out the same day and when they left we had water and we were extremely happy with the job they did.

reviews.author: Amanda Gellhaus
reviews.text: Had a sink/dishwasher drain backing up; called Golden and spoke to a very nice lady (Janet, I believe) who got me set up with a same day appointment. The technician (Dean) was great; he explained his assessment and provided an estimate, and he got our drain fixed up quickly. I appreciated that he left the area very clean and explained everything/answered questions. Drain is working just fine now; would highly recommend!

plumbers.name: ASAP Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1258 N Rose Farm Rd Unit 1, Woodstock, IL 60098, USA

reviews.author: Kevin Crown
reviews.text: The technician showed up within the time window ASAP advised. He was courteous and ready to work. He stayed until the entire job was complete and knowledgeable, he answered all of our questions. We had a tankless water heater installed, a whole house sediment filtration system installed, shut off valve replaced, and reverse osmosis drinking water system installed.

reviews.author: Gitlin Law Firm
reviews.text: We have been very happy with ASAP Plumbing for all of our needs. We’ve used them for both general repairs and plumbing issues, and they have consistently delivered excellent service. They are always prompt, professional, and pleasant to deal with. We truly appreciate their reliability and highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Steven McCarty
reviews.text: Lucas was very professional and installed the water heater within a couple of hours. He went over the install details and how long it would take. When finished with the install, he explained maintenance and warranty. He cleaned up everything including disposal of the old unit. His work was very clean and demonstrated there were no gas leaks to set me at ease. I am very happy with the process and the price. I highly recommend ASAP Plumbing.

reviews.author: Nicole Leconte
reviews.text:
ASAP has been wonderful to work with! From Alex, who I initially  cumminicated with regarding my hot water heater, getting a quote, and scheduling a plumber, Olivia after hours, and finally Max who installed the water heater. They were very efficient and got everything handled in a very short turnaround time (next day).
In addition, Max is extremely knowledgeable, helpful, and professional. I am pleased with the removal and installation he performed and he patiently answered all of my questions. Overall, they ALL are very friendly and empathetic which truly helps when dealing with plumbing emergencies that always seem to happen at the worst times. I would not hesitate to use them again. I
strongly recommend their services!

reviews.author: Bethany Bellavia
reviews.text: Jon came out and gave me an estimate and explained everything to me. He was accessible and personable through the entire process. Keifer & Bryce are the plumbers that completed the work and they did phenomenal! We had a transitional hot water heater replaced with a tankless in addition to repiping and moving our water softener. They did it all and were at my house ALL day. They were professional, kind, and answered my questions. I highly recommend ASAP!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1600 S Preston St, Louisville, KY 40217, USA

reviews.author: Jimi Hance
reviews.text: I had a valve break on my main water supply line to my house at 1 am. It flooded my kitchen, part of my living room and dining room. I called around 3 am in need of a plumber and Chris called me back by 8 am. By 1130 am he was at my door and finished up before 1230. Chris was absolutely great! He was knowledgeable and knew exactly what was done wrong with the prior work on the pipe. He was easy to chat with and was very informative on what he was doing and why. I do think the price was a little steep for a smaller job, but I understand that this was done after hours and on a Sunday. I do not hold Chris accountable for the price. I do hope that Roto Rooter is taking good care of Chris! Good knowledgeable employees are hard to come by these days. I will recommend him to anyone in the future! Chris gets 5 stars for his work but RR gets 3 stars for the steep price. This job should of been no more than $300 or $350 AT MOST.

reviews.author: John Martin
reviews.text: Dalton was conscientious and provided a quote for the work required. He cleaned our line and found and removed the cause of the blockage. He ran a camera through the drain line to insure the line would remain clear and there were no other problems. The total was exactly as quoted. Very satisfied. Great service by Roto-Rooter. This was an after hours job. Very grateful that they were able to solve our problem quickly when we needed them.

reviews.author: Suzy Mohr
reviews.text:
We recently needed the help from Roto Rooter for a backed up drain in our basement. Kyle was our technician and I want to compliment him on cleaning everything up when he was finished. I wasn’t home most of the time while he was here and was afraid when I got home, I would have lots of cleaning to do. It was nice to come home and find he had already taken care of it.
We are happy to report that our drains are working the way they should.
Thanks

reviews.author: Hannah
reviews.text: Thanks Chris for being so thorough and efficient! I won't use anyone else besides Roto-Rooter from now on. From start to finish, it was an easy process and he arrived quick to resolve the issue. He explained what he was doing, and answered the questions I had. Overall, it was a quick and easy fix to a "crappy" situation.

reviews.author: Sony Steier
reviews.text: I recently used Rotor Rooter on a rental property of mine. We first tried two other plumbers who worked on this powder room toilet but they left and said it was better. However, The problem still existed and this toilet was Mount Vesuvius after those plumbers left! Somehow, they made it even worse. It was the Friday after Thanksgiving, and the only plumber who we could find was Rotor Rooter. They did not charge holiday hours and came within a few hours. It was roto Rooter who finally found the problem with our sewer line. They determined it was a pipe that tree roots had grown into, and gave us a price to fix it. I had this issue before on a different property, so I was familiar with the hefty cost. Their price was surprisingly  reasonable for this scope of work. When they got to the Area of Repair, they soon realize that the damage extended even further into the line toward the road. They at first quoted a price to fix, but I asked to talk to their supervisor James.  In discussions with him, he said, he believed Msd should be responsible for the rest of this line because it was poorly made and passed a section that typically is what Msd plumbs to.  James took the time to explain the problem more and how I could discuss this with Msd, which was a huge help. When they came out there, Roto Rooter met with Msd and helped convince them to fix the problem with the rest of the sewer pipe. I was extremely thankful at his help and diligence, which saved me over $5000 on this additional repair. I would always suggest asking lots of questions and understanding the problem, and with Rotor Rooter and James in particular, they were extremely courteous and helpful with the best communication I have had in a long time. I wish I had called Roto Rooter to come out and fix this problem before using any other plumber. Hats off to Rotor Rooter.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 133 Portage Trail Suite 102, Cuyahoga Falls, OH 44221, USA

reviews.author: Angie Best
reviews.text: My representative was Matt and he was wonderful!! He was quick and efficient and left everything clean and the way it was. He was a life saver! We had water backed up thru the whole house for a week straight. Thank you so much Matt!

reviews.author: Denis Carter
reviews.text: This company has outstanding technicians and equipment at a fair price.Our toilets were not flushing at all. The water was filling the bowl. Cory and Dante from Roto Rooter used a camera in our sewer line and discovered a blockage directly under a large pin oak in the middle of our front yard. They attempted jetting it with a super high psi jet head, but the blockage was due to large roots that had infiltrated the sewer pipe at the joints. Undaunted, they pulled that machine out and brought out a root cutter unit which did the job. They jetted it once more and it was perfect. These two technicians, Cory and Dante, were amazing. They knew exactly how to tackle a serious problem and were polite, hard working, and consummate professionals. I will use Roto-Rooter for all my plumbing needs from now on.

reviews.author: Lisa Rene' DeBenedictis
reviews.text: I called and left a message and they returned my call promptly.  I had water backing up in my basement and they sent Jesse to the rescue within an hour.  He was very responsive and respectful and explained every step of the process.  He cleaned everything up and fixed the issue with ease ( tree roots). I highly recommend this establishment.

reviews.author: Ryan Strauss
reviews.text:
I had a badly clogged kitchen sink and called this Roto-Rooter for help. Nick showed up on time, explained what was causing the blockage, and cleared it out quickly without any hassle. Super professional, reasonably priced, and made sure everything was running perfectly before leaving.
Highly recommend if you need someone reliable and skilled!

reviews.author: Valencia Walters
reviews.text: Roto Rooter provided an overall good experience. Quick scheduling appointments. The plumber James provided great customer service and quality work. I had a clogged toilet from a dislodged toy. James was knowledgeable about plumbing, provided details explaining the different options and process, and openly disclosed pricing. He work diligently and eventually was able to unclogged the toilet by removing the toilet and extracting the object. He was professional and worked efficiently. He cleaned up his work area when finished which was a plus.  I would recommend roto rooter and will definitely be using their services in the future.

plumbers.name: Miracle Man Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 3501 N Dale Dr, Prescott Valley, AZ 86314, USA

reviews.author: Jessup Goldbergcook
reviews.text:
The owner, Caleb, is an outstanding guy. I had called to ask a few questions about relighting a water heater that was giving me some trouble. He patiently walked me through the steps over the phone, and I was able to get the water heater lit with no problems at all. It’s rare to find someone so willing to take the time to help.
I would highly recommend Miracle Man Plumbing to anyone in the area who wants to hire a company they can truly rely on. Their professionalism, honesty, and genuine customer care really set them apart. 5 Stars!!!

reviews.author: Rusty Brown
reviews.text: I contacted Miracle man on 2/25/26 and was immediately put on the books for a free estimate the next day. Ron came out and he was efficient and personable from the get go. He did a wonderful job and was able to fix our problem at the time of the estimate. The price was very reasonable. I would recommend Ron and Miracle Man to my friends and family.

reviews.author: Rick Ulmer
reviews.text: Caleb, Michael and Neil are a fantastic team. I would refer them to anyone and without a doubt Miracle Man Plumbing would give the task 110% effort.  Caleb was given a difficult task of finding a leak in the main sewage drain, dug down six feet in a small front yard.  His team had a “Can Do” attitude the three days they worked.  Pulled out boulders and huge roots to clear the drain.  This problem affected all water related appliances in the house.  Prior to leaving, the team ensured all appliances were cleared and the huge mess was cleaned up. I also need to give Stephanie a member of admin staff a positive shout out.  She kept us informed and ensured we were billed accurately.  Outstanding job!   If you need a miracle accomplished call Miracle Man Plumbing.

reviews.author: Michael Harrington
reviews.text:
