We needed a gas plumber for our new gas stove.  We had an prior issue with the gas connection we had and needed it modified quickly due to kitchen renovations.  We called on a Saturday thinking we would leave a message, and were very surprised to have a very pleasant woman to answer the phone. She scheduled an appointment for us for the following Monday morning (Federal Holiday).

Ron arrived on time and was able to troubleshoot the problem and he gave us a reasonable estimate to repair it.  He went out, bought the necessary parts, and quickly solved our issue.  Ron was polite, professional, shows great pride in his work, and was excellent to work with.  The repair was done efficiently for a very reasonable price.  For any future plumbing needs (gas or water) we will DEFINITELY choose Miracle Man.  We highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Jake Eddy
reviews.text: Michael Mikey, Mike Caleb and Neil are superstars. I am overly impressed. I have some background in Plumbing and what they did how they did it how they priced it. I wouldn’t have it any other way top not true just 10 stars if I could.

plumbers.name: Don the Plumber LLC
plumbers.address: 901 W Harris Rd Suite 165, Arlington, TX 76001, USA

reviews.author: Bertha Galan
reviews.text: Great service and reasonable prices! Don the Plumber did an excellent job in fixing the root blockage in my main water line. He’s friendly, knowledgeable, and kept me informed about what needed to be done and how he was going to fix it. I highly recommend him and will definitely call him again when the need arises.

reviews.author: Green Godless
reviews.text: Don and his crew are excellent. Great communication from the start and through out the process. They diagnosed the issue and got right to work. The work was exceptional. He located a box that had been missing for years. They were fair priced. They cleaned up and left it in perfect shape. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Terri Marcantel
reviews.text: We HIGHLY recommend Don the Plumber!! In a desperate search at 10 p.m. on a recent weeknight (because I had just discovered our water heater was leaking all over the garage floor), my husband found Don’s website as well as three other plumbers and left messages for them all. Don was the only one who responded, contacting us promptly at 7 a.m. the next morning. He came out himself a few hours later, and replaced our water heater plus fixed some other related things. Got to work, no BS, no trying to upsell us. The cost was fair and actually much less than my husband expected. Just did the job and took his time to get it right. That’s his process and his promise. We also love that it’s a family-owned business. We will for sure call on him again for any future needs.

reviews.author: Shawn Gist
reviews.text: I Had a main line clog. I initially called a different plumber because it was on a Sunday and also over the holiday weekend and Don the Plumber was closed. The other plumber that I called prices were so high, I decided to wait until Monday to call Don the Plumber.  On Monday when I called Don the Plumber I spoke with Laura, who is extremely nice and very knowledgeable. She sent Rafael out and he was timely, fast and efficient. He answered all of my questions. Don the Plumber is reasonably priced and not charging an arm and a leg. I felt very comfortable using them. You can tell they are not trying to take advantage of you and not over charging you. I have used them in the past to fix my toilets and at that time Rafael fixed both toilets fast and efficiently.  These people know what they are doing from answering the phone to getting the job done. Thanks Don the Plumber!!!

reviews.author: Dani Heath
reviews.text: What a wonderful man! Not only was Don quick, honest and fair priced, he was also a lovely human being. I highly recommend and will always go to him. Absolutely delightful!

plumbers.name: Sosa Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 2200 S Church St Unit 7, Georgetown, TX 78626, USA

reviews.author: KingWingz32
reviews.text: The guy Stephen came to my house and took care of my trailer needs and also advised me how properly watch my pipes during cold weather. He was fast and gave a reasonable price. Thanks for the great service

reviews.author: IMRedeemed
reviews.text:
Great experience w/ Sosa Plumbing!  Called yesterday early morning and was immediately scheduled for that afternoon.  They had a tech call in sick and immediately called me and explained they had to push me out to today.  Very apologetic, courteous and professional.

I was told Steven was delayed today and would be on site later this afternoon, but he showed just after original time today.  Really pleasant young man!  I had asked if he wouldn't mind my watching, so I could learn.  He was more than accomodating.  He took the time to answer any question I had and explained what he was doing throughout the repair process.  We chatted about all sorts of things while he was on site.

Would highly recommend both Steven and Sosa Plumbing and will call them with any furture plumbing needs I might have.

reviews.author: Juli Butler
reviews.text: Excellent service from Jason at Sosa Plumbing. He showed up on time, was professional and courteous, and clearly knew what he was doing. He replaced a kitchen faucet and an outdoor spigot efficiently, explained the work, and didn’t waste time. Everything was done right the first time, no mess, no surprises. This is how a plumber should operate. I wouldn’t hesitate to use Jason again or recommend him to anyone needing plumbing work.

reviews.author: Demian Saffer
reviews.text: Jason was out to my house twice - for two separate issues with clogs in cast iron pipe under the slab (once on Friday and again for a different line on Monday...when it rains, it pours, I guess). On both occasions, he was efficient, communicative about what he was seeing with the camera and in explaining what he was doing, and professional. In both cases, augering the lines was not sufficient to release the clogs, and camera work and hydro-jetting was needed to clear them. I especially appreciate that there was no attempt to upsell services or use scare tactics on the customer - it actually seemed like he was "on my team" here, and wanted to sort out the issues as quickly as possible as opposed to hoping to pad the work and hours on the job. All in all, I am very happy with Sosa and Jason's work. They'll be my go-to from here on out.

reviews.author: TJ
reviews.text: Sosa services has been amazing since I moved into my new home in Feb 2023. They came out quickly, within days of my inquiry and installed my softener and filter. They even gave me instructions for how to operate it properly. When times have come up where I’ve had questions, they have responded promptly and thoroughly. They are quality and fairly priced.

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing, Water Heaters, & Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 7501 US-287 Suite B-1, Arlington, TX 76001, USA

reviews.author: Norman Chimunda
reviews.text:
A friend referred me to Benjamin Franklin Plumbing after some frustrating experience with some other company. The highlights of my experience was working with their technician called Athens.
He was very friendly, professional and you could tell that he knew his job.
What impressed me the most about him is his integrity. He did not try to upsell you but he recommended the most practical solution to your problem. Its a rare quality these days. I will recommend this company at any time if you have a plumbing issue

reviews.author: Kelli Quinn
reviews.text: I had a cook top installed and I smelled a faint smell of gas and called Atmos gas company (first mistake) they came out and said my cook top lines needed tightened but stated when they cut it off at the stove my gas was still going so they turned my gas off in my entire house stating that I had a leak without having me turn off my appliances including my heat. This was 12/23 right before Christmas and took my meter which meant I had to get a leak inspection from a licensed plumber and a city inspection which is very costly. I couldn’t get anyone to come out due to the holidays and the earliest I could get someone was 12/31 which was Swat plumbing (do not recommend) and they was trying to charge an ungodly amount and what they described needed to be done for a leak inspection was not what I googled and said it would take 4 to 6 hours(not true) but I prayed about it and called Benjamin Franklin plumbing the lady said she could get somebody out TODAY!! When I tell you ATHENS CLINKSCALE IS AN ANGEL I mean it, he not only fixed my issue he calls with me and spoke with Atmos (Gas company) and explained that the technician that came out did not diagnose the gas issue properly and that I should not be charged for a permit and convinced them to turn my gas back on that night within an hour I was up an running. In today’s society you don’t find honest companies like this or customer service. This was NEW YEARS EVE! and he did try to price gouge me or get over this company is definitely a HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!!! and Athen is definitely a great asset to any company!

reviews.author: Anika Payne
reviews.text: So I used Benjamin Franklin plumbing when I first moved into my house years ago and they were great. But today the customer service was unreal. Athens not only diagnosed the problem quickly, he also went through every possible option for getting the fix I needed. He walked me through everything step by step, gave wonderful insight, but didn't make me feel obligated to commit to anything right away like other plumbers/technicians I've worked with. He is clearly invested into doing what's best for the homeowner, but was also realistic about expectations and understanding of the realities people face when they suddenly have an unexpected large expense. 10/10 would work with Athens again.

reviews.author: Bill Benninghoff
reviews.text: Alie Joseph did a great job repairing our outdoor hose bib today. He was friendly and competent. We got a 2 year warranty on parts and labor and the price was reasonable. He came out the same day we called, which was great.

reviews.author: Stephen Rickels
reviews.text: The Benjamin Franklin team did a great job. Very clear communication and options for the solution to my hot water slab leak. Competitive pricing. Incredible customer service. Quick and efficient work. Even after the work was complete, I had a concern and was able to connect immediately with Nick (even on a Friday night!). A team member stopped by on the way to another job to confirm that the job was complete!

plumbers.name: Buddy’s Plumbing Excellence
plumbers.address: 1501 S Cleveland Massillon Rd, Akron, OH 44321, USA

reviews.author: Joshua Richardson
reviews.text: I had an outstanding experience with this plumber. They arrived on time, diagnosed the issue quickly, and explained everything clearly. The work was done efficiently, professionally, and with great attention to detail. You can tell they take pride in their craft—no shortcuts, no upselling, just honest, high‑quality service. My plumbing is working perfectly now, and the area was left spotless. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for reliable, top‑tier workmanship.

reviews.author: Neil Oates
reviews.text: I am very impressed with the job Buddy's did for us. John did our hot water tank and recirculation pump replacement and was prompt, thorough, tidy and just overall very professional. I needed a service call a couple of weeks later and Ryan came out and addressed the problem and everything is working perfectly now. Highly recommend Buddy's.

reviews.author: Rick Rissmiller
reviews.text: In today’s world where good customer service is very hard to come by and no longer the expectation Plumbing Excellence excels! From the moment I reached out to them communication was exceptional. I reached out on a Sunday night online and by 8:45am the next day Kevin was at my house.I knew I needed at least one of the two water heaters replaced. Kevin showed me and explained how both  had failed. He took a very short time to put together an estimate which I knew  was competitive based on my experience as an Engineer. He explained the steps they would take and after my approval began work. The work took most of the day and the quality was excellent. They gave suggestions for maintenance that would help extend the life of the water heaters. I highly recommend Plumbing excellence.

reviews.author: David Campanale
reviews.text:
Called for an emergency appointment once our main drain backed up in our basement laundry room again. Jen was able to schedule a tech the same day. Matthew (Matt) was prompt and timely after communicating his drive time.
I knew I needed the pipes jetted from past situations.

I have to give Matt a huge shout-out cause he worked his butt off on the main drain for nearly three hours. He made multiple jet and camera passes to clear the clogged line and our water flows freely now.

He was very knowledgeable and offered us great advice. He was respectful and cleaned up well.

Thanks Matt for a job well done!

reviews.author: Joy Nixon
reviews.text: Amazingly quick service for a failed sump pump. They came the next day. Kevin was very informative and very nice.  I’d recommend Plumbing Excellence for their superior, friendly service!

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 200 S Main St Suite 3, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Steve Johnson
reviews.text:
We opened up our finished basement to do some remodeling, and found the main gas line on the floor, badly corroded, as a result of continuous water intrusion. (You can see the corroded gas line in the first photo-basically a ticking time bomb!)

Shane from J Blanton came out, worked with us on the quote, and Edwin and Peter were scheduled within two days. It was a tricky route for the new pipe - tying into an offset T, moving the new pipe up higher (obviously), avoiding PVC drains, sump pump discharges, and electrical conduit.  They were friendly, efficient, and did great work - photos of the finished product below.

reviews.author: Laxman Jitarwal
reviews.text: Alex Cruz from J. Blanton Plumbing did an excellent job i specifically requested an early appointment and he arrived right on time around 8:30 AM, which I really appreciated he worked very hard for almost 4 to 5 hours straight and handled everything professionally. My water wasn’t running at all, and Alex stayed focused until he fully fixed the issue and got the water running again in my house he was knowledgeable, and clearly cared about doing the job right. You can tell he puts real effort into his work. I’m very satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend Alex Cruz and J. Blanton Plumbing to anyone

reviews.author: Joan Ralph
reviews.text:
If I could have given this company ZERO stars or negative stars that would have been my rating.  NEVER do business with this company!!!!!!!!!  They lie repeatedly about their service calls and are EXTREMELY expensive for what they do!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  I have NEVER dealt with a worse company in my life!!!!!!
I just needed a valve replacement under my sink for a new dishwasher to be installed.  I talked to J. Blanton Plumbing and scheduled the work to be done the following week on a Tuesday.  The dishwasher was being installed the next day.  On Tuesday, a plumber wearing a "pretty" J. Blanton sweatshirt shows up NOT to do the work but to upsell me on having more plumbing work done!!!!  I told him he just needs to get the valve replaced as I was promised and he responds that he just drives a shell of a truck and has no repair equipment!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  And that they would send a plumber out the next day which is when the dishwasher is coming!!!!!!!!!!!  After I pointed that out, I was promised a plumber at 8:00 a.m. Wednesday morning and got my delivery pushed back as much as they could on Wednesday.  The pretty sweatshirt knew that the work requirements were and I was promised the plumber would be here.  I even called 3x later on Tuesday to ensure they would stand behind their commitment.  Well, it's now Wednesday and no plumber showed at 8.  I called again at 8:50 and was told they would send someone over right away.  I called at 9:30 as no plumber yet and was told I was someone's next stop but they couldn't tell me when that would be!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  My dishwasher delivery window is 10 - 2!!!!!  And this worthless, lying company knew this.
BOTTOM LINE:  Do not do business with them as it will be greater headaches that your current plumbing issues.  There are many good, reliable plumbers out there - J. Blanton is NOT ONE OF THEM!!!!!!!

reviews.author: irish
reviews.text: Cameron our plumber was just Awesome!! He worked like a machine and was very organized in how he went about the repairs.(I’m a Union Carpenter so I can relate!)He also KNEW HIS STUFF! And he was very personable and polite! I’d use him again for sure!👍👍

reviews.author: Charlie Benson
reviews.text: Ronnie came to take a detailed look and give me estimates on preventative maintenance. He was polite and thorough, shared his observations, explained options, and answered questions. They have great service tech, and the whole process was quick and seamless.

plumbers.name: Warrior Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 4123 Roland Ave, Baltimore, MD 21211, USA

reviews.author: Vonda Johnson
reviews.text: The came out on the weekend for just a little more to fix my water but my pipes were frozen and they did everything they could to help me. Dave opened my wall so I could insulate my pipes. They followed up and turned my water back on and came right back out to fix a little drip.  The best service ever. Brent and his plumbers were responsive, fast, friendly, professional  and on time. Dave also cleaned up after he was done. 🥰 I would definitely recommend this company.

reviews.author: dawn garner
reviews.text:
Excellent customer service.
Gave me tips on how to handle things before I might need to use them. Also, gave an estimate over the phone without having to come into the house. I didn’t have work done this time, but they did excellent work in the past:

reviews.author: Gabrielle Alper
reviews.text: So happy to have found a quality and reliable plumber right in my neighborhood!! I had a few plumbers come by to check out an odd issue with the showers in the house we just moved into. Prior to Warrior coming to visit, other plumbers just looked at it without taking it apart, and then said it would need to be replaced in full. Which was not only costly, but time consuming.  When Dave from Warrior came by, he took the time to diagnose the issue properly and he was able to do the repair with the existing hardware. They were also SUPER affordable and Brent was upfront about the cost and process. We will definitely use Warrior again when we need plumbing work.

reviews.author: Nancy Sherman
reviews.text: We are grateful beyond words for the consistently excellent work and high level of commitment to their customers that the  talented, knowledgeable and, very importantly, totally trustworthy team at Warrior Plumbing brings to each and every job. Most recently, just days before the snow and ice storm (Fern) would cover Baltimore, I was told by another plumbing company, after two expensive part replacements and days of no heat in the house in mid December, that they were going to "red tag" our boiler (more days of ho heat in the house just before the January storm), and that they would leave a contract for us to sign for the purchase and installation of a new boiler. If we wanted to move forward, a signature and partial payment would be expected - all on a job where little inspection of the existing unit happened and no reason for the red-tagging existed. I knew that I had to, at the least, get a second and maybe third estimate on the cost of a new boiler. I called Warrior initially for just this estimate. After speaking with Brent and letting him know what had transpired with the first plumbing company, he offered to have someone come out the next morning and take a look at what might be going on. Dave and a colleague arrived at my house - did a simple, but essential inspection of the unit - correctly observed the new pricey parts the other plumber had installed in December - and, saw one part that was in good shape but had two bolts missing that would keep it standing upright. A schematic of the inside of my boiler - pulled from Dave's back pocket - and, some very smart observational skills and knowledge of my boiler - allowed Dave to have the boiler up and running again with the installation of two bolts, which he had on hand in his truck. Our heat has worked better in the past two weeks than on any day in my recent memory. And, I was able to tear up an estimate from the former plumber for $11,400. Whether Dave is a super-smart professional or an angel dropped down from heaven, I don't know. I am inclined to believe he is both. I am deeply grateful every day for the professionals and people that I have met and have had the pleasure of working with at Warrior. Their work is more than solid; and, as individuals, they, too, are more than solid - really good people - genuinely proud of what they do - proud, especially, to do an honest day's work, and very proud when they can help you resolve your problems. Some companies say that you will be safer with them; but, Warrior really cares - about their work, about you, and about keeping the good reputation for excellence and honesty they have earned from grateful customers in Baltimore. Thank you so much, Brent and Dave! I've got you on "speed dial" - lol - the rest of Baltimore should, too!

reviews.author: Timothy Smith
reviews.text:
Above-and-beyond professionalism and guidance!!!

I was dealing with a complicated frozen pipe situation involving a well system, and Brent at Warrior Plumbing was outstanding. From the start, he was thoughtful, knowledgeable, and incredibly responsive. What really stood out was how willing he was to communicate and guide me through the situation—even when he wasn’t physically on site. Brent made it clear that he was available any time of day  to put my mind at ease .

Brent took the time to walk through the problem step by step, helped me understand what to look for, and gave clear, practical guidance to safely mitigate the issue and prevent further damage. In a stressful situation where timing and the right decisions mattered, having his expertise and steady communication made all the difference.

It’s rare to find a professional who is this invested in helping a customer do things the right way and protecting their home. Warrior Plumbing is exactly the kind of company you want to call when you need someone you can trust.

Highly recommended.

plumbers.name: Made's Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1040 W Sublett Rd Ste 140, Arlington, TX 76001, USA

reviews.author: deadrick Harris
reviews.text: Made’s Plumbing did an excellent job installing my new water heater. He arrived on time, completed the work efficiently, and made sure everything was done right. Professional service, fair pricing, and a clean job—highly recommended!

reviews.author: Jan Powers
reviews.text:
Mades Plumbing came out to repair a persistent leaking valve on our tub.
They did a wonderful job after three over providers had failed. I'm thrilled beyond words! While here they agreed to reset a toilet whose wax ring had disappeared into the ether!
No more rocking! We ALSO had a bar sink that was backed up and they were able to clear that too! They went way above and beyond to see that our needs were met! Will always use them in the future! Thanks guys!

reviews.author: Sue Sappington
reviews.text: Mades Plumbing did a great job for us when they replaced the wax seals in two toilets and replaced our outside faucets front and back. They were professional, courteous and highly competent. Ben took special pains to make sure all work was done correctly. He also took the time to inspect our garbage disposal and water heater and assisted me in getting warranty service on the water heater. We will be calling them for future work and wholeheartedly recommend Mades Plumbing to anyone in need of quality plumbing services.

reviews.author: Bryan Panella
reviews.text: These guys were great. I have been screwed over by plumbers in the past and these guys were honest.  They explained everything they needed to do and discussed possible outcomes.  A+++ customer service.

reviews.author: Katrina Dorraj
reviews.text: My mom recommended Ben to us and he installed a water heater and garbage disposal for us almost 4 yrs ago. Everything has been working great. Had him back to fix some other issues recently and he was able to repair an existing faucet saving us hundreds. He’s courteous, efficient, and honest. Highly recommend him and his team.

plumbers.name: Excalibur Plumbing
plumbers.address: 11880 Hero Way W #308, Leander, TX 78641, USA

reviews.author: Stuart Gillen
reviews.text: Great work by these guys at reasonable prices.  I had to have a Pressure Reduction Valve replaced which had caused damage to my Hot Water Heater Pressure Valves and a busted sprinkler line.  The team came out and fixed it up.  Super friendly and courteous.  Ask for Curtis he was fantastic!

reviews.author: C Perilloux
reviews.text: Great job!  Richard and his helper were right on it for a propane gas water heater replacement, checked out everything, installed the same-fit/size replacement that we had lined up already right there,  and amazingly, they were done in exactly one hour!  That included re-soldering the hard-piped high-pressure relief pipe back together that needed to be removed just to do the install.  Quick work, and great workmanship!   Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Matthew Peirsel
reviews.text: I hired Excalibur to repair a shower faucet valve improperly installed by home flippers who didn’t know what they were doing. The plumber, Curtis arrived on short notice and was exceptionally professional and courteous in my home. He explained the issue, fixed my shower so it is working correctly despite missing parts in the shower handle (flipper nonsense again) and showed me what missing parts I need and how to install them to make it fully right. He kept this work within the standard service call price. I am exceptionally happy with the service that Curtis provided and I recommend him for any plumbing needs you may have.

reviews.author: G L
reviews.text: highly recommend Excalibur- I used them previously at my condo and knew who to call when I needed a plumber at my "new" house. All of their plumbers that I have worked with are excellent. Kind, efficient, competent, and thorough. I had 2 things that needed to be fixed and Curtis was punctual and educated me on things that needed to be on my radar as a 40+ year old house. I would absolutely want to work with Curtis again!

reviews.author: Blaire Hampton
reviews.text: Curtis helped me with a leak repair and was extremely helpful, professional, and diligent! He has great attention to detail and takes pride in his work! Would highly recommend Excalibur Plumbing and specifically Curtis’ work!

plumbers.name: Tribeca Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 6211 W Northwest Hwy c251, Dallas, TX 75225, USA

reviews.author: Erich Tompkins
reviews.text:
Stop searching for a plumber and use these
guys they are great!!!    I am a new customer
we searched online during the snow storm
b/c our water heater failed mid storm- they were out the next day after inspecting and were done with the full install after about 5 hrs, permits, electrical plumbing and they installed flood stops and sensors and hauled out the old one.   Jay build
an excellent plan and All don the guys who came out were clean friendly polite intelligent and professional.   Just a great efficient operation and my new go-to plumber!!!!!

reviews.author: Dayna Moser
reviews.text: During the most recent winter storm Our water heaters froze and broke causing water damage to the fist floor. Tribeca responded with a sense of urgency - they came over within hours to assess the situation and began researching our warranty. By the next morning they contacted us to confirm our order and a few hours later they were back for installation. Their team was courteous and respectful and got the job done quickly. They went above and beyond to lend us a space heater so the new water heater wouldn’t freeze overnight. We had hot water within 24 hours of reporting our issue. I would highly recommend them when you need help.

reviews.author: Chad Davis
reviews.text: I called on a Friday afternoon for a natural gas issue and they were able to squeeze me in last minute. Jay and AJ were great and solved my problem very quickly. Cost was less than I expected, which is always nice. I would highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Adam Nonnenmacher
reviews.text: Jay did professional work and was quick to diagnose the problem with my frozen hot water tank inlet line in the attic. They added more insulation so it would thaw and eventually it came back. Quick response too.

reviews.author: Ian Wright
reviews.text: Had issues with water heaters and gas leaks, and Tribeca came out to the house and cleared up all the issues promptly. From friendly dispatch to timely arrivals to quality work, all around excellent experience. Special shout out to Jay for all his help!

plumbers.name: 1-Tom-Plumber
plumbers.address: 9200 Pyott Rd, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Cordell Walker
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience with 1-Tom-Plumber from start to finish. They answered my call right away after I discovered my old water heater was leaking, which honestly caught me off guard since it was only about 8 years old. I had a big bulky 75-gallon Richmond power-vent water heater, and by the time I noticed the issue, water was leaking throughout my basement.

To make matters worse, some of my existing plumbing lines were already corroded and beginning to leak as well. I went a full week without hot water while trying to figure out the best long term solution, which was incredibly stressful.

When 1-Tom-Plumber came out, they were professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain all of my replacement options without pressure. After talking it through, I decided to upgrade to a tankless “endless hot water” system. I’m so glad I did.

The new system works amazingly well. I never run out of hot water, and unlike traditional systems, it doesn’t require a specific hard-water softener, so I didn’t have to invest in an additional water softening system. It also doesn’t require costly yearly flushes, which was a huge plus for me.

On top of that, the system comes with a 15-year manufacturer warranty and is made right here in America, which gave me even more confidence in my decision. The workmanship was truly top-notch, the installation was clean, and everything was explained clearly along the way.

I’m extremely happy with my experience and the upgrade. If you’re dealing with water heater issues or considering going tankless, I highly recommend 1-Tom-Plumber. They made a stressful situation so much easier and delivered excellent results.

reviews.author: Cy Nick
reviews.text: What I thought was a simple laundry clog turned out to be a much larger sewer job. Even though Justin was slotted for what was probably a fast job, he was still able to quickly adapt thanks to being incredibly prepared and having everything he could need in his truck, didn't have to run out for parts or tools even once. Got me back up and running quickly and expertly, highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kristina
reviews.text: I would absolutely recommend this company and its valuable employee Eric!  He was here within 2 hours (Sunday am at 7) for a leak in the garage ceiling.  Eric was professional and patient in answering our questions and very knowledgeable….for a cubs fan 😂.  He fixed the issue! I would absolutely recommend this company again

reviews.author: jose lopez
reviews.text: The place to call for sure , came home and my ceiling was about to cave in, called them and  they were here in the blink of an eye. Justin did an excellent job and was done in less than 20 minutes. Super friendly and professional.

reviews.author: Peter Bilik
reviews.text: Our tankless water heater froze during the recent subzero temperatures, causing the system to burst and we completely lost hot water. We have a 10 month old baby at home and it was a really tough spot to be in. 1-Tom-Plumber was recommended to us through a local community page and we gave them a shot. Eric was an absolute delight to work with, straightforward, and gave us multiple options not just equipment types but ways to pay. Moises, the owner was also very accommodating and they were all able to get us our hot water back in no time. The install looks clean and professional. They saved us during this big freeze. Thank you Eric!

plumbers.name: North Alabama Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 2918 Meridian St N Suite B, Huntsville, AL 35811, USA

reviews.author: Allen Viggins
reviews.text: I called with an urgent matter while they were booked. Chris made some calls and Bryan was able to come and see me next day. The quoted price was stood by. The work was above expectations. Done quickly and professionally I was highly satisfied and recommend this company to anyone looking for a trust worth reputable company.

reviews.author: Josh Evans
reviews.text: Brian and crew are professional, courteous, prompt, and offer the best price we were quoted! Would definitely recommend North Alabama Plumbing for all your plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Brianna Ogle
reviews.text:
Fast, honest, affordable!!!!
We called on a Sunday afternoon upon finding a wet spot in our ceiling from an upstairs bathroom. They immediately found room where they could on their schedule, and even got here earlier than anticipated!! They communicated very well about arrival time, price, and repairs. No sticker shock and a beautiful working tub faucet with no leaks!! I would give 10 stars if I could! We have always loved working with North Alabama Plumbing!

reviews.author: Beck McDowell
reviews.text:
Can’t recommend these folks highly enough. Chris worked us in on a busy day when we had no kitchen sink, Matthew went under the house multiple times trying to unclog the sink line, and Brian came to the rescue when no one else could
figure out the problem. He came up with a creative solution to the headache that Five Points plumbing is known for. And their price was very reasonable after all the extra work. We appreciate them so much.

reviews.author: Vicki Copeland
reviews.text: I've used North Alabama Plumbing a few times now and they have always gone above and beyond my expectations while charging less than other companies.  I could go on and on, but I"ll just say that their service is without par.  I recommended them to my elderly dad.  Not only did the technician fix his leaking toilet, he checked the whole house and tightened some loose connections.  That peace of mind was priceless.  This is the only plumbing company I have had such positive experiences with and I've used several in the area in previous years.  They're the best!

plumbers.name: Atlanta Star Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2979 Jonquil Dr, Smyrna, GA 30080, USA

reviews.author: Tiffany Ogle
reviews.text: I had a main valve break, which left me with no water.  From the phone call with Heidi to completion was a great experience. Britt and Stew came out and hooked me up immediately.  They were very professional and did an amazing job.  Would definitely refer them in the future.

reviews.author: Alexis Lucia Oswald-Doering
reviews.text: Atlanta Star Plumbing is the absolute best they were thorough. Took the time to explain everything to me and I cannot thank them enough for finally solving an issue that has been a long time problem. Customer service 10 star all the way thank you very much.

reviews.author: Michael Stimpert
reviews.text: Matt and Stew were prompt, courteous, and professional. They were thorough in identifying the problem (not an easy task), and transparent about the costs involved and the amount of wallboard. That would have to be removed to allow for their work to be done

reviews.author: A Vrtis
reviews.text: For starters, Maria handled my phone call to Atlanta Star Plumbing and was just incredible. She took down and processed my information quickly and was able to dispatch a crew same-day to stop a flooding issue in my home. Not only that but she was kind, caring, and helped brighten a frustrating day dealing with a plumbing issue! Once Matt arrived at my home he quickly assessed the issue and issued a quality fix on my phone that got my kitchen back to functional status. I would highly, highly recommend this company's services for any plumbing issues you might have in the Atlanta area!

reviews.author: Bernadette Tan
reviews.text: Stuart was very professional! He was quick to find out the cause of the flood and took the adequte measures for it not to happen it again. Not only, did Stuart deglogged the toilet, but let some hot water run from the faucet of the sink for making sure everything will flow thorougly through the pipe. I am glad that he explained the reason of his acts such I can do better in the future as prevention.

plumbers.name: Pike Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4341 Stilesboro Ln NW, Kennesaw, GA 30152, USA

reviews.author: Donald richardson
reviews.text: Pike Plumbing did a repiping of my home on November 25th due to a second slab leak since August that I experienced a week earlier. Zack had come out the previous Tuesday, Nov 18th, to give me a quote. That next Monday, Glen, who was coordinating everything, came out to check things out and to leave the supplies since the next day was going to be rainy. Glen was waiting outside when I woke up the next morning. The job started promptly around 9:30, and they finished around 3:30 that same day. The guys did a great job, and I was very satisfied with the outcome. I had contacted two other companies for a quote, and they missed the mark by a long shot. One of them even had me removing the vanity in the master bath. Pike was by far the best price. The price Zack quoted was the price I paid. A week later, I heard a strange thumping sound while using the hot water in the sink in the master bathroom, and they sent someone out to check it out and took care of it right away. I couldn't be happier with the job they did.

reviews.author: Kelly Busch
reviews.text: It is 3 days before Thanksgiving, I have elderly relatives arriving in a few hours, and our water pipe broke in the front yard right before the foundation. I explained my situation and he could hear the panic in my voice. This amazing company had a plumbing technician in my driveway within 2 hours. Thank you Pike Plumbing!! You saved the day and my entire holiday week.

reviews.author: Suzanne Purcell
reviews.text: This company can highly recommended to me and now I know why. I was able to get an appointment quickly and my service Technician Carson Weaver was fantastic and very knowledgeable. I know several people who have used this company for a variety of reasons and they have all been extremely satisfied with the service.

reviews.author: SRav
reviews.text: The entire experience working with the Pike team has been best in class! From my initial conversation where I was educated on all of my water heater options to the quick turn around in scheduling service and then the  exceptionally professional installation was by far a better experience on any/all services I have had on any repair in my house. Thank you Pike team

reviews.author: Alexis Shmookler
reviews.text: Had a great experience with Pike Plumbing today. They came recommended by several folks in my neighborhood. I called for some help to replace my tub drain and they were able to come out the very next day. Josh was extremely knowledgeable, friendly and honest. The price was reasonable - I will definitely be calling Pike again for any future plumbing needs. Thanks all!

plumbers.name: Stellar Plumbing, Drains and Water Heaters
plumbers.address: 347 Lively Blvd, Elk Grove Village, IL 60007, USA

reviews.author: Manoj Sachan
reviews.text: Great experience with this plumbing company. They replaced our ejector pump and basin and did a very clean and professional job. The team covered the carpets and walkways, completed the installation properly, and cleaned the area after finishing the work. Very happy with the service and would recommend them.

reviews.author: Daniel
reviews.text: Having to replace a water heater is never fun. From the start, this company communicated effectively and sent out a tech to inspect the issue. Gus, was very detail oriented and I appreciated that he explained things thoroughly. While their quote was not the cheapest, I felt confident that they would do the work right and they have a great warranty too! Day of installation, again, communication from the entire team was fantastic and everything went smoothly. Gus did an amazing job and I would highly recommend this company for any plumbing issues. I will definitely use them if a plumbing need arises. You get what you pay for, and this case it was excellent customer service and a smooth process to get a new water heater installed properly.

reviews.author: Clyde Miller
reviews.text:
Stellar Plumbing and Ken Saved Our Dream Home!
I had a serious plumbing emergency at my brand-new house—the dream home I was so excited about. Due to a high water table, the basement's sump pump setup, which was originally installed by a realtor that thinks he is a contractor (isn't good at either occupation), was running constantly (every 3.5 minutes!), destined to burn out and cause a major flood. I was incredibly nervous that I had bought a house that would constantly flood.

Fortunately, I know the owner of Stellar Plumbing, and they immediately sent out Ken. Ken has 16 years of experience in plumbing and even more in the trades, and his expertise was immediately apparent. He not only quickly assessed the faulty setup but also took the time to calm me down and walk me through the comprehensive solution.

This was a mini-construction project involving a deeper pit and a dual-pump solution with completely redone piping. While it was a significant investment, Ken assured me that his experience with similar projects meant this was the permanent fix I needed.

The results are astounding: our new system is robust, reliable, and the pumps now alternate, running only about every 15 minutes. I feel 100% more confident that my home is protected and has the right system in place. If you have any serious plumbing concerns, especially with water management, I can't recommend Ken and Stellar Plumbing highly enough. They are true professionals who deliver lasting peace of mind!

reviews.author: JOHN GROSS
reviews.text: I had Stellar out to give me a bid on a backup for our sump pump as well as a few other plumbing jobs.  They were very courteous, professional and knowledgable.  We are not planning to move forward with any projects at this time but I could tell that they were a very good company and would do a good job. I would recommend them.

reviews.author: Josh Stephens
reviews.text: They tried to say I had a broken sewer and wanted to dig up my yard and charge me $18500 for a full sewer line replacement. I have a warrenty for the sewer and water line I'd gotten through the village of Streamwood so I contacted them and they sent out another plumber (Center Gaurd Plumbing) to inspect the line. They cleared the blockage and revealed that Stellar didn't even map out the sewer line properly. When I brought these finding to Stellar they said that the plumber that came after didn't do a good job and that stellars efforts initially made it easier for the next guy to completely clear the line. Lol. So by that logic if their guy just stayed working at the clog he made (cause it wasn't backing up befor he meddle with it) they would have been able to clear it. I assume they gave up becuase they saw a way to make an easy $9k-18500. And I say that because the whole time this is happening Carlos was trying to sell me financing not realizing my warrenty would cover the cost of any and all repairs. Just really disappointing as the work they did was pricey but still adequate, I didn't mind paying extra if the job is done right but I do cross a line when you try to pull one over on me. Stellars guy didn't even map my sewer line out correctly if I had needed to use them they would have been poking holes in my yard like a geek squad installer trying to mount a TV on my wall. I thought this was a professional outfit but they couldn't even honor a partial refund when I called them out on them not finishing the job. At the end of the day it's just money I can make more but man I'd hate to have someone else pull a loan on something they don't need to.

plumbers.name: All Hours Plumber
plumbers.address: 5401 W Kennedy Blvd Suite 100, Tampa, FL 33609, USA

reviews.author: Lisa Contreras
reviews.text: Vinnie was amazing! We just bought a house (built in the 80s) and had a leak under the sink. He was able to not only fix it but also clean up the plumbing mess from the previous owner making everything so clean and easy to see. He gave us great feedback on what was going on, talking us through everything and what he’d recommend based on our situation. Highly highly recommend!

reviews.author: Katherine G
reviews.text:
My ceiling started leaking on the second floor. I had called all hours plumbers because of the wonderful reviews I had read so decided to take a chance. We ended up needing to have  our old shower and tile removed and a brand new shower and tub installed as well as the pipes and the toilet flange changed and a pipe that was bad. I cannot say enough great things about Yoan and his work at All Hours Plumber. From start to finish, he was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly patient. He explained the entire process clearly, answered every single one of my questions without hesitation, and made us feel completely comfortable throughout the project.

The quality of his work is outstanding — everything looks beautiful and was done with such attention to detail. You can truly tell he takes pride in what he does. Yoan and his helper were both professional, efficient, and respectful of our home. They kept the area clean and worked seamlessly as a team.

It’s hard to find a plumber you can fully trust, but we definitely found one. We will absolutely be using him again and 10/10 recommend All Hours Plumber to anyone looking for honest, skilled, and reliable plumbing service. We are beyond happy with the results!

reviews.author: Ernesto Gallardo
reviews.text:
This was our first time using All Hours Plumber, and we couldn’t be more satisfied with the experience! From start to finish, everything was handled professionally and efficiently. They were punctual, provided fast service, and made the whole process smooth and stress-free.

James, the technician who came out, was outstanding. He took the time to clearly explain everything he was going to do before starting the work, which we really appreciated. He was completely respectful, knowledgeable, and made sure all of our questions were answered. Thank you James!

It’s hard to find service like this nowadays. We will definitely be using All Hours Plumber again and highly recommend them to anyone in need of reliable plumbing services!

reviews.author: Carlos Lastra
reviews.text:
I’m writing to share my excellent experience with James from All Hours Plumbing.
James provided outstanding service from start to finish. He was professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to clearly explain the issue and the solution. His work was done efficiently and with great attention to detail, and it was clear he takes pride in doing the job right.
What stood out most was James’s reliability and customer service. He arrived on time, was respectful of my home, and made sure everything was working properly before leaving. It’s not often you come across someone who combines technical skill with such a positive attitude.
Because of James’s excellent service, I would not hesitate to recommend All Hours Plumbing to anyone in need of plumbing work. He is a true asset to your team.

reviews.author: Argi Irizarry
reviews.text: Vinnie was by far the best plumber I have ever hired. 23 years as a home owner I have never been showed such kindness from a company like this. Not only did he do a great job but he saved me a lot of money on the water heater I had installed. I was impressed because he gave me the choice to choose what fit best for my finances. Thank you so much Vinnie! All hours plumber you are now my go to!

plumbers.name: Justin Jackson's plumbing services
plumbers.address: 724 Albert Way, Arroyo Grande, CA 93420, USA

reviews.author: Joseph Timmons
reviews.text: I own a 3500SF mixed-use property in the Village of Arroyo Grande CA 93420.  My tenant said the water heater tank was leaking.  I called my regular plumber.  Un-available over the 3-day holiday weekend.  "Cold-called" Justin Jackson's Plumbing.  After a short discussion Justin went to see the situation. We wound up moving forward happily.  Longer story short: first call-800AM, paid invoice-200PM.  Justin sent photos and all VERY GOOD at a fair price.  They're a family business and I would go back to them in a heartbeat!!

reviews.author: Chris Baker
reviews.text: I setup a service visit with Justin (for the first time) assuming I needed to have my toilet ring replaced to resolve a smell and to check a couple of other things. He assessed the situation and told me that he wouldn't recommend the replacement because he didn't think it was the source of the smell. He recommended that I proceed with my thought of replacing a sink stopper with a simple device I found on Amazon, rather than having him do a more complicated repair on that fixture. He helped me with a quick fix on a slow draining tub. When I asked him what I owed for the visit he said nothing, not even a trip charge. Very impressive! Obviously an honest professional that really stretches to develop his client base, although he is well established. He's my plumber for future issues.

reviews.author: Mai
reviews.text:
Amazing service from Justin Jackson!

After a lack of response from our last local plumber (Culbert) in SLO, we contacted Justin Jackson's Plumbing Service in Arroyo Grande.

They came out the next day and took care of the problem right away. We strongly recommend them for any of your plumbing needs. They were professional, personable, efficient, and the price was very reasonable.

It’s so nice to have people who truly care about making the customer happy.

Justin & team, thank you so much for the top-notch care. We will be calling you again for our tankless water heater!

reviews.author: G D
reviews.text:
Shout out to Justin Jackson’s Plumbing, who comes out in the middle of a rain storm in the very late evening and saved our house from flooding.
Justin is honest in every aspect from time of arrival to pricing for service as well as troubleshooting.
You couldn’t ask for a better plumbing service, so call them immediately for all your needs!

reviews.author: eatonassoc
reviews.text: Excellent experience. Everyone was pleasant and helpful, the two man crew arrived within an hour of being called (it was not an emergency) and did a great job resolving the issue. Highly recommended!

plumbers.name: Service Force Plumbing
plumbers.address: 9300 Colesville Rd, Silver Spring, MD 20901, USA

reviews.author: Ryan Rosenfeld
reviews.text: Service Force replaced my boiler and hot water heater and we couldn’t be happier.  It was a tricky job with our older house and awkward setup, but they performed the install and an initial repair quickly and efficiently.

reviews.author: Liz Hutter
reviews.text:
.. We experienced several issues related to timing, and the scope of work shifted significantly from the beginning to the end of the project. Overall, this was not the level of experience we have typically had with your company.

We have had many positive experiences working with you in the past, so I am hopeful this was an isolated situation. That said, I would appreciate the opportunity to speak with someone directly to review the specifics, as I believe there is some important feedback to share

reviews.author: Ian Bates
reviews.text: Joe and Tyler were fantastic. Called them for a pre-purchase inspection for our home. I’m incredibly happy I did! They were fast, professional, and, at the risk of being cliche, professional. I would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jeff Davis
reviews.text: Excellent Service. Tyler showed up on time(was even early) and diagnosed and resolved the issue in less then 30 minutes. Highly recommended and they are my go to for any plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Edward Tanner
reviews.text: Tyler did a great job identifying the problem quickly and finding a solution. The whole process was very simple and easy. Hopefully I don’t need their services again anytime soon, but if I did, I would definitely use service force plumbing in the future.

plumbers.name: All Masters Plumbing
plumbers.address: 7501 U.S. 287 Frontage Rd, Arlington, TX 76001, USA

reviews.author: clayton peyton
reviews.text: Joshua Barksdale and Maurice Gibsom were GREAT! They went above and beyond to fix all my plumbing issues. They gave very clear advice with best cost. Both were super supportive in replacing my water heaters. Great company and great techs!

reviews.author: Davis Coppola
reviews.text:
Douglass truly saved our plumbing.
This is someone that truly cares about the customer experience and making things right for everyone involved. If I could give a higher review, I would.

Douglass dedicated time to ensure we were comfortable and understood what was going on while maximizing efficiency and getting things done properly. This is experience on a completely different level. The knowledge and skill shown during these visits is second to none. Had I had known my experience would have been this positive, I would never have looked elsewhere.

Not only were tips provided to ensure the drains stay clean, but also provided knowledge on long term maintenance which is invaluable. I can't thank him enough and will happily personally re-request his services if anything comes up again.

reviews.author: Greg Drescher
reviews.text:
Disregard previous post for All Masters Plumbing! I would not recommend them to anyone!
I recieved a letter from the city advising that I obviously had a water leak since my usage had gone up over 2000%. I called All Masters Plumbing & a gentleman came out & misdiagnosed where the leak was. They jackhammered through the concrete in the garage, found no leak there, left a huge hole wide open & left! My wife waited several days for someone to come back & fix the damage they did. They finally showed up after they scheduled three times, twice not showing up. They did a very sloppy, unprofessional job & it was not put back to the way it was before they did their damage! Another gentleman from the same company came out & found the leak outside the house, approximately 24 feet away from where they tore up the concrete inside my garage. The actual leak was found & repaired in less than an hour.
I was surprised to get an invoice from All Masters Plumbing for $5445.00 for the work they did fixing their mistake!
Previously we signed a loan thinking it was going to be a major cost but loan was not needed because it was a leak outside! Now the loan company is calling & asking why I'm rejecting this document since All Masters Plumbing submitted the loan as work completed!
I would never recommend this Plumbing company to anyone because of the misdiagnosis, shoddy repair & charging a horrendous price for repairing the damage they did! My wife & I have called several times & left messages for the manager to call back, but he never does! All I want is my bill adjusted, I shouldn't have to pay for their mistake & I would like my concrete done so it looks like it did before they wrecked it!
I'm hoping this is a mistake made by office thinking that first job was completed properly!

reviews.author: Kat Pham
reviews.text:
BEST SERVICE AND QUICK !!
Very professional work making sure customer are satisfy and happy with the works. Get everything clean out nicely and help customer with question showing steps by steps explain everything clearly for sure will recommended to many more client. Our business are very satisfy!! Thomas and Mark are very kind and friendly!!

reviews.author: Sanjiv Patel
reviews.text: Douglass came out to my house for an estimate that I requested for frequent back ups and roots in my lines. He was very informative and took the time to show me videos of what the issues were. He gave me his honest professional opinion on what repairs to focus on first. He was great.

plumbers.name: Mr. Twister Plumbing & Septic
plumbers.address: 3101 Church St, Hellertown, PA 18055, USA

reviews.author: Mark Morales
reviews.text: Took the time to explain my issue and the cause as well as the solution. Mr Twister went above and beyond exceptional service. My service tech was a well mannered professional who really knew his stuff. If ever needed, no hesitation to have Mr Twister back in my home.

reviews.author: Cydni Ticktin
reviews.text: Mr Twister was able to get us in same day for an emergent issue. Our Technician Mark was absolutely amazing. He took his time to explain and educate us with all of our options and helped create a plan to fix our issue. He was personable, understanding and incredibly helpful. Could not have asked for a better experience.

reviews.author: Linda Smith
reviews.text:
Fantastic work!! This was our first time using Mr. Twister and we are very pleased with their work. After Freddy came out and gave us an estimate on 2 options with reasonable prices we decided to have our 2 (50 yr old) bathrooms redone. Bob K, Bob, Steve, Rob and Jacob K are the guys that worked on the project. They were always on time and cleaned up each day. When it was completed we were extremely happy with our new bathrooms!!  We will definitely refer Mr. Twister to our friends and family. Thank you all for a job well done!
Attached before and after pictures

reviews.author: Matt Keretz
reviews.text: Great job by Luke and the Twister company! Super friendly, talked me through my options, and was super knowledgeable about what was being done. Also, let me know of things to look out for down the road! Thank you again!

reviews.author: Royā Retreat
reviews.text: Mr. Twister has been handling various jobs at my property over the past year, and I can’t recommend them highly enough. They and their team are consistently professional, clear in their communication, and always show up on time. Their pricing is fair, and most importantly, they’re extremely trustworthy — which is rare to find. Every project has been completed with care and attention to detail. It’s a huge relief knowing I can rely on Mr. Twister. Highly recommended.

plumbers.name: Capelli Plumbing
plumbers.address: 536 Lewelling Blvd Suite F, San Leandro, CA 94579, USA

reviews.author: Laura Stamme
reviews.text: Capelli Plumbing has been my go to for years. Recently, I needed a new garbage disposal and was having electrical problems with the old unit.  James promptly scheduled the job for the next day even though it was not an emergency. Edward did an efficient job installing the unit. My house has older wiring issues and they had one of their members (Alex) come and help rewire the unit to fix the electrical issue. They were able to quickly purchase the needed parts and accomplish the job in under an hour. Great work, quick communication and friendly service!

reviews.author: Rick Olivero
reviews.text:
The 2nd time I have used this company and both times the service was excellent. They were efficient and personable the 1st time and exactly the same this 2nd time.
Our tech was Jessie who took his time and was very thorough.  He didn’t leave until the job was complete.  CAPELLI Plumbing better hang on to this young man👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.author: Jolie Enos
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience with Capelli Plumbing.  From the call I had with sonya in the office, to the meeting with plumbing tech, Preston Morales, I felt very confident with moving forward with securing them for my home plumbing job.  Preston was very knowledgeable and helped me understand the issues and why it was happening.  The education he took time to do put my mind at ease, which allowed me to feel confident in moving forward with my home plumbing project.

reviews.author: Rob Capozzi
reviews.text: Amazing work. Wasn’t sold. Acted like a consultant. Explained everything.  Highly recommend would use again. Reasonable prices. Found my plumber!

reviews.author: jerry wong
reviews.text: Capelli Plumbing takes all the stars. Very good communication and also on time. The technician has a lot of experience under his belt and he is very knowledgeable and provided his professional service. He was able to unclog my shower drain and he went one step further to make sure there were no other problems. Thumbs up. Highly recommend Capelli for plumbing services

plumbers.name: Blue Plumbing and Drain Cleaning LLC
plumbers.address: 8561 Florentine Rd F, Prescott Valley, AZ 86314, USA

reviews.author: Aims LL
reviews.text: This is an excellent business! They helped us with a part we were having trouble finding. They were extremely affordable, kind, easy to work with, communicated well and went above and beyond to help us. Very grateful to them!

reviews.author: Michelle Rush
reviews.text: Unfortunately, the place I rent has needed a lot of plumbing repairs the last couple months, but these Blue Plumbing was wonderful. Susie was quick to get us scheduled, and Robert did great work!

reviews.author: Debora Booth
reviews.text: My ex husband was a great plumber and I expect a lot. I am very satisfied and happy with Blue Plumbing. Their communication and follow up was extremely professional. I would definitely not call anyone else. I’m a customer for life.

reviews.author: Jessica Rose
reviews.text:
I wash shocked by the price, but that seems to be the cost of doing business these days. On the other hand they got here within 2 hrs and only took 50 mins, for that I am very pleased.
Jessica

reviews.author: doreen balansche
reviews.text: Brad and Susie were great.  It was early Sunday morning and I discovered a leak under my kitchen sink.  I called and they were out within a few hours.  Their professionalism was great and I will definitely recommend them to anyone with a plumbing issue.

plumbers.name: PLUMB GENIUS
plumbers.address: 25 N Fretz Ave, Edmond, OK 73003, USA

reviews.author: Michael Stewart
reviews.text:
I hired Plumb Genius/Trophy Plumbing to replace two sets of leaking shower valves on July 22nd, 2025. Simplest job ever. One shower valve set they replaced started leaking again on September 9th. I called them back to see if they would return and rectify the situation. They have a 30-day warranty on their work, but I was 17 days out of that window. These are shower valves...like I said, simplest job ever. Shower valves, in my experience, should last years (the ones they replaced were at least 10 years old...probably closer to 20). They were going to charge me $130 just to show up again. I would have happily paid them for the hourly work, but not a fee to show up (again) to fix (again) what they already proposed to have fixed, and what I paid over $500 to have them fix.

When they informed me the fee would apply in my case as I was out of their warranty window, I informed them I may as well pay someone else a service fee if Plumb Genius/Trophy Plumbing won't stand behind their work. But, they chose to let me move on to another vendor. Really bad business practice and questionable competence at basic plumbing work if you ask me. I will not use them again.

Integrity and character count for something in my opinion, and I can't support a business that doesn't stand behind their work. Especially only 47 days after they charged me $517 for basic, simple services.

reviews.author: Katie Tolbert
reviews.text: AHS sent this company out for a broken hot water tank. They wanted us to pay $1425 out of pocket. My husband took the hot water tank to Home Depot and got it exchanged for free and spent $18 on a new water line.  Total scam. Now called Trophy Plumbing. I’m guessing they changed the name due to terrible reviews.

reviews.author: Miranda Andrews
reviews.text: Jerred and Eric installed a new water heater after ours crapped out. They were 5 minutes early!  Amazing! They gave us a beautiful upgrade and were polite, detailed and professional. I would recommend them take care of you if you want things don’t correctly and up to code. Good job guys and thanks again for coming out on a Saturday.

reviews.author: Jack Washmon
reviews.text:
These people absolutely destroyed my girlfriend's yard, fixed the pipe, ripped up all her grass, and her bushes from the yard and just left them all laying there.
Use someone else, they don't care about the damage they do to your property.

reviews.author: Philip W
reviews.text:
I would give negative 5 stars if I could. Neither plumb, nor genius to be found. They came, "fixed" our water heater, which didn't make it 48 hours. We then initiate replacement through our home warranty.

Ask for an itemized estimate, if you dare, and it will be intentionally vague and riddled with charges that are inexplicable by their staff. I waited a full day for a call from a plumber to explain the items on the estimate and their alleged code violations. Never received a call.

As their supposed customer service representative said, "you can Google it" with regard to their alleged code violations. I did Google it and then got a second opinion. Turns out they coded the water heater to the wrong city, so the entire estimate was wrong. Still wondering what a $600 charge for "Water Modification" meant.

I call the home warranty company to initiate a correction of the incorrect estimate, and Plumb Genius' operations manager says the earliest they can call to correct the issue is Tuesday because of the holiday (it is Friday and we initiated the first service call the previous Friday).

So if you want a company that will do less than the bare minimum to fix their own mistakes, without the slightest sense of urgency, Plumb Genius will get it especially wrong for you. I got my money for the service call back from the home warranty company, and am going with the second opinion, whose estimate was correct the first time, and who thoroughly explained the work.

After this experience, I wouldn't trust them to work in my house, even if they were to correct the errors and perform decent customer service.

plumbers.name: Heil Plumbing & HVAC
plumbers.address: 9603 Deereco Rd Suite 304, Timonium, MD 21093, USA

reviews.author: Michael Kirks
reviews.text:
I would like to commend Heil Plumbing for the wonderful job they did completing our sewer plumbing project. From start to finish, the process was handled in an efficient, professional, and timely manner.
Thank you to Ashley in the office, who was very responsive to urgent requests, and to Jake, the first technician who came out to assess the issue.
We had a couple of plumbers come out to the house, but it was difficult getting a clear commitment from them regarding getting a cost estimate. After dealing with the back and forth, my wife decided to search online for a Howard County plumber and found Heil Plumbing’s phone number.
I called, and the very next day Jake came out to assess the problem. We truly appreciate Heil Plumbing’s prompt response. Jake quickly determined that the issue extended beyond what the previous plumbing companies had identified, which gave us much-needed clarity and direction.
A special thank you to Otto, the lead technician.  He was very knowledgeable and responsive, ensuring that everything was completed correctly and timely. The team worked diligently and kept me informed throughout the entire process.
It’s not always easy dealing with plumbing problems, but they made the experience smooth and stress-free. I truly appreciate their hard work and excellent customer service, and I highly recommend Heil Plumbing to anyone in need of reliable and efficient plumbing services.

reviews.author: Jen Seidel
reviews.text: We had a main line water pipe leak into our basement. This was a really scary and stressful situation for us. They needed to replace the whole entire pipe out to the sidewalk    It Sounded like a weeks worth of work at least and we really need our basement.   I called Heil Plumbing after posting something on Facebook. They came highly recommended immediately. From the time I called them  to the time they left was absolutely seamless and perfect. It was only 6 PM in the evening and no other companies were  open, but they were still in the office and answered the phone And it was not an answering service.    Whoever answered, the phone was as sweet as could be and very helpful.  And I instantly felt calmer    The sales tech that came out for the quote was friendly and very knowledgeable and made us feel very comfortable answering all our concerns . This was a Friday and they booked us for that Monday.  The crew came right on time and we cannot believe how efficient and fast they were. They started at 7:30 AM and finished by 1 PM.  A job like this is very messy, but as you can see from the photos, they kept all the dirt contained away from my neighbors yards. And then they hosed it off afterwards. They replaced our grass and seeded it, then covered it with plenty of hay, so there isn’t any mud anywhere. I am so grateful we used this company. We will definitely use them in the future if needed. And I highly recommend them.!

reviews.author: Harry Stello
reviews.text: I called today for an issue that I've been putting off for multiple months due to what I thought was a high priced fix ( my picket froze and cracked my water line outside). I called and talked to an Ai answering service who surprisingly got the everything correct without having to repeat anything. Chand and Ronaldo were dispatched about 30 minutes later and arrived about an hour after I placed my call. Chad was extremely professional and helpful. He methodically talked me through what and where he thought the problem was and where the break could have been. I signed the authorization for work, which gave me the price and detailed what work he was going to perform. About an hour later, they were done and they showed me where the break was in the water line (exactly where he thought the issue would be by the way). They turned the water on, verified they fixed the issue and the spicket worked as expected. I think Ronaldo has an excellent mentor! Thank you for the excellent customer service, you have a customer for life.

reviews.author: Mary Morgan
reviews.text:
Chad was great!  He was very knowledgeable. He outlined and explained the process of the new water heater installation.  He immediately recognized and addressed  my concern regarding the leak and possible damage to my floors. Colin was a great help in the process.
HEIL is the  company to call FIRST! They RESPOND quickly!!!  THANK YOU!

reviews.author: Sally DS
reviews.text: I have used Heil Plumbing for many years and they always do good work at a fair price. My technician,  Chad K., was professional, very thorough and explained everything to me. Highly recommend.

plumbers.name: 2020 Drain Clean & Plumbing
plumbers.address: 14325 Willard Rd # D, Chantilly, VA 20151, USA

reviews.author: Eric C.
reviews.text: I highly recommend 2020 Drain Clean.  They were very quick to come to my house and fix the clogged drain and the technician was very professional and courteous.  I was particularly impressed with his diligence in finding the obstruction, which turned out being more than 50 feet down the pipe.  Don’t hesitate to call them.

reviews.author: S Akbar
reviews.text: Very professional. I had an under ground leak in the front yard and had to install a new pipe from a water meter to the inside the house. The guys took care of it quickly and very professionally. I was very impressed with the work they did. From beginning to end it went smoothly. I would hire them again in the future.

reviews.author: Khanh Huynh
reviews.text: We had our Tankless water heater fail at our shop and 2020 DC&P helped out tremendously with diagnosing and replacement of the unit as fast as they could. Josh was transparent and prompt with us so we are really happy with the service. Thanks!

reviews.author: daniel davis
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of working with 2020 Drain Clean & Plumbing for the replacement and installation of my water heater, and I couldn't be happier with the service! From start to finish, [he/she/they] demonstrated exceptional professionalism and expertise.

2020 Drain Clean & Plumbing arrived on time and took the time to assess my old unit before explaining the different options available. Their knowledge helped me select the best water heater that suited my needs and budget. The installation process was smooth and efficient.

What impressed me most was their attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction. After the installation, They walked me through how to operate the new unit and answered all my questions patiently.

Overall, I highly recommend 2020 Drain Clean & Plumbing for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: L. C.
reviews.text:
I've written reviews in the past about 20 20 Drain Clean and I am at it again. I cannot highly recommend them enough! When a significant leak cause serious damage in my home, they came to my rescue. Not only did they arrive promptly to assess the situation, but their team quickly got to work and effectively stopped the leak.
But what truly impressed me was their skillful ability to re-pipe my entire house at an incredible price. Lee and Abdul's expertise and skill were evident throughout the process. They worked diligently, ensuring that the job was completed to the highest standard while keeping me informed every step of the way. They are not just talented; they’re also incredibly responsive. They were quick to respond to any questions and always kept me abreast of what whey were doing, making me feel valued as a customer. Their professionalism and commitment to customer satisfaction are commendable. More importantly, they were very respectful of my home and ensure the work did had little impact to my house. They also worked alongside the renovation team's schedule so that everything came together at the same time.
If you are looking for a plumbing company that combines outstanding service, reliability, and excellent pricing, look no further than 20 20 Drain Clean. They truly saved the day for me (as well as other times when I've called on them), and I’m beyond grateful for their hard work!

plumbers.name: Abbott Brothers Plumbing & Heating of Maryland
plumbers.address: 3510 Keswick Rd, Baltimore, MD 21211, USA

reviews.author: Ricki Rutley
reviews.text: I had a gas line connected and cooktop installed in my condo. While the price was a bit higher than I was expecting, the service was excellent and I decided that I wanted the reliability of a well known company whom I had worked with in the past. They arrived as expected and took care of the installation in a timely and professional manner. The fact that they were able to get to me on the same day of delivery of the cooktop, with less than 24hrs notice, was a big factor for paying a little more. Thank you goes out to Mike Soper and his crew!

reviews.author: Kirk Roush
reviews.text:
We hired Abbott Brothers to repair and replace our sewer line, and it was a challenging job due to working around our deck, flagstone walkway, and landscaping. The crew was extremely thoughtful about minimizing impact and preserving as much as possible.

The work was completed quickly, with impressive knowledge and problem-solving along the way. Everyone was professional and communicated clearly throughout the process.

Mike in particular was fantastic—very helpful, flexible, and a great communicator who gave us real confidence in both the plan and the execution.

We were impressed with the quality of the work and the professionalism of the entire team and would highly recommend Abbott Brothers for any plumbing project.

reviews.author: Mike Basch
reviews.text: Mike and his team are good honest people.  We had an issue with our Tankless Water Heater.  They came out multiple times to try fixes though they suggested from the statt it would likely need to be replaced.  The fixes didnt work and they were kind enough to discount us back some of the service cost since we had them install the new unit.  They were the perfect combination of well priced, highly responsive and professional.  I would definitely recommend their service as its clear that they are committed to doing right by their clients!

reviews.author: Walter Starr
reviews.text: Very happy with the services provided provided by Abbott Brothers. I called on a Monday for a failed and leaking water heater, and they showed up promptly Tuesday morning as promised , and the fee was reasonable and exactly what they quoted me over the phone.

reviews.author: redaaltizer
reviews.text:
Eric showed up on time, after reviewing my plumbing problems he told me how they could be fixed exactly how much it would cost and how long it would take. I would definitely recommend this company and hopefully you'll get Eric. I would definitely use this company Again Eric's attention to detail and ability to explain exactly what needed to be done and how it was going to take to be done was definitely appreciated. Thanks Eric!!! A job well done I truly appreciate you.
Red

plumbers.name: Spicewood Plumbing
plumbers.address: 337 Red Bluff Rd, Spicewood, TX 78669, USA

reviews.author: John Miller
reviews.text: Josh and Trevor were great. Respectful and great communication. Doing a total master bath renovation with moving shower, toilet and vanities. Prompt and thorough. Very satisfied with Spicewood Plumbing.

reviews.author: jackie english
reviews.text: Exceptional courteous service. Showed up on time and quickly resolved our issue. Zeke is a great technician; we love working with him. Spicewood is always our first phone call when we need help with plumbing services.

reviews.author: Kayla Hoffman
reviews.text:
You never want to hear “sorry your tankless water heaters (plural) did not withstand the low temps experienced by HSB”  I even had water collecting in the electrical outlets.  I had to replace two heaters … my builder put the tankless heaters on the exterior of my home and they are not built to withstand freezing temps.  I felt very confident listening and learning from Josh Savage with Spicewood Plumbing. He carefully walked me through the process. New Navien tankless hot water heaters were installed with meticulous precision. It was a lengthy install and no steps were missed.
I am grateful to Josh for the tutorial for winterizing exterior tankless water heaters and now I feel more confident to follow his recommendations.
