Once he replaced a section of the copper pipe with PVC pipe he turned the water back on to my house and noticed the work he had just done was leaking. Stacy instructed us he had to run to a different job and then back to the store then back to our house.  After being away for 1-2 hours he finally arrived with a gator bite Stainless steel tube and completed the job. After asking for the pricing Stacy stated Tim deals with the prices and will get back to us. The next day Tim arrived at my house and gave us a verbal price for the work of the damaged pipe. The initial price was extremely high he gave us for pipe patch work and asked him to explain where he got his total from. Tim explained various fees, taxes, hourly labor, and also a fee for an initial house call. I instructed him I would not pay the fee for the initial house call when this was a continuation of the work from yesterday.
After everything was said and done Tim verbally told us his work is warrantied and call him if any problems arise. Overall the company seems to do good work just has high prices compared to other local plumbers. If I was home and not out of town I would have shopped around for better pricing but I didn’t want to leave the stress of that on my girlfriend.

reviews.author: Charise Strandberg
reviews.text: A big thanks to Tim who facilitated getting our tub unclogged as well as installing a brand new water heater. His customer service is top notch and his installer David is extremely knowledgeable and efficient. Tim ensured we got a quality water heater and was able to get things done quickly. Tim was very responsive and follows through to make sure his customers are happy. Thank you so much!

reviews.author: Lorie Reimiller
reviews.text:
Tim and Ernesto are the BEST!!💗💗  My daughter and family were having problems with their plumbing this past Saturday and she has 4 children. She wasn't able to get the landlord and was very upset. I'm from Stillwater PA and did a Google search for plumber's in her area (SATURDAY)  later in the evening I called and spoke with Tim he was AMAZING and VERY responsive very polite. He called Ernesto after working major hours through out the week and that day. 🙏🙏💗💗  Ernesto  went to my daughter's house and fixed everything for her he was very professional and took his time to check everything. He didn't rush through and say he couldn't do it or show up for 5 minutes and do God knows what (like some would)  he did his Best and they are very HAPPY. Keep up the GREAT work guy's HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
LORIE FROM PA

reviews.author: Ke'Ondra Kenner
reviews.text: I am so grateful for this company. My name is Shea and I have been going through a rough time because I just had a baby and I had a huge leak at which plenty company’s came and it was not fixed correctly and my water bill was through the roof and my floors coming up. I also had no hot water and my water was running slow when it’s usually good pressure. Well I spoke to Tim & he was very nice and reassuring. Everyone from the leak detection to the plumber that came was very nice and went above and beyond. I now have hot water and everything is very well so far. A lot of weight and stress have been lifted off my shoulders. I can raise my baby in peace. Thank you so much. Really heavenly sent. I appreciate yall very much.

reviews.author: Eric Tucker
reviews.text: Excellent customer service and professionalism.  Best plumbing company I have dealt with.  Better pricing and service than the larger companies.  These guys have the knowledge and experience to quickly diagnose and address the issue.  I plan on using them for all of our commercial building needs.

plumbers.name: Emergency Master Plumbing & Air LLC
plumbers.address: 2118 W Julie Cir, Phoenix, AZ 85027, USA

reviews.author: Shwetha Sharma
reviews.text: Justin and Parker were awesome. I had a pretty bad toilet clog which revealed itself over the course of 3 days of trying to unclog it, but Justin and Parker didn't give up. They tried every modality they could and eventually hydrojetted the clog out from the roof after hours of trying different methods. It was definitely costly at over $2,000, but they didn't give up. Parker is such a well-mannered young man, he even took his shoes off every time before going onto the carpet and left the bathroom clean before leaving. Thank you guys, so happy thats over!

reviews.author: Scott Nash
reviews.text: I called on a Sunday evening. The person I spoke with was extremely helpful and friendly. Justin arrived within an hour, diagnosed the problem, and fixed it right away. He was pleasant and professional. I'm so happy to have a new plumber I can trust.

reviews.author: Kathryn Santiago
reviews.text: We had a plumbing emergency on Christmas Day. I reached out to them around 4am, by 10am everything was resolved. I cannot recommend Emergency Master Plumbing & Air enough. They truly came in and saved the day. Our plumber was courteous, professional, knowledgeable, and gave us a fair price for their services. This is going to be my go-to Plumber from now on.

reviews.author: Jeff Neal
reviews.text: I love this company. I called them on a Friday and they're out Saturday morning. I had a shower that would not turn off all the way and they immediately fixed it. Apparently they carry enough parts to take care of almost everything and they cleaned up their mess. Everything works perfect. I am thrilled with their quick response and their price. Thanks, emergency Master plumbers

reviews.author: Clifford Reph
reviews.text:
Justin was great by keeping me up to date on his arrival time.
We negotiated a deal to replace the washer hook up valves, but to find that price only included "one" valve. I asked Justin to check the hot water valve to be sure that it isn't leaking also. I was told that the valve was good to only find that it also leaks after taking the hose off. Now, I need to call another plumber to fix the other valve. The only reason that I gave 3 stars is that they negotiated a price that I could afford and Justin was so nice.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1900 Campus Commons Dr Ste 105, Reston, VA 20191, USA

reviews.author: Anne Andrews
reviews.text: We had Roto-Rooter out to clear out an exterior drain line from the sump pump. Jaime and Yousef were terrific. They explained the process and were quick and efficient. They very kindly tolerated my questions about what they cleared out of the line and how to prevent this in the future. This was a wonderful experience.

reviews.author: Diane Greenberg
reviews.text: The gentleman that came today, Jamie Marino did an outstanding job. He was professional. He left everything clean after the repair was done. I would definitely recommend him again and your services. You all did an outstanding job of fixing the toilet the sink and now we have working items and running water. Thank you again.

reviews.author: Val V
reviews.text:
Jamie Moreno with Roto-Rooter did a phenomenal job! He was extremely professional and took the time to clearly explain where the problem was, why the leak occurred in the first place, and what needed to be done to fix it. He completed all the repairs quickly and efficiently.

I especially appreciated that he took and shared pictures before and after the work, walking me through everything so I fully understood the situation. At no point did I feel pressured into unnecessary repairs — his honesty and transparency were truly reassuring.

In addition to fixing the issue, Jamie offered helpful recommendations on what to watch for in the future, which we greatly appreciated. We are very pleased with the work he did — 5 stars all around!

While we hope we won’t need plumbing services again anytime soon, if we do, I sincerely hope Jamie is the one who comes out to help us.

Attaching before and after pictures for reference.

reviews.author: Madina Wazir
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Roto-Rooter. Shams, the technician, arrived on time, was very professional, and took the time to clearly explain the issue and the work that needed to be done. The job was completed efficiently and thoroughly, and everything is working perfectly now. While the service was not cheap, the price was reasonable for the quality, expertise, and peace of mind provided. I really appreciated Shams’ honesty and professionalism and would definitely recommend Roto-Rooter to anyone needing reliable plumbing service.

reviews.author: Theo Bush
reviews.text: Great service! The plumbers called me “boss” and were patient and understanding when I could not find my credit card. I found it and gave it to them and felt appreciated. They gave me a fist bump and wished me to have a great day. The plumbers not only did an amazing job, but built a connection with me and I will of course want them specifically to come back if I ever need help again. Also, I forgot to mention the man himself! Jaime moreno did an excellent job!!

plumbers.name: U.S. Allied Plumbing & HVAC
plumbers.address: 191 Poplar Pl, North Aurora, IL 60542, USA

reviews.author: Sam Chase
reviews.text:
Quickly fixed a problem behind my shower faucet that a different company cut holes in my ceiling and quoted me 3k needlessly for.
So grateful for Howard and Zach coming out and swiftly and honestly fixing the problem.

reviews.author: Jason Lehner
reviews.text:
We had a significant leak coming from the main in the basement Howard from US Allied came out with an hour to help.  He was able to band aid fix the leak until the correct part can be ordered so it can be replaced properly.  We are super thankful for his friendly, honest professional service we would highly recommend.

Follow up: US Allied came back out Monday morning as promised to replace the valve where the main comes into the house.  Kyle did an amazing job he was informative, fast and super funny.  Kyle is super friendly type of guy he is the kinda guy you wanna go and crack open a beer with after work just a great attitude. He explained everything he was going to do in detail so there wouldn't be any surprises.  He even took the time to replace a spigot for me while he was here.  Amazing job I stick by my statement I would highly recommend

reviews.author: Matthew Pronger
reviews.text:
Knowledgeable and professional, the plumber, first of all, brought his own boot covers to protect my home. Next, he performed a timely assessment and provided me with the issue and the repair cost before he did anything else. He also provided me with a replacement option.
During the replacement, he was respectful of my home, my budget and my dog. (My dog loved the attention) The work was clean,  time efficient and cost effective.
Thank you, US Allied. We've never had so much hot water. I will definitely use you again.

reviews.author: Mr. MKETHPN Hills
reviews.text: Kyle did an excellent job and provided a thorough overview of what needed to be repaired. More importantly, he provided a competitive price that exceeded my expectations. I will definitely keep US Allied Plumbing and HVAC stored for future repairs and consultation.

reviews.author: Steven Zink
reviews.text: Alex did an excellent job!  Positioned the new water heater so that the controls would be accessible, added vertical run in the vent line for improved draft, added an expansion tank, explained very clearly what routine maintenance is recommended.  Looking forward to the next project with US Allied!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1070 Marina Village Pkwy UNIT 202, Alameda, CA 94501, USA

reviews.author: N S
reviews.text:
AMAZING SERVICE! Had a random emergency issue in my home today (renter) and after contacting the company, a team of 3 arrived in less than an hour.

It was a big job - but the three workers came, listened, assessed thoroughly, and got right to work.

In the process, two toilets had to be taken out, sewage/water that flooded into two of the showers had to be vacuumed out, lines/pipes had to be cleared out, and all effected areas needed to the be cleaned up afterwards (which was a lot to clean up).

They worked their butts off for hours until everything was done, no complaints or breaks (even though I could tell it was very tiring).

They worked together without issue, communicated throughout (with me and my landlord both/they worked out payment etc with him over the phone for me) and were all super friendly and down to earth as well, which made the whole experience way less stressful.

The company will also be sending another team member out in a couple days to inspect and mar a plan to fix any potential damage as a result of today’s issue if needed.

****TERRENCE, AMAD, and MATT were the 3 workers who did the job today****
Y’all rock!

Thanks again!!

P.S - I do have one small suggestion for management though.

For emergency issues that happen to fall on weekends and that might require someone to come out and inspect for damage AFTER a situation like mine (from water damage) -

Having whatever general documents your company requires the customer/owner to sign before someone can be sent out to do a post inspection - readily available somewhere for them to access and get signed as soon as possible without having to wait until a weekday/when office opens again would be really helpful and avoid any delays.

In my case it’s Saturday, so I’ll wait until Monday, but would have liked that to be done today. It’s not a huge deal, Monday is okay too! But just a suggestion!

Again thank you for the amazing service!!!

reviews.author: ma c
reviews.text:
Rich, from Roto-Rooter, just cleaned out our main drain in the front yard. What a nice gentleman. He did a wonderful job, cleaned up the mess that the plugged-up drain left behind. He was conscientious, professional and made sure that the drain was completely unclogged. I am very satisfied and glad that I chose Roto-Rooter.

Roto-Rooter also sent a second person, Jason, to run a camera down the drain to make sure that the drain was cleared to my satisfaction; it was.

Finally, Roto-Rooter had a $100.00 coupon that I could use, making the job very affordable. I will definitely use Roto-Rooter again.

reviews.author: Heather Johnson
reviews.text: Rich saved the day when our shower was backing up and found the culprit in a massive hair ball! He was patient, customer service oriented and very courteous as he releived us of our bezoar burden. He answered all of our questions and spent the necessary time ensuring the job was done right. We consulted a couple of other companies first and ultimately we are so glad we went with Rich and Roto Rooter because the service and price were impeccable. Thanks Rich, you rock!

reviews.author: PD Wanjari
reviews.text:
We had an emergency kitchen sink drain problem, and on a friend's recommendation, decided to call Roto Rooter. Within the next 2 hours they were at my place working.

The work was prompt and to satisfaction. Apart from that, Richard, out technician, shared several tips to ensure longevity of pipes. Overall, when it's plumbing, I think I need not see elsewhere, but Roto Rooter.

Highly recommend the company, and Richard, in specific.

reviews.author: Sam Goldhaber
reviews.text:
Richard service technician 7280 from Roto-Rooter's team made the experience of getting plumbing done at my home painless.
Additionally he spent the extra effort and time to explain the service he provided.

Roto-Rooter isn't the cheapest option in the Bay area but the service quality provided by this individual made it worth the investment and he worked with me to find a price that I could agree on.

I hope someone at his company is able to read this review because it was absolutely his work and professionalism that made me decide to say yes to the service as well as satisfied upon its completion.

plumbers.name: S Waters Plumbing
plumbers.address: 28 Pamaron Way ste d, Novato, CA 94949, USA

reviews.author: Sharon Woo
reviews.text: Brandon and Lopez were prompt, courteous, clean and very knowledgeable. Brandon has worked on three previous jobs for us and each time worked diligently to help remediate plumbing for our 55 year old home, both inside and out. Highly recommend S Waters.

reviews.author: Jaime Greene
reviews.text: Kevin came to our home on time, checked everything out and provided an accurate estimate.  I accepted and he was able to complete the repairs we needed with our kitchen and bathroom plumbing.  We are very happy to have Kevin help us with our home plumbing for the second time.  He always does thorough work and is clear about what needs to be done and why.  Thank you S Waters Plumbing and Kevin. We would highly recommend to anyone needing plumbing work done.

reviews.author: Ki Foley
reviews.text: Kevin and crew were very efficient, professional, polite, clean, detailed oriented. What more can I say. They were able to get the job done in just 1 day. We're impressed. Thanks.

reviews.author: Sarah Forsman
reviews.text: I have used S Waters Plumbing for over 20 years and have only good things to say about them. They are prompt, polite, efficient and timely. I highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Valerie Harbidge
reviews.text: Love this company. They respond quickly. They show up on site professionally, they get the job done and they don’t try to price gouge. As a local business owner who operates with high integrity in this way, I have a strong appreciation for it. Manny and Brandon are fantastic.

plumbers.name: VanDerBosch Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 6928 N Greenview Ave, Chicago, IL 60626, USA

reviews.author: L M
reviews.text: We called VanDerBosch and they were able to come fix our broken shut-off valve sooner and for considerably less money than another plumber I was using previously. They made us feel like a top priority. Our technician, George, did fantastic work. He was professional, friendly, very skilled and knowledgeable. We won't hesitate to call VanDerBosch the next time we need plumbing work done at our condo.

reviews.author: David Schuette
reviews.text:
My experience with VanDerBosch was extremely positive. I reached out to convert an electric water heater to a tankless gas unit, and the job was fairly involved. The quoting technician arrived on time, was courteous, and took the time to think through exhaust routing options and confirm code requirements before we settled on a plan. He even made a second trip out.

Installation day was just as smooth. Andrew and Nick showed up exactly when expected, were professional throughout, protected the floors, worked cleanly, and only opened up what was necessary. They cleaned up thoroughly and left the area looking neat.

I also appreciated how receptive they were as I researched models and asked about upgrades (recirculation options and a newer unit with additional features). Each change was quoted clearly, and they were accommodating as the scope evolved. Overall, a great experience - on time, thoughtful, and high-quality work.

reviews.author: Cam Jones
reviews.text: I wish I had been introduced to VanDerBosch years ago.  One, very happy to support a family-owned business, but two, the expertise by the team members was extremely well demonstrated.  Monica, Andrew, Wilf, and Alan (and I can't usually remember my own name by the way) are fantastic to work with and a very special shout out to Monica and Andrew.  Monica communicated, scheduled, and comforted me throughout the process to keep me apprised and informed.  Andrew, who should be teaching this stuff (which he does do the training I've been since told) educated me on the work being performed and is outstanding to keep it at a level I understood and used analogies that made total sense that I would never have thought of regarding hot water heaters, boilers, and sewers.  Thank you all!!! Great job and you are on my speed dial!!!

reviews.author: Holly Newhouse
reviews.text: George came out to fix a couple of issues we had with kitchen and bathroom sinks. He was very professional and very thorough with his work and a nice guy to boot. We have had multiple plumbers come out from this company in the past year and every time we have experienced impeccable service. This is old school plumbing service at its best. They are reasonably priced considering the price hikes they have to endure for all their parts. I would wholeheartedly recommend them for all plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Francheska Viejon
reviews.text: George came out and assessed a leak for me, as well as let me know if I needed additional venting for my laundry tower. He was very thorough, knowledgeable, and friendly! I had a really great experience working with George and he is an excellent representation of this company!

plumbers.name: Stellar Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4400 N Stage Way Ln, Prescott Valley, AZ 86314, USA

reviews.author: Jacob Wright
reviews.text: Duane answered my call at 6pm in the evening and met me at my property at 8am the next morning.  He did a clean, professional job replacing a bad hot water heater that was leaking.  Not the cheapest price but definitely a fair price and he showed up and got the job done the next day.  I recommend Stellar Plumbing.

reviews.author: shihancheng
reviews.text: Duane was referred to me by my realtor, and I couldn’t be happier with how the project turned out. He truly had my best interests in mind—budget-conscious and never tried to upsell. He returns calls and shows up on time, which is rare these days. I highly recommend Stellar Plumbing and Duane!

reviews.author: geani ronne
reviews.text:
Stellar Plumbing was referred to me by my neighbors snd Duayne was FANTASTIC !
My wster heater went out and he came out within 39 minutes and had s new one installed the next morning on a Saturday !
His price was so reasonable and $36000 LESS than another company.  I HIGHLY RECOMMEND Stellar Plumbing.

reviews.author: Dan and Carol Smith
reviews.text: We’ve tried several different plumbers since we moved to Prescott and in our opinion, Stellar Plumbing is the best. Duane is very knowledgeable and knows what he’s doing. He always returns your call, trustworthy, on time, price conscious and hard working.

reviews.author: Donna King
reviews.text: Stellar Plumbing was stellar!!! Duane responded very timely to an emergency situation we had with a broken water main valve that was flooding our yard and potentially running up our water bill. He had the problem fixed within hours and his fee was very fair and reasonable. I would definitely recommend this company and use their services again for all my future plumbing needs!

plumbers.name: High Priority Plumbing and Services, Inc.
plumbers.address: 317 Northpoint Pkwy, Acworth, GA 30102, USA

reviews.author: Michelle Newman
reviews.text: My experience with High Priority Plumbing was excellent!  Aaron was very courteous,  knowledgeable and professional.  He explained what was happening with my hot water heater and recommended for it to be replaced.  Upon his return to install my new hot water heater, he explained exactly what he would be doing during the installation.  I am very pleased with this company! Aaron is the best!!  American Home Shield got one right!!

reviews.author: Bravo Charlie
reviews.text:
Highly professional and thorough service.

Steven communicated when he would be here and arrived on time, punctuality is huge plus.

At each step in the investigation and repair of our leak, Steven asked if we had questions. He talked us through the "how" and "why" of each step in the process.

The thorough review of our plumbing and attention to detail, highlighted another issue that we will be working with High Priority plumbing to fix. Again, he displayed high levels of communication and professionalism.

We ended with a clear plan for the next step to correct our plumbing problems. I would highly recommend High Priority Plumbing and specifically Steven for future use.

reviews.author: Marcel Myers
reviews.text: Steven was very knowledgeable and beyond helpful. Walked me through every step of the way on what he was doing and more importantly extremely honest. I highly recommend this company and asking for Steven for all your plumbing needs! Thanks again!

reviews.author: Lisa Castillo
reviews.text: Highly recommend High Priority Plumbing! Their technician, Steven had the utmost professionalism. Incredibly knowledgeable with our situation and even suggested little tips for moving forward. It was a great experience from the first interaction with the office staff. They made working with our home warranty policy incredibly easy.  Hopefully I'll never need a plumber again if I do they will be my first call:

reviews.author: Mike B
reviews.text:
I’ve been in the construction industry for 26 years and am a licensed General Contractor, so I don’t give praise lightly.

Steven was outstanding—professional, knowledgeable, and clear in explaining the issues and solutions. He quickly identified what needed to be done and helped move the repairs forward. Based on my experience, he’s easily in the top 1% of vendors I’ve worked with.

Highly recommend this company.

plumbers.name: Five Star Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 2018 Mountain Rd, Joppatowne, MD 21085, USA

reviews.author: Yungjin Kim
reviews.text:
We recently completed two projects with Five Star, including the replacement of the water line between the main shutoff valve and the house. The cost and quality of their service for that work were excellent, and we had no complaints. Based on that experience, I would recommend Five Star for main waterline leak repairs.

During the water line replacement, I also asked Chris about repairing a leaking bathtub faucet. He said they could send another technician the next day to replace the diverter cartridge. The following morning, the technician arrived and, after a quick inspection, provided an estimate of $471 for the repair. He explained that the work required replacing the shower diverter cartridge, consistent with what Chris had mentioned. Although the estimate was higher than I expected, I approved it, assuming the repair might be complex and because the technician was ready to proceed.

After I shut off the main water for him, I took a short break to have a cup of coffee. Before I even finished it, he had completed the replacement and asked me to turn the water back on for a leak test. The technician was very professional, and the repair was completed within about 20 minutes with good results.

However, I felt that $471 was excessive for the level of labor and complexity involved. I later checked the price of the T809206 shower diverter cartridge and found it sells for about $57 at Home Depot, meaning roughly $410 was charged for about 30 minutes of labor. Because Five Star had previously provided fair pricing and excellent service for the main waterline repair, I did not obtain multiple estimates for the bathtub repair—I relied on my loyalty and trust in them. Afterward, I checked with other plumbers and learned that comparable repairs typically range from $250 to $350, including parts.

This experience was a lesson learned: relying on a single provider, even one with whom you have had good experiences, may not always result in fair pricing. It is always best to obtain multiple estimates before making a decision, regardless of prior loyalty.

reviews.author: James Conley
reviews.text: I don’t write post often but feel compelled to share my experience with Five Star Plumbing.     I had a water line leak originating from the outside and leaking into my basement. Unfortunately, my home warranty company nor home owners insurance company covered the repair. This turned out to be a significant out of pocket expense. I called several big named companies and was met with broken promises and quotes between $7,300.00 and $8,300.00 being the highest. Something inside of me told me to keep looking for a better deal. I ran across Five Star Pluming online and gave them a call. It was a Sunday morning. I spoke with Chris who said they could repair my leaking line on Tuesday morning. I appreciated the honesty. The big companies said they could do the job the same day, only to come up with excuses. I reluctantly asked Chris how much the job will cost. The quote Chris gave me was thousands less. The quote included replacing all plumbing leading to the county meter inside. No other company offered this as part of their quote. Five Star Plumbing arrived on time and did an awesome job as promised for thousands of dollars less. Did I mention Five Star guaranteed the water line for 10 years? If you want a job done right, honesty upfront and a fair price, chose Five Star Plumbing.

reviews.author: Mal Baker
reviews.text: We discovered water leak from the main pipe , which needed to be replaced . After few estimates we went with Five Star Plumbing which turned out to be the best decision! Brian showed up on time , extremely knowledgeable and professional. Explained everything they were going to do and did just that . We had a tree with huge roots on their way but Brian and his team worked hard to dig out all they needed and repair what was necessary. Would definitely recommend them to anyone !

reviews.author: Heather Sarno
reviews.text: I highly recommend Five Star Plumbing!  They solved my plumbing and water pressure issues when no one was able to. They have the expertise to get to the real problem and do it right the first time. I am so grateful my friend recommended them! They did all the work for providing water from the public hook up to my house and the internal water hook up. I have used them for general plumbing issues as well and highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jon Chapman
reviews.text: 250 dollars an hour and won't give you a quote or estimate of any kind without charging 89 bucks to come out. Replacing a P-trap on a kitchen sink shouldn't cost 580 dollars. Edit: updaing from one-star. Their customer service rep saw my review and called to make it right. The tech overestimated the time needed to complete the job. I respect them following up and making things right.

plumbers.name: Rose Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 6520 Oley Speaks Way suite a, Canal Winchester, OH 43110, USA

reviews.author: Trent Westcamp
reviews.text:
Rose Plumbing is my “go-to” plumbing service for a variety of repairs! We needed a backflow installed that was required by the City Of Columbus. They got a quote over to me within a few hours, had the job scheduled and they just completed the work this morning. Everything looks clean, up to code and professional. Grant was the tech that took care of the job.

We also use Rose Plumbing for several backflow tests at different facilities, as our last plumber retired from the trade. They picked up where he left off. Fantastic company and fantastic people! 🙂🤙🏻

reviews.author: John Gladstone
reviews.text: I have had rose plumbing do work for me for 7 years . There prices for there work is so reasonable cheap.the quality work you get is outstanding for there prices.  And his workers do great work and keep you updated.  Thank you Ryan Rose

reviews.author: Susie C
reviews.text: I called Rose Plumbing right when they opened, and they were able to slot us in quickly despite the last-minute request! Grant came out to our house promptly. Our water heater was fairly old; Grant said there was a potential solution for keeping the pilot light on, but he recommended we get a new one installed (which we had expected). Incredibly, he was able to again fit us into his schedule, and within two hours, was able to get a new water heater from their supplier and install it. Very professional and incredibly efficient! We cannot recommend Rose Plumbing enough.

reviews.author: Kyle Ross
reviews.text: Great experience, Grant came out same day and fixed a leak through a basement ceiling. It only took him an hour or so and the hole he had to cut was much smaller than I expected. Would recommend!

reviews.author: tom hiebel
reviews.text: The technician was skilled, efficient, and respectful of our home, they even cleaned up thoroughly afterward. The install was done perfectly, and the pricing was fair with no surprise fees. We highly recommend them to anyone in need of honest, reliable, high-quality plumbing work.  We will definitely be using their services in the future.

plumbers.name: CDS Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 1103 W Dr Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Seffner, FL 33584, USA

reviews.author: Sarah Woo
reviews.text: The receptionist who answered was very nice and quick to help. She kept me up to date on how long it would take for the plumber to arrive. Josh was very friendly and informative. He was able to do the repair quickly and efficiently; he was also able to give me good tips on how to maintain the well system my house is on.

reviews.author: Julie Culpepper
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience with CDS Plumbing helping resolve an issue my mother was having at her home during the holidays. I wasn’t sure how quickly I’d be able to get someone out to her house, but when I called CDS, I spoke with a delightful woman named Nora who immediately put me at ease. She arranged for a technician to come out the very same day.

Josh arrived promptly and cleared the clogged drain right away. He also took the time to assess a recurring clog issue and identified a small section of cast iron piping with nodules that were restricting proper drainage. Josh explained everything clearly and recommended an affordable long-term solution to prevent the issue from happening again. He then helped schedule the Hydro-Smooth repair during the week in a way that worked with my mother’s schedule.

Nora and the office team were incredibly accommodating and communicative throughout the process. Josh returned as scheduled and took care of everything efficiently and professionally.

This was the second time we’ve used CDS Plumbing and Justin Cook’s team, and they continue to exceed our expectations. They are honest, fair, dependable, and deliver high-quality work. Everyone we interacted with, from the office staff to Josh in the field, was friendly, knowledgeable, and solution-oriented.

I’m so glad we found CDS Plumbing. I only wish they were located in South Florida; we could use more companies, owners, and professional technicians like the team at CDS.

Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jordan Patascher
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough great things about CDS Plumbing Services. From the very first phone call to the completion of the job, the entire experience was professional, smooth, and stress-free. They were quick to respond, scheduled the appointment promptly, and showed up exactly when they said they would. That alone already sets them apart from many companies.

Their team is extremely knowledgeable and clearly experienced. They took the time to thoroughly assess the issue, explain what was going on, and walk me through the options before starting any work. I really appreciated how transparent and honest they were — no upselling, no pressure, just straightforward recommendations and fair pricing.

The workmanship was outstanding. Everything was done carefully, up to code, and with attention to detail. You can tell they take pride in what they do. They kept the work area clean, respected my property, and made sure everything was functioning perfectly before leaving.

What impressed me most was their professionalism and communication. They kept me informed throughout the entire process and made sure I was satisfied before wrapping up. It’s hard to find contractors who genuinely care about customer service the way CDS Plumbing Services does.

If you’re looking for a dependable, honest, and skilled plumbing company that stands behind their work, I highly recommend CDS Plumbing Services. They exceeded my expectations, and I will absolutely be calling them again for any future plumbing needs. Five stars all the way!

reviews.author: Tahrea
reviews.text: CDC plumbing was such an amazing company to work with!! From Josh who made me feel comfortable with the drain line job and knew what he was doing!!!  (two other companies wanted to tear my whole kitchen and ceiling a part and charge me 7 times the amount!!) Josh made the job quick and painless!! Nora was very responsive with scheduling and handling any questions I had. I can not say enough good things about my experience. I will be calling CDC plumbing from now on!

reviews.author: Ayla Tomlin
reviews.text:
CDS Plumbing is a nightmare. Be ready to manage your own project, check their progress, and call many times wondering why they are destroying your house. While they replaced our sewage line and it works, everything else was disastrous.

I have much more to share and extensive video evidence showing their complete disregard for our home, but Google Reviews won’t accept videos and has a maximum character count which I clearly met.

What they did right:
- Replaced the entire sewage line at a fair price.
- Plumbing has worked so far.

What went wrong:
- Workers left doors/windows open with the A/C running.
- Trash and debris were left everywhere; we had to clean it ourselves.
- Cracked bathroom tiles.
- Dirt and debris from floor work piled onto living room floors with no protection.
- Concrete splattered on baseboards and flooring, causing permanent damage.

The concrete work after plumbing was done by a different company. It was so uneven that floors and laundry room couldn’t be finished. CDS “fixed” it by bringing the same company back, who sanded everything with zero protection. Our entire home was coated in concrete dust on ALL surfaces—furniture, vents, cabinets, clothes, dishes, pantry items, you name it.

Cleanup was brutal. Six family members spent four full days moving out our home, cleaning everything off-site, laundering clothes and bedding, and washing dishes elsewhere. CDS only sent 4–5 cleaners who were reluctant and limited; the cleaning company confirmed CDS minimized staff and refused additional help.

After moving back in, concrete dust continued to come through our air vents and settle on our belongings. Given that I have two children, I requested professional air duct cleaning due to health concerns. The owner was again rude and reluctant.

We never asked for reimbursement for housing, utility costs, or the extra week displaced. Even so, CDS resisted. Dust continued to come through vents, forcing professional air duct cleaning for health reasons. The owner was rude, dismissive, and at one point said he would “not spend another penny,” showing zero concern for our safety or family.

Additional issues:
- A worker failed to reconnect a pipe, flooding our laundry room.
- Bathroom vanity measured incorrectly and is off-center.
- Laundry room vanity installed at an angle; sink leans forward and won’t drain.
- I repeatedly had to inspect the home and property to find unfinished work and leftover debris, requiring multiple return visits.
- Workers smoked marijuana in our backyard twice.

Final thoughts:
Plumbing works, but everything else was handled with zero professionalism. Damage to our home, unsafe conditions, poor workmanship, and dismissive ownership made this extremely stressful. Avoid CDS Plumbing if you value your home, health, or peace of mind.

Pic 1: Bathroom vanity crooked and off the wall due to bad measurements. Last item left incomplete.
Pic 2: Concrete spot in front yard left behind.
Pic 3: Computer covered in dust after unprotected sanding.
Pic 4: Bathroom items coated in dust.
Pic 5: Bedroom floor left unprotected.
Pic 6: Portion of kitchen/household items removed for cleaning; clothing laundered elsewhere.
Pic 7: Cracked bathroom tile.
Pic 8: Living room floor left uncovered, causing damage.
Pic 9: Dust everywhere throughout the home.
Pic 10: Pantry emptied and cleaned.
Pic 11: Closet dust; workers questioned if cleaning was needed.
Pic 12: Mattresses and large items removed; workers resisted sending help.
Pic 13: Yard debris left; I had to call them back.
Pic 14: Bags and children’s shoes coated in dust.

plumbers.name: Emergency Plumbing service
plumbers.address: 449 Lakeside Pl, Highland Park, IL 60035, USA

reviews.author: Paul Tsupin
reviews.text: I’ve had an excellent experience with this plumbing company across my home and multiple other properties. Their service is always prompt, honest, and professional. The team is extremely knowledgeable, takes the time to answer all questions clearly, and consistently resolves issues the right way the first time. Communication is outstanding from start to finish, which is rare and very much appreciated. Reliable, transparent, and high-quality work every time. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Orlando
reviews.text: Konstantin reached out and was able to squeeze me in last minute to provide assistance and repair a copper pipe that was damaged during a remodel project. That speed in which he replied and showed up for the repair, the professionalism, the knowledge, and the efficiency he displayed during the short, quick visit was phenomenal. Well worth the price of service.

reviews.author: Ziyad Nazem
reviews.text: I’ve used this plumbing service several times, and every experience has been excellent. They are always prompt, reliable, and available when needed, and their rates are very reasonable. The quality of work has consistently been great, and I’ve never had an issue. Konstantin, in particular, does a fantastic job—professional, courteous, and efficient. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Aaron
reviews.text:
$35,000 DISASTER FROM A SIMPLE CLOGGED TOILET!!!

We called "Emergency Plumbing" with a clogged toilet in August 2024. After their plumber visited us, we ended up with THREE ROOMS DESTROYED BY WATER AND SEWAGE, costing $35,000 IN REPAIRS that took SEVERAL MONTHS, and then later getting dropped by our brand new homeowners insurance due to the claim!

"Emergency Plumbing" happily took my several hundred dollars in payment for "clearing the clogged toilet". They have offered no recompense for causing our massive loss. But, to their credit, they did say "sorry" a couple times.

THE FULL, DISGUSTING, DANGEROUS, SAD STORY:

In August 2024 I called about a clogged toilet I couldn't plunge clear. They were able to schedule a plumber for early in the morning.

He tried an auger to clear the clog, to no avail. So, he asked to see the sewer cleanout. We went to the basement, where things were about to go DANGEROUSLY BAD.

He opened up the cleanout and A FIRE HOSE RIVER OF SEWAGE immediately began to spray out onto him and our finished basement. He panicked and asked for garbage cans / bags to catch the sewage river.

My wife brought down some large utility garbage bags. The plumber and I held up and filled about 3-4 large bags of sewage over our heads during the next several minutes before the flow finally stopped and he could cap off the cleanout. He reassured me by saying, "sometimes stuff like this happens". We were both drenched in sewage from head to toe. Some had splashed in my eyes and mouth.

He started to hand mop up the large sewage puddle with some paper towels. I told him "don't bother, this all will need a mitigation company". He replied, "all you really need is some soap and water". Ummm no.

We dried off, shedded clothes and went back upstairs. The toilet still wouldn't drain, so he said he'd drive back to get the larger auger. He asked if I had any toilets upstairs, and I replied yes. He said "OK, you can use your upstairs toilet and shower, just don't use the clogged one down here". He left and I started to shower.

After showering I came back down to the main floor to discover that SHOWER WATER WAS GUSHING OUT OF THE TOILET INTO OUR BATHROOM AND HALLWAY!!! More fun!

In the second panic of the day, I tried my best to dam up the NEW RIVER OF WATER now FLOODING my main level hardwood floors. I ran downstairs to see even more water now soaking many ceiling tiles and raining onto the sauna and floor.

I called the plumber and the head plumber agreed to come join the fun. He arrived, I explain the scene, and he said "Oh no, he should never have told you to use the fixtures upstairs". Oh no!

The first plumber later returned with the larger auger. They managed to clear the clog with it. They did some hand mopping up of the now destroyed first floor powder room, hallway, hall closet, and living room. They asked for a check for several hundred dollars, said sorry for the problems, took my check and left.

The next day we opted for a water & sewage mitigation company, rather than the plumber's recommendation of "soap and water". We then watched much of our house get ripped apart and endured days of loud fans a dehumidifiers.

The insurance claim process and reconstruction took place over the next couple months. We had to cancel our Thanksgiving party, as we were still wrapping up the rebuild by then.In the weeks after the plumbing adventure, I texted and called the plumber, hoping to get some recompense for this disaster, maybe cover my insurance deductible, maybe even my money back? We talked on the phone once and I made my case. He didn't offer anything at all. Haven't heard from them since.

0 STARS - CANNOT RECOMMEND FOR ANY PLUMBING WORK. Maybe the head plumber is good? But whatever junior plumber they sent to unclog my toilet basically destroyed much of my new house. They were arrived on time and were friendly to talk to, though, tiny bonus points for that. ONE QUARTER OF A STAR

reviews.author: Igor Khaletskiy
reviews.text: I hired Emergency Plumbing to install a new water heater and was very impressed. Konstantin, the master technician, explained everything clearly and did an excellent job. The work was done quickly, professionally, and at a fair price. I’m very satisfied and would recommend them to anyone.

reviews.author: Hershel Perlmutter
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience with Edgar as he replaced our kitchen sink drain system. I'd highly recommend Edgar and J. Blanton for any of your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Logan Cook
reviews.text: Greg was very professional and knowledgeable. He made quick work of our toilet repair and was willing to double check the plumbing underneath to ensure we didn’t have any other connected problems. Would recommend.

reviews.author: Christopher C.
reviews.text: Dominic ran into some very large build up during the cleaning, but was able to modify his approach to make sure the job was done perfectly. Very thankful for his expertise and service.

reviews.author: Bill Keller
reviews.text: Cameron showed up in time, was super knowledgeable, friendly and paid attention to detail.  He offered advice, conscious about the property and building shut off time frame.  He made sure that all water sources in my condo were working when finished.   Well worth the time and money spent.

reviews.author: Carmen Bello
reviews.text: Zach Staar was the technician we had out to our building to help diagnose some plumbing issues. He is a great guy to work with and is very thorough and up front and explains everything in detail. You can tell he's a guy who cares about the work he does and wants to do the right thing for the home owner. It's increasingly rare to find people like that these days so it was a breath of fresh air working with him.

plumbers.name: 1-800-PLUMBER +AIR
plumbers.address: 351 E Main St, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Joseph Rivera
reviews.text: My experience was as good as it gets. In 2017 my sewer and gas lines were replaced to the main. Unfortunately I didn’t have the right plumbing company. They only did the bare minimum.  Now in 2025 my drains weren’t draining so 1800 plumber of Yukon+ air assessed my situation and thank the lord I had coverage from HomeServe who covered me for 1500 of my bill . The plumbing team was awesome, courteous and professional. My job took one day to complete and they removed cast iron and lead pipes from 1951 and put pvc everywhere drains were needed for my home. They up sold me a back flow preventer which if I ever need it will definitely be worth it.

reviews.author: TERRY JOHNSON
reviews.text: Floor drain was backed up, the technician (Travis) who came out was completely awesome. His whole goal was to make sure I was satisfied. This comment is truly not about the service but the great work that he did, to get the drain unclogged. He was professional, determined and most of all honest! his work ethics are impeccable and you don't find many like that these days. Great Job Travis and continue to serve your customers the way you do!

reviews.author: eugene McCarrell
reviews.text: Excellent work! Travis and his helper came to do repair on my dripping shower. They came courtesy of my home warranty company and they were very respectful, as I had another person in my home at the same time. They did a first class job. I have to replace the drywall but it is great knowing that the drip has stopped.  I now have full access to my shower. Thank you.

reviews.author: Freda Yamah
reviews.text: Owner is extremely rude. He yelled at me so bad because I called to get clarification as to why my garage disposal is no longer sitting in my sink aligned well like it was prior to them removing it to perform the job. He told me to meet him at the unit the next day so he could show me exactly but the way he yelled at me on the phone no way I was going to meet him in person. No way he should feel comfortable speaking to anyone like that it was absurd!!

reviews.author: Yohana Sheridan
reviews.text:
This company was assigned to me through my home warranty. The representative who came out to do the inspection was absolutely amazing, professional, friendly, and thorough. However, the person handling the finances, Vince, was extremely disappointing. I was overcharged by hundreds of dollars. After shopping around, I easily found a much cheaper quote.

I even called back because I wanted the original rep, who was so kind and helpful, to have the job. Instead, Vince told me to find someone else. So I did, and my new water heater is now being installed for hundreds of dollars less.

woohoo!

William and Rickie

STACEE SPURLING

reviews.author: Ms. Ti
reviews.text: Anna and Matt Biggs are the best. I would entrust a major plumbing deal with this company. Anna and Matt are very knowledgeable. The two have empathy for the situation one may encounter. The two most certainly place my mind at ease. I would most certainly recommend this company. High Quality service.

reviews.author: Rebecca Barnes
reviews.text: A few months ago, William did a great job converting my old gas water heater, which was leaking and needed to be replaced, with a new heat pump water heater. The craftsmanship was of high quality to make sure pipes and angles all worked, and it has been working great ever since. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Meg Dietzel
reviews.text: Highly recommend! Ask for Rick, he’s the best! I had a leak coming through my ceiling and he quickly figured out the issue and repaired it. He even helped me solution an issue I’ve had with my pipes freezing for 4 years!

reviews.author: Harendra Kumar
reviews.text: I recently had a major water leak in my front yard, and I’m extremely impressed with the work done by William and Joe from Overflow Service. Their diagnostic skills were top-notch—they quickly identified the root cause of the issue and presented me with a clear plan of action. Their estimations were spot on, and the quality of their work was outstanding. They dug and fixed the leak at the exact right spot, and everything was done professionally and efficiently. I highly recommend them for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Lisbeth Lynn
reviews.text: During some bathroom renovations our contractor found some piping issues.  Miracle Plumbing came out the next day and fixed the issue without any problem.  Very competent and good work.  Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Jean Pressel
reviews.text:
Miracle’s plumbers did a wonderful job installing new faucets for our bathtub. They came to our house the same day we called them. Our faucet wouldn’t turn off the hot water. We
recommend them and will hire them again!

reviews.author: Kassandra Maldonado
reviews.text: Three plumbings companies came to our apartment to give us estimate for bathtub faucet leak. Miracle came out and was lowest  price. Thank God! We found for a quality plumber with the license and insurance. Miracle treated us like family from the begining.

reviews.author: Chadwick Calkins
reviews.text: These guys showed up and we’re so nice, professional, and respectful. The job ended up being bigger than anticipated but they stayed until it was completed without complaining and honored the quoted price. I will use them for my hair salon business and for my home from now on!

reviews.author: Vijaya Teralandur
reviews.text: Miracle Plumbing did an excellent job replacing our water servicing lines. Liran Levy was a pleasure to work with. Starting from the initial contact up to the completion of the work, Li stayed engaged with the project and ensured the work was completed satisfactorily. I highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Kris R
reviews.text: Called Sunday morning for a busted hot water heater. Evan was quick to respond to the dispatch call and showed right up. He assessed the problem, described what was wrong, explained the situation and solution. Then he wasted no time getting started. The whole situation took a lot less time than I expected. He was very polite and personable. His work was great. I have used Dean Plumbing in the past and they will always be my first choice. Happy I do not have to spend the weekend without hot water.

reviews.author: Steven Nelson
reviews.text: I appreciate the quick response of Dean Plumbing. Braxton did a great job. He communicated what he was going to do and kept me updated on his progress and on costs.  Both gentlemen were professional and courteous. And he accomplished the task which was unclogging my daughter's pipes and making sure there were no backups. Good work

reviews.author: Shayne Howell

They did an excellent (and thorough) job, especially dealing with the oddities of plumbing that old.  All the work was completed in the 2 and a half days they quoted and it's so wonderful to have actual water flow again!  I couldn't ask for a more professional, responsive, and friendly experience.

reviews.author: Amy Harvey
reviews.text: This was my first time using Dean Plumbing. I called them and Evan showed up to my house within 30 minutes. He was professional and completed the job in a timely manner. I will definitely use them again for future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Denise Patterson
reviews.text: Evan was very professional, repaired leak at gas meter then verified fire pit and gas logs worked correctly after repair. Efficient work, fair price, came to repair the problem very quickly.  I am very thankful to have everything working safely again especially with a snow and ice storm of significant potential coming this weekend. Bonus was instruction on how to prevent damage to pipes correctly with extreme cold temps coming this weekend! Will definitely call Dean’s anytime I need plumbing / gas repairs!

He did an excellent job, nice and neat and precise and cleaned up after himself. He leaked checked all of the fittings before he departed and very happy with the results.

reviews.author: Nathan Henry
reviews.text: J. Henry Plumbing did a great job. I had a shower replaced by New Bath today and when they came to install the new shower pan, but the drain and water stubs were not in the wall, blocking the new installation. reviews.author: Jim Stanco
reviews.text: Mr. Conner Troup was very nice and professional. He listened to my concerns about Huntsville utilities recent repairs to a water main in front our house that possibly causing a surge in water pressure causing our T&P valve to pop! . He was honest and said our hot water heater is fine after inspection. He suggested a new T&P replacement as a precautionary measure. He also replaced the drain valve with a ball valve to ease in the suggested drain of our tank a few times a year to prolong the hot water heaters life. I have your number so when it’s time to replace the hot water heater I’m going lot call J. Henry Plumbing. Thanks again Conner.

reviews.author: Donna Bartlett
reviews.text: Dustin did a great job and knew what he was doing. He took the time to find the issue we were having unlike previous plumbers and fixed it. The price was a little high but was in line with other plumbers. Bottom line great service, job well done, average price. I would recommend this plumber.

reviews.author: Scott Haas

Always very responsive and never had to call them back to redo anything.  Every tech I have had was respectful and competent.  I have several rental properties and my own house and will always use them for plumbing issues.

He took time to explain everything needed to correctly replace my leaking water heater.  The work was completed in a couple of hours without a mess and at competitive rates.  I would highly recommend using Direct Source Plumbing and will use them again when another plumbing issue arises.
