reviews.text: Came out and did an amazing job. David was not only very honest and upfront but very timely and communication was very clear and concise. He came out to fix a shower diverter that 3 other plumbers couldn’t figure out and in under 5 minutes was able to properly diagnose it. Will be using him for more projects for sure.

reviews.author: Jay Salisbury
reviews.text: David was able to get out the day after I called. He showed up at the time that we scheduled made a quick inspection of the items I wanted repaired and gave me a quote on the spot. The quote was competitive and I asked if he could get the work done immediately and he said yes. He completed the repairs within just a few hours, and everything was done professionally and without a mess. I definitely recommend Direct Source Plumbing to anyone in need of plumbing repairs or new service.

reviews.author: Brian Dally
reviews.text: I had first called 2 other plumbers for a whole house stoppage to come diagnose the problem. The first was at night, charged me an emergency service call fee, arrived and took a quick look at it and then quoted me an extra large amount for the next step to  fully diagnose the issue. I decided to get a second opinion and called a another company who then came out the following morning, took my service call payment first, tried to diagnose the clog, then said they couldn’t tell what it was but would required a massive excavation in the front yard at an excessive amount of money to further diagnose. I couldn’t get a straight answer on some of my questions and just had a feeling something wasn’t right. After they left, and quite frustrated because I felt I was getting nowhere fast, I then called Direct Source Plumbing and spoke with Amie who was very helpful in taking my call, took detailed notes, and with a sense of urgency, relayed my message to the plumber. In a short time, I received a call from Tyler who gave me an good idea of what needed to be done to diagnose the issue. When he arrived he was extremely polite and knowledgeable about the situation, and took the time to explain to me what he was doing, so that I  fully understood each step, and ultimately ended up diagnosing and fixing the problem. He even called and had the master plumber, David, confirm and verify his diagnosis. This is how I wish all service calls could be! Tyler is the perfect example of how the ideal repairmen should be. I believe this company and religious-based group is in business for the right reasons, to truly help people when they need it. I can’t possibly recommend them enough! True professionals! Thank you again!

reviews.author: Zeke Thomas
reviews.text: We have used DSP a few times now and they are always honorable and have great customer service. They are fair and a company I feel you can trust. David came out and I appreciated his experience and integrity. Thank you.

plumbers.name: Beehive Plumbing Orem
plumbers.address: 1145 S 800 E Suite 213, Orem, UT 84097, USA

reviews.author: Sharon Montoya
reviews.text:
Josh was very nice and professional.  Did quick work to get my hot water back on. So maybe I take back what I said within an hour of fixing it we still don't have hot water and it's doing the exact same thing I called for that he fixed! It's been 6 hrs since he left , 5hours since I called and told them it's not working,  said he would call me to walk me through a couple things . Still haven't heard from him . I paid over $500 today and still don't have hot water!!
I don't recommend them.

reviews.author: Selma Griffith
reviews.text: All plumbers that worked on our building today were great. Very transparent, friendly, went above & beyond. It was a long day, they did great.

reviews.author: sharee wilson
reviews.text: Tristen was Awesome! He communicated through the whole process. He was very detailed in everything that he worked on, our house is under contract and these are items that the inspector called out.  We were able to get  Behive Plumbing out there the next day to get everything fixed and get our report back to the buyers, that everything had been taken care of! We are very grateful for Tristen and Behive Plumbing. Would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Cameron Elder
reviews.text:
Jordan Ostler was prompt, professional
, and knowledgeable. He quickly addressed the problem and offered solutions. He also offered preventative measures to ensure the issue was a one time issue. Beyond being a professional, he was also sympathetic. Fantastic customer service all around from the initial set up to the actual service itself.

reviews.author: Natalie Bradshaw
reviews.text: Beehive plumbing was very responsive when I reached out and they were able to come same day within an hour or two. We had Benjamin and Maverick come to our house and they were very kind and professional. They were great with my kids who wanted to see what they were doing and “help.” Thank you!

plumbers.name: Goettl's High Desert Mechanical
plumbers.address: 8001 E State Rte 69 STE F, Prescott Valley, AZ 86314, USA

reviews.author: bobdon sanders
reviews.text: Thomas was nice and prioritized and explained the parts and maintenance needed.  We paid $1,400 for everything he recommended but wish he would have voluntarily shown us the old and new parts.  I asked him and he mentioned they were in the truck and could show us if we wanted.  I said thats OK.  Just gotta trust Goettl I suppose...ugh

reviews.author: Joan Griffin
reviews.text: The service technician, Moe, was prompt, professional and cordial.  During his inspection he reviewed the options for further maintenance and upgrade. He gave the pros and cons of each system in regards to my situation and hvac needs.  He was knowledgeable and clear in his presentation.  I felt very comfortable with my decision in going forward with his recommendation.  Thank you. Jg

reviews.author: Debra Horan
reviews.text: We had our yearly maintenance check completed and couldn’t be more pleased with the service. Thomas was extremely knowledgeable, thorough, and took the time to patiently explain what was needed for our unit in a way that was easy to understand. We never felt rushed, and all of our questions were answered clearly. It’s refreshing to work with someone who is both professional and genuinely cares about doing the job right. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jerry Carrier
reviews.text:
Thomas Pride did an excellent job of inspecting our HVAC system.  Upon inspection a bid for replacement of a plenum duct above the HVAC unit was submitted which I may have done in future.   At this time the system works perfectly so no repair was scheduled.   Thomas was very thorough in explaining that the HVAC system was clean and working proper internally.  Part of the inspection was to replace three return air filters.
This will satisfy our warranty with the LENNOX product manufacturer.
Thanks go to Thomas Pride for a job well done.
Jerry Carrier

reviews.author: Brindy Bringhurst
reviews.text: Jaxon was super helpful. Did a full inspection of our system and gave honest recommendations on what is needed and why. Showed me photos and measurements. Very thorough. The office is also very pleasant to work with. They’re the first I call for any HVAC needs in cottonwood.

plumbers.name: Reliant Plumbing - Dallas
plumbers.address: 2702 Manor Way, Dallas, TX 75235, USA

reviews.author: Sofia Romero
reviews.text:
Asa from Reliant Plumbing has been out here a lot over the past couple of weeks, and he’s been great every single time. He’s incredibly kind, always explains what’s going on, is honest and genuinely helpful. Even with repeat issues, he stays patient and makes the process way less stressful.
Booking an appointment is also super convenient. The representatives do a wonderful job getting someone out ASAP, which we really appreciate. Overall, great experiences all around and I know they’ll always deliver 😎

reviews.author: Brittany King
reviews.text:
Outstanding Service from Reliant Plumbing!

Mark and James from Reliant Plumbing came out to replace my water heater, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. They were professional, friendly, and very knowledgeable. They explained everything clearly, worked efficiently, and made sure the job was done right before leaving. The area was left clean, and the new water heater is working perfectly. I truly appreciate their great attitude and quality workmanship. I highly recommend Reliant Plumbing, and especially Mark and James, for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Hannah Allison
reviews.text: James and Mark did an absolutely amazing job on my water heater. From start to finish, they were professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly efficient. They took the time to explain what was going on, answered all my questions, and made sure everything was working perfectly before they left. The quality of their work was outstanding, and they left the area clean and tidy. It’s clear they take real pride in what they do. I couldn’t be happier with the service and would highly recommend James and Mark to anyone needing water heater or plumbing work!

reviews.author: Mickey Vogt
reviews.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Mark and James did an exceptional job replacing our water line. From start to finish, they were professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly efficient. They took the time to explain the process, answered all our questions, and made sure everything was done right the first time. The work area was kept clean, and the job was completed on schedule with great attention to detail. It’s clear they take pride in their work. I highly recommend Mark and James to anyone needing water line replacement or plumbing work—top-notch service all around!

reviews.author: Terry Allison
reviews.text: The technician James, that was sent out was very polite and very professional. Even put on protectors to protect my floor I called them because I had a warm spot on my floor he asked me a few questions.  And it turns out that I have had several slab leaks from the research that he done, and he gave us a few different quotes.We went ahead and proceeded with a whole house water supply repipe and i could not be more happy with the services that I was provided. James walked me through everything and made sure that there was no lack of communication, I highly recommend reliant, pointing for all of your plumbing knees in the DFW area

plumbers.name: Tri-State Plumbing, Electrical, and Septic
plumbers.address: 1801 Rutherford Rd, Greenville, SC 29609, USA

reviews.author: Amy E
reviews.text: The team was great to work with. From their customer service and communications (Samantha) to the actual repair / installation (Tim, Aaron, and Ronnie) we had a wonderful experience. They took the time to make sure we understood the details of the project, worked with us on pricing, were able to promptly schedule within two weeks of the date we committed to the project, and took the time to clean up the site and level out the dirt when they were done. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: The Massey's of Carolina
reviews.text:
The team showed up at our home and were extremely professional and efficient. Thank you Jacob and Josh for being so courteous and informative regarding our plumbing matter. Kudos to you both

Rev. Massey

reviews.author: Michelle
reviews.text:
I am a property manager and a member of the Upstate Apartment Association. We contracted this company to replace a sewer/drain line, but instead of completing the full replacement, they only applied a patch. The line was still leaking when they left, and when contacted for warranty support, they declined to take responsibility.

Unfortunately, the level of professionalism and follow-through is not what it used to be. This is what can happen when the person who ensured accountability and results is no longer with the company. I will be sharing this experience with others in the association to help them make informed decisions.

reviews.author: Taurus Cohen
reviews.text:
All we knew was that there was a loud noise and then we could tell water was running from somewhere. My husband called Tri-State and was able to make an appointment for the next morning. Jacob came out and advised us of the issue and gave us a quote. He gave us time to discuss and make a decision while he waited patiently in his work vehicle
There was no pressure at all
We agreed and he went straight to work!! He was super pleasant and easy to work with . So was Barbara when we spoke over the phone. I am 100% satisfied! Thanks Jacob!

reviews.author: Alan
reviews.text: Tri-State Electrical and Plumbing began work on a property I manage in North Carolina. Shortly after the project started, a local inspector arrived and issued a stop order, as the company did not hold the required license to perform the work.

plumbers.name: Jack's All-American Plumbing
plumbers.address: 315 Roemer Way, Santa Maria, CA 93454, USA

reviews.author: Allie
reviews.text:
This company installed our water softener and the system leaked resin beads into our entire home. They knew the damage this causes, never told us, and claimed it was ‘fixed.’ Over the next year we had failing appliances, pressure issues, leaks, and now potential mold. They refused to acknowledge any responsibility and even charged us full price for a premature water heater replacement caused by their mistake. This is unethical and dangerous service.

*** Thank you for the reply. I will not be calling. For documentation and transparency, I prefer all communication in writing.

To clarify the situation: we have time-stamped photos of the original installation because we were excited to show our family the “upgrade.” These photos clearly show that the water softener was installed incorrectly the first time. The two connection tubes were reversed. When resin beads began leaking into our plumbing, your team returned, swapped out the softener, and reconnected the lines the only other possible way… confirming that the original installation was backwards. We had to discover this ourselves after reviewing the photos.

At no point did anyone warn us of the long-term consequences of resin beads entering a home’s plumbing system. We were told the issue was “fixed,” yet over the next year we experienced repeated leaks, failing appliances, pressure issues, and now potential mold. I have time stamped documentation of all of the above. My boyfriend even had to take a full week of vacation from his night-shift job to deal with the water heater leak that developed almost a year later… damage that directly aligns with resin bead contamination your technician never disclosed.

Because of the MAJOR installation errors, the lack of warning, and the ongoing issues we’ve had to correct ourselves, I no longer feel I can trust your company to give accurate information or handle this responsibly. That is why I am insisting on written communication only.

At this point, I need clear written answers to the following:
1.	How resin beads entered our plumbing system
2.	Whether the original installation met manufacturer specifications
3.	Why we were not informed of risks, symptoms, or what to look for after bead discharge
4.	What corrective action your company is prepared to take

I will continue communication only by email so everything can be properly documented. I look forward to your written response.

reviews.author: Dmb B
reviews.text: We don’t usually review places, but we made an exception. We just wanted to say that we called a couple of plumbing places and Jack’s plumbing was the most reasonable price out there. Not only were they on time, kind & loyal to their price!! They were quick, and did it fantastic job. We were very happy customers. We would Absolutely recommend Jack’s Plumbing!!!

reviews.author: Christine Haubruge
reviews.text: Unfortunately we found a leak in the shower. We had to take out some of the tile and then modify The pressure balance valve trim. Mark gave it his all to please me since I wasn’t going to be able to have quite what I had imagined. The job turned out great. So did all the faucets and other bathtub fixtures.

reviews.author: Call Krista
reviews.text:
So the day before there was a backup at our office building that impacted 3 different offices.
Jacks plumbing came out and cleared the line and in the process of it scratched my new toilet.

When I called them I didn't expect to have any thing but just an I'm sorry.
However today they sent Jeff and Carson out and not only took care of the toilet but also was willing to haul off an old toilet at no cost or charge.
They certainly put Customer service as a high priority.
The only reason for the 4 Stars was I wish I didn't have to call them for the second visit, however it's always better to have a good experience in the end and that was their goal well done thank you Jeff and Carson and Jacks!

reviews.author: roland jennings
reviews.text: My water heater was on its last leg and was making a booming noise, called up jack’s plumber, since we had used them before they came out quickly installed a new one and had hot water that night I was highly impressed with Nathan and Jeff I highly recommend them and this company

plumbers.name: Duvall Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 312 S Coltrane Rd, Edmond, OK 73034, USA

reviews.author: Todd Dobberstein
reviews.text: Rip off. Had a leak that needed to be repaired quickly. I had already removed all the drywall and done the work to find the leak. They were able to come out and fix quickly but charged $650 for 30 minutes of work, about 4 ft of pex, and a couple connectors. Definitely took advantage of me and my situation. Won’t use them again.

reviews.author: Eli Glass
reviews.text: I had an outdoor faucet that wouldn't stop leaking and needed replaced. A lovely receptionist answered my call on a Saturday (Easter weekend at that) and had me scheduled for Monday. 2 professional and easy to talk to guys, Cayde and Rob had an earlier opening on Monday and where able to come out earlier and replace the faucet. This wasn't an average repair as they had to remove a tile in the shower to get to the back of the wall where the outdoor faucet was located and then had to fix the janky work that was previously done 40 years ago. The guys had no problem doing some problem solving and handled the curve ball efficiently and like it was nothing. They got it all taken care of for a reasonable price (Around $400) and my dripping outdoor faucet is no more.

reviews.author: Ginny Schiefer
reviews.text: I would give zero stars if I could. They repaired a slab leak at my house two years ago, and their work was so shoddy that I had to spend another $1700 today to have it repaired. I have attached photos so you can see their mess. Save yourself money and use another company.

reviews.author: Cooper Cadle
reviews.text: I've heard it said you can only pick two of these three, "fast, cheap, good". If it's good and cheap, it won't be fast. If it's fast and cheap, it won't be good. If it's good and fast, it won't be cheap. Duvall is the first company I have worked with that is all three. You will not regret working with them.

reviews.author: Brianna McAlvain
reviews.text: Duvall doesn’t even exist. They were bought out by Airco. This is false advertising and a scheme to dupe customers into thinking they’re using one company, and then another actually shows up. Shady.

plumbers.name: Flow Bros Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4408 Kelly Elliott Rd, Arlington, TX 76017, USA

reviews.author: Yao
reviews.text: After struggling with clogged yard drains, I chose Flow Bros based on their outstanding reviews.  Jacob and Stephen worked efficiently to get everything cleared and flowing properly again. The pricing was fair and transparent, with no surprises. I truly appreciate their expertise and will definitely use them for future plumbing needs. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: kowonia davis
reviews.text:
Here’s a polished, high-quality review you can use or post:

**⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Flow Bros Plumbing is outstanding!
I couldn’t be happier with their service. The team is extremely trustworthy, reliable, and honest—qualities that are hard to find these days. They showed up exactly on time, clearly explained the issue, and gave fair, upfront pricing with no surprises. The work was done efficiently and with great attention to detail. It’s clear they take pride in what they do and truly care about their customers. If you’re looking for a plumbing company you can depend on, Flow Bros Plumbing is the one to call. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: James Milton
reviews.text: Flow Bros was recommended to us after we discovered a leak in our yard. They were able to come out same day. Stephen was great - prompt, polite and knowledgeable. He explained the process, gave us an estimate and fixed the leak within a couple of hours at a reasonable price. We will be using them for future plumbing needs. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Theresa Jorgensen
reviews.text: Highly recommend Flow Bros.  They replaced all of the cast iron sewer lines under our 2,000 sq. ft. home, fully tunneling under the slab, about 100 linear feet.  Master plumber Jacob and his teammate Stephen did all the plumbing, replacing all cast iron sewer lines with PVC and drilling new drains through the slab in the kitchen and laundry.  Also replaced sewer line out to the street.  Jacob was super easy to work with.  Communication was always quick and straightforward, work was completed quickly, and all of our questions were fully addressed.  Jacob has decades of experience at replacing cast iron sewer pipes under homes, and it showed.   Cost was very competitive.  We are thoroughly pleased with Flow Bros and the high quality work they did for us.

reviews.author: Ron & Kate Allen
reviews.text: If you want an honest, reliable plumber who does good work, shows up when they say they will show up, communicates openly and honestly, provides full transparency, and offers fair and competitive rates, this is the company.  I got three quotes for a slab leak repair, and of the three companies who quoted the work to me, Jacob from Flow Bros was the only one who took the time to break down what all would entail, accurately diagnose the issue, give me a thorough and concise breakdown of the repair, and offer pricing that was transparent and fair.  Once the leak was located,  and the repair ended up being quicker and simpler than originally quoted, they adjusted the price accordingly, which ended up saving a significant amount of money not only over the competitors quotes, but over their original quote.  Thanks Jacob and thanks, Flow Bros for a great experience.  We will recommend you to everyone we know.

plumbers.name: Plumbing Unit
plumbers.address: 6704 McCallum Blvd, Dallas, TX 75252, USA

reviews.author: Enyer Barber
reviews.text: I’m in Plano and had a leaking shower valve that finally gave out. Plumbing Units came out, removed the old worn-out valve, and installed a brand-new one with no issues at all. The work was clean, efficient, and done with real attention to detail. My shower is running perfectly now with no leaks at all. Great service, fair pricing, and very professional crew. I will definitely use them again.

reviews.author: TriAngel Investment Group
reviews.text: We recently experienced an issue with the gas line leading to our fireplace, and Zach and his team handled it exceptionally well. They quickly diagnosed the problem, completed the necessary repairs, and ensured everything was functioning properly before finishing the job. They also addressed related non-plumbing items to make sure the entire project was handled thoroughly. We truly appreciated their professionalism, attention to detail, and commitment to making sure we were completely satisfied with the work.

reviews.author: kelly mills
reviews.text: Zack did a great job replacing a loose flange under my toilet. He went over and beyond securing and sealing it so there will be no future issues. He included a warranty, was very polite, on time, polite, and had great quality work. This company is very reliable and quick to provide you service as soon as you need it. I would highly recommend Plumbing Unit! Thank you!!

reviews.author: Judy Tribble
reviews.text: This amazing company is so great!!! They act so fast to help you!!! During this last week during another Texas crazy storm,  went above to assist me with faucet covers so my pipes didn't bust. They sent an amazing employee to put faucet covers on my outside ones. Not only did he come out early he also tightened my leaking ones. Highly recommend!!!!!! Thank you soooo much!!! I will recommend this company to everyone I know!!!! Keep up the great service!!!❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

reviews.author: David Grams
reviews.text:
Nathan and Eric did a great job on a hard to remove faucet cartridge and tub drain.  They are very professional and took the appropriate time to get the job done right.

I use Knee Deep Plumbing for all my plumbing projects.

plumbers.name: Zoom Drain
plumbers.address: 1220 Satterwhite Rd Ste 1104, Buda, TX 78610, USA

reviews.author: Mercedes Flint
reviews.text: We are quite new to having a house with a septic tank, so when we realized it was time to have it pumped, we did some research online to find a highly rated company. We quickly called Zoom Drain who got to our house within a few days (not an emergency) and we had an absolutely amazing experience! Austin Craig showed up and addressed any questions or concerns we had, and was very friendly and had a great attitude on a cold morning! Would definitely recommend using Zoom Drain!

reviews.author: Hammond Hendrix
reviews.text:
I can't say enough good things about Zoom Drain.
They are prompt and always do a great job cleaning our old cast iron drain.
Particularly, Austin is the gentleman we request because he has always affords "top notch"  service.
That said, I highly recommend Zoom Drain (and Austin) for your next cast iron drain cleaning service.
Note: Zoom Drain offers a regularly scheduled drain cleaning service that can save you money if you need it.

reviews.author: Camille Buzbee
reviews.text: JC is the best. We had a clog that just wouldn’t quit and he came out 3 times to help us get it fixed. Each time he stayed late and worked extra to make sure we’re in a good place. Top notch service, and just an overall cool dude. Thanks, JC!

reviews.author: ashley krystal
reviews.text:
(As you can see by their reply to their review they are not able to take accountability for their actions/damage that they did and are shifting blame onto the client. I DID request text communication and the AMOUNT and METHOD of communication was fine - they just never apologized or even acknowledged how their business has caused me a loss of revenue. Their response to their review shows EXACTLY who they are, that they gave me my money back, treated me like a liar, and never talked to me again except for a text to schedule the contractors. NEVER AN APOLOGY. Their response to this should be enough to show you that you should look for another company! I would NOT trust them!)

I DO NOT RECOMMEND EVER using Zoom Drain. I called them on July 12th to look at a potential clog. When the technician left, he said it was fixed. Ten minutes later I had water covering my entire pantry, laundry room, and it was as entering my garage and my kitchen. I had the owner send someone back, but she made me feel like I was the problem and only partially reminded me. after having it looked at for SEVERE water damage, I NEVEr heard much from
Her again. Never an apology, never a follow up.  NO accountability.  I CRIED.  The damage ended up costing me well over $20k in LOST revenue. Still no apology and never any urgency to get it fixed from zoom drain. I was passed off to multiple contractors who were in and out of my house for a MONTH to fix it. ZD never spoke to me again and only communicated through the businesses they sent out to fix everything; water resto team, another plumber, movers, other contractors, etc. I had to beg for them to hire movers to move my work inventory that was exposed to the water damage and kept trying to find more affordable options for them. Because of their initial mistake and lying saying they fixed it, they had to rip down my entire shelving system in my pantry, which had all of my businesses inventory and put it in boxes in the garage. I had to figure out how to run my business out of boxes in the garage for a month. I am STILL unpacking and finding my stuff. The contractors did a mediocre job rebuilding the shelf. The movers actually were the nicest of them all putting my inventory. They never formally apologized, she made me feel to be the problem. No follow up on anything and I had to start taking anti depressants again because of the immense amount of stress, lack of care to the situation and serious loss of revenue. Do not ever use them, calling them was the biggest mistake I made in 2024. I’m still unpacking (September 3rd and it happened July 12 and I haven’t heard from them since July. Not even ONE apology when their plumber caused the water damage.) They never even followed up to make sure that the work was completed was up to the standard of what it was before they ruined it and this mistake has cost me a severe dip in my mental health, severe lack of of revenue to my business and they made me feel terrible the entire time when they did communicate with me (they maybe text me twice after it happened but just ignored me after my refund and passed me off to contractors.) DO NOT risk using them, this has been the most stressful experience all because of a clog (PS I had to beg them to send a second guy out who easily found the clog and fixed that, but that was too late for the water damage and the owner made me feel like she was accusing me of lying to even get the second guy out here after the first guys mistake.)

reviews.author: Suburbs Forver Now
reviews.text: Zoom was very prompt when they arrived avd our disposal was Fuc quickly at a very affordable cost.  We will definitely use them again.

plumbers.name: Frecka Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1770 Newberry St, Cuyahoga Falls, OH 44221, USA

reviews.author: Jeff O'Brien
reviews.text:
We had a fantastic experience with Frecka Plumbing! Matt came out to install a Toto bidet toilet seat for us, and from start to finish, everything was top-notch. He arrived right on time, which we really appreciated, and his friendly, professional attitude made the whole experience a pleasure.

What stood out most was how thoroughly Matt explained everything, from the installation process to how to get the most out of the new seat. You could tell he genuinely cared about doing the job right and making sure we were completely comfortable and satisfied before he left.

It’s rare to find a company that combines quality workmanship with such outstanding customer service. Frecka Plumbing has earned a customer for life. If you’re looking for a plumber you can trust, look no further. Ask for Matt, you won’t be disappointed!

reviews.author: Paul Anderson
reviews.text:
Frecka Plumbing did a great job replacing our main shutoff valve at a reasonable price. Tim, our plumber, did wonderful work, coordinating everything with the water department and replacing the faulty valve. He also coached me in draining and flushing our water heater without any extra charge!
The job was done on time, the area was left clean, and the bill was less than estimated. Cannot recommend them more highly.

reviews.author: John MacWherter
reviews.text:
Tim was great!!  We had several jobs lined up for him--replace a  shower head, fix a leaky faucet, tighten a sink handle--and he did them all in an hour and a half and did them well.  We have been working with Frecka for more than 20 years and they have always been great to work with and reasonably priced.
A quality operation!

John MacWherter

reviews.author: Michele Messina
reviews.text: I love Frecka plumbing..we have used them multiple  times and they are amazing!  Tim the plumber also known as "Jim " per his business card  is absolutely  amazing!  His knowledge  is fantastic...he is friendly and so helpful!  I look forward to seeing him. I know thst he will find and fix the problems every time!  Thank you to Tim and Frecka for another  wonderful  experience!!!! You guys are amazing!!!!!  Same day service!  Absolutely amazing!!!!

reviews.author: Rachel Davis
reviews.text:
I will never let any other plumbing company work on my house! Tim swapped out a shower valve for me, very efficiently and cleaned up after. Five star service AND pricing. I was figuring it would be way, way more expensive and the possibility of extra holes for access.
Thank you guys for being so reliable and knowledgeable! Frecka is permanently on my speed dial when issues arise.

plumbers.name: Plumbers Near Me LLC
plumbers.address: 355 S Teller St STE 200, Lakewood, CO 80226, USA

reviews.author: Dana Shelayne Kroeger
reviews.text:
Isaac was amazing, smart and kind.

He fixed my issue in less than 5 minutes. And now I have a bigger issue that I discovered tonight that takes a lot more to fix.

Honestly I would have never found the other issue if it weren’t for Isaac problem-solving the first. Thank you Isaac.

But here is what I learned about ‘Plumbers Near Me’ today. I found them on Google. I was doing a broad search as most “Plumbing Companies” charge an and a leg for even the easiest of fixes that could simply advise a person on how to fix on their own.

If I didn’t have a Mom in hospice, a dog to take care of and a job - I probably could have figured it out on my own.

But I don’t have such time or luxury right now.

What stood out was that it was a family run company, which matters to me. I come from a family of farmers. It matters.

I know most plumbing prices and they are typically exorbitant when unnecessary to charge people such costs.

So that is what is going to insure Plumbers Near Me THRIVE!

Kind, caring and smart plumbers or associate plumbers because guess who I will always call in every scenario in the future? Inexpensive or expensive.

Plumbers Near Me LLC.

Good people. Smart people. Dependable people that actually care about the human they are helping.

I have to believe that there are many that feel the same as me. And if not they haven’t dealt with the monopolies.

Thank you.

reviews.author: Taylor Coghlan
reviews.text: I have hired them 3 times to do miscellaneous things for me, they fixed my shower once, installed toilets and just recently installed a water filter and a new kitchen faucet. They do great work, are efficient and have excellent quotes. Thank you again guys, I look forward to working with you again in the future.

reviews.author: Anna Rodriguez
reviews.text: We needed 2 quarter turn shutoff valves installed in a bathroom prior to installing a new vanity and faucet. Carlos took care of this quickly and efficiently. Tha price quoted was on par with 3 other quotes we had received. While he was here, we added on an additional service to a leaky toilet tank. We were very impressed with Carlos' knowledge and skills. We will be using Plumbers Near Me in the future for our plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Tim Farrow
reviews.text: We had a different company out first and they misdiagnosed the issue with our toilet. Carlos quickly and correctly found our issue and was honest in telling us how to fix it ourselves. I would happily use them again, especially since I feel almost guilty they didn’t charge us for extremely helpful information!

reviews.author: Kaylee S
reviews.text: We highly recommend Plumbers Near Me . Carlos M has fixed two things in our house and each time he kindly answers all our questions (so we can be better homeowners)and always gives us sound advice. reviews.author: Reese Anderson
reviews.text: Bryce and Nick were absolutely amazing! They were polite, informative, quick with top notch service and got the job done correctly the first time! I recommend them for any drain or plumbing issues.

reviews.text: Josh is excellent at what he does! He came on time, went right to the leak and fixed it in a timely manner. Very professional and highly recommend this company for all your plumbing needs. We thank you for coming out to Space Shop Self Storage- Duluth.

reviews.text: Great professionalism. Nick is Very knowledgeable about the job and has a skill set that allows him to get the job done right the first time meaning he's fast! I highly recommend this company!

Tina
General Manager

reviews.author: Melanie Arvanites
reviews.text: JMJ Plumbing is fantastic! I’ve had them come out several times now, and they’ve been consistently reliable every time. Even on a holiday, their response was fast and professional. The technicians are punctual, clean, and respectful of my home. Pricing is very reasonable for the quality and speed of service. It’s hard to find dependable plumbers—especially during holidays—but JMJ Plumbing always delivers. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Abbie Miller
reviews.text: Derek did an outstanding job fixing an issue we had with our guest bathroom tub! He was punctual, thorough, and incredibly friendly throughout the entire process. His professionalism and expertise really stood out. I highly recommend JMJ for anyone in need of plumbing services. Exceptional service all around!

reviews.author: Karen Jeffrey
reviews.text: Greg explained everything he needed to do and showed us the problem areas that needed to be repaired.  He explained different options we could do to repair leaks and gave us the pricing options up front.  He was courteous, kept in touch about his arrival time and cleaned everything up as he worked. We will use Greg again if we need a plumber.

reviews.author: Tony Martin
reviews.text: Referred to JMJ by a trusted friend and neighbor. BINGO!...this trusted friend nailed it. Greg was extremely courteous and genuine from the moment he stepped up to our front stoop. He skillfully and promptly identified our problem and gave me the option to pursue a simple repair on my own (I mentioned doing a bit of DIY work) as a way of saving some money.  Very impressed  with this priority on what's best for the customer...says a lot about Greg and the company.  Happy to say we've got a new 'go-to' plumber to use and to recommend!

reviews.author: Juan Castilla
reviews.text:
Thank you Brent, for saving the day.
Quick response and professional service.
Appreciate the attention to detail and the line of communication, in real time and the use of PPE's to maintain a sanitary process..
5 Star service, 👍👍👍👍👍

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing of Harford County
plumbers.address: 16A Bel Air S Pkwy Suite 300, Bel Air, MD 21015, USA

reviews.author: Kunal Teeda
reviews.text:
A completely unnecessary upsell — get a second opinion before using this company

I called Benjamin Franklin Plumbing to diagnose a leaking faucet. The technician took a quick look and immediately quoted me over $700 to replace the entire faucet. No real explanation, no attempt to troubleshoot, and not a single alternative option offered.

What actually fixed it? A $20 cartridge replacement. I confirmed the issue myself and repaired it in minutes. No full replacement needed. No $700 bill. Just a basic part the technician never bothered to check.

This wasn’t just a high quote. It was a wrong diagnosis that would’ve cost me hundreds of dollars for work that wasn’t necessary. That’s a serious trust problem.

If I hadn’t stopped to verify the issue on my own, I would’ve been charged more than 30 times the cost of the real fix.

I won’t be calling this company again, and I strongly recommend anyone reading this to always get a second opinion. A plumbing company should solve your problem—not create an expensive one.

reviews.author: Ryan James
reviews.text: Highly recommended company and services from my experience using Benjamin Franklin  plumbing.  If you are lucky enough to get the technician I had, his name is Ira Miller, then you can feel comfortable and confident that you are in good hands.  Thanks again for the  services provided.

reviews.author: Adam Holmwood
reviews.text:
It takes a lot for me to be compelled to write a poor review. We hired Benjamin Franklin Plumbing (Columbia, MD) on August 29, 2025 to clear a clog in our kitchen sink. The technician was here for about 40 minutes and used a standard Snake K-60 machine (the type you can rent at Home Depot for ~$75/day). The total bill was $650, which was shocking compared to the $350–$400 range that we later learned other reputable companies typically charge for the same service and labor.

I called Benjamin Franklin Plumbing's office three separate times (Aug. 30, Sept. 3, and Sept. 5) asking to please speak with a manager or owner about the invoice. Each time I was promised a call back within 48–72 business hours. No one ever returned my calls. On my third attempt, the receptionist became argumentative instead of assuring me I would receive a call back.

In my opinion, this company overcharged us and then refused to provide any accountability or even a courtesy call back from management. Based on my experience, I cannot recommend this company and would advise others to shop around before calling them.

reviews.author: Shawn Taylor
reviews.text: Between the time I called and my leak was fixed was less than two hours! Jerry was great. Thank you!

reviews.author: Deborah Schlehr
reviews.text: Highly recommend this company! Ira was amazing and a pleasure to interact with. He fixed our emergency and had our water restored in under 2 hours for 1/4 of the cost we were quoted to have it fixed 2 days from now with a different company. So knowledgeable and took time to explain all of the options and possible outcomes. Truly an answer to our prayers. Thank you!!

plumbers.name: Garabedian Plumbing & Heating Inc.
plumbers.address: 208 Austin St, Worcester, MA 01609, USA

reviews.author: Benny (benny_fresh)
reviews.text: First-time homeowner. Never had to hire a plumber before but the drain in our basement bathroom sink was clogged pretty bad so I called Garabedian based on internet reviews. The woman who took our call was very polite. She explained their pricing & fees before booking the service call for us. No unexpected up-charges or surprise fees. They couldn't guarantee same-day service (for non-emergencies) but we got lucky and Sean was able to get to us within two hours of calling. Sean was very professional & friendly. He diagnosed the problem quickly, drilled into the drain pipe, snaked the clog, and patched it back up. Will call them again if I ever need a service plumber.

reviews.author: Henry John Kerr
reviews.text: These guys are outstanding. Al (Alec) arrived precisely on time, looking sharp in his Garabedian shirt. He immediately conveyed a sense of confidence that he knew what he was doing -- and he just got everything done quickly, efficiently, properly. And then some: there actually were two other jobs we hadn't originally had on the call order, and he took care of those effortlessly too. He was a superb communicator -- letting us know what he was doing and what he was going to do. And he left the place super-clean and tidy. Five out of five stars! Ten out of ten stars!

reviews.author: Paul Conner
reviews.text: Called Garabedian plumbing when our hot water heater began to leak.  They came out immediately and diagnosed the problem and returned shortly thereafter and installed a new heater.  Conscientious staff completed the work and cleaned the area in just a few hours.  Very happy with the result.  I highly recommend!!!

reviews.author: Betsy Cullen
reviews.text: Garabedian to the rescue! Can't give enough praise to Caleb! He was able to take care of a few big issues for us, while being polite, knowledgeable and cleaned up the area before he left!  10/10

We decided to get more plumbing work done which included replacing 5 old shutoff valves, removing the garbage disposal and putting in new drain/waste pvc, a new sink flange, and two new union traps. Rick was our technician, and was great to work with! He was very professional, polite, and gave us a ton of good advice. He answered all our questions and didn't try to upsell us on anything. The work was stellar and done in a short period of time. We felt the quote was fair and reasonably priced, and would highly recommend Rick and Garabedian to others.

I highly recommend Quality Plumbing Services based on the outstanding work recently completed at my home. reviews.text: Dan was extremely knowledgeable, patient, understanding, and got everything fixed quick and efficiently for us. He was the first person we had work on our plumbing since we’ve moved in and we haven’t looked anywhere else since, he’s that good. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Victoria B. Wons
reviews.text:
We were dealing with a sump pump emergency when it suddenly stopped working and water began coming into our basement. It was incredibly stressful, and most companies I called were either unavailable or rushed us off the phone and were quick to assume that our sump pump was shot. Quality Plumbing Services was the only company that took the time to really ask questions and understand exactly what was happening with our sump pump.

Even though they weren’t able to come out until the next day, the person I spoke with was calm, knowledgeable, and patient. He walked me through a temporary solution over the phone that helped prevent our basement from flooding. Thanks to this guidance, we were able to get the motor going and avoid major damage.

They  came out right away the next morning. I’m extremely grateful for their professionalism, compassion, and willingness to help during a stressful emergency. I can’t recommend Quality Plumbing  Services enough.

reviews.author: Benny Chance

reviews.text: We have had Cherokee Plumbing out twice within the past week.  Once for some burst pipes at our business, and today for a broken and leaking hot water heater at our home. Highly recommend!

reviews.text: Rudy and Ty were quick to provide a quote and even completed the plumbing job the same day! They were efficient with time and reasonably priced + offer a membership to help with the cost of future plumbing maintenance/repairs. 10/10 recommend!

reviews.text: Cherokee Plumbing did an excellent job with our plumbing needs. They were professional, on time, and communicated clearly throughout the entire process. The quality of their plumbing work was outstanding and everything was completed efficiently and cleanly. I would highly recommend Cherokee Plumbing to anyone looking for reliable plumbing services.

reviews.text: I called Cherokee Plumbing at 9 am and Rudy and Steven came out that afternoon. They were really nice, respectful guys and diagnosed the issue with my hot water heater within 15 minutes and repaired it within the hour. They went to Locke Supply and got me a $300 part under warranty so all I was out was for the labor itself, and the price was reasonable. Do not leave plumbing work to handymen who may seem cheaper! Prior to this I had a “plumber” come out who claimed my hot water tank needed to be replaced. Use this company for quick effective results.

reviews.author: Deryl Gotcher
reviews.text: I needed a kitchen faucet replaced. A friend recommended Plumbtastic Solutions. I left a message and they called back immediately. We will definitely call them in the future for plumbing jobs.

reviews.author: Clyde
reviews.text: I had a plumber come out 3 years ago to replace my outside leaking faucet. It worked fine for 2 years before starting to leak. The same company sent someone else out, who messed with it and was able to get it to stop leaking. He said that if it leaked again, they were going to have to do the work from the inside, meaning, cutting out the drywall that I would have to repair. A year later, I noticed it leaking after not being used for a period. I decided to use Plumbtastic Solutions, who was recommended to me by a friend. Zack examined the issue and determined that it was a cheap brand that was damaged during installation. He was able to replace the faucet and redo the mortar in a timely manner. I will use him again.

reviews.author: bassguitarman s
reviews.text:
This was my first experience with Zachary and Laura after having read several very positive recommendations on Facebook groups.  Very nice people to work with and no huge upsell pressure about replacement.  Zachary explained the problem and repaired it after making a trip for parts.  The price was fair and reasonable.

I have a few other jobs on other houses that I will call them for.  For now, I have found my new plumbing company to use.

reviews.author: Stephanie Davis
reviews.text: This company is the best! We I am in need of a plumber, I call Plumbtastic Solutions LLC! They came out quick and were very helpful, courteous, honest and reasonable. I wouldn’t hesitate to call them again when I need. Thank you Zach & Laura!

reviews.author: Natalie Cooper
reviews.text: We had the most wonderful experience dealing with Zach and Laura with Plumbtastic Solutions!!  They were so professional, timely, communicative, and efficient!!  Before they entered our home they put on footies and Laura’s exact statement was, “we want to treat your home as if it was our own” and they did that exactly, which is a top level of customer service that I completely appreciated as a homeowner and it’s those kind of things that make them stand out from many!! They were so friendly and personable while executing the job efficiently!   I would recommend them to everyone, they were great!!!!

plumbers.address: 14335-14350, 14383 Newbrook Dr ste300, Chantilly, VA 20151, USA

reviews.author: Vinod Patel
reviews.text:
I couldn’t be happier with the service I received from John R Plumbing LLC! From the very first call, John was professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to walk me through every detail of converting my traditional hot water tank to a tankless system. He explained the process clearly, answered all of my questions without making me feel rushed, and made sure I understood exactly what to expect before, during, and after the installation.
The communication throughout the entire project was top-notch — John kept me informed every step of the way, and the work was completed efficiently and cleanly. You can tell he truly takes pride in his craft. The tankless system is running perfectly, and I’m already noticing the difference!
If you’re looking for a plumber who is honest, skilled, and actually communicates like a professional should, look no further than John R Plumbing LLC. Highly recommend to anyone in need of plumbing services, especially if you’re considering making the switch to tankless. You won’t be disappointed!

reviews.author: Kim Proppe
reviews.text: John replaced my main shut off valve and the hose bib winterizing valve. His work was excellent! He's professional, conscientious, and his prices are reasonable. He has a strong work ethic. He followed up a few days later just to be sure I was happy with the work he completed and to arrange a time to come by and check everything himself. You don't find that very often! I will definitely use him again!

reviews.author: Xinyang Sui
reviews.text: Super professional and tidy. John fixed my water heater piping last week and the work was perfect. Definitely a 5-star experience. Highly recommended!!!

reviews.author: Paul Chung
reviews.text:
I am completely satisfied with the recent water heater replacement service provided by JR Plumbing. John arrived promptly as scheduled and completed the installation efficiently and professionally. During the visit, he also checked the water pressure and proactively identified other areas we should monitor in the near future.

We were impressed by the John's expertise, attention to detail, and the care taken to thoroughly clean the work area afterward. This level of professionalism and commitment to excellent customer service is truly commendable, and we would gladly recommend JR Plumbing to others.

reviews.author: Wayne Mack
reviews.text:
I've used John R Plumbing multiple times and John is always reliable, fast, and has good prices. He is always extremely polite and professional.

When my wife and I returned from vacation, we heard the old sump pump running constantly, but when I checked the pit was almost empty. I contacted John and he came by the same day to diagnose the problem. He determined the switch had failed and he was able to get a new sump pump ordered and installed in a couple of days.

I strongly recommend John R Plumbing for whatever plumbing issues that you may have in northern Virginia.

reviews.author: Mitzi Griffiths
reviews.text: Storytime!!...recently my wedding ring accidentally fell down the drain in my bathroom sink, I know!!, instant panic attack!!...I didn't know what to do and started searching on-line for plumbing companies open on the holiday Monday!!...low and behold Right Away Plumbing came up and showed it was open, Yaaaay!!...thankful to Wendy who was very empathetic to the sensitive situation and dispatched someone right away, I appreciate her calm demeanor during my not so calm time, lol!!...grateful the plumber text me to let me know he was on his way and sent me his ETA, very helpful!!..upon arrival,  Kallem was very professional, also quite calm and felt confident he would find my ring, this definitely provided me with some peace of mind!...he unscrewed the pipes, there was a delay at first, but then it happened, I heard the ring clink as it dropped into the bowl, Yaaaay!!!...big shout-out to Kallem who saved the day, found my ring and also made sure our pipes were secured before leaving!!..thank you for all your help...5 stars to the entire team at Right Away Plumbing!! *****

reviews.author: Carlos Daniel Gonzalez Álvarez
reviews.text: Last night, I contacted the company for assistance with my malfunctioning furnace. They arrived promptly and provided a comprehensive explanation of their intended approach before commencing the pricing process. Their demeanor was professional, accommodating, and reasonable. I highly recommend this company to anyone in need of plumbing services.

reviews.text: Tony was prompt, polite, and very communicative. He clearly articulated the issues and showed before and after photos which gave me a lot of confidence that we were all set. Highly recommend

reviews.text: Wow!! So professional and knowledgeable! He helped repair our toilets and reviewed all our plumbing needs thoughtfully! Will definitely ask for him again!

reviews.text: could not get anyone to give me a range of how much it cost to change a sprinkler head.  While , I understand you want to send a technician out to assess what is a simple task,  Respectfully were  not saving lives or putting people in the moon here.

reviews.author: Bradley “B-radzilla” Vaillancourt
reviews.text:
Waited 4 hrs at a vacant house to be called after there time slot had passed and asked if they could reschedule the next day. Sorry, I just gave up a half day of work for a no show.

Update: Had a good conversation with the owner. He responded head on with humility and has committed to making it right. I respect his approach and think a lot of service providers can learn from him. I will be updating to a 5 star rating and will be recommending him.

reviews.author: Tim Miller
reviews.text: This is a derilic company. Stay clear! Three visits in one month, almost a thousand dollars later, to fix an ac unit? The owner, joe, was combative when i talked to him, just to finally get an ac repair done right. Do yourself a favor and call a qualified company. Joe told me i was out of their service range, after sending a technician the first time bc "they had some down time" he did offer to pay back the first two visits, like the check is in the mail type of deal. Last visit was a total accumulation of lies. Supposedly it was my downstairs unit that was affecting my upstairs unit. Downstairs unit was running perfectly. But the shady stuff happened when the tech lied about that,then passed me off to the money collector. After i gave my card number, he hung up abruptly. This company does not need to be allowed to do repairs in Oklahoma! Best of luck joe .edit, still waiting on that refund that you said two week ago.

reviews.author: John Biggs
reviews.text: Wes was super courteous and didn’t waste any time getting right to the job at hand, he gave excellent advice on how to keep my drains clean and hopefully problem free. He was done in just under an hour and left zero clean up for me the customer which I really appreciate. I highly recommend Amped and Wesley Norton. Thanks so much for your efficient work Wes!

reviews.author: Carla Seymour
reviews.text: Very good technician maintain his word as he stated.  Would refer Chris to anyone .  Thank you for your service .    Very through install.

plumbers.name: At Your Service Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 225 Union Blvd #150, Lakewood, CO 80228, USA

reviews.author: Mona Calderon
reviews.text:
Great service! I was scheduled quickly and my install went perfect. The plumber was professional, friendly & provided great service. Need a good plumber? Look no further!!

Update:

I was so impressed with their service last year for a routine job that I trusted their expertise for a major repair - water damage. My toilet flooded my bathroom , and Dominick not only managed the work, he helped navigate the tricky insurance process so that the full rebuild was covered. They also worked quickly so that the inconvenience didn't last as long as the initial estimate of 2-3 months and turned out to be less than 1 month. We are extremely happy with the results! Thank you, Dominick, Jesús & and crew, for your professionalism, hard work, and fast turnaround!! 👍🏽👌🏽 They really went above & beyond to complete the job.

(Before & after pix) Although I loved my bathroom before, I'm ecstatic with my newly designed bathroom. Dominick had a vision and asked me to trust him to see it through. I did and am now enjoying a modern state of the art en suite.

reviews.author: Matthew Reich
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about Dominic and Jon from At Your Service Plumbing Co. We had a serious emergency at one of our Airbnb properties over New Year’s Eve — the toilet was completely backed up after a guest accidentally flushed something that got stuck in the pump motor, and no one else we called could come out on short notice.

Dominic and Jon were the only company willing and able to respond immediately, and they handled the situation professionally, thoroughly, and with great communication throughout the entire process. They diagnosed the problem, worked diligently on a very challenging clog, and kept us updated every step of the way. Their expertise, reliability, and commitment to getting us taken care of made a very stressful situation so much easier — we couldn’t be more grateful.

If you need honest, skilled, and responsive plumbing professionals who truly deliver in an emergency, Dominic and Jon are exactly who you want. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Roger Thompson
reviews.text: I hired at your service plumbing company to install a water heater for me, I was very impressed with the performance and professionalism from Dominic. He is a very skilled plumber tech. who knows his trade. No wonder he is the owner of the company, he really knows how to treat his customers. From one business man to another, I can relate to how you need to be very professional and knowledgeable in you job scope. Dominic and I talked about each other's businesses of being owners and how we both enjoy fishing and long trips. I would definitely recommend hiring Dominic and his company for the best plumbing service in town.

reviews.author: Matt Hodge
reviews.text: Our water heater started leaking over a weekend. We called at your service and they had a quote and scheduled an appointment in under two days. Their technician was friendly, efficient and thorough. He even had to adjust some piping and the hood as the new one was taller than the previous model. I felt the price was very fair also having compared the quote to a couple other options. We were very happy with our service and the new heater works amazingly. Highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Stacey Howes
reviews.text: Finding a trustworthy and quality plumber has always been a challenge and so I was so happy to have found At Your Service. They were quick, professional and got everything running smoothly again for under $400 (after we'd been quoted 25k for a full sewer repair just days before by another company). Highly recommend and will definitely be working with them in the future for all our plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Lewis Plumbing
plumbers.address: 113 W Mission St, Santa Barbara, CA 93101, USA

reviews.author: Monique Rodriguez
reviews.text: Jorge and Manny were AMAZING!! So polite and took care of my shower blockage. I couldn’t believe how clean they left everything as well! That really means a lot to me. Kind smiles and good manners too. Grateful for their Professional service!

reviews.author: Roy Hathon
reviews.text: Rick was a great plumber. Arrived promptly, parked without blocking the neighbors, and got to work. He unclogged the sink in about 20 minutes and verified the water was flowing out to the sewer. Great service, recommended additional measures to prevent reoccurring clogs, but was not pushy to sell it. Definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Karen
reviews.text: Many thanks to Jorge, Bryan and Felipe who just completed what has to be one of the worst, if not the worst plumbing job ever. Our ancient cast iron pipes under the house had been leaking for some time before we discovered it. Lewis Plumbing came out quickly. It took a week to complete this huge job, but they were here on time every day with great, can-do attitudes. It was very pleasant to work with them and I will call them again should I need their services.

reviews.author: Janine Jones
reviews.text: We had the best experience with Jesus!  He was the ultimate professional. He came to do one job that another plumber (from another company) started but failed to complete. Jesus worked his magic and had a solution completed within a few hours.  He also solved 3 other issues that we were experiencing without hesitation. Jesus figured out the root of the plumbing problems.  It was so worth the money to have peace of mind knowing that Jesus had it all covered.  To top off this “best in class” service, the office staff at Lewis Plumbing called us the next day to make sure everything was working properly.   We now have our permanent plumbing company for our home.  No others can compare!

reviews.author: Caroline Corazza
reviews.text: George was amazing! He was friendly, thorough, and made certain that I knew exactly what he was doing each step of the way. He also gave me great tips to help maintain our clear lines in the future. I highly recommend Lewis Plumbing and George in particular. I could tell he took a lot of pride in the work he does.

plumbers.name: Complete Plumbing & Drain
plumbers.address: 148 Central Dr, Brandon, FL 33510, USA

reviews.author: Joe Erskine
reviews.text: John came by to give an estimate to replace our 15yo Gas, Hot Water Heater. The estimate was lower than others and he took the time to explain why. I agreed to the price and within an hour and a half the job was done. After checking there was no debris in the water, I paid. John was very friendly and professional, and completed the job quickly. I will recommend this business to anyone that needs work done!

reviews.author: James James
reviews.text: Outstanding Service.  Do not hesitate to use this company.  Sean and his crew go above and beyond.  Called in the morning about a leak and they arrived less than 2 hours later.  Called a few weeks later and again arrived within a few hours and solved the issue.  Asked if they could change a bathroom item and there the next day completing it perfectly.  A phenomenal quality and detail oriented company.  Thank you for the great service.

reviews.author: Kara Champion (Soulcology)
reviews.text:
The gentlemen (3 team members) were
highly skilled, friendly and expedient.
Great results.👍👍👍👍

The scope was to find the main water line that runs water into the home. They had to locate it under the crawl space of a 100+ year old home.

Ion order to hook up my Culligan outdoor water softener/purifier…

They succeeded where others failed.

reviews.author: Carlos Ramos
reviews.text: Our water heater died while I was away on a trip. My wife was a bit hesitant dealing with this alone. But this company  made the whole process easier by being professional and courteous.  This will be my go to going forward. Thank you.

reviews.author: beth garcia
reviews.text: Have used Complete Plumbing & Drain multiple times and will continue to do so! We just had Austin for replacements and repairs and he was awesome.

plumbers.name: Hardy Plumbing | Emergency Plumber, Drain Cleaning, Pipe Repair, Tankless Water Heater Repair and Replacement in Towson MD
plumbers.address: 8517 Loch Raven Blvd, Towson, MD 21286, USA

reviews.author: POVMom81
reviews.text: I was very impressed with Hardy Plumbing! I had an emergency situation with my shower handle coming loose and my water wouldn't turn off in the middle of the night! I called for an estimate, and spoke with Amanda who was really nice and helpful while I was an anxious mess. The prices were reasonable with or without me purchasing the parts myself. Hardy fit me in on the same day I called them which was a Friday. They gave me a 1-4pm window and the plumber arrived at 12:45. He was polite, knowledgeable, showed & explained to me what he was going to do, and got right down to business. My shower was repaired and working again in just under an hour! They had payment options including putting a card on file, which isn't charged until they're done and you're satisfied. They even looked at a leak under the kitchen sink and gave us a price on replacing the faucet for free. It was a pleasure to do business with them and I would highly recommend Hardy Plumbing to any friends and family!

reviews.author: Debbie Hess
reviews.text: Wayne has been here several times to fix things I have needed done. He has been wonderful, efficient and very friendly. He answers all of my questions, is very patient and has great ideas. He has saved me from spending unnecessary money. I have spoken to Amanda, Justin and Jake and everyone is so nice and helpful. It has been easy to get appointments. I am so happy that I have found your company and have already recommended you to my friends.

reviews.author: Gaige Dubois
reviews.text: We couldn’t be happier with Wayne from Hardy Plumbing. As new homeowners in an older house, we’ve relied on him for everything from fixing rusty pipes and carefully cutting into tile to install a new shower head and faucet, to resolving a concerning oven/gas line issue. Wayne is incredibly knowledgeable, thorough, and professional. He takes the time to answer questions, double checks his work, and makes sure everything is done the right way, while also teaching you along the way. His customer service is outstanding, and their pricing is fair. We truly appreciate his work and HIGHLY recommend Hardy Plumbing!! 10/10

reviews.author: Haleh Azimi
reviews.text: I had 2 other companies out before calling Hardy. The customer service, from taking my appointment, all the way to fixing the issue, was seamless - the price was also very fair. I’ll definitely use them for any plumbing future issue.

reviews.author: KJ Creaby
reviews.text:
After all the snow and recent rain, there was a gurgling sound coming from my basement. Upon further investigation, one of my two sump pumps was spitting water everywhere, and the well was filled to the brim. The other sump pump was silent... too silent. Luckily there was no flooding, yet. After asking Google who the best, most highly rated local plumbers were, the first name to come up was Hardy Plumbing, with a 5-star rating. I would like to continue the trend, as after calling them, they came out the next day, diagnosed the issues (one busted sump pump and one completely dead sump pump), temporarily fixed the one to release the built up water, and then came back the next day to replace both pumps. Amanda on the phones and Nate and Justin with the plumbing know-how were all super kind, professional and provided great service!

I have found my go to plumber for all future needs, and highly recommend this company!

plumbers.name: Trinity Services
plumbers.address: 2209 9th St, Marble Falls, TX 78654, USA

reviews.author: Graham Heck
reviews.text: John Fest is the best. Such a nice guy, and very knowledgeable. Highly recommend for any HVAC service! Trinity took good care of me on a Friday before a holiday weekend came right out, and even came back Friday evening with the part to finish. Lifesaver!

reviews.author: Dan Freeland
reviews.text: Trinity got our HVAC service scheduled the next morning and didn't overcharge for things we didn't need.  Cleaned coils and it's working good as new! Will use them again for yearly cleaning etc.

reviews.author: Cindy Guzman
reviews.text:
Sarah was quick to respond to our text messages sent over the holiday weekend and scheduled a service appointment the next day after the holiday.  Thank you Sarah!
John always services our units.  He is always prompt and friendly.  We trust his ability and honesty to provide us quality service.  Thank you John!
At this servicing, I have requested review of the service time as we feel the time was closer to 1 hour rather than the 1.75 that was billed.  I requested that review a week ago via an email reply to the invoices email address.  I have not heard back from anyone.  I will submit another review request now, again via email.

reviews.author: David Gaskill
reviews.text: When it rains it pours, we had to have John back out as our unit was leaking. He was quick to get here, we called Saturday night late and he was here Sunday noon. Fixed our problem and explained everything very well. Highly suggest Trinity Service, especially John. Thanks for the great service at a very reasonable price!

reviews.author: Jake Koziel
reviews.text: The technicians showed up on time, diagnosed the problem, explained what was required to be repaired and replaced (and why), and had the work completed in no time at all. They could not have been any nicer. Highly recommend Trinity Services for all of your Electrical, Plumbing, and HVAC needs.

plumbers.name: Restoration Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 703 Millview Dr, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Donna Bode
reviews.text: The team at Restoration Plumbing are excellent. Brandon and Aden were the technicians who worked at my house today and they were one-time, communicative, and ensured I understood what they were doing and that I was happy with the results of their work. From Derek, the owner, to every team member of this company you will experience their in-depth knowledgeable, their kindness, and professionalism. There is no other plumbing company I would have out to my home. I am a Realtor and if a client is in need of plumbing services, Derek and his team at Restoration Plumbing is the number I share. A+++ plumbing service and a very easy referral for me to make!

reviews.author: Billy Vigliotti
reviews.text:
Derek was very responsive from first contact and easy to work with.  Brandon and his son were great on the job.  They supplied and installed a new ejector pump and replaced 2 outdoor faucets. The team was very professional and thorough.
Highly recommended and will definitely call for any future needs!

reviews.author: Rebecca Gorski
reviews.text: The individual that installed our shelves drilled into a waste pipe thinking it was a stud, and we didn’t find out until the following evening after using our shower. We called Restoration first thing the next morning and they were able to send someone out that afternoon. Our plumber, Brandon, was incredibly knowledgeable and rolled with all the punches that came from communication with our shelf installer (as it turns out, he had drilled TWO holes into the same pipe). Brandon took the time to be sure the job was done right and answered all of our questions thoroughly and with kindness (and as new homeowners, we had quite a few!). We are so appreciative to have found plumbers we can absolutely trust and they will be our go-to from here on out!

reviews.author: Steve Beach
reviews.text: Brandon & Aiden did a great job! They were on time, friendly and affordable! They repaired a small leak we had and were very honest. They only replaced what needed it and did a very professional and clean job! Would definitely recommend!👍🏻🪠

reviews.author: Peter Heald
reviews.text: The team at Restoration plumbing did a great job replacing our water heater. They explained everything, gave a fair quote, and worked quickly and cleanly. We trust them for all our plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Clear and Present Plumbing LLC
plumbers.address: Box #2470, 555 Rebel Dr, Kyle, TX 78640, USA

reviews.author: Jake & Stephanie Langi
reviews.text: Great experience working with Clear and Present Plumbing. Travis came out and installed a new hot water heater and toilet as well as replaced the valve coming out of the wall. Very happy with the work. Travis was very courteous, knowledgeable, and prompt and left everything clean. Would absolutely recommend them for any of your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Kathy Vermillion
reviews.text: After the freezing temperatures and thinking the outside pipes were protected, pipes can freeze and break.  Happened on a Monday evening and Travis was able to come to the rescue the next day, before noon, and had the broken pipe replaced and the water back on in under an hour!  Travis was very professional, personable, explained what needed to be done and completed the repair, far exceeding my expectations!  I’ll definitely be contacting Clear and Present Plumbing again.  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Stephanie McDevitt
reviews.text: Travis was professional and punctual with being on time. He didn't hesitate to take the toilet off and fix my problem. I will definitely save their number and continue to use them. SM

reviews.author: W W
reviews.text: David is excellent. He clearly walked through my potential issues with my hot water heater and gave me options. He also helped me get the most out of my water softener. I'll never hesitate to call David for any future plumbing issues. I feel at ease knowing I have his number!

reviews.author: Christina Stansbury
reviews.text: We had such a great experience with Travis and David from Clear & Present Plumbing! Travis came out quickly when our kitchen sink was backed up from the garbage disposal and got it unclogged. While there, we discussed the need to replace our hot water heater and they got us scheduled the next day. Travis was professional, knowledgeable, and very easy to work with. Highly recommend Clear & Present Plumbing for anyone needing a reliable plumber!

plumbers.name: T And T Sons Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 990 N Delany Rd, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: David Brodsky
reviews.text: Highly recommended.  I was getting ready to travel and noticed a leak just before I was leaving.  I tried calling others I found online but nobody was available.  Luckily, I found T & T Plumbing.  I called and they were at my house within the hour.  They were quick and professional and got the job done right.  Tom Jr. is a great guy and very knowledgeable.  Next time they will be my first call.

reviews.author: Debra Chidester
reviews.text: I had a plumbing issue that turned out to be major and costly. My sewer system needed to be replaced from my foundation to some 30 feet down to the village system. I had used TandT in the past so was very confident in the diagnosis of my problem, not to mention witnessing these old pipes when they were dug up and exposed. The pipe in the foundation had literally sheered off. This was an huge job. Every one of the tradesmen were respectful of our property and  kept our inconvenience to a minimum,. There was great communication and they kept within the estimate. It’s very comforting to know a job like this was done by the highest standards in the industry.  We lost one sidewalk square but they were all 34 years old so we opted to go ahead and replace the sidewalk not just the one square. Tom gave us a referral of who could do this work and as you can see they also did a great job. Thank you TandT.

reviews.author: Jessie Graham
reviews.text: HIGHLY recommend T&T. We needed an urgent repair at 10pm on a Saturday night and they came over without hesitation and fixed it quickly and for a reasonable price. Tom was so friendly, helpful, and quick. We are so appreciative of him for coming out to help!

reviews.author: Chris Wagner
reviews.text: T and T plumbing were absolutely awesome. They were available within a matter of hours. They troubleshot the issue and had it corrected in less than an hour. Pricing is extremely fair. All around good people and great company. I will not be calling anyone else. Thank you for the help.

reviews.author: Paul DeBoer
reviews.text: I'm grateful for the awesome service by Tom (son).  He was very professional and kept things tidy.  Tom fixed my slow draining bathroom sink and a water leak.  Not at simple task as my house is 73 years old.   He also replaced my kitchen faucet.  I am extremely happy with T and T plumbing and I highly recommend them.  Great service at fair prices.  Thanks again Tom!

plumbers.name: Stake Plumbing and Heating
plumbers.address: 145 Sewall St, Boylston, MA 01505, USA

reviews.author: Mark B
reviews.text: Stake Plumbing is fantastic!!  They recently installed all the plumbing in my new 3 car garage & work shop, which included a new complex water filtration system, hot water, sinks, rerouting well lines, and irrigation feeds and external spigots. All their work was to high standards, on time, and competitively priced.  They also stand behind their work.... when a well pump check valve started acting up, they came out immediately and replaced at no charge.   Curtis Jr. is a knowledgeable and  hardworking professional, and a pleasure to work with.  Highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Mukund Lingineni
reviews.text: Curtis Jr. helped replace our water heater and handle a few other tasks. It is very hard to find someone who is customer-friendly, a true small business, and really great at their job. Curtis checks all the boxes. Most of all, he is honest and reliable. I highly recommend him.

reviews.author: Tom Taylor
reviews.text: I hired Stake Plumbing for some work as part of my kitchen remodel, including installing new water lines and disconnecting/reconnecting the dishwasher and sink with a new faucet. Curtis’ communication was excellent throughout the entire process, and the work was completed efficiently and with great attention to detail. I highly recommend Curtis for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: John Freeman
reviews.text: Curt installed a new on-demand gas water heater to replace our old tank type. Job went smoothly. I'm very impressed by the communication and effort to getting the job done. There were no surprises.

reviews.author: Troy Kasper
reviews.text: Curtis is well versed in his profession.  Several times during remodeling of our bathroom/walk in shower that he was here, he was continually working.
