After a long day, I had a busted water pipe in my basement. I shut off the main valve to stop the flooding, and they arrived soon after. They quickly isolated the problem pipe so I could still have water in the rest of my house. Even though it was late, they made sure everything was safe before heading home for the night. They returned the next day and finished the repair, and now everything works perfectly. I really appreciate their hard work and fast response. I’ll definitely call them again for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Katherine Mendoza
reviews.text: Our shower faucet and handle stopped working, so we called a local plumber in Louisville. They scheduled a visit quickly and gave us a fair quote for the repairs. We also needed a bathroom cabinet installed. Randall kept us updated about when the plumber would arrive. Kyle showed up right on time, took some measurements, and got straight to work. The job was done well, and the customer service was excellent. Their prices matched what you’d expect around here. I highly recommend this plumbing service—they’re even available 24 hours if you have an emergency. I liked that they also use text and online alerts to confirm appointments, which made everything easy to track.

reviews.author: B Parks
reviews.text: Noah's Plumbing & Water Heaters was extremely helpful, professional, and fair when I had a plumbing problem at my home in Louisville. After I called, they showed up quickly that same day. Thomas and his team carefully checked out my plumbing and walked me through a few different ways to fix the issue, along with the costs for each option, which I really appreciated. What I first thought was just a simple clog and maybe a damaged pipe turned out to be a bigger situation involving my septic system and pipes. The crew took the time to explain everything step by step, making sure I understood what needed to be fixed right away and what could wait a bit. They worked several hours on the job, and when extra hands were needed, more help arrived quickly. The plumbers kept my house clean throughout the work, were friendly with my dog as they went in and out, and even gave me advice on how to take better care of my plumbing moving forward. If you need honest, hardworking plumbers in Louisville, I highly recommend calling this crew. I’ll definitely use their services again in the future.

reviews.author: Kirsten Cunningham
reviews.text: I was at the hardware store searching for plumbing parts and needed some advice. I approached a friendly person who took the time to patiently answer all my plumbing questions. Later, I noticed he was loading supplies into a Noah's Plumbing & Water Heaters truck in the parking lot. I decided right then that if I ever needed a plumber, I would reach out to this company. When I found a leak under my kitchen sink that was starting to damage my cabinets, I called for help. Brantley arrived quickly, was polite and knowledgeable, and explained everything clearly. The repair was done perfectly and the area was left neat and clean. I’m really glad I chose this company for my plumbing needs and would definitely recommend them to anyone needing reliable service.

reviews.author: marco santos
reviews.text: Absolutely fantastic service! From the moment I called Noah's Plumbing & Water Heaters to the job being finished, it took only a few hours. We noticed our water bill was higher than usual and found a leak at our place in Louisville. After reaching out to a few plumbers, this company responded the quickest. Kyle, our plumber, arrived right on time, quickly found exactly where the leak was, and explained what went wrong in simple terms. He got everything fixed fast and made sure it was working like new. The cost was much less than we expected, which was a nice surprise. I would definitely call them again for any plumbing issues!

plumbers.name: Lancaster Plumbing & Drain
plumbers.address: 117 W Main St Suite 207F, Lancaster, OH 43130, USA

reviews.author: Douglas Barber
reviews.text: You guys were awesome. Thank You for responding when Roto Rooter did not. I had a 2 hour window with Roto Rooter no one called or showed. I talked to you guys and a half hour later James showed up and took care of our problem. Both the service and price were great. Thanks again for getting the job done in a timely fashion and not leaving us hanging like Roto Rooter did.

reviews.author: Church
reviews.text: Our tech was the nicest, very knowledgeable and did an excellent job, maybe a little overpriced but labor is not cheap and we were back up and running.  Grateful to even get a tech when everyone was having flooding and sump pump issues.

reviews.author: Amanda Brokaw
reviews.text: Chad is awesome and very thorough. He explained everything very well and did everything he could to help resolve the problem

reviews.author: Jerry Woodgeard
reviews.text: Very courteous and professional. They explained everything and their price was extremely reasonable.

reviews.author: Mike Milby
reviews.text: Superstar company from the receptionist to our tech, Johnathon! I was very impressed from start to finish. Very unusual for a service company to be this professional as well kind and detailed in the way they treat their customers. Very impressive!

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3409 N Paulina St, Chicago, IL 60657, USA

reviews.author: Evelyn Hannagan
reviews.text: Javier did an exceptional job fixing my very old bathroom and making it into a modern brand new bathroom. I highly recommend rescue plumbing. Thank you so much for the beautiful new bathroom

reviews.author: aimee houck
reviews.text: I called Rescue Plumbing Tuesday afternoon for a clogged water pipe and they were able to send Loga & Alan over the next day. The team was early, walked me through the issue and were able to snake the problem out in under an hour.

reviews.author: Bridget Hussey
reviews.text: Javier did incredible work for us today! When we noticed our toilet was leaking, he came to assess the issue. He advocated for us as renters and educated the owners of the property on the proper repairs that were needed to fully fix the problem. He installed a brand new toilet so quickly and did it with such professionalism, respect and kindness. His assistant Jimmy was also great. I truly enjoyed my experience with Rescue Plumbing and would recommend them to anyone!

reviews.author: Vanda Berman
reviews.text: Rescue Plumbing was amazing. We thought we had a leak in the building and they came out right away. Logan took the time to listen and talk us through all the possibilities and options available to us. He was very knowledgeable and respectful of our space.

reviews.author: Cat Amaro
reviews.text: We noticed a leak super late at night. I sent a request for service before bed and received a response before I woke up. They were quick to give us same day window frame and work around our schedule. The two guys (did not get their names as my husband was the main point of communication) were so kind, professional, fast, and efficient. Thank you!

plumbers.name: Rooter Man
plumbers.address: 1110 Putman Dr NW, Huntsville, AL 35816, USA

reviews.author: Jeanne Steadman
reviews.text: I can highly recommend Craig at Rooterman! We had a serious plumbing issue of a burst  pipe because of the extreme cold and he went above and beyond! to fix everything. He worked so hard and was so professional, knowledgeable and kind! Craig is the best!

reviews.author: Lynne Brown
reviews.text: We have a great plumber who has taken care of our needs so well, but was out of town and no one was available with his group for an evening emergency. He recommended Rooter Man and we are very grateful he did.  Our building, with multiple renters, had 6 commodes stopped up.  Drake spent 2 hours climbing on the roof and unclogging those commodes.  He would not leave until he had flushed each of those commodes multiple times to be certain everything was working perfectly.  His patience, professionalism and determination were amazing and we greatly appreciate him solving our issue before anyone arrived for work this morning.  We highly recommend Rooter Man.

reviews.author: Devin Theobald
reviews.text: Had a leaking hose bib. Couple of appliances on their own field line. We wanted an additional hose bib added to our garden about 60’ from our home. Craig did an amazing job. We could not be happier. He replaced both hose bibs and older no freeze lines. He did an absolutely beautiful job on our hydrant at our garden. I know it’s just a hose pole, but it really adds to the farm/garden aesthetic of our small family farms Craig’s idea. And he was right. It’s better  in a freeze, and it looks and performs great. My little daughters love opening it up to weather the garden and chickens. Craig got the sink drain and clothes washer off their own field lines and tied to our septic. If it rained heavy, we could not run the dishwasher or clothes washer. Now we can. Craig always had a smile on his face. Was informed, confident, honest, and I felt like he really wanted to do a good job for us. Highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: M.G. Sturm
reviews.text: I love this company, keep their number on speed dial, when plumbing needs arise. Be it for outside faucet needs, water lines to be extended for garden irrigation or inside when toilets leak, not flush or one needs help with new installation. They are wonderful, knowledgeable, quick, professional, and their rates are reasonable.

reviews.author: Lee Nall
reviews.text: Rooter Man provides exceptional service. Vickilyn is always spot on  when she answers the phone and assigns as plumber and provides the estimated arrival time both during and after hours.  I highly recommend them for your plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Exclusive Plumbing LLC
plumbers.address: 14740 Flint Lee Rd # P, Chantilly, VA 20151, USA

reviews.text:
I had a leaking pipe that settled on some 2x4 framing in the wall. When the crew arrived they quickly worked to cut out and install a new section of pipe with several fittings.

The crew was excellent and the office staff is always a pleasure to work with. Highly recommend Exclusive Plumbing, great company and great people!

reviews.author: Connie Wright
reviews.text: Sam Mosely is WONDERFUL! Very professional, such a nice pleasant young man.  Sam worked until he found the problem & fixed it.  I recommend if you need a Plumber, please call & ask for Sam. You will not be disappointed.  Thanks again SAM!

reviews.author: Tat Noguera
reviews.text:
Exclusive Plumbing Service was excellent!!
Thank you for all the work done at my home today. Jorge was so nice and professional, he knew how to take care of a lot of small plumbing problems we had… and fixed the once we did not know but  needed attention. I am so happy and thankful.

reviews.author: Ash Prash
reviews.text:
Cesar was very professional and respectful and did a great job of fixing my leaking toilet. He was very kind and considerate and left the place of work clean.
This is the third time I had Exclusive Plumbing to do work for me, Exclusive Plumbing live up to their name. They are simply the best.
Ash Prashad

reviews.author: The Kelley Family
reviews.text: Outstanding professionalism. Despite the challenges that we faced with our “extended warranty” company regarding coverage, Luis and his team were more than accommodating. Their honesty is to be commended and because of that, they will be the ONLY company that we call for ALL of our plumbing needs moving forward.

plumbers.name: Charge Construction & Plumbing LLC
plumbers.address: 100 S Williams St Unit 4, Thornton, IL 60476, USA

reviews.author: Michael Young
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of doing business with this company on my first full rehab.  Very knowledgeable, understanding, and respectful.  And might I add there work is very clean.  On my next one I will definitely use this company again.  Thanks for an awesome job well done

reviews.author: Amanda Carreon
reviews.text: Paid over 6k to have my plumbing redone. Had pex installed and new PVC drain tubes. I will let the pictures do the talking.

reviews.author: Evan Deranja
reviews.text: Hi. Marcus came out to fix our flooded basement in a Saturday (of course it had to be a weekend).  We live in an old house and have had many pipe issues over the years. He was fantastic! He’s by far the best plumber to come out to help us at our house to date (and we've had several). He took the time to make sure he completely diagnosed and solved our problem thoroughly; and for the first time in a long time, I feel like the problem has been truly solved. And furthermore, he taught me a lot about how the plumbing works on these old houses, and I feel much more confident in how to prevent and manage problems like these in the future. I highly recommend Marcus at Charge Plumbing and definitely plan on using his services again in the future - although hopefully I will be calling for just maintenance and preventive work rather than for an actual basement flood.

reviews.author: Karlyn Boens
reviews.text: You do not have to look anywhere else! You can trust Charge Construction and Plumbing with your needs. After the pipes on my sump pump disconnected, Don was able to quickly diagnose the problem, talk to me about all solutions—temporary and long-term and fixed it within one hour. Extremely professional! As a parent, I needed this fixed ASAP and was grateful that Charge Construction and Plumbing was working evening hours to meet my needs. I also needed someone trustworthy and knowledgable. I even talked to a few other plumbers afterwards who agreed that Don’s pricing was fair and his technique was top notch!

reviews.author: Carissa Zavala
reviews.text: Marcus was professional, knowledgeable, and provided great service! Came out same-day to fix our toilet and the entire process from start to finish went smoothly. Highly recommend Charge Construction & Plumbing!

plumbers.name: Dundee Services Inc
plumbers.address: 9 Michigan Ave, East Dundee, IL 60118, USA

reviews.author: Joseph Tumilty
reviews.text: Peter fixed our main plumbing leak issue, and knocked out a gas hookup while he was here. Great service and the price was more than fair. Would use his services again and would recommend to family and friends in a heartbeat. Thank you!

reviews.author: Jim Proudfoot
reviews.text: Peter was very good at installing my AC and furnace. He also fixed my boiler. Would highly recommend!

reviews.author: marie borck
reviews.text: I am very happy with Dundee Services. Peter was awesome. He resolved the poor drainage issues in my yard by extending drain tile further away from the house. Also by putting river rock around the foundation. He made the entire process smooth and at an affordable price.

reviews.author: Christi Melhorn
reviews.text: Great experience with Dundee Services! Peter was quick to respond to our heat issue on a -7 degree day. He was  knowledgeable and communicative and gave us an incredibly fair price. He assessed the repair and made sure everything was in safe, working order before he left. Definitely recommend and we will be returning customers.

reviews.author: m bendi
reviews.text: I’ve used Dundee Services three times now, and Peter has been awesome to work with every single time. He helped me out with installing a new dishwasher, fixing some leaky pipes in my basement, and took care of an HVAC issue I couldn't solve myself. He's dependable and reasonably priced with no hidden costs or upselling. If you need some work done, residential or commercial.. this is your guy. Highly recommend!

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3832 Taylorsville Rd #4, Louisville, KY 40220, USA

reviews.author: Karen Simon
reviews.text: We had a gas line ran to our fire place.  Andrew and Anthony were awesome!  Both are very knowledgeable and patient with all our questions, they explained all to us and showed us what we needed to do.  I had several estimates.   They had better price that comes with a guarantee.   I would highly recommend them.  Benjamin Franklin plumbing, they are great.  Thank you both!

reviews.author: Michael Muller
reviews.text: Dan and his team did a fantastic job helping me with an emergency plumbing repair. They didn't have any openings in the schedule, but they were able to get someone to our house after normal closing hours to fix a major sink clog for me. They did great! Solid work, good cleanup, and reasonably priced. I love these guys!

reviews.author: deborah dennelle
reviews.text: Benjamin Franklin is very professional and top notch with customer service.  We had a wonderful experience with Stella whom is very organized, upbeat and a great communicator.  Anthony and Mark came out and replaced our tankless water heater along with installing a Halo5 conditioning treatment.  Explained everything very thoroughly and were so nice.  We are very pleased with the results and could tell right away the difference in our water quality.  We just moved here and were pretty nervous at first about needing new plumbers.  Benjamin Franklin squashed all our fears and we are so relieved to know that we can trust them for our future services!  Great job guys, thank you so much! 👏

reviews.author: Louie Laubheimer
reviews.text:
Anthony arrived and started on the job at hand. He explained what he was doing and why. He is very polite, helpful about different things I asked him.
This company is very reasonable on their work prices. I sent text to other
companies and they never responded back to me but this company did respond back to me in a timely manner. Other companies quoted me prices like $1,095 -   $625 - $606 . This company I will have back to do my work from now on.
Thanks again for your reasonable quote and workmanship.

Louie

reviews.author: tara graves
reviews.text: I have called Benjamin Franklin plumbing now for several jobs and they are now my go to plumbers for all my projects. They are replumbing an entire house for me and also have promptly come for even a small job such as hooking up my gas stove for an investment property and install a water heater for an apartment building that I needed done quick. They had it installed in less than 24 hours so the renter would not be without hot water. Anthony has gone above and beyond with his customer service and explains everything thoroughly.  Its hard to find a company that has fair pricing, reliability and good quality... which are the 3 things im always looking for. Anthony has met all those wishlist items and im extremely pleased to have found them. Thank u guys!!!!!!!! 💓

plumbers.name: Complete Care Plumbing Electric & AC
plumbers.address: 2205 Warehouse Cir ste 101, Marble Falls, TX 78654, USA

reviews.author: Michelle Doerr
reviews.text:
These guys are the best.  they did all my new plumbing when I remodeled  and then today when I got up to my lake house, I had no water due to a busted pipe.  Complete care came right out at 5 o’clock on a Friday and fixed it immediately and the price wasn’t bad. As a 33 yr Realtor Who’s dealt with lots of contractors in that time and a homeowner I highly recommend them.
It’s  great to have good contractors at your disposal. It’s hard to find in Kingsland. If you want a good plumber that gets the job done right go to Complete Care.

reviews.author: Christian Amaro
reviews.text: Fantastic service! Clint and his guys were able to perform a clean and efficient water softener install at our home! Strongly recommend them!

reviews.author: Highland Lakes Boat Rentals Meadows
reviews.text: Ramona Meadows- long/time customer. I want to say Complete Care Plumbing is a fantastic company; has amazing service men, so knowledgeable and efficient.  Every time they have had to come out they’ve been friendly, cleaned up after themselves, professional. Also Christian-run, caring people.

reviews.author: Michael Landry
reviews.text:
We purchased a house in Burnet in June 2020 and moved from Austin to burnet in 2022. Shortly after our purchase, we needed an indoor fan motor replaced and was told by neighbors and friends to contact James at Complete Care Plumbing and A/C. They were not wrong, James came out and repaired same day.
Since that time, we have needed plumbing and HVAC services from repairs to installation of a bathroom and HVAC to our shop we built.
Recently, we had an emergency gas line repair at my inlaws house that was needed over a holiday weekend and thanks to Johnny, James, and Clint, the inlaws were back online quickly.
I highly recommend Complete Care for your future Plumbing and HVAC needs.

reviews.author: Carolyn Larsen
reviews.text:
Complete Care Plumbing,  Electric, and A/C removed two standard flush toilets and installed two Toto Bidet Neorest toilets in their place. The job included installing GFCI electric outlets to supply power to the Toto toilets. Clint took great care of us, sending two plumbing professionals to our home promptly the following morning to ensure everything was working properly with the new Toto toilets.
We have used Complete Care several times in the past for air conditioning service, remodel preps, removal of an existing hot water heater and installation of a new electric 50 gallon hot water heater. We appreciate their professionalism so much.

plumbers.name: One Call Plumbing
plumbers.address: 101 N Main St suite 308, Greenville, SC 29601, USA

reviews.author: BOB COOK
reviews.text:
was having an issue with both my toilet and sink in downstairs bath. Kevin came out and promptly took care of both issue. He was honest and straightforward. He explained what and why the issue was happening. The pricing is great as well as the service. I will definitely be using them for any future projects. OH, and they don’t charge you a bogus dispatch fee just to show up!

Highly recommend

reviews.author: Bailey Bottini
reviews.text: Would highly recommend! Chris (who came and worked on our house) was extremely helpful, very kind, thorough, and efficient. While he was efficient, he took the time to explain what he was doing, why he was doing it, and what to watch out. As a first time home owner, this was exactly what I hoped for.

reviews.author: Noelle Jacob
reviews.text: Super great service! They were quick and efficient and made sure to help me after hours when I called! 10/10 would recommend again for any of your plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Adrian Allen
reviews.text: Initially thought they did a good job repairing the pipe in my garage, but turns out they charged me $500 for a repair that burst anyway and that they refuse to warranty. Pipe burst tonight and I had to shut off water to my entire house and call another company to cap it. Trash.

reviews.author: Erin Culbertson
reviews.text: Three cheers and five stars for One Call Plumbing.  Had an emergency situation at our office that caused us to have to shut water off to the whole building.  One Call had someone on site within an hour to get us back up and running.  Very professional team all around, quick and efficient work, and reasonable pricing.  I'm a very grateful toilet flusher!!

plumbers.name: RJ Kuhn Plumbing Heating Cooling Inc.
plumbers.address: 585A State Rte 31, Oswego, IL 60543, USA

reviews.author: Josh Hartman
reviews.text: These guys are great! We had a sewer backup at our house on Saturday morning, gave them a call, and their on-call tech, Eric, was able to come out later that afternoon. He quickly cleared the blockage and then ran a camera through the pipe to make sure everything looked good. Fast, professional, and thorough—highly recommend!

reviews.author: Brynn Pattermann
reviews.text:
I’ve used RJ Kuhn a handful of times, and they have always been reliable, courteous, timely, reasonably priced, and knowledgeable. We’ve called them for furnace/A/C repairs and tune-ups, as well as plumbing issues.

This past Friday, with a windchill of -35°F, we ran into a problem at a rental property while replacing a toilet. We called RJ Kuhn, and within an hour they were on site. They fixed the issue, moved things around, and completely reran a new line so we could install a toilet that wouldn’t fit with the existing conditions.

Highly recommend RJ Kuhn for any HVAC or plumbing needs—you won’t be let down. Thank you, Rick, Rob and Eric!

reviews.author: Alison Vega
reviews.text: Eric came to our house to fix the plumbing problems in our laundry room and he did an outstanding job. He is exceptionally skilled at his job: he diagnosed the issue quickly, explained why the problem occurred, and he also answered all of our questions.

reviews.author: Andrew McCallum
reviews.text: I had a terrific experience with RJ Kuhn Plumbing and heating. I am in the construction consulting business And can say that they did a terrific job of explaining certain areas that needed attention on a fairly new furnace, And humidifier, we noticed a difference almost immediately. Once the repairs were completed. They also worked on my plumbing as well and made suggestions that were economical but improved how my system worked. I would highly recommend them.! Very honest and Kept me informed on the project as it was ongoing for several days.

reviews.author: Louis Puskas
reviews.text:
Took advantage of my elderly father who is 80 years old with age related anxiety and early signs of dementia.

Between May 2025 and November 2025, they hustled him for $5,311.42.

There wasn't anything wrong with his water softener and no he didn't need every pipe in basement replaced.

I'm reaching out to elder law abuse attorneys to see if i have a case.

plumbers.name: JTS Plumbing Services LLC
plumbers.address: 126 Lexi Ln, Meridianville, AL 35759, USA

reviews.author: Stephanie Norman
reviews.text: We highly recommend JTS Plumbing Services for any of your plumbing needs. Jake was quick to respond, quick to schedule, and very knowledgeable and easy to work with. We had a leak in our garage and he was very thorough in finding our leak, explaining things along the way, and fixing our leak quickly. The quality of his work is top notch and he is very reasonably priced. We've found our new plumber.

reviews.author: Carla Miller
reviews.text: Thank u JTS Plumbing Service for coming out today to replace my Water Regulator.  Thank u so much for the perfect job and service u did for me today.   I appreciate it so much.  I recommend ur services to everyone.   If u want the job to be done right don’t hesitate to call Jake at JTS Plumbing Service LLC.  He is a fabulous Plumber.  He is experienced at his job.  I will be calling u again for my next plumbing repair.  Thank u again Jake.   A satisfied customer ♥️C Miller

reviews.author: Tiffany Wetherholt
reviews.text: JTS Plumbing is wonderful to work with. Jake was very efficient in finding the problem to our slab leak today and was able to get everything fixed the same day. He is quick, honest, and affordable. I highly recommend his company!

reviews.author: Jay Hafner
reviews.text: I have used JTS plumbing numerous times and have recommended  him to my friends from church. Jake is very knowledgeable  and always does quality work. And on top of that,he is a super nice guy.and my neighbors. Give him a call for your plumbing issues,and I can assure you you will have him on your go too list. Jay hafner meridianville

reviews.author: Nick Klein
reviews.text: Jake was incredibly helpful and was very quick to show up. I would recommend that you call JTS plumbing before anyone else as he has extremely reasonable prices with a very quick and friendly service. He did an outstanding job! Will absolutely use again the next time I need any plumbing work done. Thank you so much, you were a lifesaver!!!

plumbers.name: B & C Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4922 Moores Mill Rd Suite B, Huntsville, AL 35811, USA

reviews.author: Jim Keller
reviews.text: I had two new hot water heaters and an expansion tank installed in my garage after one of my older tanks started leaking from its rusted bottom.  Dewey came right out, inspected them for what I needed and then did a fantastic job replacing them at a very reasonable price. He is very knowledgeable, courteous and a real pro when it comes to all things plumbing related, not to mention also being a very nice guy! Thank you Dewey. I highly recommended B & C Plumbing and will absolutely use them again in the future whenever the need arises.

reviews.author: Andrew Rutledge
reviews.text: B & C Plumbing has been a great vendor for our property management company, Real Property Management Rocket City, here in the Huntsville, Alabama area. They are reliable, responsive, and complete their work in a timely and professional manner. Communication is solid, pricing is fair, and they’re easy to work with. We appreciate having a plumbing company we can count on and highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Abby Goodwin
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with B&C Plumbing. They arrived on time and completed the work efficiently. The plumber was professional, friendly, and explained everything clearly. The quality of work was top-notch, and the price was fair with no surprises. I highly recommend them for anyone needing reliable and honest plumbing services!

reviews.author: Nancy Floyd
reviews.text: B & C Plumbing has always been the “Go-To” Service for my Rinnai Tankless Hot Water heater in Huntsville.  I highly recommend them for their professional installation and repair and repair services. Their Rinnai certified installer/repairman was extremely professional and knowledgeable during my unit installation five years ago and provided the same professional quality service during my recent problem. B & C Plumbing responded quickly with the assessment then a one day turnaround for the warranty parts from Rinnai and then installation. I am totally satisfied with B & C and will continue to call on them for my plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Carol Blair
reviews.text:
Dewey replaced a bathroom faucet for us. He arrived when he said he was. He did the work and left the area beat and clean. He did not try to sell me anything I didn’t need.
He has done work for me before and is always pleasant, courteous and professional.
We have used B&C for many years.

plumbers.name: Barrera Plumbing Services LLC
plumbers.address: 6163 Turnersville Rd, Creedmoor, TX 78610, USA

reviews.author: Veronica Salazar
reviews.text:
Barrerra Plumbing as been a life saver for my 84 year old mother.  She has been using Barrera Plumbing for years now.  They offer quick service, great prices and have great customer service.
Our most recent experience was truly life saving.  My mom's house is old, built in the 50's.  We have not used gas as our heating for a long time.  However the pipes and equipment was still in our home.  These pipes were coroding and gas was slowly leaking.  They came quickly and fixed all of the pin holes in the pipes.  My mother was very grateful.

This work was done right after a huge storm in the Austin Area and mom also had trees that were down.  The workers began cutting the large branches.  We are so appreciative for all the work they have done for us.

reviews.author: LE
reviews.text: We needed to move some roof vents associated with our gas appliances to clean up the front roof line. Victor was super responsive, even though we live close to Lockhart. We had so much confidence in him after talking through the roof vents, that we also asked him to replace our ancient water heater. The work was done very quickly, professionally and at reasonable rates. Who knew I'd be excited about relocated roof vents and a new water heater?  I would strongly recommend Barrera Plumbing!

reviews.author: John H
reviews.text: Westley and his helper did an outstanding job on removing and replacing my water heater. they are polite and very understanding when I ask questions about the project, they are honest, professional and upfront with pricing. When the job was completed, they took the time to explain all the warranty. All debris was removed, and the area was left nice and clean. I will definitely use Barrera Plumbing services again

reviews.author: Redslim Lady
reviews.text:
I shared the best experience with Samson and Stephen today on an urgent water heater request. They were very detailed, instructional, knowledgeable, experienced and most of all professional throughout the task they conquered to get the job done.
Merry Christmas to you and your company for sending me the BEST!
I could not have asked for anything else BETTER!
Throughout their process of getting their project accomplished. I was able to observe communication, teamwork, kindness and professionalism amongst themselves and reprocity.
Thank you so much and keep up the good work!

reviews.author: Ima Kwltr
reviews.text:
Barrera Plumbing plumbers did a very good job in clearing rocks, caleche, mud and whatnots from my plumbing fixtures to include faucets, toilet tanks, inlet water valves to showers, tubs, corresponding pipes and controls after a main water pipe broke which they also repaired.

Special Mentions go to Mike, Isaiah, Jason, Stephen and Sam for being very knowledgeable in their field, highly professional, Supreme Gentlemen, Courteous and Very Respectful in their manner.

Kudos to the Customer Service Ladies Miranda and Mon, for being very personable and easy to deal with for prompt service and scheduling.

I highly recommend Barrera Plumbing Services for all your plumbing needs, big and small.

plumbers.name: Amazing Plumbing Solutions LLC
plumbers.address: 871 Thornton Pkwy # 169, Thornton, CO 80229, USA

reviews.author: Mike Jensen
reviews.text: I phoned Amazing Plumbing Solutions on 9/8/25 @ 11: 15 AM because the pressure relief valve on our hot water heater had failed and the heater was leaking water at a rapid rate thru the failed valve.  Dave Contreras made a house call within 2 hours.  He diagnosed our problem as a failed pressure regulator on the incoming water line to our home. This allowed water at too high a pressure to be fed to the hot water tank and led to the failure of its pressure relief valve.  Dave was able to replace the incoming pressure relief valve and install a small expansion tank in lieu of the pressure relief valve on the hot water tank.  Repairs were completed less than 3 hours after Dave's arrival & that included a visit to a nearby hardware store to pick up a needed part.  We were impressed with his diagnosis of the problem and with his workmanship & demeanor.  We'd recommend him to anyone with a plumbing problem or emergency.

reviews.author: Samantha Trujillo
reviews.text: I called at 8pm and he came promptly, was very knowledgeable and helpful. I was quoted quickly and price seemed fair. Would recommend to people needing quick and quality service.

reviews.author: Cameron Ryan
reviews.text: I didn't have work but I had the pleasure of dealing with one of their "friendly" workers. They parked in front of my house where they were not working and strung trash everywhere so I couldn't park. The plumber refused to move when asked than proceeded to park in the same spot. On top of that he looked extremely unkempt and could barley keep his pants up. As a service electrican I think thats extremely unprofessional and honestly gross. If this guy is the representation of there company I will never hire them and id advise people that they don't. This is not a professional company.

reviews.author: Eugene
reviews.text: Amazing job!!! Cleared out my main sewer line and was extremely informative about the issues I'm currently facing and even showed me on the camera live. Everything was cleaned prior to him leaving too! Service was quick and got me going again. Also is first responder and military friendly. 100% going to use him in the future!

reviews.author: Lauren
reviews.text: Our toilet bowl was cracked and David from Amazing Plumbing Solutions was able to come out the day after we called. He replaced our throne swiftly and left no mess behind. The price was super fair for how Amazing they operate. The previous owners of our home did a lot of diy repairs so no plumbing repair job here is easy but as a true master of his craft, David didn't skip a beat and was in and out in about 2 hours. He was friendly to our kids and pets too, which is always a plus when having home repairs done. Will recommend 10/10!

plumbers.name: MacLin Plumbing Co, Inc.
plumbers.address: 651 N US Hwy 183 Ste 335-144, Leander, TX 78641, USA

reviews.author: Bridget M
reviews.text: *AVOID* Cost me thousands of dollars because they did not want to do the job assigned by my home warranty company, American Home Shield. MacLin Plumbing CO. was assigned to my service ticket regarding my leaking hot water tank. As many Texas residents, my gas water tank is in the attic. When MacLin came to look at the tank, they told me that due to Texas regulations, they needed 25 in. clearance to get the new tank up in the attic, my clearance was only around 24 in., so I would need to provide the clearance in order for them to complete the job. They told me they do not provide access and my only other option would be a tankless water heater, which would not be covered by the warranty and cost thousands more. As a first time home owner that knows nothing about this stuff, I trusted that the plumber would have the experience with attic tanks to advise me honestly on my options. When I proposed if I could remove the attic stairs myself, which would give the necessary 25" clearance, he refused, and said it would not be safe for his men. Foolishly, I took his word that this was my only option, and agreed to their service provided I gave them 25" access. After consulting multiple people, and two plumbing companies about this, I not only realized it would be structurally impossible to carve out the clearance MacLin supposedly needed to complete the job, but also both plumbers told me their team would simply remove the pieces of wood trim to give enough clearance to complete the job. I was pressured to sign the service contract on the spot, then after getting my second opinions, AHS refused to allow me to reassign a new plumber to the service ticket, my only option was a cash out for far less than it would now cost me to replace out of pocket. A neighbor recommended Proven Plumbing. I called at 8:30am on a Friday, they showed up within an hour, & returned to do the job on Monday. They had NO problem cutting the wood trim to make enough clearance for the tank, even replacing it after the job was completed. I HIGHLY recommend using Proven Pluming for your water heater needs, especially if it is in the attic.

reviews.author: angelin abraham
reviews.text: I just had a simple service from them through my home insurance company. My plumber, Jerry Hamlin was early, quick, quiet, clean and considerate to wear shoe covers and not mess up my floors. He was also kind enough to give me some advice for future repairs. Never had a bad experience with this company!

reviews.author: Christina Dienner
reviews.text:
I had a very troubling experience with this plumbing service. A plumber came to our house on a Friday to address an issue covered by our homeowner’s insurance. He identified the problem and said a crew would return on Monday. I didn’t sign any paperwork at that time, and despite asking him to call my husband for approval, no call was made. My husband left multiple messages that Friday during business hours and no one from the office followed up with him.

On Monday, a crew arrived, completed the work, and left without any paperwork or prior communication. Later, the plumber contacted my husband demanding payment, but we requested the paperwork first to ensure insurance coverage. The plumber agreed but still did not provide the necessary documents.

Things escalated when the plumber showed up at our house unannounced, banging aggressively on the door for ten minutes while I was home alone with my children. Feeling threatened, I called my husband. He spoke to the plumber, who then threatened him over the phone stating “he better pay or else”. He stayed on our property for 45 minutes.

My husband contacted the office, which stated that this behavior was unacceptable and that the owner would follow up. However, we never received any communication from the owner.

The unprofessional and aggressive conduct was deeply distressing. If you value respectful and transparent service, I would strongly recommend looking elsewhere.

reviews.author: Cari G.
reviews.text:
A plumber came to my home WED, saw the drywall damage in the ceiling that’s coming from the upstairs bath; plumber goes upstairs to the bath, sees a saturated bath mat, tells me it’s a sloppy shower and leaves. He doesn’t even cut into the drywall to see if there is the possibility of a plumbing leak.
THURS I pay to get the drywall cut out and mold is discovered - too much mold to be caused by a ‘sloppy shower.’ This has been growing over time and we’ve only been in this home 4 weeks. Contractor says he has never met a plumber that didn’t cut drywall to see what’s going on behind it.
Today/FRI, I called my home warranty company (AHS) to find out the status of Maclin coming back and finding the leak only to discover Maclin has cancelled the follow up service call. I’m so frustrated I don’t want another Maclin employee in my home. AHS has found a different plumbing company for me.🤞

reviews.author: Uma Shankar Yadlapati
reviews.text: My warranty company sent MacLin Plumbing to address an issue with my water heater. Matt from MacLin Plumbing arrived the next day, right on time. He was professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. He replaced a part on one water heater and adjusted the connections on the second one. Matt also provided helpful advice on what to look for in the future. Overall, it was a five-star service!

plumbers.name: Goode Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2216 Lee St, Evanston, IL 60202, USA

reviews.author: Rafael Flores
reviews.text: I recently had my tankless water heater replaced and was very impressed with the entire experience. John Lackemacher, my main plumber contact, took the time to answer all my questions and worked with me to ensure the project stayed within budget. He was attentive to my concerns and helped put my mind at ease throughout the process. The plumbers on site were professional, courteous, and able to clearly explain each step, providing helpful details along the way. They performed custom work tailored to my specific setup and executed it flawlessly. The attached warranty gives me great confidence in the installation, which is especially important as I have tenants. Highly recommended for their professionalism, skill, and customer service.

reviews.author: Blooming Properties
reviews.text: Francisco was great and was very determined to get rid of a tough clog which he did and cleaned up well afterwards.  He was on time and had a great demeanor.  Plumbing companies need to be more transparent with their pricing especially when you ask about a specific service over the phone.

reviews.author: Vanessa Sanchez
reviews.text: Jon H was great! He did an amazing job explaining what was going on (I have no clue about anything plumbing). I highly recommend him for all plumbing services and will be contacting him again in the future if needed! Thank you.

reviews.author: Pamela McKenzie
reviews.text: This is my second time working with Goode Plumbing and all three technicians were great. This was also my second time working with Nick, and he is the best. I really appreciated that he patiently explained everything to me, answered all my questions (sometimes more than once!), until I clearly understood all of my options. I also appreciated that he gave me multiple quotes at different price points, so I could make an educated decision about investing more upfront, or putting off some work until later. The day after the shower repair, I had a general contractor patch up the wall and install an access panel, per Nick's recommendation. Even the GC said "they did really good work". I hope I don't need them for a good long while, but I will be calling Goode for my next plumbing need.

reviews.author: Charles Rose
reviews.text: We requested a service call on Monday morning and a technician called us before noon. He came, routed the pipe, cleaned up and was gone in an hour. Frank , our technician, was very professional and informative. Would recommend him and Goode to everyone.

plumbers.name: Plumb Shield Plumbing - Arlington
plumbers.address: 1301 S Bowen Rd Suite 140, Arlington, TX 76013, USA

reviews.author: Ricky Mangrum-Texas Realtor
reviews.text: Out of all the plumbers I called on a Sunday night for a plumbing emergency. Plumb Shield was the only company that answered. Terry and Damian came out, found the problem, and educated me. They were knowledgeable and affordable. I’ll definitely be a repeat customer and refer them to my family, friends, and business clientele. Very impressed.

reviews.author: Kimberly Webster
reviews.text: Terry and Nathan quickly came out to replace a defective pressure reducing valve in my front yard.  They also installed an expansion tank on my water heater. They were very knowledgeable and were able to answer all of my questions. I will definitely use them again!

reviews.author: Phantom_Knight
reviews.text: Mike and terry were incredibly responsive, our water heater went out this morning and was replaced within three hours! We have never had a job done so quickly, efficiently and professionally on our house historically in the time that we have been living here! They were able to give us all of our options and lay them out, they were fast, got it done same day and were so honest and personable. We will definitely be utilizing this company again and requesting the same workers!

reviews.author: Dean VonFox
reviews.text: Terry and Nathan did an amazing job replacing my water heater, hooking up my dishwasher, and replacing the water valves for my washer! I really appreciate that they took the time to go through the details with me, double checked their work, and were overall amazing. This is actually the second job I have hired them for, because they did such an amazing job the first time!

reviews.author: Earnest Pouncy
reviews.text: Rarely will unforseen plumbing issues be considered a pleasant experience. But on this occasion, it definitely was. Terry was very knowledgeable and patient while answering the host of questions we had for each new problem area that was discovered. He and Nathan both took the time to explain what was happening and showed their work throughout the entire process. Started with replacing a faulty water line and installing a new toilet. To identifying and fixing another major issues. Can't complain about cost with this type of quality. Will definitely be using again in the future.

plumbers.name: Colorado Green Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 1400 Washington Ave, Louisville, CO 80027, USA

reviews.author: LinMo
reviews.text:
I called that morning because my water heater wasn’t heating.
Nate got to my place right on time. He explained the pilot light was out and showed me what I had been doing wrong when trying to light it. He was very patient and pleasant with my questions.
I will definitely call Colorado Green again the next time I have any plumbing, heating or cooling concerns.
Thank you

reviews.author: Amanda Varlese
reviews.text: James is stellar, he’s worked on my furnace a couple times. He is up front, efficient and honest and he worked magic with some sensors and I need to get appropriate filters. He’s also taken great care of my entire family and their hvac needs. Thanks James!

reviews.author: Gary Larson
reviews.text:
We needed a new Sump Pump in the basement.  Colorado Green sent out  Vin, who gave a free estimate, then completed the removal of the old pump and installation of the new one in less than an hour.  Great Work!

I found Paul, the owner, to be very fair and honest to work with, and would highly recommend Colorado Green for your plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Gio Giovetti
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience with CO Green Plumbing, Heating and Cooling. The AC stopped working at my rental unit - in the middle of a heat wave. James was there the next day to diagnose it. It required replacement but James noticed damage from a car likely backing into the unit. He worked with me and my insurance company to get my claim approved. He is reliable, professional, timely...and just a great guy. Brandi in the office was also fantastic. I highly recommend this small but reliable company!

reviews.author: Ian H.
reviews.text:
I have worked with Colorado Green Plumping, Heating & Cooling twice in the last few months both for plumbing situations. What I cannot emphasize enough is how quickly they get to you.

Both times I have called they have sent someone within 24-hours always clarifying if it is an emergency or not. The professionals that they employ are also great. I have met four plumbers thus far through random needs (outside faucet, tankless water heater installation, soft water filter, reverse osmosis filter) and they have all been legitimately incredible.

Do not hesitate if you are shopping for a plumber, this is the place.

plumbers.name: McCarther Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1200 Mill St, Lampasas, TX 76550, USA

reviews.author: Joey Sullivan
reviews.text: Eric and his team are true salt of the earth, honest good people who are excellent at their trade.  They took care of me when I had to completely replace my cast iron plumbing and their prices were quite competitive.  They gave me multiple options that worked with my budget.  I cannot recommend them enough.  I will always use them for my plumbing needs in Lampasas.

reviews.author: Tami Hurst
reviews.text: We had a plumbing leak and John at McCarther Plumbing came out right away and got straight to work. He was knowledgeable, efficient, and worked diligently until the issue was fully resolved—even staying into the evening to make sure it was done right. His pricing was very reasonable, and his professionalism really stood out. We truly appreciated his dedication and would absolutely recommend McCarther Plumbing to anyone needing reliable plumbing service.

reviews.author: Shelly Denning
reviews.text: I am the Treasurer of the School Creek Baptist Church in Lampasas, TX.  We have used McCarther Plumbing a few times for our plumbing needs, and they have ALWAYS done a fantastic job!!!  Very reasonable and professional.  I would definitely recommend them to everyone!!

reviews.author: Jenne Mendiola
reviews.text: Eric and Aiden came today to look at my toilet.  Eric was recommended to me by my contractor. Eric is very professional and he was knowledgeable in all the plumbing issues I had. He took the time to make sure each issue was fixed correctly. I will definitely be calling them again for more plumbing projects. I feel like they are trustworthy, honest and professionally ethical. I will be recommending them to everyone I know.

reviews.author: Mitzi Hebert
reviews.text: We had a plumbing issue on Christmas Eve and called for service.  The young man came out and fixed our issue within 30 minutes.  He was very polite and professional.  We will definitely use them again.

plumbers.name: Matthews Plumbing Service
plumbers.address: 195 E Stearns Rd, Bartlett, IL 60103, USA

reviews.author: Alex & Jen Galuszka
reviews.text:
I recently had Matt from Matthews Plumbing Service out to help with my ejector pump, and I couldn’t be more impressed. It’s rare to find someone who combines expert knowledge with such a genuine, personable approach. He clearly knew exactly what he was doing, diagnosing the problem quickly and explaining the fix in a way that made total sense. Matt stands by  his products and his work.
What really stood out, was the service he was punctual, professional, and thorough. Beyond the technical work, we had a great conversation while he was here; he’s just a truly kind, down-to-earth, and decent person who takes pride in his craft. It’s a relief to find a plumber you can trust both for their skills and their character. Matt will be the only plumber I will be calling and recommending to family.

reviews.author: Dan T
reviews.text: I was doing laundry last night when my sewer backed up filling my laundry room floor. I called Matthews Plumbing this morning, Bryan was fantastic to deal with trying to get somebody out to my house today. Matt came out this afternoon. He also was great, explained to me my options, and what he had found when he was done. Both guys really seemed to care and explained everything. I would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Allyson Rinchiuso
reviews.text: Matt was extremely prompt and professional. He arrived on time, was able quickly identify the leak in our upstairs plumbing and fixed it right away. His prices were extremely reasonable. Very happy with the service. We would use this company again.

reviews.author: Ned Mansour
reviews.text:
Amazing service and great Company all around.  I had the opportunity to work with Mathew directly.  He came immediately to trouble shoot my tankless water heater - 1 day later he installed a new Navien S2 - and we are very happy customers.

- excellent pricing
- very professional and friendly
- took time and cared for home like it was his own
- would recommend 100% 5 star

Thank you again!

reviews.author: Chris Roberts
reviews.text:
Matt did a great job for us. We initially called for help fixing a leaky faucet. After taking a look, Matt recommended a replacement rather than a repair and gave us great info to make our decision — but never pressured us to go one route vs the other. The work was done quickly with zero mess to clean up after Matt was finished. The price was very reasonable, too…less than we would have paid for installation from Lowe’s or Home Depot and we feel the work is much better.

We prefer to hire local businesses so we are thrilled to have found someone local that we can trust. We will definitely use Matthews again and will recommend them to our friends and family.

plumbers.name: TJM Sewer and Plumbing
plumbers.address: 31W070 Rohrssen Rd, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Robin Fomusa
reviews.text:
I hate to leave a bad review, especially for a local business, but I’ve given TJM Sewer & Plumbing plenty of time to fix things to no avail. On December 26, I paid a $125 estimate fee and was quoted $4,500 to replace a pump and tank and redo plumbing. I was told the $125 would be credited if we moved forward. When the work was done, they determined the tank did not need to be replaced, yet I was still charged the full $4,500 and the estimate fee was not deducted.

Shortly after installation, the pump was not functioning properly. When I asked them to return to fix it, they attempted to sell me a whole-house filtration system instead of addressing the issue. I declined. They later blamed our problems on an issue with the well and claimed they could not fix it. I hired a well contractor who resolved the problem in 30 minutes without touching the well, leading me to believe there was never an issue with the well.

I requested an itemized invoice, which did not align with the work performed. Based on labor and materials, the job appears significantly overpriced (almost double). I formally requested a partial refund on January 12 and followed up multiple times, most recently on February 6, and have received no response.
I am incredibly disappointed with the lack of response and professionalism. I’ve also since been informed that they were never even licensed to have done the work they performed. I am sharing my experience in hopes that it can save someone else the headache and loss of money.

reviews.author: Andy Jeser
reviews.text:
TJM Saves the day!  Todd, Chris, and the TJM team were outstanding.    We had an excellent experience with TJM.

We  noticed strong sewer gas odor on a Friday morning.   Todd and Chris quickly came out and determined we had a broken sewer pipe. They were back at my house Saturday morning with a big crew to fix the issue.

Our repair was very involved.  It was big and extensive repair.  It  required saw cutting our driveway, opening the foundation,  and major excavating to access the broken pipes and fix the issue.      Todd, Chis, & crew had our plumbing fixed that afternoon.    They were back Monday to finish things up and closed things out with the inspector.

TJM was honest, professional, knowledgeable, delivered on quality, and was priced fairly.

My family and I were in a very bad spot with an unexpected broken sewer pipe that required major repairs.   TJM walked us through every step and did their best to help us out during a stressful situation.   No matter how many questions or issues we had-  Todd always took his time to address our concerns.  He wants to help and he does great work.

I 100% recommend TJM for any plumbing and sewer job.      They will get the job done right.

reviews.author: Gina Postelli
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience with TJM Plumbing. They were right on time. They were knowledgeable and efficient, finishing everything they said they would in 2 hours. And that included an unexpected trip to Home Depot to ensure they had a part which would not leak. He charged exactly what his estimate said he would charge. I would call them again for any job in my home.

reviews.author: Neil Hollister
reviews.text:
Very happy with the initial visit, was with in the hour.  They promptly put camera in sewer line and quickly identified the problem to the 61 year old Cast main sewer line.  They had to break through concrete slab to replace all cast.  Messy job but needed to be done!

I will be using them again to install a tub!

Highly recommend TJM!!!!

reviews.author: Eric W
reviews.text: Man this company is the BOMB! I called and got same day service. Chris and Christian showed up and diagnosed my issue with 10 mins and had my kitchen sink and 1st floor toilet fixed with the hour. 2 issues only $400.  THEY DIDN'T EVWN WAKE MY SLEEPING KIDS. HIGHLY RECOMMEND

plumbers.name: HelloPlumbing
plumbers.address: 242 Antler Dr, Murfreesboro, TN 37130, USA

reviews.author: Lisa Smith - Nashville Realtor
reviews.text: I called Gabe for an emergency frozen pipe burst and he came through in a pinch. Great service, communication and professionalism. Definitely will be keep him for future business and referrals. He was reliable and efficient with a smile on his face. If you're looking for a plumber in the Rutherford County area, he's your guy!

reviews.author: Andrew Pilcher
reviews.text: We were so grateful that Gabe saved us with a next day repair. He did fantastic work and was very helpful. We will be hiring him with all our future plumbing needs. Can’t recommend enough!

reviews.author: Molly
reviews.text: Gabe was wonderful to work with. Extremely honest, which is hard to come by these days.  Showed me some leaks in my cooper pipe, which I ended up replumbing my whole house.  Gabe worked extremely hard, his pricing was reasonable. I will only use him now and highly recommend him for anyone looking for an honest plumber with reasonable pricing.

reviews.author: Brandon Kimbrell
reviews.text: Gabe at Hello Plumbing does outstanding work! First of all he is very honest and upfront. I had a small pin hole leak coming from inside the dry wall behind my washing machine. He found the hole within minutes and within a few more minutes he had it repaired, good as new. I highly recommend Hello Plumbing. Gabe is very knowledgeable and professional. Give him a call for any plumbing issues you are having.

reviews.author: Sheri Edwards
reviews.text: I found Hello Plumbing and so glad I did. Excellent customer service from the initial phone call to the end of the job done for me. Gabe came out and gave me an estimate . A few days later, he installed a replacement dishwasher for us and we were very happy with his attention to detail.  He even listened  to my general plumbing questions and was happy to answer them.I would definitely recommend him for your next job. You will not be disappointed.

plumbers.name: Mark's Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 1851 Suncast Ln, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Bill Henkelman
reviews.text: Mike and Jesse are talented and courteous plumbers. They handled our list of maintenance items quickly. They replaced a Kohler shower valve, toilet valve and cleared faucet filters. Recently we had Mark’s staff replace an aging sump pump and water softener with new technology. Have had Mark’s plumbing at our home for 20 years. We have several neighbors that have Mark for all their plumbing needs. They are the best.

reviews.author: paul jagiello
reviews.text: Mark's Plumbing was recommended to us by a neighbor. Mark's Plumbing provided us excellent plumbing service.  Michael and Jesse were knowledgeable, professional and polite.  They were on time the two times that they were at our house.  The plumbing work that they performed is exactly what was needed and it was completed quickly.  I will definitely recommend Mark's Plumbing to family and friends.

reviews.author: David Hunter
reviews.text: Mark's was the low price of three plumbers I contacted. They did pricing over phone / email instead having to come out, which the other two required and charged for. Communication was good. Work was done efficiently and professionally. 10/10 woudl call again.

reviews.author: Sean Morrissey
reviews.text: Absolutely amazing! We had a shower cartridge issue that went sideways. Mark‘s plumbing handled everything incredibly professionally and communicated very well. I’d highly recommend using them moving forward.

reviews.author: Cynthia Kieckhefer
reviews.text: Great company. Mark DiBiase has always been our direct provider but he’s managing a couple younger plumbers in his business now who are just the nicest, most personable guys. Well qualified. I feel such peace of mind knowing that they’ve done work for me.

plumbers.name: Good Bro's Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1069 County street #2976, Blanchard, OK 73010, USA

reviews.author: Ronald Andrews
reviews.text: Kalob arrived and handled the install of a new toilet and replacement of the wall water shut off valve. Very professional and pricing was great. Thank you for the fast service! Would highly recommend 👍🏼

reviews.author: Adrienne Beamon
reviews.text:
Of course I picked the day before Thanksgiving to try and fix my outdoor faucet leak… and of course it ended with us having zero water for TWO DAYS. (10/10 do not recommend being your own plumber 😂)

Good Bros Plumbing swooped in like the heroes they are. I called, got an appointment first thing the next morning, they came out, assessed the situation, grabbed the parts, and had us back in business before lunch.

Living out in the country, fast service is basically a unicorn — but these guys delivered! Friendly, quick, and absolutely saved our Thanksgiving weekend!

Highly recommend them… especially if you’re like me and occasionally believe YouTube makes you a licensed plumber.

reviews.author: Sierra Angle
reviews.text: We had a wonderful experience with Zack. He was very nice, took the time to explain everything thoroughly, and did an excellent job fixing our plumbing issues. We really appreciated his work and kindness!

reviews.author: Shelley Young
reviews.text: Kaleb had worked on a previous shower remodel at our house & we were so impressed with him that we called Good Bros for some plumbing issues with our rental property. He is knowledgeable, professional & punctual. We will definitely call again with any plumbing issues! Thanks!

reviews.author: Hollienne Heatley
reviews.text: The service was PHENOMENAL!!!! I felt that Zac really knew what he was talking about and gave me a REASONABLE estimate to fix my issue! Very personable! Loved the WHOLE experience!

plumbers.name: NA Plumbing LLC
plumbers.address: 301 NW Oakwood Ave, Huntsville, AL 35811, USA

reviews.author: Julianna Edwards Carter
reviews.text: We were so close to having our new toilet installed on our own BUT we got stuck at the very end so I contacted NAP and they sent Mike to our house in Madison the very next day. He fixed the toilet perfectly! Our family has been living with one toilet for 10 days now so you can imagine how thrilled I am to have this new toilet working. Mike was great...professional and friendly AND knew his stuff- the perfect combo! He was in and out in like 30 minutes and he even used his shop vac to get up any water so the bathroom was ready to use right then. I would definitely recommend NAP. Thanks Mike!!

reviews.author: Gwen Crutcher
reviews.text: Had a leak in bathroom and they sent someone out right away. Johnny was very polite and professional and my problem was resolved right away. I would definitely recommend this company.

reviews.author: Leanna Edger
reviews.text: Had issues with kitchen sink draining and called and was greeted with kindness and was told they would try to work us in same day, but could for sure get us in the following if not. We thought we actually resolved our problem on our own and canceled which they were also extremely nice about. About a week later realized we really did need someone and was treated with great kindness yet again as well as working to get us in the same day. Got our sink draining perfectly very quickly.

reviews.author: Robert McAuliffe
reviews.text: Johnny Bell and North American Plumbing are simply the best at what they do.  I have used them for our main home and several rental properties and we are never  disappointed.  They are on time and always are priced right.   They get it done the first time !!!

reviews.author: Cleveland Crutcher
reviews.text: My experience with NA Plumbing was nothing but the best. My hot water heater unexpectedly busted and I needed same day service. I called NA Plumbing and they understood exactly what I needed asap service so despite the fact they had busy day they put me on same day service. On the plumber came he was very knowledgeable and extremely kind. He performed his job with professionalism and didn’t waste anytime installing my new hot water heater. I’m so grateful for NA Plumbing. I definitely suggest you all use this plumbing company for you plumbing needs!

plumbers.name: Drain Savants
plumbers.address: 1224 Gunderson Ave, Berwyn, IL 60402, USA

reviews.author: Jessica DeCory
reviews.text:
Tammy was great and had a plumber out right away on a Saturday to have a look at our shower.
They were prompt with fair pricing and followed up with great information. We will definitely use them in the future for our plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Julie
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about this company. Tammy was so kind and understanding from the very beginning, and she immediately made me feel at ease. She sent out her best plumber for the job, and he handled my broken gas line quickly, safely, and with real expertise.

What impressed me most was how smoothly everything was handled. Gas line issues can feel overwhelming, but Tammy and her team took the stress out of the situation and gave me complete confidence that I was in good hands.

It’s rare to find a company that combines skill, professionalism, and genuine compassion the way they do. I’m so grateful I called them and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them to anyone who needs reliable plumbing work done right.

reviews.author: Terry Cortesi
reviews.text: Called in the morning Jim and Lisa were here around 1:00. Very Nice and Helpful. Got the job done in a short time. I would Recommend Drain Savants 100%. Tammy is so Friendly. We had a Great conversation. What a Great Company.

reviews.author: Marco Garcia
reviews.text:
I called them for a backed up kitchen sink. They let me know they could show up within an hour. They got there and took care of our backup easy peasy. Now the drain is flowing and our first floor is cleaned up.

I was worried and they relieved me of that stress! Thank you!

reviews.author: Ann Ryan
reviews.text: Jim and Lisa fixed an issue that I've tried to resolve for several weeks. Had ABC scheduled twice but they didn't show up one day then tried to show up 6 hours later on a different day. Tried a few rounds of using vinegar/baking soda/hot water to fix a clogged bath tub but nothing worked. Jim and Lisa were on time and fixed the issue plus cleaned up in less than 20 mins. They explained the problem was due to hair catching on a part of the drain stopper that is unnecessary b/c we dont take baths in this tub so dont even need it. Cost $250 and of course I wish the price was lower but am very thankful to have a drain that is free and clear! My family will be using Drain Savants again in the future!!

plumbers.name: Good Call Plumbing
plumbers.address: 707 Herra St UNIT H, Elburn, IL 60119, USA

reviews.author: Jeff Dieken
reviews.text:
Great job from Goodcall!
Outstanding service, repairs were done professionally with everything left, clean and in perfect working order. What you can expect is honesty with attention to detail.
This is a company you can trust. We have used them for several jobs and would not hesitate to call them again.
Fair honest, pricing and with great follow-through.
Expert plumbers and service every time!!

reviews.author: Joan Henriksen
reviews.text: Nobody wants to call the plumber! A simple sewer clean-out turned into a major repair including replacing old corroded cast iron pipes and re-routing other plumbing for simple flow and connection to the main line. Good Call got us on the schedule ASAP. The plumbers are smart polite friendly and took the time to explain everything. They cleaned everything up and we are completely happy with their high standard of work.If you need a plumber, call GOOD CALL, they rock!

reviews.author: jessica roberts
reviews.text: Loved GCP! Missy in the office is fantastic…. When they came out to replace our water heater they were very thorough and explained everything to us about what they did from start to finish. Good Call Plumbing has my forever business…

reviews.author: ray O
reviews.text: We have used good call Plumbing for a few years now and have never been disappointed. Steve and his crew are great. It literally is a good call

reviews.author: carol ireland
reviews.text: Brett W. came and installed a new bathroom sink in our 130 year old house. He did a fabulous job. He's careful and so respectful. What a pleasure to work with and his work is excellent!

plumbers.name: Reliable HVAC & Plumbing
plumbers.address: 330 Tacoma St # 2A, Worcester, MA 01605, USA

reviews.author: Luis Lozano
reviews.text: I contacted Reliable HVAC after discovering water leaking from my furnace/AC. Assuming a faulty condensate pump, I requested a repair. Ian responded and replaced the pump. However, he left without testing or confirming that the leak had stopped. Unfortunately, the water continued even after he left. I was billed $235, but the issue wasn’t resolved. I was overcharged for incomplete work and left without an actual solution. When the issue continued, I investigated further and discovered a block of ice had formed around the evaporator coils. All of this was visible and diagnosable with basic HVAC troubleshooting, which the technician did not perform. If you’re seeking truly reliable service, I recommend looking elsewhere.

reviews.author: Amarilys Clarke
reviews.text: I felt compelled to leave this review as I never had such a great experience when it came to resolving plumbling issues. Our water heater went on Tuesday and we happened to noticed right away around 2:38 p.m., my husband called Reliable and they came out right away.  They were here around 3:10p.m. same day.  Hunter was extremely professional, easy to communicate with him, personable, very knowledgeable.  They never asked for a service call fee, he immediately told us the price, recommended a better product.  We immediately said to go ahead and within 45 minutes he was back with a new water heater.  He promptly installed it, hawl the old one out to take with him and cleaned after himself. He was prompt and efficient. He replaced the copper pipe that had multiple welding from how many times the water heater had been replaced.  He also replaced few valves.  It looks clean and professional. After installation he explained everything about the water heater and how to trouble shoot different scenarios. He was done by 6 p.m. I have to say, I was very impressed with how prompt and efficient they were (specially Hunter) to resolve our problem.  Highly recommend!!!!!

reviews.author: Riane S
reviews.text: I cannot thank Ian enough. Came out within 30 minutes of an early Sunday morning call. Figured out the issue and is scheduling the solution for the same week. Finally a company that answers the phone and helps when in need. They will be our new and only HVAC and plumber.

reviews.author: Paul Marinucci
reviews.text:
Reliable HVAC and Plumbing is absolutely fantastic!!  From the moment I called and spoke to Alex who arranged the service call and she scheduled their tech I knew I was in the best of hands. Tech Eric called me as he was on his way and arrived exactly on time as he’d said. Eric listened patiently and intently as I explained the issue with my furnace.  He detailed what the usual possible causes could be and explained all the diagnostics he would do to rule them out and hone in on what the problem could be. Eric explained in great detail what he was doing and why.  Eric narrowed it down and quickly found that the communications between the Thermostat and the furnace were faulting out and causing the furnace to trip off and fail to run properly. Eric quickly installed a new digital thermostat and tested it and the furnace thoroughly. He showed me how to operate the thermostat, set date and time, heating and cooling - I dont even have to read the owners manual - Eric explained everything in great detail, with a smile, taking his time answering all my questions. It’s clear that Eric and Reliable HVAC are the best I’ve ever dealt with and I’m
Happy to be their customer for life. Great work and thank you for getting me back up and running so quickly!  Huge kudos!!

reviews.author: Aditya
reviews.text:
Firstly, it's great to see a young entrepreneur like Ian running a major business. I often judge a company based on its after-sales service, and many businesses fall short in that area. Once they have your money, they often feel no obligation to address your concerns.

This is where Reliable HVAC exceeded my expectations. The team was very proactive and addressed two of my main concerns even a month after the installation was completed.

No questions were asked— a team was dispatched immediately to assess the situation.

They also took full ownership of the entire MASS SAVE refund process, which was seamless. I highly recommend this business if you're looking for excellent after-sales support.

plumbers.name: Ultimate Plumbing
plumbers.address: 14025 N Eastern Ave Apt 1105, Edmond, OK 73013, USA

reviews.author: Chris Poteet
reviews.text:
Gage and his team were great. I had a sudden slab leak while I was out of state for work. My wife and son were unable to stay at the house until it was repaired.

He came out the same day I called him to inspect and provided a quote that he honored despite some unforseen circumstances. When his team showed up to do the work the next day and I asked (over the phone) how long they thought until the water service was restored they said told me they didn't plan to leave until the pipe was fixed. They worked 12-14 hours that day and got the water working.

They came out the next day to finish backfilling the trench and wrap up the job. Gage stayed in contact well after his work was done and invoice paid to help me deal with the insurance claim for his portion of the work. Great workmanship and service. I had shopped the repair around. Ultimate beat the next (licensed) competitor by $1500

reviews.author: Bob Chambers
reviews.text: I’ve used Gauge in his team at ultimate plumbing multiple times. Zeek always answers his phone and coordinates with the team. I’ve done multiple fires and multiple construction jobs on .   I am the owner  Express Restoration in Edmond Oklahoma. They are my go to Plumbing company they handle Commercial they handle residential from top down there. Top notch very reasonable great to work with ultimate plumbing highly recommend.

reviews.author: Marty Brown
reviews.text: Ultimate Plumbing saved us yet again. I cannot begin to explain how refreshing it is to deal with a service company that is truly interested in doing right by their customers. The integrity and transparency by which this company is ran is not something you see everyday and why I will continue to recommend them to anyone in need of their services.

reviews.author: Kayla Hudlow
reviews.text: Gage at Ultimate plumbing has worked on several of our plumbing issues at both our house and investment house, as well as several friends of ours. He is extremely professional, punctual, and fair of pricing. Highly recommend for any plumbing needs! Won’t use anyone else!

reviews.author: Kate Prieto
reviews.text: Gage and his team are so thorough and great communicators. We have used them for new construction, remodels, hot water heaters and plumbing service work. Great work and fast response!

plumbers.name: MenWon Plumbing & Drain Services
plumbers.address: 397B Mill St, Worcester, MA 01602, USA

reviews.author: Gwyn
reviews.text: My experience with MenWon was fantastic. Aaron was extremely friendly and knowledgeable. I called him on a Thursday and my repair was done by Saturday afternoon. He took a look at the issue on Saturday and had the repair completed, all in under 3 hours. Aaron replaced copper piping connected to the water heater that was leaking for a fair price, and did not attempt to upsell me on services when I asked him a few questions about other plumbing issues. I will definitely be using MenWon for any future plumbing work. Anyone looking for a reliable, professional, and local to Worcester plumber, I would highly recommend you choose MenWon.

reviews.author: Deb Hinkle
reviews.text: Aaron is professional and kind. He always follows through, cleans up(!), and offers reasonable prices for important work. MenWon has helped me out twice and I will always have their number handy.

reviews.author: Melinda Cyr
reviews.text: I needed to have my leaking kitchen faucet replaced.  Aaron came out the same day I called, gave me a reasonable estimate and performed the work.  He was friendly, professional and knowledgeable.  I will be calling him again as well as recommending him to my family and friends.

reviews.author: Alyssah
reviews.text: Really happy with the service provided. We called about an issue and he came the same day and spent time fixing the problem for a reasonable price. We’ve had his help in the past for another house too. We highly recommend 10/10!

reviews.author: Jake Babineau
reviews.text: Menwon plumbing is responsive and affordable while delivering quality results. You will not be disappointed with the entire experience from faucet to drain!

plumbers.name: The Plumbing Ministry
plumbers.address: 1996 Alvarado St, San Leandro, CA 94577, USA

reviews.author: John Hartmann
reviews.text: Extremely unprofessional. I hired Plumbing Ministry to install a Moen automatic water shutoff in my new home. The technician was given access to my home before we moved in.
