A month later, I was inspecting my crawl space and noticed that my $700 sleeping bag was in the corner where the installation had been done. It was covered in dust and had a hole in it. The technician had clearly taken it from my belongings and used it as a pad while working under my house and left it there! The technician is the ONLY person who had access to my crawl space since the home was purchased, but Plumbing Ministry denied that their employee did this and refused to compensate me for the loss.

reviews.author: Arjmand Yousefian
reviews.text: I recently had sewer drain replacement work done by  The Plumbing Ministry , and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. From start to finish, the team was professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. They explained the process clearly, completed the job on time, and made sure everything was done right. The quality of their work really shows, and they left the area clean when finished. I would highly recommend them to anyone looking for reliable plumbing services!

reviews.author: Deborah W.
reviews.text:
I called the Plumbing Ministry from a referral, and I am so glad I did.
They came to inspect my sewer lateral, only to discover that a previous sewer job one year prior (by a pretend plumber) was not up to code. Image how disappointed I was over the large amount of money literally down the sewer.
The Plumbing Ministry came and made the repair, did my sewer lateral, and it passed both the City & EBMUD standards. The staff was always timely, courtesy, respectful, and hard working. KUDOS to Louis and his team!!

reviews.author: Seido Karasaki
reviews.text:
EDIT: ***See the owner's response. Note the total lack of empathy or ownership for the mistake. Do you really want to do business with plumbers who don't even try to help when something goes wrong, especially when it affects somebody who had nothing to do with the job? I would encourage everyone who is thinking of hiring this company to think twice - read all the negative yelp and google reviews to see what you're really getting into when you hire the Plumbing Ministry. One review even notes that the only positive reviews are from real estate agents who want the bare minimum done. I would highly encourage anyone reading this review who has had problems with the Plumbing Ministry to reach out to the El Cerrito City Department, Better Business Bureau, California Department of Consumer Affairs, and California Attorney General's Office to file a complaint.***

My neighbors hired the Plumbing Ministry to do some plumbing work. This involved the company coming on July 24th and digging up the pipes in the street area between my neighbors place and residence. They then proceeded to accidentally cut our cable and wifi service line, which resulted in a brief interruption to cell service. As of today, July 28th, the wifi service still has not been fixed.

The Plumbing Ministry has not offered to resolve this situation in any way whatsoever. They first tried to deny they had anything to do with it, but after confronting them, they told me they would contact the office and the right people to get this fixed. Since I had not heard anything from them and no work had been done to restore access, I called the office number for the plumbing ministry. I talked to the owner who was apathetic at best, denied all wrongdoing by stating that our cables were unmarked (which does not seem like a reason to cut them in the first place), and told me that there is nothing they can do.

Wifi may seem unimportant to most, but as somebody who works remotely, I find the apathy and the lack of ownership taken by the Plumbing Ministry to be appalling. I believe my experience to be indicative of the work they perform and the service that they provide as a business.

reviews.author: Samuel Sutton
reviews.text: Sewer lateral replacement. Dug out the wrong place at first and ruined a huge section of my yard. The driveway repair was awful and is already cracking. Took multiple days for them to finish the job with a huge hole in my driveway. Didn't care to make it right when asked either. Stay away.

plumbers.name: Doctor Drain & Sewer Cleaning
plumbers.address: 127 Ridgeway Ave, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Sonia Agudo
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Dr. Drain and Sewer Cleaning Company. They were very punctual, professional, and provided excellent service from start to finish. They cleaned the sewer lines thoroughly and took the time to explain what was going on and share their expertise. I really appreciated their honesty and attention to detail. If you’re looking for a reliable company to handle drain or sewer issues, I highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Orbelin Martinez
reviews.text: Great service, friendly staff very fast and efficient took care of our problem. I highly recommend them use them for any small or big job. They will definitely take care of you. Prices are very good. Not like other companies that charge an arm and a leg.

reviews.author: Anita Martinez
reviews.text: Today we encountered a serious problem at our home. The drain was clogged in all our toilets and main drain system in the home, as I called the drain doctor, he came out quickly within the hour, took care of the problem and discovered that there was roots in our sewer system. I highly recommend this company to anyone in the area. Their prices are very friendly and the team works fast and efficient.

reviews.author: Keith R.
reviews.text: Called them on a Friday night for a recurrent issue we’ve had with our sewer backing up, which hasn’t happened in 5 years, nevertheless it needs to be taken care of fairly urgently. Javier spent a good amount of time explaining our options and what we can expect from the service tech coming out. Ended up going with Doctor Drain over the other companies that I called for bids on based on the amount of time they spent on the phone with me, and they were out here within 36 hours of my request. He took extra time working on everything and our drain flow better than it did even before the blockage stopped things up, and showed me where the sludge was collecting in our pipes. Don’t hesitate to call Doctor Drain out for your drain and sewer needs! Reasonably priced, great service in home, great customer service over the phone, and quick to respond, what more can you ask for?

reviews.author: Eric Barrera
reviews.text: I couldn’t be more happier with  having Dr. Drain and sewer coming out and unclogging my basement drain. The pricing he charged me was unbeatable compared to any other companies I’ve called. He’s very reasonable, very professional and knowledgeable when it comes to his work I highly recommend him!

plumbers.name: Intelligent Service: Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 951 N Old Rand Rd Unit 104, Wauconda, IL 60084, USA

reviews.author: sheshannah kuhl
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Anthony DiBari from DiBari Plumbing, and I couldn’t be more impressed. From the moment I called, they were responsive, friendly, and quick to schedule an appointment. When they arrived, they were punctual, respectful of my home, and fully equipped to tackle the issue at hand.
Not only did they fix the problem efficiently, but they also took the time to explain what went wrong and how to prevent it in the future. The pricing was transparent and fair, with no hidden fees or surprises.
I’m genuinely grateful for the level of expertise and customer care they provided. I highly recommend Anthony DiBari to anyone in need of plumbing services. They’ve earned a customer for life!

reviews.author: David Hunter
reviews.text: These guys always do an excellent job. On three different visits, they installed a new AC, furnace, and humidifier. Their prices are reasonable; they installed the new units only a few days after I called; they got the job right the first time; and all the units were quality products. I'll definitely be calling them again if I need plumbing help.

reviews.author: Irv Bomberger
reviews.text: We have used Intelligent Service for over a decade and have consistently enjoyed excellent service.  Most recently we needed them to replace a shower cartridge in an old shower in an old house.  It could have been an expensive fix given the old piping and framing of the house, but our service technician worked with us to carefully fix the problem without structural damage.  This level of expertise and service is invaluable.

reviews.author: Mike M.
reviews.text:
Boomer and the crew fixed our sewer problem quickly and let me exactly what they were doing.  They explained the process perfectly.
Very satisfied and will use them again.

reviews.author: Varg James
reviews.text: Geo was professional and courteous. He came to perform a tuneup service for the furnace. He exudes confidence. Explained everything he performed in detail. I will definitely consider their service in the future.

plumbers.name: Planet Plumbing & Drain
plumbers.address: 1423 Skyway Dr, Longmont, CO 80504, USA

reviews.author: Brian Gibson
reviews.text: Michael Longwell and Brian were on time, clearly communicated the plan and estimated cost, performed the work efficiently, and cleaned up thoroughly afterward. I continue to use Planet Plumbing because they’ve consistently been able to clear roots from my sewer line, something other companies told us couldn’t be done without excavating and replacing the entire line. I appreciate their honesty and practical approach. I’ll definitely call them again.

reviews.author: A.J. Ellis
reviews.text: I rarely write reviews but this case stood out, massive shoutout to Tim from Planet Plumbing. Tim was able to come out same day to provide a same-day estimate to compare against other bids. I had felt uneasy about the bid process, I had gotten so many differing opinions it was hard to diagnose the issue. That all changed when Tim arrived, he was incredibly knowledgeable, patient and honest with his estimate and took time to walk me through all his thinking around our water heater and potential other plumbing work. As a result, Planet Plumbing earned a client for life, whether we buy now or in the future. Tim's info is now saved in my phone and I highly recommend reaching out to Planet Plumbing if you want honest, sincere and professional support. Don't forget to ask for Tim!

reviews.author: Ross Meyer
reviews.text:
Great experience w/ Planet Plumbing. Chase was communicative, detail oriented, competent, and kind. He corrected the prior homeowner's crappy installation and taught me how to better maintain the new installation. I called at 7 AM and they were onsite by 9:45. Pricing was fair. Ask for Chase when you call!

Update: Darren made a followup visit for a different problem and was also great. Helpful and informative, and fixed the problem. Second great experience with Planet Plumbing.

reviews.author: Michael David
reviews.text:
No BS over the phone - I asked for a "kitchen sink snake" cost and they told me. Other companies play the game, not these folks.
When Chase came by he was professional and efficient. Made sure all his bases were covered and that the job was done correctly. If I need these folks again, I will not hesitate to call.

reviews.author: Katie Harmon
reviews.text:
[Update 7/23] The folks at Planet Pluming went above and beyond to help address the issue at my house and help explain the work. Their follow-up two technicians were exceedingly professional and thoughtful and tidy. They helped locate the main sewer line issue and repair a separate issue that had come up during the first visit, all against the cost of the original visit. I so appreciate their follow-up, flexibility, and stellar customer service. I'll look forward to working with them again in the future!

[Original 7/21] I've used Planet Plumbing for years and have always been happy with their service and prices--and have widely recommended them. But my technician today over-stressed my system, leaving gray water pouring in my basement (for me to clean up), left a mess in my shower, was not able to fix a dripping bathroom sink faucet, spent several hours trying to clear a mainline without camera-scoping it first--taking out my toilet in the process (which didn't seem to have any issues). For $750, I got: one new bathtub spigot (that had only a minor problem before), a still-dripping bathroom sink, no improvement or information about the sewer line that is still prone to backup, and messes I need to clean up. I never leave reviews, but I am extremely disappointed in the service, price, and lack of communication about the process and options during the project. When it's hard enough to find time and money for the essentials, this is a super-frustrating experience.

plumbers.name: Cedar Park Plumbers
plumbers.address: 11300 W Parmer Ln #1021, Cedar Park, TX 78613, USA

reviews.author: martin loroima
reviews.text:
I own a rental house in Cedar Park and I had an emergency with a couple of projects that needed to be fixed ASAP. First, my water heater is in the attic and my tenant informed me that there was no hot water in the whole house. The second problem was that when the tenant flushed the toilet there was water backing up to the bathtub. He tried to use the plunger to see if he could get the toilet unclogged but after spending almost an hour trying to unclog it he finally gave up.

All this happened over the weekend and I was out of town. I needed a plumber ASAP cause the tenant had some visitors and he was already frustrated. After calling multiple plumbing companies in the area nobody was available or they simply did not pick up the phone.

Finally, I found Cedar Park Plumbers and I was surprised they picked up the phone at 8pm on a Saturday. I explained what was going on and within 30 minutes they sent a plumber out to my property. He took pictures of the water heater and sent them to me explaining that it was an old unit and needed to be replaced. My water heater has an expansion tank and he gave me a detailed explanation of why I needed another expansion tank.

After that, he ran a camera to find the problem of the clogged line and found some tree roots in the sewer line. The toilet paper could not go through and got stuck causing the clog. He read his machine to remove the roots and unclogged the line. He told me that that was a temporary solution but once you have roots in the pipe they will grow again to the point where they can brake the pipe much worse.

Anyways, he had a brand new water heater and also installed it and the same night he fixed the 2 problems that were causing stress. I’m very very grateful to Cedar Park Plumbers for their availability and for helping me solve these 2 problems. I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Bianca Salazar
reviews.text: I was in need of an emergency plumbing company and they were the only one that picked up the phone. They even came on a weekend. Thumbs up

reviews.author: Christina Torres
reviews.text: We had a shower issue and I called several places. Another company was able to get us in (just happened to be the first one I called) but I would absolutely call Cedar Park Plumbers next time as my first option. I spoke with Ivan, the plumber and he was very professional, transparent, and working to get to us quickly. His estimations were very manageable. I will keep their number for future issues. Their pricing is also really good. If it weren't for the timing which was really just luck of the draw, I would have opted to go with them.

reviews.author: David Hocher
reviews.text: We had a water heater leak on a Saturday and after several calls Cedar Park plumbers was the only that was able to come out that day. Ivrin was knowledgeable, friendly, and did a great job replacing the water heater. They had reasonable costs as well.  Would highly recommend this company

reviews.author: Melu Tava
reviews.text: They are the best plumbers in Cedar Park. They know their craft and have great prices

plumbers.name: Dear Plumber
plumbers.address: 1007 State Hwy 71 Ste 1F, Bastrop, TX 78602, USA

reviews.author: Kathy Pann
reviews.text: Today, I had the pleasure of getting a brand new sink and faucet installed in my kitchen by Skylar from Dear Plumber.  He arrived on time, was extremely pleasant and very professional, with great attention to detail.  My old sink was extremely heavy and quite difficult to get out, but he did a fantastic job of doing so, making sure that everything was handled with care.  It was a lot of work, but he gotc my beautiful new faucet and sink installed in no time.  In fact, there was a very small piece missing from the sink hardware box and he left and drove to Home Depot and bought one for me so my sink would be complete.  I can’t say enough about what a great job he did.  I highly recommend this company for any of your plumbing needs.  I added before and after pictures so you can see the big difference.

reviews.author: Pete Wassdorf
reviews.text: Skylar is a really nice guy and did a good job; but he prices by the job rather than hourly. He gave me a fixed price beforehand of $511 and I agreed with it. But it only took a hour and five minutes. That’s more than my lawyer or accountant charge by the hour and three times what car dealers charge for mechanics. I just didn’t feel good about it in the end. It made me feel like I made a bad decision.

reviews.author: Denise Hebson
reviews.text:
Skylar has been nothing but professional and prompt seeing to our needs. A home built in th 20's and needed a water heater.  He had to make things work in the small area it was installed in. Above and beyond and fair price.

Our primary home, our tankless water heater went out during covid. Skylar searched abd searched for a heater for us. Within less that a week,  one was installed.  Once again a very fair price.

We were selling our primary home, and after inspection,  the now owners wanted sone plumbing done. Skylar to the rescue.  We recommend  Dear Plumber.  I say 5 plus star's. 🌟

reviews.author: Danielle Merida Gillis
reviews.text:
AMAZING JOB and HONEST!
I had another plumber come out that tried to really scam me. Advised a much larger job with huge price. I decided to get a second opinion. Skylar came out. He was honest giving me options and explaining everything along the way. He was quick and fair priced very polite very professional definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Darrel Branhagen
reviews.text: Water heater died and 1st company said they could come in 4 days and a new heater may cost $3000.  Called Dear Plummer and he came same day and had to evaluate and do one physical repair.  Had to dry everything out and following Skyler’s instructions the heater worked by next morning.  One hour and $100 so how happy do you think I am?  Oh, and Skyler and his assistant were very pleasant to work with, and they will be the first I’ll call in the future.

plumbers.name: Wilcoxen Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3436 RM 1431, Kingsland, TX 78639, USA

reviews.author: Jaime Austin
reviews.text: Had a leak in my attic water heater and water was leaking out my overflow.  They can same day and did an amazing job with tough accessibility.  Fair price.  Great 2 techs that came out.  Courteous and respected my house.  Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: James Fountain
reviews.text: Called Wilcoxen Plumbing due to a leak at the water meter, they had someone out w/in 2 hours. Fixed the leak in 30 minutes. James & Jose were friendly, professional. I highly recommend Wilcoxen Plumbing.

reviews.author: Jenn Charlton
reviews.text: Labor and parts very reasonable. Showed up quickly! Will call for all plumbing needs from now on.

reviews.author: Molly Edie
reviews.text: Slab leaks are extremely costly yet the Wilcoxen Team KNOW what they are doing & re-routed the leaking water line thru the attic. Very thankful for their alternate plan. Ethan explained things to us & was very professional, polite & so was his helper. They resolved the issue quicker & cheaper than expected so we are quite pleased! Wilcoxen have been our plumbers since we moved into this old home a few years ago & will continue to be our Team. THANK YOU WILCOXEN! Friendly & reliable staff. The BEST!

reviews.author: Carolyn Word
reviews.text: The people at Wilcoxen Plumbing are friendly and professional, and they handled my needs rapidly. Joey and Kameron did  exceptional work on my dripping faucet plus put in new shut off valves as well. They are highly knowledgeable and competent,  as well as courteous. They kept me informed of every task they did as the repairs progressed. The overall cost was a fair price for the good work done.

plumbers.name: Mikes Plumbing Chicago : 24 Hour Plumber Chicago, Emergency Plumbers In Glenview, Evanston, Glencoe, Niles & Skokie
plumbers.address: 7214 N Crawford Ave, Lincolnwood, IL 60712, USA

reviews.author: V A
reviews.text: Mike’s Plumbing came through for our condo building when a major pipe burst in the basement, threatening to cause even more damage to the property. Mike and his team responded immediately, identified the issue, and fixed it quickly and efficiently. Their professionalism, speed, and attention to detail truly stood out. Thanks to their prompt work, the water was stopped before it could cause further damage. I highly recommend Mike’s Plumbing to anyone looking for a reliable, knowledgeable, and trustworthy plumbing company.

reviews.author: kevin orozco
reviews.text:
Mike and his team are great!
He replaced my 3-unit building entire water supply and drainage system.
Mike and his team are profesional, respectful, clean, and understanding to one’s situation.
Mike was quick and happy to respond to any questions and concerns I had along the way. His prices are fair and reasonable compared to others.
You can tell Mike has many years of knowledge and a master in his craft.
A bonus is he is also well connected to other trade professionals if your tackling other projects like me.
Will definitely be a repeating customer!

reviews.author: Chris/Tammy Clsm
reviews.text: Mike and his team were absolutely top notch. Their professionalism, honesty, attention to detail and service surpassed my expectations. They replaced old pipes in the bathroom sink as well as the kitchen sink. His knowledge and experience is vast and the job was done properly. I would trust Mike and his team to work on any plumbing issues. Do not look any further. Call and have the peace of mind the job will be done correctly.

reviews.author: Shawnalee Jones
reviews.text: Mike came out on Saturday after I had an emergency sewage backup.  He came out within an hour and worked all day to make the repairs.  He is honest, patient, and a great plumber!

reviews.author: Emil Thomas
reviews.text: I can't recommend Mike  highly enough! He was prompt, professional, and incredibly knowledgeable. He quickly diagnosed the issue and had everything fixed in no time, all while keeping things neat and tidy. Communication was great throughout the whole process, and the pricing was fair and transparent. It's such a relief to have a reliable plumber I can trust—I'll definitely be calling him again for any future plumbing needs!

plumbers.name: Friendly Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1128 Algonquin Rd, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Karen Smith
reviews.text: Michael is terrific! Quick response. Knowledgeable. Friendly and extremely fair. Professional,  respectful, direct. Follows through and truly cares. Love this company.  Can't say enough good things!!

reviews.author: Paulette C
reviews.text: Friendly Plumbing is a wonderful company.  We had a leak in our storage area and were so worried about what was happening.  I called Friendly Plumbing and Michael was here the next day.  Looked at the issue and told me all I needed was an end cap on a vent pipe and he wouldn't take any payment from me. So nice to work with an honest company.

reviews.author: m m
reviews.text:
I had an emergency water heater issue on a Sunday and called Friendly Plumbing.  Even though they were technically closed, they answered my call, gave me instructions for safety until they could arrive the following morning and provided me with warranty information on the unit within minutes of us talking

The next day when Michael arrived he knew within minutes what the issue was, explained why it malfunctioned and had the faulty parts installed.  Because of the previous days water leak, the unit wouldn’t stay lit because everything was still wet so we set up a large fan to dry it out and he returned later to finalize the repair.  Michael has done other work at my home over the years and it’s always done meticulously, professionally and  of course Friendly!  He’s a plumbing genius!  Fortunately for me he installed a floor drain years ago in the utility closet and that saved my adjoining room’s flooring during this incident

From start to finish this company was amazing- made a tough situation much easier to navigate. Highly recommend them for sll your plumbing needs

reviews.author: Nany Michael
reviews.text:
Total ripoff! I hired them to take a look for a partially clogged toilet. A guy came and asked, if I wanna remodel?!!! I said no
He said; well, it will cost you $825!!!
For what?!! He said we will remove the whole toilet and unclogged.
I told him it’s just a partial clogging. He said:” I know but that’s our price”!!
Total RIPOFF

reviews.author: Susan McKinney
reviews.text: I cannot speak highly enough of Friendly plumbing. The owner is so conscientious. He resolved my tree root drain clog quickly and competently, left the area spotless,  and even resolved an additional issue I had with low water pressure in my faucet. He was also so personable and polite. I would hire him any time.

plumbers.name: Mass Pike Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 100 Front St suite 401, Worcester, MA 01608, USA

reviews.author: Allan Pires
reviews.text:
Doing business with Evan was a satisfying experience! He came to rescue me when I most needed. Long story short: The pipe connection to my water heater burst on a cold Friday night around 10:50pm. Instantly I was left with no hot water in the house. I contacted Evan first thing Saturday morning, after seeing all his great reviews. He promptly showed up, diagnosed my water heater with rusty pipes, and gave me a fair estimate. Evan replaced my water heater and all the plumbing connections on the same day.
From now on I’ll be Evan’s customer for all my HVAC/plumbing needs. Thank you, Evan! Keep up the outstanding work!
Allan Pires

reviews.author: Nicole Ruf
reviews.text: Evan has been our go to Plumber for a couple years now. He is very responsive with communications and he always makes room for us in his schedule. We feel confident and safe with Evan as our plumber. He is respectful, trustworthy and reliable. He has been able to diagnose all our problems and fix them same day or within a couple days. If you are looking for a reliable plumber for any of your plumbing problems or emergent needs Evan is your guy. He will show up, ready to figure out how to help your family best, he will communicate clearly, and he will get the job done in a timely manner.

reviews.author: Gigi Moise
reviews.text: Evan was dispatched to my home due to my toilet not working properly and bathroom sink clogged . He arrived on time and went straight to work. He was attentive to the situation . Explained every step of the way . Even caught a leak I wasn’t aware of. 🫣Identified the problem and remediated as quick as possible. I couldn’t be more happy with the service. If you’re looking for prompt, professional, knowledgeable  and overall positive experience look no further then Mass Pike Plumbing and Heating. Tell them Gigi sent you .

reviews.author: Maria “Ma”
reviews.text: Evan is highly efficient and dependable. I was having serious issues with my steam heater and three of my radiators. The work done was professional and there was a thorough explanation given. All my questions were answered and I'd have to say I'm 100 percent confident.

reviews.author: Stefanie DePaul
reviews.text:
Evan Ryan & Mass Pike Plumbing & Heating are THE BEST! Evan is one of the hardest working people I have ever met in my entire life. I met Evan years ago and whenever I have any issue with my plumbing, Evan is there right away! Evan has installed a rainforest showerhead for me. Evan has come on a Sunday and fixed a clogged kitchen sink that was full of crushed egg shells in the garbage disposal. (he also taught me that the garbage disposal is for crumbs and not for actual food!) Evan has come to my office and unclogged a toilet on a Sunday. He is also installed plumbing for a washer and dryer at my office. He always gives a fair price and he always cleans up after himself and leaves the place nicer than he found it.

I highly recommend Evan and Mass Pike plumbing and heating! 10/10 Recommend! 😀

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 895 Hampshire Rd, Stow, OH 44224, USA

reviews.author: Charles Honsinger
reviews.text: purchase new water heater back in 12/12/2024 water heater under warranty but labor to install new water heater was 1600.00 the biggest ripoff I would never recommend rotor rooter out stow Ohio for any plumbing issues

reviews.author: Abbey kavanagh Marshall
reviews.text: So extremely disappointed by this company. We had a sewer back up in our basement, they came out in a timely manner which I appreciated. However, the guy looked into the pipe with flashlight and determined it was a “sludge buildup” and recommended we got hydro jetting for 738 dollars. Turns out after the problem getting worse and getting a second opinion it was tree roots.

reviews.author: Michael Junewicz
reviews.text: I had an emergency at my home with a couple of drains backed up. I didn't know what to expect about how the issues would be addressed. Roto Rooter sent a plumber on the same day that I called, and he addressed both drains quickly. I worried that the second drain might be a big ordeal, but the plumber was able to snake it without changing the price he'd already quoted for the first drain. One of the drains was a floor drain, and it finally has a proper cover on it, as it has needed for a while. I'm very happy with my service.

reviews.author: Ron Long
reviews.text:
Well, I had about as good of an experience as a person with sewage in his basement can have! Brian, my technician, was polite, punctual, articulate and informed! He answered all of my questions and understood my reservations about how we needed to proceed. In the end, it was taken care of professionally and efficiently. I was educated as to what caused the problem (That camera that can go out the sewer line was pretty cool!) and given some reasonable recommendations on follow up service.
I called Roto-Rooter because of their good reputation and I was not disappointed!
Lee
Stow, Ohio

reviews.author: Steve Shimko
reviews.text: My 86 year old grandmother paid $5,000 to have a 150 foot section of downspout pipe that goes to the street replaced. We had a technician out initially to try and snake the drain. The tech worked for 20 minutes with a hydro jet and decided that the pipe was broken underground. They charged $500 for a 20 minute service. He then told us that another tech would be out the following day to run a camera and locator through the pipe to decide what further action needed to be taken. That tech was there for another 20 minutes and did nothing but right a quote for having the pipe replaced. He initially told us that it would cost $3,900 dollars, he then spoke on the phone with a supervisor who told us that it would cost an additional $4,500 to have it fixed. So that’s how we got to $5,000. We were told they would call the day before before they came to do the work which they did not. They did the work in 1 day. It wasn’t a small job, but hardly worth $5,000.  They left a huge mess  of boulders, roots and broken concrete on my grandmas yard and told her that it would “settle out in 5 to 8 months” and that they weren’t landscapers. For 5k they could’ve tried harder to clean up their mess. They also took $20 worth of corrugated pipe that I had temporarily rigged up so that her basement wouldn’t flood. Sure, she now has a good piece of pipe in the ground but I’m pretty unhappy with the way they treated my grandmother and her property. They didn’t cover the concrete that they put in and it rained on it. The day after, my grandma is almost in tears because of the way they left her yard.

plumbers.name: AHS/TOPTEC Plumbing & Sewer Repair
plumbers.address: 345 E Park Ave, Libertyville, IL 60048, USA

reviews.author: Benjamin Ferdinand
reviews.text:
I just moved into a new house and called Dan at AHS Plumbing twice for two separate plumbing emergencies within our first week!  First up was a sewer line clog.  Dan arrived quickly, cleared the clog and offered recommendations to avoid future problems.  Call #2 was at 4am during a heavy rain storm as my old sump pump and the battery backup were failing to keep up with the rain.  Dan answered the phone on the first try, and after I explained the problem, he was at my house in 40 mins.!  We ended up replacing two sump pumps and battery backup systems for a very fair price, especially considering it was all done same day.

Is AHS Plumbing cheap?  No, but you get what you pay for.  Done right quickly and the first time.  No BS add-on charges.  Very skilled and professional service.  Incredibly responsive.  Dan earned my trust and will be my “go to” plumber for all future needs.

reviews.author: Linda Louis
reviews.text: I had a plumbing issue in my kitchen last night and called at 5:30 pm. By 8am this morning, Dan was at my door! He had booties to walk through the house, offered thorough explanations and practical advice, and fixed the problem in about an hour. He also checked out the pipes in my basement to make sure that everything was in proper order there, explaining what had completely mystified me about our plumbing. Thank you so much, Dan! I hope I won't have to call again, but I definitely will go with AHS if I do experience more issues in the future!

reviews.author: Mathew Joseph
reviews.text: Dan did an amazing job installing shutoff valves for my homes existing outdoor hydrants. He also installed one for me in my garage. He was on-time, courteous and very helpful. I highly recommend Dan to anyone with any type of plumbing repair or installation!

reviews.author: Kim W.
reviews.text: Dan and his partner worked on changing Several faucets and even came back to my house few days later when our laundry machine backed up with water. They did a great job in all the work they did. I had alot of questions about our plumbing and he answered all of them without being annoyed by all my questions. I trust them when it comes to doing plumbing around my home and am grateful for the work they did. They are honest, do quality work and are affordable, my husband and I are so glad we had them fix our plumbing issues!

reviews.author: Brittani Michela
reviews.text: To say that Dan at AHS Plumbing is a superhero doesn’t reflect the magnitude of how outstanding he is. We called Dan in an emergency situation - out sewage pipe sheared away from foundation. We had major backup with raw sewage leaking onto our foundation. Dan answered our call and drove right over to talk to us. He was calm, knowledgeable, friendly, and reassuring. He quoted us half of what local plumbers and bigger companies (Roto-Rooter) were wanting to charge. He fixed our issue and brought the plumbing up to code. Turns out, it’s a very common problem in the Mundelein area, so Dan knew what to do...he’s done it, literally, a hundred times, in this area. We were so lucky to have called him. Not only was he extremely efficient with this job, he took the time to explain everything he and his team was doing. We felt that communication was totally transparent and honest. If you need plumbing help, call AHS Plumbing!

plumbers.name: Wendricks-White Plumbing
plumbers.address: 912 W Greenwood Ave, Waukegan, IL 60087, USA

reviews.author: Mike Carlson
reviews.text: Leaky exterior faucet was replaced by Ed, who was friendly and worked efficiently and quickly. I'm satisfied with the work performed and will certainly use them again. Thanks!

reviews.author: Doug Carlson
reviews.text: Mario and Fernando were very personable, friendly and professional from the first minute. They told me what they were going to do and how much it would cost. And kept to both their time and cost estimates with a smile.

reviews.author: Frances Groves
reviews.text: Tom arrived on time with a smile to perform an emergency repair on the leak from one of the pipes in my basement.  He did an excellent job and left the work site clean and tidy.  I have been using Wendricks for all my plumbing work for more than 20 years and am very happy with their prompt and excellent services.

reviews.author: Linda Kerby
reviews.text:
Great company. Amazingly attentive and prompt to fix our plumbing problem. Ed was very  professional and knew exactly what to do. The job was over in no time! We have used Wendrick’s for many years and will continue to do so. The best!
Also, the young lady setting up appointments was very helpful.  She went above and beyond to accommodate our situation.  She actually seems to care about her job and providing service. Not at all like other companies that act like they’re “doing you a favor” by even talking to you! Keep up the great work!

reviews.author: Darin Kuklis
reviews.text: David did a fantastic job.  Very professional and personable.  He explained everything he was doing and showed respect for my home and property.

plumbers.name: Clog Doc
plumbers.address: 556 Tallmadge Rd, Cuyahoga Falls, OH 44221, USA

reviews.author: Evan Matthews
reviews.text: Jonathan and his crew could not have been more efficient and professional. They quickly diagnosed the pipe issue I was having and provided a quick solution. They were informative and worked hard over the course of 2 days to get my plumbing back in shape! I highly recommend ClogDoc!

reviews.author: B. Johnson
reviews.text: We highly recommend Jonathan and his team (John, Joe, and others). They are one of the best contractors we have ever worked with, demonstrating honesty, expertise, efficiency, and exceptional skill. We have hired them for projects ranging from simple drain cleaning to extremely large, complex new system installation job. In every case, they orchestrated the work with remarkable confidence and competency, making each project truly a work of art.

reviews.author: Stefanie Cardinal
reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things about Clog Doc! The owner, Jonathan and his crew, Phil, Francisco and Joe were all super nice and really pay attention to detail. They spent 12 -14 hrs over 2 days really looking inside the pipe, hydro-jetting, snaking, re-jetting and looking again to ensure they didn’t miss anything. Due to the condition of our pipe we went with their re-lining process for our situation. Jonathan and the guys really took the time to show us how it worked and what to expect. They actually use a high-power UV light to set the epoxy liner that they put in place. They are very thorough and Phil is funny as hell! Unfortunately for our situation, we had to have a hole dug in our yard so they could gain access to our pipe, however just know that this relining process can also be done without them having to dig at all! From start to finish, the men were all great to work with considering the situation at hand. And they are also very reasonable! We got the vibe that they cared way more about the job they were doing instead of the payment. They really cared and their cost came in WAY lower than other companies we had estimates from. Definitely give them a call if you’re having any issues! We can’t thank them enough and if we ever any issues with anything again we will call them first for sure!

reviews.author: Krystal Mudery
reviews.text: If anyone is looking to have a sewer repair done. This is the place to call. Very knowledgeable staff. Timely and efficient.  Step by step communication the entire way from start to finish.  I was never left wondering what was the next steps or process.  Johnathan was in constant communication while job was being performed,  as well sent videos of before and after . I am.very pleased with the service they provided.  I couldn't recommend a better company.

reviews.author: James Tolley
reviews.text: Clog Doc did an excellent job of cleaning the main drain in my house. They showed me (via camera) the condition of the pipe before and after. They went above and beyond and had to work longer than expected. But they stayed until the job was complete. They were friendly, and considerate about cleaning up. I highly recommend them.

plumbers.name: Mint Plumbing LLC
plumbers.address: 11921 Freedom Dr Suite 550, Reston, VA 20190, USA

reviews.author: Adam Hall
reviews.text: Josh did a great job with our water heater! He gave us a fair price and the product was excellent. More importantly, when there was a small issue nine months later and we reached out to him, he got back with us that night and was at our house early the next morning where he promptly fixed the problem. We highly recommend Josh to anyone looking for a plumber!

reviews.author: Omar
reviews.text: I got a quick response from Josh after my initial outreach. He came in the next day and saw a major issue with a badly leaking pipe that he able to fix within a few hours. He explained everything that was going on, kept me informed of how my system was set up, and set up a better system for our home.

reviews.author: Carl Hutzler
reviews.text:
You can’t go wrong with Josh and Mint Plumbing. Extremely detail oriented. Extremely professional. He solves plumbing problems the first time! Just call him and get on the schedule.

Josh fixed a crappy plumbing job that my original installer did and added a couple of vibration damping/anti hammer attractors. And my problem is solved!

I think it’s beautiful too!?

___________

I had Josh come out a second time to look at a new vibration issue and it turns out the water pressure adjustment valve was the culprit. It provided 65lbs/in2 and was not adjustable. My shower DTV control has a rating of 45lb/in2 MAX and the higher pressure was the cause of the knocking. Josh arrived and had a sense that this may be the issue and even brought a new pressure adjustment valve. We tested everything first and then replaced the adjustment valve. Everything is working once again! So nice to have someone with as much experience as Josh to know ahead of time what the issue might be. You don't find people like this everywhere!

reviews.author: Michel Heflin
reviews.text: As a property manager, it is hard to find good subcontractors and I need to say I have found one of the best plumbers out there that I have worked with in my field of over 35 years. I have had several emergency calls and surgical centers that need to be absolutely sterilized. He has come in and done work. You could never tell that he was there, and it was always cleaner when he left from his arrival. He has helped me do everything from installing new fixtures, plumbing and even a major leak on a 2 inch main hotline for an entire building, he had it so much patched to help slow the water leak down until we could shut the building totally down and drain it. He was absolutely fantastic and doing this. His prices are always extremely reasonable and sometimes I scratch my head on the price on a couple of occasions , I thought the price was way too low from my past experience dealing with other contractors. He’s extremely honest and will explain things to you. You cannot find a better man than him. I trust him and don’t need to stand over him while he’s doing his job because I know it’ll be right when he is done  with no cut corners which is strange and today’s time. I hope this help people realize on when you find somebody good you hold onto them so I definitely recommending him for anybody that needs plumbing work larger small and I would like to thank him personally for all of his hard work , and responding quickly to all emergency calls that I’ve had to place with him and his timing.

reviews.author: Sandy Norris
reviews.text: Josh is very detailed and professional.  He provides prompt service and warranties his work for a year. Highly recommend this vendor!

plumbers.name: The Secret Plumber
plumbers.address: 6726 W Wakefield Dr, Alexandria, VA 22307, USA

reviews.author: KatLMG
reviews.text:
I am so incredibly happy that I found Smooth Plumbing!  They are always able to schedule you without delay, and should you have any questions, their communication is quick - even at 9 PM.

The technicians are highly trained, very knowledgeable, communicative and downright nice!  The first job I booked, I was sent a bio for my technician, as well as a tracking map to know when he would arrive at my house.

Pricing is fair and upfront and you are always given at least three options to choose from as far as the work that could/will be done and what it costs.  I had two toilets replaced by Smooth recently, and thank goodness the technician was knowledgeable enough to know my issues were most likely stemming from high pressure in my home (THANKS TJ!).  Being as it was time to replace my hot water heater, I did so today and also had a gauge installed that will even out high water pressure when it happens.  Talk about fast, he did it all by himself within two hours.

Thank you Smooth Plumbing, I have not felt lied to nor taken advantage of.  As of this point, I do not believe I will go anywhere else when I need service!

reviews.author: Haley Johnson
reviews.text: Ian was so helpful and knowledgeable with my frozen pipe situation. I would recommend this company to any new homeowners needing a plumber.

reviews.author: David Kofalt
reviews.text: After my initial contact, they got me scheduled very quickly. They completed the job in a good amount of time and it was very reasonably priced. They explained the work done and gave appropriate suggestions for possible future work with definite care and not pressure. They were professional, courteous, and very friendly. Will definitely work with them again and will recommend to friends.

reviews.author: lisa coakley
reviews.text: Absolutely delighted with the service from Two Irish Plumbers! They arrived precisely when they said they would, and wasted no time getting to work. Their professionalism was evident as they quickly and efficiently tackled the plumbing issue, explaining each step in a way that was easy to understand. Not only did they fix the immediate problem, but they also took the time to clearly explain how I could prevent similar issues in the future, which was incredibly helpful. I truly appreciate their expedited and professional work, and I wouldn't hesitate to call them again for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Donald O'Connor
reviews.text: Steve was professional and courteous and came on time. He kept me informed of his systematic approach to finding the cause of the problem, and let me know what he was going to do as each step moved forward. I highly recommend him if you are having a plumbing problem.

plumbers.name: Walker Plumbing Co Inc
plumbers.address: 375 Green Acres, Georgetown, TX 78626, USA

reviews.author: Daniel C
reviews.text:
Had a great experience with Noah & Walker Plumbing Co. We woke up at 7 am to the sound of the 10 year old+ water heater leaking in the garage. Called around and landed on Walker Plumbing. They managed to expedite a technician within the hour and we got a brand new water heater installed (and old one removed off the property!) by 12 pm. Awesome full service.

Noah provided great & knowledgable service and we will definitely call Walker for our future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Carol Graff
reviews.text: Walker plumbing is awesome! They came out within 20 minutes and fixed a major problem. Owner is very nice and trustworthy. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Buddy Bradford
reviews.text: Walker Plumbing is second-to-none incredible! We have two fairly new awesome commodes that had minor issues. Upon calling Francine today, Nathan came to our home to fix the issues at no charge. We were very grateful! Walker Plumbing is the very best plumbing company in Georgetown, Texas. Walker Plumbing is dependable, 100% ethical, friendly, and everything you will want in a plumbing company! Mr. Walker is a great man as well! Buddy and Sue Bradford

reviews.author: Michelle Long
reviews.text: Payton came out a couple times (we had to order free warranty parts from Moen) to complete repairs in my parents’ kitchen and 2 showers.  He did great work quickly, cleanly.  They were super satisfied.  Very highly recommend.  Thank you, Payton!

reviews.author: Laura Facchini
reviews.text: Noah came out to correct a different plumbing company’s mistake and did not charge me. He was on time and courteous too! I will plan on using Walker Plumbing next time.

plumbers.name: Convenient Plumbing
plumbers.address: 200 South Dr, South Elgin, IL 60177, USA

reviews.author: Ami Engel
reviews.text:
The team at Convenient Plumbing is great. I have used them for years to help with all kinds of needs, large and small. They are responsive and strive to educate you when they are doing repairs so you understand the need. They won’t do a repair if it is not warranted, and they will talk you through those situations as well.

We have had their help with our toilet, the outdoor spigots, the ejector pump, and our water heater. They even did a camera view of the pipe that goes out to the street.

I appreciate their service and certainly recommend their services to others!

reviews.author: Jeremy AmRhein
reviews.text: Had a great experience working with Convenient Plumbing.  They turned my Thursday night nightmare into an early Friday morning solution.  My water heater broke down and Ed and his son Jeremy came the very next morning to diagnose the problem.  After a discussion about the cost to repair versus the cost to replace (10 yr old heater), I decided to replace the unit.  They replaced the unit within a few hours.  Fast, efficient and honest.  Straight forward communication, no upselling or pressure.  Rare to find these days.  Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Joe F
reviews.text: We just had Convenient Plumbing fix an issue with our ejector pit backing up. They were upfront about all charges and options to resolve the issue. They were  amazing, professional, and speedy. Great work, great company.

reviews.author: Leo
reviews.text: They are now my go to plumbing company. Called 3 different plumbers. Ed called me back within minutes and stopped by within 15 to take a look at what needed to be done. Quoted me on the spot, scheduled to have the village shut off the water a few days later and was here a few minutes after the water was turned off. Ed and Jeremy worked quickly, explained everything and answered all my questions. They did a great job and I will definitely recommend them to anyone needing a professional plumber.

reviews.author: Carlos Durand
reviews.text: Had recently needed our ejector pump replaced, called and was quoted properly over the phone and the work was done within 2-3 hours of me calling, and here I thought I was just going to be calling to schedule! Walked me through what was done and some tips with the new pump, highly recommend for anyone in the Fox Valley area that is looking for both reliable and speedy plumbing service!

plumbers.name: All Suburban Plumbing & Sewer Service Inc.
plumbers.address: 15W134 Lexington St, Elmhurst, IL 60126, USA

reviews.author: Jana McNally
reviews.text:
It’s wonderful to have a company that you can rely on and All Suburban is that for our family.  We’ve been using them for almost 10 years and they have always been fair, reliable, responsive, and done great work!

I noticed a one star review and I believe they must have the wrong company because they reference an office woman and there is no office woman with this company. When you call you get directly connected to the plumber (a male).

reviews.author: DK 13
reviews.text:
I was trying to change all the powder outlets, switches and a light fixture on my new condo by myself. When I faced a difficulty I gave up and I called these guys. The guy on the phone was super friendly and helpful. He told me instead of coming here and charge me he could help me on the phone and tell me what to do since it was an easy fix… and he did it!!! I really appreciate that!
Honest, helpful and kind person, what’s why in any future project I’ll call them and also recommend to everybody.

reviews.author: Jim Becker
reviews.text: When I needed help with an important plumbing issue, I called All Suburban for the first time. The person on the phone was professional and within 1 hr, two pro's showed up and did the job quickly and at a fair price. The guys that did the work were outstanding and explained things perfectly to me. I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Nancy O'Brien
reviews.text: There should be a 5 star option as that is what All Suburban Plumbing deserves. A leaky water heater required a visit from them. It needed to be replaced. All Suburban determined it was still under warranty and took care of getting a new one and installing it in less than a day. The only finger I lifted was to dial their number and you should too if you are in need of their services. Prompt, kind, solid, trustworthy people. Thank you All Suburban!

reviews.author: Hollie R
reviews.text: I had used this company for 2 small jobs previously and everything was fine.  Had them come back out to rod a bathtub drain and this was absolutely the worst service experience.  After the team left, I was cleaning up (they don't cover their boots), and when I went rinse out the tub, water started flowing through the ceiling in the bathroom below as a hole had been poked through my pipe.  I immediately called the company but as it was 5pm, they couldn't send anyone until the next day.  When the office called the next morning, I asked would their insurance cover the work given what had occurred, the office woman tells me "don't start with me, we don't have to send anyone out." This cost me an insurance claim, my deductible, and months of repairs.

plumbers.name: GTX Plumbing
plumbers.address: 107 Halmar Cove #141, Georgetown, TX 78628, USA

reviews.author: Kristi Carney
reviews.text: GTX Plumbing was AMAZING! They came out so quickly to help us with plumbing issues and provided outstanding service. Their team is always incredibly prompt, professional, and a pleasure to work with. We truly appreciate how fast and efficient they were — highly recommend GTX Plumbing to anyone in Georgetown!

reviews.author: Lahari
reviews.text: Five stars!!!! We had a burst spigot during the freeze, and they were absolute lifesavers. They actually FaceTimed with us yesterday to assess the damage and give us peace of mind when no one else could make it out. Then, they braved the icy roads today to complete the repair. Professional, kind, and incredibly helpful.

reviews.author: Christina Bhatti
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough good things about GTX plumbing. I called them for an emergency when the company my home warranty works with couldn't make it.
Lloyd is AMAZING!!! He is fast, responsive, and had the issue fixed quickly. The customer service is out of this world. GTX plumbing is now in my speed dial.

reviews.author: Michael Skawin
reviews.text: I have utilized GTX since the big freeze. Lloyd walked me thru on the phone on what to do to prepare for it...this was the first time I called them and I was not a regular customer at that time. During the freeze they sent update texts re scheduling, etc. I could not contact my previous plumber but GTX was there for me. Since then they have provided a new water heater and flushed it on regular basis. I also had a problem with my kitchen sink faucet on night and I called an Lloyd answered and walked me thru how to fix the situation. GTX is the"real deal"'.' I would not go to anyone else.

reviews.author: Jimmy Voyles
reviews.text: Very impressed with professionalism and installation quality of our Gemline KDC filtration system.  Thank you Christopher and Cesar!

plumbers.name: Cork's Plumbing, Heating, & Cooling
plumbers.address: 10249 Vine St, Huntley, IL 60142, USA

reviews.author: Joel Weideman
reviews.text: My furnace decides to go out when it's zero degrees on a Saturday.  I call Cork's and they find the part for my 20 year old furnace.  Gil shows up and I'm back in business 30 minutes after he arrives.  Can't ask for more than that!!!  They do great plumbing work too!

reviews.author: J. M.
reviews.text:
Needed 2 bathroom faucets replaced. Dave came out, was prompt, personable, knowledgeable and professional. Very neat. Was appreciative that we emptied out the vanities and gave him room to work.
We've used Cork's several times - replaced toilets, our water heater...
Very reasonable and they do excellent work!
Save yourself some time Googling and collecting estimates, just call Cork's!

reviews.author: Edward P
reviews.text: Came out to fix a code 33 on my furnace, overheating. changed the limit switch that took about a hour, never checked the furnace for other problems that could cause the problem and told me to lower the gas valve if the problem persists a highly dangerous thing to do then took the old part to resell to someone else that was in working order.  $263.00 bill. Never again Corks

reviews.author: Emotional Sobriety Retreat
reviews.text: I called this company for an HVAC repair, and the lady who answered told me they were too busy and didn’t want the business. I’ve honestly never heard anything like that before. If you’re looking for reliable service, I’d suggest finding someone who actually wants to work with customers. I wonder if the owner actually knows the lady is turning people away.

reviews.author: Venkata Seera
reviews.text: The service is very reliable and reasonable price, not over priced like others.  Frank is an amazing person

plumbers.name: Anything Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3229 Maysville Rd NE, Huntsville, AL 35811, USA

reviews.author: Sharon Bachle
reviews.text: Responded quickly. Came out same day I called, Monday. Was back on Wednesday to replace 17 year old water heater. Updated the plumbing as well as installed Rheeme 50 gallon. Price was very reasonable, less than other quote we got and certainly more expedient. They were professional, responsive and really nice people. I highly recommend Anything Plumbing.

reviews.author: Belinda Conley
reviews.text: Anytime and everytime we've called upon Anything Plumbing, they've answered and did the jobs quickly and at a reasonable cost. Today, with a full schedule, they were able to fit us in between calls and explained to us what we needed to do since he didn't have my particular part on his truck. We were able to get the part that night and fix it because of his instructions. If we couldn't get the part, he was coming back to fix it in the morning. They will continue to get my business each and every time because they treat us like they want our business and not like they are looking to get rich off of a job. If you are looking for reasonable and reliable, I recommend using Anything Plumbing.

reviews.author: Christopher Tobias
reviews.text: Excellent! Quality and pride in work! Organized and courteous! Clear communication and great follow through! 17 yo hot water heater replaced within 24 hours of initial call! Very fair price. God blessed us with finding Anything Plumbing!

reviews.author: Scott Lambert
reviews.text: Highly recommend Anything Plumbing! We had a leak in an unknown location. They came out quickly and found and repaired the leak quickly.  They were also much more thorough and affordable than another plumber we had out previously. They took great care in ensuring our yard was kept neat and clean throughout the process. Anything Plumbing will be the first people we call for future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Lo Wang
reviews.text: Jarrett at Anything Plumbing was very professional from start to finish. He gave me a 45 minute heads up of when he would be there which gave me time to get home to meet him. He was very thorough with his troubleshooting and quickly figured out my issue. Not only was he quick to figure it out but he had my pressure regulator valve replaced and the hot water heater leak repaired in just under 2 hours. I wouldn't hesitate to call him again in the future with any plumbing needs. Thanks Jarrett!

plumbers.name: Dale the Plumbing Pro
plumbers.address: 584 Atrium Dr ste 110, Vernon Hills, IL 60061, USA

reviews.author: Michael Norris
reviews.text: Here’s the revised review based on your requirements: Honest, helpful, and friendly service. We reached out to have our water heater looked at and got connected with Roger. From the beginning, he made everything easy and explained what needed to be done. Roger even helped us figure out that our water heater was still under warranty, so we were able to get the replacement parts for free. He gave us clear instructions on how to get the warranty parts, and also offered to take care of the whole project for us. When the parts arrived, Roger came over, installed them, and also fixed our kitchen sink while he was here. The prices were very reasonable. He took the time to explain everything he was doing, which was really nice because we like to understand what’s going on with our plumbing. We appreciate his honesty, and how available he was throughout the process. We feel like we found a plumber we can trust for any future work, like repiping or other plumbing repairs.

reviews.author: Billy D
reviews.text: Dale the Plumbing Pro was recommended to me by a neighbor in Vernon Hills when I discovered two separate water leaks in my crawl space. They were easy to reach, quick to respond, and showed a high level of professionalism. Zachary was the plumber who came out to help, and he was polite, knowledgeable, and worked hard to get everything fixed. He not only repaired both water leaks to our satisfaction, but while checking things over, he also found a gas leak we didn't know about. Zachary returned soon after and took care of that issue as well. I would definitely recommend their plumbing services to anyone looking for reliable and thorough work.

reviews.author: Jared B
reviews.text: When my water heater started leaking, I reached out to a few different plumbing companies for quotes. One company sent Camden to my home in Vernon Hills to check things out and give me several options, all at no charge. Camden patiently answered all my questions about the different water heater choices and explained everything clearly. I decided to go with this company because their reputation was great and my experience with Camden was excellent. The installer arrived on time the next morning, replaced my old tank, and made sure everything was working perfectly. He was very friendly, kept me updated throughout the job, and answered every question I had about the new system. Everyone I spoke with in the office was also very helpful and quick to respond, making the whole process smooth and stress-free. I had a wonderful experience and will definitely call them again for any plumbing or water heater needs. I highly recommend them to anyone in Vernon Hills looking for reliable and professional plumbers!

reviews.author: L Calhoun
reviews.text: We had three drains in our house that were draining very slowly. I tried everything I could to fix them myself, but nothing worked. I decided to call Dale the Plumbing Pro. Roger came by the next day and was very knowledgeable and professional. He took the time to explain each step as he worked on the problem. Since our house has older pipes, it turned out that a single blockage was causing issues with both sink drains and the shower drain. Roger found the problem by checking through the vent in the attic and was able to clear the clog. Now all our drains are working perfectly and water flows out quickly, just like it should. Roger was efficient, thorough, and did a fantastic job. I'm very happy with the service!

reviews.author: Lincoln Rodriguez
reviews.text: Here's a revised version of your customer feedback, following all the requirements: Another excellent job by Roger and his crew. They're always my first call for any plumbing issue. I had a sudden plumbing emergency on a property that was about to close, and a buyer noticed a problem that needed urgent repair. With just one call, Roger and his team were there the next day and fixed everything quickly. They handled the job efficiently, and I was pleasantly surprised at how reasonable the price was. If you're not calling these plumbers, you might be paying more than you need to. Highly recommend for any plumbing needs!

plumbers.name: Lehigh Valley Plumbing Experts
plumbers.address: 502 Jefferson St Suite B, Whitehall Township, PA 18052, USA

reviews.author: Paul Mesler
reviews.text: Had a really good experience with this company. Eddie is an excellent plumber, very friendly and personable. I even had a family emergency on the day I originally scheduled with him, and he was very understanding and willing to schedule for the next day. The prices are reasonable too. I highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Israel Rosario
reviews.text: Dan and Jose from Eva home services were very professional in the service provided for the refinishing and reinstalling of our iron railing by the front door of our home. Very satisfied customer! The wood was there to brace the rail until the cement dried.

reviews.author: Barbara Gangemi
reviews.text: I have to say this company was the most reliable plumbing company of all times. They were prompt, reliable, expertise and compassion with their work and with us as the customer. They didn’t rush, they explained everything as they repaired, and they cleaned up afterwards. I praise this company I called another plumber and he kept saying he was coming for 1 week! Tony & Rob are great thank you again for a job well done.

reviews.author: F Rep
reviews.text: I would like to recommend EVA to individuals wishing to replace their hot water tank.  The service members were prompt, courteous, and performed the installation in a professional manner. When they finished, they cleaned the workspace and removed debris. Before they left, they answered all my questions. Their service was excellent.

reviews.author: Leonardo Nivar
reviews.text: Cory and Mike arrived to my home promptly and was able to assess the situation and give great feedback. He worked quickly and was able to repair my water heater in a timely manner. He was respectful and professional. Would definitely recommend him for any service.

plumbers.name: Canal Winchester Plumbing & Drain
plumbers.address: 8130 Howe Industrial Pkwy Suite C, Canal Winchester, OH 43110, USA

reviews.author: David Chapman
reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things about this family run company. People can get so nervous when trying to find a good reputable plumbing service. I called these folks in the morning concerning a bathroom drain leak. They scheduled, and sent a plumber out to my place (Jonathan) before noon. Jonathan was very polite, and courteous. He was very conscience about not tracking in anything from outside. Jonathan, being insured, and a licensed plumber, was very knowledgeable about the plumbing profession. He explained my problem very clearly and told me how he would fix it, and worked up a cost estimate. The estimated total cost was surprisingly, and pleasantly reasonable. He was able to do the repair completely, and quickly, and he left NO MESS. If you are looking for a plumbing service, I would highly recommend this family run business. They are honest folks, and can be trusted. They will treat you fairly, and I think you will be pleasantly pleased that you called them.

reviews.author: Paula Hickman
reviews.text: Braun was professional, thorough and so helpful in guiding me to a reasonable solution to my water heater and water softener problems. I've had this company before and so far they seem fair and trustworthy. I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Talisha Haywood
reviews.text: We called them at 1 PM. To schedule an urgent service needed. They told us they would come in between 4 and 8 PM. I called around 5:30 PM to get an estimate on what time they might be there. They said they were working at another location and it would be on the later timeframe of 4 to 8 PM. They then called at 7:20 PM and said they would not be able to make it out. This was a major inconvenience as we really needed our drain to be looked at. I would not give them five stars at all. Then we called and they said they can put us on at 12 PM tomorrow. We will not be using their services.

reviews.author: Charlotte Brown
reviews.text: From start to finish we had the best experience! Mike was so thorough and seemed like he truly cared. He explained everything in detail which we appreciated. They got him out here SO quickly which was exactly what we needed. They turned our frustrating day around!

reviews.author: Edward Estell
reviews.text: Chad did a nice job. It was a good experience.  He will be the guy that I call the next time I need work done.

plumbers.name: Local Plumber of South Tampa
plumbers.address: 333 N Falkenburg Rd B-209, Tampa, FL 33619, USA

reviews.author: tammy zaiko
reviews.text: I just cannot say enough about this company.  I’ve been working with Joe and his team for about a year now and am so impressed not only with Joe’s knowledge but the level of service is the best I have seen from any of the contractors I have used refurbishing my home.  I had an issue today (Saturday) and even though it was joes day off he drove a significant distance to ensure I have hot water for the weekend. Can’t say enough positive about this company.

reviews.author: Roseann
reviews.text: Jimmy was very professional. He removed and replaced a shower valve for the tub. He also changed out the angle stops to new quarter turn shut offs. He cleaned up after installing all of these items.  He is a definitely an asset to your company.

reviews.author: drew demauro
reviews.text: Check it out hands down some of the GREATEST customer service from start to finish.My man happened to break his leg the week that they wanted to finish re-routing the water meters this company went above and beyond the call of duty . So we thank y’all very much Gauge,Jeff,Jacob and that other dude I’m so sorry I forgot your name! We will continue to advertise for your company very personable amazingly mannered men .Honestly felt like we were more than just customers more like extended family of course minus family drama.Thanks you guys and know when I’m anywhere and hear a water drip or a toilet that runs constantly I am forever asking people if they need a plumber because I have an amazing local company on speed dial….

reviews.author: Guy Gyorkos
reviews.text: Paul was really professional and knowledgeable. Will definitely use him again if we have any issues.

reviews.author: Chris Oliszewski
reviews.text:
Recently called Paradise for a kitchen plumbing need, and they came out super quick and provided me with an estimate. They performed the work flawlessly, on time, and as promised.
Highly recommend!!!

plumbers.name: Graff's Plumbing & Heating Inc
plumbers.address: 125 Tolbert St, Wadsworth, OH 44281, USA

reviews.author: wayne culver
reviews.text: Very professional, showed up the day I called, and did great work. They Installed a garbage disposal, ran a water line for my refrigerator, and fixed the drainage piping that was preventing my kitchen sink from draining.

reviews.author: Ben Zelei
reviews.text: I had a really good experience.  Had two different leaks and a shut off that wasn't working so I had to shut off the main to the entire house.  Called on a Sunday evening and they came out first thing in the morning to inspect and then came back later in the day to fix.  Savannah and young Thom were a pleasure to work with.  Savannah was very personable and was able to relate to us in different ways in our personal lives outside of just plumbing issues.  They had that good small business feel that is much appreciated.  I would definitely recommend.

reviews.author: niasca mcgee
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of working with Savannah. She was incredibly kind and patient while describing things to me. My issue, I thought to be minor ended up being a little more than I expected. Savannah offered options to help find a quick solution for our family. Thank you so much, Savannah!

reviews.author: Dixie Lee
reviews.text: Snaked sewer drain and replaced sump pump.  Super friendly and worked quickly while they were here.  They said they got all of the tree roots, however two days later they had to come back out with a camera to find that there were more roots in the pipeline.   They charged me twice when the problem should have been taken care of the first time.  No invoice was given at the time of either service.  I have asked for an invoice several times since the repair and keep getting the run around.

reviews.author: Samantha Melick
reviews.text: Amazing!! We had out waste valve break meaning it needed shut off at the street and we were without water! With a very busy house with lots of people and animals that is not ideal. They fit us in to give us a quote day one, and they quoted us hundreds cheaper than other local plumbers. And got us back up and running  the next day! We appreciate everything you did for us! 1000% would use again and recommend!

plumbers.name: Above All Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1709 S Fretz Ave #130, Edmond, OK 73013, USA

reviews.author: Huan Nguyen
reviews.text: I gave them a call about my rusting water heater and they scheduled me for a replacement within a couple days with their sister company, Water Heater Man. Juan and Kyle did an awesome job and the installation of a new and updated heater went very smoothly. I would definitely reach out to these guys again!

reviews.author: Mike Mills
reviews.text: I called them for a shower faucet leak.  They ended up installing a new single handle faucet and I must admit that they did a good job even if it was a bit pricey (which I paid in cash).  Problem was that they knocked 6 tiles off my shower wall.  I was told they would send out a tile setter to fix it in a couple days. well, after I think it was 5-6 days, I emailed them and they ignored me with no response.  I waited until the 8th day and called them.  I was told they was aware of the problem and that they would contact Mike the Plumber and if he hasn't contacted a tile setter that they would and call me later that day which they didn't do. The faucet was installed on the 7th and here it is the 17th and I've heard nothing.

reviews.author: S W S
reviews.text: I can’t believe what just happened. Our boiler packed up on Thursday, we hadn’t been able to wash or shower for 4 days. The Insurance Company finally got it’s act together and got us a fantastic plumber – these guys. All the way from Edmund to our home in Norman. Then in one hour they got the unit inspected and their office sorted out the Insurance Company and in another hour they had collected and installed our new boiler. Incredible. Thanks Jeff and Randy! Thanks super efficient back office!

reviews.author: Kevin Walls
reviews.text: Daryl and his team are the kind of people you hope to hire!  These guys did a great job and stand behind their work. In my case, a utility company doing work on same location, caused damage that didn’t reveal itself for months. When I asked Daryl to look into it, he uncovered the damage and repaired it because they warranty their work. Never mind the finger-pointing blame-game between the gas utility and THEIR contractor (who I believe ultimately caused damage during their work), Daryl was mission focused on my behalf. Many, many thanks!

reviews.author: Valere Hull
reviews.text: This is an excellent company! Matt was the technician who worked diligently to fix my sewer line problem. He was knowledgeable, efficient, answered my questions patiently and completely, and was very pleasant! The work was done competently, and the charge was very reasonable. I will most definitely use the company again and also request Matt.

plumbers.name: EZ Flow Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1914 W Howard Ln, Austin, TX 78728, USA

reviews.author: Truitt Adams
reviews.text: Sorry Batman and Robin but James and AJ are the REAL dynamic duo! I had a major clog in my mainline, called a plumber from Taskrabbit, he came out and made the problem worse! Called E Z  Flow the next day and James/ AJ were at my house at 11am sharp. James came in, assessed the situation and told me exactly what the issue was, remedies to fix it and the overall cost with no fluff. Jame and AJ got right to work and were very professional and kept me abreast of their progress. James is a straight shooter (which I like), and has a great personality to boot. AJ worked diligently and I could tell he knew what he was doing by his confidence. By 12:30pm the issue was resolved and James and AJ drove away like hero Cowboys at the end of a Western. The price for the job was VERY reasonable and didn’t make me sweat. PLEASE use E Z Flow Plumbing for any plumbing issues. They are the best hands down!

reviews.author: Donnie La Press
reviews.text: Awesome work Mo at good price. Redid my old leaky pipe w/new pex and swapped mixing valve. Also helped woth drain pipe.

reviews.author: chuck lindsey
reviews.text: Bill at EZ Flow replaced a leaky water heater for me. Quick responses, clear communication, honest assessment, fair price and now I have hot water! What more could you want? I’m happy to have found EZ Flow as they’ve gained a new customer from me.

reviews.author: Phong Cao
reviews.text: fantastic experience. got a bradford white hydrojet 50 gallon 10 year warranty installed with the best price in the area - beat 40+ other plumbing shops here in Austin. I highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Sam Lundin
reviews.text: This company is excellent.  Bill is a good man.  God bless his family and his company.  My water heater broke, and I was in a bind.  I was geographically outside of the zone he normally covers in terms of distance.  But he heard my baby crying in the background (unrelated matter) and he was willing to go out of his way to help my family.  He had no obligation to do that, he did it out of the kindness of his heart.  America was built on the backs of good men like Bill and his company, who help other fellow Americans in times of need.  His positive intentions touched my heart, and I am deeply thankful to him for it.

plumbers.name: Hardy Plumbing | Emergency Plumber, Drain Cleaning, Pipe Repair, Tankless Water Heater Repair and Replacement in Timonium, MD
plumbers.address: 5 Ballyhaunis Ct, Timonium, MD 21093, USA

reviews.author: Brent H
reviews.text: Hardy Plumbing installed our new hybrid (electric heat pump) water heater and our water leak detector auto-shut off (Moen Flo) and did an outstanding job.  The plumbers were on time, courteous, professional and left no waste—a combination rare to find these days.  I absolutely recommend Hardy Plumbing for anyone.  They have also served my friend with the same level of professionalism and effectiveness.  I don’t think you can go wrong with them!
