What a great company and people. You don’t see this kind of service and empathy everywhere these days. Well, we saw it here. Highly recommend them. Thank you so much Cahill.

Ed Lees

reviews.author: Rhina Westenkirchner
reviews.text: We accidentally drilled into a water pipe while installing a new vanity. Cahill was here within an hour and did the repair quickly. The bill was quite reasonable. We will definitely continue to use their services.

reviews.author: Jeff Clay
reviews.text: Extremely quick response. Fair assessment and great customer service. I came to them after being unhappy with another local Libertyville company (TT) and am glad I switched.

reviews.author: Joanne Brand
reviews.text: Another great job by Cahill! They explain everything they are doing and always go above and beyond what is needed.  Very professional, always on time and I love the text messages that they are on their way with a picture and name of the person!  I’m so happy I’ve found a Company I can trust and rely on. Thank you!

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 7080 N McCormick Blvd Unit W51, Lincolnwood, IL 60712, USA

reviews.author: Leslie Carter
reviews.text: Great experience with Rescue Plumbing. They were very responsive - I called on Monday, they came out Tuesday to inspect and provide estimate, repair was completed on Thursday. Bob was very knowledgeable, courteous and efficient. I recommend Rescue Plumbing.

reviews.author: Meg Morrison
reviews.text: Bob did an excellent job unclogging my bathroom sink. He communicated clearly about his arrival time, was friendly and professional, and took care to make sure the problem was fully resolved before he left.

reviews.author: Ali Anderson
reviews.text: Bob & Eunice were wonderful! Highly recommend them if you have plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Anthony DiAngelo
reviews.text:
★★★★★ (5/5 stars)

Pete and his colleague Kevin provided exceptional plumbing service for our bathroom issues. They tackled two problems - replacing the roddings in the master bathroom and fixing a shower drip in the secondary bathroom - with outstanding professionalism and expertise.

What stood out most was their thorough communication. They took the time to explain both the underlying problems and their solutions in detail, which helped me understand exactly what work was being done. This kind of transparency is invaluable when dealing with plumbing issues.

Pete was excellent to work with on the coordination front, making the whole process smooth and hassle-free. The quality of their workmanship was impeccable - everything was done with great attention to detail.

I'm already planning to use Pete's services for any future plumbing needs, which is perhaps the strongest endorsement I can give. For anyone looking for reliable, skilled, and communicative plumbers, I highly recommend Pete and Kevin.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

reviews.author: Shaggy McBeard
reviews.text: I called Rescue Plumbing when my fridge couldn’t be installed due to a leaky valve. They not only came that same day, but even contacted me to see if they could come earlier than the timeframe I was given! The 2 individuals were incredibly efficient, extremely kind and explained my options. I will not be calling anyone else from now on. Plus, they were extremely reasonable!

plumbers.name: Complete Plumbing Septic & Drain Solutions LLC
plumbers.address: 26554 Lee Hwy, Abingdon, VA 24211, USA

reviews.author: sandra pack
reviews.text: Scheduling  with Kendra was easy and timely. She listened to find out the reason I was calling about. Kevin called prior to coming to our home. He pumped and inspected our septic tank, and   took the time to answer all questions. Kevin was  professional, efficient, friendly, and very knowledgeable.  I will definitely use this company for future maintenance or problems., I highly recommend this company. Thank you for such great service!

reviews.author: Kimberly Couch
reviews.text: Can’t say enough about this Company. Top notch in every way. Great service, Communication, and a pleasure to work with. Thankful to have this service!!!

reviews.author: Jenny O'Hara
reviews.text: We have used Complete Plumbing for both our home and our veterinary hospital and have had wonderful service every time. They are thorough, fix the issue or repair, and are wonderful people who will treat you right. Thank you guys for always taking care of us when we are in need!

reviews.author: Kendra Hooker
reviews.text: Workers were very polite and very personable. Would defiantly recommend this company! And will use again😊

reviews.author: Dianne Lester
reviews.text: Complete Plumbing Septic & Drain is a great company to work with if you have a plumbing job that needs to be done!  My Aunt needed a plumber and I called several plumbers prior to calling Complete Plumbing and she did not get a returned call any of them. With  Complete Plumbing, it was the exact opposite. They returned a call and responded right away.  These guys  are great! They sent (Jacob and Rick) out to take a look. They were very professional and polite.  They did a stellar job with repairing her tub and shower.  They did the job right and went the extra mile! Great communication, prompt service, and easy to schedule. The price was very reasonable as well. We will definitely seek the services of Complete Plumbing again. Thank you!

plumbers.name: Suburban Sewer & Septic Inc.
plumbers.address: 17201 Jefferson St, Union, IL 60180, USA

reviews.author: Rosanne Derango
reviews.text: Absolutely the best customer service.  We had a broken waste line and Kyle came out at midnight to confirm.  Rest of the crew came today and fixed it.  Excellent work. Nice people.  Honest.  They don't make them like this anymore.  Family run business we would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Julie Palmisano
reviews.text:
I hope it's okay to say THANK YOU to your company who not only came out to look at our concern the very next morning, but took the time to educate us and give us options for repair.

We called three seperate companies and yours showed up, crawled under our pipes, and provided a reasonable quote. The work you did was greatly appreciated, the guys were very detailed, and job was done by the afternoon. Thank you!
-Steve & Julie Palmisano

reviews.author: Christina DeRaedt- Robledo
reviews.text: We have been using the family owned Suburban Sewer and Septic since the late 1980s. They have always been the best in the area for all of our needs. From a rodding of sink or floor drain to a larger repair of the sewer line between the house and the street. Randy, Jeff, and Kyle have always been our go to when in need.

reviews.author: Steve Lazzerini
reviews.text: The guys came by Friday first thing and fixed our leaky toilet and leaky laundry tub. Good work ethic and they knew what they were doing. We will definitely call them with all of our plumbing needs. Thanks guys.

reviews.author: Gary Esterling
reviews.text: Totally not dependable.  1st call -did not bring proper equipment. second call - routed out old cast iron pipe but did not water jet the entire length which made for overflowed sewer again because of debris left in the pipe.    Would not recommend. Not professional

plumbers.name: Midwest Plumbing. Co LLC
plumbers.address: 225 Union Blvd #150, Lakewood, CO 80228, USA

reviews.author: Kim Preston
reviews.text: I am really glad I called James at Midwest plumbing. We had a sewer issue, and he responded very quickly. Communication was great, and he arrived about 15 minutes early. He called to give me a heads up about arriving early, which was awesome. James was able to clear our line and clearly discussed our options moving forward. He was both knowledgeable and professional. The price was very reasonable as well. I highly recommend Midwest plumbing.

reviews.author: Kelly D.
reviews.text: We just moved into a new place and James and his brother did a great job for us.  We will have them do plumbing work for us in the future.   They replaced a very old hot water heater in a crawl space, replaced three toilets and did some work under the kitchen sink.  James came out to give us a quote first and then came the next week to complete the job.  James was friendly and polite.  He followed up after the work was completed to make sure all was to our satisfaction. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Emily Fleming
reviews.text: Wow! These guys are fantastic! If you want to support a family owned business call the brothers with Mid-West Plumbing! They are not only kind, but very thorough and ensure they get the job done right! They guarantee their work and have very fair/reasonable prices! Scheduling was easy and they were able to address my concern the same day! I’m so glad I found a plumber I can trust!

reviews.author: Clayton Riding
reviews.text: Midwest Plumbing has done a lot of work at my house. They did a spectacular job with my shower valve install, my toilet shutoff valve replacement, and main water shutoff valve replacement. They’re quick to respond and quick to come out. They’re a local family owned business and they should be your first call if you need a plumber

reviews.author: Nick Kotter
reviews.text: Had a very clogged bathroom sink that our children use. They were able to diagnose the problem and offered to charge just for a p trap replacement due to the age of the existing pipe - which could be a problem for snakes. Most of the clog was in the trap and the rest was taken care of with the Glug product. Thanks to Midwest for getting our barhroom working so quickly.

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1100 Manor Dr, Wilmette, IL 60091, USA

reviews.author: Cassondra Branderhorst
reviews.text: Pete and Noah were awesome! They were prompt, courteous, professional, and friendly. At the end of the service, Pete even offered to help walk me through any other issues free of charge and asked me to follow-up in a week to make sure everything was still functioning well. I would recommend Rescue Plumbing to anyone and will definitely work with them again should the need arise. Especially Pete and Noah-thank you both!

reviews.author: Dyanna Gregory
reviews.text: Pete and Noah were amazing! They replaced our water shut off valve in record time and were extremely pleasant to chat with during the experience.  They let us know exactly what problems to look out for in the future and even came out on New Years Eve!  Five stars, they were awesome!!!!

reviews.author: Michael Vazquez
reviews.text: I’ve used Rescue - and specifically Pete and Noah - multiple times and they are always incredible.  Pete knows his stuff and is very sensible in approach to repairs, balancing effort with utility etc.  Noah is a class act and very responsive and flexible. 10/10 best plumbers around.

reviews.author: Eric Selcke
reviews.text: Pete and Noah were both very helpful and professional while installing a new water heater. The installation was efficient and they both did a great job explaining the issue with the old unit and how it needed to be handled. In the event of any future issues, they will be my first call.

reviews.author: Kelly Polnaszek
reviews.text: Pete and Noah were great and I would highly recommend them! They took the time to understand what was going on, inspected thoroughly, and explained the issue to me. They also clearly explained what the next steps would be to resolve the issue and helped connect me with the appropriate people to do so. We are so thankful to them and would gladly use them again in the future!

plumbers.name: CORE Plumbing & Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 6339 Charlotte Pike Suite 1394, Nashville, TN 37209, USA

reviews.author: Nathalie Devot
reviews.text: Core Plumbing is a top of the line company. Their customer service is by far one of the best I have experienced. Caitlin (the dispatcher) was friendly, helpful, knowledgeable, and compassionate. She went above and beyond to assist us in our water heater tank emergency. Michael (the technician) was AMAZING!!! He did a great installation for the new tank and he even came back the following day to make sure everything was working as it should!!! Thanks to them, we finally have running water and hot water!!! Thank you 😊

reviews.author: Stephanie Stanton
reviews.text: Moved into a newly remodeled rental home in East Nashville and was having issues with hot water and water pressure. Eduardo arrived and was amazing! Walked me through what was causing the challenges (incorrectly installed fixtures and dirty water lines) and he corrected on the spot. All said and done in an hour. So impressed with the professionalism and service.

reviews.author: Maureen L
reviews.text: Highly recommend CORE for their professionalism and attention to detail. Very happy to learn that not only are they amazing plumbers but Eddie is top-notch at drywall and spackling. Will definitely be looking to use them again in the future!  Competitively priced as well.

reviews.author: Stead Fast
reviews.text: Michael is awesome!!! He saw me at a gas station. I had a flat tire. He stopped everything he was doing to change my tire for me. Thank you so much!

reviews.author: Elena Morales Snavely
reviews.text:
Rick was very helpful.
Had issues getting a tech out due to property management but they made us a priority, answering our call late at night and coming out first time in the morning to help with a clog that rendered all of our showers, upstairs bathrooms and washer unusable, sending water into the floor and walls.
They came out promptly and identified and removed the clog before testing everything. They did an excellent job and the repairs were very professional.

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1455 Valley Center Pkwy Suite 170, Bethlehem, PA 18017, USA

reviews.author: M B
reviews.text: Initially, I was very satisfied with this company for a hot water heater they installed. I’m now trying to set up an appointment for “Ben Franklin maintenance plan“ I purchased when I bought my hot water heater, but there’s no answering of the phones, at all. I tried every phone number. I waited  on hold multiple times during a two day period. I finally made an appointment online and they never showed. I received a confirmation text and email saying that they would be there but they never showed. They were great a few months ago, but I don’t know what happened to them, hence my very BAD review. Beware!! You probably wouldn’t be able to get a hold of them anyway.

reviews.author: K Washington
reviews.text: A 12 yrs experience plumber arrived 2x an stated he was unable to install my newly purchased sink. He insisted that it couldn't be done and insistes for me to purchase a facet along with a amother new sink. So today the drain remains slow exiting and clogged. The price that was paid was outrageous for the service that was supposed to be completed.

reviews.author: Michael Perry
reviews.text: Benjamin Franklin plumbing did an excellent job clearing out my plumbing clean out. My technician was very experienced and explained everything to me. He also educated me on the other systems at my home. I highly recommend Benjamin Franklin plumbing. Thank you for the great job. Also the office staff was excellent.

reviews.author: JD Aeon
reviews.text: This past week l had my house sump pump replaced. They came in as scheduled and did an excellent job! As l also have some other jobs to be done such as replacement of sinks and toilets, they offered me membership on their services and products sort of club which comes with discounts and other benefits associated to products and services, etc. l was pleasantly surprised and quite pleased! They get the job done and keep you informed of all possibilities.  My special thanks for the two polite, efficient and nice professional plumbers they sent to my house! Cheers!

reviews.author: Jay Volk
reviews.text: Justin was Awesome!  Very helpful, worked hard, and was done in a timely manner. The cost was a bit more than we hoped, but the work came with a multiple year warranty so it's all good. We'll be using them for any and all plumbing needs from this point forward.

plumbers.name: Ray's Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 948 Estes Ct, Schaumburg, IL 60193, USA

reviews.author: Jerry Mcwilliams
reviews.text: Parked next to one of there vehicles at a Menards in Glendale Hts,IL and there driver put a dent in my passenger rear qtr panel, I called and talked with there phone staff and was told i would get a call back, well that never happened of course. Take ownership when you damage someone's vehicle!

reviews.author: Peter
reviews.text:
Purchased an AC and Furnace from Ray's for my parents home because they touted their warranty on April of 2021. Today November of 2023, the furnace would not heat, so we called for service. Under the impression that the warranty should cover all labor for 5 years, and parts for 10, we thought this should be covered. Instead, they arrived (charged 78 dollars to drive to our home) then charged my parents156 dollars to diagnose the issue, then charged them 82.80 to clean and test the flame sensor. So they were charged 316.80 for a unit that is fully covered under warranty, less than two years old.

I would avoid doing business with this company as there are hundreds of HVAC companies that stand behind their products. This was my mistake for choosing Ray's for my parents HVAC needs. The company I chose for my own home doesn't charge me a penny to do service on my unit as that's what the warranty was for. If it inoperative, they take care of it as it should be. Ray's does not have that level of service.

reviews.author: Laura Michalak
reviews.text: They came to our rescue just in time!!  Our furnace was just about to quit all together and they came out the same day to install a new one. Very efficient and friendly installers, did a great job. Would definitely use Ray's again and recommend to everyone.

reviews.author: Mark
reviews.text:
Worked with Marshall and Dan, they repiped my entire home with all new copper.

System has great pressure, in and out in a day! Absolutely recommended to anyone needing to transition from galvanized to copper.

reviews.author: Carrie
reviews.text: Ray's Plumbing did an amazing job replacing my old A/C unit. The installers were polite, thorough and kept me updated throughout the process. Thank you for the friendly, high quality, and affordable service!

plumbers.name: T. Lenard Plumbing & Drain Inc.
plumbers.address: 206 Crenshaw Dr, Murfreesboro, TN 37128, USA

reviews.author: Jonathon Hobstetter
reviews.text: We had an issue with our water heater and bathroom plumbing after the freezes that occurred this winter. He was very nice on the phone, but when we set an appointment he rescheduled several times. When he finally arrived to assist, he did fix the water heater. When working on the shower, he told us we needed to order a part off Amazon to complete the repair. Once the part arrived, he never came out to finish the job. He was paid in full at this point. We reached out several times to confirm a time which he never came through on. It has been months. Finally, he stopped answering completely.

reviews.author: tammy miller
reviews.text: Todd was very quick to get us scheduled and was here the next day. Our hot water heater was installed quickly with a lot of attention paid to our wood floors, general neatness, etc. We hired him for a second job of disconnecting a water softener system which required under the house crawling around. While under the house he discovered a potential disaster where a wire holding up a copper pipe was wearing through the pipe, about to open the pipe. He corrected it while under the house. So he was very aware of all the plumbing system not just what he was called in for. Great guy, Great service. Thanks Todd.

reviews.author: Jaylyn Shanklin
reviews.text: Todd did amazing same day service at my house. He was very kind, and helped me very quickly. I had a leak in an outside faucet & the pipes under my house were shaking. He fixed the leak and secured the pipes for an excellent price. He is my permanent plumber.

reviews.author: Kellye Johnson
reviews.text: We had no idea of what plumber in the area could fit us in on a holiday weekend and this was the first place we called. After telling him our issues, he said he could come the next morning, then called back and said he could come that very night if that was okay. Heck yes! Super friendly and knowledgeable! Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Matthew Kroeger
reviews.text:
Todd is just the best.  I called the first company about a bad smell coming from my water and they quoted me $2300 to replace my water heater over the phone without even looking at it.

I called Todd and he said he would come check it out.  Told me I had a few more years at least with my water heater and flushed it to kill the smell.

Todd is an expert and a professional and he absolutely earned me a s a customer for life.  I cannot recommend Todd enough. :)

plumbers.name: Blue Whale Backflow, Plumbing, & Excavating
plumbers.address: 801 N Raddant Rd, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: David C
reviews.text: I've used Blue Whale for several plumbing issues in the past, and I've always had an great experience.  The owner (Ken) is very responsive and friendly.  Always patient and explains the issues. The work is done right the first time, and they show up when they say the will!  Just yesterday (a Saturday), my water heater was leaking.  I called early in the morning, and within a couple hours, Tony was out here replacing it.  Completely done by 1 pm, and I initially called at about 8:30 am. Amazing, especially for a Saturday!  I will only call Blue Whale for my plumbing issues...I have them stored in my phone! Great people to do business with!

reviews.author: Jeremy Hesselink
reviews.text:
A great experience with Blue Whale today.

Responsive, efficient and fairly priced. They showed up in a great looking vehicle and had everything they needed stocked on the truck for a garbage disposal replacement.

Ken and crew took great care, made no messes and were very polite. I'd recommend anyone needing a residential service plumber to give this company a call.

Thanks so much!

reviews.author: Bob Cohoon
reviews.text: Ken and crew replaced my old clay sewer line that had major problems in Woodridge. They were very responsive and helpful during the quoting of the job. During the job, they took a lot of steps to preserve my lawn and keep the dig site safe. The new sewer line is great and I am very happy with the work that was performed. Overall, I had a very good experience with Blue Whale Plumbing and Sewer and the work was high quality at a reasonable price.

reviews.author: Uallknowme22
reviews.text:
BEST EXPERIENCE EVER!!!!

I stumbled upon this company because the previous homeowners used them and left the contact info behind when I bought this house.  I contacted them to install a toilet and I have to say the professionalism and level of customer service I received was outstanding!  They arrived on time, worked quickly to get the toilet installed and best part of all is they did not leave a mess behind.  I was impressed with the knowledge the plumber shared about things to do around my home to keep plumbing issues at bay and the price point was great.  I would not hesitate to recommend them to family, friends and coworkers.  I salute you BWP&S for the level of service you provided me today and putting my mind at ease in this new space of homeownership.  Thank you, thank you, thank you Tony & Zion.

reviews.author: J Hilton
reviews.text: Blue Whale Plumbing is a great local option to consider for your plumbing needs. I have used Blue Whale for both an emergency plumbing issue a few years ago and just recently to install a utility sink in my laundry room. On both occasions they were on time and extremely professional/knowledgeable. For the utility sink, I received multiple quotes which were all within $50.00 of each other so Blue Whale’s pricing is very competitive…licensed plumbers aren’t cheap. Also, in my experience(s), their office coordinator was very responsive to calls/emails about the scheduling/quote. Thanks Blue Whale!

plumbers.name: Huntsville Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 9582 Madison Blvd Ste 14, Madison, AL 35758, USA

reviews.author: Linda Odom
reviews.text: Huntsville Plumbing responded to our emergency plumbing issue within a few hours of my call and installed a new shower valve professionally, quickly, and courteously. I would recommend them to anyone with a plumbing problem.   Give them a call.

reviews.author: Sam Digesu
reviews.text: Huntsville Plumbing recently installed a tankless hot water heater system in my home after my old electric tank began leaking. I decided to switch to a gas tankless system, and I couldn't be happier with the installation, their knowledge of the system, and their plumbing expertise. The owner, Jason, explained everything that was needed and how it would be done. During the installation, he suggested improvements like hiding the water lines in the wall and the best way to run the ventilation pipe. The installation looks very professional and neat. Jason was very communicative, informing me of the arrival times of his workers and checking in regularly to see if I had questions. The cost was very reasonable.  This was my first experience with Huntsville Plumbing, and I was thoroughly impressed. I will definitely use their services again for future plumbing needs and highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Kevin Morris
reviews.text: Had a leak from a copper supply line in bathroom wall, and of course it was in the worst spot imaginable.  Called a couple plumbers who insisted the tub had to be pulled to fix it, and wanted to charge an arm and a leg.  Had a friend tell me to call Jason at Huntsville Plumbing.  Jason responded immediately and was easy to work with.  He fully expected he may have to pull the tub based on what I told him was happening, but he wanted to come see it for himself before sending a crew out.  He spent time assessing the situation and explored all options.  He felt there was a good possibility he could make the repair without pulling the tub.  He went to work and successfully fixed the leak in the copper line.  Very grateful for what he did, and saved me a lot of time, headache and money!  Would give a 100 stars if possible!

reviews.author: Jennifer Marsden
reviews.text: Jason Osborne fit us in the next day. He also kindly waited for us to get a better part when we had the wrong size faucet and dealt with some prior installation issues which required redrilling, reattaching, and recaulking the sink. Our go to plumbers!

reviews.author: Brad Murphy
reviews.text: Huntsville Plumbing (Jason) had been here multiple times and they provide excellent customer service.  They are responsive, timely, efficient, and provide a high quality repair service.  The team always comes tooled with the right things and parts to make the job happen on site.  I highly recommend Huntsville Plumbing Inc

plumbers.name: Pine Country Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3623 Crossings Dr Suite 228, Prescott, AZ 86305, USA

reviews.author: Ron Martina
reviews.text: Mike was great. He did an outstanding job on our tankless water heater and soft water unit. We are very pleased with Pine Country plumbing and will be using them for our future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Dennis Osgood
reviews.text: Highly recommend. This is a family business and the service was terrific. We had all our cutoff valves replaced. The work was professional, the owner friendly and informative. We have found our plumber.

reviews.author: Ryan Sutton
reviews.text: Very impressed with Mike.  Happy with my sewer service which required a hydro jet and chain grinder clean out.  Pine Country Plumbing is professional and has experience to get it done right.

reviews.author: Mike Anders
reviews.text: Highly recommend! Great reliable plumbers that know what they’re doing, reliable and easy to communicate with. 5 star experience from a phone call to job completion.

reviews.author: Dustin Rigg
reviews.text: Mike is great! honest... looked at the clamp done on the leak, and stated nothing needs to be done... Because I have buyers who wanted it to be replaced, he did it so it had a "3" year warranty... super fast and professional!

plumbers.name: Ethical Plumbing
plumbers.address: 104 S Calhoun St Suite #4, Greenville, SC 29601, USA

reviews.author: Will Younts
reviews.text: The tech was nice and knowledgeable but my issue is with the company’s pricing.  I would not have used them if I’d known how expensive they were.  The office is 1.5 miles from my house and they charged me $80 for a trip charge even though I told them exactly what I needed.  I was the ln charged almost double for the repair on top of the trip charge.  They quoted me some other repairs and 2 other quotes I got where less than half of what they quoted me. I only used them because I was in a pinch, but I will not be using them in the future.

reviews.author: Felicia Batchelor
reviews.text:
We had an excellent experience with Ethical Plumbing today replacing our water heater. From start to finish, the team was professional, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable. They explained our options clearly, answered all our questions, and completed the installation efficiently and neatly.

It’s refreshing to work with a company that is honest, fair, and truly lives up to its name. We felt confident we were in good hands the entire time. Highly recommend Ethical Plumbing to anyone needing reliable, high-quality plumbing work!

reviews.author: Patricia Childress
reviews.text: We are so pleased with the service we received from everyone at Ethical plumbing. The gentleman that came & finished plumbing in my farmhouse sink Was very professional & personable. They did a great job.

reviews.author: Bob
reviews.text: I put in the request on Angi and had a response within minutes.  They scheduled me for the next morning for a tankless water heater repair and service.  Mike was here on time, explained everything discussed the price and performed the job efficiently and well.  Very nice and professional throughout.  We will use them in the future for our plumbing needs .  We highly recommend them.

reviews.author: GEORGE Schmidt
reviews.text: He was knowable, answered any questions we had. then be gave us ballpark estimates our options. Very Happy with the service.

plumbers.name: Clean Care Sewer Specialists
plumbers.address: 39219 N Poplar St, Lake Villa, IL 60046, USA

reviews.author: Felice Thompson
reviews.text: Tom was fantastic! He showed up the same day, was friendly, professional, and clearly knew what he was doing. He fixed my leaky sink quickly and efficiently, and provided reasonable pricing for future work, if needed. The whole experience was smooth and stress-free. Truly exceptional service! I’ll absolutely call Clean Care again and highly recommend this company to anyone needing quality plumbing work!

reviews.author: Dennis Brancato
reviews.text:
Where do I begin….I contracted Tom to take a look at a repair to my sump line that another company had done in August. After getting a bad information and problem solving from KBI,  I contacted Tom to take a look and provide me with another opinion. He not only quickly understood the situation but identified the problems. He and his colleague Al were able to re-repair the KBI job that was very poorly done but also were able to confirm and identify an issue with the sump line out in the parkway area that KBI had initially identified. KBI wanted to charge me $3800 to dig and fix the line in the parkway without any other options or discussion regarding utility lines. .  Not only did Tom identify the issue but was diligent in immediately contacting JULIE and the Village to have them mark the utility lines and discuss concerns with the gas line impeding the sump line. Nicor came out the following morning and confirmed the damaged sump line that Tom had seen with his line camera. Turns out the gas company had damaged the sump line at some point but they immediately took action to dig it and repair it. I can’t stress enough how awesome it was to work with Tom and his colleague Al to get the repair and resolution so quickly and more so appropriately!!!   Also kudos to Nicor for and the Village of Lake Villa for their fast response and resolution.
Highly recommend this company!! 5+ ⭐️

reviews.author: Chris Brenner
reviews.text: Had a clogged kitchen sink drain and a poorly installed P trap and drain pipe that needed to be redone. Tom was quick to respond to my phone call, quickly provided a quote (which was lower than another provider) from a couple of photos and came out as quickly as he could. Job was done quickly and final cost was well under the quote as it didn't take as long as expected. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Nina Mae Vidal Howard
reviews.text:
Heavy April showers bring May flowers, but they can also cause your sewer to back up and sump pump to fail at the wrong time. Thank goodness Tom was referred to us by a good friend, Kevin. Tom was able to come out when we needed him. The existing sump pump, which was already installed prior to us moving in a little over a year ago, had failed to work when we needed it to. Tom assessed the situation and even went above and beyond by going out to find the right sump pump for us and any additional parts needed.
He explained everything he was doing and what needed to be done to help keep it maintained. Very kind, professional and efficient. Please do not hesitate to contact Tom if you ever need a professional plumber. Thank you Tom from the Howard Family.

reviews.author: Kevin Ramirez
reviews.text: Tom is the best! Honest and reliable. A different company quoted me 5K for a fictitious sewer line crack and Tom inspected and discovered it wasn't.  I'm so happy I found him!

plumbers.name: Walker Tradesman Plumbing
plumbers.address: 31 Windmill Cir # B, Abilene, TX 79606, USA

reviews.author: Jennifer Rominger
reviews.text: I needed a plumber last minute after work. Apparently after 4pm in most of town, is "after hours" for plumbers. I am a teacher and do not even get home till after 4. I called several different companies and was just shocked at the price to just get someone out here. Finally came across Walker and the sweetest woman answered the phone and told me she would try and get someone out..and she did! Leo the technician was fantastic and also very knowledgeable. He gave us some great tips about our system and what we can do to avoid this in the future. They charged one flat fee for the call and the work combined. Walker will be my go to from now on.

reviews.author: Jim Teigen
reviews.text: We have used them for years.  Why?  They come when you call, and help with emergencies.  This time, both our water heaters went out on the same day.  Called and they were there within 3 hours.  Very courteous.  respectful of property and our situation.  Advised of lunch break, how long they would be gone and when to expect them back, and they arrived early.  My Wife and I trust them, and they always address me be name [on the phone or in person].  They may have a new name, but they still are the Great Plumber Company my family relies on.  Thank you.

reviews.author: Frankie McPherson
reviews.text:
1 review
2.0 star rating 1/2/2018
They did show up at the scheduled appointment time, however, it took them over an hour to write an estimate. For a water leak under house, pier and beam, repair small leak on water heater line and to replace all valves in house. Once I accepted estimate, just for the leak under house and to repair the water heater, they had to leave to get parts. Came back, it took them less than 10 under the house to realize they didn't have all necessary parts to fix leak under house. So they had to leave again, for another hour. They came back and 5 minutes later the leak under the house was fixed. Then they decided the pipes under the sink were leaking and needed to be replaced. Funny how they had never leaked previously but what am I to do, I was at their mercy. Of course that upped the price. AND, the didn't have p-traps, so they left for another hour to go get p-traps. When they finally finished and left, we discovered they hadn't relit the pilot light on the water heater. So, yes they had to return. So, $925.00 later, everything does seem to be working but the price was astronomical and the fact that they had no parts on their truck was ridiculous. I would never recommend them.

reviews.author: Tyler Selhorst
reviews.text: Walker Tradesman Plumbing has been at my house four times over the past three years. They are always available to assist and are very professional when they arrive. The three plumbers I have interacted with are intelligent and willing to discuss the issues at hand to help resolve in the future. It seems as though plumbing issues always happen when you least expect them and Walker is always available to help resolve those issues.

reviews.author: Jack Hardcastle
reviews.text: Steve came within an hour of our call on a Saturday.  He was very polite and forthcoming about the cost and diagnosed it quickly, and did the repair in a timely manner.  Have used WTP multiple times and never felt bad afterwards...high recommendation.

plumbers.name: Orem Plumbers & Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 1178 S State St, Orem, UT 84097, USA

reviews.author: Kennedi Rudy
reviews.text: The water in our home was making strange noises in the pipes. Their team inspected the system and found loose mounting brackets. They secured everything properly. The banging sounds have completely stopped.

reviews.author: Theodore Zain
reviews.text: Early one morning, we discovered our toilet overflowing. I contacted their team immediately. They handled the blockage quickly and sanitized the area. Everything was back to normal in no time.

reviews.author: Isai Kamila
reviews.text: The bathtub overflow leaked during long baths. The technicians replaced the gasket, sealed the connections and tested thoroughly. They explained the cause and gave maintenance tips. The tub now fills safely and the team was professional, courteous and careful.

reviews.author: Lindsey Cristopher
reviews.text: Water occasionally backed up from the shower drain with a glugging sound. The plumber found a partially blocked vent that was affecting airflow. He cleared the vent and flushed the entire line. The shower drain worked quietly and smoothly once he was done. Great understanding of plumbing airflow issues.

reviews.author: Archie Adams
reviews.text: This service stood out for its calm and organized approach, with each step handled professionally. Minor enhancements were made to support better performance and the results were confirmed before completion. The overall experience felt dependable.

plumbers.name: Monkey Wrench Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 466 E 500 S, Salt Lake City, UT 84111, USA

reviews.author: Zack Myers
reviews.text: Carlos was great! I have an old home (built in 1908) & he added a shut off valve for my gas range at a very reasonable price. He also caught that I had a loose vent on my water heater & he fixed it free-of-charge. Highly recommend Monkey Wrench & I plan on using them on all future plumbing projects! :)

reviews.author: J G
reviews.text: We Love Monkey Wrench Jerry and Tony came and replaced the main drain in our house and they did awesome work. I would post a photo but am technically challenged lol but it looks great. Have used them in the past and will continue in the future best prices and very honest just what you want for repair/ home improvements. Thanks Monkey Wrench

reviews.author: Kalen Abraham
reviews.text: They came out to repair the sewer line for my neighbor to discover it’s a joint line and connects to mine. They came over and asked if they could cut out a section of my driveway to access the line I said that was fine then the plumber assured me they would fix the spot they cut out and it would look fantastic better then before. We exchanged contact info and he would let me know when they would be out to do it. They came out fixed it and then left it for a little to make sure they addressed the matter. Week later they came out and finally fixed the driveway. Or so I thought a week passed and it started to rain after two hours I go out to find that the slab they laid was now sinking 2 inches and had a massive hole under it making it useless. It appears they just put dirt back in the hole but didn’t pack it so when it got wet it washed out and sunk down. That section of the drive way is useless and it is where I usually park. I text the plumber that set it up all with pictures of what it looked like and he told me he would send his guys out asap to address the matter I let a week pass and texted him checking to see when they picked a date. I was ignored it’s now been another week with no response. I’m writing this review to warn others of what kinda of work they do and promises they will make to you and not uphold.

reviews.author: Cindy Hall
reviews.text: Carlos Luna is a jewel to work with. Completed job as he said and very efficiently. He explained things well

reviews.author: Craig Poland
reviews.text:
Carlos is awesome! He was polite, professional and friendly. He cleaned up the little mess he made (no questions asked) and did a good job fixing the issues we were having.
Definitely coming back if we have issues in the future!

plumbers.name: Round Rock Plumbing
plumbers.address: 201 University Oaks Blvd STE 540 #5008, Round Rock, TX 78665, USA

reviews.author: Nolan McCandless
reviews.text: This is just one of the few plumbing companies in Round Rock that offers 24 hours emergency services. This is great for our community.

reviews.author: Ann Marie Tubman
reviews.text: We had a leak late in the evening and Round Rock Plumbing was able to get out to us quickly. They were professional, and were able to repair the leak before any further damage had been done.

reviews.author: Kristal Castro
reviews.text: Justin at Round Rock Plumbing was a pleasure to work with. He was prompt in answering the phone and came out to us later that afternoon. Quick response and a fair price for our clogged drains. Storing their phone number in my phone to use this plumbing again! Thanks guys

reviews.author: Christopher Eargle
reviews.text: We hired Round Rock Plumbing to replace a water heater that was on the fritz. We were greatful for Justin's expertise and speed in getting this replaced for us before a family gathering over the weekend. We really appreciate you for that!! We recommend this plumbing company.

reviews.author: B T
reviews.text: I don't often write reviews but decided to today.  Justin was my tech and was very professional, skilled, and fast.  He and his partner showed up within the 2 hr time window I was allotted, and texted me about 30 minutes before he got here.  He correctly diagnosed the issue within minutes, and had it fixed and out the door within 30 minutes.  Plumbers aren't inherently cheap but the cost was within the range that I figured it would be.  I felt the cost was reasonable.  I have saved their number in my contacts in case I have an unfortunate Plumbing emergency in the future.  The van that they showed up in does have a different company name on it, but it's the same company.  I highly recommend them.

plumbers.name: Dulles Plumbing, Heating and Air
plumbers.address: 44675 Cape Ct # 150, Ashburn, VA 20147, USA

reviews.author: Derek Smoot
reviews.text:
I recently had a no-heat situation and reached out to Dulles Plumbing, Heating & Air. Their Service operations Manager was able to quickly get a technician out to my home, which was a huge relief.

The technician was very professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain exactly what was going on with my system. What really stood out was that they provided multiple options for repair rather than pushing just one solution. They clearly explained each option so I could choose what worked best for my home and budget.

Overall, the service was prompt, honest, and very professional. I highly recommend the team at Dulles Plumbing, Heating & Air to anyone needing reliable HVAC service.

reviews.author: Andrew Colon
reviews.text:
We have used Dulles Plumbing multiple times for multiple projects. They have always done a great job and completed the work in a timely manner. We have always had a pleasure speaking with the team and scheduling appointments. Chris does a great job making sure each job is completed to perfection and clarifies what exactly is needed for each job.

I would recommend this company for all your plumbing needs.
-Andrew

reviews.author: Damandeep Singh
reviews.text: So we had a Sewer line grading issue and we talked a 3-4 different plumbing companies. The main plumber from Dulles Plumbing group was  the most accurate in identifying the problem and gave a very clear plan of what needs to be done. He was accessible by phone and extremely good at explaining everything. The price and warranty provided to us was very competitive and we moved forward with the project. David and his team (Bobby and Pablo) was very professional and neat in their work from Day1. The project had some complications which David was able navigate through. I was really impressed by the problem solving and ingenuity from him. Due to complications the project went into the second day and Dulles Plumbing group did not hesitate to finish it properly on the next day. I would definitely recommend these guys. One of the best experiences I have had with a plumbing company.

reviews.author: Jake Yezzi
reviews.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent Service and Professionalism

I recently had a leak in the water line between the meter and my house, and Dulles Plumbing did an outstanding job troubleshooting and fixing the issue. From the moment I contacted them, their team was responsive, professional, and knowledgeable.

They quickly identified the problem, explained the necessary repairs clearly, and completed the work efficiently with high-quality craftsmanship. The team was courteous and made sure everything was cleaned up afterward. I truly appreciate their expertise and dedication to getting the job done right.

I highly recommend Dulles Plumbing to anyone in need of reliable and professional plumbing services!

reviews.author: Matthew Fitzgerald
reviews.text: Dulles plumbing did a great job replacing a cracked toilet for us.  They were fast, courteous and professional.  Pricing was very fair. Thank you for helping us with our plumbing needs!

plumbers.name: TMK Plumber Pflugerville
plumbers.address: 610 E Wells Branch Pkwy #17207, Pflugerville, TX 78660, USA

reviews.author: Andres Vanguardia
reviews.text: TMK Plumber Pflugerville is the best in the business. They will tell you what the problem is and they will give you a quote without trying to sell you more or take advantage of your plumbing needs. I recommend them

reviews.author: Mike Kennedy
reviews.text: I had a great experience with TMK Plumber Pflugerville. Their rates were super competitive (another company tried to charge me 3X what TMK charged). They were able to help within hours of my initial call, and Irvan was super knowledgeable and friendly.  I won't hesitate to give them a call in the future when I need a plumber I can trust.

reviews.author: Mr. Brian
reviews.text: Beware of them scam. I called them because I had a sewage backup at my house in round rock. I called and they sent a plumber to come to my house. The guy who came looked like he did drugs and was super rude. He wanted 600 dollars to clear my clog and after me telling him it was too much money and I would pass he started insulting my family about how he drove all this way for nothing and was cursing all over my face in the driveway. Keep in mind on their website they claimed free estimates. After long talks he wouldn't leave and then said he could do it for $475. I agreed and he used his auger to try to clear my pipe. While he was clearing my pipe he started to complain that it was only for 45 minutes of work and if I wanted him to continue clearing the pipe he would have to charge more. What a sketchy business practice. Keep in mind he was smoking all over my face at the same time. After 15 minutes he said he couldn't clear my clog and still had the means to charge me $475 for 15 minutes of nothing. Keep in mind the whole time he was smoking in my face with all his drug smell and kept insisting he would have to dig my pipe up for $5000. Later in the day I called a different plumber who was able to clear the clog with their augur for only $175 dollars that took them 2hr+ because of a plastic piece was stuck in the pipe. What a scam, I never seen someone so willing to scam and rudly smoke in customers faces. I don't why this place has so much good review but they got to be fake. Keep in mind they put their location on google maps as the northtown mud apartment but they aren't even there. A locaton for them doesn't exist. Whatever you do if you call them expect a crazy rude drugged plumber to come to your house to scam you. They guy the sent me he drove a white chevy truck. Just be careful if you call I got scammed by them and the guy was rude and smoked all over my face. Better off calling someone else.

reviews.author: Aiyana Franco
reviews.text:
When I discovered a foundation water leak I called several plumbing companies to come asses the issue and within 2 hours of the initial call TMK was at my door.

Edwin, Benny (the plumber and his team) checked all the boxes for being professional, courteous, on time, knowledgable, economical, all my questions were answered, the crew cleaned up, follow up was excellent and most importantly they fixed the water leak.

They went above and beyond and for that I am grateful.
Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Jill Lara
reviews.text: I had 4 other plumbing companies bid on a pluming project for my house. I needed to reroute the plumbing lines. The best prices was from TMK. They sent the main technician with 2 helpers and finished the project in 2 days. I'm very pleased with them

plumbers.name: Plumbers of Greenville
plumbers.address: 708 Reid School Rd, Taylors, SC 29687, USA

reviews.author: Austin Cooper
reviews.text: Plumbers of Greenville provided us with the best service we could have asked for today. Ross went above and beyond, answered my questions and solved our water pressure and temperature issues. The cost of their services is very fair. We will definitely be going with them again if the time comes.

reviews.author: Clyde Fowler
reviews.text:
We chose Plumbers of Greenville because of their name.  It communicates confidence.  And these fellows have the right to be confident.  I am recommending Plumbers of Greenville to everyone that wants to remodel their bathroom.  They excel in every aspect of the project.  Scheduling, finishing on time, quality of work,  quality of their subcontractor's work, and experienced suggestions was excellent.  They clearly defined when we were responsible to select  our fixtures, tile, and glass.  We have never experienced this level of professionalism with a contractor.  We offer this recommendation with no hesitation.
Clyde and Debbie Fowler

reviews.author: Francisco Reyes
reviews.text: In the process of selling our home, an inspector came out to look at our home and stated our guest bathroom had some issues. When we called Plumbers of GV, they were quick to come out take a look at the problem. Thanks to his actual knowledge and experience, Ross was able to make an accurate diagnose, and found that there was no actual issue at all with the bathroom. He was able to save us some money, definitely recommend using them!

reviews.author: Alejandro Rios
reviews.text: Pablo and Ross were very professional in planning and executing my project in a professional and technical manner. They are the best contractors I have worked with in many years. reviews.author: Ellen Thermos
reviews.text: We had one toilet that we could not clear. They fit us in the very day we called. It was an easy fix and the plumber they sent out was very professional. We were grateful for the fast service. We know many happy customers that also use Rieck Plumbing.

reviews.author: Nikki Palonen
reviews.text: Joey Leiting, Ray and Santana were extremely helpful w/ fixing my plumbing issue (in the Willows) I had a leaking pipe going thru my hvac duct under my house and they rerouted n replace my pipes etc and were super clear, professional and explained and showed pics of everything they did step by step. Extremely fair price to fix everything I was surprised tbh, other plumbers or services alike would try take advantage of me being a deaf widowed mom. I will only go through WM Rieck for any plumbing service and recommend them to everyone!  Thank you guys VERY VERY much.

reviews.author: Mk Green.
reviews.text: Competent and professional. I had another leak in the 1 inch copper service inside the wall of my garage. Called the office and was immediately scheduled a service call for the same day. The plumber Freddie arrived on time and quickly got to work. The work done was better than I expected and the charge was within my expectation. Much Thanks!

reviews.author: Sam Razo
reviews.text:
This is a locally owned family business. Joey, one of the owners, was very friendly and easy to talk to. They are competitively priced. In fact, when talking to the owner, you don't feel like they're trying to nickel and dime you out of your money. On several occasions, to my surprise, Joey talked me out of unnecessary repairs, even though it would have meant more money for their business.

We had the sewer lines and supply lines replaced and re-piped. This is a big labor intensive job. I called around to four other plumbing companies for estimates and Rieck Plumbing offered the best prices, by far. Shockingly, most plumbing businesses won't be bothered to do this kind of work because there's more money to be made doing simple service calls and less hassle.

To be critical, I would have to include that Rieck Plumbing's biggest weakness would have to be poor communication. This project would take several weeks. On many occasions, I didn't know if I should expect plumbers to show up that day or not because one of the phases had been completed. Also, we were never given an option to choose between copper and PEX pipes. It was assumed that we wanted PEX because we showed concern over the overall cost. You will need to be proactive in asking questions, getting clarification, and letting them know what your preferences are. The good thing is, their staff is more than happy to answer questions and they don't make you feel like you are burdening them with your inquiries. Also, I wish they would have installed the PEX lines more thoughtfully . Perhaps higher up where they would be out of the way for future projects that involve accessing my attic.

It's worth mentioning, that the plumbers working in my house, Nick and Jose, were completely professional and trustworthy. They weren't snooping around the house or taking things that didn't belong to them. *Cough* Oliveira's *Cough*

Overall, I would recommend Rieck Plumbing. They are competent, hard working plumbers. They're reasonably priced. Over the years, I've used many different local plumbers.

reviews.author: Sarah Pauley
reviews.text: Our family recently needed our water heater (and some gas line) replaced, and we received amazing customer service from  WM Rieck Plumbing. From the initial call to inquire about a quote, to the detailed quote after they checked out the property, and during the skilled plumbing work to replace the water heater and gas line (and a few other pipes/fixtures), we were shown amazing professionalism, kindness (I had some wild kids running around and asking our plumber questions), and top-notch skill & know-how. I would absolutely hire them again for any future plumbing needs.

plumbers.name: Hartwig Mechanical
plumbers.address: 20800 E Brink St, Harvard, IL 60033, USA

reviews.author: josh rowe
reviews.text:
Hopefully you do better work than your team drives.  Plate number 3750157 thinks he’s in a race van.   Not a very good impression for a business.

After going through the other reviews I just had to edit.  Do you actually verify drivers licenses??

reviews.author: Brittny Jablonski
reviews.text: One of your drivers just straight up ran a red light in downtown west Dundee just now. And then when I passed him I saw he was on his phone. Please tell your drivers to be safe, as some of us have precious cargo (kids) in our vehicles.

reviews.author: Joe Joe The Circus Clown
reviews.text:
If your company’s work is anything like the behavior of your drivers, I wouldn’t trust you to paint a fence, let alone handle a professional job.
Absolutely disgraceful that someone representing your business drives like a maniac, tailgating and endangering others on the road. A quick look at your reviews shows years of the same complaints so clearly this isn’t an isolated issue, it’s a company problem.
Either you condone this reckless behavior, or your drivers are out of control. Either way, it’s unsafe, unprofessional, and unacceptable. If your team is in that much of a rush, maybe they should sign up for DoorDash instead.
Do better, though based on your track record, I won’t be holding my breath.

reviews.author: Kelly Plath
reviews.text: I had a pipe burst in my basement and was given the recommendation to call Hartwig to help. Not only did they respond with a tech at my house within an hour, but he did the work so quickly and clean. He was very kind and helpful. They made a very stressful situation feel calm and easy. I'm grateful for their work.

reviews.author: Abstrakt Marketing
reviews.text: We love partnering with the Hartwig team! They are so easy to work with - always great communicators and very informative.

The crew was very clean, professional, and respectful, which we truly appreciated. They took the time to explain the process, were understanding of our concerns, and handled everything responsibly. The work was completed efficiently and with great attention to detail. We’re extremely happy with the service and would absolutely recommend them to anyone in need of reliable plumbing work.

reviews.author: Carla Craig
reviews.text: If you’re looking for a trustworthy plumbing company, call Premier Plumbing Solutions. They repaired our toilet and fixed low water pressure issues we’d been dealing with for months. Great customer service and very reasonable pricing.

reviews.author: Kaleb Rankin
reviews.text: Had a sudden plumbing emergency late at night and Premier Plumbing Solutions came through fast. The plumber was professional, explained everything clearly, and fixed the issue on the first visit. Fair pricing and excellent service. Highly recommend this plumbing company!

reviews.text: Premier Plumbing Solutions is hands down the best plumber I’ve worked with. They handled our clogged drain quickly and left the area spotless. Honest, reliable, and knowledgeable — exactly what you want in a local plumbing service.

reviews.author: Aiden Saunders
reviews.text: From the first phone call to the final repair, everything was smooth. Premier Plumbing Solutions replaced our leaking water heater and walked us through all our options. No pressure, just quality plumbing work done right.

reviews.author: Steve SanSoucie
reviews.text: I had such a great experience with MF Mitchell Plumbing! He replaced my bathroom faucet and did an awesome job — everything looks perfect and works great. He was super friendly, professional, and let me know when he would be showing up.  The best part was his fair pricing — I didn’t feel ripped off like I have with the big plumbing companies that charge a small fortune. You can tell he really takes pride in his work and cares about doing right by his customers. I’m so glad I found him and will definitely call him again for any future plumbing needs. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Essentially Esther
reviews.text: My kitchen sink started leaking randomly one day and a good friend of mine recommended Mitch who also did work for him and his family, very well from what how he described it. Mitch came that same day I called him and fixed the problem, such great service. He's so nice and kind and such a pleasure to work with. Then the next month sadly my boiler broke and I did not have any heat or hot water for weeks, it was a very hard time for me. It was an old brand and the parts weren't common and were available overseas so it wouldn't benefit me to fix it so I decided to just replace the whole system. I called Mitch and he and his team replaced everything with a Navien system and I was so pleased and satisfied with all their hard work. He actually finished the installation coincidentally on my birthday so that was nice. I included a picture of the finished product showcasing his high quality of work. I would highly recommend MF Mitch Plumbing to anyone looking for any and all HVAC services. He is definitely someone I will always reach out to for future work because of the amazing quality of work and professionalism he provided me.

reviews.author: Anne Kisiel
reviews.text: We cannot say enough good about Mitchell Plumbing!  We called late Thursday afternoon after hours, as our water tank burst a leak, and we had been working with our heating company for 2 days between a service call and a “sales” call to get a quote for a new tank.  Mitch called us back literally less than one minute after we left a message, and asked us to forward pictures of the tank .. half hour later he came back with a quote $1,000 LESS than our own heating co with whom we have a service contract and with whom we have been doing business for well over 10 years!   He made arrangements to order the tank first thing in the AM… then he and his helper showed up and expertly did the installation!   All quite amazing response considering we never used this company before!   He took care of us promptly and professionally on a Friday afternoon!   Definitely keeping his card for future needs!  HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!

reviews.author: Robert Levin
reviews.text: Hi Everyone - I hardly ever sit down and write a review, either pro or con.  I will be brief then.    His name is Bobby.  This plumber was absolutely terrific, from start to finish.  I live in a fairly large garden-style condo complex, and should I need work done, it must always be by a licensed professional.  Bobby helped me with the installation of a hot water heater, a toilet, and a dishwasher.  Every detail in each process was done with great care.  It took a while for each installation - but he made sure everything was perfect.  Time and effort, very well spent. Honest, and exceptionally fair priced too.  Thank You Bobby - for everything.

reviews.author: Karina Herrera
reviews.text:
Bobby did an excellent job, and Mitch was more than fair with the pricing. Not only he made sure to stay within my budget, but after the job was completed he waited for payment until I had the funds. No one has ever done that for me. He understood the situation that I was going through, and for that I’m more than grateful.
Thank you Mitch for a job well done, your kindness, and empathy.

plumbers.name: Drainmaster Sewer & Plumbing LLC
plumbers.address: 1302 Raymond St, South Elgin, IL 60177, USA

reviews.author: Rachael Ivanovic
reviews.text:
Stop searching and hire The Tim’s. 100/5 stars. If you need someone who is honest, does great work, is extremely knowledgeable, goes above and beyond AND has fair pricing, you found them.

We are SO lucky we found them. Our situation sucked but it could have been way worse (and frankly, 5x the cost). They communicated at every stage of the project, explained what was going on and what to expect and prepare for. They worked in single digit weather, early mornings/weekend/late nights, did everything possible to limit the cost, and really went the extra mile to complete the job although they had to move their schedule around.

We had a leak in a pipe in the yard. It became urgent when we started to get water in the basement. They moved their schedule around, got the permits, rented the equipment, etc in the matter of about a day. Most people would have told us “oh well you’ll have to wait”, but the Tims CARE and that’s the difference. When they identified another issue, they already had the plan of attack in motion. Although they told us it was most likely impossible, they worked literal magic so that we didn’t have to replace concrete that was poured this past year, saving us a lot of money, stress, and time. Overall, they did EVERYTHING they could to take care of us and our situation, and made a really stressful situation as pain free as possible. I cannot even begin to express how grateful I am.

reviews.author: Mark Whipple
reviews.text:
Drain Masters was recommended to me by two friends at the gym for what I thought was a plugged toilet drain line.  They came by within a day of my call, diagnosed the problem at no charge, and told me I could fix it myself, or have them repair the issue at what I thought was a pretty reasonable price.

I elected to do it myself to save the money as it was a pretty simple fix.  They were honest and comfortable to deal with.  I will definitely be calling these guys again for any plumbing issues I have.

reviews.author: Cheri Patrick
reviews.text: This is the second time we’ve used drain master to route our Floor drain by washer/dryer prevent back ups! I would highly recommend them to anyone in the area who Have plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Zoe Cornelius
reviews.text: The bathroom shower head sprayed unevenly and weakly. I called their plumbing experts for assistance. They inspected the fixture and found mineral deposits inside. Once cleaned, water sprayed evenly again. Very pleased with the fix.

reviews.author: Conrad Bradley

reviews.author: Christian Wood
reviews.text: The bathroom tap leaked constantly and caused stains around the sink. Worn fixtures were replaced to fix the leak. The faucet now shuts off properly. The area was left clean.

reviews.text: Jason is a great professional.  He is clean, thorough and used quality materials in order to install our whole home Kind Water filtration system.  I would highly recommend his services.  Thank you Jason!

reviews.author: Krystyna
reviews.text: I had a sewer backup. I called a few different companies. I chose Metro because I felt like the plumber responded to me respectfully and took my issue seriously. All my questions (I had many) were patiently answered and explained and the work was completed without destruction to my property. I recommend Metro to everyone!

He had it done by dinner and at a very reasonable cost.
Thank you Metro plumbing for your promptness and for the professional tech you sent out.

reviews.text: I’ve had a great experience with this plumbing company — they’ve worked on all of my rental properties and have always been reliable, professional, and efficient. My husband and I own a hosting company and have trusted All Star Plumbing with the properties we manage, and we couldn’t be happier with their service. The reliability they provide gives us true peace of mind knowing every job will be handled correctly and professionally.

Their in-depth knowledge and attention to detail truly set them apart. The owner is caring, honest, and extremely professional, and we never feel taken advantage of, something that is very important to us as business owners.

It’s clear they love their community, and that shows through their integrity and quality of work. We highly recommend All Star Plumbing for all plumbing needs in Abilene and the surrounding areas to anyone looking for dependable, trustworthy, and skilled plumbing services!

reviews.author: merhawi temnewo
reviews.text:
I’m not a plumbing expert, but I trusted AllSTAR Plumbing to fix my issue as promised. They gave me a quote and assured me the house would be fully usable. Unfortunately, I was disappointed with the outcome. After hiring a different professional plumber, I was told that AllSTAR’s work had actually worsened the plumbing issue and improper materials were used. In the end, the work did not meet the professional standard I expected.

A few days after I posted the review above, the owner called me and demanded that I take it down, threatening to sue me if I didn’t. I was shocked by the call. During the conversation, he used profanity and made offensive remarks about my background, including calling me a foreigner and saying I didn’t know what I was talking about.

I found this behavior completely unacceptable and unprofessional. I am a proud American, and no customer should ever be spoken to this way. The call was recorded. If anything, I have clear documentation of harassment and intimidation. What a shameful way to treat a customer.

reviews.author: Candace Kennemer
reviews.text: Mason and Trevor were professional, helpful, and friendly!  They made me comfortable as they expertly repaired my outdoor faucet.  Thank you Jay and Crystal for sending the best!

reviews.text: Jimmy and his associate were very helpful and got the job done quick and efficiently. Would recommend to anyone for plumbing needs. They were able to get people over in a timely manner and they were great about explaining and getting the problem solved quickly. Thank you for the great work would use them again.

reviews.author: kim paridon
reviews.text: I had a clogged toilet and called this morning since it is my only one. Cathy called right back and a service technician was at my house within 15 min. He was there about 10 minutes and I'm back in business!

reviews.author: K Kalman
reviews.text: Very responsive.  Not thrilled with them entering my house and walking on my light beige carpet WITHOUT booties and ruiing my carpet.  Plumber was quick and efficient and patient in explaining the problem and remedies.  His assistant...not so much.  And look what he did to my carpet....yes that BLACK streak.

reviews.author: Dawn Nagy
reviews.text: Hands down best plumber in Wadsworth!  Professional, experienced and very fair pricing.  They just replaced all our PVC with PEX and I was pleased they used a brand that was white instead of the red/blue.  Love supporting local businesses and this one is a gem!  Respectful and treated us the way a good neighbor should.

reviews.author: G Moore
reviews.text: I purchased my home 5 years ago in Wadsworth. I have used Cathy Geary Plumbing to install a waterline to my fridge, gas line in my home, and other misc plumbing fixes around the house. The work is ALWAYS quality, done well and so far never leaks. Jimmy one of her workers is also very courteous, punctual, helpful, willing to answer questions, explain things, and even will fix things you have called them for in a manner that will address other issues that he see's coming if it impacts the work he is already doing. i.e., he was fixing a leak for me and saw two more about to happen that were in line with what he was fixing, so he adjusted his initial plan to make sure those were addressed as well (AND WITH NO ADDITIONAL CHARGE).. I did Construction myself for 15 years and Cathy and her team have always been some of the hard-to-find honest hard working folks out there. Plumbing was never my forte and Cathy is my go-to when I need plumbing done. Thank you, Cathy and Team, for always doing me right! I have seen some negative reviews on here and my guess is everyone had a bad day now and again, but the reviews I have seen have not been my experience and if they ever were or are I will share, but Cathy and her whole team have bent over backwards and always came through for me even in a pinch...

plumbers.name: TMK Plumber Austin
plumbers.address: 610 E Wells Branch Pkwy #17207, Pflugerville, TX 78660, USA

reviews.author: Jose Vera
reviews.text: Incredible service, fast and affordable. They diagnosed my plumbing issue and gave me a quote in 30 minutes. The next day they were punctual with all the necessary parts to replace the Pressure Released Valve. Recommended

reviews.author: Jeovanny Guerra
reviews.text: They did a repipe work for my house in Austin. This is a rental and the tenant called me to inform me the city sent a notification of a potential water leak due to a sudden increase in the water bill. I had them come over to find the water leak and after founding a slab leak they gave me the best quote out of 3 other plumbing companies in the area. They did an excellent job and will have their contact ready to call them for any other plumbing need

reviews.author: Volvo Tzadik
reviews.text: They came to help me with my plumbing problem. It was late at night and only they answered the phone. Great service and great people to work with. I recommend them.

reviews.author: Dylan Alejandro Pacheco
reviews.text: They gave me a quote for a water repair but it was not worth repair instead we decided to replace it. We got a 50-gallon gas Rheem water heater. They replaced all the supply lines and installed an expansion tank. I'm very pleased with their job at my house

reviews.author: yosely ovalles
reviews.text: They were very professional and prompt. My tankless water heater was installed properly and they hauled off the old unit. Now I'm getting hot water on demand for all my family. I should've made the change a long time ago. Anyways I recommend them and I will use them again

plumbers.name: Oakland Plumbing Experts
plumbers.address: 957 Jackson St, Oakland, CA 94607, USA

reviews.author: Elisha Peter
reviews.text: I had a stubborn clog in my main drain that multiple services had failed to fix. This team came highly recommended, and they did not disappoint. The technician was knowledgeable and used the right equipment to clear everything thoroughly. He explained each step and ensured the job was done perfectly. Very professional and polite. My drains have been running smoothly ever since. Highly recommend their service!

reviews.author: Ethen Ronald
reviews.text: I reached out about a water heater issue and received a clear estimate right away. The team arrived as promised, got started without delay, and finished the job efficiently. The final cost matched what was discussed upfront, which I really appreciated.

reviews.author: Juliet Scott
reviews.text: From the initial visit through completion, everything went smoothly. The plumber addressed a complicated issue efficiently without unnecessary upselling, and the pricing felt fair. It’s rare to find service that’s both dependable and transparent. I wouldn’t hesitate to reach out again for future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Lane Eileen
reviews.text: The technician was very thorough during the inspection and took the time to be helpful throughout the visit. They explained different improvement options clearly and made sure everything was in good shape before heading out. Overall, it was a reassuring and professional experience.

reviews.author: Jaelyn Maryjane
reviews.text: The plumber provided fast and effective service. He diagnosed the issue quickly and fixed it without any complications. His professionalism made the entire process easy. I’m very happy with the results.

plumbers.name: Watson's Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 110 Bouzarth Ln, Aberdeen, MD 21001, USA

reviews.author: Will Nagle
reviews.text: I've used Watson's since purchasing my house about 5 years ago for various plumbing needs, due to poor workmanship from previous owner. They can always make it out relatively fast within a day or two of calling, and have always arrived in the time window provided. Scott and Justin have both been great to work with. Only complaints I see on here are the prices from my research they are on the high end. However, being punctual, doing fast, quality work with explanations and tips on how to keep things running smoothly can account for that. I have no complaints with Watson's so far.

reviews.author: Dave Bohola
reviews.text:
Had this outfit hook up my washing machine and dryer  It started to leak over the washer so I called them.  The same came in and said it was an appliance issue with the dish washer
A few days later, we traced it to the upstairs showers and NOT the dish washer.  This guy as far as I'm concerned was lazy and didn't want to do the work. They charged me $128 dollars to find a league they didn't look for.  I will never call them again.

reviews.author: Ray Church
reviews.text: This is my first review for them, but I have hired Watson's multiple times for various jobs over the years. When i lived in Conowingo many years ago and now in Bel Air a few times. I just had them come out again this past week to replace some shower piping for me. I have never been disappointed. They do quality work and know they know their stuff. I know the job will be done right with them!

reviews.author: Joanne Merrill
reviews.text: I called Watson's late in the day on Monday and Scott arrived on time first thing on Tuesday. He was able to identify the issue and resolve my leaking exterior faucet quickly. While looking for the exterior water shut off valve, he noticed my hot water heater had condensation around the exhaust pipe. He showed me how fumes could be leaking and reset and tightened the clamps around the exhaust pipe. Could have leaked carbon monoxide. What a great feeling I was left with . Called about one problem and two were resolved. Thank you Watson's! What great Service! Five Stars all he way!

reviews.author: Kristine Reinhardt
reviews.text: We are so happy we found Watson's!!  The plumber that came to install our new water system was fantastic.  We were so comfortable with Scott.  He explained everything well, was very neat, protected our carpet, showed us how everything worked. And very important to me, he labeled everything!   It was just an overall wonderful experience. We've wanted to do this for a couple years.  Priced it here and there with a several companies, but in the end, not only did we choose Watson's for the great price, it really was for Scott.  Finding contractors to work in your home that you trust can be very difficult - Scott is a wonderful young man.  And my price quoted what I paid. Thank you.

plumbers.name: Longevity Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 3908 Neptune Ave, Lompoc, CA 93436, USA

reviews.author: Rizza Burke
reviews.text: I was amazed how quickly Javet from Longevity Plumbing Services responded to my distress call. We had a water leak, in our main line from the city, and it was leaking 45 gallons an hour. Javet did not delay, and he immediately helped us. He even gave me some tips and advice which was greatly appreciated since I know nothing about plumbing. I will definitely be calling Longevity Plumbing Services again for any of our future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Thor Manson
reviews.text: Yesterday owner Javet Long from Longevity Plumbing in Vandenberg Village was at our house to replace a corroded and non- functioning water, ( shut off ) valve on our water line.  Not a huge job, but Javet was very efficient in getting the job done promptly, and at a reasonable price.  Javet is very personable, and easy to communicate with.  Highly recomended.

reviews.author: Amy Keck
reviews.text: Javet is the best! ! First time customer here and wow, I’m impressed. We had a water leak that he quickly repaired on a Sunday.
